# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## What This Repo Is

**Data Foundry demo** — a non-functional, visually realistic walkthrough for M&A professionals. Static React app with pre-populated data from two fictional companies (Meridian Software Group and Summit Orthopedics Group). No backend, no real data processing.

The full product spec lives in `design_docs/ux_ui_report.md`. See `design_docs/sequencing.md` for how the demo relates to the product. See `docs/demos_rundown.md` for a detailed technical summary of what each screen showcases.

## Commands

```bash
npm install
npm run dev          # dev server (Vite, defaults to port 5173)
npm run build        # tsc -b && vite build (type-check + bundle)
npm run lint         # eslint
npm run preview      # serve production build locally
```

No test framework is configured. Validation is build-time: `src/data/validate.ts` checks annotation counts at module load, and `src/scenarios/summit-ortho/hold-period/validate-thread.ts` runs cross-fixture denial rate assertions as a side-effect import. Always run `npm run build` after changing annotation data, constants, or hold-period fixture files.

## Stack

Vite 7 + React 19 + TypeScript 5.9 + Tailwind CSS 4. Key libraries: React Router 7 (routing), Zustand 5 (state, with `persist` middleware for scenario selection), ReactFlow 11 (graph diagrams), Recharts 3 (charts), TanStack Table 8 (data tables), dagre (graph layout), lucide-react (icons).

## Architecture

### Multi-Scenario System

The app supports multiple demo scenarios through `ScenarioContext`. Each scenario implements the `ScenarioData` interface (`src/scenarios/types.ts`) which defines every piece of data any screen can consume.

**Registration flow:** `src/main.tsx` imports each scenario and calls `registerScenario(id, data)`. The `ScenarioProvider` in `App.tsx` reads the active scenario ID from `scenarioStore` and provides the corresponding `ScenarioData` via React context. All screens call `useScenario()` to get data — no screen has conditional logic for specific scenarios.

**Current scenarios:**
- `meridian` — B2B SaaS company, 9 systems (ERPs, CRMs, billing), $203M ARR. Data lives in `src/data/` (legacy location) and is assembled in `src/scenarios/meridian.ts`.
- `summit-ortho` — PE-backed orthopedic platform, 12 systems (EHRs, billing/RCM, GLs, CRM, payroll), $78M net collections. Data lives in `src/scenarios/summit-ortho/` with its own `_constants.ts` and data files. Includes hold-period modules.

**Adding a new scenario:** Create a data directory, implement `ScenarioData`, call `registerScenario()` in `main.tsx`. No screen code changes needed.

**URL parameters:** `?demo=meridian` or `?demo=summit-ortho` selects scenario on load. `?scenario=fresh|sell-side-complete|pre-merge|post-close|vcp-in-progress|ai-ready` loads a store snapshot for jumping to a specific demo state. Hold-period snapshots (`post-close`, `vcp-in-progress`, `ai-ready`) are only defined for Summit Ortho.

### Routing & Screens

Three persona entry points with linear screen flows:
- `/sell-side/problem` → Problem screen (dark-mode intro)
- `/sell-side/1..6` → S1 through S6 (6 screens)
- `/buy-side/1..4` → B1 through B4 (4 screens)
- `/hold-period/i-0` → Integration problem screen (dark-mode intro)
- `/hold-period/i-1..i-3` → Integration screens (MultiEntityIngestion, SchemaHarmonization, KPIReconciliation)
- `/hold-period/v-0` → VCP problem screen (dark-mode intro)
- `/hold-period/v-1..v-4` → Value Creation screens (TuckInOnboarding, DriftDetection, PortfolioView, DataRoomGeneration)
- `/hold-period/a-0` → AI problem screen (dark-mode intro)
- `/hold-period/a-1..a-3` → Enterprise AI screens (QueryComparison, FeatureAssembly, FeedbackLoop)
- `/` → Landing page with scenario + persona selection
- `/__dev` → Component harness (dev only)

Each screen is in `src/screens/sell-side/`, `src/screens/buy-side/`, or `src/screens/hold-period/`. Layouts (`SellSideLayout`, `BuySideLayout`, `HoldPeriodLayout`) wrap screens with `AppShell` (TopBar + Sidebar + Outlet). Hold-period uses alphanumeric URL segments (i-1, v-2, a-3) with `useHoldPeriodNavigation` hook for navigation.

### Data Layer — The Single Source of Truth Pattern

Each scenario has a `_constants.ts` file as its central authority. Every number that appears on multiple screens (financial values, annotation counts, entity counts, system IDs, concept IDs) is defined there exactly once. All other data files import from constants.

**Meridian constants:** `src/data/_constants.ts` — ARR_VALUES, ANNOTATION_COUNTS (342 total), ENTITY_COUNTS, CONCENTRATION (Apex Medical 7.8% → 11.2%, threshold 10%), SCHEMA_STATS (9 systems, 127 tables, 47,832 fields).

**Summit Ortho constants:** `src/scenarios/summit-ortho/_constants.ts` — REVENUE_VALUES (billing/payment/GL), ANNOTATION_COUNTS (380 total), ENTITY_COUNTS, CONCENTRATION (UHC 22% → 34%, threshold 30%), SCHEMA_STATS (12 systems, 94 tables, 31,847 fields).

**Summit Ortho hold-period constants:** `src/scenarios/summit-ortho/hold-period/_constants.ts` — ACQUIRER (Alpine Health Partners, 10 systems, $132M), COMBINED (22 systems, 58K fields, $210M), VCP_TARGETS ($28M EBITDA, 12 initiatives, 24 KPIs), AI_APPS (3 apps, $7.5M impact), INTEGRATION (16 checklist items, 22 migrations), DENIAL_RATE_THREAD (single source of truth for all denial rate values across all fixtures), FRONT_RANGE (tuck-in entity constants), ANNOTATION_VELOCITY (improving auto-accept rates).

Data files are static fixtures, not fetched. They export typed arrays/objects consumed by screens via `useScenario()`.

**Hold-period data:** `src/scenarios/summit-ortho/hold-period/` contains data fixtures for 12 hold-period screens (3 problem + 3 integration + 4 VCP + 3 AI). Fixture files: `acquirer.ts` (Alpine Health Partners), `integration.ts` (ingestion, schema conflicts, sankey flows, KPI reconciliations), `vcp.ts` (KPIs, EBITDA bridge, tuck-in entity, drift event, portfolio heatmap, data room), `ai.ts` (query results, ML features, training dataset, prediction routing), `problem-screens.ts` (pain stat configs). The `holdPeriod` field on `ScenarioData` is null for Meridian (no hold-period module) and populated for Summit Ortho. Screens guard with `if (!scenario.holdPeriod) return <Navigate to="/" />`.

**Denial Rate Thread:** A single numerical thread (denial rate) flows through S4 → I-3 → V-1 → V-2 → V-3 → A-1 → A-2 → A-3, demonstrating data continuity across the entire hold-period. All values come from `DENIAL_RATE_THREAD` in `_constants.ts`. `validate-thread.ts` runs cross-fixture assertions at build time (imported as a side-effect from `hold-period/index.ts`). KPI ID for denial rate is `kpi-denial-rate` across all fixture files — do not use `kpi-ops-01` or other aliases.

### Annotation Count Constraints

Annotation files have strict bucket totals enforced at build time. Buckets must sum to total:
- Meridian: 287 auto-accepted + 34 high + 14 medium + 7 low = 342
- Summit: 319 auto-accepted + 38 high + 16 medium + 7 low = 380

When adding/removing hand-written annotations, adjust generated counts to compensate.

### System-to-Concept Mapping

Not every system has every concept. `SYSTEM_CONCEPT_POOLS` in each scenario's `annotations.ts` enforces realistic constraints:

**Meridian:**
- ERPs (NetSuite, QuickBooks, SAP): revenue recognized/billed, customer. No contracts, no booked revenue.
- CRMs (Salesforce Org 1 & 2, HubSpot): revenue booked, customer, contracts. No billed/recognized revenue.
- Billing (Zuora, Stripe, Chargebee): revenue billed, customer, contracts. Zuora also gets recognized revenue.

**Summit Ortho:**
- EHRs (athenahealth, eClinicalWorks, NextGen, Modernizing Medicine): patient, provider, encounter, diagnosis, procedure.
- Billing/RCM (Kareo, AdvancedMD, Waystar): claim, payment, denial, payer.
- GL (QuickBooks Online, Sage Intacct, Excel): GL revenue, GL expense.

### State Management

Zustand stores in `src/store/` track demo interactions (not persistent data):
- `scenarioStore` — active scenario ID, persisted to `sessionStorage` via Zustand `persist` middleware so page refresh stays on the correct scenario
- `annotationStore` — bulk-accept state for S2
- `entityStore` — entity merge interaction for S3
- `driftStore` — drift acceptance for S6
- `navigationStore` — screen navigation
- `processingStore` — processing overlay state
- `integrationStore` — hold-period integration state: ingestion phase, system annotation progress, conflicts resolved, KPIs reconciled, cascade animation phase
- `vcpStore` — hold-period VCP state: tuck-in onboarding phase, drift resolution phase, data room generation phase
- `aiStore` — hold-period AI state: query execution phase, dataset assembly phase/records, prediction routing phase, active system tab

`resetAllStores()` in `resetDemo.ts` resets all stores. Triggered by Ctrl+Shift+R globally.

### Component Organization

`src/components/` organized by role:
- `layout/` — AppShell, TopBar, Sidebar, ScreenContainer
- `data-display/` — DataTable, FinancialTable, MetricCard, ReconciliationRow, WaterfallChart, CohortTable, GanttChart
- `feedback/` — ConfidenceBadge, StatusBadge, ProgressBar, ProcessingOverlay, DealTimer, TimeComparisonBadge
- `interactive/` — BulkAcceptButton, DrillDownPanel, ToggleTabs, EntityMergeCard, DiffView, LineagePopover
- `visualization/` — TopologyGraph, OntologyDiagram, LineageDAG, LineageFullView, ConcentrationChart

### Key Design Principles

1. **Confidence-forward** — Every automated output shows High/Medium/Low confidence with provenance
2. **Progressive disclosure** — Dashboard (5s scan) → Detail view → Deep dive (full lineage)
3. **Two audiences, one truth** — Same data, persona-adapted views
4. **Time-aware** — 60–90 day exclusivity clock drives all workflows

## Scripts

```bash
npx tsx scripts/validate-data.ts    # standalone Meridian data validation (annotation counts, financials)
npx tsx scripts/test-formatters.ts  # unit tests for currency/percentage/number formatters
```

## Design Docs

| Document | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `design_docs/code_architecture.md` | Complete architecture reference and build-from-scratch blueprint |
| `design_docs/meridian_data_bible.md` | Single source of truth for Meridian demo data/numbers |
| `design_docs/healthcare_demo_memo.md` | Screen-by-screen spec for Summit Ortho with interaction details |
| `design_docs/demo_scenarios_guide.md` | Guide to demo scenarios and URL parameter usage |
| `design_docs/demo_video_scripts.md` | Scripts for demo video recordings |
| `design_docs/pipeline_comparison_ux_report.md` | UX comparison of data pipeline approaches |
| `design_docs/pain_points_report_data_room.md` | M&A data room pain points driving product design |
| `design_docs/pain_points_report_post-acquisition.md` | Post-acquisition integration pain points |
| `design_docs/NAV_data_migration_report.md` | NAV data migration research |
| `design_docs/NAV_data_migration_demo_memo.md` | NAV data migration demo spec |
| `design_docs/NAV_data_migration_demo_script.md` | Screen-by-screen interaction script for NAV migration scenario |
| `design_docs/NAV_data_migration_implementation_plan.md` | Implementation plan for NAV migration scenario |
| `design_docs/NAV_demo_presentation_script.md` | Click-by-click presentation script with talk tracks and recovery notes |
| `design_docs/sequencing.md` | Build order, ontology architecture, tech decisions |
| `design_docs/ux_ui_report.md` | Full product spec |
| `docs/demos_rundown.md` | Technical summary of what each screen showcases |
| `docs/healthcare_demo_script.md` | 2-minute demo script for Summit Ortho scenario |
| `docs/sell_side_demo_script.md` | Sell-side demo walkthrough script |
| `docs/demo_overview.md` | High-level demo overview |

## Gotchas

- Annotation build-time assertions will fail if bucket counts don't match `ANNOTATION_COUNTS` in the scenario's `_constants.ts`. Always verify with `npm run build` after changing annotations.
- `SYSTEM_IDS` and `CONCEPT_IDS` in constants files are used across data files. Renaming requires updating all references.
- System `logoUrl` values must use the `'public/logos/...'` prefix (not `/logos/...`). The screen code strips `public/` and prepends `/`, so a leading slash in `logoUrl` produces a broken `//logos/...` URL.
- ReactFlow components (TopologyGraph, LineageDAG) must be wrapped in `ReactFlowProvider`.
- Vite dev server port is not configured in `vite.config.ts` — it defaults to 5173.
- The Meridian scenario data lives in `src/data/` (legacy) while Summit Ortho data lives in `src/scenarios/summit-ortho/`. Both are assembled into `ScenarioData` objects and registered in `main.tsx`.
- Hold-period `validate-thread.ts` runs as a side-effect import and will crash the app at load time if any cross-fixture assertion fails (not just at build time). Check the browser console for `[Denial Rate Thread]` errors.
- The denial rate KPI must use `kpi-denial-rate` as its ID everywhere (KPIS registry, heatmap, reconciliations, validation). Using `kpi-ops-01` or other IDs will break `validate-thread.ts` assertions.
- Hold-period `_constants.ts` imports from parent `summit-ortho/_constants.ts` for data continuity values. This is the one permitted exception to the "data files only import from their own constants" rule.
```

import js from '@eslint/js'
import globals from 'globals'
import reactHooks from 'eslint-plugin-react-hooks'
import reactRefresh from 'eslint-plugin-react-refresh'
import tseslint from 'typescript-eslint'
import { defineConfig, globalIgnores } from 'eslint/config'

export default defineConfig([
  globalIgnores(['dist']),
  {
    files: ['**/*.{ts,tsx}'],
    extends: [
      js.configs.recommended,
      tseslint.configs.recommended,
      reactHooks.configs.flat.recommended,
      reactRefresh.configs.vite,
    ],
    languageOptions: {
      ecmaVersion: 2020,
      globals: globals.browser,
    },
  },
])

{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "tsBuildInfoFile": "./node_modules/.tmp/tsconfig.app.tsbuildinfo",
    "target": "ES2022",
    "useDefineForClassFields": true,
    "lib": ["ES2022", "DOM", "DOM.Iterable"],
    "module": "ESNext",
    "types": ["vite/client"],
    "skipLibCheck": true,

    /* Bundler mode */
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "allowImportingTsExtensions": true,
    "verbatimModuleSyntax": true,
    "moduleDetection": "force",
    "noEmit": true,
    "jsx": "react-jsx",

    /* Linting */
    "strict": true,
    "noUnusedLocals": true,
    "noUnusedParameters": true,
    "erasableSyntaxOnly": true,
    "noFallthroughCasesInSwitch": true,
    "noUncheckedSideEffectImports": true
  },
  "include": ["src"]
}

import { useEffect } from 'react'
import { Routes, Route, Navigate } from 'react-router-dom'
import LandingPage from './screens/LandingPage'
import SellSideLayout from './screens/sell-side/SellSideLayout'
import S1_SystemTopology from './screens/sell-side/S1_SystemTopology'
import S2_OntologyAnnotation from './screens/sell-side/S2_OntologyAnnotation'

import I2_SchemaHarmonization from './screens/hold-period/I2_SchemaHarmonization'
import I3_KPIReconciliation from './screens/hold-period/I3_KPIReconciliation'

import A2_FeatureAssembly from './screens/hold-period/A2_FeatureAssembly'

import N3_PostingChainLineage from './screens/nav-migration/N3_PostingChainLineage'
import N4_TieOutGates from './screens/nav-migration/N4_TieOutGates'
import N5_DimensionReconstruction from './screens/nav-migration/N5_DimensionReconstruction'
import N6_ExceptionsWorkbench from './screens/nav-migration/N6_ExceptionsWorkbench'
import N7_MigrationRoadmap from './screens/nav-migration/N7_MigrationRoadmap'
import ComponentHarness from './screens/__dev/ComponentHarness'
import { resetAllStores } from './store/resetDemo'
import { useScenarioStore } from './store/scenarioStore'
import { ScenarioProvider } from './scenarios/ScenarioContext'

export default function App() {
  const scenarioId = useScenarioStore((s) => s.scenarioId)

  // Global keyboard shortcut: Ctrl+Shift+R resets all stores
  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
      if (e.ctrlKey && e.shiftKey && e.key === 'R') {
        e.preventDefault()
        resetAllStores()
        window.location.href = '/'
      }
    }
    window.addEventListener('keydown', handler)
    return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', handler)
  }, [])

  return (
    <ScenarioProvider scenarioId={scenarioId}>
      <Routes>
        <Route path="/" element={<LandingPage />} />

        <Route path="/sell-side/problem" element={<SellSideProblem />} />
        <Route path="/sell-side" element={<SellSideLayout />}>
          <Route index element={<Navigate to="1" replace />} />
          <Route path="1" element={<S1_SystemTopology />} />
          <Route path="2" element={<S2_OntologyAnnotation />} />
          <Route path="3" element={<S3_EntityResolution />} />
          <Route path="4" element={<S4_ARRReconciliation />} />
          <Route path="5" element={<S5_ExhibitGenerator />} />
          <Route path="6" element={<S6_QuarterlyRefresh />} />
        </Route>

        <Route path="/buy-side" element={<BuySideLayout />}>
          <Route index element={<Navigate to="1" replace />} />
          <Route path="1" element={<B1_ImportTopology />} />
          <Route path="2" element={<B2_MetricReconstruction />} />
          <Route path="3" element={<B3_RiskDashboard />} />
          <Route path="4" element={<B4_IntegrationPlanner />} />
        </Route>

        <Route path="/hold-period/i-0" element={<I0_IntegrationProblem />} />
        <Route path="/hold-period/v-0" element={<V0_VCPProblem />} />
        <Route path="/hold-period/a-0" element={<A0_AIProblem />} />
        <Route path="/hold-period" element={<HoldPeriodLayout />}>
          <Route index element={<Navigate to="i-1" replace />} />
          <Route path="i-1" element={<I1_MultiEntityIngestion />} />
          <Route path="i-2" element={<I2_SchemaHarmonization />} />
          <Route path="i-3" element={<I3_KPIReconciliation />} />
          <Route path="v-1" element={<V1_TuckInOnboarding />} />
          <Route path="v-2" element={<V2_DriftDetection />} />
          <Route path="v-3" element={<V3_PortfolioView />} />
          <Route path="v-4" element={<V4_DataRoomGeneration />} />
          <Route path="a-1" element={<A1_QueryComparison />} />
          <Route path="a-2" element={<A2_FeatureAssembly />} />
          <Route path="a-3" element={<A3_FeedbackLoop />} />
        </Route>

        <Route path="/nav-migration/problem" element={<NavMigrationProblem />} />
        <Route path="/nav-migration" element={<NavMigrationLayout />}>
          <Route index element={<Navigate to="1" replace />} />
          <Route path="1" element={<N1_CompanyInventory />} />
          <Route path="2" element={<N2_RiskHeatmap />} />
          <Route path="3" element={<N3_PostingChainLineage />} />
          <Route path="4" element={<N4_TieOutGates />} />
          <Route path="5" element={<N5_DimensionReconstruction />} />
          <Route path="6" element={<N6_ExceptionsWorkbench />} />
          <Route path="7" element={<N7_MigrationRoadmap />} />
        </Route>

        {import.meta.env.DEV && (
          <Route path="/__dev" element={<ComponentHarness />} />
        )}

        <Route path="*" element={<Navigate to="/" replace />} />
      </Routes>
    </ScenarioProvider>
  )
}
```

src/main.tsx
```
import { StrictMode } from 'react'
import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client'
import { BrowserRouter } from 'react-router-dom'
import { ErrorBoundary } from './components/ErrorBoundary'
import App from './App'
import './styles/globals.css'
import { validateDemoData } from './data/validate'
import { type ScenarioName } from './data/scenarios'
import { useAnnotationStore } from './store/annotationStore'
import { useEntityStore } from './store/entityStore'
import { useDriftStore } from './store/driftStore'
import { useProcessingStore } from './store/processingStore'
import { useScenarioStore } from './store/scenarioStore'
import { useIntegrationStore } from './store/integrationStore'
import { useVCPStore } from './store/vcpStore'
import { useAIStore } from './store/aiStore'

// ── Register scenarios (avoids circular imports) ──
import { registerScenario, getScenario } from './scenarios/ScenarioContext'
import { meridianScenario } from './scenarios/meridian'
import { summitOrthoScenario } from './scenarios/summit-ortho/index'
import { navMigrationScenario } from './scenarios/nav-migration/index'

registerScenario('meridian', meridianScenario)
registerScenario('summit-ortho', summitOrthoScenario)
registerScenario('nav-migration', navMigrationScenario)

// Dev-mode: run data validation on startup
if (import.meta.env.DEV) {
  const errors = validateDemoData()
  if (errors.length > 0) {
    console.warn('[Data Foundry] Data validation errors:')
    errors.forEach((err) => console.warn(`  - ${err}`))
  } else {
    console.info('[Data Foundry] All data validations passed')
  }
}

// Scenario URL parameter: ?scenario=fresh|sell-side-complete|pre-merge
// Also supports ?demo=meridian|summit-ortho to select scenario
const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search)

// Set active scenario from URL if specified
const demoParam = params.get('demo')
if (demoParam === 'meridian' || demoParam === 'summit-ortho' || demoParam === 'nav-migration') {
  useScenarioStore.getState().setScenario(demoParam)
}

const scenarioParam = params.get('scenario') as ScenarioName | null
if (scenarioParam) {
  // Determine which scenario data to use for snapshot loading
  const activeScenarioId = useScenarioStore.getState().scenarioId ?? 'meridian'
  const activeScenario = getScenario(activeScenarioId)
  const snapshots = activeScenario.storeSnapshots
  const snapshot = snapshots[scenarioParam]

  if (snapshot) {
    useAnnotationStore.getState().reset()
    useAnnotationStore.setState({
      acceptedCount: snapshot.annotationStore.acceptedCount,
      totalCount: snapshot.annotationStore.totalCount,
      bulkAccepted: snapshot.annotationStore.bulkAccepted,
      progressPercent: snapshot.annotationStore.progressPercent,
      isProcessing: snapshot.annotationStore.isProcessing,
    })

    useEntityStore.getState().reset()
    useEntityStore.setState({
      rawCount: snapshot.entityStore.rawCount,
      uniqueCount: snapshot.entityStore.uniqueCount,
      mergedEntities: new Set(snapshot.entityStore.mergedEntities),
      topCustomerConcentration: snapshot.entityStore.topCustomerConcentration,
      mergeAnimationPhase: snapshot.entityStore.mergeAnimationPhase,
      isProcessing: snapshot.entityStore.isProcessing,
    })

    useDriftStore.getState().reset()
    useDriftStore.setState({
      driftAbsorbed: snapshot.driftStore.driftAbsorbed,
      reviewPublished: snapshot.driftStore.reviewPublished,
      isProcessing: snapshot.driftStore.isProcessing,
    })

    useProcessingStore.getState().reset()
    useProcessingStore.setState({
      activeOverlay: snapshot.processingStore.activeOverlay,
      ingestionComplete: snapshot.processingStore.ingestionComplete,
      currentStep: snapshot.processingStore.currentStep,
    })

    if (snapshot.integrationStore) {
      useIntegrationStore.getState().reset()
      useIntegrationStore.setState({ ...snapshot.integrationStore })
    }
    if (snapshot.vcpStore) {
      useVCPStore.getState().reset()
      useVCPStore.setState({ ...snapshot.vcpStore })
    }
    if (snapshot.aiStore) {
      useAIStore.getState().reset()
      useAIStore.setState({ ...snapshot.aiStore })
    }

    console.info(`[Data Foundry] Loaded scenario: ${scenarioParam}`)
  }
}

createRoot(document.getElementById('root')!).render(
  <StrictMode>
    <ErrorBoundary>
      <BrowserRouter>
        <App />
      </BrowserRouter>
    </ErrorBoundary>
  </StrictMode>,
)
```

src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx
```
import { Component, type ErrorInfo, type ReactNode } from 'react';

interface Props {
  children: ReactNode;
}

interface State {
  hasError: boolean;
  error: Error | null;
}

export class ErrorBoundary extends Component<Props, State> {
  state: State = { hasError: false, error: null };

  static getDerivedStateFromError(error: Error): State {
    return { hasError: true, error };
  }

  componentDidCatch(error: Error, info: ErrorInfo) {
    console.error('ErrorBoundary caught:', error, info.componentStack);
  }

  render() {
    if (this.state.hasError) {
      const error = this.state.error;
      if (import.meta.env.DEV) {
        return (
          <div style={{ padding: 24, margin: 24, border: '2px solid #DC2626', borderRadius: 8, fontFamily: 'monospace' }}>
            <h2 style={{ color: '#DC2626', marginTop: 0 }}>Render Error</h2>
            <p><strong>{error?.message}</strong></p>
            <pre style={{ fontSize: 12, overflow: 'auto', maxHeight: 300 }}>{error?.stack}</pre>
          </div>
        );
      }
      return (
        <div style={{ padding: 24, textAlign: 'center', fontFamily: 'Inter, sans-serif' }}>
          <p>Something went wrong — press Ctrl+Shift+R to reset.</p>
        </div>
      );
    }
    return this.props.children;
  }
}

// The shared vocabulary for all data files and stores.
// Every number that appears on multiple screens is defined here exactly once.

// ── System IDs (used by annotations, entities, lineage, topology) ──
export const SYSTEM_IDS = {
  NETSUITE_PARENT: 'netsuite-parent',
  QUICKBOOKS: 'quickbooks',
  QUICKBOOKS_AE1: 'quickbooks-ae1',
  QUICKBOOKS_AE2: 'quickbooks-ae2',
  SAP_B1_AE3: 'sapb1-ae3',
  SALESFORCE_ORG1: 'salesforce-org1',
  SALESFORCE_ORG2: 'salesforce-org2',
  HUBSPOT: 'hubspot',
  ZUORA_PARENT: 'zuora-parent',
  STRIPE: 'stripe',
  CHARGEBEE: 'chargebee',
} as const;

  crm: 203_200_000,

  gl: 196_100_000,
  variance: 2_400_000,
} as const;

} as const;

// ── Exhibit names (used by exhibits.ts, entities.ts downstream impacts, buyside) ──

// ── Canonical concept IDs (used by ontology.ts, annotations.ts, lineage.ts, dbt-models) ──

src/data/annotations.ts
```
import type { Annotation, AnnotationStatus, ConfidenceLevel } from '../types/annotation';
import { SYSTEM_IDS, CONCEPT_IDS, ANNOTATION_COUNTS } from './_constants';

// ── Helpers ──

function confidenceLevel(c: number): ConfidenceLevel {
  if (c >= 85) return 'high';
  if (c >= 60) return 'medium';
  return 'low';
}

function makeAnnotation(
  id: string,
  systemId: string,
  tableName: string,
  fieldName: string,
  dataType: string,
  sampleValues: string[],
  mappedConceptId: string,
  mappedConceptLabel: string,
  confidence: number,
  status: AnnotationStatus,
  alternativeMappings: Annotation['alternativeMappings'] = [],
): Annotation {
  return {
    id,
    systemId,
    tableName,
    fieldName,
    dataType,
    sampleValues,
    mappedConceptId,
    mappedConceptLabel,
    confidence,
    confidenceLevel: confidenceLevel(confidence),
    status,
    alternativeMappings,
  };
}

// ── 5 Key Demo Annotations (Screen 2 showcase) ──

const KEY_DEMO_ANNOTATIONS: Annotation[] = [
  makeAnnotation(
    'ann-demo-001', SYSTEM_IDS.NETSUITE_PARENT, 'tranSales', 'amount', 'currency',
    ['14500.00', '8200.50', '31000.00'],
    CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_RECOGNIZED_GROSS, 'Revenue > Recognized > Gross',
    95, 'auto-accepted',
    [{ conceptId: CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_BILLED_GROSS, conceptLabel: 'Revenue > Billed > Gross', confidence: 72 }],
  ),
  makeAnnotation(
    'ann-demo-002', SYSTEM_IDS.ZUORA_PARENT, 'invoice', 'chargeAmount', 'decimal(12,2)',
    ['14500.00', '8200.00', '31000.00'],
    CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_BILLED_GROSS, 'Revenue > Billed > Gross',
    94, 'auto-accepted',
    [{ conceptId: CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_RECOGNIZED_GROSS, conceptLabel: 'Revenue > Recognized > Gross', confidence: 68 }],
  ),
  makeAnnotation(
    'ann-demo-003', SYSTEM_IDS.SALESFORCE_ORG1, 'Opportunity', 'Amount', 'currency',
    ['145000.00', '82000.00', '310000.00'],
    CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_BOOKED_GROSS, 'Revenue > Booked > Gross',
    92, 'auto-accepted',
    [{ conceptId: CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_BILLED_GROSS, conceptLabel: 'Revenue > Billed > Gross', confidence: 61 }],
  ),
  makeAnnotation(
    'ann-demo-004', SYSTEM_IDS.HUBSPOT, 'deals', 'amount', 'number',
    ['52000', '18500', '94000'],
    CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_BOOKED_GROSS, 'Revenue > Booked > Gross',
    87, 'needs-review',
    [
      { conceptId: CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_BILLED_GROSS, conceptLabel: 'Revenue > Billed > Gross', confidence: 64 },
      { conceptId: CONCEPT_IDS.CONTRACT_VALUE, conceptLabel: 'Contract > Value', confidence: 42 },
    ],
  ),
  makeAnnotation(
    'ann-demo-005', SYSTEM_IDS.QUICKBOOKS, 'journal', 'creditAmount', 'decimal(12,2)',
    ['5200.00', '12800.00', '3400.50'],
    CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_RECOGNIZED_GROSS, 'Revenue > Recognized > Gross',
    58, 'flagged',
    [
      { conceptId: CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_BILLED_NET, conceptLabel: 'Revenue > Billed > Net', confidence: 55 },
      { conceptId: CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_BILLED_GROSS, conceptLabel: 'Revenue > Billed > Gross', confidence: 48 },
    ],
  ),
];

// ── 34 High-confidence pending annotations (85-89%, needs-review) ──

const PENDING_HIGH_ANNOTATIONS: Annotation[] = [
  // NetSuite (8)
  makeAnnotation('ann-ph-001', SYSTEM_IDS.NETSUITE_PARENT, 'tranSales', 'entityId', 'integer', ['5012', '5013', '5078'], CONCEPT_IDS.CUSTOMER_ACTIVE, 'Customer > Active', 89, 'needs-review'),
  makeAnnotation('ann-ph-002', SYSTEM_IDS.NETSUITE_PARENT, 'tranSales', 'tranDate', 'date', ['2025-12-01', '2025-12-15', '2026-01-03'], CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_RECOGNIZED_GROSS, 'Revenue > Recognized > Gross', 88, 'needs-review'),

  makeAnnotation('ann-ph-004', SYSTEM_IDS.NETSUITE_PARENT, 'customer', 'email', 'varchar', ['billing@apexmed.com', 'ap@meridian.org', 'finance@brightpath.io'], CONCEPT_IDS.CUSTOMER_CHURNED, 'Customer > Churned', 86, 'needs-review'),
  makeAnnotation('ann-ph-005', SYSTEM_IDS.NETSUITE_PARENT, 'account', 'accountName', 'varchar', ['Software Revenue', 'Professional Services', 'Deferred Revenue'], CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_RECOGNIZED_GROSS, 'Revenue > Recognized > Gross', 85, 'needs-review'),

    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.CUSTOMER_ACTIVE, label: 'Customer > Active' },
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.CUSTOMER_CHURNED, label: 'Customer > Churned' },
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.CONTRACT_TERM, label: 'Contract > Term' },
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.CONTRACT_VALUE, label: 'Contract > Value' },
  ],
  [SYSTEM_IDS.SALESFORCE_ORG2]: [
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_BOOKED_GROSS, label: 'Revenue > Booked > Gross' },
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.CUSTOMER_ACTIVE, label: 'Customer > Active' },
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.CUSTOMER_CHURNED, label: 'Customer > Churned' },
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.CONTRACT_TERM, label: 'Contract > Term' },
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.CONTRACT_VALUE, label: 'Contract > Value' },
  ],
  [SYSTEM_IDS.HUBSPOT]: [
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_BOOKED_GROSS, label: 'Revenue > Booked > Gross' },
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.CUSTOMER_ACTIVE, label: 'Customer > Active' },
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.CUSTOMER_CHURNED, label: 'Customer > Churned' },
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.CONTRACT_TERM, label: 'Contract > Term' },
  ],
  // Billing: billed revenue, customers, contract terms/values; Zuora also has rev recognition
  [SYSTEM_IDS.ZUORA_PARENT]: [
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_BILLED_GROSS, label: 'Revenue > Billed > Gross' },
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_BILLED_NET, label: 'Revenue > Billed > Net' },
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_RECOGNIZED_GROSS, label: 'Revenue > Recognized > Gross' },
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.CUSTOMER_ACTIVE, label: 'Customer > Active' },
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.CONTRACT_TERM, label: 'Contract > Term' },
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.CONTRACT_VALUE, label: 'Contract > Value' },
  ],
  [SYSTEM_IDS.STRIPE]: [
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_BILLED_GROSS, label: 'Revenue > Billed > Gross' },
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.CUSTOMER_ACTIVE, label: 'Customer > Active' },
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.CONTRACT_TERM, label: 'Contract > Term' },
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.CONTRACT_VALUE, label: 'Contract > Value' },
  ],
  [SYSTEM_IDS.CHARGEBEE]: [
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_BILLED_GROSS, label: 'Revenue > Billed > Gross' },
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.CUSTOMER_ACTIVE, label: 'Customer > Active' },
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.CONTRACT_TERM, label: 'Contract > Term' },
    { id: CONCEPT_IDS.CONTRACT_VALUE, label: 'Contract > Value' },
  ],
};

/**
 * Deterministic pseudo-random number generator (mulberry32).
 * Returns a function that yields values in [0, 1).
 */
function mulberry32(seed: number): () => number {
  let s = seed | 0;
  return () => {
    s = (s + 0x6d2b79f5) | 0;
    let t = Math.imul(s ^ (s >>> 15), 1 | s);
    t = (t + Math.imul(t ^ (t >>> 7), 61 | t)) ^ t;
    return ((t ^ (t >>> 14)) >>> 0) / 4294967296;
  };
}

/**
 * Generate placeholder annotations with deterministic, realistic data.
 */
export function generatePlaceholderAnnotations(
  count: number,
  systemId: string,
  status: AnnotationStatus,
  confidenceRange: [number, number],
): Annotation[] {
  const rng = mulberry32(systemId.length * 1000 + count);
  const pool = SYSTEM_FIELD_POOLS[systemId] ?? SYSTEM_FIELD_POOLS[SYSTEM_IDS.NETSUITE_PARENT];
  const conceptPool = SYSTEM_CONCEPT_POOLS[systemId] ?? CONCEPT_POOL;
  const results: Annotation[] = [];

  for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    const fieldEntry = pool[Math.floor(rng() * pool.length)];
    const concept = conceptPool[Math.floor(rng() * conceptPool.length)];
    const [lo, hi] = confidenceRange;
    const confidence = Math.round(lo + rng() * (hi - lo));

    // Alt suggestions can come from any concept (cross-system suggestions are realistic)
    const altConcept = CONCEPT_POOL[Math.floor(rng() * CONCEPT_POOL.length)];
    const altConfidence = Math.max(10, confidence - 15 - Math.floor(rng() * 20));

    results.push({
      id: `ann-gen-${systemId}-${status}-${i.toString().padStart(4, '0')}`,
      systemId,
      tableName: fieldEntry.table,
      fieldName: `${fieldEntry.field}_${i}`,
      dataType: fieldEntry.dataType,
      sampleValues: fieldEntry.samples,
      mappedConceptId: concept.id,
      mappedConceptLabel: concept.label,
      confidence,
      confidenceLevel: confidenceLevel(confidence),
      status,
      alternativeMappings:
        altConcept.id !== concept.id
          ? [{ conceptId: altConcept.id, conceptLabel: altConcept.label, confidence: altConfidence }]
          : [],
    });
  }

  return results;
}

// ── Assembly ──
// Target distribution (from ANNOTATION_COUNTS):
//   auto-accepted:       287
//   needs-review (high): 34    (85-89% confidence)
//   needs-review (med):  14    (60-84% confidence)
//   flagged (low):       7     (<60% confidence)
//   TOTAL:               342
//
// Hand-written counts by bucket:
//   auto-accepted:       3  (demo 1, 2, 3)
//   needs-review (high): 35 (demo-004 + 34 PENDING_HIGH)  → need 34, drop last one
//   needs-review (med):  4  (MEDIUM_CONFIDENCE)            → need 14, generate 10 more
//   flagged (low):       8  (demo-005 + 7 LOW_CONFIDENCE)  → need 7, drop last one
//
// Remaining to generate:
//   auto-accepted:       287 - 3 = 284
//   medium:              14 - 4 = 10

const TRIMMED_PENDING_HIGH = PENDING_HIGH_ANNOTATIONS.slice(0, 33); // 33 + demo-004 = 34
const TRIMMED_LOW = LOW_CONFIDENCE_ANNOTATIONS.slice(0, 6);         // 6 + demo-005 = 7

// Generate 272 auto-accepted across systems (284 - 12 curated = 272)
const AUTO_ACCEPTED_GENERATED = [
  ...generatePlaceholderAnnotations(50, SYSTEM_IDS.NETSUITE_PARENT, 'auto-accepted', [90, 99]),
  ...generatePlaceholderAnnotations(27, SYSTEM_IDS.QUICKBOOKS, 'auto-accepted', [90, 98]),
  ...generatePlaceholderAnnotations(31, SYSTEM_IDS.SAP_B1_AE3, 'auto-accepted', [90, 98]),
  ...generatePlaceholderAnnotations(40, SYSTEM_IDS.SALESFORCE_ORG1, 'auto-accepted', [90, 99]),
  ...generatePlaceholderAnnotations(21, SYSTEM_IDS.SALESFORCE_ORG2, 'auto-accepted', [90, 98]),
  ...generatePlaceholderAnnotations(29, SYSTEM_IDS.HUBSPOT, 'auto-accepted', [90, 97]),
  ...generatePlaceholderAnnotations(34, SYSTEM_IDS.ZUORA_PARENT, 'auto-accepted', [90, 99]),
  ...generatePlaceholderAnnotations(23, SYSTEM_IDS.STRIPE, 'auto-accepted', [90, 98]),
  ...generatePlaceholderAnnotations(17, SYSTEM_IDS.CHARGEBEE, 'auto-accepted', [90, 97]),
]; // = 50+27+31+40+21+29+34+23+17 = 272

// Generate 10 medium needs-review across systems
const MEDIUM_GENERATED = [
  ...generatePlaceholderAnnotations(2, SYSTEM_IDS.NETSUITE_PARENT, 'needs-review', [60, 84]),
  ...generatePlaceholderAnnotations(1, SYSTEM_IDS.QUICKBOOKS, 'needs-review', [60, 84]),
[TRUNCATED]
```

import {
  ARR_VALUES,
  VARIANCE_COMPONENTS,
  CONCENTRATION,
  ENTITY_COUNTS,
} from './_constants';
import type { ReconstructedMetric, VarianceDecomposition, RiskFactor, IntegrationTask } from '../types/buyside';
import type { ExportFile } from '../types/demo';

// ── Metric Reconstruction (Screen B2) ──

export const RECONSTRUCTED_METRICS: ReconstructedMetric[] = [
  {
    name: 'Total ARR',
    sellerReported: ARR_VALUES.billing,       // $198.7M
    independent: 196_300_000,
    delta: -ARR_VALUES.variance,              // -$2.4M
    materiality: 'material',
  },
  {
    name: 'Net Revenue Retention',
    sellerReported: 112,
    independent: 109,
    delta: -3,
    materiality: 'material',
  },
  {
    name: 'Gross Margin',
    sellerReported: 74.2,
    independent: 73.8,
    delta: -0.4,
    materiality: 'immaterial',
  },
  {
    name: 'Customer Count',
    sellerReported: ENTITY_COUNTS.uniqueEntities, // 3,408
    independent: 3_391,
    delta: -17,
    materiality: 'immaterial',
  },
];

// ── Variance Decomposition (Screen B2 drill-down) ──

export const VARIANCE_DECOMPOSITION: VarianceDecomposition = {
  metricName: 'Total ARR',
  totalDelta: -ARR_VALUES.variance,           // -$2.4M
  items: [
    {
      description: 'Timing differences — 47 contracts with booking/billing date mismatch',
      amount: VARIANCE_COMPONENTS.timing,     // $1.1M
      classification: 'timing',
      materiality: 'immaterial',
    },
    {
      description: 'Entity resolution — 3 duplicate accounts overstating ARR',
      amount: VARIANCE_COMPONENTS.entityResolution, // $800K
      classification: 'methodology',
      materiality: 'noteworthy',
    },
    {
      description: 'Revenue classification — professional services counted as recurring',
      amount: VARIANCE_COMPONENTS.classification,   // $500K
      classification: 'classification',
      materiality: 'material',
    },
  ],
};

// ── Risk Dashboard (Screen B3) ──

export const RISK_FACTORS: RiskFactor[] = [
  {
    id: 'risk-concentration',
    name: 'Customer Concentration',
    impact: `Top customer at ${CONCENTRATION.after}% vs reported ${CONCENTRATION.before}% — exceeds ${CONCENTRATION.threshold}% threshold`,
    confidence: 'high',
    detail: 'Post-entity-resolution, Apex Medical subsidiaries roll up to 11.2% of total ARR. Seller reported 7.8% prior to subsidiary consolidation. Exceeds standard PE concentration threshold of 10%.',
    dollarImpact: 22_200_000,
  },
  {
    id: 'risk-change-of-control',
    name: 'Change-of-Control Exposure',
    impact: '$8.3M ARR at risk from contracts with change-of-control termination clauses',
    confidence: 'medium',
    detail: '14 enterprise contracts totaling $8.3M ARR contain explicit change-of-control termination rights. 6 contracts allow termination within 30 days of ownership change.',
    dollarImpact: 8_300_000,
  },
  {
    id: 'risk-classification',
    name: 'Revenue Classification',
    impact: '$500K in professional services revenue classified as recurring',
    confidence: 'high',
    detail: 'Three contracts include bundled implementation fees recognized monthly alongside SaaS subscription revenue. ASC 606 analysis suggests unbundling required.',
    dollarImpact: VARIANCE_COMPONENTS.classification,
  },
  {
    id: 'risk-retention',
    name: 'Retention Overstatement',
    impact: 'NRR of 109% vs seller-reported 112% after methodology normalization',
    confidence: 'high',
    detail: 'Seller calculation includes reactivated churned accounts in expansion. Industry-standard methodology excludes reactivations, reducing NRR by 3 percentage points.',
  },
  {
    id: 'risk-schema-drift',
    name: 'Schema Drift Risk',
    impact: '3 schema change events in past 6 months across source systems',
    confidence: 'medium',
    detail: 'Zuora v12→v13 migration added discountType field. Salesforce Org 2 renamed ARR field. HubSpot removed deal_arr property. Rate of schema change suggests ongoing integration maintenance cost.',
  },
];

// ── Integration Planner (Screen B4) ──

export const INTEGRATION_TASKS: IntegrationTask[] = [
  {
    id: 'task-entity-master',
    description: 'Consolidate entity master across 9 systems using resolved golden records',
    targetDay: 1,
    status: 'ready',
    mappingsReady: true,
  },
  {
    id: 'task-chart-of-accounts',
    description: 'Unify chart of accounts (NetSuite parent ← SAP B1 + QuickBooks)',
    targetDay: 1,
    status: 'ready',
    mappingsReady: true,
  },
  {
    id: 'task-billing-migration',
    description: 'Migrate billing from Chargebee + Stripe to Zuora (parent platform)',
    targetDay: 30,
    status: 'pending',
    mappingsReady: false,
  },
];

// ── Export Files (Screen B4 — references dbt-models.ts content) ──

export const EXPORT_FILES: ExportFile[] = [
  {
    path: 'models/staging/zuora/stg_zuora__invoices.sql',
    type: 'sql',
    content: '', // Content loaded from dbt-models.ts at render time
    ontologyVersion: 'unified_v3',
    generatedAt: '2026-03-10T14:23:17Z',

  {
    path: 'models/staging/netsuite/stg_netsuite__revenue.sql',
    type: 'sql',

  {
    path: 'schema.yml',
    type: 'yml',

    generatedAt: '2026-03-10T14:23:17Z',

];

// ── Data Quality Score (Screen B1) ──

export const DATA_QUALITY_SCORE = {
  overall: 'B+',
  dimensions: [
    { name: 'Completeness', grade: 'A−', detail: '94% of business-critical fields mapped to canonical concepts' },
    { name: 'Consistency', grade: 'B', detail: '81% cross-system reconciliation rate before adjustments' },

  ],
} as const;

// dbt model SQL templates generated by Data Foundry
// These are static demo assets — not executed against any database.

export const DBT_MODELS: Record<string, string> = {
  'models/staging/zuora/stg_zuora__invoices.sql': `\
/* Generated by Data Foundry v2.4.1 | Ontology: unified_v3 | Source: zuora.invoices | Generated: 2026-03-10T14:23:17Z */

WITH source AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ source('zuora', 'invoices') }}
),

renamed AS (
    SELECT
        -- Mapped from: Id → contract (confidence: 97%)
        id                          AS invoice_id__zuora,

        -- Mapped from: AccountId → customer (confidence: 94%)
        account_id                  AS customer_id__zuora,

        -- Mapped from: InvoiceDate → invoice_date (confidence: 99%)
        invoice_date                AS invoice_date,

        -- Mapped from: Amount → revenue.billed.gross (confidence: 96%)
        amount                      AS revenue_billed_gross__zuora,

        -- Mapped from: TaxAmount → tax_amount (confidence: 98%)
        tax_amount                  AS tax_amount__zuora,

        -- Mapped from: Balance → revenue.billed.net (confidence: 91%)
        amount - tax_amount         AS revenue_billed_net__zuora,

        -- Mapped from: Status → invoice_status (confidence: 99%)
        status                      AS invoice_status__zuora,

        -- Mapped from: SubscriptionId → contract (confidence: 93%)
        subscription_id             AS contract_id__zuora,

        -- Mapped from: CreatedDate → created_at (confidence: 99%)
        created_date                AS created_at,

        -- Mapped from: UpdatedDate → updated_at (confidence: 99%)
        updated_date                AS updated_at

    FROM source
    WHERE status != 'Draft'
)

SELECT * FROM renamed
`,

  'models/staging/netsuite/stg_netsuite__revenue.sql': `\
/* Generated by Data Foundry v2.4.1 | Ontology: unified_v3 | Source: netsuite.transactions | Generated: 2026-03-10T14:23:17Z */

WITH source AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ source('netsuite', 'transactions') }}
),

filtered AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM source
    WHERE transaction_type IN ('Invoice', 'Credit Memo', 'Journal Entry')
      AND posting = TRUE
),

renamed AS (
    SELECT
        -- Mapped from: transaction_id → contract (confidence: 88%)
        transaction_id              AS transaction_id__netsuite,

        -- Mapped from: entity_id → customer (confidence: 92%)
        entity_id                   AS customer_id__netsuite,

        -- Mapped from: trandate → recognition_date (confidence: 97%)
        trandate                    AS recognition_date,

        -- Mapped from: amount → revenue.recognized.gross (confidence: 94%)
        amount                      AS revenue_recognized_gross__netsuite,

        -- Mapped from: net_amount → revenue.billed.net (confidence: 89%)
        net_amount                  AS revenue_billed_net__netsuite,

        -- Mapped from: subsidiary_id → subsidiary (confidence: 99%)
        subsidiary_id               AS subsidiary_id__netsuite,

        -- Mapped from: account_number → gl_account (confidence: 96%)
        account_number              AS gl_account__netsuite,

        -- Mapped from: memo → description (confidence: 85%)
        memo                        AS description__netsuite,

        -- Mapped from: period → fiscal_period (confidence: 98%)
        posting_period              AS fiscal_period__netsuite,

        -- Mapped from: created → created_at (confidence: 99%)
        date_created                AS created_at

    FROM filtered
)

SELECT * FROM renamed
`,

  'models/staging/salesforce/stg_salesforce__opps.sql': `\
/* Generated by Data Foundry v2.4.1 | Ontology: unified_v3 | Source: salesforce.opportunities | Generated: 2026-03-10T14:23:17Z */

WITH source AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ source('salesforce', 'opportunities') }}
),

won_only AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM source
    WHERE stage_name = 'Closed Won'
      AND is_deleted = FALSE
),

renamed AS (
    SELECT
        -- Mapped from: Id → contract (confidence: 91%)
        id                          AS opportunity_id__salesforce,

        -- Mapped from: AccountId → customer (confidence: 96%)
        account_id                  AS customer_id__salesforce,

        -- Mapped from: Name → opportunity_name (confidence: 99%)
        name                        AS opportunity_name__salesforce,

        -- Mapped from: Amount → revenue.booked.gross (confidence: 93%)
        amount                      AS revenue_booked_gross__salesforce,

        -- Mapped from: CloseDate → close_date (confidence: 99%)
        close_date                  AS close_date,

        -- Mapped from: ACV__c → annual_contract_value (confidence: 87%)
        acv__c                      AS annual_contract_value__salesforce,

        -- Mapped from: ARR__c → arr (confidence: 95%)
        arr__c                      AS arr__salesforce,

        -- Mapped from: ContractTerm__c → contract_term_months (confidence: 90%)
        contract_term__c            AS contract_term_months__salesforce,

        -- Mapped from: OwnerId → sales_rep (confidence: 98%)
        owner_id                    AS sales_rep_id__salesforce,

        -- Mapped from: CreatedDate → created_at (confidence: 99%)
        created_date                AS created_at

    FROM won_only
)

SELECT * FROM renamed
`,

  'models/marts/finance/arr_waterfall.sql': `\
/* Generated by Data Foundry v2.4.1 | Ontology: unified_v3 | Source: marts.finance | Generated: 2026-03-10T14:23:17Z */

-- ARR Waterfall: Reconciles booked (CRM), billed (billing), and recognized (GL) revenue
-- Mapped from: revenue.booked.gross, revenue.billed.gross, revenue.recognized.gross

WITH crm_arr AS (
    -- Mapped from: salesforce.opportunities → revenue.booked.gross (confidence: 93%)
    SELECT
        customer_id__salesforce     AS customer_id,
        'crm'                       AS source_layer,
        SUM(arr__salesforce)        AS arr_amount,
        DATE_TRUNC('quarter', close_date) AS quarter
    FROM {{ ref('stg_salesforce__opps') }}
    GROUP BY 1, 3, 4
),

billing_arr AS (
    -- Mapped from: zuora.invoices → revenue.billed.gross (confidence: 96%)
    SELECT
        customer_id__zuora          AS customer_id,
        'billing'                   AS source_layer,
        SUM(revenue_billed_gross__zuora) * 12
            / COUNT(DISTINCT DATE_TRUNC('month', invoice_date))
                                    AS arr_amount,
        DATE_TRUNC('quarter', invoice_date) AS quarter
    FROM {{ ref('stg_zuora__invoices') }}
    WHERE invoice_status__zuora = 'Posted'
    GROUP BY 1, 4
),

gl_arr AS (
    -- Mapped from: netsuite.transactions → revenue.recognized.gross (confidence: 94%)
    SELECT
        customer_id__netsuite       AS customer_id,
        'gl'                        AS source_layer,
        SUM(revenue_recognized_gross__netsuite) * 4
                                    AS arr_amount,
        DATE_TRUNC('quarter', recognition_date) AS quarter
    FROM {{ ref('stg_netsuite__revenue') }}
    WHERE gl_account__netsuite LIKE '4%'  -- revenue accounts
    GROUP BY 1, 4
),

unioned AS (
    SELECT * FROM crm_arr
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM billing_arr
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM gl_arr
),

waterfall AS (
    SELECT
        quarter,
        customer_id,
        MAX(CASE WHEN source_layer = 'crm'     THEN arr_amount END) AS arr_crm,
        MAX(CASE WHEN source_layer = 'billing'  THEN arr_amount END) AS arr_billing,
        MAX(CASE WHEN source_layer = 'gl'       THEN arr_amount END) AS arr_gl,
        -- Variance analysis
        MAX(CASE WHEN source_layer = 'crm' THEN arr_amount END)
          - MAX(CASE WHEN source_layer = 'billing' THEN arr_amount END)
                                    AS variance_crm_vs_billing,
        MAX(CASE WHEN source_layer = 'billing' THEN arr_amount END)
          - MAX(CASE WHEN source_layer = 'gl' THEN arr_amount END)
                                    AS variance_billing_vs_gl
    FROM unioned
    GROUP BY 1, 2
)

SELECT
    quarter,
    customer_id,
    arr_crm,
    arr_billing,
    arr_gl,
    variance_crm_vs_billing,
    variance_billing_vs_gl,
    CASE
        WHEN ABS(variance_crm_vs_billing) > 50000 THEN 'material'
        WHEN ABS(variance_crm_vs_billing) > 10000 THEN 'notable'
        ELSE 'immaterial'
    END AS variance_flag
FROM waterfall
`,

  'schema.yml': `\
version: 2

models:
  - name: stg_zuora__invoices
    description: "Staged Zuora invoice records with unified field naming"
    meta:
      data_foundry:
        source_system: zuora
        ontology_version: unified_v3
        generated_at: "2026-03-10T14:23:17Z"
    columns:
      - name: invoice_id__zuora
        description: "Zuora invoice identifier"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: contract
            source_field: Id
            confidence: 0.97
      - name: customer_id__zuora
        description: "Zuora account identifier mapped to canonical customer"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: customer
            source_field: AccountId
            confidence: 0.94
      - name: revenue_billed_gross__zuora
        description: "Gross billed revenue from Zuora invoices"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: revenue.billed.gross
            source_field: Amount
            confidence: 0.96
      - name: revenue_billed_net__zuora
        description: "Net billed revenue (gross minus tax)"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: revenue.billed.net
            source_field: Balance
            confidence: 0.91

  - name: stg_netsuite__revenue
    description: "Staged NetSuite transaction records for revenue recognition"
    meta:
      data_foundry:
        source_system: netsuite
        ontology_version: unified_v3
        generated_at: "2026-03-10T14:23:17Z"
    columns:
      - name: customer_id__netsuite
        description: "NetSuite entity mapped to canonical customer"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: customer
            source_field: entity_id
            confidence: 0.92
      - name: revenue_recognized_gross__netsuite
        description: "Gross recognized revenue from NetSuite GL"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: revenue.recognized.gross
            source_field: amount
            confidence: 0.94
      - name: revenue_billed_net__netsuite
        description: "Net revenue from NetSuite transactions"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: revenue.billed.net
            source_field: net_amount
            confidence: 0.89

  - name: stg_salesforce__opps
    description: "Staged Salesforce closed-won opportunities"
    meta:
      data_foundry:
        source_system: salesforce
        ontology_version: unified_v3
        generated_at: "2026-03-10T14:23:17Z"
    columns:
      - name: customer_id__salesforce
        description: "Salesforce account mapped to canonical customer"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: customer
            source_field: AccountId
            confidence: 0.96
      - name: revenue_booked_gross__salesforce
        description: "Gross booked revenue from Salesforce opportunities"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: revenue.booked.gross
            source_field: Amount
            confidence: 0.93
      - name: arr__salesforce
        description: "Annual recurring revenue from Salesforce custom field"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: revenue.booked.gross
            source_field: ARR__c
            confidence: 0.95
      - name: contract_term_months__salesforce
        description: "Contract duration in months"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: contract
            source_field: ContractTerm__c
            confidence: 0.90

  - name: arr_waterfall
    description: "ARR waterfall reconciling CRM, billing, and GL layers"
    meta:
      data_foundry:
        model_type: mart
        ontology_version: unified_v3
        generated_at: "2026-03-10T14:23:17Z"
    columns:
      - name: arr_crm
        description: "ARR from CRM (Salesforce closed-won)"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: revenue.booked.gross
            layer: crm
      - name: arr_billing
        description: "ARR from billing system (Zuora invoices)"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: revenue.billed.gross
            layer: billing
      - name: arr_gl
        description: "ARR from general ledger (NetSuite recognized)"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: revenue.recognized.gross
            layer: gl
      - name: variance_crm_vs_billing
        description: "Variance between CRM and billing ARR"
      - name: variance_billing_vs_gl
        description: "Variance between billing and GL ARR"
      - name: variance_flag
        description: "Materiality classification: material, notable, or immaterial"
`,
};
```

import { SYSTEM_IDS, EXHIBIT_NAMES } from './_constants';
import type { DriftEvent, QuarterlyRefresh } from '../types/drift';

export const QUARTERLY_REFRESH: QuarterlyRefresh = {
  quarter: 'Q3 2026',
  exhibitsUpdated: 23,
  exhibitsNeedingReview: 2,
  reconciliationBreaks: 0,
  reviewItems: [
    {
      description: 'New top-10 customer: HealthBridge Corp',
      type: 'new-customer',
      detail: 'HealthBridge Corp entered top 10 with $2.1M ARR in Q3 2026. Concentration analysis and top-25 exhibit updated automatically.',
    },
    {
      description: 'Zuora schema change: discountType field added',
      type: 'schema-change',
      detail: 'Zuora invoice object added discountType field in v13. Suggested re-mapping provided; Gross Margin by Product Line exhibit flagged for review.',
    },
  ],
  ontologyDiff: {
    systemName: 'Zuora',
    previousVersion: 'v12',
    newVersion: 'v13',
    addedFields: ['discountType'],
    removedFields: [],
    changedFields: [],
    affectedExhibits: 1,
    unaffectedExhibits: 22,
  },
};

export const DRIFT_EVENTS: DriftEvent[] = [
  {
    id: 'drift-001',
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.ZUORA_PARENT,
    systemName: 'Zuora',
    changeDescription: 'New field discountType added to invoice object',
    severity: 'high',
    affectedAnnotations: 3,
    affectedMetrics: [EXHIBIT_NAMES.GROSS_MARGIN, 'Gross Margin by Product Line'],
    status: 'investigating',
    remediation: 'Map discountType to canonical discount classification; re-derive net revenue calculation',
  },
  {
    id: 'drift-002',
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.SALESFORCE_ORG2,
    systemName: 'Salesforce Org 2',
    changeDescription: 'Opportunity.ARR__c field renamed to Opportunity.Annual_Recurring_Revenue__c',
    severity: 'critical',
    affectedAnnotations: 5,
    affectedMetrics: [EXHIBIT_NAMES.ARR_WATERFALL, EXHIBIT_NAMES.ARR_BY_CUSTOMER],
    status: 'resolved',
    remediation: 'Annotation updated to point to renamed field; all downstream metrics revalidated',
  },
  {
    id: 'drift-003',
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.HUBSPOT,
    systemName: 'HubSpot',
    changeDescription: 'Custom property deal_arr removed from deal object',
    severity: 'low',
    affectedAnnotations: 1,
    affectedMetrics: [EXHIBIT_NAMES.ARR_WATERFALL],
    status: 'auto-acknowledged',
    remediation: 'Field was unused in current ontology mapping; no downstream impact confirmed',
  },
];

import { EXHIBIT_NAMES } from './_constants';
import type { Exhibit } from '../types/exhibit';
import type { WaterfallItem } from '../types/metric';

// ── EBITDA Bridge (Revenue → EBITDA) ──
// Starts from Billing ARR $198.7M, ends at ~$47.7M (24% EBITDA margin)
export const EBITDA_BRIDGE_ITEMS: WaterfallItem[] = [
  { label: 'Revenue',              value: 198_700_000, type: 'start',    drillable: false },
  { label: 'COGS',                 value: -51_200_000, type: 'decrease',  drillable: true  },
  { label: 'Gross Profit',         value: 147_500_000, type: 'total',     drillable: false },
  { label: 'Sales & Marketing',    value: -43_700_000, type: 'decrease',  drillable: true  },
  { label: 'R&D',                  value: -35_800_000, type: 'decrease',  drillable: true  },
  { label: 'G&A',                  value: -16_100_000, type: 'decrease',  drillable: true  },
  { label: 'Operating Income',     value:  51_900_000, type: 'total',     drillable: false },
  { label: 'Stock-Based Comp',     value:  -6_400_000, type: 'decrease',  drillable: true  },
  { label: 'One-Time Items',       value:   2_200_000, type: 'increase',  drillable: true  },
  { label: 'Normalized EBITDA',    value:  47_700_000, type: 'total',     drillable: false },
];

// ── Deferred Revenue Schedule (quarterly) ──
export const DEFERRED_REVENUE_DATA = [
  { quarter: 'Q1 2025', beginning: 28_400_000, newBookings: 14_200_000, recognized: 12_800_000, ending: 29_800_000 },
  { quarter: 'Q2 2025', beginning: 29_800_000, newBookings: 15_100_000, recognized: 13_600_000, ending: 31_300_000 },
  { quarter: 'Q3 2025', beginning: 31_300_000, newBookings: 16_400_000, recognized: 14_200_000, ending: 33_500_000 },
  { quarter: 'Q4 2025', beginning: 33_500_000, newBookings: 17_800_000, recognized: 15_100_000, ending: 36_200_000 },
  { quarter: 'Q1 2026', beginning: 36_200_000, newBookings: 16_900_000, recognized: 14_800_000, ending: 38_300_000 },
  { quarter: 'Q2 2026', beginning: 38_300_000, newBookings: 17_200_000, recognized: 15_500_000, ending: 40_000_000 },
];

// ── Revenue by Product Line ──
// Sums to ~$198.7M
export const REVENUE_BY_PRODUCT = [
  { product: 'Core Platform',       arr:  99_400_000, pctTotal: 50.0, yoyGrowth: 18.2 },
  { product: 'Analytics Suite',      arr:  49_700_000, pctTotal: 25.0, yoyGrowth: 34.5 },
  { product: 'Integration Hub',     arr:  33_800_000, pctTotal: 17.0, yoyGrowth: 27.1 },
  { product: 'Professional Services', arr: 15_800_000, pctTotal:  8.0, yoyGrowth:  8.3 },
];

// ── ARR by Customer (top 10) ──
// Top 10 ≈ 32% of total ARR ($198.7M)
export const ARR_BY_CUSTOMER_TOP10 = [
  { rank: 1,  customer: 'Apex Medical Systems',        arr: 8_200_000, pctTotal: 4.13 },
  { rank: 2,  customer: "St. Luke's Health Network",   arr: 7_400_000, pctTotal: 3.72 },
  { rank: 3,  customer: 'Regional Medical Associates',  arr: 6_800_000, pctTotal: 3.42 },
  { rank: 4,  customer: 'NovaCare Health Group',        arr: 6_200_000, pctTotal: 3.12 },
  { rank: 5,  customer: 'Pacific Health Partners',      arr: 5_900_000, pctTotal: 2.97 },
  { rank: 6,  customer: 'Summit Medical Holdings',      arr: 5_500_000, pctTotal: 2.77 },
  { rank: 7,  customer: 'MedBridge Solutions',           arr: 5_100_000, pctTotal: 2.57 },
  { rank: 8,  customer: 'Cascade Healthcare Corp',      arr: 4_800_000, pctTotal: 2.42 },
  { rank: 9,  customer: 'Heritage Health Systems',       arr: 4_400_000, pctTotal: 2.21 },
  { rank: 10, customer: 'Atlas Clinical Networks',       arr: 4_200_000, pctTotal: 2.11 },
];

// ── Contract Terms Distribution ──
export const CONTRACT_TERMS_DATA = [
  { termBucket: '1 Year',     count: 2_180, pctArr: 48.2, avgAcv: 43_900 },
  { termBucket: '2 Year',     count:   820, pctArr: 28.6, avgAcv: 69_300 },
  { termBucket: '3 Year',     count:   310, pctArr: 17.8, avgAcv: 114_100 },
  { termBucket: 'Month-to-Month', count: 98, pctArr: 5.4,  avgAcv: 10_900 },
];

// ── Churn Analysis ──
// Total churn ARR = $13.5M (matches waterfall)
export const CHURN_DATA = [
  { type: 'Voluntary (non-renewal)', count: 89,  arrLost: 7_200_000, rate: 3.6 },
  { type: 'Involuntary (payment)',    count: 42,  arrLost: 2_100_000, rate: 1.1 },
  { type: 'Downgrade',                count: 67,  arrLost: 4_200_000, rate: 2.1 },
  { type: 'Total',                    count: 198, arrLost: 13_500_000, rate: 6.8 },
];

// ── Expansion Revenue Detail ──
// Total expansion ARR = $18.6M (matches waterfall)
export const EXPANSION_DATA = [
  { type: 'Upsell (same product)',   count: 312, arrAdded: 9_800_000 },
  { type: 'Cross-sell (new product)', count: 187, arrAdded: 5_400_000 },
  { type: 'Price Increase',           count: 143, arrAdded: 3_400_000 },
  { type: 'Total',                    count: 642, arrAdded: 18_600_000 },
];

// ── Customer Acquisition Cost by Channel ──
export const CAC_DATA = [
  { channel: 'Direct Sales',    spend: 18_200_000, newCustomers: 210, cac: 86_700, ltvCacRatio: 4.2 },
  { channel: 'Inbound/Content', spend:  4_800_000, newCustomers: 340, cac: 14_100, ltvCacRatio: 12.8 },
  { channel: 'Partners',        spend:  3_200_000, newCustomers: 180, cac: 17_800, ltvCacRatio: 10.1 },
  { channel: 'Total / Blended', spend: 26_200_000, newCustomers: 730, cac: 35_900, ltvCacRatio: 7.1 },
];

// ── MRR Trend (12 months ending at ~$16.56M/mo = $198.7M ARR) ──
export const MRR_TREND = [
  { month: 'Apr 2025', mrr: 15_170_000 },
  { month: 'May 2025', mrr: 15_280_000 },
  { month: 'Jun 2025', mrr: 15_410_000 },
  { month: 'Jul 2025', mrr: 15_560_000 },
  { month: 'Aug 2025', mrr: 15_730_000 },
  { month: 'Sep 2025', mrr: 15_870_000 },
  { month: 'Oct 2025', mrr: 15_990_000 },
  { month: 'Nov 2025', mrr: 16_080_000 },
  { month: 'Dec 2025', mrr: 16_210_000 },
  { month: 'Jan 2026', mrr: 16_340_000 },
  { month: 'Feb 2026', mrr: 16_460_000 },
  { month: 'Mar 2026', mrr: 16_558_000 },
];

// ── Gross Margin by Product Line ──
export const GROSS_MARGIN_BY_PRODUCT = [
  { product: 'Core Platform',         revenue: 99_400_000, margin: 78.2, yoyChange: 1.4 },
  { product: 'Analytics Suite',        revenue: 49_700_000, margin: 76.5, yoyChange: 2.1 },

];

export const EXHIBITS: Exhibit[] = [
  {
    id: 'arr-waterfall',
    name: EXHIBIT_NAMES.ARR_WATERFALL,

src/data/lineage.ts
```
import { SYSTEM_IDS, CONCEPT_IDS, EXHIBIT_NAMES } from './_constants';
import type { LineageNode, LineageEdge, GhostNode } from '../types/demo';

// ── Lineage Paths (for LineagePopover — 2-3 paths with 4-5 nodes each) ──

const arrCellPath: { nodes: LineageNode[]; edges: LineageEdge[] } = {
  nodes: [
    { id: 'lp1-field', label: 'Zuora invoice.chargeAmount', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.ZUORA_PARENT },
    { id: 'lp1-annotation', label: 'Revenue.Billed.Gross mapping (94%)', type: 'annotation', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.ZUORA_PARENT },
    { id: 'lp1-concept', label: CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_BILLED_GROSS, type: 'concept' },
    { id: 'lp1-metric', label: 'ARR Waterfall — Ending ARR', type: 'metric' },
    { id: 'lp1-cell', label: `${EXHIBIT_NAMES.ARR_WATERFALL} cell B7`, type: 'exhibit-cell' },
  ],
  edges: [
    { source: 'lp1-field', target: 'lp1-annotation', confidence: 94 },
    { source: 'lp1-annotation', target: 'lp1-concept' },
    { source: 'lp1-concept', target: 'lp1-metric' },
    { source: 'lp1-metric', target: 'lp1-cell' },
  ],
};

const nrrCellPath: { nodes: LineageNode[]; edges: LineageEdge[] } = {
  nodes: [
    { id: 'lp2-field', label: 'Salesforce Opportunity.Amount', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.SALESFORCE_ORG1 },
    { id: 'lp2-annotation', label: 'Revenue.Booked.Gross mapping (92%)', type: 'annotation', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.SALESFORCE_ORG1 },
    { id: 'lp2-concept', label: CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_BOOKED_GROSS, type: 'concept' },
    { id: 'lp2-metric', label: 'NRR by Cohort — Q1 2025', type: 'metric' },
    { id: 'lp2-cell', label: `${EXHIBIT_NAMES.NRR_BY_COHORT} cell C3`, type: 'exhibit-cell' },
  ],
  edges: [
    { source: 'lp2-field', target: 'lp2-annotation', confidence: 92 },
    { source: 'lp2-annotation', target: 'lp2-concept' },
    { source: 'lp2-concept', target: 'lp2-metric' },
    { source: 'lp2-metric', target: 'lp2-cell' },
  ],
};

const concentrationPath: { nodes: LineageNode[]; edges: LineageEdge[] } = {
  nodes: [
    { id: 'lp3-field', label: 'NetSuite customer.entityId', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.NETSUITE_PARENT },
    { id: 'lp3-annotation', label: 'Customer mapping (95%)', type: 'annotation', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.NETSUITE_PARENT },
    { id: 'lp3-concept', label: CONCEPT_IDS.CUSTOMER, type: 'concept' },
    { id: 'lp3-metric', label: 'Customer Concentration — Top 25', type: 'metric' },
  ],
  edges: [
    { source: 'lp3-field', target: 'lp3-annotation', confidence: 95 },
    { source: 'lp3-annotation', target: 'lp3-concept' },
    { source: 'lp3-concept', target: 'lp3-metric' },
  ],
};

export const LINEAGE_PATHS = [
  { label: 'ARR Waterfall — Ending ARR', ...arrCellPath },
  { label: 'NRR by Cohort — Q1 2025', ...nrrCellPath },
  { label: 'Customer Concentration', ...concentrationPath },
];

// ── Ghost Nodes (for LineagePopover depth indicators) ──

export const GHOST_NODES: GhostNode[] = [
  {
    id: 'ghost-1',
    parentNodeId: 'lp1-concept',
    label: '… 3 other source fields',
    pathCount: 4,
  },
  {
    id: 'ghost-2',
    parentNodeId: 'lp1-metric',
    label: '… 2 other metrics',
    pathCount: 3,
  },
  {
    id: 'ghost-3',
    parentNodeId: 'lp2-concept',
    label: '… 5 other source fields',
    pathCount: 6,
  },
  {
    id: 'ghost-4',
    parentNodeId: 'lp3-concept',
    label: '… 8 other source fields',
    pathCount: 9,
  },
];

// ── Full Lineage Graph (for LineageFullView — 20 nodes) ──

export const FULL_LINEAGE_GRAPH: { nodes: LineageNode[]; edges: LineageEdge[] } = {
  nodes: [
    // Source fields (layer 1)
    { id: 'fl-zuora-charge', label: 'Zuora invoice.chargeAmount', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.ZUORA_PARENT },
    { id: 'fl-zuora-discount', label: 'Zuora invoice.discountAmount', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.ZUORA_PARENT },
    { id: 'fl-ns-amount', label: 'NetSuite tranSales.amount', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.NETSUITE_PARENT },
    { id: 'fl-ns-account', label: 'NetSuite account.acctName', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.NETSUITE_PARENT },
    { id: 'fl-sf-amount', label: 'Salesforce Opportunity.Amount', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.SALESFORCE_ORG1 },
    { id: 'fl-sf-stage', label: 'Salesforce Opportunity.StageName', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.SALESFORCE_ORG1 },
    { id: 'fl-hs-amount', label: 'HubSpot deals.amount', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.HUBSPOT },
    { id: 'fl-stripe-amount', label: 'Stripe charges.amount', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.STRIPE },
    { id: 'fl-ns-customer', label: 'NetSuite customer.entityId', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.NETSUITE_PARENT },
    { id: 'fl-sf-account', label: 'Salesforce Account.Name', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.SALESFORCE_ORG1 },

    // Annotations (layer 2)
    { id: 'fl-ann-billed', label: 'Revenue.Billed.Gross (94%)', type: 'annotation' },
    { id: 'fl-ann-billed-net', label: 'Revenue.Billed.Net (91%)', type: 'annotation' },
    { id: 'fl-ann-recognized', label: 'Revenue.Recognized.Gross (95%)', type: 'annotation' },
    { id: 'fl-ann-booked', label: 'Revenue.Booked.Gross (92%)', type: 'annotation' },

    // Concepts (layer 3)

    // Metrics + Exhibits (layer 4)
    { id: 'fl-metric-arr', label: EXHIBIT_NAMES.ARR_WATERFALL, type: 'metric' },
  ],
  edges: [
    // Source → Annotation
    { source: 'fl-zuora-charge', target: 'fl-ann-billed', confidence: 94 },
    { source: 'fl-zuora-discount', target: 'fl-ann-billed-net', confidence: 91 },
    { source: 'fl-ns-amount', target: 'fl-ann-recognized', confidence: 95 },
    { source: 'fl-sf-amount', target: 'fl-ann-booked', confidence: 92 },
    { source: 'fl-hs-amount', target: 'fl-ann-booked', confidence: 87 },
    { source: 'fl-stripe-amount', target: 'fl-ann-billed', confidence: 89 },
    { source: 'fl-ns-customer', target: 'fl-ann-customer', confidence: 96 },
    { source: 'fl-sf-account', target: 'fl-ann-customer', confidence: 93 },

    // Annotation → Concept
    { source: 'fl-ann-billed', target: 'fl-concept-billed' },
    { source: 'fl-ann-billed-net', target: 'fl-concept-billed' },
    { source: 'fl-ann-recognized', target: 'fl-concept-recognized' },
    { source: 'fl-ann-booked', target: 'fl-concept-booked' },
    { source: 'fl-ann-customer', target: 'fl-concept-customer' },

    // Concept → Metric

    { source: 'fl-concept-recognized', target: 'fl-metric-arr' },
    { source: 'fl-concept-booked', target: 'fl-metric-arr' },
  ],
};

src/data/metrics.ts
```
import type { WaterfallItem } from '../types/metric';
import { ARR_VALUES } from './_constants';

// ── ARR Waterfall (trailing 12 months) ──
// Builds on Billing baseline: Beginning ARR + movements = Ending ARR ($198.7M)
export const WATERFALL_ITEMS: WaterfallItem[] = [
  { label: 'Beginning ARR',  value: 182_000_000, type: 'start',    drillable: false },
  { label: 'New Business',   value:  24_300_000, type: 'increase',  drillable: true  },
  { label: 'Expansion',      value:  18_600_000, type: 'increase',  drillable: true  },
  { label: 'Reactivation',   value:   2_100_000, type: 'increase',  drillable: true  },
  { label: 'Contraction',    value: -14_800_000, type: 'decrease',  drillable: true  },
  { label: 'Churn',          value: -13_500_000, type: 'decrease',  drillable: true  },
  { label: 'Ending ARR',     value: ARR_VALUES.billing, type: 'total', drillable: false },
];

// ── Cohort Retention (NRR ~112% average) ──
// 6 cohorts, 12-month retention curves starting at 100%.
// Values above 100% reflect net expansion; NRR averages ~112%.
export const COHORT_RETENTION: { cohort: string; months: number[] }[] = [
  {
    cohort: 'Q1 2025',
    months: [100, 98, 97, 96, 98, 101, 104, 107, 109, 111, 113, 114],
  },
  {
    cohort: 'Q2 2025',
    months: [100, 97, 96, 95, 97, 100, 103, 106, 108, 110, 112, 113],
  },
  {
    cohort: 'Q3 2025',
    months: [100, 98, 97, 97, 99, 102, 105, 107, 109, 111, 112],
  },
  {
    cohort: 'Q4 2025',
    months: [100, 97, 96, 96, 98, 101, 104, 106, 109, 111],
  },
  {
    cohort: 'Q1 2026',
    months: [100, 98, 97, 96, 99, 102, 105, 108, 110],
  },
  {
    cohort: 'Q2 2026',
    months: [100, 97, 96, 97, 100, 103, 106],
  },
];

import type { SourceOntology, CanonicalConcept } from '../types/annotation';
import { SYSTEM_IDS, CONCEPT_IDS } from './_constants';

// ── Source ontology summaries (one per system) ──

export const SOURCE_ONTOLOGIES: SourceOntology[] = [
  {
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.NETSUITE_PARENT,
    systemName: 'NetSuite',
    tableCount: 28,
    fieldCount: 12_400,
    keyConcepts: ['Revenue Recognition', 'Customer Master', 'Invoice Line Items', 'Journal Entries', 'Chart of Accounts'],
    derivedConcepts: [
      { name: 'Revenue Recognition', category: 'Financial', tables: 4, fields: 1_840 },
      { name: 'Journal Entry', category: 'Financial', tables: 3, fields: 1_120 },
      { name: 'Chart of Accounts', category: 'Financial', tables: 2, fields: 680 },
      { name: 'Subsidiary Allocation', category: 'Financial', tables: 2, fields: 520 },
      { name: 'Customer Master', category: 'Entity', tables: 3, fields: 2_100 },
      { name: 'Vendor', category: 'Entity', tables: 2, fields: 860 },
      { name: 'Invoice Line Item', category: 'Commercial', tables: 4, fields: 1_960 },
      { name: 'Purchase Order', category: 'Commercial', tables: 2, fields: 1_040 },
      { name: 'Revenue Schedule', category: 'Operational', tables: 3, fields: 1_480 },
      { name: 'Multi-Currency Translation', category: 'Operational', tables: 2, fields: 540 },
      { name: 'Audit Trail', category: 'Operational', tables: 1, fields: 260 },
    ],
    relationships: ['Customer → Invoice → Line Item', 'GL Account → Journal Entry → Transaction', 'Subsidiary → Revenue Schedule'],
    constraints: ['Multi-subsidiary enabled', 'ASC 606 revenue recognition rules'],
  },
  {
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.QUICKBOOKS,
    systemName: 'QuickBooks',
    tableCount: 14,
    fieldCount: 4_200,
    keyConcepts: ['Customer Master', 'Invoice', 'Payment', 'Chart of Accounts'],
    derivedConcepts: [
      { name: 'Invoice', category: 'Financial', tables: 2, fields: 680 },
      { name: 'Payment', category: 'Financial', tables: 2, fields: 540 },
      { name: 'Chart of Accounts', category: 'Financial', tables: 1, fields: 320 },
      { name: 'Customer Master', category: 'Entity', tables: 2, fields: 780 },
      { name: 'Vendor', category: 'Entity', tables: 1, fields: 360 },
      { name: 'Sales Receipt', category: 'Commercial', tables: 2, fields: 620 },
      { name: 'Expense Category', category: 'Operational', tables: 2, fields: 480 },
      { name: 'Bank Transaction', category: 'Operational', tables: 2, fields: 420 },
    ],
    relationships: ['Customer → Invoice → Payment', 'Account → Transaction'],
    constraints: ['Shared instance for 2 acquired entities'],
  },
  {
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.SAP_B1_AE3,
    systemName: 'SAP Business One',
    tableCount: 18,
    fieldCount: 6_800,
    keyConcepts: ['Business Partner', 'A/R Invoice', 'Revenue Recognition', 'Currency Translation', 'Cost Center'],
    derivedConcepts: [
      { name: 'A/R Invoice', category: 'Financial', tables: 3, fields: 1_240 },
      { name: 'Revenue Recognition', category: 'Financial', tables: 2, fields: 880 },
      { name: 'Journal Entry', category: 'Financial', tables: 2, fields: 640 },
      { name: 'Currency Translation', category: 'Financial', tables: 1, fields: 380 },
      { name: 'Business Partner', category: 'Entity', tables: 2, fields: 920 },
      { name: 'Cost Center', category: 'Operational', tables: 2, fields: 560 },
      { name: 'Delivery Note', category: 'Commercial', tables: 2, fields: 680 },
      { name: 'Purchase Order', category: 'Commercial', tables: 1, fields: 440 },
      { name: 'Inventory Valuation', category: 'Operational', tables: 1, fields: 340 },
      { name: 'Batch Sync Log', category: 'Operational', tables: 1, fields: 180 },
    ],
    relationships: ['Business Partner → Invoice → Line Item', 'GL Account → Journal Entry', 'Cost Center → Revenue Allocation'],
    constraints: ['On-prem deployment with batch sync', 'EUR → USD currency translation required'],
  },
  {
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.SALESFORCE_ORG1,
    systemName: 'Salesforce Org 1',
    tableCount: 15,
    fieldCount: 5_600,
    keyConcepts: ['Account', 'Opportunity', 'Contract', 'Product Line Item', 'Activity'],
    derivedConcepts: [
      { name: 'Account', category: 'Entity', tables: 2, fields: 1_120 },
      { name: 'Contact', category: 'Entity', tables: 1, fields: 640 },
      { name: 'Opportunity', category: 'Commercial', tables: 2, fields: 980 },
      { name: 'Contract', category: 'Commercial', tables: 2, fields: 760 },

    ],
