  {
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.SALESFORCE_ORG2,
    systemName: 'Salesforce Org 2',
    tableCount: 8,
    fieldCount: 2_900,
    keyConcepts: ['Account', 'Opportunity', 'Contract'],
    derivedConcepts: [
      { name: 'Account', category: 'Entity', tables: 1, fields: 680 },
      { name: 'Opportunity', category: 'Commercial', tables: 2, fields: 720 },
      { name: 'Contract', category: 'Commercial', tables: 1, fields: 480 },
      { name: 'Product Line Item', category: 'Commercial', tables: 1, fields: 380 },
      { name: 'Contact', category: 'Entity', tables: 1, fields: 340 },
      { name: 'Activity / Task', category: 'Operational', tables: 1, fields: 180 },
      { name: 'Custom Field Mapping', category: 'Operational', tables: 1, fields: 120 },
    ],
    relationships: ['Account → Opportunity → Line Item', 'Account → Contract'],
    constraints: ['Inherited from acquisition, limited customization'],
  },
  {
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.HUBSPOT,
    systemName: 'HubSpot',
    tableCount: 12,
    fieldCount: 4_100,
    keyConcepts: ['Contact', 'Company', 'Deal', 'Marketing Event'],
    derivedConcepts: [
      { name: 'Company', category: 'Entity', tables: 2, fields: 840 },
      { name: 'Contact', category: 'Entity', tables: 2, fields: 720 },
      { name: 'Deal', category: 'Commercial', tables: 2, fields: 680 },
      { name: 'Deal Stage Pipeline', category: 'Commercial', tables: 1, fields: 320 },
      { name: 'Marketing Event', category: 'Operational', tables: 2, fields: 560 },
      { name: 'Email Engagement', category: 'Operational', tables: 1, fields: 440 },
      { name: 'Attribution Model', category: 'Operational', tables: 1, fields: 280 },
      { name: 'Form Submission', category: 'Operational', tables: 1, fields: 260 },
    ],
    relationships: ['Company → Contact → Deal', 'Company → Marketing Event → Attribution'],
    constraints: ['Migrating to Salesforce; historical data retained'],
  },
  {
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.ZUORA_PARENT,
    systemName: 'Zuora',
    tableCount: 16,
    fieldCount: 6_200,
    keyConcepts: ['Subscription', 'Invoice', 'Rate Plan', 'Revenue Schedule', 'Payment'],
    derivedConcepts: [
      { name: 'Subscription', category: 'Commercial', tables: 3, fields: 1_280 },
      { name: 'Rate Plan / Charge', category: 'Commercial', tables: 2, fields: 840 },
      { name: 'Invoice', category: 'Financial', tables: 2, fields: 920 },
      { name: 'Revenue Schedule', category: 'Financial', tables: 2, fields: 760 },
      { name: 'Payment Application', category: 'Financial', tables: 2, fields: 580 },
      { name: 'Credit Memo', category: 'Financial', tables: 1, fields: 340 },
      { name: 'Account (Billing)', category: 'Entity', tables: 1, fields: 520 },
      { name: 'Product Catalog', category: 'Operational', tables: 1, fields: 420 },
      { name: 'Usage Record', category: 'Operational', tables: 1, fields: 280 },
      { name: 'Amendment History', category: 'Operational', tables: 1, fields: 260 },
    ],
    relationships: ['Account → Subscription → Rate Plan → Charge', 'Invoice → Invoice Item → Revenue Schedule', 'Payment → Invoice Application'],
    constraints: ['Ratable revenue recognition', 'Multi-currency billing'],
  },
  {
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.STRIPE,
    systemName: 'Stripe',
    tableCount: 9,
    fieldCount: 3_400,
    keyConcepts: ['Customer', 'Subscription', 'Invoice', 'Payment Intent'],
    derivedConcepts: [
      { name: 'Customer', category: 'Entity', tables: 1, fields: 580 },
      { name: 'Subscription', category: 'Commercial', tables: 2, fields: 720 },
      { name: 'Invoice', category: 'Financial', tables: 1, fields: 480 },
      { name: 'Payment Intent', category: 'Financial', tables: 1, fields: 420 },
      { name: 'Charge / Refund', category: 'Financial', tables: 1, fields: 360 },
      { name: 'Price / Product', category: 'Commercial', tables: 1, fields: 380 },
      { name: 'Payout', category: 'Financial', tables: 1, fields: 260 },
      { name: 'Dispute', category: 'Operational', tables: 1, fields: 200 },
    ],
    relationships: ['Customer → Subscription → Invoice', 'Payment Intent → Charge → Refund'],
    constraints: ['Usage-based + fixed billing models'],
  },
  {
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.CHARGEBEE,
    systemName: 'Chargebee',
    tableCount: 7,
    fieldCount: 2_232,
    keyConcepts: ['Customer', 'Subscription', 'Invoice'],
    derivedConcepts: [
      { name: 'Customer', category: 'Entity', tables: 1, fields: 420 },
      { name: 'Subscription', category: 'Commercial', tables: 1, fields: 480 },
      { name: 'Invoice', category: 'Financial', tables: 1, fields: 380 },
      { name: 'Plan / Addon', category: 'Commercial', tables: 2, fields: 360 },
      { name: 'Payment Source', category: 'Financial', tables: 1, fields: 280 },
      { name: 'Credit Note', category: 'Financial', tables: 1, fields: 312 },
    ],
    relationships: ['Customer → Subscription → Invoice', 'Subscription → Addon'],
    constraints: ['Annual contracts only'],
  },
];

// ── Unified canonical concept hierarchy ──

export const UNIFIED_ONTOLOGY: CanonicalConcept[] = [
  {
    id: 'revenue',
    label: 'Revenue',
    category: 'Financial',
    description: 'All revenue-related canonical concepts across source systems',
    children: [
      {
        id: CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_BOOKED_GROSS,
        label: 'Booked Revenue (Gross)',
        category: 'Financial',
        description: 'Gross revenue booked in CRM at contract signing, before adjustments',
      },
      {
        id: 'revenue.billed',
        label: 'Billed Revenue',
        category: 'Financial',
        description: 'Revenue as invoiced through billing systems',
        children: [
          {
            id: CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_BILLED_GROSS,
            label: 'Billed Revenue (Gross)',
            category: 'Financial',
            description: 'Gross invoiced amount before discounts and credits',
          },
          {
            id: CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_BILLED_NET,
            label: 'Billed Revenue (Net)',
            category: 'Financial',
            description: 'Net invoiced amount after discounts, credits, and adjustments',
          },
        ],
      },
      {
        id: CONCEPT_IDS.REVENUE_RECOGNIZED_GROSS,
        label: 'Recognized Revenue (Gross)',
        category: 'Financial',
        description: 'Revenue recognized per ASC 606 in the general ledger',
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: CONCEPT_IDS.CUSTOMER,
    label: 'Customer',
    category: 'Entity',
    description: 'Canonical customer entity resolved across all source systems',
    children: [
      {
        id: 'customer.active',
        label: 'Active Customer',
        category: 'Entity',
        description: 'Customer with at least one active subscription or contract',
      },
      {
        id: 'customer.churned',
        label: 'Churned Customer',
        category: 'Entity',
        description: 'Customer with no active subscriptions whose last contract has ended',
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: CONCEPT_IDS.CONTRACT,
    label: 'Contract',
    category: 'Commercial',
    description: 'Canonical contract entity linking customer commitments across systems',
    children: [
      {
        id: 'contract.term',
        label: 'Contract Term',
        category: 'Commercial',
        description: 'Duration and renewal terms of the contract',
      },
      {
        id: 'contract.value',
        label: 'Contract Value',
        category: 'Commercial',
        description: 'Total and annualized monetary value of the contract',
      },
    ],
  },
];

src/data/reconciliation.ts
```
import type { ReconciliationMetric } from '../types/metric';
import { ARR_VALUES, VARIANCE_COMPONENTS } from './_constants';

export const RECONCILIATION_METRICS: ReconciliationMetric[] = [
  // ── 1. Total ARR ──
  {
    id: 'total-arr',
    name: 'Total ARR',
    sources: [
      { sourceName: 'CRM (Salesforce + HubSpot)', value: ARR_VALUES.crm },
      { sourceName: 'Billing (Zuora + Stripe + Chargebee)', value: ARR_VALUES.billing },
      { sourceName: 'GL (NetSuite + QuickBooks + SAP)', value: ARR_VALUES.gl },
    ],
    variance: {
      description: 'CRM vs Billing: +$4.5M gap driven by timing, pipeline inclusion, multi-year normalization, entity resolution, and classification differences',
      amount: ARR_VALUES.crm - ARR_VALUES.billing, // 4_500_000
      materiality: 'material',
      categories: [
        {
          label: 'Timing',
          amount: VARIANCE_COMPONENTS.timing, // 1_100_000
          color: '#F59E0B',
          drillDownItems: [
            {
              description: 'Contracts with booking/billing date mismatch',
              amount: VARIANCE_COMPONENTS.timing,
              detail:
                '47 contracts with booking date in Q3 but billing start in Q4 — CRM records ARR at close, billing system defers to invoice date',
            },
          ],
        },
        {
          label: 'Pipeline inclusion',
          amount: 1_300_000,
          color: '#3B82F6',
          drillDownItems: [
            {
              description: 'Closed-won deals not yet invoiced',
              amount: 1_300_000,
              detail:
                'Pipeline deals marked "closed-won" in CRM but not yet invoiced in billing system; represents 23 contracts awaiting counter-signature or billing activation',
            },
          ],
        },
        {
          label: 'Multi-year normalization',
          amount: 800_000,
          color: '#8B5CF6',
          drillDownItems: [
            {
              description: 'Multi-year prepayment recognition differences',
              amount: 800_000,
              detail:
                'Multi-year prepayments recognized ratably in Zuora but at invoice in QuickBooks; 14 contracts affected',
            },
          ],
        },
        {
          label: 'Entity resolution',
          amount: VARIANCE_COMPONENTS.entityResolution, // 800_000
          color: '#10B981',
          drillDownItems: [
            {
              description: 'Entity resolution disagreement',
              amount: VARIANCE_COMPONENTS.entityResolution,
              detail:
                '3 accounts merged by seller that buyer keeps separate — rollup differences create $800K ARR attribution gap',
            },
          ],
        },
        {
          label: 'Classification',
          amount: VARIANCE_COMPONENTS.classification, // 500_000
          color: '#EF4444',
          drillDownItems: [
            {
              description: 'Revenue classification dispute',
              amount: VARIANCE_COMPONENTS.classification,
              detail:
                'Professional services revenue booked as recurring subscription in CRM; reclassifiable as non-recurring under buyer methodology',
            },
          ],
        },
      ],
    },
    status: 'review',
  },

  // ── 2. Customer Count ──
  {
    id: 'customer-count',
    name: 'Customer Count',
    sources: [
      { sourceName: 'CRM (Salesforce + HubSpot)', value: 3_450 },
      { sourceName: 'Billing (Zuora + Stripe + Chargebee)', value: 3_408 },
      { sourceName: 'GL (NetSuite + QuickBooks + SAP)', value: 3_391 },
    ],
    variance: {
      description: 'CRM vs Billing: +42 customers — minor discrepancy from entity resolution and inactive account retention',
      amount: 42,
      materiality: 'immaterial',
      categories: [
        {
          label: 'Inactive account retention',
          amount: 25,
          color: '#F59E0B',
          drillDownItems: [
            {
              description: 'Inactive CRM accounts still counted',
              amount: 25,
              detail:
                '25 accounts marked inactive in billing but still listed as active in CRM — no invoices in trailing 12 months',
            },
          ],
        },
        {
          label: 'Entity resolution delta',
          amount: 17,
          color: '#10B981',
          drillDownItems: [
            {
              description: 'Cross-system entity resolution differences',
              amount: 17,
              detail:
                '17 accounts deduplicated differently across systems; billing merges subsidiaries that CRM keeps separate',
            },
          ],
        },
      ],
    },
    status: 'reconciled',
  },

  // ── 3. Net Revenue Retention (NRR) ──
  {
    id: 'nrr',
    name: 'Net Revenue Retention',
    sources: [
      { sourceName: 'CRM (Salesforce + HubSpot)', value: 114 },
      { sourceName: 'Billing (Zuora + Stripe + Chargebee)', value: 112 },
      { sourceName: 'GL (NetSuite + QuickBooks + SAP)', value: 109 },
    ],
    variance: {
      description: 'CRM vs GL: -5pp spread driven by cohort methodology and churn definition differences',
      amount: -3, // Billing vs GL in percentage points
      materiality: 'material',
      categories: [
        {
          label: 'Cohort methodology',
          amount: -2,
          color: '#3B82F6',
          drillDownItems: [
            {
              description: 'Cohort start-date methodology disagreement',
              amount: -2,
              detail:
                'CRM uses booking date for cohort assignment; GL uses revenue recognition date — shifts 31 contracts across cohort boundaries, inflating CRM NRR by ~2pp',
            },
          ],
        },
        {
          label: 'Churn definition',
          amount: -1,
          color: '#EF4444',
          drillDownItems: [
            {
              description: 'Churn recognition timing difference',
              amount: -1,
              detail:
                'GL recognizes churn at contract end; CRM defers churn until renewal window closes (90-day grace) — 8 accounts in grace period with $1.6M combined ARR',
            },
          ],
        },
      ],
    },
    status: 'review',
  },

  // ── 4. Gross Margin ──
  {
    id: 'gross-margin',
    name: 'Gross Margin',
    sources: [
      { sourceName: 'CRM (Salesforce + HubSpot)', value: 74.8 },
      { sourceName: 'Billing (Zuora + Stripe + Chargebee)', value: 74.2 },
      { sourceName: 'GL (NetSuite + QuickBooks + SAP)', value: 73.8 },
    ],
    variance: {
      description: 'CRM vs GL: -1.0pp spread — minor differences in COGS classification',
      amount: -0.4, // Billing vs GL
      materiality: 'immaterial',
      categories: [
        {
          label: 'Discount classification',
          amount: -0.6,
          color: '#F59E0B',
          drillDownItems: [
            {
              description: 'Discount treatment in margin calculation',
              amount: -0.6,
              detail:
                'CRM excludes volume discounts from revenue line; GL nets them against gross revenue — affects 42 enterprise contracts with tiered pricing',
            },
          ],
        },
        {
          label: 'COGS allocation',
          amount: -0.4,
          color: '#8B5CF6',
          drillDownItems: [
            {
              description: 'Infrastructure cost allocation differences',
              amount: -0.4,
              detail:
                'GL allocates shared infrastructure costs across all product lines; CRM-derived margin excludes shared hosting — $340K COGS difference',
            },
          ],
        },
      ],
    },
    status: 'reconciled',
  },
];
```

src/data/scenarios.ts
```
// Predefined state snapshots for demo entry points.
// Each scenario defines store state to load for a specific demo starting point.
//
// SCENARIO-DRIVEN (mutate Zustand stores):
// 1. Screen S1: Ingestion interstitial -> processingStore.ingestionComplete
// 2. Screen S2: "Accept all High-confidence" -> annotationStore.bulkAccept()
// 3. Screen S3: Entity merge -> entityStore.mergeEntity()
// 4. Screen S4: Variance drill-down open -> processingStore (overlay only)
// 5. Screen S6: Drift absorption -> driftStore.absorbDrift()
// 6. Screen B1: Import interstitial -> processingStore
// 7. Screen B2: Reconstruction drill-down -> processingStore (overlay only)
// 8. Screen B4: Carry-forward -> processingStore + visual mode change
//
// PLAIN REACT STATE (do NOT use stores):
// - Tab switches (ToggleTabs)
// - Table sorting, filtering, column resizing
// - Accordion/row expand/collapse
// - Sidebar navigation clicks
// - Popover open/close
// - Modal open/close

import {
  ANNOTATION_COUNTS,
  ENTITY_COUNTS,
  CONCENTRATION,
  ENTITY_NAMES,
} from './_constants';

// State shapes matching each store's state interface (without actions).

interface AnnotationScenarioState {
  acceptedCount: number;
  totalCount: number;
  bulkAccepted: boolean;
  progressPercent: number;
  isProcessing: boolean;
}

interface EntityScenarioState {
  rawCount: number;
  uniqueCount: number;
  mergedEntities: Set<string>;
  topCustomerConcentration: number;
  mergeAnimationPhase: 'idle' | 'counter' | 'chart' | 'impact' | 'complete';
  isProcessing: boolean;
}

interface DriftScenarioState {
  driftAbsorbed: boolean;
  reviewPublished: boolean;
  isProcessing: boolean;
}

interface ProcessingScenarioState {
  activeOverlay: string | null;
  ingestionComplete: boolean;
  currentStep: number;
}

interface NavigationScenarioState {
  currentScreen: string;
  persona: 'sell-side' | 'buy-side' | 'hold-period' | null;
  screenHistory: string[];
}

interface IntegrationScenarioState {
  ingestionComplete: boolean;
  ingestionPhase: 'idle' | 'processing' | 'animating' | 'complete';
  systemAnnotationProgress: Record<string, number>;
  conflictsResolved: string[];
  kpisReconciled: string[];
  isProcessing: boolean;
}

interface VCPScenarioState {
  onboardingComplete: boolean;
  onboardingPhase: 'idle' | 'processing' | 'complete';
  driftResolved: boolean;
  driftResolutionPhase: 'idle' | 'reviewing' | 'processing' | 'resolved';
  v3Filters: {
    organization: 'all' | 'summit' | 'alpine' | 'front-range';
    kpiStatus: 'all' | 'on-target' | 'below-target' | 'critical';
    entityStatus: 'all' | 'new' | 'drift-resolved';
  };
  dataRoomGenerated: boolean;
  dataRoomPhase: 'idle' | 'processing' | 'complete';
  isProcessing: boolean;
}

interface AIScenarioState {
  queryExecuted: boolean;
  queryPhase: 'idle' | 'processing' | 'complete';
  a1Filters: {
    discrepancyType: 'all' | 'entity-duplication' | 'schema-drift' | 'definition-conflict' | 'missing-data' | 'none';
    severity: 'all' | 'critical' | 'high' | 'low';
    discrepanciesOnly: boolean;
  };
  datasetAssembled: boolean;
  assemblyPhase: 'idle' | 'processing' | 'complete';
  predictionRouted: boolean;
  routingPhase: 'idle' | 'routing' | 'complete';
  isProcessing: boolean;
}

export interface ScenarioSnapshot {
  annotationStore: AnnotationScenarioState;
  entityStore: EntityScenarioState;
  driftStore: DriftScenarioState;
  processingStore: ProcessingScenarioState;
  navigationStore: NavigationScenarioState;
  integrationStore?: IntegrationScenarioState;
  vcpStore?: VCPScenarioState;
  aiStore?: AIScenarioState;
}

export type ScenarioName = 'fresh' | 'sell-side-complete' | 'pre-merge' | 'post-close' | 'vcp-in-progress' | 'ai-ready';

// ── Scenario definitions ──

const FRESH: ScenarioSnapshot = {
  annotationStore: {
    acceptedCount: ANNOTATION_COUNTS.autoAccepted,
    totalCount: ANNOTATION_COUNTS.total,
    bulkAccepted: false,
    progressPercent: ANNOTATION_COUNTS.initialProgressPercent,
    isProcessing: false,
  },
  entityStore: {
    rawCount: ENTITY_COUNTS.rawRecords,
    uniqueCount: ENTITY_COUNTS.uniqueEntities,
    mergedEntities: new Set<string>(),
    topCustomerConcentration: CONCENTRATION.before,
    mergeAnimationPhase: 'idle',
    isProcessing: false,
  },
  driftStore: {
    driftAbsorbed: false,
    reviewPublished: false,
    isProcessing: false,
  },
  processingStore: {
    activeOverlay: null,
    ingestionComplete: false,
    currentStep: 0,
  },
  navigationStore: {
    currentScreen: 'landing',
    persona: null,
    screenHistory: [],
  },
};

const SELL_SIDE_COMPLETE: ScenarioSnapshot = {
  annotationStore: {
    acceptedCount: ANNOTATION_COUNTS.autoAccepted + ANNOTATION_COUNTS.pendingHigh, // 321
    totalCount: ANNOTATION_COUNTS.total,
    bulkAccepted: true,
    progressPercent: ANNOTATION_COUNTS.postBulkAcceptPercent, // 94
    isProcessing: false,
  },
  entityStore: {
    rawCount: ENTITY_COUNTS.rawRecords,
    uniqueCount: ENTITY_COUNTS.uniqueEntities - 1, // 3407 (one entity merged)
    mergedEntities: new Set<string>([ENTITY_NAMES.APEX_MEDICAL_ID]),
    topCustomerConcentration: CONCENTRATION.after, // 11.2
    mergeAnimationPhase: 'complete',
    isProcessing: false,
  },
  driftStore: {
    driftAbsorbed: true,
    reviewPublished: false,
    isProcessing: false,
  },
  processingStore: {
    activeOverlay: null,
    ingestionComplete: true,
    currentStep: 0,
  },
  navigationStore: {
    currentScreen: 'landing',
    persona: null,
    screenHistory: [],
  },
};

const PRE_MERGE: ScenarioSnapshot = {
  annotationStore: {
    acceptedCount: ANNOTATION_COUNTS.autoAccepted + ANNOTATION_COUNTS.pendingHigh, // 321
    totalCount: ANNOTATION_COUNTS.total,
    bulkAccepted: true,
    progressPercent: ANNOTATION_COUNTS.postBulkAcceptPercent, // 94
    isProcessing: false,
  },
  entityStore: {
    rawCount: ENTITY_COUNTS.rawRecords,
    uniqueCount: ENTITY_COUNTS.uniqueEntities, // 3408 (no merges yet)
    mergedEntities: new Set<string>(),
    topCustomerConcentration: CONCENTRATION.before, // 7.8
    mergeAnimationPhase: 'idle',
    isProcessing: false,
  },
  driftStore: {
    driftAbsorbed: true,
    reviewPublished: false,
    isProcessing: false,
  },
  processingStore: {
    activeOverlay: null,
    ingestionComplete: true,
    currentStep: 0,
  },
  navigationStore: {
    currentScreen: 'landing',
    persona: null,
    screenHistory: [],
  },
};

export const SCENARIOS: Partial<Record<ScenarioName, ScenarioSnapshot>> = {
  fresh: FRESH,
  'sell-side-complete': SELL_SIDE_COMPLETE,
  'pre-merge': PRE_MERGE,
} as const;
```

    recordCount: 1_400_000,

    id: SYSTEM_IDS.CHARGEBEE,
    name: 'Chargebee',
    type: 'billing',
    platform: 'chargebee',
    entity: 'Entity C',
    logoUrl: 'public/logos/chargebee.svg',
    abbreviation: 'CB',

    syncStatus: 'connected',
    lastSynced: '2026-03-10T07:55:00Z',
    tableCount: 7,
    fieldCount: 2_232,
    recordCount: 420_000,

];

```
import { SYSTEM_IDS } from './_constants';

/** Which legal entities are served by which systems */
export const ENTITY_SYSTEM_MAP = [
  { entity: 'Parent', systemIds: [SYSTEM_IDS.NETSUITE_PARENT, SYSTEM_IDS.SALESFORCE_ORG1, SYSTEM_IDS.ZUORA_PARENT] },
  { entity: 'Acquired A', systemIds: [SYSTEM_IDS.QUICKBOOKS, SYSTEM_IDS.SALESFORCE_ORG1, SYSTEM_IDS.STRIPE] },
  { entity: 'Acquired B', systemIds: [SYSTEM_IDS.QUICKBOOKS, SYSTEM_IDS.SALESFORCE_ORG2, SYSTEM_IDS.STRIPE] },
  { entity: 'Acquired C', systemIds: [SYSTEM_IDS.SAP_B1_AE3, SYSTEM_IDS.SALESFORCE_ORG2, SYSTEM_IDS.CHARGEBEE] },
  { entity: 'Acquired D', systemIds: [SYSTEM_IDS.HUBSPOT] },
] as const;

/** Display order for type lanes (top to bottom) */
export const TYPE_LANE_ORDER: ('erp' | 'crm' | 'billing')[] = ['erp', 'crm', 'billing'];

/** Colors per system type */
export const TYPE_COLORS: Record<string, string> = {
  erp: '#F97316',
  crm: '#3B82F6',
  billing: '#8B5CF6',
};

/** Get all system IDs that share at least one entity with the given system */
export function getRelatedSystemIds(systemId: string): Set<string> {
  const related = new Set<string>();
  for (const mapping of ENTITY_SYSTEM_MAP) {
    if (mapping.systemIds.includes(systemId as never)) {
      for (const id of mapping.systemIds) {
        related.add(id);
      }
    }
  }
  related.delete(systemId); // don't include self
  return related;
}
```

src/data/validate.ts
```
// Dev-mode data integrity validation.
// Called once on app startup when import.meta.env.DEV.
// Returns an array of error messages (empty = all good).

import {
  ARR_VALUES,
  VARIANCE_COMPONENTS,
  ANNOTATION_COUNTS,
  ENTITY_COUNTS,
} from './_constants';

const TOLERANCE = 100_000; // +/- $100K for financial comparisons

function withinTolerance(actual: number, expected: number): boolean {
  return Math.abs(actual - expected) < TOLERANCE;
}

export function validateDemoData(): string[] {
  const errors: string[] = [];

  // ── Check 1: Variance components sum to ARR_VALUES.variance ──
  const varianceSum =
    VARIANCE_COMPONENTS.timing +
    VARIANCE_COMPONENTS.entityResolution +
    VARIANCE_COMPONENTS.classification;

  if (!withinTolerance(varianceSum, ARR_VALUES.variance)) {
    errors.push(
      `Variance components sum (${varianceSum}) does not match ARR_VALUES.variance (${ARR_VALUES.variance}) within +/-${TOLERANCE}`
    );
  }

  // ── Check 2: Annotation count distribution matches ANNOTATION_COUNTS ──
  const annotationDistributionSum =
    ANNOTATION_COUNTS.autoAccepted +
    ANNOTATION_COUNTS.pendingHigh +
    ANNOTATION_COUNTS.medium +
    ANNOTATION_COUNTS.low;

  if (annotationDistributionSum !== ANNOTATION_COUNTS.total) {
    errors.push(
      `Annotation distribution sum (${annotationDistributionSum}) does not match total (${ANNOTATION_COUNTS.total})`
    );
  }

  // ── Check 3: Entity counts consistency ──
  if (ENTITY_COUNTS.uniqueEntities >= ENTITY_COUNTS.rawRecords) {
    errors.push(
      `uniqueEntities (${ENTITY_COUNTS.uniqueEntities}) should be less than rawRecords (${ENTITY_COUNTS.rawRecords})`
    );
  }

  // ── Check 4: Validate reconciliation data (static import) ──
  // Reconciliation checks are handled by the build-time script (scripts/validate-data.ts)
  // which can do proper static imports. This runtime validator only does basic checks.

  return errors;
}

// Auto-run in dev mode
if (typeof import.meta !== 'undefined' && import.meta.env?.DEV) {
  const devErrors = validateDemoData();
  if (devErrors.length > 0) {
    console.warn('[Data Foundry] Data validation errors:');
    devErrors.forEach((err) => console.warn(`  - ${err}`));
  }
}
```

src/hooks/useAnimatedCounter.ts
```
import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react';

/**
 * Animates a number from its current value to `target` over `duration` ms.
 * Only runs when `enabled` is true — avoids running on initial render.
 * Uses ease-out cubic timing: 1 - (1 - t)^3
 */
export function useAnimatedCounter(
  target: number,
  duration = 1000,
  enabled = true,
): number {
  const [current, setCurrent] = useState(target);
  const rafRef = useRef<number | null>(null);
  const startValueRef = useRef(target);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!enabled) {
      setCurrent(target);
      return;
    }

    const startValue = startValueRef.current;
    if (startValue === target) return;

    const startTime = performance.now();
    const delta = target - startValue;

    const animate = (now: number) => {
      const elapsed = now - startTime;
      const t = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1);
      // Ease-out cubic
      const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - t, 3);
      const value = Math.round(startValue + delta * eased);
      setCurrent(value);

      if (t < 1) {
        rafRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(animate);
      } else {
        startValueRef.current = target;
      }
    };

    rafRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(animate);

    return () => {
      if (rafRef.current !== null) {
        cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current);
      }
    };
  }, [target, duration, enabled]);

  // Keep startValueRef in sync when target changes and animation completes
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!enabled) {
      startValueRef.current = target;
    }
  }, [target, enabled]);

  return current;
}
```

src/hooks/useDerivedMetrics.ts
```
import { useAnnotationStore } from '../store/annotationStore';
import { useEntityStore } from '../store/entityStore';
import { useDriftStore } from '../store/driftStore';
import { useProcessingStore } from '../store/processingStore';

interface DerivedMetrics {
  /** Weighted average: annotation 40%, entity resolution 30%, exhibit readiness 30% */
  overallCompletionPercent: number;
  /** True when all sell-side interactions are complete */
  sellSideReadiness: boolean;
  /** Count of unresolved items across all stores */
  pendingActions: number;
}

/**
 * Composition point for cross-store data.
 * Reads from multiple Zustand stores and computes derived values.
 * Stores must NOT import from each other — screens that need values
 * from multiple stores use this hook instead.
 */
export function useDerivedMetrics(): DerivedMetrics {
  // Annotation store
  const progressPercent = useAnnotationStore((s) => s.progressPercent);
  const bulkAccepted = useAnnotationStore((s) => s.bulkAccepted);

  // Entity store
  const mergedEntities = useEntityStore((s) => s.mergedEntities);
  const uniqueCount = useEntityStore((s) => s.uniqueCount);
  const rawCount = useEntityStore((s) => s.rawCount);

  // Drift store
  const driftAbsorbed = useDriftStore((s) => s.driftAbsorbed);

  // Processing store
  const ingestionComplete = useProcessingStore((s) => s.ingestionComplete);

  // --- Completion percentages per dimension ---

  // Annotation: use progressPercent directly (0-100)
  const annotationCompletion = progressPercent;

  // Entity resolution: percentage of deduplication done (merged > 0 means resolution performed)
  const entityResolutionProgress = mergedEntities.size > 0
    ? Math.min(100, ((rawCount - uniqueCount) / rawCount) * 100 + 20)
    : ((rawCount - uniqueCount) / rawCount) * 100;

  // Exhibit readiness: placeholder based on available signals
  const exhibitReadiness =
    (ingestionComplete ? 40 : 0) +
    (bulkAccepted ? 30 : 0) +
    (driftAbsorbed ? 30 : 0);

  // Weighted average
  const overallCompletionPercent = Math.round(
    annotationCompletion * 0.4 +
    entityResolutionProgress * 0.3 +
    exhibitReadiness * 0.3,
  );

  // Sell-side readiness: all key interactions complete
  const sellSideReadiness =
    bulkAccepted &&
    mergedEntities.size > 0 &&
    driftAbsorbed;

  // Pending actions: count of unresolved items
  let pendingActions = 0;
  if (!bulkAccepted) pendingActions++;
  if (mergedEntities.size === 0) pendingActions++;
  if (!driftAbsorbed) pendingActions++;
  if (!ingestionComplete) pendingActions++;

  return {
    overallCompletionPercent,
    sellSideReadiness,
    pendingActions,
  };
}
```

src/hooks/useHoldPeriodNavigation.ts
```
import { useCallback } from 'react';
import { useNavigate, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom';

const HOLD_PERIOD_SCREEN_ORDER = [
  'i-1', 'i-2', 'i-3',
  'v-1', 'v-2', 'v-3', 'v-4',
  'a-1', 'a-2', 'a-3',
] as const;

export type HoldPeriodScreen = typeof HOLD_PERIOD_SCREEN_ORDER[number];

function deriveCurrentIndex(pathname: string): number {
  const segments = pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean);
  const lastSegment = segments[segments.length - 1];
  const idx = HOLD_PERIOD_SCREEN_ORDER.indexOf(lastSegment as HoldPeriodScreen);
  return idx >= 0 ? idx : 0;
}

export function useHoldPeriodNavigation() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const location = useLocation();
  const currentIndex = deriveCurrentIndex(location.pathname);
  const currentScreen = HOLD_PERIOD_SCREEN_ORDER[currentIndex];

  const goNext = useCallback(() => {
    if (currentIndex < HOLD_PERIOD_SCREEN_ORDER.length - 1) {
      navigate(`/hold-period/${HOLD_PERIOD_SCREEN_ORDER[currentIndex + 1]}`);
    }
  }, [currentIndex, navigate]);

  const goBack = useCallback(() => {
    if (currentIndex > 0) {
      navigate(`/hold-period/${HOLD_PERIOD_SCREEN_ORDER[currentIndex - 1]}`);
    }
  }, [currentIndex, navigate]);

  const goToScreen = useCallback(
    (screen: HoldPeriodScreen) => navigate(`/hold-period/${screen}`),
    [navigate],
  );

  return {
    currentScreen,
    currentIndex,
    totalScreens: HOLD_PERIOD_SCREEN_ORDER.length,
    goNext,
    goBack,
    goToScreen,
    screens: HOLD_PERIOD_SCREEN_ORDER,
  };
}
```

src/hooks/useProgressAnimation.ts
```
import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react';

/**
 * Animates a percentage from `from` to `to` when `trigger` transitions to true.
 * Returns the current animated percentage.
 * Uses ease-out cubic timing: 1 - (1 - t)^3
 */
export function useProgressAnimation(
  from: number,
  to: number,
  duration = 800,
  trigger = false,
): number {
  const [current, setCurrent] = useState(from);
  const rafRef = useRef<number | null>(null);
  const prevTriggerRef = useRef(trigger);

  useEffect(() => {
    const wasTriggered = !prevTriggerRef.current && trigger;
    prevTriggerRef.current = trigger;

    if (!wasTriggered) return;

    const startTime = performance.now();
    const delta = to - from;

    const animate = (now: number) => {
      const elapsed = now - startTime;
      const t = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1);
      // Ease-out cubic
      const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - t, 3);
      setCurrent(from + delta * eased);

      if (t < 1) {
        rafRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(animate);
      }
    };

    rafRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(animate);

    return () => {
      if (rafRef.current !== null) {
        cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current);
      }
    };
  }, [trigger, from, to, duration]);

  return current;
}
```

src/hooks/useScreenNavigation.ts
```
import { useCallback, useMemo } from 'react';
import { useNavigate, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom';

type Persona = 'sell-side' | 'buy-side' | 'hold-period' | 'nav-migration';

const SCREEN_COUNTS: Record<Persona, number> = {
  'sell-side': 6,
  'buy-side': 4,
  'hold-period': 10,
  'nav-migration': 7,
};

function deriveCurrentScreen(pathname: string, persona: Persona): number {
  // Expected path format: /<persona>/<screenNumber>
  const segments = pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean);
  const lastSegment = segments[segments.length - 1];
  const parsed = parseInt(lastSegment, 10);
  if (!isNaN(parsed) && parsed >= 1 && parsed <= SCREEN_COUNTS[persona]) {
    return parsed;
  }
  return 1;
}

/**
 * Manages linear navigation through sell-side (screens 1-6) or buy-side (screens 1-4).
 * Derives current screen from the URL path and provides navigation helpers.
 */
export function useScreenNavigation(persona: Persona) {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const location = useLocation();

  const maxScreen = SCREEN_COUNTS[persona];
  const currentScreen = deriveCurrentScreen(location.pathname, persona);
  const screens = useMemo(
    () => Array.from({ length: maxScreen }, (_, i) => i + 1),
    [maxScreen],
  );

  const goToScreen = useCallback(
    (screen: number) => {
      if (screen >= 1 && screen <= maxScreen) {
        navigate(`/${persona}/${screen}`);
      }
    },
    [navigate, persona, maxScreen],
  );

  const goNext = useCallback(() => {
    if (currentScreen < maxScreen) {
      goToScreen(currentScreen + 1);
    }
  }, [currentScreen, maxScreen, goToScreen]);

  const goBack = useCallback(() => {
    if (currentScreen > 1) {
      goToScreen(currentScreen - 1);
    }
  }, [currentScreen, goToScreen]);

  return { currentScreen, goNext, goBack, goToScreen, screens };
}
```

src/scenarios/ScenarioContext.tsx
```
import { createContext, useContext, useLayoutEffect, useEffect, type ReactNode } from 'react';
import type { ScenarioData } from './types';
import { useAnnotationStore } from '../store/annotationStore';
import { useEntityStore } from '../store/entityStore';

const ScenarioContext = createContext<ScenarioData | null>(null);

// Scenario registry - populated by main.tsx to avoid circular imports
const scenarios = new Map<string, ScenarioData>();

export function registerScenario(id: string, scenario: ScenarioData) {
  scenarios.set(id, scenario);
}

export function getScenario(id: string | null): ScenarioData {
  const scenario = scenarios.get(id ?? 'meridian');
  if (!scenario) {
    // Fallback to first registered scenario
    const first = scenarios.values().next().value;
    if (!first) throw new Error('No scenarios registered. Call registerScenario() before rendering.');
    return first;
  }
  return scenario;
}

interface ScenarioProviderProps {
  scenarioId: string | null;
  children: ReactNode;
}

export function ScenarioProvider({ scenarioId, children }: ScenarioProviderProps) {
  const scenario = getScenario(scenarioId);

  // scenario object is derived from scenario.id — when id changes, everything changes
  // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    useAnnotationStore.getState().reinitialize(scenario.constants.ANNOTATION_COUNTS);
    useEntityStore.getState().reinitialize(
      scenario.constants.ENTITY_COUNTS,
      scenario.constants.CONCENTRATION
    );
  }, [scenario.id]);

  // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
  useEffect(() => {
    if (import.meta.env.DEV) {
      for (const exhibit of scenario.exhibits.definitions) {
        if (!scenario.exhibits.renderers[exhibit.id]) {
          console.error(`[ScenarioData] Exhibit "${exhibit.id}" has no registered renderer`);
        }
        if (!(exhibit.id in scenario.exhibits.data)) {
          console.error(`[ScenarioData] Exhibit "${exhibit.id}" has no data entry`);
        }
      }
    }
  }, [scenario.id]);

  return (
    <ScenarioContext.Provider value={scenario}>
      {children}
    </ScenarioContext.Provider>
  );
}

export function useScenario(): ScenarioData {
  const ctx = useContext(ScenarioContext);
  if (!ctx) throw new Error('useScenario must be used within ScenarioProvider');
  return ctx;
}
```

src/scenarios/types.ts
```
// ScenarioData — the complete shape of a scenario's data.
// Every field a screen or component consumes is represented here.
// This file imports ONLY from src/types/ — never from src/data/ or src/store/.

import type { SourceSystem, SchemaTable } from '../types/system';
import type {
  SourceOntology,
  CanonicalConcept,
  Annotation,
} from '../types/annotation';
import type { MatchCandidate, EntityResolutionStats } from '../types/entity';
import type {
  ReconciliationMetric,
  WaterfallItem,
} from '../types/metric';
import type { Exhibit } from '../types/exhibit';
import type { DriftEvent, QuarterlyRefresh } from '../types/drift';
import type {
  ReconstructedMetric,
  VarianceDecomposition,
  RiskFactor,
  IntegrationTask,
} from '../types/buyside';
import type {
  TimeComparison,
  DownstreamImpact,
  ExportFile,
  GhostNode,
  LineageNode,
  LineageEdge,
} from '../types/demo';
import type {
  ScenarioSnapshot,
  ScenarioName,
} from '../data/scenarios';
import type { CombinedEntity, SystemMigrationItem, IntegrationReadinessScore, IngestionAnimationState, SchemaConflict, SankeyFlow, KPIReconciliation } from '../types/integration';
import type { KPI, EBITDABridge, TuckInEntity, KPIDriftEvent, PortfolioHeatmapCell, DataRoomExhibit, DataRoomConfig, ExhibitPreviewData } from '../types/vcp';
import type { BrokenQueryResults, ResolvedQueryResults, MLFeatureCandidate, TrainingDatasetSummary, PredictionRouting } from '../types/ai';
import type {
  NAVCompany, NAVTable, NAVTableDetail, RiskCategory, NAVFieldAnnotation,
  PostingChainNode, PostingChainEdge, TieOutGate,
  ReconciliationGateCategory, ReconciliationGate,
  DimensionSetExplosion, DimensionTransaction, DimensionCompletenessRow,
  MigrationException, MigrationTask, MigrationArtifact,
} from './nav-migration/types';

// ── Constants shapes ──

export interface AnnotationCounts {
  readonly total: number;
  readonly autoAccepted: number;
  readonly pendingHigh: number;
  readonly medium: number;
  readonly low: number;
  readonly initialProgressPercent: number;
  readonly postBulkAcceptPercent: number;
}

export interface EntityCounts {
  readonly rawRecords: number;
  readonly uniqueEntities: number;
  readonly deduplicationRate: number;
}

export interface ConcentrationConfig {
  readonly before: number;
  readonly after: number;
  readonly threshold: number;
}

export interface SchemaStats {
  readonly totalSystems: number;
  readonly totalTables: number;
  readonly totalFields: number;
  readonly fieldsForAnnotation: number;
}

export interface CompanyInfo {
  readonly name: string;
  readonly industry: string;
  readonly arr: number;
  readonly ownership: string;
  readonly acquisitionCount: number;
  readonly founded: string;
  readonly employees: number;
  readonly exitStatus: string;
  readonly fiscalCalendar: string;
  readonly baseCurrency: string;
  readonly systemCount: number;
  readonly entityCount: number;
}

export interface DataQualityScore {
  readonly overall: string;
  readonly dimensions: readonly {
    readonly name: string;
    readonly grade: string;
    readonly detail: string;
  }[];
}

// ── Exhibit data shapes ──

export interface ExhibitDataMap {
  [exhibitId: string]: unknown;
}

export type ExhibitRenderer = (props: { data: unknown }) => React.ReactNode;

export interface LineagePath {
  label: string;
  nodes: LineageNode[];
  edges: LineageEdge[];
}

// ── Topology config ──

export interface EntitySystemMapping {
  entity: string;
  systemIds: string[];
}

// ── Cohort data ──

export interface CohortRow {
  cohort: string;
  months: number[];
}

// ── The main scenario data interface ──

export interface ScenarioData {
  id: string;
  company: CompanyInfo;

  // Constants — replaces _constants.ts per-scenario
  constants: {
    SYSTEM_IDS: Record<string, string>;
    FINANCIAL_VALUES: Record<string, number>; // ARR_VALUES or REVENUE_VALUES
    VARIANCE_COMPONENTS: Record<string, number>;
    ANNOTATION_COUNTS: AnnotationCounts;
    ENTITY_COUNTS: EntityCounts;
    CONCENTRATION: ConcentrationConfig;
    EXHIBIT_NAMES: Record<string, string>;
    CONCEPT_IDS: Record<string, string>;
    ENTITY_NAMES: {
      PRIMARY_ID: string;
      PRIMARY_VARIANTS: readonly string[];
      SECONDARY_ID: string;
      SECONDARY_VARIANTS: readonly string[];
    };
    SCHEMA_STATS: SchemaStats;
  };

  // Core data
  systems: SourceSystem[];
  sourceOntologies: SourceOntology[];
  unifiedOntology: CanonicalConcept[];
  annotations: Annotation[];

  // Entity resolution
  matchCandidates: MatchCandidate[];
  entityStats: EntityResolutionStats;
  mergeDownstreamImpact: DownstreamImpact;

  // Reconciliation
  reconciliation: {
    metrics: ReconciliationMetric[];
    labels: {
      source1: string;
      source2: string;
      source3: string;
      varianceLabel: string;
    };
  };

  // Exhibits
  exhibits: {
    definitions: Exhibit[];
    renderers: Record<string, ExhibitRenderer>;
    data: ExhibitDataMap;
    lineagePaths: LineagePath[];
    ghostNodes: GhostNode[];
    fullLineageGraph: { nodes: LineageNode[]; edges: LineageEdge[] };
    exhibitLineageMap: Record<string, string>;
  };

  // Waterfall / metrics
  waterfall: {
    items: WaterfallItem[];
    title: string;
  };
  cohortRetention: CohortRow[];

  // Drift / refresh
  quarterlyRefresh: QuarterlyRefresh;
  driftEvents: DriftEvent[];

  // Buy-side
  buyside: {
    reconstructedMetrics: ReconstructedMetric[];
    varianceDecomposition: VarianceDecomposition;
    riskFactors: RiskFactor[];
    integrationTasks: IntegrationTask[];
    exportFiles: ExportFile[];
    dataQualityScore: DataQualityScore;
  };

  // Schemas & lineage
  schemaTables: SchemaTable[];
  dbtModels: Record<string, string>;
  timeComparisons: TimeComparison[];

  // Store snapshots (pre-baked states for scenario loading)
  storeSnapshots: Partial<Record<ScenarioName, ScenarioSnapshot>>;

  // Hold-period data (null for scenarios without post-acquisition module)
  holdPeriod: {
    acquirer: CompanyInfo;
    combined: {
      entityCount: number;
      systemCount: number;
      totalFields: number;
      combinedRevenue: number;
    };

    // Act I: Integration
    combinedEntities: CombinedEntity[];
    systemMigrations: SystemMigrationItem[];
    ingestionAnimationData: IngestionAnimationState[];
    schemaConflicts: SchemaConflict[];
    sankeyFlows: SankeyFlow[];
    kpiReconciliations: KPIReconciliation[];
    integrationReadiness: IntegrationReadinessScore;

    // Act II: VCP
    tuckInEntity: TuckInEntity;
    kpiDriftEvent: KPIDriftEvent;
    portfolioHeatmap: PortfolioHeatmapCell[];
    kpis: KPI[];
    dataRoomExhibits: DataRoomExhibit[];
    dataRoomConfig: DataRoomConfig;
    ebitdaBridge: EBITDABridge[];
    entityOrgMap: Record<string, string>;
    exhibitPreviewData: Record<string, ExhibitPreviewData>;

    // Act III: AI
    brokenQueryResults: BrokenQueryResults;
    resolvedQueryResults: ResolvedQueryResults;
    mlFeatures: MLFeatureCandidate[];
    trainingDataset: TrainingDatasetSummary;
    predictionRouting: PredictionRouting;

    // Layout config
    problemScreens: {
      integration: { painStats: { value: string; label: string }[] };
      vcp: { painStats: { value: string; label: string }[] };
      ai: { painStats: { value: string; label: string }[] };
    };
    layoutConfig: {
      dealTimer: { day: number; total: number; label: string };
    };
  } | null;

  // Screen-specific display config
  problemScreen: {
    painStats: { value: string; label: string }[];
  };
  sellSideLayout: {
    dealTimer: { day: number; total: number; label: string };
  };
  buySideLayout: {
    dealTimer: { day: number; total: number; label: string };
  };

  // Topology layout config
  topology: {
    systemTypes: string[];
    laneLabels: Record<string, string>;
    typeColors: Record<string, string>;
    entitySystemMap: EntitySystemMapping[];
  };

  // Ontology diagram config
  unifiedOntologyCategories: string[];

  // Interaction behavior config (replaces hardcoded string IDs)
  interactions: {
    primaryMetricId: string;
    primaryMetricLabel: string;
    concentrationEntityLabel: string;
    primaryRiskId: string;
  };

  // NAV Migration data (null for scenarios without migration module)
  navMigration: {
    companies: NAVCompany[];
    tables: NAVTable[];
    tableDetails: Record<string, NAVTableDetail>;

    riskCategories: RiskCategory[];
    navAnnotations: NAVFieldAnnotation[];

    postingChain: {
      nodes: PostingChainNode[];
      edges: PostingChainEdge[];
      rentalNodes: PostingChainNode[];
      rentalEdges: PostingChainEdge[];
      tieOutGates: TieOutGate[];
    };

    gateCategories: ReconciliationGateCategory[];
    gates: ReconciliationGate[];

    dimensionSets: DimensionSetExplosion[];
    dimensionTransactions: DimensionTransaction[];
    dimensionCompleteness: DimensionCompletenessRow[];
    dimensionDiffData: {
      before: string[];
      after: string[];
      changes: { before: string; after: string }[];
    };

    exceptions: MigrationException[];

    migrationPlan: {
      tasks: MigrationTask[];
      artifacts: MigrationArtifact[];
      inputRequirements: string[];
    };

    problemScreen: {
      painStats: { value: string; label: string; color: 'red' | 'amber' | 'gray' }[];
    };
    layoutConfig: {
      dealTimer: { day: number; total: number; label: string };
    };

    counters: {
      inventory: { companies: number; tables: number; fields: number; nonStandard: number };
      risk: { nonStandard: number; highRiskFields: number; estimatedRework: string };
      gates: { total: number; passing: number; warn: number; fail: number };
      exceptions: { total: number; critical: number; high: number; medium: number; autoResolvable: number };
      dimensions: { uniqueSets: number; dimensionCodes: number; completenessPercent: number; incompleteRecords: number };
    };
  } | null;
}
```

src/screens/LandingPage.tsx
```
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { Building2, Activity, Stethoscope, Briefcase, Database } from 'lucide-react';
import { resetAllStores } from '../store/resetDemo';
import { useScenarioStore } from '../store/scenarioStore';
import { getScenario } from '../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';

const SCENARIO_OPTIONS = [
  {
    id: 'meridian',
    label: 'Meridian Software Group',
    subtitle: 'B2B SaaS / Healthcare IT',
    icon: Building2,
  },
  {
    id: 'summit-ortho',
    label: 'Summit Orthopedics Group',
    subtitle: 'PE-backed Orthopedic Practice',
    icon: Stethoscope,
  },
  {
    id: 'nav-migration',
    label: 'Cascade Rentals Group',
    subtitle: 'NAV 2018 Migration',
    icon: Database,
  },
] as const;

export default function LandingPage() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const setScenario = useScenarioStore((s) => s.setScenario);
  const [activeScenarioId, setActiveScenarioId] = useState<string>('meridian');

  // Reset all stores on mount for clean state
  useEffect(() => {
    resetAllStores();
  }, []);

  const scenario = getScenario(activeScenarioId);

  function handlePersonaClick(persona: 'sell-side' | 'buy-side' | 'hold-period' | 'nav-migration') {
    setScenario(activeScenarioId);
    if (persona === 'sell-side') {
      navigate('/sell-side/problem');
    } else if (persona === 'buy-side') {
      navigate('/buy-side/1');
    } else if (persona === 'nav-migration') {
      navigate('/nav-migration/problem');
    } else {
      navigate('/hold-period/i-0');
    }
  }

  const isNavMigration = activeScenarioId === 'nav-migration';

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-900 flex flex-col items-center justify-center px-6">
      {/* Logo */}
      <div className="mb-10 text-center">
        <img
          src="/logos/mtn-ekg-white.svg"
          alt="Data Foundry"
          className="h-14 w-auto mx-auto mb-4"
        />
        <h1
          className="text-4xl font-bold text-white tracking-tight"
          style={{ fontFamily: "'Inter', sans-serif" }}
        >
          Data Foundry
        </h1>
        <p className="mt-2 text-gray-400 text-sm">
          Schema-first semantic integration for M&A due diligence
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* Scenario selector */}
      <div className="mb-8 w-full max-w-3xl">
        <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-medium uppercase tracking-wider mb-3 text-center">
          Select Demo Scenario
        </p>
        <div className="flex gap-3 justify-center">
          {SCENARIO_OPTIONS.map((opt) => {
            const isActive = activeScenarioId === opt.id;
            const Icon = opt.icon;
            return (
              <button
                key={opt.id}
                type="button"
                onClick={() => setActiveScenarioId(opt.id)}
                className={`flex items-center gap-3 px-5 py-3 rounded-lg border transition-all cursor-pointer ${
                  isActive
                    ? 'bg-white/10 border-blue-400/50 text-white'
                    : 'bg-white/5 border-white/10 text-gray-400 hover:bg-white/8 hover:border-white/20'
                }`}
              >
                <Icon className={`w-5 h-5 ${isActive ? 'text-blue-400' : 'text-gray-500'}`} />
                <div className="text-left">
                  <div className={`text-sm font-medium ${isActive ? 'text-white' : 'text-gray-300'}`}>
                    {opt.label}
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">{opt.subtitle}</div>
                </div>
              </button>
            );
          })}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Persona cards — conditional based on scenario */}
      <div className="flex gap-6 max-w-4xl w-full justify-center">
        {isNavMigration ? (
          /* NAV Migration: single Migration card */
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={() => handlePersonaClick('nav-migration')}
            className="flex-1 max-w-sm bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-8 text-left hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-amber-400/40 transition-all group cursor-pointer"
          >
            <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-lg bg-amber-500/20 flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
              <Database className="w-6 h-6 text-amber-400" />
            </div>
            <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-white mb-1">Migration</h2>
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-4">NAV 2018 → Business Central</p>
            <div className="border-t border-white/10 pt-4">
              <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-medium uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">
                {scenario.company.name}
              </p>
              <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">
                4 NAV companies &middot;{' '}
                {scenario.constants.SCHEMA_STATS.totalFields.toLocaleString()} fields &middot; 7 screens
              </p>
            </div>
          </button>
        ) : (
          /* Standard scenarios: Sell-Side, Buy-Side, Hold Period */
          <>
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => handlePersonaClick('sell-side')}
              className="flex-1 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-8 text-left hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-blue-400/40 transition-all group cursor-pointer"
            >
              <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-lg bg-blue-500/20 flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
                <Building2 className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-400" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-white mb-1">Sell-Side</h2>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-4">Prepare for Exit</p>
              <div className="border-t border-white/10 pt-4">
                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-medium uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">
                  {scenario.company.name}
                </p>
                <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">
                  {scenario.constants.SCHEMA_STATS.totalSystems} source systems &middot;{' '}
                  {scenario.constants.SCHEMA_STATS.totalFields.toLocaleString()} fields &middot; 6 screens
                </p>
              </div>
            </button>

            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => handlePersonaClick('buy-side')}
              className="flex-1 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-8 text-left hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-emerald-400/40 transition-all group cursor-pointer"
            >
              <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-lg bg-emerald-500/20 flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
                <Activity className="w-6 h-6 text-emerald-400" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-white mb-1">Buy-Side</h2>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-4">Verify & Integrate</p>
              <div className="border-t border-white/10 pt-4">
                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-medium uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">
                  PE Due Diligence
                </p>
                <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">
                  Independent reconstruction &middot; Risk analysis &middot; 4 screens
                </p>
              </div>
            </button>

            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => handlePersonaClick('hold-period')}
              disabled={!scenario.holdPeriod}
              className={`flex-1 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-8 text-left transition-all group ${
                !scenario.holdPeriod
                  ? 'opacity-40 cursor-not-allowed'
                  : 'hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-violet-400/40 cursor-pointer'
              }`}
            >
              <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-lg bg-violet-500/20 flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
                <Briefcase className="w-6 h-6 text-violet-400" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-white mb-1">Hold Period</h2>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-4">Post-Acquisition Integration</p>
              <div className="border-t border-white/10 pt-4">
                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-medium uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">
                  {scenario.holdPeriod ? 'Integration + VCP + AI' : 'Not available for this scenario'}
                </p>
                <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">
                  {scenario.holdPeriod
                    ? `${scenario.holdPeriod.combined.systemCount} combined systems \u00B7 15 screens`
                    : 'Select Summit Ortho to enable'}
                </p>
              </div>
            </button>
          </>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Footer */}
      <p className="mt-12 text-xs text-gray-600">
        Demo &middot; All data is fictional ({scenario.company.name})
      </p>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/store/aiStore.ts
```
import { create } from 'zustand';

export interface A1Filters {
  discrepancyType: 'all' | 'entity-duplication' | 'schema-drift' | 'definition-conflict' | 'missing-data' | 'none';
  severity: 'all' | 'critical' | 'high' | 'low';
  discrepanciesOnly: boolean;
}

interface AIState {
  // A-1: Query comparison
  queryExecuted: boolean;
  queryPhase: 'idle' | 'processing' | 'complete';
  a1Filters: A1Filters;

  // A-2: Feature assembly
  datasetAssembled: boolean;
  assemblyPhase: 'idle' | 'processing' | 'complete';

  // A-3: Feedback loop
  predictionRouted: boolean;
  routingPhase: 'idle' | 'routing' | 'complete';

  isProcessing: boolean;
}

interface AIActions {
  runQuery: () => void;
  completeQuery: () => void;
  setA1Filter: (key: keyof A1Filters, value: string | boolean) => void;
  resetA1Filters: () => void;
  startAssembly: () => void;
  completeAssembly: () => void;
  routePrediction: () => void;
  completeRouting: () => void;
  setProcessing: (v: boolean) => void;
  reset: () => void;
}

const DEFAULT_A1_FILTERS: A1Filters = {
  discrepancyType: 'all',
  severity: 'all',
  discrepanciesOnly: false,
};

export const INITIAL_STATE: AIState = {
  queryExecuted: false,
  queryPhase: 'idle',
  a1Filters: { ...DEFAULT_A1_FILTERS },
  datasetAssembled: false,
  assemblyPhase: 'idle',
  predictionRouted: false,
  routingPhase: 'idle',
  isProcessing: false,
};

export const useAIStore = create<AIState & AIActions>((set) => ({
  ...INITIAL_STATE,
  runQuery: () => set({ queryPhase: 'processing', isProcessing: true }),
  completeQuery: () => set({ queryExecuted: true, queryPhase: 'complete', isProcessing: false }),
  setA1Filter: (key, value) =>
    set((state) => ({ a1Filters: { ...state.a1Filters, [key]: value } })),
  resetA1Filters: () => set({ a1Filters: { ...DEFAULT_A1_FILTERS } }),
  startAssembly: () => set({ assemblyPhase: 'processing', isProcessing: true }),
  completeAssembly: () => set({ datasetAssembled: true, assemblyPhase: 'complete', isProcessing: false }),
  routePrediction: () => set({ routingPhase: 'routing', isProcessing: true }),
  completeRouting: () => set({ predictionRouted: true, routingPhase: 'complete', isProcessing: false }),
  setProcessing: (v) => set({ isProcessing: v }),
  reset: () => set({ ...INITIAL_STATE }),
}));
```

src/store/annotationStore.ts
```
import { create } from 'zustand';
import { ANNOTATION_COUNTS } from '../data/_constants';
import type { AnnotationCounts } from '../scenarios/types';

interface AnnotationState {
  acceptedCount: number;
  totalCount: number;
  bulkAccepted: boolean;
  progressPercent: number;
  isProcessing: boolean;
  pendingHighCount: number;
  postBulkAcceptPercent: number;
}

interface AnnotationActions {
  bulkAccept: () => void;
  reinitialize: (counts: AnnotationCounts) => void;
  reset: () => void;
}

export const INITIAL_STATE: AnnotationState = {
  acceptedCount: ANNOTATION_COUNTS.autoAccepted,       // 287
  totalCount: ANNOTATION_COUNTS.total,                  // 342
  bulkAccepted: false,
  progressPercent: ANNOTATION_COUNTS.initialProgressPercent, // 84
  isProcessing: false,
  pendingHighCount: ANNOTATION_COUNTS.pendingHigh,      // 34
  postBulkAcceptPercent: ANNOTATION_COUNTS.postBulkAcceptPercent, // 94
};

export const useAnnotationStore = create<AnnotationState & AnnotationActions>((set, get) => ({
  ...INITIAL_STATE,

  bulkAccept: () => {
    const state = get();
    set({
      acceptedCount: state.acceptedCount + state.pendingHighCount,
      progressPercent: state.postBulkAcceptPercent,
      bulkAccepted: true,
    });
  },

  reinitialize: (counts: AnnotationCounts) =>
    set({
      acceptedCount: counts.autoAccepted,
      totalCount: counts.total,
      bulkAccepted: false,
      progressPercent: counts.initialProgressPercent,
      isProcessing: false,
      pendingHighCount: counts.pendingHigh,
      postBulkAcceptPercent: counts.postBulkAcceptPercent,
    }),

  reset: () => set({ ...INITIAL_STATE }),
}));
```

};

src/store/entityStore.ts
```
import { create } from 'zustand';
import { ENTITY_COUNTS, CONCENTRATION } from '../data/_constants';
import type { EntityCounts, ConcentrationConfig } from '../scenarios/types';

type MergeAnimationPhase = 'idle' | 'counter' | 'chart' | 'impact' | 'complete';

interface EntityState {
  rawCount: number;
  uniqueCount: number;
  mergedEntities: Set<string>;
  topCustomerConcentration: number;
  concentrationAfter: number;
  mergeAnimationPhase: MergeAnimationPhase;
  isProcessing: boolean;
}

interface EntityActions {
  mergeEntity: (id: string) => void;
  setAnimationPhase: (phase: MergeAnimationPhase) => void;
  reinitialize: (counts: EntityCounts, concentration: ConcentrationConfig) => void;
  reset: () => void;
}

export const INITIAL_STATE: EntityState = {
  rawCount: ENTITY_COUNTS.rawRecords,           // 4200
  uniqueCount: ENTITY_COUNTS.uniqueEntities,    // 3408
  mergedEntities: new Set<string>(),
  topCustomerConcentration: CONCENTRATION.before, // 7.8
  concentrationAfter: CONCENTRATION.after,        // 11.2
  mergeAnimationPhase: 'idle',
  isProcessing: false,
};

export const useEntityStore = create<EntityState & EntityActions>((set) => ({
  ...INITIAL_STATE,

  mergeEntity: (id: string) =>
    set((state) => {
      if (state.mergedEntities.has(id)) return state;
      const newMerged = new Set(state.mergedEntities);
      newMerged.add(id);
      return {
        mergedEntities: newMerged,
        uniqueCount: state.uniqueCount - 1,
        topCustomerConcentration: state.concentrationAfter,
      };
    }),

  setAnimationPhase: (phase: MergeAnimationPhase) =>
    set({ mergeAnimationPhase: phase }),

  reinitialize: (counts: EntityCounts, concentration: ConcentrationConfig) =>
    set({
      rawCount: counts.rawRecords,
      uniqueCount: counts.uniqueEntities,
      mergedEntities: new Set<string>(),
      topCustomerConcentration: concentration.before,
      concentrationAfter: concentration.after,
      mergeAnimationPhase: 'idle',
      isProcessing: false,
    }),

  reset: () => set({ ...INITIAL_STATE, mergedEntities: new Set<string>() }),
}));
```

src/store/integrationStore.ts
```
import { create } from 'zustand';
import type { I2Filters } from '../screens/hold-period/components/harmonization-types';
import type { I3CascadeFilters } from '../screens/hold-period/components/reconciliation-types';

interface IntegrationState {
  // I-1: Ingestion
  ingestionComplete: boolean;
  ingestionPhase: 'idle' | 'processing' | 'animating' | 'complete';
  systemAnnotationProgress: Record<string, number>;

  // I-1: View state
  i1ActiveView: 'systems' | 'topology';
  i1SelectedSystem: string | null;
  i1Filters: {
    organization: 'all' | 'acquirer' | 'target';
    status: 'all' | 'mapped' | 'in-progress' | 'unmapped';
    confidence: 'all' | 'high' | 'medium' | 'low';
  };

  // I-2: Schema harmonization
  harmonizationComplete: boolean;
  conflictsResolved: string[];
  i2Filters: I2Filters;
  i2SelectedMapping: string | null;

  // I-3: KPI reconciliation
  kpisReconciled: string[];
  i3CascadeFilters: I3CascadeFilters;

  isProcessing: boolean;
}

interface IntegrationActions {
  startIngestion: () => void;
  completeIngestion: () => void;
  completeHarmonization: () => void;
  resolveConflict: (conceptName: string) => void;
  reconcileKpi: (kpiId: string) => void;
  setProcessing: (v: boolean) => void;
  reset: () => void;
  setI1ActiveView: (view: 'systems' | 'topology') => void;
  setI1SelectedSystem: (systemId: string | null) => void;
  setI1Filter: (key: 'organization' | 'status' | 'confidence', value: string) => void;
  resetI1Filters: () => void;
  setI2Filter: (key: keyof I2Filters, value: string) => void;
  setI2SelectedMapping: (id: string | null) => void;
  resetI2Filters: () => void;
  setI3CascadeFilter: (key: keyof I3CascadeFilters, value: string) => void;
  resetI3CascadeFilters: () => void;
}

export const INITIAL_STATE: IntegrationState = {
  ingestionComplete: false,
  ingestionPhase: 'idle',
  systemAnnotationProgress: {},
  harmonizationComplete: false,
  conflictsResolved: [],
  i2Filters: { organization: 'all' as const, status: 'all' as const, confidence: 'all' as const, concept: 'all' as const },
  i2SelectedMapping: null,
  kpisReconciled: [],
  i3CascadeFilters: { kpi: 'all' as const, type: 'all' as const },
  isProcessing: false,
  i1ActiveView: 'systems' as const,
  i1SelectedSystem: null,
  i1Filters: { organization: 'all' as const, status: 'all' as const, confidence: 'all' as const },
};

export const useIntegrationStore = create<IntegrationState & IntegrationActions>((set) => ({
  ...INITIAL_STATE,
  startIngestion: () => set({ ingestionPhase: 'processing', isProcessing: true }),
  completeIngestion: () => set({ ingestionComplete: true, ingestionPhase: 'complete', isProcessing: false }),
  resolveConflict: (conceptName) => set((s) => ({
    conflictsResolved: [...s.conflictsResolved, conceptName],
  })),
  reconcileKpi: (kpiId) => set((s) => ({
    kpisReconciled: [...s.kpisReconciled, kpiId],
  })),
  setProcessing: (v) => set({ isProcessing: v }),
  completeHarmonization: () => set({ harmonizationComplete: true }),
  reset: () => set({ ...INITIAL_STATE }),
  setI1ActiveView: (view) => set({ i1ActiveView: view }),
  setI1SelectedSystem: (systemId) => set({ i1SelectedSystem: systemId }),
  setI1Filter: (key, value) => set((s) => ({
    i1Filters: { ...s.i1Filters, [key]: value },
  })),
  resetI1Filters: () => set({
    i1Filters: { organization: 'all', status: 'all', confidence: 'all' },
  }),
  setI2Filter: (key, value) => set((s) => ({
    i2Filters: { ...s.i2Filters, [key]: value },
  })),
  setI2SelectedMapping: (id) => set({ i2SelectedMapping: id }),
  resetI2Filters: () => set({
    i2Filters: { organization: 'all', status: 'all', confidence: 'all', concept: 'all' },
  }),
  setI3CascadeFilter: (key, value) => set((s) => ({
    i3CascadeFilters: { ...s.i3CascadeFilters, [key]: value },
  })),
  resetI3CascadeFilters: () => set({
    i3CascadeFilters: { kpi: 'all', type: 'all' },
  }),
}));
```

src/store/navMigrationStore.ts
```
import { create } from 'zustand';

interface NavMigrationState {
  // N1
  discoveryComplete: boolean;
  // N2
  riskScanComplete: boolean;
  bulkAnnotationsAccepted: boolean;
  // N3
  rentalOverlayVisible: boolean;
  // N4
  resolvedGates: string[];
  // N5
  dimensionMappingSuggested: boolean;
  // N6
  resolvedExceptions: string[];
  bulkExceptionsResolved: boolean;
  // N7
  artifactsGenerated: boolean;
  // Shared
  isProcessing: boolean;
}

interface NavMigrationActions {
  completeDiscovery: () => void;
  completeRiskScan: () => void;
  acceptBulkAnnotations: () => void;
  toggleRentalOverlay: () => void;
  resolveGate: (id: string) => void;
  suggestDimensionMapping: () => void;
  resolveException: (id: string) => void;
  bulkResolveExceptions: () => void;
  generateArtifacts: () => void;
  setProcessing: (v: boolean) => void;
  reset: () => void;
}

const INITIAL_STATE: NavMigrationState = {
  discoveryComplete: false,
  riskScanComplete: false,
  bulkAnnotationsAccepted: false,
  rentalOverlayVisible: false,
  resolvedGates: [],
  dimensionMappingSuggested: false,
  resolvedExceptions: [],
  bulkExceptionsResolved: false,
  artifactsGenerated: false,
  isProcessing: false,
};

export const useNavMigrationStore = create<NavMigrationState & NavMigrationActions>((set) => ({
  ...INITIAL_STATE,

  completeDiscovery: () => set({ discoveryComplete: true }),
  completeRiskScan: () => set({ riskScanComplete: true }),
  acceptBulkAnnotations: () => set({ bulkAnnotationsAccepted: true }),
  toggleRentalOverlay: () => set((s) => ({ rentalOverlayVisible: !s.rentalOverlayVisible })),
  resolveGate: (id) => set((s) => ({ resolvedGates: [...s.resolvedGates, id] })),
  suggestDimensionMapping: () => set({ dimensionMappingSuggested: true }),
  resolveException: (id) => set((s) => ({ resolvedExceptions: [...s.resolvedExceptions, id] })),
  bulkResolveExceptions: () => set({ bulkExceptionsResolved: true }),
  generateArtifacts: () => set({ artifactsGenerated: true }),
  setProcessing: (v) => set({ isProcessing: v }),
  reset: () => set({ ...INITIAL_STATE }),
}));
```

src/store/navigationStore.ts
```
import { create } from 'zustand';

export type Persona = 'sell-side' | 'buy-side' | 'hold-period' | 'nav-migration' | null;

interface NavigationState {
  currentScreen: string;
  persona: Persona;
  screenHistory: string[];
}

interface NavigationActions {
  setScreen: (screen: string) => void;
  setPersona: (persona: Persona) => void;
  goNext: () => void;
  goBack: () => void;
  reset: () => void;
}

export const INITIAL_STATE: NavigationState = {
  currentScreen: 'landing',
  persona: null,
  screenHistory: [],
};

export const useNavigationStore = create<NavigationState & NavigationActions>((set, get) => ({
  ...INITIAL_STATE,

  setScreen: (screen: string) =>
    set((state) => ({
      currentScreen: screen,
      screenHistory: [...state.screenHistory, state.currentScreen],
    })),

  setPersona: (persona: Persona) => {
    // Reset persona-dependent stores when switching persona
    // Import is deferred to avoid circular dependency at module load
    import('./resetDemo').then(({ resetPersonaStores }) => resetPersonaStores());
    set({ persona });
  },

  goNext: () => {
    // Screen ordering is handled by the component layer;
    // this is a convenience for linear navigation if needed.
    const { currentScreen } = get();
    set((state) => ({
      screenHistory: [...state.screenHistory, currentScreen],
    }));
  },

  goBack: () =>
    set((state) => {
      const history = [...state.screenHistory];
      const previous = history.pop();
      if (!previous) return state;
      return {
        currentScreen: previous,
        screenHistory: history,
      };
    }),

  reset: () => set({ ...INITIAL_STATE, screenHistory: [] }),
}));
```

src/store/processingStore.ts
```
import { create } from 'zustand';

interface ProcessingState {
  activeOverlay: string | null;
  ingestionComplete: boolean;
  currentStep: number;
}

interface ProcessingActions {
  startProcessing: (overlayId: string, steps: number) => void;
  completeStep: () => void;
  endProcessing: () => void;
  reset: () => void;
}

export const INITIAL_STATE: ProcessingState = {
  activeOverlay: null,
  ingestionComplete: false,
  currentStep: 0,
};

export const useProcessingStore = create<ProcessingState & ProcessingActions>((set) => ({
  ...INITIAL_STATE,

  startProcessing: (overlayId: string, _steps: number) =>
    set({
      activeOverlay: overlayId,
      currentStep: 0,
    }),

  completeStep: () =>
    set((state) => ({
      currentStep: state.currentStep + 1,
    })),

  endProcessing: () =>
    set({
      activeOverlay: null,
      currentStep: 0,
      ingestionComplete: true,
    }),

  reset: () => set({ ...INITIAL_STATE }),
}));
```

src/store/resetDemo.ts
```
import { useAnnotationStore } from './annotationStore';
import { useEntityStore } from './entityStore';
import { useNavigationStore } from './navigationStore';
import { useDriftStore } from './driftStore';
import { useProcessingStore } from './processingStore';
import { useScenarioStore } from './scenarioStore';
import { useIntegrationStore } from './integrationStore';
import { useVCPStore } from './vcpStore';
import { useAIStore } from './aiStore';
import { useNavMigrationStore } from './navMigrationStore';

export function resetAllStores(): void {
  useScenarioStore.getState().reset();
  useAnnotationStore.getState().reset();
  useEntityStore.getState().reset();
  useNavigationStore.getState().reset();
  useDriftStore.getState().reset();
  useProcessingStore.getState().reset();
  useIntegrationStore.getState().reset();
  useVCPStore.getState().reset();
  useAIStore.getState().reset();
  useNavMigrationStore.getState().reset();
}

export function resetPersonaStores(): void {
  useAnnotationStore.getState().reset();
  useEntityStore.getState().reset();
  useDriftStore.getState().reset();
  useProcessingStore.getState().reset();
  useIntegrationStore.getState().reset();
  useVCPStore.getState().reset();
  useAIStore.getState().reset();
  useNavMigrationStore.getState().reset();
}
```

src/store/scenarioStore.ts
```
import { create } from 'zustand';
import { persist, createJSONStorage } from 'zustand/middleware';

interface ScenarioState {
  scenarioId: string | null;
}

interface ScenarioActions {
  setScenario: (id: string) => void;
  reset: () => void;
}

export const useScenarioStore = create<ScenarioState & ScenarioActions>()(
  persist(
    (set) => ({
      scenarioId: null,
      setScenario: (id: string) => set({ scenarioId: id }),
      reset: () => set({ scenarioId: null }),
    }),
    {
      name: 'data-foundry-scenario',
      storage: createJSONStorage(() => sessionStorage),
    },
  ),
);
```

src/store/vcpStore.ts
```
import { create } from 'zustand';
import type { V3Filters } from '../screens/hold-period/components/portfolio-types';
import { V3_DEFAULT_FILTERS } from '../screens/hold-period/components/portfolio-types';

interface VCPState {
  // V-1: Tuck-in onboarding
  onboardingComplete: boolean;
  onboardingPhase: 'idle' | 'processing' | 'complete';

  // V-2: Drift detection
  driftResolved: boolean;
  driftResolutionPhase: 'idle' | 'reviewing' | 'processing' | 'resolved';

  // V-3: Portfolio view filters
  v3Filters: V3Filters;

  // V-4: Data room generation
  dataRoomGenerated: boolean;
  dataRoomPhase: 'idle' | 'processing' | 'complete';

  isProcessing: boolean;
}

interface VCPActions {
  startOnboarding: () => void;
  completeOnboarding: () => void;
  startDriftResolution: () => void;
  completeDriftResolution: () => void;
  setV3Filter: (key: keyof V3Filters, value: string) => void;
  resetV3Filters: () => void;
  startDataRoomGeneration: () => void;
  completeDataRoomGeneration: () => void;
  setProcessing: (v: boolean) => void;
  reset: () => void;
}

export const INITIAL_STATE: VCPState = {
  onboardingComplete: false,
  onboardingPhase: 'idle',
  driftResolved: false,
  driftResolutionPhase: 'idle',
  v3Filters: { ...V3_DEFAULT_FILTERS },
  dataRoomGenerated: false,
  dataRoomPhase: 'idle',
  isProcessing: false,
};

export const useVCPStore = create<VCPState & VCPActions>((set) => ({
  ...INITIAL_STATE,
  startOnboarding: () => set({ onboardingPhase: 'processing', isProcessing: true }),
  completeOnboarding: () => set({ onboardingComplete: true, onboardingPhase: 'complete', isProcessing: false }),
  startDriftResolution: () => set({ driftResolutionPhase: 'processing', isProcessing: true }),
  completeDriftResolution: () => set({ driftResolved: true, driftResolutionPhase: 'resolved', isProcessing: false }),
  startDataRoomGeneration: () => set({ dataRoomPhase: 'processing', isProcessing: true }),
  completeDataRoomGeneration: () => set({ dataRoomGenerated: true, dataRoomPhase: 'complete', isProcessing: false }),
  setV3Filter: (key, value) =>
    set((s) => ({ v3Filters: { ...s.v3Filters, [key]: value } })),
  resetV3Filters: () => set({ v3Filters: { ...V3_DEFAULT_FILTERS } }),
  setProcessing: (v) => set({ isProcessing: v }),
  reset: () => set({ ...INITIAL_STATE }),
}));
```

src/styles/globals.css
```
/* Google Fonts */
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap');

@import "tailwindcss";

/* Design system color tokens */
:root {
  /* Brand */
  --color-primary: #1A56DB;
  --color-primary-light: #3B82F6;

  /* Status */
  --color-verified: #059669;
  --color-warning: #D97706;
  --color-error: #DC2626;
  --color-neutral: #6B7280;

  /* Confidence badges */
  --color-confidence-high: #059669;
  --color-confidence-medium: #D97706;
  --color-confidence-low: #DC2626;

  /* System accents */
  --color-system-netsuite: #F97316;
  --color-system-salesforce: #3B82F6;
  --color-system-hubspot: #F97316;
  --color-system-zuora: #8B5CF6;
  --color-system-stripe: #6366F1;
  --color-system-chargebee: #F59E0B;
  --color-system-quickbooks: #22C55E;
  --color-system-sapb1: #0EA5E9;
}

/* Base resets */
*,
*::before,
*::after {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

html {
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
}

body {
  margin: 0;
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
}

/* Utility: monospace font for financial data */
.font-mono {
  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
}

/* Entity merge animation keyframes */
@keyframes merge-flash {
  0%, 100% { border-color: transparent; }
  50% { border-color: #22c55e; }
}
```

// Types for Hold Period Act III: Enterprise AI Transformation (A-0 through A-4)

import type { ProcessingStep } from './demo';

export interface AIQueryResultRow {

}

  entityId: string;
  resolvedName?: string;
}

export interface BrokenQueryResults {
  rows: AIQueryResultRow[];
  payerVariants: PayerVariant[];
  calloutText: string;
  failureStatText: string;
  summaryStats: {
    conflictingDefinitions: number;
    duplicateSegments: number;
    systemsReturningZero: number;
    systemsReturningNA: number;
  };
}

export interface QueryResolutionStep {
  label: string;
  durationMs: number;
}

export interface ResolvedQueryResults {
  rows: AIQueryResultRow[];
  segmentBreakdown: {
    segmentName: string;
    metricValue: number;
    volume: number;
  }[];
  platformAverage: number;
  resolutionSteps: QueryResolutionStep[];
  summaryStats: {
    canonicalDefinitions: number;
    resolvedSegments: number;
    consistentEntities: number;
  };
}

export interface MLFeatureCandidate {
  name: string;
  canonicalConcept: string;
  sourceFieldCount: number;
  completeness: number;
  consistency: number;
  freshness: number;
  lineagePath: string[];
  demoOrigin?: string;
}

export interface TrainingDatasetSummary {
  totalRecords: number;
  positiveCount: number;
  positiveRate: number;
  negativeCount: number;
  positiveLabel: string;
  negativeLabel: string;
  perEntityContribution: {
    entityId: string;
    entityName: string;
    records: number;
  }[];
  largestSingleEntity: number;
  crossEntityMultiplier: number;
  assemblySteps: ProcessingStep[];
  counterfactual: {
    pipelineCount: number;
    definitionConflicts: number;
    segmentVariants: number;
    timelinePerEntity: number;
    estimatedCost: number;
  };
}

export interface SystemTranslation {
  systemId: string;
  systemName: string;
  targetField: string;
  alertLevel: string;
  worklistEntry: {
    priority: string;
    description: string;
  };
  entityIds: string[];
}

export interface PredictionRouting {
  prediction: {
    fields: { label: string; value: string }[];
    probability: number;
    probabilityLabel: string;
    reasoning: string;
    recommendedAction: string;
  };
  canonicalFormat: Record<string, string | number>;
  systemTranslations: SystemTranslation[];
  aggregateImpact: {
    items: { key: string; amount: number; label: string }[];
    total: number;
    multipleValue: number;
  };
  routingSteps: ProcessingStep[];
}
