```
// Types for Hold Period Act II: KPI-Driven Value Creation (V-0 through V-4)

import type { ProcessingStep } from './demo';

export interface KPI {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  category: 'revenue' | 'cost' | 'operational' | 'clinical' | 'growth';
  current: number;
  target: number;
  unit: string;
  trend: 'improving' | 'flat' | 'declining';
  baselineSource: string;
}

export interface EBITDABridge {
  label: string;
  value: number;
  type: 'base' | 'add' | 'subtract' | 'total';
  initiativeId?: string;
}

export interface Initiative {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  category: string;
  status: 'in-progress' | 'not-started' | 'complete';
  ebitdaImpact: number;
  owner: string;
  linkedKpis: string[];
  timeline: { start: string; end: string };
}

export interface CohortAnalysis {
  cohort: string;
  periods: number[];
  metric: 'retention' | 'expansion';
}

export interface OperatingModelMetric {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  preDeal: number;
  current: number;
  target: number;
  unit: string;
}

// ── New types for revised hold-period screens ──

export interface TuckInAnnotationResults {
  totalFields: number;
  autoAccepted: number;
  autoAcceptRate: number;
  highConfidence: number;
  needsReview: number;
}

export interface TuckInKPIMapping {
  kpiId: string;
  kpiName: string;
  status: 'auto-mapped' | 'flagged';
  flagReason?: string;
  sourceField?: string;
}

export interface TuckInEntityMatch {
  matchedEntityName: string;
  matchType: 'auto-merge' | 'flagged';
  confidence: 'high' | 'medium';
  reason: string;
}

export interface TuckInEntity {
  name: string;
  sites: number;
  systems: { id: string; name: string }[];
  tables: number;
  fields: number;
  annotationResults: TuckInAnnotationResults;
  kpiMappings: TuckInKPIMapping[];
  entityMatches: TuckInEntityMatch[];
  processingSteps: ProcessingStep[];
}

export interface SchemaDiffEntry {
  field: string;
  changeType: 'enum-modified' | 'field-added' | 'enum-extended';
  before?: string;
  after: string;
  detail: string;
}

export interface DriftResolutionMapping {
  sourceValue: string;
  canonicalValue: string;
  confidence: 'high' | 'medium';
  reasoning: string;
  needsReview: boolean;
}

export interface KPIDriftEvent {
  systemName: string;
  detectedAt: string;
  affectedEntityIds: string[];
  schemaDiff: SchemaDiffEntry[];
  kpiImpacts: {
    kpiName: string;
    severity: 'breaking' | 'potential' | 'none';
    detail: string;
    brokenValue?: number;
    correctedValues?: Record<string, number>;
  }[];
  resolutionMappings: DriftResolutionMapping[];
  postResolution: {
    platformReconciledRate: number;
    annotationsFlaggedForReview: number;
    exhibitsRegenerated: string[];
  };
}

export interface PortfolioHeatmapCell {
  entityId: string;
  entityName: string;
  kpiId: string;
  kpiName: string;
  value: number;
  baseline: number;
  target: number;
  trend: 'up' | 'down' | 'flat';
  status: 'green' | 'yellow' | 'red';
  badges: ('new' | 'drift-resolved')[];
}

export interface LineageHistoryEntry {
  timestamp: string;
  eventType:
    | 'initial-annotation'
    | 'drift-detected'
    | 'drift-resolved'
    | 'schema-change'
    | 'entity-added'
    | 'definition-updated';
  description: string;
  beforeValue?: string;
  afterValue?: string;
  sourceSystem?: string;
  resolution?: string;
}

export interface DataRoomExhibit {
  exhibitId: string;
  name: string;
  category: 'existing' | 'hold-period';
  generationStatus: 'ready' | 'generating' | 'pending';
  previewData: Record<string, unknown>;
  lineageHistory: LineageHistoryEntry[];
}

export interface DataRoomConfig {
  entityScope: string[];
  timeRangeMonths: number;
  exhibitCount: number;
  processingSteps: ProcessingStep[];
}

// ── Exhibit preview data (discriminated union for type-safe rendering) ──

export type ExhibitPreviewData =
  | { type: 'table'; columns: string[]; rows: string[][] }
  | { type: 'waterfall'; bars: { label: string; value: number; barType: 'base' | 'add' | 'subtract' | 'total' }[] }
  | { type: 'key-value'; entries: { label: string; value: string }[] };
```

src/utils/formatters.ts
```
/**
 * Format a number as currency with M/K suffixes for large values.
 * 203_200_000 → "$203.2M", 1_100_000 → "$1.1M", 500_000 → "$500K", 47_832 → "$47,832"
 * Negative: -2_400_000 → "-$2.4M"
 */
export function formatCurrency(value: number): string {
  const abs = Math.abs(value);
  const sign = value < 0 ? '-' : '';

  if (abs >= 1_000_000) {
    const millions = abs / 1_000_000;
    // Show decimal only if it's not a whole number of millions
    const formatted = millions % 1 === 0 ? millions.toFixed(0) : millions.toFixed(1);
    return `${sign}$${formatted}M`;
  }

  if (abs >= 100_000) {
    const thousands = abs / 1_000;
    const formatted = thousands % 1 === 0 ? thousands.toFixed(0) : thousands.toFixed(1);
    return `${sign}$${formatted}K`;
  }

  return `${sign}$${abs.toLocaleString('en-US')}`;
}

/**
 * Format a number as a percentage.
 * 7.8 → "7.8%", 84 → "84%", 96.2 → "96.2%"
 */
export function formatPercentage(value: number, decimals?: number): string {
  if (decimals !== undefined) {
    return `${value.toFixed(decimals)}%`;
  }
  // Auto: show decimal only if present
  return `${value % 1 === 0 ? value.toFixed(0) : value.toString()}%`;
}

/**
 * Format a number as a signed currency delta.
 * 500_000 → "+$500K", -2_400_000 → "-$2.4M"
 */
export function formatDelta(value: number): string {
  const formatted = formatCurrency(value);
  if (value > 0) {
    return `+${formatted}`;
  }
  return formatted;
}

/**
 * Format a number with comma separators.
 * 47_832 → "47,832", 3_408 → "3,408"
 */
export function formatNumber(value: number): string {
  return value.toLocaleString('en-US');
}
```

src/utils/layoutGraph.ts
```
import dagre from 'dagre';
import type { Node, Edge } from 'reactflow';

interface LayoutOptions {
  /** Graph direction: 'TB' (top-bottom), 'LR' (left-right), etc. */
  rankdir?: string;
  /** Minimum horizontal separation between nodes */
  nodesep?: number;
  /** Minimum vertical separation between ranks */
  ranksep?: number;
}

const DEFAULT_NODE_WIDTH = 172;
const DEFAULT_NODE_HEIGHT = 36;

/**
 * Shared dagre layout utility for all ReactFlow components.
 * Computes positions for nodes based on graph structure and returns
 * nodes with updated `position: { x, y }`.
 */
export function layoutGraph(
  nodes: Node[],
  edges: Edge[],
  options?: LayoutOptions,
): Node[] {
  const {
    rankdir = 'LR',
    nodesep = 50,
    ranksep = 150,
  } = options ?? {};

  const g = new dagre.graphlib.Graph();
  g.setDefaultEdgeLabel(() => ({}));
  g.setGraph({ rankdir, nodesep, ranksep });

  nodes.forEach((node) => {
    const width = node.width ?? DEFAULT_NODE_WIDTH;
    const height = node.height ?? DEFAULT_NODE_HEIGHT;
    g.setNode(node.id, { width, height });
  });

  edges.forEach((edge) => {
    g.setEdge(edge.source, edge.target);
  });

  dagre.layout(g);

  return nodes.map((node) => {
    const nodeWithPosition = g.node(node.id);
    const width = node.width ?? DEFAULT_NODE_WIDTH;
    const height = node.height ?? DEFAULT_NODE_HEIGHT;

    return {
      ...node,
      position: {
        // dagre centers nodes; offset to top-left for ReactFlow
        x: nodeWithPosition.x - width / 2,
        y: nodeWithPosition.y - height / 2,
      },
    };
  });
}
```

.claude/skills/software-feel-design/SKILL.md
```
---
name: software-feel-design
description: Evaluate, critique, or propose UI/UX designs from a software-feel perspective. Auto-triggers when the user asks to think through a design, critique a design, propose design suggestions, or evaluate whether something feels like software vs an infographic.
user-invocable: true
---

# Software-Feel Design Evaluation

When thinking through, critiquing, or proposing any design for this product, apply the following framework. Every design decision should push the interface toward feeling like **real enterprise software an M&A professional could sit down and use** — not a set of infographics or a slideshow.

## Core Evaluation Lens: Software vs Infographic

**Software signals** (pursue these):
- Sortable, filterable tables as the primary data surface
- Row-level actions (view, review, resolve, approve)
- Filter chips, search inputs, dropdown selectors
- Progressive disclosure: summary → detail → deep dive
- Persistent state (selections, filters, scroll position)
- Clickable numbers that drill into source data
- Keyboard navigation, hover states, focus rings
- Dense information display respecting user expertise
- Below-content detail panels triggered by row selection
- Status indicators tied to actionable workflows

**Infographic signals** (eliminate these):
- Animated counters or number roll-ups
- Gradient circles, progress rings, decorative SVG
- Triptych stat cards with icons
- "Congratulations" or completion celebration banners
- Auto-advancing animations that remove user control
- Large hero metrics with no drill-down capability
- Decorative illustrations or icons that don't convey data
- Fixed layouts that can't be filtered or sorted
- Back/Forward navigation buttons (slideshow pattern)
- Summary-only views with no path to underlying data

## UX Spec Principles (from design_docs/ux_ui_report.md)

Evaluate every design against these 8 principles:

### 1. Spreadsheet-as-Interface
The primary interaction model is a dense, sortable, filterable table — not cards, not dashboards, not visualizations. Tables are the default. Charts and diagrams are secondary views accessed via toggle, not the landing state.

### 2. Progressive Disclosure (3 Layers)
- **Layer 1 (5-second scan):** Summary bar with key metrics. Scannable at a glance.
- **Layer 2 (30-second exploration):** Sortable table with filter chips. User controls what they see.
- **Layer 3 (deep dive):** Detail panel, lineage view, or drill-down. Only shown on explicit user action.

### 3. Confidence-Forward
Every automated output shows confidence level (High/Medium/Low) with provenance. No number appears without attribution to its source system and the confidence of its derivation.

### 4. No Decorative Elements
Every pixel conveys information or enables interaction. No gradients for aesthetics, no icons for decoration, no whitespace for "breathing room" at the expense of data density. If an element doesn't help the user make a decision, remove it.

### 5. Every Number Clickable
Any number displayed on screen should be a path to its source data, lineage, or detailed breakdown. Dead-end numbers erode trust.

### 6. Time-Aware
The 60-90 day exclusivity clock drives urgency. Time comparisons (traditional vs Data Foundry) reinforce value. Timestamps on data show freshness.

### 7. Auditability
Users must be able to trace any output back to its inputs. "View change history," "View lineage," and provenance links are not optional — they're core to the interface.

### 8. Two Audiences, One Truth
Same underlying data, persona-adapted views. Sell-side and buy-side see different presentations of identical facts. The data layer is shared; only the lens changes.

## How to Apply This Framework

When evaluating a design:

1. **Identify infographic signals** — List every element that feels like a presentation rather than a tool. Be specific: "the gradient progress ring on line 47" not "the progress indicator."

2. **Check each UX principle** — Score the design against all 8 principles. Note which are satisfied, which are partially met, and which are violated.

3. **Propose software alternatives** — For each infographic signal, propose a concrete replacement that serves the same informational purpose but feels like software. Include enough detail to implement.

4. **Evaluate interaction model** — Can the user sort? Filter? Select? Drill down? If not, the design is a poster, not a tool.

5. **Check data density** — Is the screen using space efficiently for an expert user? M&A professionals are comfortable with dense financial tables. Don't dumb it down.

When proposing a design:

1. **Start with the table** — What are the columns? What are the sort/filter options? What happens when you click a row?

2. **Add the summary bar** — What 4-6 metrics belong in the top-level scan?

3. **Design the detail panel** — What appears when a row is selected? What secondary data becomes available?

4. **Consider the secondary view** — Is there a topology, chart, or diagram that adds value? Make it a toggle, not the default.

5. **Validate against the 8 principles** — Before presenting, check every principle. Fix violations before sharing.
```

src/components/data-display/CohortTable.tsx
```
interface CohortData {
  cohort: string;
  months: number[];
}

interface CohortTableProps {
  data: CohortData[];
}

/**
 * Returns a background color based on retention percentage.
 * 100% = full green, <80% transitions toward red.
 */
function retentionColor(value: number): string {
  if (value >= 95) return "rgba(5, 150, 105, 0.25)";   // strong green
  if (value >= 90) return "rgba(5, 150, 105, 0.18)";   // green
  if (value >= 85) return "rgba(5, 150, 105, 0.10)";   // light green
  if (value >= 80) return "rgba(217, 119, 6, 0.15)";   // amber
  if (value >= 70) return "rgba(220, 38, 38, 0.12)";   // light red
  return "rgba(220, 38, 38, 0.22)";                     // red
}

function retentionTextColor(value: number): string {
  if (value >= 85) return "#065F46";
  if (value >= 80) return "#92400E";
  return "#991B1B";
}

export function CohortTable({ data }: CohortTableProps) {
  if (data.length === 0) return null;

  const maxMonths = Math.max(...data.map((d) => d.months.length));
  const monthHeaders = Array.from({ length: maxMonths }, (_, i) => `M${i + 1}`);

  return (
    <div className="overflow-x-auto border border-gray-200 rounded-lg">
      <table className="w-full text-sm border-collapse">
        <thead>
          <tr className="bg-gray-50">
            <th className="px-3 py-2 text-left font-medium text-gray-700 border border-gray-200 min-w-[100px]">
              Cohort
            </th>
            {monthHeaders.map((header) => (
              <th
                key={header}
                className="px-3 py-2 text-center font-medium text-gray-700 border border-gray-200 min-w-[60px]"
              >
                {header}
              </th>
            ))}
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          {data.map((row) => (
            <tr key={row.cohort}>
              <td className="px-3 py-2 font-medium text-gray-900 border border-gray-200 whitespace-nowrap">
                {row.cohort}
              </td>
              {row.months.map((value, idx) => (
                <td
                  key={idx}
                  className="px-3 py-2 text-center border border-gray-200"
                  style={{
                    backgroundColor: retentionColor(value),
                    color: retentionTextColor(value),
                    fontFamily: "'JetBrains Mono', monospace",
                    fontSize: 12,
                  }}
                >
                  {value.toFixed(1)}%
                </td>
              ))}
              {/* Fill empty cells if this row has fewer months */}
              {Array.from(
                { length: maxMonths - row.months.length },
                (_, idx) => (
                  <td
                    key={`empty-${idx}`}
                    className="px-3 py-2 border border-gray-200 bg-gray-50"
                  />
                )
              )}
            </tr>
          ))}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/components/data-display/DataTable.tsx
```
import { useState } from "react";
import {
  useReactTable,
  getCoreRowModel,
  getSortedRowModel,
  flexRender,
  type ColumnDef,
  type SortingState,
} from "@tanstack/react-table";
import { ArrowUp, ArrowDown, ArrowUpDown } from "lucide-react";

interface DataTableProps<T> {
  columns: ColumnDef<T, unknown>[];
  data: T[];
  onRowClick?: (row: T) => void;
}

export function DataTable<T>({ columns, data, onRowClick }: DataTableProps<T>) {
  const [sorting, setSorting] = useState<SortingState>([]);

  const table = useReactTable({
    data,
    columns,
    state: { sorting },
    onSortingChange: setSorting,
    getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel(),
    getSortedRowModel: getSortedRowModel(),
  });

  return (
    <div className="overflow-x-auto border border-gray-200 rounded-lg">
      <table className="w-full text-sm">
        <thead>
          {table.getHeaderGroups().map((headerGroup) => (
            <tr key={headerGroup.id} className="bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200">
              {headerGroup.headers.map((header) => (
                <th
                  key={header.id}
                  className="px-4 text-left font-medium text-gray-700 select-none"
                  style={{ height: 36 }}
                  onClick={header.column.getToggleSortingHandler()}
                  role={header.column.getCanSort() ? "button" : undefined}
                >
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                    {header.isPlaceholder
                      ? null
                      : flexRender(header.column.columnDef.header, header.getContext())}
                    {header.column.getCanSort() && (
                      <span className="text-gray-400">
                        {header.column.getIsSorted() === "asc" ? (
                          <ArrowUp className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                        ) : header.column.getIsSorted() === "desc" ? (
                          <ArrowDown className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                        ) : (
                          <ArrowUpDown className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                        )}
                      </span>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </th>
              ))}
            </tr>
          ))}
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          {table.getRowModel().rows.map((row, idx) => (
            <tr
              key={row.id}
              className={`${
                idx % 2 === 0 ? "bg-white" : "bg-gray-50"
              } ${onRowClick ? "cursor-pointer hover:bg-blue-50" : ""}`}
              style={{ height: 36 }}
              onClick={() => onRowClick?.(row.original)}
            >
              {row.getVisibleCells().map((cell) => (
                <td key={cell.id} className="px-4 text-gray-900">
                  {flexRender(cell.column.columnDef.cell, cell.getContext())}
                </td>
              ))}
            </tr>
          ))}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/components/data-display/FinancialTable.tsx
```
import { useState } from "react";
import {
  useReactTable,
  getCoreRowModel,
  getSortedRowModel,
  flexRender,
  type ColumnDef,
  type SortingState,
} from "@tanstack/react-table";
import { ArrowUp, ArrowDown, ArrowUpDown } from "lucide-react";

interface FinancialTableProps<T> {
  columns: ColumnDef<T, unknown>[];
  data: T[];
  onCellClick?: (row: T, columnId: string) => void;
}

export function FinancialTable<T>({
  columns,
  data,
  onCellClick,
}: FinancialTableProps<T>) {
  const [sorting, setSorting] = useState<SortingState>([]);

  const table = useReactTable({
    data,
    columns,
    state: { sorting },
    onSortingChange: setSorting,
    getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel(),
    getSortedRowModel: getSortedRowModel(),
  });

  return (
    <div className="overflow-x-auto border border-gray-200 rounded-lg">
      <table className="w-full text-sm border-collapse">
        <thead className="sticky top-0 z-10 shadow-[0_1px_3px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)]">
          {table.getHeaderGroups().map((headerGroup) => (
            <tr key={headerGroup.id} className="bg-gray-100">
              {headerGroup.headers.map((header) => (
                <th
                  key={header.id}
                  className="px-3 text-left font-semibold text-gray-700 select-none border border-[#E5E7EB]"
                  style={{ height: 32 }}
                  onClick={header.column.getToggleSortingHandler()}
                  role={header.column.getCanSort() ? "button" : undefined}
                >
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                    {header.isPlaceholder
                      ? null
                      : flexRender(header.column.columnDef.header, header.getContext())}
                    {header.column.getCanSort() && (
                      <span className="text-gray-400">
                        {header.column.getIsSorted() === "asc" ? (
                          <ArrowUp className="w-3 h-3" />
                        ) : header.column.getIsSorted() === "desc" ? (
                          <ArrowDown className="w-3 h-3" />
                        ) : (
                          <ArrowUpDown className="w-3 h-3" />
                        )}
                      </span>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </th>
              ))}
            </tr>
          ))}
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          {table.getRowModel().rows.map((row) => (
            <tr key={row.id} className="bg-white hover:bg-blue-50/30">
              {row.getVisibleCells().map((cell) => {
                const rawValue = cell.getValue();
                const isNumeric = typeof rawValue === "number";
                const numericValue = isNumeric ? (rawValue as number) : null;

                // P2: Conditional coloring for numeric values
                let colorClass = "text-gray-900";
                if (numericValue !== null) {
                  if (numericValue > 0) colorClass = "text-green-700";
                  else if (numericValue < 0) colorClass = "text-red-700";
                }

                return (
                  <td
                    key={cell.id}
                    className={`px-3 border border-[#E5E7EB] ${colorClass} ${
                      isNumeric ? "text-right font-mono" : ""
                    } ${onCellClick ? "cursor-pointer" : ""}`}
                    style={{
                      height: 32,
                      fontFamily: isNumeric ? "'JetBrains Mono', monospace" : undefined,
                    }}
                    onClick={() => onCellClick?.(row.original, cell.column.id)}
                  >
                    {flexRender(cell.column.columnDef.cell, cell.getContext())}
                  </td>
                );
              })}
            </tr>
          ))}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/components/data-display/GanttChart.tsx
```
interface GanttTask {
  label: string;
  startDay: number;
  endDay: number;
  status: "ready" | "pending";
}

interface GanttChartProps {
  tasks: GanttTask[];
  totalDays: number;
}

const STATUS_COLORS: Record<GanttTask["status"], string> = {
  ready: "#059669",
  pending: "#D97706",
};

const STATUS_BG: Record<GanttTask["status"], string> = {
  ready: "rgba(5, 150, 105, 0.15)",
  pending: "rgba(217, 119, 6, 0.15)",
};

export function GanttChart({ tasks, totalDays }: GanttChartProps) {
  // Generate day axis labels (show every 30 days + day 1)
  const axisLabels: number[] = [1];
  for (let d = 30; d <= totalDays; d += 30) {
    axisLabels.push(d);
  }
  if (axisLabels[axisLabels.length - 1] !== totalDays) {
    axisLabels.push(totalDays);
  }

  return (
    <div className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg p-4 bg-white">
      {/* Day axis */}
      <div className="relative h-6 mb-2 ml-[160px]">
        {axisLabels.map((day) => (
          <span
            key={day}
            className="absolute text-xs text-gray-500"
            style={{
              left: `${((day - 1) / (totalDays - 1)) * 100}%`,
              transform: "translateX(-50%)",
              fontFamily: "'JetBrains Mono', monospace",
            }}
          >
            {day}
          </span>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Tasks */}
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
        {tasks.map((task, idx) => {
          const leftPct = ((task.startDay - 1) / totalDays) * 100;
          const widthPct = ((task.endDay - task.startDay + 1) / totalDays) * 100;

          return (
            <div key={idx} className="flex items-center gap-3">
              {/* Task label */}
              <div className="w-[148px] flex-shrink-0 text-sm text-gray-700 truncate text-right pr-2">
                {task.label}
              </div>

              {/* Timeline track */}
              <div className="flex-1 relative h-7 bg-gray-50 rounded">
                <div
                  className="absolute top-0.5 h-6 rounded"
                  style={{
                    left: `${leftPct}%`,
                    width: `${widthPct}%`,
                    backgroundColor: STATUS_BG[task.status],
                    borderLeft: `3px solid ${STATUS_COLORS[task.status]}`,
                  }}
                >
                  <span
                    className="text-xs font-medium px-2 leading-6 whitespace-nowrap"
                    style={{ color: STATUS_COLORS[task.status] }}
                  >
                    Day {task.startDay}–{task.endDay}
                  </span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          );
        })}
      </div>

      {/* Legend */}
      <div className="flex gap-4 mt-4 ml-[160px]">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
          <div className="w-3 h-3 rounded" style={{ backgroundColor: STATUS_COLORS.ready }} />
          <span className="text-xs text-gray-600">Ready</span>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
          <div className="w-3 h-3 rounded" style={{ backgroundColor: STATUS_COLORS.pending }} />
          <span className="text-xs text-gray-600">Pending</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/components/data-display/MetricCard.tsx
```
import { TrendingUp, TrendingDown } from "lucide-react";

interface MetricCardProps {
  label: string;
  value: string;
  status?: "positive" | "negative" | "neutral";
  trend?: "up" | "down";
  onClick?: () => void;
}

const statusColors: Record<string, string> = {
  positive: "text-green-700",
  negative: "text-red-700",
  neutral: "text-gray-700",
};

export function MetricCard({
  label,
  value,
  status = "neutral",
  trend,
  onClick,
}: MetricCardProps) {
  return (
    <div
      className={`min-w-[200px] bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg p-4 ${
        onClick ? "cursor-pointer hover:border-blue-300 hover:shadow-sm transition-all" : ""
      }`}
      onClick={onClick}
    >
      <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-1" style={{ fontSize: 14 }}>
        {label}
      </p>
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <span
          className={`font-bold ${statusColors[status]}`}
          style={{
            fontSize: 24,
            fontFamily: "'JetBrains Mono', monospace",
          }}
        >
          {value}
        </span>
        {trend === "up" && <TrendingUp className="w-5 h-5 text-green-600" />}
        {trend === "down" && <TrendingDown className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600" />}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

import { ChevronRight } from "lucide-react";
import type { ReconciliationMetric } from "../../types/metric";
import { formatCurrency } from "../../utils/formatters";

interface ReconciliationRowProps {
  metric: ReconciliationMetric;
  onExpand: () => void;
  expanded: boolean;
}

const statusConfig: Record<string, { label: string; className: string }> = {
  reconciled: {
    label: "Reconciled",
    className: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  },
  review: {
    label: "Review",
    className: "bg-amber-100 text-amber-800",
  },
  "material-discrepancy": {
    label: "Material Discrepancy",
    className: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
  },
};

export function ReconciliationRow({
  metric,
  onExpand,
  expanded,
}: ReconciliationRowProps) {
  const status = statusConfig[metric.status];
  const varianceAmount = metric.variance.amount;
  const varianceColor =
    varianceAmount > 0
      ? "text-green-700"
      : varianceAmount < 0
        ? "text-red-700"
        : "text-gray-700";

  return (
    <div
      className="w-full bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 hover:border-blue-200 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
      onClick={onExpand}
    >
      <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
        {/* Expand chevron */}
        <ChevronRight
          className={`w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 transition-transform duration-200 flex-shrink-0 ${
            expanded ? "rotate-90" : ""
          }`}
        />

        {/* Metric name */}
        <div className="flex-1 min-w-[160px]">
          <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">{metric.name}</span>
        </div>

        {/* Source values */}
        <div className="flex gap-6">
          {metric.sources.map((source) => (
            <div key={source.sourceName} className="text-right min-w-[100px]">
              <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{source.sourceName}</p>
              <p
                className="text-sm text-gray-900"
                style={{ fontFamily: "'JetBrains Mono', monospace" }}
              >
                {formatCurrency(source.value)}
              </p>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* Variance */}
        <div className="text-right min-w-[100px]">
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Variance</p>
          <p
            className={`text-sm font-semibold ${varianceColor}`}
            style={{ fontFamily: "'JetBrains Mono', monospace" }}
          >
            {formatCurrency(varianceAmount)}
          </p>
        </div>

        {/* Status badge */}
        <span
          className={`px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${status.className}`}
        >
          {status.label}
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

import { useState } from "react";
import type { SourceSystem } from "../../types/system";
import { formatNumber } from "../../utils/formatters";

interface SystemTileProps {
  system: SourceSystem;
}

export function SystemTile({ system }: SystemTileProps) {
  const [logoError, setLogoError] = useState(false);

  const statusColor =
    system.syncStatus === "connected"
      ? "bg-green-500"
      : system.syncStatus === "syncing"
        ? "bg-amber-500"
        : "bg-red-500";

  return (
    <div
      className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg p-4 flex flex-col justify-between"
      style={{ width: 200, height: 160 }}
    >
      <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
        {!logoError ? (
          <img
            src={system.logoUrl}
            alt={system.name}
            className="h-8 w-8 object-contain rounded"
            onError={() => setLogoError(true)}
          />
        ) : (
          <div
            className="h-8 w-8 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-white text-xs font-bold"
            style={{ backgroundColor: system.brandColor }}
          >
            {system.abbreviation}
          </div>
        )}
        <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
          <div className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full ${statusColor}`} />
          <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 capitalize">{system.syncStatus}</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div>
        <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">{system.name}</h3>
        <div className="flex gap-3 text-xs text-gray-500">
          <span>{formatNumber(system.recordCount)} records</span>
          <span>{formatNumber(system.fieldCount)} fields</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

src/components/data-display/WaterfallChart.tsx
```
import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
import {
  BarChart,
  Bar,
  XAxis,
  YAxis,
  CartesianGrid,
  Cell,
  ResponsiveContainer,
  Text,
} from "recharts";
import type { WaterfallItem } from "../../types/metric";
import { formatCurrency } from "../../utils/formatters";

interface WaterfallChartProps {
  items: WaterfallItem[];
  animated?: boolean;
  onBarClick?: (item: WaterfallItem) => void;
}

const BAR_COLORS: Record<WaterfallItem["type"], string> = {
  start: "#3B82F6",
  increase: "#059669",
  decrease: "#DC2626",
  total: "#3B82F6",
};

interface WaterfallDatum {
  label: string;
  value: number;
  invisible: number;
  type: WaterfallItem["type"];
  original: WaterfallItem;
}

function buildWaterfallData(items: WaterfallItem[]): WaterfallDatum[] {
  let runningTotal = 0;
  return items.map((item) => {
    if (item.type === "start" || item.type === "total") {
      const datum: WaterfallDatum = {
        label: item.label,
        value: item.value,
        invisible: 0,
        type: item.type,
        original: item,
      };
      if (item.type === "start") runningTotal = item.value;
      return datum;
    }

    // For increases and decreases, calculate the invisible base
    const absValue = Math.abs(item.value);
    if (item.type === "increase") {
      const datum: WaterfallDatum = {
        label: item.label,
        value: absValue,
        invisible: runningTotal,
        type: item.type,
        original: item,
      };
      runningTotal += absValue;
      return datum;
    }

    // decrease
    runningTotal -= absValue;
    return {
      label: item.label,
      value: absValue,
      invisible: runningTotal,
      type: item.type,
      original: item,
    };
  });
}

function CustomBarLabel(props: {
  x?: number;
  y?: number;
  width?: number;
  value?: number;
  index?: number;
  data?: WaterfallDatum[];
}) {
  const { x = 0, y = 0, width = 0, index = 0, data = [] } = props;
  const item = data[index];
  if (!item) return null;

  return (
    <Text
      x={x + width / 2}
      y={y - 8}
      textAnchor="middle"
      fontSize={11}
      fill="#374151"
      fontFamily="'JetBrains Mono', monospace"
    >
      {formatCurrency(item.original.value)}
    </Text>
  );
}

export function WaterfallChart({
  items,
  animated = false,
  onBarClick,
}: WaterfallChartProps) {
  const [visibleBars, setVisibleBars] = useState(animated ? 0 : items.length);
  const intervalRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!animated) {
      setVisibleBars(items.length);
      return;
    }

    setVisibleBars(0);
    intervalRef.current = setInterval(() => {
      setVisibleBars((prev) => {
        if (prev >= items.length) {
          if (intervalRef.current) clearInterval(intervalRef.current);
          return prev;
        }
        return prev + 1;
      });
    }, 200);

    return () => {
      if (intervalRef.current) clearInterval(intervalRef.current);
    };
  }, [animated, items.length]);

  const visibleItems = items.slice(0, visibleBars);
  const chartData = buildWaterfallData(visibleItems);

  return (
    <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={320}>
      <BarChart
        data={chartData}
        margin={{ top: 24, right: 16, bottom: 8, left: 16 }}
      >
        <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" vertical={false} />
        <XAxis
          dataKey="label"
          tick={{ fontSize: 12 }}
          tickLine={false}
          axisLine={{ stroke: "#E5E7EB" }}
        />
        <YAxis
          tick={{ fontSize: 11, fontFamily: "'JetBrains Mono', monospace" }}
          tickFormatter={(v: number) => formatCurrency(v)}
          axisLine={false}
          tickLine={false}
        />
        {/* Invisible base bar */}
        <Bar
          dataKey="invisible"
          stackId="waterfall"
          fill="transparent"
          isAnimationActive={false}
        />
        {/* Visible value bar */}
        <Bar
          dataKey="value"
          stackId="waterfall"
          animationDuration={300}
          label={<CustomBarLabel data={chartData} />}
          onClick={(_data: unknown, index: number) => {
            const item = chartData[index];
            if (item && onBarClick) onBarClick(item.original);
          }}
          cursor={onBarClick ? "pointer" : undefined}
        >
          {chartData.map((entry, index) => (
            <Cell key={index} fill={BAR_COLORS[entry.type]} />
          ))}
        </Bar>
      </BarChart>
    </ResponsiveContainer>
  );
}
```

src/components/feedback/ConfidenceBadge.tsx
```
import { useState } from 'react';
import type { ConfidenceLevel } from '../../types/annotation';
import { COLORS } from '../../utils/colors';

interface ConfidenceBadgeProps {
  level: ConfidenceLevel;
  score?: number;
  alternativeLabel?: string;
}

const LEVEL_CONFIG: Record<ConfidenceLevel, { label: string; color: string }> = {
  high: { label: 'High', color: COLORS.confidenceHigh },
  medium: { label: 'Review', color: COLORS.confidenceMedium },
  low: { label: 'Manual', color: COLORS.confidenceLow },
};

export default function ConfidenceBadge({ level, score, alternativeLabel }: ConfidenceBadgeProps) {
  const [showTooltip, setShowTooltip] = useState(false);
  const config = LEVEL_CONFIG[level];

  return (
    <span
      className="relative inline-flex items-center"
      onMouseEnter={() => setShowTooltip(true)}
      onMouseLeave={() => setShowTooltip(false)}
    >
      <span
        className="inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium text-white"
        style={{ backgroundColor: config.color }}
      >
        {config.label}
      </span>

      {showTooltip && (score !== undefined || alternativeLabel) && (
        <span className="absolute bottom-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 mb-2 z-50 whitespace-nowrap rounded bg-gray-900 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs text-white shadow-lg">
          {score !== undefined && <span>Score: {score}</span>}
          {score !== undefined && alternativeLabel && <span> &middot; </span>}
          {alternativeLabel && <span>{alternativeLabel}</span>}
          <span className="absolute top-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 border-4 border-transparent border-t-gray-900" />
        </span>
      )}
    </span>
  );
}

src/components/feedback/CounterAnimation.tsx
```
import { useAnimatedCounter } from '../../hooks/useAnimatedCounter';
import { formatCurrency, formatNumber, formatPercentage } from '../../utils/formatters';

interface CounterAnimationProps {
  value: number;
  format?: 'currency' | 'number' | 'percentage';
  enabled?: boolean;
  duration?: number;
}

const FORMATTERS: Record<string, (v: number) => string> = {
  currency: formatCurrency,
  number: formatNumber,
  percentage: formatPercentage,
};

export default function CounterAnimation({
  value,
  format = 'number',
  enabled = true,
  duration = 1000,
}: CounterAnimationProps) {
  const animatedValue = useAnimatedCounter(value, duration, enabled);
  const formatter = FORMATTERS[format] ?? formatNumber;

  return <span>{formatter(animatedValue)}</span>;
}

import type { DealTimerConfig } from '../../types/demo';
import { COLORS } from '../../utils/colors';

interface DealTimerProps {
  config: DealTimerConfig;
}

export default function DealTimer({ config }: DealTimerProps) {
  const { currentDay, totalDays, label } = config;
  const percentage = totalDays > 0 ? Math.round((currentDay / totalDays) * 100) : 0;

  return (
    <div className="inline-flex w-[200px] flex-col gap-0.5">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-gray-600">
        <span>
          Day{' '}
          <span className="font-bold" style={{ fontFamily: "'JetBrains Mono', monospace" }}>
            {currentDay}
          </span>{' '}
          of {totalDays}
        </span>
        <span className="text-gray-400">|</span>
        <span className="truncate">{label}</span>
      </div>
      <div className="h-[3px] w-full overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-gray-200">
        <div
          className="h-full rounded-full transition-all duration-500"
          style={{
            width: `${percentage}%`,
            backgroundColor: COLORS.primary,
          }}
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

src/components/feedback/ProcessingOverlay.tsx
```
import { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react';
import { Loader2 } from 'lucide-react';
import type { ProcessingStep } from '../../types/demo';

interface ProcessingOverlayProps {
  steps: ProcessingStep[];
  onComplete: () => void;
  visible: boolean;
}

export default function ProcessingOverlay({ steps, onComplete, visible }: ProcessingOverlayProps) {
  const [currentIndex, setCurrentIndex] = useState(0);

  const advance = useCallback(() => {
    setCurrentIndex((prev) => prev + 1);
  }, []);

  // Reset when becoming visible
  useEffect(() => {
    if (visible) {
      setCurrentIndex(0);
    }
  }, [visible]);

  // Timer to advance through steps
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!visible || steps.length === 0) return;
    if (currentIndex >= steps.length) {
      onComplete();
      return;
    }

    const timer = setTimeout(advance, steps[currentIndex].durationMs);
    return () => clearTimeout(timer);
  }, [visible, currentIndex, steps, onComplete, advance]);

  if (!visible) return null;

  const activeStep = currentIndex < steps.length ? steps[currentIndex] : steps[steps.length - 1];

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/40">
      <div className="w-full max-w-md rounded-xl bg-white p-8 shadow-2xl">
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
          <Loader2 className="h-8 w-8 animate-spin text-blue-600" />

          <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-800">{activeStep.label}</p>

          <div className="flex w-full gap-1.5">
            {steps.map((_, idx) => (
              <div
                key={idx}
                className={`h-1 flex-1 rounded-full transition-colors duration-300 ${
                  idx <= currentIndex ? 'bg-blue-600' : 'bg-gray-200'
                }`}
              />
            ))}
          </div>

          <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">
            Step {Math.min(currentIndex + 1, steps.length)} of {steps.length}
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

import { COLORS } from '../../utils/colors';

interface ProgressBarProps {
  current: number;
  total: number;
  animated?: boolean;
  className?: string;
}

export default function ProgressBar({ current, total, animated = true, className = '' }: ProgressBarProps) {
  const percentage = total > 0 ? Math.round((current / total) * 100) : 0;

  return (
    <div className={`flex flex-col gap-1 ${className}`}>
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-xs text-gray-600">
        <span>{current} of {total}</span>
        <span>{percentage}%</span>
      </div>
      <div className="h-2 w-full overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-gray-200">
        <div
          className="h-full rounded-full"
          style={{
            width: `${percentage}%`,
            backgroundColor: COLORS.primary,
            transition: animated ? 'width 0.5s ease-out' : 'none',
          }}
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

import { CheckCircle, AlertTriangle, XCircle } from 'lucide-react';

type Status = 'reconciled' | 'review' | 'material-discrepancy';

interface StatusBadgeProps {
  status: Status;
}

const STATUS_CONFIG: Record<Status, { label: string; icon: typeof CheckCircle; colorClass: string }> = {
  reconciled: { label: 'Reconciled', icon: CheckCircle, colorClass: 'text-green-600 bg-green-50' },
  review: { label: 'Review', icon: AlertTriangle, colorClass: 'text-amber-600 bg-amber-50' },
  'material-discrepancy': { label: 'Material Discrepancy', icon: XCircle, colorClass: 'text-red-600 bg-red-50' },
};

export default function StatusBadge({ status }: StatusBadgeProps) {
  const config = STATUS_CONFIG[status];
  const Icon = config.icon;

  return (
    <span
      className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium ${config.colorClass}`}
    >
      <Icon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
      {config.label}
    </span>
  );
}

src/components/interactive/BulkAcceptButton.tsx
```
import { useState } from 'react';
import { Check } from 'lucide-react';

interface BulkAcceptButtonProps {
  count: number;
  disabled?: boolean;
  onAccept: () => void;
}

export default function BulkAcceptButton({ count, disabled, onAccept }: BulkAcceptButtonProps) {
  const [accepted, setAccepted] = useState(false);

  const handleClick = () => {
    if (accepted || disabled) return;
    onAccept();
    setAccepted(true);
  };

  return (
    <button
      type="button"
      disabled={accepted || disabled}
      onClick={handleClick}
      className={`inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-200 ${
        accepted
          ? 'bg-green-600 text-white cursor-default'
          : disabled
            ? 'bg-gray-300 text-gray-500 cursor-not-allowed'
            : 'bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700 cursor-pointer'
      }`}
    >
      {accepted ? (
        <>
          <Check className="h-4 w-4" />
          Accepted
        </>
      ) : (
        `Accept all High-confidence (${count})`
      )}
    </button>
  );
}
```

src/components/interactive/DiffView.tsx
```
interface DiffViewProps {
  additions: string[];
  removals: string[];
  changes: { before: string; after: string }[];
}

export default function DiffView({ additions, removals, changes }: DiffViewProps) {
  // Build unified line list with line numbers
  let lineNumber = 1;

  interface DiffLine {
    num: number;
    text: string;
    type: 'addition' | 'removal' | 'change-before' | 'change-after';
  }

  const lines: DiffLine[] = [];

  removals.forEach((line) => {
    lines.push({ num: lineNumber++, text: line, type: 'removal' });
  });

  changes.forEach((change) => {
    lines.push({ num: lineNumber++, text: change.before, type: 'change-before' });
    lines.push({ num: lineNumber++, text: change.after, type: 'change-after' });
  });

  additions.forEach((line) => {
    lines.push({ num: lineNumber++, text: line, type: 'addition' });
  });

  const bgColor = (type: DiffLine['type']) => {
    switch (type) {
      case 'addition':
        return 'bg-green-50';
      case 'removal':
        return 'bg-red-50';
      case 'change-before':
        return 'bg-red-50';
      case 'change-after':
        return 'bg-amber-50';
    }
  };

  const textColor = (type: DiffLine['type']) => {
    switch (type) {
      case 'addition':
        return 'text-green-800';
      case 'removal':
        return 'text-red-800';
      case 'change-before':
        return 'text-red-800';
      case 'change-after':
        return 'text-amber-800';
    }
  };

  const prefix = (type: DiffLine['type']) => {
    switch (type) {
      case 'addition':
        return '+';
      case 'removal':
        return '-';
      case 'change-before':
        return '-';
      case 'change-after':
        return '+';
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="overflow-x-auto border border-gray-200 rounded-lg">
      <div className="min-w-0">
        {lines.map((line, idx) => (
          <div
            key={idx}
            className={`flex items-start ${bgColor(line.type)} border-b border-gray-100 last:border-b-0`}
          >
            {/* Line number */}
            <span
              className="flex-shrink-0 w-10 text-right pr-2 py-1 text-xs text-gray-400 select-none border-r border-gray-200"
              style={{ fontFamily: "'JetBrains Mono', monospace" }}
            >
              {line.num}
            </span>

            {/* Prefix */}
            <span
              className={`flex-shrink-0 w-6 text-center py-1 text-xs font-bold ${textColor(line.type)}`}
              style={{ fontFamily: "'JetBrains Mono', monospace" }}
            >
              {prefix(line.type)}
            </span>

            {/* Content */}
            <pre
              className={`flex-1 py-1 pr-3 text-xs ${textColor(line.type)} whitespace-pre-wrap break-all m-0`}
              style={{ fontFamily: "'JetBrains Mono', monospace" }}
            >
              {line.text}
            </pre>
          </div>
        ))}

        {lines.length === 0 && (
          <div className="px-4 py-6 text-center text-sm text-gray-400">
            No differences found
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/components/interactive/DownstreamImpactCard.tsx
```
import { AlertTriangle } from 'lucide-react';
import type { DownstreamImpact } from '../../types/demo';

interface DownstreamImpactCardProps {
  impact: DownstreamImpact;
  visible: boolean;
}

export default function DownstreamImpactCard({ impact, visible }: DownstreamImpactCardProps) {
  return (
    <div
      className={`rounded-lg border border-amber-200 bg-amber-50 p-4 transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out ${
        visible
          ? 'opacity-100 translate-y-0'
          : 'opacity-0 translate-y-4 pointer-events-none'
      }`}
    >
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
        <AlertTriangle className="h-4 w-4 text-amber-600" />
        <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-amber-800">Downstream Impact</span>
      </div>

      <div className="space-y-3">
        {impact.affectedExhibits.length > 0 && (
          <div>
            <p className="text-xs font-medium text-amber-700 mb-1">Affected Exhibits</p>
            <ul className="space-y-0.5">
              {impact.affectedExhibits.map((exhibit, idx) => (
                <li key={idx} className="text-xs text-amber-900 flex items-start gap-1.5">
                  <span className="mt-1.5 h-1 w-1 flex-shrink-0 rounded-full bg-amber-400" />
                  {exhibit}
                </li>
              ))}
            </ul>
          </div>
        )}

        {impact.newRisks.length > 0 && (
          <div>
            <p className="text-xs font-medium text-amber-700 mb-1">New Risks</p>
            <ul className="space-y-0.5">
              {impact.newRisks.map((risk, idx) => (
                <li key={idx} className="text-xs text-amber-900 flex items-start gap-1.5">
                  <span className="mt-1.5 h-1 w-1 flex-shrink-0 rounded-full bg-amber-400" />
                  {risk}
                </li>
              ))}
            </ul>
          </div>
        )}

        {impact.metricsChanged.length > 0 && (
          <div>
            <p className="text-xs font-medium text-amber-700 mb-1">Changed Metrics</p>
            <ul className="space-y-0.5">
              {impact.metricsChanged.map((metric, idx) => (
                <li key={idx} className="text-xs text-amber-900 flex items-start gap-1.5">
                  <span className="mt-1.5 h-1 w-1 flex-shrink-0 rounded-full bg-amber-400" />
                  {metric}
                </li>
              ))}
            </ul>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/components/interactive/DrillDownPanel.tsx
```
import { useState } from 'react';
import type { VarianceCategory, DrillDownItem, WaterfallItem } from '../../types/metric';
import { WaterfallChart } from '../data-display/WaterfallChart';
import { formatCurrency } from '../../utils/formatters';

interface DrillDownPanelProps {
  categories: VarianceCategory[];
  animated?: boolean;
  onLineageClick?: (item: DrillDownItem) => void;
}

function categoriesToWaterfallItems(categories: VarianceCategory[]): WaterfallItem[] {
  return categories.map((cat) => ({
    label: cat.label,
    value: cat.amount,
    type: cat.amount >= 0 ? ('increase' as const) : ('decrease' as const),
    drillable: cat.drillDownItems.length > 0,
  }));
}

export default function DrillDownPanel({
  categories,
  animated = false,
  onLineageClick,
}: DrillDownPanelProps) {
  const [expandedCategory, setExpandedCategory] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const waterfallItems = categoriesToWaterfallItems(categories);

  const handleBarClick = (item: WaterfallItem) => {
    if (!item.drillable) return;
    setExpandedCategory((prev) => (prev === item.label ? null : item.label));
  };

  const expandedCat = categories.find((c) => c.label === expandedCategory);

  return (
    <div className="space-y-4">
      {/* Level 1: Waterfall chart */}
      <WaterfallChart
        items={waterfallItems}
        animated={animated}
        onBarClick={handleBarClick}
      />

      {/* Level 2: Detail table for expanded category */}
      {expandedCat && (
        <div className="border-l-2 border-blue-200 pl-4 ml-2">
          <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700 mb-2">
            {expandedCat.label} Breakdown
          </h4>
          <div className="overflow-x-auto border border-gray-200 rounded-lg">
            <table className="w-full text-sm border-collapse">
              <thead>
                <tr className="bg-gray-50">
                  <th className="px-3 py-2 text-left font-semibold text-gray-700">Description</th>
                  <th className="px-3 py-2 text-right font-semibold text-gray-700">Amount</th>
                  <th className="px-3 py-2 text-left font-semibold text-gray-700">Detail</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                {expandedCat.drillDownItems.map((item, idx) => (
                  <tr
                    key={idx}
                    className={`bg-white hover:bg-blue-50/40 ${
                      onLineageClick ? 'cursor-pointer' : ''
                    }`}
                    onClick={() => onLineageClick?.(item)}
                  >
                    <td className="px-3 py-2 text-gray-900">{item.description}</td>
                    <td
                      className={`px-3 py-2 text-right font-mono ${
                        item.amount >= 0 ? 'text-green-700' : 'text-red-700'
                      }`}
                      style={{ fontFamily: "'JetBrains Mono', monospace" }}
                    >
                      {formatCurrency(item.amount)}
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-3 py-2 text-gray-600">{item.detail}</td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>

          {/* Level 3 hint */}
          {onLineageClick && (
            <p className="mt-2 text-xs text-gray-400">
              Click a row to view full lineage path
            </p>
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/components/interactive/EntityMergeCard.tsx
```
import { GitMerge } from 'lucide-react';
import type { MatchCandidate } from '../../types/entity';
import { formatCurrency, formatNumber } from '../../utils/formatters';

type AnimationPhase = 'idle' | 'counter' | 'chart' | 'impact' | 'complete';

interface EntityMergeCardProps {
  candidate: MatchCandidate;
  onMerge: () => void;
  animationPhase: AnimationPhase;
}

function EntityCard({
  entity,
  side,
  animationPhase,
}: {
  entity: MatchCandidate['entities'][0];
  side: 'left' | 'right';
  animationPhase: AnimationPhase;
}) {
  const isAnimating = animationPhase === 'counter' || animationPhase === 'chart' || animationPhase === 'impact';
  const translateX = isAnimating ? (side === 'left' ? 'translateX(20px)' : 'translateX(-20px)') : 'translateX(0)';

  return (
    <div
      className={`flex-1 rounded-lg border-2 p-4 transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out ${
        isAnimating
          ? 'border-yellow-400 bg-yellow-50'
          : 'border-gray-200 bg-white'
      }`}
      style={{
        transform: translateX,
        animation: isAnimating ? 'merge-flash 1s ease-in-out' : undefined,
      }}
    >
      <div className="space-y-2">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <span className="inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-blue-100 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium text-blue-700">
            {entity.systemName}
          </span>
        </div>
        <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">{entity.name}</p>
        <div className="space-y-1 text-xs text-gray-600">
          <div className="flex justify-between">
            <span>Record Type</span>
            <span className="font-medium text-gray-800">{entity.recordType}</span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex justify-between">
            <span>Records</span>
            <span className="font-medium text-gray-800">{formatNumber(entity.recordCount)}</span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex justify-between">
            <span>ARR Contribution</span>
            <span
              className="font-medium text-gray-800"
              style={{ fontFamily: "'JetBrains Mono', monospace" }}
            >
              {formatCurrency(entity.arrContribution)}
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function MergedCard({ candidate }: { candidate: MatchCandidate }) {
  const totalRecords = candidate.entities.reduce((sum, e) => sum + e.recordCount, 0);
  const totalARR = candidate.entities.reduce((sum, e) => sum + e.arrContribution, 0);
  const systemNames = candidate.entities.map((e) => e.systemName).join(' + ');

  return (
    <div className="rounded-lg border-2 border-green-500 bg-green-50 p-4 transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
        <GitMerge className="h-4 w-4 text-green-600" />
        <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-green-800">Merged Entity</span>
      </div>
      <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">
        {candidate.entities[0]?.name}
      </p>
      <div className="space-y-1 text-xs text-gray-600">
        <div className="flex justify-between">
          <span>Sources</span>
          <span className="font-medium text-gray-800">{systemNames}</span>
        </div>
        <div className="flex justify-between">
          <span>Total Records</span>
          <span className="font-medium text-gray-800">{formatNumber(totalRecords)}</span>
        </div>
        <div className="flex justify-between">
          <span>Combined ARR</span>
          <span
            className="font-medium text-gray-800"
            style={{ fontFamily: "'JetBrains Mono', monospace" }}
          >
            {formatCurrency(totalARR)}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export default function EntityMergeCard({
  candidate,
  onMerge,
  animationPhase,
}: EntityMergeCardProps) {
  if (animationPhase === 'complete') {
    return <MergedCard candidate={candidate} />;
  }

  const [entityA, entityB] = candidate.entities;
  if (!entityA || !entityB) return null;

  const isAnimating = animationPhase !== 'idle';

  return (
    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
      <EntityCard entity={entityA} side="left" animationPhase={animationPhase} />

      {/* Merge button */}
      <div className="flex-shrink-0">
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={onMerge}
          disabled={isAnimating}
          className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-200 ${
            isAnimating
              ? 'bg-gray-300 text-gray-500 cursor-not-allowed'
              : 'bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700 cursor-pointer'
          }`}
        >
          <GitMerge className="h-4 w-4" />
          Merge
        </button>
      </div>

      <EntityCard entity={entityB} side="right" animationPhase={animationPhase} />
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/components/interactive/ExportFileTree.tsx
```
import { useState, useMemo } from 'react';
import { Folder, FileCode, ChevronRight, ChevronDown } from 'lucide-react';

interface ExportFileTreeProps {
  files: Record<string, string>;
}

interface TreeNode {
  name: string;
  path: string;
  isFile: boolean;
  children: TreeNode[];
}

function buildTree(files: Record<string, string>): TreeNode {
  const root: TreeNode = { name: '', path: '', isFile: false, children: [] };

  Object.keys(files).forEach((filePath) => {
    const parts = filePath.split('/').filter(Boolean);
    let current = root;

    parts.forEach((part, idx) => {
      const isLast = idx === parts.length - 1;
      let child = current.children.find((c) => c.name === part);

      if (!child) {
        child = {
          name: part,
          path: parts.slice(0, idx + 1).join('/'),
          isFile: isLast,
          children: [],
        };
        current.children.push(child);
      }

      current = child;
    });
  });

  // Sort: folders first, then files, alphabetically within each group
  const sortChildren = (node: TreeNode) => {
    node.children.sort((a, b) => {
      if (a.isFile !== b.isFile) return a.isFile ? 1 : -1;
      return a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
    });
    node.children.forEach(sortChildren);
  };
  sortChildren(root);

  return root;
}

function TreeItem({
  node,
  depth,
  selectedPath,
  onSelect,
  expandedFolders,
  onToggleFolder,
}: {
  node: TreeNode;
  depth: number;
  selectedPath: string | null;
  onSelect: (path: string) => void;
  expandedFolders: Set<string>;
  onToggleFolder: (path: string) => void;
}) {
  const isExpanded = expandedFolders.has(node.path);
  const isSelected = node.isFile && selectedPath === node.path;

  const handleClick = () => {
    if (node.isFile) {
      onSelect(node.path);
    } else {
      onToggleFolder(node.path);
    }
  };

  return (
    <>
      <button
        type="button"
        onClick={handleClick}
        className={`flex w-full items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-1 text-left text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors ${
          isSelected ? 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-700' : 'text-gray-700'
        }`}
        style={{ paddingLeft: `${depth * 16 + 8}px` }}
      >
        {node.isFile ? (
          <FileCode className="h-3.5 w-3.5 flex-shrink-0 text-gray-400" />
        ) : (
          <>
            {isExpanded ? (
              <ChevronDown className="h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0 text-gray-400" />
            ) : (
              <ChevronRight className="h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0 text-gray-400" />
            )}
            <Folder className="h-3.5 w-3.5 flex-shrink-0 text-amber-500" />
          </>
        )}
        <span className="truncate">{node.name}</span>
      </button>

      {!node.isFile && isExpanded &&
        node.children.map((child) => (
          <TreeItem
            key={child.path}
            node={child}
            depth={depth + 1}
            selectedPath={selectedPath}
            onSelect={onSelect}
            expandedFolders={expandedFolders}
            onToggleFolder={onToggleFolder}
          />
        ))}
    </>
  );
}

export default function ExportFileTree({ files }: ExportFileTreeProps) {
  const tree = useMemo(() => buildTree(files), [files]);
  const filePaths = useMemo(() => Object.keys(files), [files]);

  const [selectedPath, setSelectedPath] = useState<string | null>(filePaths[0] ?? null);

  // Start with all folders expanded
  const [expandedFolders, setExpandedFolders] = useState<Set<string>>(() => {
    const folders = new Set<string>();
    Object.keys(files).forEach((fp) => {
      const parts = fp.split('/').filter(Boolean);
      for (let i = 1; i < parts.length; i++) {
        folders.add(parts.slice(0, i).join('/'));
      }
    });
    return folders;
  });

  const toggleFolder = (path: string) => {
    setExpandedFolders((prev) => {
      const next = new Set(prev);
      if (next.has(path)) {
        next.delete(path);
      } else {
        next.add(path);
      }
      return next;
    });
  };

  const selectedContent = selectedPath ? files[selectedPath] ?? '' : '';

  return (
    <div className="flex border border-gray-200 rounded-lg overflow-hidden" style={{ height: 400 }}>
      {/* Left panel: file tree */}
      <div className="w-[30%] border-r border-gray-200 overflow-y-auto bg-gray-50">
        <div className="py-1">
          {tree.children.map((child) => (
            <TreeItem
              key={child.path}
              node={child}
              depth={0}
              selectedPath={selectedPath}
              onSelect={setSelectedPath}
              expandedFolders={expandedFolders}
              onToggleFolder={toggleFolder}
            />
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Right panel: file content */}
      <div className="w-[70%] overflow-auto bg-white">
        {selectedPath ? (
          <div className="p-3">
            <div className="text-xs text-gray-400 mb-2 font-medium">{selectedPath}</div>
            <pre
              className="text-xs text-gray-800 whitespace-pre-wrap break-all m-0"
              style={{ fontFamily: "'JetBrains Mono', monospace" }}
            >
              {selectedContent}
            </pre>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-full text-sm text-gray-400">
            Select a file to view its content
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/components/interactive/LineagePopover.tsx
```
import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import type { LineageNode, LineageEdge, GhostNode } from '../../types/demo';

interface LineagePopoverProps {
  nodes: LineageNode[];
  edges: LineageEdge[];
  ghostNodes?: GhostNode[];
  onOpenFull: () => void;
  anchor: { x: number; y: number };
  onClose: () => void;
}

const NODE_WIDTH = 120;
const NODE_HEIGHT = 32;
const PADDING_X = 40;
const PADDING_Y = 50;

interface LayoutNode {
  id: string;
  label: string;
  x: number;
  y: number;
  isGhost: boolean;
  pathCount?: number;
}

function layoutNodes(
  nodes: LineageNode[],
  ghostNodes: GhostNode[]
): LayoutNode[] {
  const allNodes: LayoutNode[] = nodes.map((n, i) => ({
    id: n.id,
    label: n.label,
    x: PADDING_X,
    y: PADDING_Y + i * (NODE_HEIGHT + 24),
    isGhost: false,
  }));

  ghostNodes.forEach((gn, i) => {
    allNodes.push({
      id: gn.id,
      label: gn.label,
      x: PADDING_X + NODE_WIDTH + 60,
      y: PADDING_Y + i * (NODE_HEIGHT + 24),
      isGhost: true,
      pathCount: gn.pathCount,
    });
  });

  // Simple column layout: arrange nodes by their edge relationships
  // Assign columns based on topological order
  return allNodes;
}

export default function LineagePopover({
  nodes,
  edges,
  ghostNodes = [],
  onOpenFull,
  anchor,
  onClose,
}: LineagePopoverProps) {
  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handleClickOutside = (e: MouseEvent) => {
      if (containerRef.current && !containerRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)) {
        onClose();
      }
    };
    document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
    return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
  }, [onClose]);

  const layoutResult = layoutNodes(nodes, ghostNodes);
  const nodeMap = new Map(layoutResult.map((n) => [n.id, n]));

  const totalPaths = ghostNodes.reduce((sum, gn) => sum + gn.pathCount, 0) || edges.length;

  // Compute SVG viewbox dimensions
  const maxX = Math.max(...layoutResult.map((n) => n.x + NODE_WIDTH)) + PADDING_X;
  const maxY = Math.max(...layoutResult.map((n) => n.y + NODE_HEIGHT)) + PADDING_Y;
  const svgWidth = Math.max(360, maxX);
  const svgHeight = Math.max(240, maxY);

  return (
    <div
      ref={containerRef}
      className="fixed z-50 bg-white rounded-lg shadow-xl border border-gray-200 flex flex-col"
      style={{
        width: 400,
        height: 320,
        left: anchor.x,
        top: anchor.y,
      }}
    >
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-3 py-2 border-b border-gray-100">
        <span className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500">
          1 of {totalPaths} path{totalPaths !== 1 ? 's' : ''}
        </span>
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={onClose}
          className="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 text-sm"
        >
          &times;
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* SVG lineage diagram */}
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto p-2">
        <svg
          width={svgWidth}
          height={svgHeight}
          viewBox={`0 0 ${svgWidth} ${svgHeight}`}
          className="w-full h-full"
        >
          {/* Edges */}
          {edges.map((edge, idx) => {
            const source = nodeMap.get(edge.source);
            const target = nodeMap.get(edge.target);
            if (!source || !target) return null;
            return (
              <line
                key={idx}
                x1={source.x + NODE_WIDTH}
                y1={source.y + NODE_HEIGHT / 2}
                x2={target.x}
                y2={target.y + NODE_HEIGHT / 2}
                stroke="#94A3B8"
                strokeWidth={1.5}
                markerEnd="url(#arrowhead)"
              />
            );
          })}

          {/* Ghost node edges */}
          {ghostNodes.map((gn) => {
            const ghost = nodeMap.get(gn.id);
            const parent = nodeMap.get(gn.parentNodeId);
            if (!ghost || !parent) return null;
            return (
              <line
                key={`ghost-edge-${gn.id}`}
                x1={parent.x + NODE_WIDTH}
                y1={parent.y + NODE_HEIGHT / 2}
                x2={ghost.x}
                y2={ghost.y + NODE_HEIGHT / 2}
                stroke="#94A3B8"
                strokeWidth={1.5}
                strokeDasharray="4 3"
                opacity={0.5}
              />
            );
          })}

          {/* Arrow marker */}
          <defs>
            <marker
              id="arrowhead"
              markerWidth="8"
              markerHeight="6"
              refX="8"
              refY="3"
              orient="auto"
            >
              <polygon points="0 0, 8 3, 0 6" fill="#94A3B8" />
            </marker>
          </defs>

          {/* Nodes */}
          {layoutResult.map((node) => (
            <g key={node.id} opacity={node.isGhost ? 0.5 : 1}>
              <rect
                x={node.x}
                y={node.y}
                width={NODE_WIDTH}
                height={NODE_HEIGHT}
                rx={6}
                fill={node.isGhost ? '#F8FAFC' : '#EFF6FF'}
                stroke={node.isGhost ? '#94A3B8' : '#3B82F6'}
                strokeWidth={1.5}
                strokeDasharray={node.isGhost ? '4 3' : undefined}
              />
              <text
                x={node.x + NODE_WIDTH / 2}
                y={node.y + NODE_HEIGHT / 2 + 4}
                textAnchor="middle"
                fontSize={10}
                fill="#1E293B"
                fontFamily="'Inter', sans-serif"
              >
                {node.label.length > 16 ? node.label.slice(0, 14) + '...' : node.label}
              </text>
            </g>
          ))}
        </svg>
      </div>

      {/* Footer */}
      <div className="px-3 py-2 border-t border-gray-100">
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={onOpenFull}
          className="w-full text-center text-xs font-medium text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-800 py-1"
        >
          Open Full Lineage Graph
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/components/interactive/ToggleTabs.tsx
```
interface ToggleTabsProps {
  tabs: { id: string; label: string }[];
  activeTab: string;
  onChange: (id: string) => void;
}

export default function ToggleTabs({ tabs, activeTab, onChange }: ToggleTabsProps) {
  return (
    <div className="inline-flex rounded-lg bg-gray-100 p-1">
      {tabs.map((tab) => (
        <button
          key={tab.id}
          type="button"
          onClick={() => onChange(tab.id)}
          className={`rounded-md px-4 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-300 ${
            activeTab === tab.id
              ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-sm'
              : 'text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-800'
          }`}
        >
          {tab.label}
        </button>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

src/components/layout/AppShell.tsx
```
import { useState, type ReactNode } from 'react'
import Sidebar from './Sidebar'
import type { DealTimerConfig } from '../../types/demo'

interface AppShellProps {
  persona: 'sell-side' | 'buy-side' | 'hold-period' | 'nav-migration'
  children: ReactNode
  dealTimer?: DealTimerConfig
  currentScreen?: string
}

export default function AppShell({
  persona,
  children,
  currentScreen = '',
}: AppShellProps) {
  const [collapsed, setCollapsed] = useState(false)

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      <Sidebar
        persona={persona}
        currentScreen={currentScreen}
        collapsed={collapsed}
        onToggle={() => setCollapsed((c) => !c)}
      />

      {/* Main content area: offset by sidebar width */}
      <main
        className={`p-6 transition-[margin] duration-200 ${collapsed ? 'ml-16' : 'ml-60'}`}
      >
        {children}
      </main>
    </div>
  )
}

src/components/layout/ScreenContainer.tsx
```
import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
import { Clock } from 'lucide-react'
import type { TimeComparison } from '../../types/demo'

interface ScreenContainerProps {
  title: string
  subtitle?: string
  headerStats?: { label: string; value: string }[]
  children: ReactNode
  timeComparison?: TimeComparison
}

export default function ScreenContainer({
  title,
  subtitle,
  headerStats,
  children,
  timeComparison,
}: ScreenContainerProps) {
  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col h-full">
      {/* Top bar */}
      <div className="flex-shrink-0 bg-white border-b border-gray-200 -mx-6 -mt-6 px-6 py-4 mb-6">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-4">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <h1 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900">{title}</h1>
            {subtitle && (
              <span className="text-sm text-gray-400">{subtitle}</span>
            )}
          </div>

          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            {/* Stat chips */}
            {headerStats && headerStats.length > 0 && (
              <div className="flex gap-2">
                {headerStats.map((stat) => (
                  <div
                    key={stat.label}
                    className="rounded-md bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 px-3 py-1.5"
                  >
                    <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">{stat.label}: </span>
                    <span className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-900">{stat.value}</span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}

            {/* Processing time badge */}
            {timeComparison && (
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-md bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs text-gray-500">
                <Clock size={12} />
                <span>
                  Completed in <strong className="text-gray-700">{timeComparison.completedIn}</strong>
                </span>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Content area */}
      <div className="flex-1 min-h-0 overflow-auto">{children}</div>
    </div>
  )
}
