import { NavLink, Link } from 'react-router-dom'
import {
  Network,
  BookOpen,
  Users,
  BarChart3,
  FileText,
  RefreshCw,
  Import,
  Calculator,
  ShieldAlert,
  GitMerge,
  Layers,
  Target,
  TrendingUp,
  Database,
  Brain,
  Activity,
  ChevronsLeft,
  ChevronsRight,
} from 'lucide-react'
import type { ReactNode } from 'react'

interface NavItem {
  label: string
  to: string
  icon: ReactNode
}

interface SidebarSection {
  header: string
  items: NavItem[]
}

const SELL_SIDE_SECTIONS: SidebarSection[] = [
  {
    header: 'Data Sources',
    items: [
      { label: 'Systems', to: '/sell-side/1', icon: <Network size={18} /> },
      { label: 'Schema Map', to: '/sell-side/2', icon: <BookOpen size={18} /> },
    ],
  },
  {
    header: 'Analysis',
    items: [
      { label: 'Entities', to: '/sell-side/3', icon: <Users size={18} /> },
      { label: 'ARR', to: '/sell-side/4', icon: <BarChart3 size={18} /> },
    ],
  },
  {
    header: 'Output',
    items: [
      { label: 'Exhibits', to: '/sell-side/5', icon: <FileText size={18} /> },
      { label: 'Refresh Log', to: '/sell-side/6', icon: <RefreshCw size={18} /> },
    ],
  },
]

const BUY_SIDE_SECTIONS: SidebarSection[] = [
  {
    header: 'Ingest',
    items: [
      { label: 'Systems', to: '/buy-side/1', icon: <Import size={18} /> },
    ],
  },
  {
    header: 'Validation',
    items: [
      { label: 'Metrics', to: '/buy-side/2', icon: <Calculator size={18} /> },
      { label: 'Risk', to: '/buy-side/3', icon: <ShieldAlert size={18} /> },
    ],
  },
  {
    header: 'Planning',
    items: [
      { label: 'Integration', to: '/buy-side/4', icon: <GitMerge size={18} /> },
    ],
  },
]

const HOLD_PERIOD_SECTIONS: SidebarSection[] = [
  {
    header: 'Integration',
    items: [
      { label: 'Ingestion', to: '/hold-period/i-1', icon: <Network size={18} /> },
      { label: 'Schemas', to: '/hold-period/i-2', icon: <Layers size={18} /> },
      { label: 'KPIs', to: '/hold-period/i-3', icon: <Users size={18} /> },
    ],
  },
  {
    header: 'Operations',
    items: [
      { label: 'Onboarding', to: '/hold-period/v-1', icon: <BarChart3 size={18} /> },
      { label: 'Drift', to: '/hold-period/v-2', icon: <Target size={18} /> },
      { label: 'Portfolio', to: '/hold-period/v-3', icon: <TrendingUp size={18} /> },
      { label: 'Data Room', to: '/hold-period/v-4', icon: <FileText size={18} /> },
    ],
  },
  {
    header: 'ML Pipeline',
    items: [
      { label: 'Queries', to: '/hold-period/a-1', icon: <Database size={18} /> },
      { label: 'Features', to: '/hold-period/a-2', icon: <Brain size={18} /> },
      { label: 'Feedback', to: '/hold-period/a-3', icon: <Activity size={18} /> },
    ],
  },
]

const NAV_MIGRATION_SECTIONS: SidebarSection[] = [
  {
    header: 'Discovery',
    items: [
      { label: 'Inventory', to: '/nav-migration/1', icon: <Database size={18} /> },
      { label: 'Risk Map', to: '/nav-migration/2', icon: <ShieldAlert size={18} /> },
    ],
  },
  {
    header: 'Lineage',
    items: [
      { label: 'Posting Chain', to: '/nav-migration/3', icon: <GitMerge size={18} /> },
      { label: 'Tie-Outs', to: '/nav-migration/4', icon: <Target size={18} /> },
      { label: 'Dimensions', to: '/nav-migration/5', icon: <Layers size={18} /> },
    ],
  },
  {
    header: 'Resolution',
    items: [
      { label: 'Exceptions', to: '/nav-migration/6', icon: <Users size={18} /> },
      { label: 'Roadmap', to: '/nav-migration/7', icon: <BarChart3 size={18} /> },
    ],
  },
]

const NAV_CONFIG: Record<string, SidebarSection[]> = {
  'sell-side': SELL_SIDE_SECTIONS,
  'buy-side': BUY_SIDE_SECTIONS,
  'hold-period': HOLD_PERIOD_SECTIONS,
  'nav-migration': NAV_MIGRATION_SECTIONS,
}

interface SidebarProps {
  persona: 'sell-side' | 'buy-side' | 'hold-period' | 'nav-migration'
  currentScreen: string
  collapsed: boolean
  onToggle: () => void
}

function NavItemLink({ item, collapsed }: { item: NavItem; collapsed: boolean }) {
  return (
    <NavLink
      to={item.to}
      title={collapsed ? item.label : undefined}
      className={({ isActive }) =>
        [
          'flex items-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors',
          collapsed
            ? 'justify-center px-0 py-2.5'
            : 'gap-3 px-3 py-2.5',
          isActive
            ? 'bg-white/15 text-white border-l-[3px] border-white' + (collapsed ? '' : ' pl-[9px]')
            : 'text-white/70 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/10 border-l-[3px] border-transparent' + (collapsed ? '' : ' pl-[9px]'),
        ].join(' ')
      }
    >
      {item.icon}
      {!collapsed && item.label}
    </NavLink>
  )
}

export default function Sidebar({ persona, collapsed, onToggle }: SidebarProps) {
  const config = NAV_CONFIG[persona]

  return (
    <aside
      className={`fixed left-0 top-0 bottom-0 flex flex-col z-20 transition-[width] duration-200 ${
        collapsed ? 'w-16' : 'w-60'
      }`}
      style={{ backgroundColor: '#70799E' }}
    >
      {/* Logo area */}
      <Link
        to="/"
        className={`h-14 flex items-center hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors ${
          collapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'gap-2.5 px-5'
        }`}
      >
        <img src="/logos/mtn-ekg-white.svg" alt="Data Foundry" className="h-7 w-auto" />
        {!collapsed && (
          <span className="text-white font-bold text-lg tracking-tight">
            Data Foundry
          </span>
        )}
      </Link>

      {/* Navigation */}
      <nav className="flex-1 flex flex-col gap-0.5 px-2 py-2 overflow-y-auto">
        {config.map((section) => (
          <div key={section.header} className="mb-2">
            {!collapsed && (
              <p className="px-3 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-semibold text-white/40 uppercase tracking-wider">
                {section.header}
              </p>
            )}
            {collapsed && (
              <div className="border-t border-white/10 my-1.5 mx-2" />
            )}
            {section.items.map((item) => (
              <NavItemLink key={item.to} item={item} collapsed={collapsed} />
            ))}
          </div>
        ))}
      </nav>

      {/* Collapse toggle */}
      <button
        type="button"
        onClick={onToggle}
        className="h-10 flex items-center justify-center text-white/50 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
        title={collapsed ? 'Expand sidebar' : 'Collapse sidebar'}
      >
        {collapsed ? <ChevronsRight size={18} /> : <ChevronsLeft size={18} />}
      </button>
    </aside>
  )
}
```

import { Bell } from 'lucide-react'
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'
import type { DealTimerConfig } from '../../types/demo'

const PERSONA_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
  'sell-side': 'Sell-Side: CFO View',
  'buy-side': 'Buy-Side: PE Deal Lead View',
  'hold-period': 'Hold Period: Operating Partner View',
  'nav-migration': 'Migration: Operating Partner View',
}

interface TopBarProps {
  persona: 'sell-side' | 'buy-side' | 'hold-period' | 'nav-migration'
  dealTimer?: DealTimerConfig
}

export default function TopBar({ persona, dealTimer: _dealTimer }: TopBarProps) {
  const personaLabel = PERSONA_LABELS[persona] ?? persona

  return (
    <header className="fixed top-0 left-60 right-0 h-14 bg-white border-b border-gray-200 flex items-center justify-between px-6 z-10">
      {/* Left: logo + text */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
        <Link to="/" className="flex items-center gap-2 hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity">
          <img src="/logos/mtn-ekg.svg" alt="Mountain Biometrics" className="h-6 w-auto" />
          <span className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 tracking-tight">
            Data Foundry
          </span>
        </Link>
        {/* DealTimer placeholder — rendered in Phase 2 */}
        <div />
      </div>

      {/* Center: persona label */}
      <div className="absolute left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2">
        <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-500">
          {personaLabel}
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* Right: notification bell */}
      <div className="relative">
        <button
          type="button"
          className="p-2 rounded-lg text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors"
          aria-label="Notifications"
        >
          <Bell size={20} />
        </button>
        {/* Orange dot for drift alerts — visible when alerts exist */}
        <span className="absolute top-1.5 right-1.5 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-orange-500 ring-2 ring-white hidden" />
      </div>
    </header>
  )
}

src/components/visualization/ConcentrationChart.tsx
```
import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
import {
  BarChart,
  Bar,
  XAxis,
  YAxis,
  CartesianGrid,
  ReferenceLine,
  ResponsiveContainer,
  Cell,
} from "recharts";

/* ---------- CSS for threshold pulse ---------- */

const pulseStyles = `
  @keyframes threshold-pulse {
    0%, 100% { stroke: #DC2626; stroke-opacity: 0.4; }
    25% { stroke: #DC2626; stroke-opacity: 1; stroke-width: 3; }
    50% { stroke: #DC2626; stroke-opacity: 0.4; }
    75% { stroke: #DC2626; stroke-opacity: 1; stroke-width: 3; }
  }
  .threshold-pulse line {
    animation: threshold-pulse 1.5s ease-in-out 1;
  }
`;

/* ---------- main component ---------- */

interface ConcentrationChartProps {
  before: number;
  after: number;
  threshold: number;
  animated?: boolean;
}

export function ConcentrationChart({
  before,
  after,
  threshold,
  animated = false,
}: ConcentrationChartProps) {
  const [currentValue, setCurrentValue] = useState(animated ? before : after);
  const [crossed, setCrossed] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!animated) {
      setCurrentValue(after);
      setCrossed(after >= threshold && before < threshold);
      return;
    }

    // Reset to before value
    setCurrentValue(before);
    setCrossed(false);

    // Animate to after value using CSS transition on the bar
    const timer = setTimeout(() => {
      setCurrentValue(after);
      // Detect threshold crossing
      if (after >= threshold && before < threshold) {
        const crossTimer = setTimeout(() => setCrossed(true), 800);
        return () => clearTimeout(crossTimer);
      }
    }, 300);

    return () => clearTimeout(timer);
  }, [animated, before, after, threshold]);

  const barColor = currentValue >= threshold ? "#DC2626" : "#22C55E";

  const data = [{ name: "Top Customer", value: currentValue }];

  return (
    <>
      <style>{pulseStyles}</style>
      <div className="w-full">
        <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={140}>
          <BarChart
            data={data}
            layout="vertical"
            margin={{ top: 24, right: 30, left: 80, bottom: 10 }}
          >
            <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" horizontal={false} />
            <XAxis
              type="number"
              domain={[0, 15]}
              tickFormatter={(v: number) => `${v}%`}
              tick={{ fontSize: 11, fill: "#6B7280" }}
            />
            <YAxis
              type="category"
              dataKey="name"
              tick={{ fontSize: 12, fill: "#374151" }}
              width={70}
            />
            <ReferenceLine
              x={threshold}
              stroke="#DC2626"
              strokeDasharray="4 4"
              strokeWidth={crossed ? 2 : 1.5}
              className={crossed ? "threshold-pulse" : ""}
              label={{
                value: `${threshold}%`,
                position: "top",
                fill: "#DC2626",
                fontSize: 10,
              }}
            />
            <Bar
              dataKey="value"
              barSize={32}
              radius={[0, 4, 4, 0]}
              isAnimationActive={animated}
              animationDuration={1500}
              animationEasing="ease-in-out"
            >
              <Cell fill={barColor} />
            </Bar>
          </BarChart>
        </ResponsiveContainer>

        {/* Labels */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-2 text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">
          <span>
            Before: <span className="font-mono font-medium text-gray-700">{before}%</span>
          </span>
          <span>
            After:{" "}
            <span
              className={`font-mono font-medium ${after >= threshold ? "text-red-600" : "text-green-600"}`}
            >
              {after}%
            </span>
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </>
  );
}
```

src/components/visualization/LineageDAG.tsx
```
import { useCallback, useMemo } from "react";
import ReactFlow, {
  ReactFlowProvider,
  Background,
  MiniMap,
  Handle,
  Position,
  type NodeProps,
} from "reactflow";
import "reactflow/dist/style.css";

import type { LineageNode, LineageEdge } from "../../types/demo";
import { layoutGraph } from "../../utils/layoutGraph";

/* ---------- CSS classes for highlighted path ---------- */

const glowStyle = `
  .lineage-highlight {
    box-shadow: 0 0 8px 2px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.5);
  }
`;

/* ---------- custom nodes by type ---------- */

const typeStyles: Record<
  LineageNode["type"],
  { bg: string; border: string; shape: string }
> = {
  "source-field": {
    bg: "bg-orange-50",
    border: "border-orange-300",
    shape: "rounded",
  },
  annotation: {
    bg: "bg-amber-50",
    border: "border-amber-400",
    shape: "rotate-45",
  },
  concept: {
    bg: "bg-blue-50",
    border: "border-blue-400",
    shape: "rounded-full",
  },
  metric: {
    bg: "bg-green-50",
    border: "border-green-400",
    shape: "rounded-full",
  },
  "exhibit-cell": {
    bg: "bg-purple-50",
    border: "border-purple-400",
    shape: "rounded",
  },
};

function LineageNodeComponent({ data }: NodeProps) {
  const nodeType = data.nodeType as LineageNode["type"];
  const isHighlighted = data.highlighted as boolean;
  const style = typeStyles[nodeType] ?? typeStyles["source-field"];

  const isDiamond = nodeType === "annotation";

  if (isDiamond) {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center justify-center" style={{ width: 60, height: 60 }}>
        <Handle type="target" position={Position.Left} className="!bg-gray-300" />
        <div
          className={`${style.bg} border ${style.border} ${isHighlighted ? "lineage-highlight" : ""}`}
          style={{
            width: 42,
            height: 42,
            transform: "rotate(45deg)",
            display: "flex",
            alignItems: "center",
            justifyContent: "center",
          }}
        >
          <span
            className="text-[9px] font-medium text-gray-700 truncate max-w-[36px]"
            style={{ transform: "rotate(-45deg)" }}
          >
            {data.label}
          </span>
        </div>
        <Handle type="source" position={Position.Right} className="!bg-gray-300" />
      </div>
    );
  }

  const isRounded = nodeType === "concept" || nodeType === "metric";

  return (
    <div
      className={`${style.bg} border ${style.border} px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium text-gray-800 ${
        isRounded ? "rounded-full" : "rounded"
      } ${isHighlighted ? "lineage-highlight" : ""}`}
    >
      <Handle type="target" position={Position.Left} className="!bg-gray-300" />
      <span className="truncate block max-w-[120px]">{data.label}</span>
      <Handle type="source" position={Position.Right} className="!bg-gray-300" />
    </div>
  );
}

const nodeTypes = { lineageNode: LineageNodeComponent };

/* ---------- main component ---------- */

interface LineageDAGProps {
  nodes: LineageNode[];
  edges: LineageEdge[];
  highlightPath?: string[];
}

export function LineageDAG({ nodes, edges, highlightPath }: LineageDAGProps) {
  const highlightSet = useMemo(
    () => new Set(highlightPath ?? []),
    [highlightPath],
  );

  const rawNodes = useMemo(
    () =>
      nodes.map((n) => ({
        id: n.id,
        type: "lineageNode" as const,
        data: {
          label: n.label,
          nodeType: n.type,
          highlighted: highlightSet.has(n.id),
        },
        position: { x: 0, y: 0 },
        width: n.type === "annotation" ? 60 : 150,
        height: n.type === "annotation" ? 60 : 36,
      })),
    [nodes, highlightSet],
  );

  const flowEdges = useMemo(
    () =>
      edges.map((e) => {
        const isHighlighted =
          highlightSet.has(e.source) && highlightSet.has(e.target);
        return {
          id: `e-${e.source}-${e.target}`,
          source: e.source,
          target: e.target,
          animated: isHighlighted,
          style: {
            stroke: isHighlighted ? "#3B82F6" : "#94A3B8",
            strokeWidth: isHighlighted ? 2.5 : 1.5,
          },
        };
      }),
    [edges, highlightSet],
  );

  const layoutNodes = useMemo(
    () => layoutGraph(rawNodes, flowEdges, { rankdir: "LR", nodesep: 50, ranksep: 150 }),
    [rawNodes, flowEdges],
  );

  const onInit = useCallback((instance: { fitView: () => void }) => {
    setTimeout(() => instance.fitView(), 50);
  }, []);

  return (
    <ReactFlowProvider>
      <style>{glowStyle}</style>
      <div className="w-full h-full min-h-[300px]">
        <ReactFlow
          nodes={layoutNodes}
          edges={flowEdges}
          nodeTypes={nodeTypes}
          onInit={onInit}
          fitView
          proOptions={{ hideAttribution: true }}
          nodesDraggable={false}
          nodesConnectable={false}
          panOnDrag
          zoomOnScroll
        >
          <Background color="#E5E7EB" gap={20} />
          <MiniMap
            nodeColor={(n) => {
              const type = n.data?.nodeType as string;
              const map: Record<string, string> = {
                "source-field": "#FDBA74",
                annotation: "#FCD34D",
                concept: "#93C5FD",
                metric: "#86EFAC",
                "exhibit-cell": "#C4B5FD",
              };
              return map[type] ?? "#D1D5DB";
            }}
            maskColor="rgba(0,0,0,0.08)"
            style={{ bottom: 10, right: 10 }}
          />
        </ReactFlow>
      </div>
    </ReactFlowProvider>
  );
}
```

src/components/visualization/LineageFullView.tsx
```
import { X } from "lucide-react";
import type { LineageNode, LineageEdge } from "../../types/demo";
import { LineageDAG } from "./LineageDAG";

interface LineageFullViewProps {
  nodes: LineageNode[];
  edges: LineageEdge[];
  highlightPath?: string[];
  onClose: () => void;
}

export function LineageFullView({
  nodes,
  edges,
  highlightPath,
  onClose,
}: LineageFullViewProps) {
  return (
    <div
      className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center"
      style={{ backgroundColor: "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4)" }}
    >
      <div
        className="relative bg-white rounded-xl shadow-2xl flex flex-col"
        style={{ width: "80vw", height: "80vh" }}
      >
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-5 py-3 border-b border-gray-200">
          <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">Full Lineage View</h2>
          <button
            onClick={onClose}
            className="p-1 rounded hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors"
            aria-label="Close lineage view"
          >
            <X className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-500" />
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Graph area */}
        <div className="flex-1 min-h-0">
          <LineageDAG
            nodes={nodes}
            edges={edges}
            highlightPath={highlightPath}
          />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

src/components/visualization/OntologyDiagram.tsx
```
import { useMemo } from "react";

import type {
  SourceOntology,
  CanonicalConcept,
  DerivedConcept,
  Annotation,
  ConceptCardData,
  ConceptMappingSummary,
  SystemContribution,
} from "../../types/annotation";
import { useScenario } from "../../scenarios/ScenarioContext";

/* ================================================================
   Source Grid View (Tab: "source")
   ================================================================ */

const CATEGORY_STYLE: Record<string, { dot: string; text: string; headerBg: string }> = {
  Financial: { dot: 'bg-blue-500', text: 'text-blue-700', headerBg: 'bg-blue-50' },
  Entity: { dot: 'bg-emerald-500', text: 'text-emerald-700', headerBg: 'bg-emerald-50' },
  Commercial: { dot: 'bg-amber-500', text: 'text-amber-700', headerBg: 'bg-amber-50' },
  Operational: { dot: 'bg-gray-400', text: 'text-gray-600', headerBg: 'bg-gray-50' },
  // Healthcare scenario categories
  Clinical: { dot: 'bg-teal-500', text: 'text-teal-700', headerBg: 'bg-teal-50' },
  Billing: { dot: 'bg-purple-500', text: 'text-purple-700', headerBg: 'bg-purple-50' },
};

function SourceGridView({ sourceOntologies, categoryOrder }: { sourceOntologies: SourceOntology[]; categoryOrder: string[] }) {
  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
      {sourceOntologies.map((ont) => {
        // Group derived concepts by category
        const byCategory: Record<string, DerivedConcept[]> = {};
        for (const dc of ont.derivedConcepts) {
          (byCategory[dc.category] ??= []).push(dc);
        }

        return (
          <div
            key={ont.systemId}
            className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg p-4 hover:shadow-sm transition-shadow"
          >
            {/* Header */}
            <div className="flex items-baseline justify-between mb-3">
              <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">{ont.systemName}</h4>
              <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-400">
                {ont.tableCount} tbl &middot; {ont.fieldCount.toLocaleString()} fld
              </span>
            </div>

            {/* Derived concepts grouped by category */}
            <div className="space-y-2.5">
              {categoryOrder.filter((cat) => byCategory[cat]?.length).map((cat) => {
                const style = CATEGORY_STYLE[cat];
                return (
                  <div key={cat}>
                    <div className={`text-[9px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider mb-1 ${style.text}`}>
                      {cat}
                    </div>
                    <div className="space-y-0.5">
                      {byCategory[cat].map((dc) => (
                        <div key={dc.name} className="flex items-center justify-between text-[11px]">
                          <span className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-gray-700">
                            <span className={`w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full flex-shrink-0 ${style.dot}`} />
                            {dc.name}
                          </span>
                          <span className="text-gray-400 tabular-nums text-[10px]">
                            {dc.tables}t &middot; {dc.fields.toLocaleString()}f
                          </span>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          </div>
        );
      })}
    </div>
  );
}

/* ================================================================
   Concept Mapping View (Tab: "unified") — HTML cards
   ================================================================ */

// Build a lookup map from system ID to system metadata (now computed dynamically)
type SystemMeta = { abbreviation: string; brandColor: string; name: string };

function buildSystemMap(systems: { id: string; abbreviation: string; brandColor: string; name: string }[]): Record<string, SystemMeta> {
  const map: Record<string, SystemMeta> = {};
  for (const sys of systems) {
    map[sys.id] = { abbreviation: sys.abbreviation, brandColor: sys.brandColor, name: sys.name };
  }
  return map;
}

/** Flatten a concept tree to get leaf concept IDs */
function getLeafConcepts(concept: CanonicalConcept): { id: string; label: string }[] {
  if (!concept.children || concept.children.length === 0) {
    return [{ id: concept.id, label: concept.label }];
  }
  const leaves: { id: string; label: string }[] = [];
  for (const child of concept.children) {
    leaves.push(...getLeafConcepts(child));
  }
  return leaves;
}

/** Check if a concept ID belongs under a given top-level concept */
function conceptBelongsTo(annotationConceptId: string, topConceptId: string): boolean {
  return annotationConceptId === topConceptId || annotationConceptId.startsWith(topConceptId + '.');
}

function buildConceptCards(
  unifiedOntology: CanonicalConcept[],
  annotations: Annotation[],
  systemMap: Record<string, SystemMeta>,
): ConceptCardData[] {
  return unifiedOntology.map((topConcept) => {
    const category = topConcept.category;

    // Get annotations belonging to this top-level concept
    const conceptAnnotations = annotations.filter((a) =>
      conceptBelongsTo(a.mappedConceptId, topConcept.id)
    );

    // Determine sub-concept grouping
    const leafConcepts = getLeafConcepts(topConcept);
    // If top concept has children, group by leaf concepts; otherwise show at top level
    const hasChildren = topConcept.children && topConcept.children.length > 0;

    const subConceptGroups: { id: string; label: string; annotations: Annotation[] }[] = [];

    if (hasChildren) {
      const matchedIds = new Set<string>();
      for (const leaf of leafConcepts) {
        const leafAnnotations = conceptAnnotations.filter((a) =>
          conceptBelongsTo(a.mappedConceptId, leaf.id)
        );
        if (leafAnnotations.length > 0) {
          subConceptGroups.push({ id: leaf.id, label: leaf.label, annotations: leafAnnotations });
          for (const a of leafAnnotations) matchedIds.add(a.id);
        }
      }
      // Collect annotations targeting the parent concept directly (not any leaf)
      const unmatched = conceptAnnotations.filter((a) => !matchedIds.has(a.id));
      if (unmatched.length > 0) {
        if (subConceptGroups.length === 0) {
          // All annotations are parent-level — show as single top-level group
          subConceptGroups.push({ id: topConcept.id, label: topConcept.label, annotations: unmatched });
        } else {
          // Mix of leaf and parent-level — add parent-level as a separate group
          subConceptGroups.push({ id: topConcept.id, label: `${topConcept.label} (General)`, annotations: unmatched });
        }
      }
    } else {
      // Show at top level — single group
      if (conceptAnnotations.length > 0) {
        subConceptGroups.push({
          id: topConcept.id,
          label: topConcept.label,
          annotations: conceptAnnotations,
        });
      }
    }

    // Build sub-concept summaries
    const subConcepts: ConceptMappingSummary[] = subConceptGroups.map((group) => {
      // Group by systemId
      const bySystem: Record<string, Annotation[]> = {};
      for (const a of group.annotations) {
        (bySystem[a.systemId] ??= []).push(a);
      }

      const systems: SystemContribution[] = Object.entries(bySystem).map(([sysId, sysAnnotations]) => {
        const meta = systemMap[sysId] ?? { abbreviation: sysId.slice(0, 3).toUpperCase(), brandColor: '#6B7280', name: sysId };
        const avgConf = Math.round(sysAnnotations.reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.confidence, 0) / sysAnnotations.length);
        // Pick highest-confidence annotation as example
        const best = sysAnnotations.reduce((a, b) => (a.confidence >= b.confidence ? a : b));
        return {
          systemId: sysId,
          abbreviation: meta.abbreviation,
          brandColor: meta.brandColor,
          systemName: meta.name,
          fieldCount: sysAnnotations.length,
          avgConfidence: avgConf,
          exampleField: { tableName: best.tableName, fieldName: best.fieldName, confidence: best.confidence },
        };
      });

      // Sort alphabetically by system name
      systems.sort((a, b) => a.systemName.localeCompare(b.systemName));

      const totalFields = group.annotations.length;
      const avgConfidence = Math.round(group.annotations.reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.confidence, 0) / group.annotations.length);

      return {
        conceptId: group.id,
        conceptLabel: group.label,
        systems,
        totalFields,
        avgConfidence,
      };
    });

    // Roll up totals
    const totalFields = conceptAnnotations.length;
    const uniqueSystems = new Set(conceptAnnotations.map((a) => a.systemId));
    const avgConfidence = totalFields > 0
      ? Math.round(conceptAnnotations.reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.confidence, 0) / totalFields)
      : 0;

    return {
      id: topConcept.id,
      label: topConcept.label,
      category,
      totalFields,
      totalSystems: uniqueSystems.size,
      avgConfidence,
      subConcepts,
    };
  });
}

function SystemPill({ contribution }: { contribution: SystemContribution }) {
  return (
    <span
      className="inline-flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold text-white flex-shrink-0 cursor-default bg-gray-400"
      title={`${contribution.systemName}: ${contribution.fieldCount} fields, ${contribution.avgConfidence}% avg confidence`}
    >
      {contribution.abbreviation}
    </span>
  );
}

function ConceptMappingView({
  unifiedOntology,
  annotations,
}: {
  unifiedOntology: CanonicalConcept[];
  annotations: Annotation[];
}) {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  const systemMap = useMemo(() => buildSystemMap(scenario.systems), [scenario.systems]);
  const cards = useMemo(() => buildConceptCards(unifiedOntology, annotations, systemMap), [unifiedOntology, annotations, systemMap]);

  return (
    <div>
      <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-3">
        How source system fields map to unified canonical concepts. Each pill represents a contributing source system.
      </p>
      <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
      {cards.map((card) => {
        const style = CATEGORY_STYLE[card.category] ?? CATEGORY_STYLE.Operational;

        return (
          <div
            key={card.id}
            className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg overflow-hidden hover:shadow-sm transition-shadow"
          >
            {/* Card header */}
            <div className={`px-4 py-3 ${style.headerBg} border-b border-gray-100`}>
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <span className={`w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full ${style.dot}`} />
                  <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 uppercase tracking-wide">{card.label}</h4>
                </div>
                <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-medium tabular-nums">{card.totalFields} fields</span>
              </div>
              <div className="text-[11px] text-gray-500 mt-1">
                From {card.totalSystems} systems &middot; {card.avgConfidence}% avg confidence
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Sub-concept rows */}
            <div className="divide-y divide-gray-50">
              {card.subConcepts.map((sc) => (
                  <div key={sc.conceptId} className="px-4 py-3">
                    <div className="flex items-baseline justify-between mb-2">
                      <div className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-800">{sc.conceptLabel}</div>
                      <div className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 tabular-nums">
                        {sc.totalFields} fld &middot; {sc.avgConfidence}% avg
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    {/* Per-system rows: pill + example field + field count */}
                    <div className="space-y-1.5">
                      {sc.systems.map((sys) => (
                        <div key={sys.systemId} className="flex items-center gap-2">
                          <SystemPill contribution={sys} />
                          <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                            <code className="text-[10px] text-gray-600 bg-gray-50 px-1 py-0.5 rounded truncate block">
                              {sys.exampleField.tableName}.{sys.exampleField.fieldName}
                            </code>
                          </div>
                          <div className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 tabular-nums flex-shrink-0">
                            {sys.exampleField.confidence}% &middot; {sys.fieldCount} fld
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
              ))}

              {card.subConcepts.length === 0 && (
                <div className="px-4 py-3 text-xs text-gray-400 italic">No annotations mapped</div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        );
      })}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

/* ================================================================
   Main Component with Tab Toggle
   ================================================================ */

interface OntologyDiagramProps {
  sourceOntologies: SourceOntology[];
  unifiedOntology: CanonicalConcept[];
  activeTab: "source" | "unified";
  annotations?: Annotation[];
}

export function OntologyDiagram({
  sourceOntologies,
  unifiedOntology,
  activeTab,
  annotations,
}: OntologyDiagramProps) {
  const scenario = useScenario();

  if (activeTab === "source") {
    return <SourceGridView sourceOntologies={sourceOntologies} categoryOrder={scenario.unifiedOntologyCategories} />;
  }

  if (annotations) {
    return (
      <ConceptMappingView
        unifiedOntology={unifiedOntology}
        annotations={annotations}
      />
    );
  }

  // Fallback if no annotations provided
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-64 text-gray-400 text-sm">
      No annotation data available
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/components/visualization/TopologyGraph.tsx
```
import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
import ReactFlow, {
  ReactFlowProvider,
  Background,
  Handle,
  Position,
  MarkerType,
  type NodeProps,
  type Node,
  type Edge,
} from "reactflow";
import "reactflow/dist/style.css";

import type { SourceSystem } from "../../types/system";
import { useScenario } from "../../scenarios/ScenarioContext";

/* ================================================================
   LAYOUT CONSTANTS
   ================================================================ */

const NODE_W = 180;
const NODE_H = 85;
const HUB_W = 280;
const HUB_H = 70;
const CONTAINER_W = 700;
const LABEL_OFFSET_Y = -30;

/* ================================================================
   CUSTOM NODE: SystemCardNode
   ================================================================ */

function formatFieldCount(n: number): string {
  return n >= 1000 ? `${(n / 1000).toFixed(1)}K` : String(n);
}

function SystemCardNode({ data }: NodeProps) {
  const sys = data as SourceSystem & {
    statusOverride?: string;
    dimmed?: boolean;
    highlighted?: boolean;
    lanePosition: "top" | "bottom";
  };
  const statusLabel = sys.statusOverride ?? sys.syncStatus;

  const dotColor =
    statusLabel === "connected" || statusLabel === "Connected"
      ? "bg-green-500"
      : statusLabel === "syncing" || statusLabel === "Connecting..."
        ? "bg-amber-500 animate-pulse"
        : "bg-red-500";

  const opacity = sys.dimmed ? "opacity-40" : "opacity-100";
  const ring = sys.highlighted ? "ring-2 ring-blue-400" : "";

  const handlePos = sys.lanePosition === "top" ? Position.Bottom : Position.Top;

  return (
    <div
      className={`bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 ${opacity} ${ring}`}
      style={{ width: NODE_W, height: NODE_H, borderLeft: `3px solid ${sys.brandColor}` }}
    >
      <Handle type="source" position={handlePos} className="!bg-gray-300" />

      {/* Row 1: abbreviation circle + name + status dot */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
        <div
          className="flex items-center justify-center rounded-full text-white text-[10px] font-bold flex-shrink-0"
          style={{ width: 28, height: 28, backgroundColor: sys.brandColor }}
        >
          {sys.abbreviation}
        </div>
        <span className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-900 truncate flex-1">
          {sys.name}
        </span>
        <span className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full flex-shrink-0 ${dotColor}`} />
      </div>

      {/* Row 2: entity label */}
      <div className="text-[11px] text-gray-500 truncate mb-0.5 pl-[36px]">
        {sys.entity}
      </div>

      {/* Row 3: compact stats */}
      <div className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 pl-[36px]">
        {sys.tableCount} tbl &middot; {formatFieldCount(sys.fieldCount)} fields
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

/* ================================================================
   CUSTOM NODE: HubNode
   ================================================================ */

function HubNode({ data }: NodeProps) {
  const d = data as { dimmed?: boolean; stats: { totalSystems: number; totalTables: number; totalFields: number } };
  const opacity = d.dimmed ? "opacity-40" : "opacity-100";

  return (
    <div
      className={`bg-blue-600 rounded-xl shadow-lg px-4 py-2 text-white text-center transition-all duration-200 ${opacity}`}
      style={{ width: HUB_W, height: HUB_H }}
    >
      <Handle type="target" position={Position.Top} className="!bg-blue-300" />
      <Handle type="source" position={Position.Bottom} className="!bg-blue-300" />

      <div className="font-bold text-sm mb-1">Data Foundry</div>
      <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 mb-1">
        {["Revenue", "Customer", "Contract"].map((c) => (
          <span
            key={c}
            className="text-[9px] bg-blue-500/50 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full"
          >
            {c}
          </span>
        ))}
      </div>
      <div className="text-[10px] text-blue-200">
        {d.stats.totalSystems} systems &middot; {d.stats.totalTables} tables &middot; {d.stats.totalFields.toLocaleString()} fields
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

/* ================================================================
   CUSTOM NODE: LaneLabelNode
   ================================================================ */

function LaneLabelNode({ data }: NodeProps) {
  const d = data as { label: string; color: string };
  return (
    <div
      className="text-[11px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider"
      style={{ color: d.color }}
    >
      {d.label}
    </div>
  );
}

/* ================================================================
   NODE TYPES
   ================================================================ */

const nodeTypes = {
  systemCard: SystemCardNode,
  hub: HubNode,
  laneLabel: LaneLabelNode,
};

/* ================================================================
   Utility: build entity-based related system lookup
   ================================================================ */

function buildGetRelatedSystemIds(
  entitySystemMap: { entity: string; systemIds: string[] }[],
) {
  return (systemId: string): Set<string> => {
    const related = new Set<string>();
    for (const mapping of entitySystemMap) {
      if (mapping.systemIds.includes(systemId)) {
        for (const id of mapping.systemIds) {
          related.add(id);
        }
      }
    }
    related.delete(systemId);
    return related;
  };
}

/* ================================================================
   LAYOUT COMPUTATION — dynamic lane positioning
   ================================================================ */

function computeTopologyLayout(
  systems: SourceSystem[],
  statusMap: Record<string, string>,
  hoveredId: string | null,
  laneOrder: string[],
  typeColors: Record<string, string>,
  laneLabels: Record<string, string>,
  getRelated: (id: string) => Set<string>,
  schemaStats: { totalSystems: number; totalTables: number; totalFields: number },
): { nodes: Node[]; edges: Edge[] } {
  const relatedIds = hoveredId ? getRelated(hoveredId) : null;

  // Group systems by type
  const grouped: Record<string, SourceSystem[]> = {};
  for (const t of laneOrder) grouped[t] = [];
  for (const sys of systems) {
    if (grouped[sys.type]) grouped[sys.type].push(sys);
  }

  // Compute dynamic Y positions:
  // First lane above hub, remaining lanes below hub
  const LANE_GAP = 140;
  const firstLaneY = 0;
  const hubY = firstLaneY + NODE_H + 40;
  const laneYMap: Record<string, number> = {};
  laneYMap[laneOrder[0]] = firstLaneY;
  for (let i = 1; i < laneOrder.length; i++) {
    laneYMap[laneOrder[i]] = hubY + HUB_H + 20 + (i - 1) * LANE_GAP;
  }

  const nodes: Node[] = [];
  const edges: Edge[] = [];

  // Hub node
  nodes.push({
    id: "hub",
    type: "hub",
    position: { x: CONTAINER_W / 2 - HUB_W / 2, y: hubY },
    data: { dimmed: false, stats: schemaStats },
    draggable: false,
    selectable: false,
  });

  // Lane labels + system cards
  for (const laneType of laneOrder) {
    const laneSystems = grouped[laneType] ?? [];
    const laneY = laneYMap[laneType];
    const laneColor = typeColors[laneType] ?? "#6B7280";
    const isAboveHub = laneType === laneOrder[0];

    // Lane label
    nodes.push({
      id: `label-${laneType}`,
      type: "laneLabel",
      position: { x: 10, y: laneY + LABEL_OFFSET_Y },
      data: { label: laneLabels[laneType] ?? laneType, color: laneColor },
      draggable: false,
      selectable: false,
    });

    // System cards — evenly spaced within lane
    const totalWidth = laneSystems.length * NODE_W;
    const gap = laneSystems.length > 1
      ? (CONTAINER_W - totalWidth) / (laneSystems.length + 1)
      : (CONTAINER_W - NODE_W) / 2;

    laneSystems.forEach((sys, idx) => {
      const x = gap + idx * (NODE_W + gap);

      const isDimmed = hoveredId !== null && sys.id !== hoveredId && !relatedIds?.has(sys.id);
      const isHighlighted = hoveredId !== null && (sys.id === hoveredId || (relatedIds?.has(sys.id) ?? false));

      nodes.push({
        id: sys.id,
        type: "systemCard",
        position: { x, y: laneY },
        data: {
          ...sys,
          statusOverride: statusMap[sys.id],
          dimmed: isDimmed,
          highlighted: isHighlighted,
          lanePosition: isAboveHub ? "top" : "bottom",
        },
        draggable: false,
        selectable: false,
      });

      // Edge to hub
      const edgeDimmed = hoveredId !== null && isDimmed;
      edges.push({
        id: `e-${sys.id}-hub`,
        source: sys.id,
        target: "hub",
        type: "smoothstep",
        animated: true,
        style: {
          stroke: edgeDimmed ? "#D1D5DB" : laneColor,
          strokeWidth: 1.5,
          opacity: edgeDimmed ? 0.25 : 1,
          transition: "opacity 200ms, stroke 200ms",
        },
        markerEnd: {
          type: MarkerType.ArrowClosed,
          color: edgeDimmed ? "#D1D5DB" : laneColor,
          width: 16,
          height: 16,
        },
      });
    });
  }

  return { nodes, edges };
}

/* ================================================================
   MAIN COMPONENT
   ================================================================ */

interface TopologyGraphProps {
  systems: SourceSystem[];
  animateIngestion?: boolean;
}

export function TopologyGraph({ systems, animateIngestion = false }: TopologyGraphProps) {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  const { systemTypes: laneOrder, typeColors, laneLabels, entitySystemMap } = scenario.topology;
  const schemaStats = scenario.constants.SCHEMA_STATS;

  const getRelated = useMemo(
    () => buildGetRelatedSystemIds(entitySystemMap),
    [entitySystemMap],
  );

  const [hoveredSystemId, setHoveredSystemId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [visibleCount, setVisibleCount] = useState(animateIngestion ? 0 : systems.length);
  const [statusMap, setStatusMap] = useState<Record<string, string>>({});
  const intervalRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null>(null);

  // Group systems by type for staggered animation (use scenario lane order)
  const systemsByLane = useMemo(() => {
    const ordered: SourceSystem[] = [];
    for (const lt of laneOrder) {
      for (const sys of systems) {
        if (sys.type === lt) ordered.push(sys);
      }
    }
    return ordered;
  }, [systems, laneOrder]);

  // Animation: grouped reveal by lane
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!animateIngestion) {
      setVisibleCount(systems.length);
      setStatusMap({});
      return;
    }

    setVisibleCount(0);
    setStatusMap({});

    let tick = 0;
    intervalRef.current = setInterval(() => {
      tick++;
      setVisibleCount((prev) => {
        const next = prev + 1;
        if (next >= systems.length && intervalRef.current) {
          clearInterval(intervalRef.current);
          intervalRef.current = null;
        }
        return Math.min(next, systems.length);
      });
    }, 250);

    return () => {
      if (intervalRef.current) clearInterval(intervalRef.current);
    };
  }, [animateIngestion, systems.length]);

  // Status cycling for newly visible nodes
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!animateIngestion) return;

    const visible = systemsByLane.slice(0, visibleCount);
    const newMap: Record<string, string> = {};
    visible.forEach((sys, idx) => {
      const elapsed = visibleCount - (idx + 1);
      newMap[sys.id] = elapsed < 2 ? "Connecting..." : "Connected";
    });
    setStatusMap(newMap);
  }, [animateIngestion, visibleCount, systemsByLane]);

  // Filter to visible systems (ordered by lane for stagger)
  const visibleSystems = useMemo(
    () => systemsByLane.slice(0, visibleCount),
    [systemsByLane, visibleCount],
  );

  // Always show hub, but only show visible system nodes
  const { nodes, edges } = useMemo(
    () => computeTopologyLayout(
      visibleSystems, statusMap, hoveredSystemId,
      laneOrder, typeColors, laneLabels, getRelated, schemaStats,
    ),
    [visibleSystems, statusMap, hoveredSystemId, laneOrder, typeColors, laneLabels, getRelated, schemaStats],
  );

  // Hover handlers
  const onNodeMouseEnter = useCallback(
    (_: React.MouseEvent, node: Node) => {
      if (node.type === "systemCard") {
        setHoveredSystemId(node.id);
      }
    },
    [],
  );

  const onNodeMouseLeave = useCallback(() => {
    setHoveredSystemId(null);
  }, []);

  const onInit = useCallback((instance: { fitView: () => void }) => {
    setTimeout(() => instance.fitView(), 50);
  }, []);

  // Re-fit when nodes change during animation
  const reactFlowRef = useRef<{ fitView: () => void } | null>(null);
  const handleInit = useCallback(
    (instance: { fitView: () => void }) => {
      reactFlowRef.current = instance;
      onInit(instance);
    },
    [onInit],
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    if (reactFlowRef.current && animateIngestion) {
      setTimeout(() => reactFlowRef.current?.fitView(), 50);
    }
  }, [visibleCount, animateIngestion]);

  return (
    <ReactFlowProvider>
      <div className="w-full h-full min-h-[400px]">
        <ReactFlow
          nodes={nodes}
          edges={edges}
          nodeTypes={nodeTypes}
          onInit={handleInit}
          onNodeMouseEnter={onNodeMouseEnter}
          onNodeMouseLeave={onNodeMouseLeave}
          fitView
          proOptions={{ hideAttribution: true }}
          nodesDraggable={false}
          nodesConnectable={false}
          zoomOnScroll={false}
          panOnDrag
        >
          <Background color="#E5E7EB" gap={20} />
        </ReactFlow>
      </div>
    </ReactFlowProvider>
  );
}
```

src/scenarios/meridian/index.ts
```
// Meridian Software Group scenario — re-exports all existing data files
// as a single ScenarioData object.

import React from 'react';

import type { ScenarioData } from '../types';

// ── Constants ──
import {
  SYSTEM_IDS,
  ARR_VALUES,
  VARIANCE_COMPONENTS,
  ANNOTATION_COUNTS,
  ENTITY_COUNTS,
  CONCENTRATION,
  EXHIBIT_NAMES,
  CONCEPT_IDS,
  ENTITY_NAMES,
  SCHEMA_STATS,
} from '../../data/_constants';

// ── Company ──
import { COMPANY } from '../../data/company';

// ── Core data ──
import { SYSTEMS } from '../../data/systems';
import { SOURCE_ONTOLOGIES, UNIFIED_ONTOLOGY } from '../../data/ontology';
import { ALL_ANNOTATIONS } from '../../data/annotations';

// ── Entity resolution ──
import { MATCH_CANDIDATES, ENTITY_STATS, MERGE_DOWNSTREAM_IMPACT } from '../../data/entities';

// ── Reconciliation ──
import { RECONCILIATION_METRICS } from '../../data/reconciliation';

// ── Exhibits ──
import {
  EXHIBITS,
  EBITDA_BRIDGE_ITEMS,
  DEFERRED_REVENUE_DATA,
  REVENUE_BY_PRODUCT,
  ARR_BY_CUSTOMER_TOP10,
  CONTRACT_TERMS_DATA,
  CHURN_DATA,
  EXPANSION_DATA,
  CAC_DATA,
  MRR_TREND,
  GROSS_MARGIN_BY_PRODUCT,
} from '../../data/exhibits';

// ── Waterfall / metrics ──
import { WATERFALL_ITEMS, COHORT_RETENTION } from '../../data/metrics';

// ── Drift ──
import { QUARTERLY_REFRESH, DRIFT_EVENTS } from '../../data/drift';

// ── Buy-side ──
import {
  RECONSTRUCTED_METRICS,
  VARIANCE_DECOMPOSITION,
  RISK_FACTORS,
  INTEGRATION_TASKS,
  EXPORT_FILES,
  DATA_QUALITY_SCORE,
} from '../../data/buyside';

// ── Schemas & lineage ──
import { SCHEMA_TABLES } from '../../data/schemas';
import { DBT_MODELS } from '../../data/dbt-models';
import { LINEAGE_PATHS, GHOST_NODES, FULL_LINEAGE_GRAPH } from '../../data/lineage';
import { TIME_COMPARISONS } from '../../data/time-comparisons';

// ── Scenarios (store snapshots) ──
import { SCENARIOS } from '../../data/scenarios';

// ── Hold-period ──
import { holdPeriodData } from './hold-period';

// ── Topology ──
import { TYPE_LANE_ORDER, TYPE_COLORS, ENTITY_SYSTEM_MAP } from '../../data/topology';

// ── Chart components for exhibit renderers ──
import { WaterfallChart } from '../../components/data-display/WaterfallChart';
import { CohortTable } from '../../components/data-display/CohortTable';
import { ConcentrationChart } from '../../components/visualization/ConcentrationChart';

// ── Helpers (mirrors S5 formatting) ──

function formatCurrency(value: number): string {
  if (Math.abs(value) >= 1_000_000) {
    return `$${(value / 1_000_000).toFixed(1)}M`;
  }
  if (Math.abs(value) >= 1_000) {
    return `$${(value / 1_000).toFixed(0)}K`;
  }
  return `$${value.toLocaleString()}`;
}

const grossMarginMetric = RECONCILIATION_METRICS.find((m) => m.id === 'gross-margin')!;

// ── Exhibit renderers ──
// Each renderer mirrors the ExhibitPreview switch cases in S5_ExhibitGenerator.tsx.
// They accept { data: unknown } but use the module-level data constants directly,
// matching how S5 works today (data is pre-imported, not passed dynamically).

function PreviewTable({ headers, rows, rightAlignFrom = 1 }: {
  headers: string[];
  rows: (string | number)[][];
  rightAlignFrom?: number;
}) {
  return React.createElement('div', { className: 'border border-gray-200 rounded overflow-hidden' },
    React.createElement('table', { className: 'w-full text-sm' },
      React.createElement('thead', null,
        React.createElement('tr', { className: 'bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200' },
          headers.map((h, i) =>
            React.createElement('th', {
              key: h,
              className: `px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 ${i >= rightAlignFrom ? 'text-right' : 'text-left'}`,
            }, h)
          )
        )
      ),
      React.createElement('tbody', null,
        rows.map((row, i) => {
          const isTotal = typeof row[0] === 'string' && (row[0] as string).toLowerCase().startsWith('total');
          return React.createElement('tr', {
            key: i,
            className: `border-b border-gray-100 ${isTotal ? 'bg-gray-50 font-semibold' : ''}`,
          },
            row.map((cell, j) =>
              React.createElement('td', {
                key: j,
                className: `px-3 py-2 ${j >= rightAlignFrom ? 'text-right font-mono' : ''} ${j === 0 ? 'text-gray-900' : 'text-gray-700'}`,
              }, cell)
            )
          );
        })
      )
    )
  );
}

const EXHIBIT_RENDERERS: Record<string, (props: { data: unknown }) => React.ReactNode> = {
  'arr-waterfall': () =>
    React.createElement(WaterfallChart, { items: WATERFALL_ITEMS }),

  'normalized-ebitda-bridge': () =>
    React.createElement(WaterfallChart, { items: EBITDA_BRIDGE_ITEMS }),

  'nrr-by-cohort': () =>
    React.createElement(CohortTable, { data: COHORT_RETENTION }),

  'customer-concentration-top-25': () =>
    React.createElement(ConcentrationChart, {
      before: CONCENTRATION.before,
      after: CONCENTRATION.after,
      threshold: CONCENTRATION.threshold,
    }),

  'gross-margin': () =>
    PreviewTable({
      headers: ['Source', 'Gross Margin', 'Variance'],
      rows: grossMarginMetric.sources.map((s) => [s.sourceName, `${s.value}%`, '']),
    }),

  'deferred-revenue-schedule': () =>
    PreviewTable({
      headers: ['Quarter', 'Beginning', 'New Bookings', 'Recognized', 'Ending'],
      rows: DEFERRED_REVENUE_DATA.map((d) => [
        d.quarter,
        formatCurrency(d.beginning),
        formatCurrency(d.newBookings),
        formatCurrency(d.recognized),
        formatCurrency(d.ending),
      ]),
    }),

  'revenue-by-product-line': () =>
    PreviewTable({
      headers: ['Product Line', 'ARR', '% of Total', 'YoY Growth'],
      rows: REVENUE_BY_PRODUCT.map((p) => [
        p.product,
        formatCurrency(p.arr),
        `${p.pctTotal.toFixed(1)}%`,
        `${p.yoyGrowth > 0 ? '+' : ''}${p.yoyGrowth.toFixed(1)}%`,
      ]),
    }),

  'arr-by-customer': () =>
    PreviewTable({
      headers: ['Rank', 'Customer', 'ARR', '% of Total'],
      rows: ARR_BY_CUSTOMER_TOP10.map((c) => [
        `#${c.rank}`,
        c.customer,
        formatCurrency(c.arr),
        `${c.pctTotal.toFixed(2)}%`,
      ]),
      rightAlignFrom: 2,
    }),

  'contract-terms-summary': () =>
    PreviewTable({
      headers: ['Term Length', 'Count', '% of ARR', 'Avg ACV'],
      rows: CONTRACT_TERMS_DATA.map((t) => [
        t.termBucket,
        t.count.toLocaleString(),
        `${t.pctArr.toFixed(1)}%`,
        formatCurrency(t.avgAcv),
      ]),
    }),

  'churn-analysis': () =>
    PreviewTable({
      headers: ['Churn Type', 'Accounts', 'ARR Lost', 'Rate'],
      rows: CHURN_DATA.map((c) => [
        c.type,
        c.count.toString(),
        formatCurrency(c.arrLost),
        `${c.rate.toFixed(1)}%`,
      ]),
    }),

  'expansion-revenue-detail': () =>
    PreviewTable({
      headers: ['Expansion Type', 'Count', 'ARR Added'],
      rows: EXPANSION_DATA.map((e) => [
        e.type,
        e.count.toString(),
        formatCurrency(e.arrAdded),
      ]),
    }),

  'customer-acquisition-cost': () =>
    PreviewTable({
      headers: ['Channel', 'Spend', 'New Customers', 'CAC', 'LTV/CAC'],
      rows: CAC_DATA.map((c) => [
        c.channel,
        formatCurrency(c.spend),
        c.newCustomers.toString(),
        formatCurrency(c.cac),
        `${c.ltvCacRatio.toFixed(1)}x`,
      ]),
    }),

  'monthly-recurring-revenue-trend': () =>
    PreviewTable({
      headers: ['Month', 'MRR', 'MoM Change'],
      rows: MRR_TREND.map((m, i) => {
        const prev = i > 0 ? MRR_TREND[i - 1].mrr : null;
        const change = prev ? ((m.mrr - prev) / prev * 100).toFixed(2) : '\u2014';
        return [
          m.month,
          formatCurrency(m.mrr),
          typeof change === 'string' && change !== '\u2014' ? `+${change}%` : change,
        ];
      }),
    }),

  'gross-margin-by-product-line': () =>
    PreviewTable({
      headers: ['Product Line', 'Revenue', 'Gross Margin', 'YoY Change'],
      rows: GROSS_MARGIN_BY_PRODUCT.map((p) => [
        p.product,
        formatCurrency(p.revenue),
        `${p.margin.toFixed(1)}%`,
        `${p.yoyChange > 0 ? '+' : ''}${p.yoyChange.toFixed(1)}pp`,
      ]),
    }),

  'risk-dashboard': () =>
    React.createElement('div', { className: 'space-y-3' },
      React.createElement('div', { className: 'border border-gray-200 rounded-lg p-4' },
        React.createElement('div', { className: 'flex items-baseline gap-3 mb-3' },
          React.createElement('span', { className: 'text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900' }, '4'),
          React.createElement('span', { className: 'text-sm text-gray-500' }, 'risk factors identified'),
        ),
        React.createElement('div', { className: 'space-y-2' },
          React.createElement('div', { className: 'flex items-center gap-2' },
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-red-500' }),
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'text-sm text-gray-700' }, 'Customer concentration exceeds 10% threshold'),
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'ml-auto text-xs font-medium text-red-600' }, 'Material'),
          ),
          React.createElement('div', { className: 'flex items-center gap-2' },
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-red-500' }),
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'text-sm text-gray-700' }, 'CRM\u2013Billing ARR variance: $4.5M (2.3%)'),
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'ml-auto text-xs font-medium text-red-600' }, 'Material'),
          ),
          React.createElement('div', { className: 'flex items-center gap-2' },
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-amber-500' }),
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'text-sm text-gray-700' }, 'NRR methodology gap: 5pp across sources'),
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'ml-auto text-xs font-medium text-amber-600' }, 'Noteworthy'),
          ),
          React.createElement('div', { className: 'flex items-center gap-2' },
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-amber-500' }),
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'text-sm text-gray-700' }, '17 accounts pending entity resolution'),
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'ml-auto text-xs font-medium text-amber-600' }, 'Noteworthy'),
          ),
        ),
      ),
      React.createElement('p', { className: 'text-xs text-gray-400 italic' }, 'See Buy-side Risk Dashboard for full analysis'),
    ),
};

// ── Exhibit data map ──
// Maps exhibit IDs to their corresponding data constants.

const EXHIBIT_DATA_MAP: Record<string, unknown> = {
  'arr-waterfall': WATERFALL_ITEMS,
  'normalized-ebitda-bridge': EBITDA_BRIDGE_ITEMS,
  'nrr-by-cohort': COHORT_RETENTION,
  'customer-concentration-top-25': {
    before: CONCENTRATION.before,
    after: CONCENTRATION.after,
    threshold: CONCENTRATION.threshold,
  },
  'gross-margin': grossMarginMetric,
  'deferred-revenue-schedule': DEFERRED_REVENUE_DATA,
  'revenue-by-product-line': REVENUE_BY_PRODUCT,
  'arr-by-customer': ARR_BY_CUSTOMER_TOP10,
  'contract-terms-summary': CONTRACT_TERMS_DATA,
  'churn-analysis': CHURN_DATA,
  'expansion-revenue-detail': EXPANSION_DATA,
  'customer-acquisition-cost': CAC_DATA,
  'monthly-recurring-revenue-trend': MRR_TREND,
  'gross-margin-by-product-line': GROSS_MARGIN_BY_PRODUCT,
  'risk-dashboard': RISK_FACTORS,
};

// ── Exhibit lineage map ──
// Maps exhibit IDs to lineage path labels.
// Mirrors the matching logic in S5: first word of exhibit name matched against
// lineage path labels. Falls back to first path ('ARR Waterfall — Ending ARR').

const EXHIBIT_LINEAGE_MAP: Record<string, string> = {
  'arr-waterfall': 'ARR Waterfall \u2014 Ending ARR',
  'nrr-by-cohort': 'NRR by Cohort \u2014 Q1 2025',
  'customer-concentration-top-25': 'Customer Concentration',
  'arr-by-customer': 'ARR Waterfall \u2014 Ending ARR',
  'customer-acquisition-cost': 'Customer Concentration',
  // All others fall back to the first lineage path
  'normalized-ebitda-bridge': 'ARR Waterfall \u2014 Ending ARR',
  'gross-margin': 'ARR Waterfall \u2014 Ending ARR',
  'deferred-revenue-schedule': 'ARR Waterfall \u2014 Ending ARR',
  'revenue-by-product-line': 'ARR Waterfall \u2014 Ending ARR',
  'contract-terms-summary': 'ARR Waterfall \u2014 Ending ARR',
  'churn-analysis': 'ARR Waterfall \u2014 Ending ARR',
  'expansion-revenue-detail': 'ARR Waterfall \u2014 Ending ARR',
  'monthly-recurring-revenue-trend': 'ARR Waterfall \u2014 Ending ARR',
  'gross-margin-by-product-line': 'ARR Waterfall \u2014 Ending ARR',
  'risk-dashboard': 'ARR Waterfall \u2014 Ending ARR',
};

// ── Topology lane labels ──

const LANE_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
  erp: 'ERP / GL',
  crm: 'CRM',
  billing: 'Billing',
};

// ── The assembled scenario ──

export const meridianScenario: ScenarioData = {
  id: 'meridian',

  company: COMPANY,

  constants: {
    SYSTEM_IDS: SYSTEM_IDS as unknown as Record<string, string>,
    FINANCIAL_VALUES: ARR_VALUES as unknown as Record<string, number>,
    VARIANCE_COMPONENTS: VARIANCE_COMPONENTS as unknown as Record<string, number>,
    ANNOTATION_COUNTS,
    ENTITY_COUNTS,
    CONCENTRATION,
    EXHIBIT_NAMES: EXHIBIT_NAMES as unknown as Record<string, string>,
    CONCEPT_IDS: CONCEPT_IDS as unknown as Record<string, string>,
    ENTITY_NAMES: {
      PRIMARY_ID: ENTITY_NAMES.APEX_MEDICAL_ID,
      PRIMARY_VARIANTS: ENTITY_NAMES.APEX_VARIANTS,
      SECONDARY_ID: ENTITY_NAMES.ST_LUKES_ID,
      SECONDARY_VARIANTS: ENTITY_NAMES.ST_LUKES_VARIANTS,
    },
    SCHEMA_STATS,
  },

  // Core data
  systems: SYSTEMS,
  sourceOntologies: SOURCE_ONTOLOGIES,
  unifiedOntology: UNIFIED_ONTOLOGY,
  annotations: ALL_ANNOTATIONS,

  // Entity resolution
  matchCandidates: MATCH_CANDIDATES,
  entityStats: ENTITY_STATS,
  mergeDownstreamImpact: MERGE_DOWNSTREAM_IMPACT,

  // Reconciliation
  reconciliation: {
    metrics: RECONCILIATION_METRICS,
    labels: {
      source1: 'CRM',
      source2: 'Billing',
      source3: 'GL',
      varianceLabel: 'ARR Variance',
    },
  },

  // Exhibits
  exhibits: {
    definitions: EXHIBITS,
    renderers: EXHIBIT_RENDERERS,
    data: EXHIBIT_DATA_MAP,
    lineagePaths: LINEAGE_PATHS,
    ghostNodes: GHOST_NODES,
    fullLineageGraph: FULL_LINEAGE_GRAPH,
    exhibitLineageMap: EXHIBIT_LINEAGE_MAP,
  },

  // Waterfall / metrics
  waterfall: {
    items: WATERFALL_ITEMS,
    title: 'ARR Waterfall',
  },
  cohortRetention: COHORT_RETENTION,

  // Drift / refresh
  quarterlyRefresh: QUARTERLY_REFRESH,
  driftEvents: DRIFT_EVENTS,

  // Buy-side
  buyside: {
    reconstructedMetrics: RECONSTRUCTED_METRICS,
    varianceDecomposition: VARIANCE_DECOMPOSITION,
    riskFactors: RISK_FACTORS,
    integrationTasks: INTEGRATION_TASKS,
    exportFiles: EXPORT_FILES,
    dataQualityScore: DATA_QUALITY_SCORE,
  },

  // Schemas & lineage
  schemaTables: SCHEMA_TABLES,
  dbtModels: DBT_MODELS,
  timeComparisons: TIME_COMPARISONS,

  // Store snapshots
  storeSnapshots: SCENARIOS,

  // Hold-period
  holdPeriod: holdPeriodData,

  // Screen-specific display config
  problemScreen: {
    painStats: [
      { value: '90 Days', label: 'Exclusivity window. 6+ months of manual work.' },
      { value: '$7.1M', label: 'Valuation at risk from data gaps' },
      { value: '47,832', label: 'Fields across 9 systems. No shared schema.' },
    ],
  },

  sellSideLayout: {
    dealTimer: { day: 12, total: 60, label: 'Exclusivity Clock' },
  },

  buySideLayout: {
    dealTimer: { day: 5, total: 42, label: 'Diligence Window' },
  },

  // Topology layout config
  topology: {
    systemTypes: TYPE_LANE_ORDER,
    laneLabels: LANE_LABELS,
    typeColors: TYPE_COLORS,
    entitySystemMap: ENTITY_SYSTEM_MAP as unknown as ScenarioData['topology']['entitySystemMap'],
  },

  // Ontology diagram config
  unifiedOntologyCategories: ['Financial', 'Entity', 'Commercial', 'Operational'],

  // Interaction behavior config
  interactions: {
    primaryMetricId: 'total-arr',
    primaryMetricLabel: 'Total ARR',
    concentrationEntityLabel: 'Customer',
    primaryRiskId: 'risk-concentration',
  },

  navMigration: null,
};

// Company IDs
export const COMPANY_IDS = {

src/scenarios/nav-migration/dimensions.ts
```
// NAV Migration — Dimension sets, completeness, and diff data.
// Self-contained — no imports from src/data/ or src/scenarios/summit-ortho/.

import type {
  DimensionSetExplosion,
  DimensionCompletenessRow,
  DimensionTransaction,
} from './types';
import { COMPANY_IDS } from './_constants';

// ─── Dimension Set Explosions ───────────────────────────────────────

const cascadePortlandComplete: DimensionSetExplosion = {
  dimensionSetId: 4821,
  entries: [
    { code: 'DEPARTMENT', valueCode: 'RENT-OPS', valueName: 'Rental Operations' },
    { code: 'PROJECT', valueCode: 'PRJ-NW-2025', valueName: 'Northwest Expansion 2025' },
    { code: 'COSTCENTER', valueCode: 'CC-PDX', valueName: 'Portland Distribution Center' },
    { code: 'REGION', valueCode: 'PACIFIC-NW', valueName: 'Pacific Northwest' },
    { code: 'VEHICLETYPE', valueCode: 'TRUCK-MED', valueName: 'Medium Delivery Truck' },
    { code: 'CONTRACTTYPE', valueCode: 'COMMERCIAL', valueName: 'Commercial Rental' },
  ],
  referenceCount: 47,
  isComplete: true,
};

const summitFurnishingsIncomplete: DimensionSetExplosion = {
  dimensionSetId: 3299,
  entries: [
    { code: 'DEPARTMENT', valueCode: 'DELIVERY', valueName: 'Delivery Department' },
    { code: 'REGION', valueCode: 'MOUNTAIN', valueName: 'Mountain Region' },
  ],
  referenceCount: 23,
  isComplete: false,
  suggestedMappings: [
    {
      code: 'DEPARTMENT',
      suggestedValueCode: 'DEL-OPS',
      suggestedValueName: 'Delivery Operations',
      confidence: 0.91,
      confidenceLevel: 'high',
      rationale:
        'Summit "DELIVERY" maps to Cascade "DEL-OPS" based on GL account usage patterns. ' +
        '91% of transactions in this department post to the same GL accounts as Cascade DEL-OPS.',
    },
    {
      code: 'PROJECT',
      suggestedValueCode: 'PRJ-MT-2025',
      suggestedValueName: 'Mountain Region Integration 2025',
      confidence: 0.74,
      confidenceLevel: 'medium',
      rationale:
        'No direct PROJECT dimension exists in Summit data. Inferred from transaction dates (all post-acquisition) ' +
        'and customer geography. 74% confidence based on location and posting date correlation.',
    },
    {
      code: 'COSTCENTER',
      suggestedValueCode: 'CC-DEN',
      suggestedValueName: 'Denver Warehouse',
      confidence: 0.71,
      confidenceLevel: 'medium',
      rationale:
        'Summit location code "DEN-WH" correlates to Cascade cost center "CC-DEN". ' +
        '71% confidence — 6 of 23 transactions reference a secondary location "DEN-SOUTH" that may map differently.',
    },
  ],
};

export const DIMENSION_SETS: DimensionSetExplosion[] = [
  cascadePortlandComplete,
  summitFurnishingsIncomplete,
];

// ─── Dimension Transactions ─────────────────────────────────────────

export const DIMENSION_TRANSACTIONS: DimensionTransaction[] = [
  {
    documentNo: 'PSI-20891',
    tableName: 'Sales Invoice Line',
    companyId: COMPANY_IDS.CASCADE_PORTLAND,
    dimensionSetId: 4821,
    shortcut1: 'RENT-OPS',
    shortcut2: 'PRJ-NW-2025',
    isComplete: true,
  },
  {
    documentNo: 'PSI-20904',
    tableName: 'Sales Invoice Line',
    companyId: COMPANY_IDS.CASCADE_PORTLAND,
    dimensionSetId: 4822,
    shortcut1: 'RENT-OPS',
    shortcut2: 'PRJ-NW-2025',
    isComplete: true,
  },
  {
    documentNo: 'PSI-18442',
    tableName: 'Sales Invoice Line',
    companyId: COMPANY_IDS.SUMMIT_FURNISHINGS,

// ─── Dimension Diff Data (Summit enrichment before/after) ───────────
// Shape matches DiffView component: { before: string[]; after: string[]; changes: { before; after }[] }

export const DIMENSION_DIFF_DATA: {
  before: string[];
  after: string[];
  changes: { before: string; after: string }[];
} = {
  before: [
    'REGION = MOUNTAIN → Mountain Region (unchanged)',
  ],
  after: [
    'PROJECT = PRJ-MT-2025 (inferred from transaction date + region: Mountain 2025 project)',
    'COSTCENTER = CC-BOI (inferred from Summit Furnishings primary location: Boise)',
  ],
  changes: [
    {
      before: 'DEPARTMENT = DELIVERY → Delivery Department',
      after: 'DEPARTMENT = RENT-OPS → Rental Operations (Delivery is a sub-function)',
    },
  ],
};

src/scenarios/nav-migration/index.ts
```
// NAV Migration scenario assembly
// Imports all nav-migration data files and assembles them into a ScenarioData object.
// Sell-side / buy-side fields are stubbed — this scenario only uses nav-migration screens.

import type { ScenarioData } from '../types';

// NAV data files
import { COMPANY, NAV_COMPANIES } from './companies';
import { NAV_TABLES, NAV_TABLE_DETAILS } from './tables';
import { RISK_CATEGORIES, NAV_ANNOTATIONS } from './risk-register';
import { POSTING_CHAIN_NODES, POSTING_CHAIN_EDGES, RENTAL_NODES, RENTAL_EDGES, TIE_OUT_GATES } from './posting-chain';
import { GATE_CATEGORIES, GATES } from './reconciliation';
import { DIMENSION_SETS, DIMENSION_TRANSACTIONS, DIMENSION_COMPLETENESS, DIMENSION_DIFF_DATA } from './dimensions';
import { EXCEPTIONS } from './exceptions';
import { MIGRATION_TASKS, INPUT_REQUIREMENTS, MIGRATION_ARTIFACTS } from './migration-plan';
import { PROBLEM_SCREEN_CONFIG } from './problem-screen';
import { SCHEMA_STATS, ANNOTATION_COUNTS, TABLE_COUNTS, GATE_COUNTS, EXCEPTION_COUNTS, RISK_COUNTS, DIMENSION_STATS } from './_constants';

export const navMigrationScenario: ScenarioData = {
  id: 'nav-migration',
  company: COMPANY,

  constants: {
    SYSTEM_IDS: {},
    FINANCIAL_VALUES: {},
    VARIANCE_COMPONENTS: {},
    ANNOTATION_COUNTS,
    ENTITY_COUNTS: { rawRecords: 0, uniqueEntities: 0, deduplicationRate: 0 },
    CONCENTRATION: { before: 0, after: 0, threshold: 0 },
    EXHIBIT_NAMES: {},
    CONCEPT_IDS: {},
    ENTITY_NAMES: {
      PRIMARY_ID: '',
      PRIMARY_VARIANTS: [],
      SECONDARY_ID: '',
      SECONDARY_VARIANTS: [],
    },
    SCHEMA_STATS,
  },

  // Core data — stubbed
  systems: [],
  sourceOntologies: [],
  unifiedOntology: [],
  annotations: [],

  // Entity resolution — stubbed
  matchCandidates: [],
  entityStats: {
    rawRecordCount: 0,
    uniqueEntityCount: 0,
    deduplicationRate: 0,
    autoMergedCount: 0,
    reviewCount: 0,
    rejectedCount: 0,
  },
  mergeDownstreamImpact: {
    affectedExhibits: [],
    newRisks: [],
    metricsChanged: [],
  },

  // Reconciliation — stubbed
  reconciliation: {
    metrics: [],
    labels: { source1: '', source2: '', source3: '', varianceLabel: '' },
  },

  // Exhibits — stubbed
  exhibits: {
    definitions: [],
    renderers: {},
    data: {},
    lineagePaths: [],
    ghostNodes: [],
    fullLineageGraph: { nodes: [], edges: [] },
    exhibitLineageMap: {},
  },

  // Waterfall / metrics — stubbed
  waterfall: { items: [], title: '' },
  cohortRetention: [],

  // Drift / refresh — stubbed
  quarterlyRefresh: {
    quarter: '',
    exhibitsUpdated: 0,
    exhibitsNeedingReview: 0,
    reconciliationBreaks: 0,
    reviewItems: [],
    ontologyDiff: { systemName: '', previousVersion: '', newVersion: '', addedFields: [], removedFields: [], changedFields: [], affectedExhibits: 0, unaffectedExhibits: 0 },
  },
  driftEvents: [],

  // Buy-side — stubbed
  buyside: {
    reconstructedMetrics: [],
    varianceDecomposition: { metricName: '', totalDelta: 0, items: [] },
    riskFactors: [],
    integrationTasks: [],
    exportFiles: [],
    dataQualityScore: { overall: '', dimensions: [] },
  },

  // Schemas & lineage — stubbed
  schemaTables: [],
  dbtModels: {},
  timeComparisons: [],

  // Store snapshots
  storeSnapshots: {},

  // Hold-period — not used
  holdPeriod: null,

  // NAV Migration — fully populated
  navMigration: {
    companies: NAV_COMPANIES,
    tables: NAV_TABLES,
    tableDetails: NAV_TABLE_DETAILS,
    riskCategories: RISK_CATEGORIES,
    navAnnotations: NAV_ANNOTATIONS,
    postingChain: {
      nodes: POSTING_CHAIN_NODES,
      edges: POSTING_CHAIN_EDGES,
      rentalNodes: RENTAL_NODES,
      rentalEdges: RENTAL_EDGES,
      tieOutGates: TIE_OUT_GATES,
    },
    gateCategories: GATE_CATEGORIES,
    gates: GATES,
    dimensionSets: DIMENSION_SETS,
    dimensionTransactions: DIMENSION_TRANSACTIONS,
    dimensionCompleteness: DIMENSION_COMPLETENESS,
    dimensionDiffData: DIMENSION_DIFF_DATA,
    exceptions: EXCEPTIONS,
    migrationPlan: {
      tasks: MIGRATION_TASKS,
      artifacts: MIGRATION_ARTIFACTS,
      inputRequirements: INPUT_REQUIREMENTS,
    },
    problemScreen: PROBLEM_SCREEN_CONFIG,
    layoutConfig: { dealTimer: { day: 1, total: 28, label: 'Migration Timeline' } },
    counters: {
      inventory: {
        companies: 4,
        tables: TABLE_COUNTS.TOTAL_TABLES,
        fields: TABLE_COUNTS.TOTAL_FIELDS,
        nonStandard: TABLE_COUNTS.NON_STANDARD_COUNT,
      },
      risk: {
        nonStandard: RISK_COUNTS.NON_STANDARD,
        highRiskFields: RISK_COUNTS.HIGH_RISK_FIELDS,
        estimatedRework: RISK_COUNTS.ESTIMATED_REWORK,
      },
      gates: {
        total: GATE_COUNTS.TOTAL,
        passing: GATE_COUNTS.PASSING,
        warn: GATE_COUNTS.WARN,
        fail: GATE_COUNTS.FAIL,
      },
      exceptions: {

        critical: EXCEPTION_COUNTS.CRITICAL,
        high: EXCEPTION_COUNTS.HIGH,

      dimensions: {
        uniqueSets: DIMENSION_STATS.UNIQUE_SETS,

        completenessPercent: DIMENSION_STATS.COMPLETENESS_PERCENT,
        incompleteRecords: DIMENSION_STATS.INCOMPLETE_RECORDS,

    },

  // Screen config stubs

};
