src/scenarios/nav-migration/migration-plan.ts
```
import type { MigrationTask, MigrationArtifact } from './types';

export const MIGRATION_TASKS: MigrationTask[] = [
  // Week 1: Discovery + Risk Register
  { label: 'Week 1: Discovery + Risk Register', startDay: 1, endDay: 5, status: 'ready', isGroupHeader: true },
  { label: 'SQL Server extraction + company enumeration', startDay: 1, endDay: 2, status: 'ready' },
  { label: 'Standard vs. non-standard classification', startDay: 2, endDay: 3, status: 'ready' },
  { label: 'RPM rental extension discovery', startDay: 3, endDay: 4, status: 'ready' },
  { label: 'Risk register generation', startDay: 4, endDay: 5, status: 'ready' },

  // Week 2: Mapping + Lineage
  { label: 'Week 2: Mapping + Lineage', startDay: 6, endDay: 14, status: 'pending', isGroupHeader: true },
  { label: 'Posting chain lineage validation', startDay: 6, endDay: 9, status: 'pending' },
  { label: 'Dimension set extraction + reconstruction', startDay: 8, endDay: 11, status: 'pending' },
  { label: 'Posting group normalization crosswalks', startDay: 9, endDay: 12, status: 'pending' },
  { label: 'Rental extension mapping (RPM → BC)', startDay: 10, endDay: 14, status: 'pending' },

  // Week 3: Reconciliation + Exceptions
  { label: 'Week 3: Reconciliation + Exceptions', startDay: 15, endDay: 21, status: 'pending', isGroupHeader: true },
  { label: 'Automated reconciliation gate execution', startDay: 15, endDay: 17, status: 'pending' },
  { label: 'Exception triage + resolution', startDay: 17, endDay: 21, status: 'pending' },
  { label: 'Rental-specific tie-outs (billed vs. on-rent)', startDay: 18, endDay: 21, status: 'pending' },

  // Week 4: Scale + Rehearsal
  { label: 'Week 4: Scale + Rehearsal', startDay: 22, endDay: 28, status: 'pending', isGroupHeader: true },
  { label: 'Full-volume extraction rehearsal', startDay: 22, endDay: 24, status: 'pending' },
  { label: 'Cutover runbook generation', startDay: 24, endDay: 26, status: 'pending' },
  { label: 'Stakeholder sign-off package', startDay: 26, endDay: 28, status: 'pending' },
];

export const INPUT_REQUIREMENTS: string[] = [
  'SQL Server read access (direct or backup restore)',
  'One controller who knows the Summit Furnishings chart of accounts (2-3 hours total)',
  'One rental ops person who can validate RPM contract linkages (2-3 hours total)',
  'Business Central target instance for test loads (Week 3)',
];

export const MIGRATION_ARTIFACTS: MigrationArtifact[] = [
  {
    path: 'discovery/company_inventory.json',
    description: 'All companies, tables, fields with classification',
    content: `{
  "companies": [
    { "id": "cascade-portland", "tables": 180, "fields": 3200, "nonStandard": 16 },
    { "id": "cascade-seattle", "tables": 180, "fields": 3100, "nonStandard": 15 },
    { "id": "cascade-boise", "tables": 180, "fields": 2800, "nonStandard": 14 },
    { "id": "summit-furnishings", "tables": 180, "fields": 2900, "nonStandard": 17 }
  ],
  "totalPhysicalTables": 720,
  "sharedTables": 40
}`,
  },
  {
    path: 'discovery/risk_register.json',
    description: 'Prioritized risk register with mitigations',
    content: `{
  "riskCategories": 7,
  "highRiskFields": 147,
  "estimatedRework": "$340K",
  "topRisk": "Polymorphic relationships (12 tables, $85K impact)"
}`,
  },
  {
    path: 'discovery/rpm_extension_catalog.json',
    description: 'Complete rental extension schema map',
    content: `{
  "rpmTables": 14,
  "totalFields": 412,
  "keyRelationships": [
    "RPM Contract → Customer (18)",
    "RPM Rental Unit → Item (27)",
    "RPM Movement → Item Ledger Entry (32)"
  ]
}`,
  },
  {
    path: 'mapping/posting_chain_lineage.json',
    description: 'Deterministic document-to-ledger mappings',
    content: `{
  "chains": 312,
  "verified": 305,
  "exceptions": 7,
  "coveragePercent": 97.8
}`,
  },
  {
    path: 'mapping/dimension_set_dictionary.json',
    description: 'All dimension sets with explosion',
    content: `{
  "uniqueSets": 1247,
  "dimensionCodes": ["DEPARTMENT","PROJECT","COSTCENTER","REGION","VEHICLETYPE","CONTRACTTYPE"],
  "completenessRate": 98.4,
  "enrichedSets": 23
}`,
  },
  {
    path: 'mapping/posting_group_crosswalks.json',
    description: 'Normalized posting group mappings',
    content: `{
  "crosswalks": 19,
  "affectedCompanies": ["summit-furnishings"],
  "sample": { "from": "RENT-DEP-SF → GL 2310", "to": "RENT-DEP → GL 2150" }
}`,
  },
  {
    path: 'mapping/rpm_to_bc_mapping.json',
    description: 'Rental extension transformation rules',
    content: `{
  "transformations": 14,
  "rpmContract": "→ BC Service Contract + Custom Rental Extension",
  "rpmUnit": "→ BC Fixed Asset + Serial No. Tracking",
  "rpmMovement": "→ BC Item Journal + Transfer Order"
}`,
  },
  {
    path: 'reconciliation/gate_results.json',
    description: 'All 847 gate evaluations with pass/fail/evidence',
    content: `{
  "totalGates": 847,
  "pass": 814,
  "warn": 22,
  "fail": 11,
  "passRate": "96.1%"
}`,
  },
  {
    path: 'reconciliation/exception_register.json',
    description: 'Remaining exceptions with resolution status',
    content: `{
  "totalExceptions": 33,
  "resolved": 19,
  "remaining": 14,
  "autoResolved": 18,
  "manualReview": 14
}`,
  },
  {
    path: 'reconciliation/rental_tieouts.json',
    description: 'Rental-specific reconciliation evidence',
    content: `{
  "contractsChecked": 48,
  "billingGaps": 4,
  "onRentDiscrepancies": 2,
  "totalLeakageEstimate": "$6,100"
}`,
  },
  {
    path: 'execution/cutover_runbook.md',
    description: 'Step-by-step cutover procedure',
    content: `# Cutover Runbook — Cascade Rentals Group

## Pre-cutover (Day -1)
1. Final extraction from NAV production
2. Run all 847 reconciliation gates
3. Verify exception count ≤ 15

## Cutover (Day 0)
4. Freeze NAV writes
5. Execute transformation pipeline
6. Load to BC staging
7. Run post-load validation gates
8. Switch DNS / application config

## Rollback trigger
- Any Category 1 gate failure → immediate rollback
- >5 new exceptions → pause and triage`,
  },
  {
    path: 'execution/dbt_models/stg_nav__customers.sql',
    description: 'Transformation models for BC target loading',
    content: `-- stg_nav__customers.sql
-- Normalize customer masters across 4 NAV companies

SELECT
  company_code || '-' || customer_no AS unified_customer_id,
  customer_no AS nav_customer_no,
  company_code,
  name,
  customer_posting_group,
  COALESCE(
    crosswalk.target_posting_group,
    customer_posting_group
  ) AS normalized_posting_group,
  dimension_set_id
FROM {{ source('nav_extract', 'customer') }}
LEFT JOIN {{ ref('posting_group_crosswalks') }} AS crosswalk
  ON customer_posting_group = crosswalk.source_posting_group`,
  },
];
```

src/scenarios/nav-migration/posting-chain.ts
```
// NAV Migration — Posting chain golden thread.
// One rental contract (SO-10847) traced end-to-end through NAV's posting chain.
// Self-contained — no imports from src/data/ or src/scenarios/summit-ortho/.

import type { PostingChainNode, PostingChainEdge, TieOutGate } from './types';

// ─── Working Layer ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
const salesHeader: PostingChainNode = {
  id: 'sales-header-36',
  tableName: 'Sales Header',
  tableId: 36,
  layer: 'working',
  keyFields: {
    'Document Type': 'Order',
    'No.': 'SO-10847',
    'Sell-to Customer No.': 'C-00412',
    'Sell-to Customer Name': 'Northwest Office Interiors',
  },
  displayValue: 'SO-10847 — Northwest Office Interiors',
};

const salesLine: PostingChainNode = {
  id: 'sales-line-37',
  tableName: 'Sales Line',
  tableId: 37,
  layer: 'working',
  keyFields: {
    'Document No.': 'SO-10847',
    'Line No.': '10000',
    'No.': '1042-OAK',
    'Description': 'Ergonomic Desk Chair – Oak',
    'Quantity': '12',
    'Unit Price': '$130.00',
    'Line Amount': '$4,680.00',
  },
  displayValue: 'Item 1042-OAK × 12 — $4,680.00',
};

// ─── Posted Document Layer ──────────────────────────────────────────
const shipmentHeader: PostingChainNode = {
  id: 'shipment-header-110',
  tableName: 'Sales Shipment Header',
  tableId: 110,
  layer: 'posted-doc',
  keyFields: {
    'No.': 'SSH-10847',
    'Order No.': 'SO-10847',
    'Sell-to Customer No.': 'C-00412',
    'Posting Date': '2025-11-15',
  },
  displayValue: 'SSH-10847',
};

const shipmentLine: PostingChainNode = {
  id: 'shipment-line-111',
  tableName: 'Sales Shipment Line',
  tableId: 111,
  layer: 'posted-doc',
  keyFields: {
    'Document No.': 'SSH-10847',
    'No.': '1042-OAK',
    'Quantity': '12',
  },
  displayValue: '12 units shipped',
};

const invoiceHeader: PostingChainNode = {
  id: 'invoice-header-112',
  tableName: 'Sales Invoice Header',
  tableId: 112,
  layer: 'posted-doc',
  keyFields: {
    'No.': 'PSI-20891',
    'Order No.': 'SO-10847',
    'Sell-to Customer No.': 'C-00412',
    'Posting Date': '2025-11-15',
  },
  displayValue: 'PSI-20891',
};

const invoiceLine: PostingChainNode = {
  id: 'invoice-line-113',
  tableName: 'Sales Invoice Line',
  tableId: 113,
  layer: 'posted-doc',
  keyFields: {
    'Document No.': 'PSI-20891',
    'No.': '1042-OAK',
    'Quantity': '12',
    'Unit Price': '$130.00/mo',
    'Rental Months': '3',
    'Line Amount': '$4,680.00',
  },
  displayValue: '12 × $130/mo × 3 mo = $4,680.00',
};

// ─── Ledger Layer ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
const custLedgerEntry: PostingChainNode = {
  id: 'cust-ledger-21',
  tableName: 'Cust. Ledger Entry',
  tableId: 21,
  layer: 'ledger',
  keyFields: {
    'Entry No.': '48291',
    'Customer No.': 'C-00412',
    'Document No.': 'PSI-20891',
    'Amount': '$4,680.00',
    'Remaining Amount': '$4,680.00',
    'Open': 'Yes',
  },
  displayValue: 'Entry 48291 — $4,680.00 remaining',
};

const detailedCustLedger: PostingChainNode = {
  id: 'detailed-cust-ledger-379',
  tableName: 'Detailed Cust. Ledger Entry',
  tableId: 379,
  layer: 'ledger',
  keyFields: {
    'Entry No.': '91847',
    'Cust. Ledger Entry No.': '48291',
    'Entry Type': 'Initial Entry',
    'Amount': '$4,680.00',
  },
  displayValue: 'Detail of Entry 48291',
};

const itemLedgerEntry: PostingChainNode = {
  id: 'item-ledger-32',
  tableName: 'Item Ledger Entry',
  tableId: 32,
  layer: 'ledger',
  keyFields: {
    'Entry No.': '67412',
    'Item No.': '1042-OAK',
    'Entry Type': 'Sale',
    'Quantity': '-12',
    'Location Code': 'PDX-WH',
    'Location Name': 'Portland Warehouse',
  },
  displayValue: '12 units — Portland Warehouse',
};

const valueEntry: PostingChainNode = {
  id: 'value-entry-5802',
  tableName: 'Value Entry',
  tableId: 5802,
  layer: 'ledger',
  keyFields: {
    'Entry No.': '83201',
    'Item Ledger Entry No.': '67412',
    'Item No.': '1042-OAK',
    'Cost Amount (Actual)': '$4,680.00',
    'Valued Quantity': '-12',
  },
  displayValue: '$4,680.00',
};

// ─── G/L Layer ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const glEntryDebit: PostingChainNode = {
  id: 'gl-entry-ar-debit',
  tableName: 'G/L Entry',
  tableId: 17,
  layer: 'gl',
  keyFields: {
    'Entry No.': '148721',
    'Transaction No.': '48721',
    'G/L Account No.': '1200',
    'G/L Account Name': 'Accounts Receivable',
    'Debit Amount': '$4,680.00',
    'Credit Amount': '$0.00',
    'Posting Date': '2025-11-15',
  },
  displayValue: 'Txn 48721 — A/R Debit $4,680.00',
};

const glEntryCredit: PostingChainNode = {
  id: 'gl-entry-revenue-credit',
  tableName: 'G/L Entry',
  tableId: 17,
  layer: 'gl',
  keyFields: {
    'Entry No.': '148722',
    'Transaction No.': '48722',
    'G/L Account No.': '4100',
    'G/L Account Name': 'Rental Revenue',
    'Debit Amount': '$0.00',
    'Credit Amount': '$4,680.00',
    'Posting Date': '2025-11-15',
  },
  displayValue: 'Txn 48722 — Revenue Credit $4,680.00',
};

const glEntryCogs: PostingChainNode = {
  id: 'gl-entry-cogs',
  tableName: 'G/L Entry',
  tableId: 17,
  layer: 'gl',
  keyFields: {
    'Entry No.': '148723',
    'Transaction No.': '48723',
    'G/L Account No.': '5100',
    'G/L Account Name': 'Cost of Goods Sold',
    'Debit Amount': '$0.00',
    'Credit Amount': '$0.00',
    'Posting Date': '2025-11-15',
  },
  displayValue: 'Txn 48723 — COGS $0 (rental, no cost of goods)',
};

// ─── Assemble main chain ────────────────────────────────────────────
export const POSTING_CHAIN_NODES: PostingChainNode[] = [
  salesHeader,
  salesLine,
  shipmentHeader,
  shipmentLine,
  invoiceHeader,
  invoiceLine,
  custLedgerEntry,
  detailedCustLedger,
  itemLedgerEntry,
  valueEntry,
  glEntryDebit,
  glEntryCredit,
  glEntryCogs,
];

export const POSTING_CHAIN_EDGES: PostingChainEdge[] = [
  // Working → Posted-Doc
  { source: 'sales-header-36', target: 'shipment-header-110', label: 'Document No. = SO-10847' },
  { source: 'sales-header-36', target: 'invoice-header-112', label: 'Document No. = SO-10847' },
  { source: 'sales-line-37', target: 'shipment-line-111', label: 'Document No. + Line No.' },
  { source: 'sales-line-37', target: 'invoice-line-113', label: 'Document No. + Line No.' },

  // Posted-Doc → Ledger
  { source: 'invoice-header-112', target: 'cust-ledger-21', label: 'Document No. = PSI-20891' },
  { source: 'invoice-line-113', target: 'item-ledger-32', label: 'Item No. = 1042-OAK' },
  { source: 'invoice-line-113', target: 'value-entry-5802', label: 'Item Ledger Entry No. = 67412' },
  { source: 'shipment-line-111', target: 'item-ledger-32', label: 'Item No. = 1042-OAK' },

  // Ledger → Ledger (detail)
  { source: 'cust-ledger-21', target: 'detailed-cust-ledger-379', label: 'Cust. Ledger Entry No. = 48291' },
  { source: 'item-ledger-32', target: 'value-entry-5802', label: 'Item Ledger Entry No. = 67412' },

  // Ledger → G/L
  { source: 'cust-ledger-21', target: 'gl-entry-ar-debit', label: 'Transaction No. = 48721' },
  { source: 'value-entry-5802', target: 'gl-entry-revenue-credit', label: 'G/L Entry No. = 148722' },
  { source: 'value-entry-5802', target: 'gl-entry-cogs', label: 'G/L Entry No. = 148723' },
];

// ─── Rental Overlay (RPM ISV extension tables) ─────────────────────
const rpmContract: PostingChainNode = {
  id: 'rpm-contract-rc4410',
  tableName: 'RPM Contract',
  tableId: 50010,
  layer: 'working',
  keyFields: {
    'Contract No.': 'RC-4410',
    'Customer No.': 'C-00412',
    'Start Date': '2025-08-15',

const rpmInspection: PostingChainNode = {
  id: 'rpm-inspection-ins2201',
  tableName: 'RPM Inspection',
  tableId: 50013,
  layer: 'gl',
  keyFields: {
    'Inspection No.': 'INS-2201',
    'Item No.': '1042-OAK',
    'Quantity Inspected': '12',
    'Result': 'Pass — minor wear',
    'Inspection Date': '2025-11-08',
  },
  displayValue: 'INS-2201 — Pass (minor wear)',
};

export const RENTAL_NODES: PostingChainNode[] = [
  rpmContract,
  rpmMovementDelivery,
  rpmMovementPickup,
  rpmUnitOnRent,
  rpmUnitAvailable,
  rpmInspection,
];

export const RENTAL_EDGES: PostingChainEdge[] = [
  // Contract → Sales Header (rental drives the sales order)
  { source: 'rpm-contract-rc4410', target: 'sales-header-36', label: 'Order No. = SO-10847 (dashed)' },

  // Contract → Movements
  { source: 'rpm-contract-rc4410', target: 'rpm-movement-delivery', label: 'Contract No. = RC-4410 (dashed)' },
  { source: 'rpm-contract-rc4410', target: 'rpm-movement-pickup', label: 'Contract No. = RC-4410 (dashed)' },

  // Movement → Unit Status
  { source: 'rpm-movement-delivery', target: 'rpm-unit-on-rent', label: 'Item No. = 1042-OAK (dashed)' },
  { source: 'rpm-movement-pickup', target: 'rpm-unit-available', label: 'Item No. = 1042-OAK (dashed)' },

  // Unit Status → Item Ledger (cross-table via item number)
  { source: 'rpm-unit-on-rent', target: 'item-ledger-32', label: 'Item No. = 1042-OAK (dashed)' },

  // Movement → Item Ledger (delivery triggers inventory movement)
  { source: 'rpm-movement-delivery', target: 'item-ledger-32', label: 'Item Ledger Entry via Posting (dashed)' },

  // Unit Available → Inspection
  { source: 'rpm-unit-available', target: 'rpm-inspection-ins2201', label: 'Return triggers inspection (dashed)' },
];

// ─── Tie-Out Gates ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const TIE_OUT_GATES: TieOutGate[] = [
  {
    id: 'gate-invoice-cle',
    description: 'Invoice total = Cust. Ledger Remaining Amount',
    status: 'pass',
    detail: '$4,680.00 = $4,680.00',
    financialImpact: null,

  {

    financialImpact: null,
  },
  {
    id: 'gate-gl-balance',
    description: 'G/L Debit sum = G/L Credit sum',
    status: 'pass',
    detail: '$4,680.00 balanced',
    financialImpact: null,
  },
  {
    id: 'gate-billed-vs-onrent',
    description: 'Billed months (3) = On-rent days / 30',
    status: 'warn',
    detail: '3 months billed, 87 on-rent days (2.9 months) — 3-day gap between delivery and contract start',
    financialImpact: 390,
    expandedDetail:
      'Delivery date: 2025-08-12. Contract start: 2025-08-15. 3-day gap represents unbilled on-rent time. ' +
      'This is a common leakage pattern in furniture rental — units are delivered before the billing period starts. ' +
      'At $130/unit/month for 12 units, the 3-day gap represents approximately $390 in unbilled rental revenue.',
    drillDownItems: [
      {
        description: 'RPM Movement MOV-8821 — Delivery on 2025-08-12',
        amount: 0,
        detail: '12 units delivered to Northwest Office Interiors 3 days before contract billing start date of 2025-08-15.',
      },
      {
        description: 'Unbilled rental revenue (3 days × 12 units × $130/30)',
        amount: 390,

];

// NAV Migration — Reconciliation gates.
// 7 categories, ~15 detail gates across companies.
// Self-contained — no imports from src/data/ or src/scenarios/summit-ortho/.

import type { ReconciliationGateCategory, ReconciliationGate } from './types';
import { COMPANY_IDS } from './_constants';

// ─── Gate Categories ────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const GATE_CATEGORIES: ReconciliationGateCategory[] = [
  {
    id: 'cat-posting-chains',
    name: 'Document-to-Ledger Posting Chains',
    totalGates: 312,
    pass: 305,
    warn: 5,
    fail: 2,
  },
  {
    id: 'cat-gl-balanced',
    name: 'G/L Balanced Entry Verification',
    totalGates: 180,
    pass: 180,
    warn: 0,
    fail: 0,
  },
  {
    id: 'cat-dimension-completeness',
    name: 'Dimension Set Completeness',
    totalGates: 94,
    pass: 88,
    warn: 4,
    fail: 2,
  },
  {
    id: 'cat-inventory-costing',
    name: 'Inventory Costing (Value Entry ↔ G/L)',
    totalGates: 67,
    pass: 61,
    warn: 3,
    fail: 3,
  },
  {
    id: 'cat-rental-billing',
    name: 'Rental Contract ↔ Billing Reconciliation',
    totalGates: 48,
    pass: 42,
    warn: 4,
    fail: 2,
  },
  {
    id: 'cat-cross-company',
    name: 'Cross-Company Consistency',
    totalGates: 82,
    pass: 78,
    warn: 4,
    fail: 0,
  },
  {
    id: 'cat-master-integrity',
    name: 'Customer/Vendor Master Integrity',
    totalGates: 64,
    pass: 60,
    warn: 2,
    fail: 2,
  },
];

// ─── Detail Gates ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const GATES: ReconciliationGate[] = [
  // ── Document-to-Ledger Posting Chains ─────────────────────────────
  {
    id: 'gate-pc-001',
    description: 'Cust. Ledger ↔ G/L Entry balance — Summit Furnishings',
    categoryId: 'cat-posting-chains',
    companyId: COMPANY_IDS.SUMMIT_FURNISHINGS,
    status: 'fail',
    detail: '$12,340 imbalance across 14 rental deposit transactions',
    financialImpact: 12_340,
    rootCause:
      'Summit Furnishings uses a different posting group mapping for rental deposit transactions. ' +
      'Their custom posting group "RENT-DEP" routes deposits to GL 2310 (Customer Deposits Held), ' +
      'whereas the Cascade standard maps deposits to GL 2150 (Deferred Rental Revenue). The $12,340 ' +
      'difference represents 14 deposit entries that posted to the wrong GL account during the initial ' +
      'data consolidation, creating a reconciliation mismatch between the customer sub-ledger and GL totals.',
    crosswalkDiff: {
      before: [
        'Summit Furnishings: Posting Group = RENT-DEP',
        'Rental Deposit → GL 2310 (Customer Deposits Held)',
        'No offset to Deferred Revenue',
      ],
      after: [
        'Cascade Standard: Posting Group = RENT-STD',
        'Rental Deposit → GL 2150 (Deferred Rental Revenue)',
        'Offset to GL 4100 on billing cycle start',
      ],
      changes: [
        { before: 'GL 2310 — Customer Deposits Held', after: 'GL 2150 — Deferred Rental Revenue' },
        { before: 'No deferred revenue offset', after: 'Auto-offset to GL 4100 at billing start' },
      ],
    },
  },
  {
    id: 'gate-pc-002',
    description: 'Sales Invoice ↔ Cust. Ledger Entry — Cascade Portland',
    categoryId: 'cat-posting-chains',
    companyId: COMPANY_IDS.CASCADE_PORTLAND,
    status: 'pass',
    detail: 'All 1,847 posted invoices reconcile to customer ledger entries',
    financialImpact: null,
  },
  {
    id: 'gate-pc-003',
    description: 'Purchase Invoice ↔ Vendor Ledger Entry — Cascade Seattle',
    categoryId: 'cat-posting-chains',
    companyId: COMPANY_IDS.CASCADE_SEATTLE,
    status: 'pass',
    detail: 'All 923 posted purchase invoices reconcile',
    financialImpact: null,
  },

  // ── G/L Balanced Entry Verification ───────────────────────────────
  {
    id: 'gate-gl-001',
    description: 'G/L transaction balance — All companies',
    categoryId: 'cat-gl-balanced',
    companyId: COMPANY_IDS.CASCADE_PORTLAND,
    status: 'pass',
    detail: 'All 180 sampled transaction groups balance to $0.00 net',
    financialImpact: null,
  },

  // ── Dimension Set Completeness ────────────────────────────────────
  {
    id: 'gate-dim-001',
    description: 'Dimension Set missing Dept code — Cascade Seattle',
    categoryId: 'cat-dimension-completeness',
    companyId: COMPANY_IDS.CASCADE_SEATTLE,
    status: 'warn',
    detail: '4 service entries missing DEPARTMENT dimension — can be inferred from location code',
    financialImpact: null,
  },
  {
    id: 'gate-dim-002',
    description: 'Dimension Set missing Project + Cost Center — Summit Furnishings',
    categoryId: 'cat-dimension-completeness',
    companyId: COMPANY_IDS.SUMMIT_FURNISHINGS,
    status: 'fail',
    detail: '20 acquired transactions missing PROJECT and COSTCENTER dimensions',
    financialImpact: null,
    rootCause:
      'Summit Furnishings did not use Project or Cost Center dimensions prior to acquisition. ' +
      'Their chart of accounts embedded department coding in the GL account number structure ' +
      '(e.g., 4100-DEL for Delivery Revenue) rather than using NAV dimensions. These 20 transactions ' +
      'need dimension enrichment before migration.',
  },

  // ── Inventory Costing ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  {
    id: 'gate-inv-001',
    description: 'Value Entry ↔ G/L Entry — Cascade Portland rental items',
    categoryId: 'cat-inventory-costing',
    companyId: COMPANY_IDS.CASCADE_PORTLAND,
    status: 'pass',
    detail: 'All 412 value entries reconcile to GL postings',
    financialImpact: null,
  },
  {
    id: 'gate-inv-002',
    description: 'Value Entry ↔ G/L Entry — Summit Furnishings used equipment',
    categoryId: 'cat-inventory-costing',
    companyId: COMPANY_IDS.SUMMIT_FURNISHINGS,
    status: 'fail',
    detail: '$8,210 variance on 3 used-equipment write-downs posted to wrong cost adjustment account',
    financialImpact: 8_210,
    rootCause:
      'Summit uses a custom cost adjustment batch job that posts write-downs to GL 5200 (Inventory Adjustments) ' +
      'instead of the standard GL 5110 (Cost Adjustment). Three year-end entries were posted with the non-standard ' +
      'mapping, creating a $8,210 variance when compared against the expected GL account.',
  },
  {
    id: 'gate-inv-003',
    description: 'Negative inventory check — Cascade Boise',
    categoryId: 'cat-inventory-costing',
    companyId: COMPANY_IDS.CASCADE_BOISE,
    status: 'warn',
    detail: '2 items show negative inventory quantities — likely timing issue on in-transit shipments',
    financialImpact: 1_440,
  },

  // ── Rental Contract ↔ Billing Reconciliation ─────────────────────
  {
    id: 'gate-rent-001',
    description: 'RPM Billed Days ↔ On-Rent Days — Cascade Portland',
    categoryId: 'cat-rental-billing',
    companyId: COMPANY_IDS.CASCADE_PORTLAND,
    status: 'warn',
    detail: '$6,100 aggregate gap across 8 contracts where delivery precedes billing start',
    financialImpact: 6_100,
  },
  {
    id: 'gate-rent-002',
    description: 'RPM Contract total ↔ Posted Invoice total — Cascade Seattle',
    categoryId: 'cat-rental-billing',
    companyId: COMPANY_IDS.CASCADE_SEATTLE,
    status: 'pass',
    detail: 'All 31 active contracts reconcile to posted invoices within $0.01 tolerance',
    financialImpact: null,
  },

  // ── Cross-Company Consistency ─────────────────────────────────────
  {
    id: 'gate-cc-001',
    description: 'Chart of Accounts alignment — Cascade Portland vs Seattle',
    categoryId: 'cat-cross-company',
    companyId: COMPANY_IDS.CASCADE_PORTLAND,
    status: 'pass',
    detail: 'COA structures match across all 142 active GL accounts',
    financialImpact: null,
  },
  {
    id: 'gate-cc-002',
    description: 'Posting Group mapping — Summit Furnishings vs Cascade standard',
    categoryId: 'cat-cross-company',
    companyId: COMPANY_IDS.SUMMIT_FURNISHINGS,
    status: 'warn',
    detail: '4 posting groups use non-standard GL mappings — requires crosswalk before migration',
    financialImpact: null,
  },

  // ── Customer/Vendor Master Integrity ──────────────────────────────
  {
    id: 'gate-master-001',
    description: 'Duplicate customer detection — Summit Furnishings',
    categoryId: 'cat-master-integrity',
    companyId: COMPANY_IDS.SUMMIT_FURNISHINGS,
    status: 'fail',
    detail: '2 duplicate customer records (same Tax ID, different Customer No.) — C-00891/C-01204',
    financialImpact: null,
    rootCause:
      'Summit created a new customer record (C-01204) for an existing customer (C-00891) when the customer ' +
      'changed their billing address. Both records have the same EIN and open ledger entries. Requires merge ' +
      'before migration to avoid duplicate A/R balances in BC.',
  },
  {
    id: 'gate-master-002',

    categoryId: 'cat-master-integrity',

    financialImpact: null,
  },
];

src/scenarios/nav-migration/risk-register.ts
```
import type { RiskCategory, NAVFieldAnnotation } from './types';
import { COMPANY_IDS, ANNOTATION_COUNTS } from './_constants';

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Risk categories (7) — matches the demo script
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const RISK_CATEGORIES: RiskCategory[] = [
  {
    id: 'risk-polymorphic',
    name: 'Polymorphic relationships',
    affectedTableCount: 12,
    severity: 'Critical',
    confidence: 0.92,
    confidenceLevel: 'high',
    estimatedImpact: 85_000,
    detail:
      'Twelve tables use the Source Type + Source No. pattern where a single Code[20] field points to different target tables depending on an Option enum. NAV stores no metadata-level foreign key for these — the relationship is enforced purely in C/AL code. During migration, each polymorphic branch must be resolved to the correct BC table reference. If any branch is missed, records silently lose their parent linkage and downstream reports (aging, ledger drill-through) return incomplete data.',
    affectedFields: [
      { table: 'Cust. Ledger Entry', field: 'Source Type / Source No.', issue: 'Points to Customer, Vendor, Bank Account, or Employee depending on enum value' },
      { table: 'G/L Entry', field: 'Source Type / Source No.', issue: 'Five-way polymorphic FK across Customer, Vendor, Bank, FA, Employee' },
      { table: 'RPM Rental Unit', field: 'Source Type / Source No.', issue: 'Three-way polymorphic FK: Item, Fixed Asset, or Resource — no metadata constraint' },
      { table: 'Sales Line', field: 'Type / No.', issue: 'Item, Resource, G/L Account, Fixed Asset, or Charge (Item)' },
    ],
    mitigationApproach:
      'Map each polymorphic branch explicitly in the crosswalk, generate per-branch validation queries, and run referential integrity checks post-migration for every enum value.',
  },
  {
    id: 'risk-dimension-set',
    name: 'Dimension Set ID dependencies',
    affectedTableCount: 28,
    severity: 'Critical',
    confidence: 0.95,
    confidenceLevel: 'high',
    estimatedImpact: 70_000,
    detail:
      'Twenty-eight tables carry a Dimension Set ID integer that references the Dimension Set Entry table. This is NAV\'s denormalized approach to multi-dimensional tagging — a single integer encodes an entire combination of dimension codes and values. If the Dimension Set Entry table is migrated with renumbered IDs (common when merging companies), every referencing table must be updated in lockstep. A single missed table causes dimensional reporting to silently return wrong slices.',
    affectedFields: [
      { table: 'G/L Entry', field: 'Dimension Set ID', issue: 'Every posted GL line carries a set ID — renumbering breaks financial analysis views' },
      { table: 'Item Ledger Entry', field: 'Dimension Set ID', issue: 'Inventory valuation by dimension fails if IDs are remapped without updating this table' },
      { table: 'Value Entry', field: 'Dimension Set ID', issue: 'Cost entries tied to wrong dimension combinations after migration' },
      { table: 'Sales Invoice Line', field: 'Dimension Set ID', issue: 'Posted document dimensions become unretrievable' },
    ],
    mitigationApproach:
      'Preserve Dimension Set IDs as-is during migration (no renumbering). If company merge requires renumbering, build a complete crosswalk and update all 28 referencing tables atomically.',
  },
  {
    id: 'risk-posting-group',
    name: 'Posting group chain breaks',
    affectedTableCount: 9,
    severity: 'High',
    confidence: 0.88,
    confidenceLevel: 'high',
    estimatedImpact: 65_000,
    detail:
      'NAV\'s posting groups form a chain from master data (Customer Posting Group, Vendor Posting Group) through General Posting Setup to specific G/L accounts. Each company may define different posting group codes that map to different account structures. When consolidating four companies, posting group codes may collide (e.g., "DOMESTIC" in Portland maps to account 4010, but "DOMESTIC" in Seattle maps to 4110). Unresolved collisions cause postings to land in the wrong G/L accounts.',
    affectedFields: [
      { table: 'Customer', field: 'Customer Posting Group', issue: 'Code collision across companies maps customers to wrong receivables accounts' },
      { table: 'General Posting Setup', field: 'Sales Account / COGS Account', issue: 'Combined setup rows may point to non-existent accounts in target chart' },
      { table: 'Vendor', field: 'Vendor Posting Group', issue: 'Same code, different payables accounts across companies' },
    ],
    mitigationApproach:
      'Generate a posting group collision matrix across all four companies. Where codes collide with different GL mappings, prefix with company code and update all master data references before go-live.',
  },
  {
    id: 'risk-rental-extension',
    name: 'Rental extension schema gaps',
    affectedTableCount: 14,
    severity: 'High',
    confidence: 0.78,
    confidenceLevel: 'medium',
    estimatedImpact: 55_000,
    detail:
      'The RPM rental extension adds 14 custom tables and modifies standard table events. These tables use polymorphic relationships (RPM Rental Unit.Source Type → Item/FA/Resource), custom enum fields not present in standard W1, and application-layer business logic encoded in C/AL event subscribers. The extension schema has no BC equivalent — it must be rebuilt as an AL extension, and all data must be migrated into the new schema. Field mappings for rental-specific concepts (unit status lifecycle, inspection scheduling, availability calculation) have no standard BC target.',
    affectedFields: [
      { table: 'RPM Rental Unit', field: 'Source Type / Source No.', issue: 'Polymorphic FK with no BC metadata constraint — must be explicitly mapped' },
      { table: 'RPM Rental Unit', field: 'Status', issue: 'Custom enum (Available/On Rent/In Service/Retired) — not a standard BC option set' },
      { table: 'RPM Availability', field: 'Available Qty.', issue: 'FlowField computed from RPM Movement — needs recomputation logic in AL' },
      { table: 'RPM Contract', field: 'Billing Schedule Code', issue: 'Custom billing cadence field with no BC equivalent' },
    ],
    mitigationApproach:
      'Build a dedicated AL extension replicating the RPM schema. Map each custom field to the new extension tables, and validate rental business logic (availability calc, inspection scheduling) with parallel-run testing.',
  },
  {
    id: 'risk-blob',
    name: 'BLOB/media fields',
    affectedTableCount: 6,
    severity: 'Medium',
    confidence: 0.90,
    confidenceLevel: 'high',
    estimatedImpact: 25_000,
    detail:
      'Six tables contain BLOB fields storing binary data (scanned receipts, report templates, logos, notes). BLOB fields are excluded from standard XMLport and RapidStart exports. They require dedicated extraction via the NAV BLOB API or direct SQL access. In BC cloud, large BLOBs must migrate to Media/MediaSet fields or Azure Blob Storage, which changes the access pattern for all consuming code.',
    affectedFields: [
      { table: 'Custom Deposit Tracker', field: 'Receipt Image', issue: 'Binary scan data — exceeds BC cloud per-record size limits' },
      { table: 'Custom Deposit Tracker', field: 'Notes', issue: 'BLOB text field — must convert to Media or large Text field' },
      { table: 'Company Information', field: 'Picture', issue: 'Company logo stored as BLOB — convert to Media field' },
    ],
    mitigationApproach:
      'Extract all BLOB fields via direct SQL. Convert binary BLOBs to BC Media/MediaSet fields. For oversized records, migrate to Azure Blob Storage with a reference pointer in BC.',
  },
  {
    id: 'risk-flowfield',
    name: 'FlowField recomputation needed',
    affectedTableCount: 34,
    severity: 'Medium',
    confidence: 0.93,
    confidenceLevel: 'high',
    estimatedImpact: 20_000,
    detail:
      'FlowFields are virtual calculated fields that NAV recomputes on demand from underlying table data. During migration, FlowField values are not transferred — they must be recalculated in the target system. If the underlying data relationships change (e.g., due to table renumbering or posting group remapping), FlowFields may return incorrect values. Thirty-four fields across Item, Customer, Vendor, and Resource tables are affected.',
    affectedFields: [
      { table: 'Item', field: 'Inventory', issue: 'Sum of Item Ledger Entry quantities — incorrect if entries are partially migrated' },
      { table: 'Customer', field: 'Balance (LCY)', issue: 'Sum of open Cust. Ledger Entries — wrong if ledger entries are remapped' },
      { table: 'Vendor', field: 'Balance (LCY)', issue: 'Sum of open Vendor Ledger Entries — same recomputation risk' },
      { table: 'RPM Availability', field: 'Available Qty.', issue: 'FlowField over RPM Movement — rental extension FlowField with no standard BC source' },
    ],
    mitigationApproach:
      'After data migration, trigger a full FlowField recalculation across all affected tables. Validate recalculated values against pre-migration snapshots to detect data integrity issues.',
  },
  {
    id: 'risk-custom-objects',
    name: 'Summit Furnishings custom objects',
    affectedTableCount: 8,
    severity: 'Medium',
    confidence: 0.75,
    confidenceLevel: 'medium',
    estimatedImpact: 20_000,
    detail:
      'Summit Furnishings has 8 custom tables built outside the RPM extension framework. These include a Custom Deposit Tracker (with BLOB fields for receipt images), a Custom Fleet Report, and 6 additional bespoke tables for delivery scheduling, warranty tracking, and commission calculation. None of these have standard BC equivalents, and their C/AL code includes direct table references that will break in AL. The deposit tracker is particularly complex because it cross-references both Customer and Sales Invoice Header through application-layer joins.',
    affectedFields: [
      { table: 'Custom Deposit Tracker', field: 'Applied to Invoice No.', issue: 'Application-layer join to Sales Invoice Header — no FK metadata' },
      { table: 'Custom Fleet Report', field: 'Unit Status Summary', issue: 'Aggregated field computed from multiple RPM tables — needs AL rewrite' },
      { table: 'Custom Delivery Schedule', field: 'Route Code', issue: 'Custom enum with no BC equivalent — must be converted to option set' },
    ],
    mitigationApproach:
      'Audit each custom table for BC compatibility. Build dedicated AL extensions for business-critical tables (Deposit Tracker, Fleet Report). Consider retiring low-usage tables after stakeholder review.',
  },
];

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Hand-written needs-review annotations (45 total: 38 high, 5 medium, 2 low)
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

const CP = COMPANY_IDS.CASCADE_PORTLAND;
const CS = COMPANY_IDS.CASCADE_SEATTLE;
const CB = COMPANY_IDS.CASCADE_BOISE;
const SF = COMPANY_IDS.SUMMIT_FURNISHINGS;

const NEEDS_REVIEW_ANNOTATIONS: NAVFieldAnnotation[] = [
  // ── Demo script highlights ──
  { sourceField: 'Status', tableName: 'RPM Rental Unit', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'asset.status', confidence: 0.76, confidenceLevel: 'medium', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Non-standard enum' },
  { sourceField: 'Dimension Set ID', tableName: 'G/L Entry', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'transaction.dimensionKey', confidence: 0.94, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Recomputation needed' },
  { sourceField: 'Source Type', tableName: 'Cust. Ledger Entry', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'ledger.sourceReference', confidence: 0.62, confidenceLevel: 'low', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Polymorphic FK' },
  { sourceField: 'Inventory', tableName: 'Item', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'inventory.onHand', confidence: 0.58, confidenceLevel: 'low', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'FlowField' },

  // ── High confidence needs-review (37 more to reach 38 total high) ──
  { sourceField: 'Source No.', tableName: 'RPM Rental Unit', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'asset.sourceId', confidence: 0.91, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Polymorphic FK' },
  { sourceField: 'Source Type', tableName: 'G/L Entry', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'transaction.sourceType', confidence: 0.89, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Polymorphic FK' },
  { sourceField: 'Source No.', tableName: 'G/L Entry', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'transaction.sourceId', confidence: 0.87, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Polymorphic FK' },
  { sourceField: 'Type', tableName: 'Sales Line', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'lineItem.type', confidence: 0.92, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Polymorphic FK' },
  { sourceField: 'No.', tableName: 'Sales Line', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'lineItem.referenceId', confidence: 0.90, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Polymorphic FK' },
  { sourceField: 'Type', tableName: 'Sales Invoice Line', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'lineItem.type', confidence: 0.91, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Polymorphic FK' },
  { sourceField: 'No.', tableName: 'Sales Invoice Line', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'lineItem.referenceId', confidence: 0.88, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Polymorphic FK' },
  { sourceField: 'Dimension Set ID', tableName: 'Item Ledger Entry', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'inventory.dimensionKey', confidence: 0.93, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Recomputation needed' },
  { sourceField: 'Dimension Set ID', tableName: 'Value Entry', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'valuation.dimensionKey', confidence: 0.92, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Recomputation needed' },
  { sourceField: 'Dimension Set ID', tableName: 'Sales Invoice Line', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'lineItem.dimensionKey', confidence: 0.91, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Recomputation needed' },
  { sourceField: 'Customer Posting Group', tableName: 'Customer', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'customer.postingGroup', confidence: 0.95, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Posting group collision' },
  { sourceField: 'Customer Posting Group', tableName: 'Customer', companyId: CS, mappedConcept: 'customer.postingGroup', confidence: 0.95, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Posting group collision' },
  { sourceField: 'Customer Posting Group', tableName: 'Customer', companyId: CB, mappedConcept: 'customer.postingGroup', confidence: 0.94, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Posting group collision' },
  { sourceField: 'Vendor Posting Group', tableName: 'Vendor', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'vendor.postingGroup', confidence: 0.94, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Posting group collision' },
  { sourceField: 'Vendor Posting Group', tableName: 'Vendor', companyId: CS, mappedConcept: 'vendor.postingGroup', confidence: 0.93, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Posting group collision' },
  { sourceField: 'Sales Account', tableName: 'General Posting Setup', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'posting.salesAccount', confidence: 0.96, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Posting group collision' },

  { sourceField: 'Billing Schedule Code', tableName: 'RPM Contract', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'rental.billingSchedule', confidence: 0.85, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Non-standard enum' },
  { sourceField: 'Available Qty.', tableName: 'RPM Availability', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'rental.availableQuantity', confidence: 0.82, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'FlowField' },

  { sourceField: 'Source Type', tableName: 'RPM Rental Unit', companyId: CB, mappedConcept: 'asset.sourceType', confidence: 0.87, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Polymorphic FK' },
  { sourceField: 'Dimension Set ID', tableName: 'G/L Entry', companyId: CS, mappedConcept: 'transaction.dimensionKey', confidence: 0.93, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Recomputation needed' },
  { sourceField: 'Dimension Set ID', tableName: 'G/L Entry', companyId: CB, mappedConcept: 'transaction.dimensionKey', confidence: 0.92, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Recomputation needed' },
  { sourceField: 'Balance (LCY)', tableName: 'Customer', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'customer.balance', confidence: 0.90, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'FlowField' },
  { sourceField: 'Balance (LCY)', tableName: 'Vendor', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'vendor.balance', confidence: 0.89, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'FlowField' },
  { sourceField: 'Notes', tableName: 'Custom Deposit Tracker', companyId: SF, mappedConcept: 'deposit.notes', confidence: 0.84, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'BLOB' },
  { sourceField: 'Receipt Image', tableName: 'Custom Deposit Tracker', companyId: SF, mappedConcept: 'deposit.receiptImage', confidence: 0.83, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'BLOB' },
  { sourceField: 'Applied to Invoice No.', tableName: 'Custom Deposit Tracker', companyId: SF, mappedConcept: 'deposit.invoiceRef', confidence: 0.86, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Application-layer join' },
  { sourceField: 'Unit Status Summary', tableName: 'Custom Fleet Report', companyId: SF, mappedConcept: 'fleet.statusSummary', confidence: 0.81, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Computed field' },
  { sourceField: 'Route Code', tableName: 'Custom Delivery Schedule', companyId: SF, mappedConcept: 'delivery.routeCode', confidence: 0.82, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Non-standard enum' },
  { sourceField: 'Dimension Set ID', tableName: 'RPM Rental Unit', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'asset.dimensionKey', confidence: 0.90, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Recomputation needed' },
  { sourceField: 'Dimension Set ID', tableName: 'Sales Header', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'order.dimensionKey', confidence: 0.92, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Recomputation needed' },
  { sourceField: 'Gen. Bus. Posting Group', tableName: 'Customer', companyId: SF, mappedConcept: 'customer.genBusPostingGroup', confidence: 0.93, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Posting group collision' },
  { sourceField: 'Vendor Posting Group', tableName: 'Vendor', companyId: CB, mappedConcept: 'vendor.postingGroup', confidence: 0.92, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Posting group collision' },
  { sourceField: 'Source No.', tableName: 'RPM Rental Unit', companyId: CB, mappedConcept: 'asset.sourceId', confidence: 0.85, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Polymorphic FK' },
  { sourceField: 'Picture', tableName: 'Company Information', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'company.logo', confidence: 0.88, confidenceLevel: 'high', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'BLOB' },

  // ── Medium confidence needs-review (5 total, 4 more) ──
  { sourceField: 'Last Inspection Date', tableName: 'RPM Inspection', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'rental.lastInspection', confidence: 0.74, confidenceLevel: 'medium', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Non-standard field' },
  { sourceField: 'Rental Rate (LCY)', tableName: 'RPM Rental Unit', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'asset.rentalRate', confidence: 0.72, confidenceLevel: 'medium', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Non-standard field' },
  { sourceField: 'Current Location Code', tableName: 'RPM Movement', companyId: CP, mappedConcept: 'rental.currentLocation', confidence: 0.70, confidenceLevel: 'medium', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Non-standard field' },
  { sourceField: 'Warranty Terms', tableName: 'Custom Fleet Report', companyId: SF, mappedConcept: 'fleet.warrantyTerms', confidence: 0.68, confidenceLevel: 'medium', status: 'needs-review', riskFlag: 'Non-standard field' },
];

// Verify hand-written counts match constants
const highCount = NEEDS_REVIEW_ANNOTATIONS.filter(a => a.confidenceLevel === 'high').length;
const mediumCount = NEEDS_REVIEW_ANNOTATIONS.filter(a => a.confidenceLevel === 'medium').length;
const lowCount = NEEDS_REVIEW_ANNOTATIONS.filter(a => a.confidenceLevel === 'low').length;

if (highCount !== ANNOTATION_COUNTS.pendingHigh) {
  throw new Error(`[NAV Annotations] Expected ${ANNOTATION_COUNTS.pendingHigh} high-confidence needs-review, got ${highCount}`);
}
if (mediumCount !== ANNOTATION_COUNTS.medium) {
  throw new Error(`[NAV Annotations] Expected ${ANNOTATION_COUNTS.medium} medium-confidence needs-review, got ${mediumCount}`);
}
if (lowCount !== ANNOTATION_COUNTS.low) {
  throw new Error(`[NAV Annotations] Expected ${ANNOTATION_COUNTS.low} low-confidence needs-review, got ${lowCount}`);
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Auto-accepted annotation generator
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

const STANDARD_FIELD_SEEDS = [
  { field: 'No.', concept: 'entity.primaryKey' },
  { field: 'Name', concept: 'entity.name' },
  { field: 'Description', concept: 'entity.description' },
  { field: 'Posting Date', concept: 'transaction.postingDate' },
  { field: 'Document No.', concept: 'document.number' },
  { field: 'Document Type', concept: 'document.type' },
  { field: 'Amount', concept: 'financial.amount' },
  { field: 'Amount (LCY)', concept: 'financial.amountLCY' },
  { field: 'Currency Code', concept: 'financial.currency' },
  { field: 'Entry No.', concept: 'ledger.entryNo' },
  { field: 'G/L Account No.', concept: 'account.glAccountNo' },
  { field: 'Sell-to Customer No.', concept: 'customer.sellToNo' },
  { field: 'Bill-to Customer No.', concept: 'customer.billToNo' },
  { field: 'Buy-from Vendor No.', concept: 'vendor.buyFromNo' },
  { field: 'Pay-to Vendor No.', concept: 'vendor.payToNo' },
  { field: 'Location Code', concept: 'inventory.locationCode' },
  { field: 'Quantity', concept: 'inventory.quantity' },
  { field: 'Unit Price', concept: 'pricing.unitPrice' },
  { field: 'Unit Cost', concept: 'pricing.unitCost' },
  { field: 'Line Amount', concept: 'financial.lineAmount' },
  { field: 'Line Discount %', concept: 'pricing.lineDiscount' },
  { field: 'Shortcut Dimension 1 Code', concept: 'dimension.shortcut1' },
  { field: 'Shortcut Dimension 2 Code', concept: 'dimension.shortcut2' },
  { field: 'Global Dimension 1 Code', concept: 'dimension.global1' },
  { field: 'Global Dimension 2 Code', concept: 'dimension.global2' },
  { field: 'Applies-to Doc. Type', concept: 'application.docType' },
  { field: 'Applies-to Doc. No.', concept: 'application.docNo' },
  { field: 'External Document No.', concept: 'document.externalNo' },
  { field: 'Due Date', concept: 'payment.dueDate' },
  { field: 'Payment Terms Code', concept: 'payment.termsCode' },
  { field: 'Payment Method Code', concept: 'payment.methodCode' },
  { field: 'Salesperson Code', concept: 'sales.salesperson' },
  { field: 'Responsibility Center', concept: 'org.responsibilityCenter' },
  { field: 'Gen. Bus. Posting Group', concept: 'posting.genBusGroup' },
  { field: 'Gen. Prod. Posting Group', concept: 'posting.genProdGroup' },
  { field: 'VAT Bus. Posting Group', concept: 'tax.vatBusGroup' },
  { field: 'VAT Prod. Posting Group', concept: 'tax.vatProdGroup' },
  { field: 'Tax Area Code', concept: 'tax.areaCode' },
  { field: 'Tax Group Code', concept: 'tax.groupCode' },
  { field: 'Shipment Date', concept: 'logistics.shipmentDate' },
  { field: 'Ship-to Code', concept: 'logistics.shipToCode' },
  { field: 'Item No.', concept: 'inventory.itemNo' },
  { field: 'Variant Code', concept: 'inventory.variantCode' },
  { field: 'Unit of Measure Code', concept: 'inventory.uom' },
  { field: 'Bin Code', concept: 'warehouse.binCode' },
  { field: 'Order Date', concept: 'order.date' },
  { field: 'Promised Delivery Date', concept: 'logistics.promisedDelivery' },
  { field: 'Status', concept: 'document.status' },
  { field: 'Completely Shipped', concept: 'logistics.completelyShipped' },
  { field: 'Last Modified Date Time', concept: 'audit.lastModified' },
  { field: 'Created Date', concept: 'audit.createdDate' },
];

const TABLE_NAMES_FOR_GENERATION = [
  'Customer', 'Vendor', 'Item', 'G/L Account', 'G/L Entry',
  'Sales Header', 'Sales Line', 'Sales Invoice Header', 'Sales Invoice Line',
  'Cust. Ledger Entry', 'Detailed Cust. Ledg. Entry',
  'Item Ledger Entry', 'Value Entry',
  'Purchase Header', 'Purchase Line', 'Purch. Inv. Header', 'Purch. Inv. Line',
  'Vendor Ledger Entry', 'Detailed Vendor Ledg. Entry',
  'Bank Account', 'Bank Account Ledger Entry',
  'General Journal Line', 'General Posting Setup',
  'Sales Shipment Header', 'Sales Shipment Line',
  'Resource', 'Service Header', 'Service Line',
  'Contact', 'Fixed Asset', 'FA Ledger Entry',
  'Job', 'Job Ledger Entry',
];

const COMPANY_LIST = [CP, CS, CB, SF];

function generateAutoAcceptedAnnotations(): NAVFieldAnnotation[] {
  const generated: NAVFieldAnnotation[] = [];
  const target = ANNOTATION_COUNTS.autoAccepted;

  let idx = 0;
  outer:
  for (const company of COMPANY_LIST) {
    for (const table of TABLE_NAMES_FOR_GENERATION) {
      for (const seed of STANDARD_FIELD_SEEDS) {
        if (generated.length >= target) break outer;

        // Use a deterministic but varied confidence between 0.96 and 1.00
        const confidence = 0.96 + ((idx * 7 + 3) % 5) * 0.008;

        generated.push({
          sourceField: seed.field,
          tableName: table,
          companyId: company,
          mappedConcept: seed.concept,
          confidence: Math.round(confidence * 100) / 100,
          confidenceLevel: 'high',
          status: 'auto-accepted',
        });

        idx++;
      }
    }
  }

  return generated.slice(0, target);
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Combined export
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

const autoAccepted = generateAutoAcceptedAnnotations();

if (autoAccepted.length !== ANNOTATION_COUNTS.autoAccepted) {
  throw new Error(
    `[NAV Annotations] Expected ${ANNOTATION_COUNTS.autoAccepted} auto-accepted annotations, generated ${autoAccepted.length}`
  );
}

export const NAV_ANNOTATIONS: NAVFieldAnnotation[] = [
  ...NEEDS_REVIEW_ANNOTATIONS,
  ...autoAccepted,
];

// Final sanity check
if (NAV_ANNOTATIONS.length !== ANNOTATION_COUNTS.total) {
  throw new Error(
    `[NAV Annotations] Expected ${ANNOTATION_COUNTS.total} total annotations, got ${NAV_ANNOTATIONS.length}`
  );
}
```

import type { NAVTable, NAVTableDetail } from './types';
import { COMPANY_IDS } from './_constants';

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Hand-written key tables (~35 rows)
// These cover the demo-script tables: core W1, RPM rental extension, and
// Summit Furnishings custom objects.
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

const CP = COMPANY_IDS.CASCADE_PORTLAND;
const CS = COMPANY_IDS.CASCADE_SEATTLE;
const CB = COMPANY_IDS.CASCADE_BOISE;
const SF = COMPANY_IDS.SUMMIT_FURNISHINGS;

const HAND_WRITTEN_TABLES: NAVTable[] = [

  { name: 'BOM Component', module: 'Inventory', fieldCount: 28 },
  { name: 'Transfer Header', module: 'Inventory', fieldCount: 44 },
  { name: 'Transfer Line', module: 'Inventory', fieldCount: 36 },
  { name: 'Warehouse Receipt Header', module: 'Inventory', fieldCount: 34 },
  { name: 'Warehouse Receipt Line', module: 'Inventory', fieldCount: 30 },
  { name: 'Warehouse Shipment Header', module: 'Inventory', fieldCount: 34 },
  { name: 'Warehouse Shipment Line', module: 'Inventory', fieldCount: 30 },
  { name: 'Assembly Header', module: 'Inventory', fieldCount: 38 },
  { name: 'Assembly Line', module: 'Inventory', fieldCount: 32 },
  { name: 'Item Charge', module: 'Inventory', fieldCount: 18 },
  { name: 'Item Charge Assignment (Sales)', module: 'Sales', fieldCount: 22 },
  { name: 'Item Charge Assignment (Purch)', module: 'Purchases', fieldCount: 22 },
  { name: 'Purch. Rcpt. Header', module: 'Purchases', fieldCount: 60 },
  { name: 'Purch. Rcpt. Line', module: 'Purchases', fieldCount: 48 },
  { name: 'Return Receipt Header', module: 'Sales', fieldCount: 56 },
  { name: 'Return Receipt Line', module: 'Sales', fieldCount: 44 },
  { name: 'Return Shipment Header', module: 'Purchases', fieldCount: 56 },
  { name: 'Return Shipment Line', module: 'Purchases', fieldCount: 44 },
  { name: 'Phys. Inventory Ledger Entry', module: 'Inventory', fieldCount: 34 },
  { name: 'G/L Register', module: 'Financial', fieldCount: 22 },
  { name: 'Item Register', module: 'Inventory', fieldCount: 20 },
  { name: 'Reminder Header', module: 'Sales', fieldCount: 40 },
  { name: 'Finance Charge Memo Header', module: 'Sales', fieldCount: 38 },
  { name: 'Cash Flow Forecast Entry', module: 'Financial', fieldCount: 28 },
  { name: 'Cost Entry', module: 'Financial', fieldCount: 32 },
  { name: 'Cost Type', module: 'Financial', fieldCount: 20 },
  { name: 'Cost Center', module: 'Financial', fieldCount: 18 },
  { name: 'IC Partner', module: 'Financial', fieldCount: 22 },
  { name: 'IC G/L Account', module: 'Financial', fieldCount: 18 },
  { name: 'IC Outbox Transaction', module: 'Financial', fieldCount: 30 },
  { name: 'IC Inbox Transaction', module: 'Financial', fieldCount: 30 },
  { name: 'Sales Price', module: 'Sales', fieldCount: 26 },
  { name: 'Sales Line Discount', module: 'Sales', fieldCount: 22 },
  { name: 'Purchase Price', module: 'Purchases', fieldCount: 24 },
  { name: 'Purchase Line Discount', module: 'Purchases', fieldCount: 20 },
  { name: 'Vendor Bank Account', module: 'Purchases', fieldCount: 32 },
  { name: 'Employee', module: 'Cross-cutting', fieldCount: 52 },
  { name: 'Employee Ledger Entry', module: 'Cross-cutting', fieldCount: 36 },
  { name: 'Sales & Receivables Setup', module: 'Sales', fieldCount: 44 },
  { name: 'Purchases & Payables Setup', module: 'Purchases', fieldCount: 42 },
  { name: 'Inventory Setup', module: 'Inventory', fieldCount: 36 },
  { name: 'General Ledger Setup', module: 'Financial', fieldCount: 48 },
  { name: 'Cash Receipt Journal', module: 'Financial', fieldCount: 40 },
  { name: 'Payment Journal', module: 'Financial', fieldCount: 40 },
  { name: 'Item Journal Template', module: 'Inventory', fieldCount: 20 },
  { name: 'Item Journal Batch', module: 'Inventory', fieldCount: 18 },
  { name: 'Customer Discount Group', module: 'Sales', fieldCount: 14 },
  { name: 'Item Discount Group', module: 'Inventory', fieldCount: 14 },
  { name: 'Service Contract Header', module: 'Service', fieldCount: 54 },
  { name: 'Service Contract Line', module: 'Service', fieldCount: 38 },
  { name: 'Service Ledger Entry', module: 'Service', fieldCount: 36 },
  { name: 'Troubleshooting Header', module: 'Service', fieldCount: 16 },
  { name: 'Document Sending Profile', module: 'Cross-cutting', fieldCount: 20 },
  { name: 'Report Selections', module: 'Cross-cutting', fieldCount: 16 },
  { name: 'Tax Area', module: 'Financial', fieldCount: 18 },
  { name: 'Tax Detail', module: 'Financial', fieldCount: 22 },
  { name: 'Tax Group', module: 'Financial', fieldCount: 14 },
];

const COMPANY_LIST = [CP, CS, CB, SF];

function generateStandardTables(): NAVTable[] {
  const generated: NAVTable[] = [];

  for (const company of COMPANY_LIST) {
    for (const seed of STANDARD_W1_TABLE_SEEDS) {
      generated.push({
        logicalName: seed.name,
        physicalName: seed.name.replace(/ /g, ' '),
        companyId: company,
        module: seed.module,
        classification: 'standard-w1',
        fieldCount: seed.fieldCount,
        riskFlags: [],
      });
    }
  }

  return generated;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Exported combined table list
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const NAV_TABLES: NAVTable[] = [
  ...HAND_WRITTEN_TABLES,
  ...generateStandardTables(),
];

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Detail records for drillable tables
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export const NAV_TABLE_DETAILS: Record<string, NAVTableDetail> = {
  'RPM Rental Unit': {
    tableId: 'RPM Rental Unit',
    fields: [
      { name: 'No.', type: 'Code[20]', description: 'Primary key — rental unit identifier' },
      { name: 'Description', type: 'Text[100]' },
      { name: 'Source Type', type: 'Option', description: 'Polymorphic FK: Item, Fixed Asset, or Resource' },
      { name: 'Source No.', type: 'Code[20]', description: 'Points to Item, FA, or Resource depending on Source Type' },
      { name: 'Status', type: 'Option', description: 'Available, On Rent, In Service, Retired' },
      { name: 'Current Location Code', type: 'Code[10]' },
      { name: 'Last Inspection Date', type: 'Date' },
      { name: 'Rental Rate (LCY)', type: 'Decimal' },
      { name: 'Dimension Set ID', type: 'Integer', description: 'Links to Dimension Set Entry for analytics' },
      { name: 'Blocked', type: 'Boolean' },
    ],
    relationships: [
      { targetTable: 'Item', joinKey: 'Source No. WHERE Source Type=Item', type: 'polymorphic' },
      { targetTable: 'Fixed Asset', joinKey: 'Source No. WHERE Source Type=Fixed Asset', type: 'polymorphic' },
      { targetTable: 'Resource', joinKey: 'Source No. WHERE Source Type=Resource', type: 'polymorphic' },
      { targetTable: 'RPM Contract', joinKey: 'Unit No.', type: 'direct' },
      { targetTable: 'RPM Inspection', joinKey: 'Unit No.', type: 'direct' },
      { targetTable: 'Dimension Set Entry', joinKey: 'Dimension Set ID', type: 'application-layer' },
    ],
    riskFlagExplanations: [
      {
        flag: 'Polymorphic FK',
        explanation:
          'Source Type + Source No. form a polymorphic foreign key that can point to Item (Table 27), Fixed Asset (Table 5600), or Resource (Table 156). The target table is determined at runtime by the enum value of Source Type. Standard BC has no metadata-level constraint for this pattern, so the migration must infer the correct target from the data values and preserve referential integrity for each branch.',
      },
    ],
  },

  Customer: {
    tableId: 'Customer',
    fields: [
      { name: 'No.', type: 'Code[20]', description: 'Primary key' },
      { name: 'Name', type: 'Text[100]' },
      { name: 'Customer Posting Group', type: 'Code[20]' },
      { name: 'Gen. Bus. Posting Group', type: 'Code[20]' },
      { name: 'Payment Terms Code', type: 'Code[10]' },
      { name: 'Balance (LCY)', type: 'Decimal', description: 'FlowField — sum of open Cust. Ledger Entries' },
      { name: 'Dimension Set ID', type: 'Integer' },
    ],
    relationships: [
      { targetTable: 'Cust. Ledger Entry', joinKey: 'Customer No.', type: 'direct' },
      { targetTable: 'Sales Header', joinKey: 'Sell-to Customer No.', type: 'direct' },
      { targetTable: 'Sales Invoice Header', joinKey: 'Sell-to Customer No.', type: 'direct' },
      { targetTable: 'Customer Posting Group', joinKey: 'Customer Posting Group', type: 'direct' },
      { targetTable: 'Dimension Set Entry', joinKey: 'Dimension Set ID', type: 'application-layer' },
    ],
    riskFlagExplanations: [],
  },

  'G/L Entry': {
    tableId: 'G/L Entry',
    fields: [
      { name: 'Entry No.', type: 'Integer', description: 'Primary key — auto-increment' },
      { name: 'G/L Account No.', type: 'Code[20]' },
      { name: 'Posting Date', type: 'Date' },
      { name: 'Document Type', type: 'Option' },
      { name: 'Document No.', type: 'Code[20]' },
      { name: 'Amount', type: 'Decimal' },
      { name: 'Dimension Set ID', type: 'Integer', description: 'Joins to Dimension Set Entry for full dimensional breakdown' },
      { name: 'Source Type', type: 'Option', description: 'Customer, Vendor, Bank Account, Fixed Asset, Employee' },
      { name: 'Source No.', type: 'Code[20]', description: 'Polymorphic reference governed by Source Type' },
      { name: 'Global Dimension 1 Code', type: 'Code[20]' },
      { name: 'Global Dimension 2 Code', type: 'Code[20]' },
    ],
    relationships: [
      { targetTable: 'G/L Account', joinKey: 'G/L Account No.', type: 'direct' },
      { targetTable: 'Dimension Set Entry', joinKey: 'Dimension Set ID', type: 'application-layer' },
      { targetTable: 'Customer', joinKey: 'Source No. WHERE Source Type=Customer', type: 'polymorphic' },
      { targetTable: 'Vendor', joinKey: 'Source No. WHERE Source Type=Vendor', type: 'polymorphic' },
    ],
    riskFlagExplanations: [
      {
        flag: 'Dimension Set ID',
        explanation:
          'Every G/L Entry carries a Dimension Set ID that references the Dimension Set Entry table. During migration, these IDs must be preserved or re-mapped so that downstream analytics (account schedules, analysis views, financial reports) continue to slice correctly. If the set IDs are renumbered without updating all referencing tables, dimensional reporting breaks silently.',
      },
    ],
  },

  'Custom Deposit Tracker': {
    tableId: 'Custom Deposit Tracker',
    fields: [
      { name: 'Entry No.', type: 'Integer', description: 'Primary key' },
      { name: 'Customer No.', type: 'Code[20]' },
      { name: 'Deposit Amount', type: 'Decimal' },
      { name: 'Applied to Invoice No.', type: 'Code[20]' },
      { name: 'Status', type: 'Option', description: 'Pending, Applied, Refunded' },
      { name: 'Notes', type: 'BLOB', description: 'Freeform notes stored as a BLOB field' },
      { name: 'Receipt Image', type: 'BLOB', description: 'Scanned receipt stored as binary' },
      { name: 'Created By', type: 'Code[50]' },
      { name: 'Created Date', type: 'Date' },
    ],
    relationships: [
      { targetTable: 'Customer', joinKey: 'Customer No.', type: 'direct' },
      { targetTable: 'Sales Invoice Header', joinKey: 'Applied to Invoice No.', type: 'application-layer' },
    ],
    riskFlagExplanations: [
      {
        flag: 'BLOB',
        explanation:
          'The Notes and Receipt Image fields use NAV BLOB storage. BLOB fields require special handling during migration — they are not included in standard XMLport exports and must be extracted via dedicated media/BLOB APIs. The Receipt Image field may contain binary data that exceeds BC cloud storage limits and needs a migration path to Azure Blob Storage or Document Attachments.',
      },
    ],
  },
};
```

src/scenarios/nav-migration/types.ts
```
// NAV Migration scenario — domain-specific types.
// These types are consumed only by nav-migration screens and data files.

export type NAVModule = 'Financial' | 'Sales' | 'Purchases' | 'Inventory' | 'Rental' | 'Service' | 'CRM' | 'Cross-cutting';
export type NAVClassification = 'standard-w1' | 'rental-extension' | 'custom' | 'shared';
export type GateStatus = 'pass' | 'warn' | 'fail';
export type ExceptionPriority = 'critical' | 'high' | 'medium';
export type PostingChainLayer = 'working' | 'posted-doc' | 'ledger' | 'gl';

export interface NAVCompany {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  logoUrl: string;
  isAcquired: boolean;
  tableCount: number;
  fieldCount: number;
  nonStandardCount: number;
}

export interface NAVTable {
  logicalName: string;
  physicalName: string;
  companyId: string;
  module: NAVModule;
  classification: NAVClassification;
  fieldCount: number;
  riskFlags: string[];
}

export interface NAVTableDetail {
  tableId: string;
  fields: { name: string; type: string; description?: string }[];
  relationships: { targetTable: string; joinKey: string; type: 'direct' | 'polymorphic' | 'application-layer' }[];
  riskFlagExplanations: { flag: string; explanation: string }[];
}

export interface RiskCategory {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  affectedTableCount: number;
  severity: 'Critical' | 'High' | 'Medium';
  confidence: number;
  confidenceLevel: 'high' | 'medium' | 'low';
  estimatedImpact: number;
  detail: string;
  affectedFields: { table: string; field: string; issue: string }[];
  mitigationApproach: string;
}

export interface NAVFieldAnnotation {
  sourceField: string;
  tableName: string;
  companyId: string;
  mappedConcept: string;
  confidence: number;
  confidenceLevel: 'high' | 'medium' | 'low';
  status: 'auto-accepted' | 'needs-review';
  riskFlag?: string;
  alternativeLabel?: string;
}

export interface PostingChainNode {
  id: string;
  tableName: string;
  tableId: number;
  layer: PostingChainLayer;
  keyFields: Record<string, string>;
  displayValue: string;
}

export interface PostingChainEdge {
  source: string;
  target: string;
  label: string;
}

export interface TieOutGate {
  id: string;
  description: string;
  status: GateStatus;
  detail: string;
  financialImpact: number | null;
  expandedDetail?: string;
  drillDownItems?: { description: string; amount: number; detail: string }[];
}

export interface ReconciliationGateCategory {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  totalGates: number;
  pass: number;
  warn: number;
  fail: number;
}

export interface ReconciliationGate {
  id: string;
  description: string;
  categoryId: string;
  companyId: string;
  status: GateStatus;
  detail: string;
  financialImpact: number | null;
  rootCause?: string;
  crosswalkDiff?: {
    before: string[];
    after: string[];
    changes: { before: string; after: string }[];
  };
}

export interface DimensionSetExplosion {
  dimensionSetId: number;
  entries: { code: string; valueCode: string; valueName: string }[];
  referenceCount: number;
  isComplete: boolean;
  suggestedMappings?: {
    code: string;
    suggestedValueCode: string;
    suggestedValueName: string;
    confidence: number;
    confidenceLevel: 'high' | 'medium' | 'low';
    rationale: string;
  }[];
}

export interface DimensionCompletenessRow {
  companyId: string;
  companyName: string;
  completeSets: number;
  incompleteSets: number;
  gapRate: string;
  primaryGap: string;
}

export interface DimensionTransaction {
  documentNo: string;
  tableName: string;
  companyId: string;
  dimensionSetId: number;
  shortcut1: string;
  shortcut2: string;
  isComplete: boolean;
}

export interface ExceptionResolution {
  description: string;
  confidence: number;
  confidenceLevel: 'high' | 'medium' | 'low';
}

export interface MigrationException {
  id: string;
  description: string;
  category: string;
  companyId: string;
  priority: ExceptionPriority;
  financialImpact: number | null;
  affectedRecords: Record<string, string>[];
  resolutionProposals?: ExceptionResolution[];
  crosswalkEntry?: string;
}

export interface MigrationTask {
  label: string;
  startDay: number;
  endDay: number;
  status: 'ready' | 'pending';
  isGroupHeader?: boolean;
}

export interface MigrationArtifact {
  path: string;
  description: string;
  content: string;
}
```

// Summit Orthopedics Group — shared vocabulary for all scenario data files.
// Every number that appears on multiple screens is defined here exactly once.
// Mirrors src/data/_constants.ts structure for the healthcare scenario.

// ── System IDs (used by annotations, entities, lineage, topology) ──
export const SYSTEM_IDS = {
  // EHR / Practice Management (4)
  ATHENAHEALTH: 'athenahealth',
  ECLINICALWORKS: 'eclinicalworks',
  NEXTGEN: 'nextgen',
  MODERNIZING_MEDICINE: 'modernizing-medicine',
  // Billing / RCM (3)
  KAREO: 'kareo',
  ADVANCEDMD: 'advancedmd',
  WAYSTAR: 'waystar',
  // Financial / GL (3)
  QUICKBOOKS_ONLINE: 'quickbooks-online',
  SAGE_INTACCT: 'sage-intacct',
  EXCEL_GL_1: 'excel-gl-1',
  EXCEL_GL_2: 'excel-gl-2',
  // Other (2)
  SALESFORCE_HEALTH_CLOUD: 'salesforce-health-cloud',
  ADP_WORKFORCE: 'adp-workforce',
} as const;

// ── Core financial metrics (used by reconciliation, buyside, metrics) ──
// Healthcare: billing charges → payment postings → GL revenue
export const REVENUE_VALUES = {
  billing: 78_000_000,
  payment: 75_800_000,
  gl: 74_200_000,
  variance: 2_400_000,
} as const;

export const VARIANCE_COMPONENTS = {
  timing: 1_200_000,
  entityResolution: 700_000,
  classification: 500_000,
} as const;

// ── Annotation counts (used by annotationStore, annotations.ts, Screen 2) ──
export const ANNOTATION_COUNTS = {
  total: 380,
  autoAccepted: 319,
  pendingHigh: 38,
  medium: 16,
  low: 7,
  initialProgressPercent: 84,
  postBulkAcceptPercent: 94,
} as const;

// ── Entity counts (used by entityStore, entities.ts, Screen 3, buyside) ──
export const ENTITY_COUNTS = {
  rawRecords: 5_800,
  uniqueEntities: 4_640,
  deduplicationRate: Math.round((1 - 4_640 / 5_800) * 100), // 20%
} as const;

// ── Concentration (used by entityStore, ConcentrationChart, buyside risk) ──
// UHC payer concentration — invisible when siloed, material when unified
export const CONCENTRATION = {
  before: 22.0,
  after: 34.0,
  threshold: 30.0,
} as const;

// ── Exhibit names (used by exhibits.ts, entities.ts downstream impacts, buyside) ──
export const EXHIBIT_NAMES = {
  PAYER_MIX: 'Revenue by Payer Mix',
  SAME_STORE_GROWTH: 'Same-Store Revenue Growth',
  DENIAL_RATE_TREND: 'Denial Rate Trend',
  PROVIDER_PRODUCTIVITY: 'Provider Productivity',
  EBITDA_BRIDGE: 'EBITDA Bridge by Site',
  PAYER_CONTRACT_RATES: 'Payer Contract Rate Comparison',
} as const;

// ── Canonical concept IDs (used by ontology.ts, annotations.ts, lineage.ts) ──
export const CONCEPT_IDS = {
  PATIENT: 'patient',
  PATIENT_DEMOGRAPHICS: 'patient.demographics',
  PROVIDER: 'provider',
  PROVIDER_NPI: 'provider.npi',
  ENCOUNTER: 'encounter',
  ENCOUNTER_DIAGNOSIS: 'encounter.diagnosis',
  ENCOUNTER_PROCEDURE: 'encounter.procedure',
  CLAIM: 'claim',
  CLAIM_CHARGE: 'claim.charge',
  PAYMENT: 'payment',
  PAYMENT_POSTING: 'payment.posting',
  DENIAL: 'denial',
  DENIAL_REASON: 'denial.reason',
  PAYER: 'payer',
  PAYER_CONTRACT: 'payer.contract',
  SERVICE_LOCATION: 'service.location',
  GL_REVENUE: 'gl.revenue',
  GL_EXPENSE: 'gl.expense',
} as const;

// ── Headline entity names (used by entities.ts, buyside.ts) ──
export const ENTITY_NAMES = {
  PRIMARY_ID: 'uhc-colorado',
  PRIMARY_VARIANTS: [
    'UHC-CO-001',
    'United Health',
    'UHCCO',
    '742',

  ] as const,
  SECONDARY_ID: 'dr-martinez',
  SECONDARY_VARIANTS: [
    'Martinez, Roberto MD',
    'R. Martinez DO',
    'Roberto Martinez-Lopez MD',
  ] as const,
} as const;

// ── Schema stats (used by systems.ts, Screen 1 counters) ──

  totalSystems: 12,
  totalTables: 94,
  totalFields: 31_847,
  fieldsForAnnotation: 380,
} as const;

src/scenarios/summit-ortho/annotations.ts
```
import type { Annotation, AnnotationStatus, ConfidenceLevel } from '../../types/annotation';
import { SYSTEM_IDS, CONCEPT_IDS, ANNOTATION_COUNTS } from './_constants';

// ── Helpers ──

function confidenceLevel(c: number): ConfidenceLevel {
  if (c >= 85) return 'high';
  if (c >= 60) return 'medium';
  return 'low';
}

function makeAnnotation(
  id: string,
  systemId: string,
  tableName: string,
  fieldName: string,
  dataType: string,
  sampleValues: string[],
  mappedConceptId: string,
  mappedConceptLabel: string,
  confidence: number,
  status: AnnotationStatus,
  alternativeMappings: Annotation['alternativeMappings'] = [],
): Annotation {
  return {
    id,
    systemId,
    tableName,
    fieldName,
    dataType,
    sampleValues,
    mappedConceptId,
    mappedConceptLabel,
    confidence,
    confidenceLevel: confidenceLevel(confidence),
    status,
    alternativeMappings,
  };
}

// ── 5 Key Demo Annotations (Screen 2 showcase) ──

const KEY_DEMO_ANNOTATIONS: Annotation[] = [
  // 1. athenahealth patient demographics → patient mapping (high confidence, auto-accepted)
  makeAnnotation(
    'ann-demo-001', SYSTEM_IDS.ATHENAHEALTH, 'patient', 'Demographics', 'varchar',
    ['DOB: 1965-03-14, Gender: M, Zip: 80129', 'DOB: 1988-07-22, Gender: F, Zip: 80013', 'DOB: 1952-11-08, Gender: M, Zip: 80302'],
    CONCEPT_IDS.PATIENT, 'Patient',
    95, 'auto-accepted',
    [{ conceptId: CONCEPT_IDS.PATIENT_DEMOGRAPHICS, conceptLabel: 'Patient > Demographics', confidence: 72 }],
  ),
  // 2. kareo claim charge → claim.charge mapping (high confidence, auto-accepted)
  makeAnnotation(
    'ann-demo-002', SYSTEM_IDS.KAREO, 'Charge', 'ChargeAmount', 'currency',
    ['1250.00', '8400.00', '350.00'],
    CONCEPT_IDS.CLAIM_CHARGE, 'Claim > Charge',
    94, 'auto-accepted',
    [{ conceptId: CONCEPT_IDS.PAYMENT, conceptLabel: 'Payment', confidence: 68 }],
  ),
  // 3. sage-intacct GL entry → gl.revenue mapping (high confidence, auto-accepted)
  makeAnnotation(
    'ann-demo-003', SYSTEM_IDS.SAGE_INTACCT, 'GLENTRY', 'AMOUNT', 'decimal(15,2)',
    ['245000.00', '189000.00', '124000.00'],
    CONCEPT_IDS.GL_REVENUE, 'GL > Revenue',
    92, 'auto-accepted',
    [{ conceptId: CONCEPT_IDS.GL_EXPENSE, conceptLabel: 'GL > Expense', confidence: 61 }],
  ),
  // 4. eclinicalworks encounter → encounter.diagnosis mapping (pending-high, 88%)
  makeAnnotation(
    'ann-demo-004', SYSTEM_IDS.ECLINICALWORKS, 'Encounter', 'ICD10', 'varchar',
    ['M17.0', 'M75.10', 'S42.001A'],
    CONCEPT_IDS.ENCOUNTER_DIAGNOSIS, 'Encounter > Diagnosis',
    88, 'needs-review',
    [
      { conceptId: CONCEPT_IDS.ENCOUNTER_PROCEDURE, conceptLabel: 'Encounter > Procedure', confidence: 64 },
      { conceptId: CONCEPT_IDS.ENCOUNTER, conceptLabel: 'Encounter', confidence: 42 },
    ],
  ),
  // 5. waystar denial → denial.reason mapping (flagged, low confidence 52%)
  makeAnnotation(
    'ann-demo-005', SYSTEM_IDS.WAYSTAR, 'ERA', 'remark_codes', 'text',
    ['N130', 'MA18 N381', 'N362'],
    CONCEPT_IDS.DENIAL_REASON, 'Denial > Reason Code (CARC)',
    52, 'flagged',
    [
      { conceptId: CONCEPT_IDS.DENIAL, conceptLabel: 'Denial', confidence: 48 },
      { conceptId: CONCEPT_IDS.PAYMENT_POSTING, conceptLabel: 'Payment > Posting', confidence: 30 },
    ],
  ),
];

// ── 37 High-confidence pending annotations (85-89%, needs-review) ──
// (demo-004 is the 38th, at 88% = high + needs-review)

const PENDING_HIGH_ANNOTATIONS: Annotation[] = [
  // athenahealth (7)
  makeAnnotation('ann-ph-001', SYSTEM_IDS.ATHENAHEALTH, 'patient', 'patient_dob', 'date', ['1965-03-14', '1988-07-22', '1952-11-08'], CONCEPT_IDS.PATIENT_DEMOGRAPHICS, 'Patient > Demographics', 89, 'needs-review'),
  makeAnnotation('ann-ph-002', SYSTEM_IDS.ATHENAHEALTH, 'provider', 'rendering_provider_npi', 'varchar', ['1234567890', '9876543210', '5678901234'], CONCEPT_IDS.PROVIDER_NPI, 'Provider > NPI', 88, 'needs-review'),

  { id: CONCEPT_IDS.PATIENT, label: 'Patient' },

  { id: CONCEPT_IDS.GL_EXPENSE, label: 'GL > Expense' },
];

/** Per-system concept pools — only concepts the system would realistically contain */
type ConceptEntry = { id: string; label: string };
const SYSTEM_CONCEPT_POOLS: Record<string, ConceptEntry[]> = {
  // EHR / Practice Management: Patient, Provider, Encounter (diagnosis/procedure)
