src/scenarios/summit-ortho/buyside.ts
```
import {
  REVENUE_VALUES,
  VARIANCE_COMPONENTS,
  CONCENTRATION,
} from './_constants';
import type { ReconstructedMetric, VarianceDecomposition, RiskFactor, IntegrationTask } from '../../types/buyside';
import type { ExportFile } from '../../types/demo';

// ── Metric Reconstruction (Screen B2) ──

export const RECONSTRUCTED_METRICS: ReconstructedMetric[] = [
  {
    name: 'Net Collections',
    sellerReported: REVENUE_VALUES.billing,       // $78M
    independent: 75_600_000,
    delta: -REVENUE_VALUES.variance,              // -$2.4M
    materiality: 'material',
  },
  {
    name: 'Denial Rate',
    sellerReported: 8.2,
    independent: 11.7,
    delta: 3.5,
    materiality: 'material',
  },
  {
    name: 'Payer Mix (UHC Concentration)',
    sellerReported: CONCENTRATION.before,         // 22%
    independent: CONCENTRATION.after,             // 34%
    delta: 12,
    materiality: 'material',
  },
  {
    name: 'Provider Count (FTE)',
    sellerReported: 42,
    independent: 39,
    delta: -3,
    materiality: 'noteworthy',
  },
];

// ── Variance Decomposition (Screen B2 drill-down) ──

export const VARIANCE_DECOMPOSITION: VarianceDecomposition = {
  metricName: 'Net Collections',
  totalDelta: -REVENUE_VALUES.variance,           // -$2.4M
  items: [
    {
      description: 'Timing differences — unapplied payments and month-close lag across 8 sites',
      amount: VARIANCE_COMPONENTS.timing,         // $1.2M
      classification: 'timing',
      materiality: 'immaterial',
    },
    {
      description: 'Entity resolution — payer identity fragmentation inflating collection totals',
      amount: VARIANCE_COMPONENTS.entityResolution, // $700K
      classification: 'methodology',
      materiality: 'noteworthy',
    },
    {
      description: 'Revenue classification — manual GL entries and pass-through misclassification',
      amount: VARIANCE_COMPONENTS.classification,   // $500K
      classification: 'classification',
      materiality: 'material',
    },
  ],
};

// ── Risk Dashboard (Screen B3) ──

export const RISK_FACTORS: RiskFactor[] = [
  {
    id: 'risk-uhc-concentration',
    name: 'UHC Payer Concentration',
    impact: `United Healthcare at ${CONCENTRATION.after}% of net collections vs reported ${CONCENTRATION.before}% — exceeds ${CONCENTRATION.threshold}% materiality threshold`,
    confidence: 'high',
    detail: 'Post-entity-resolution, United Healthcare of Colorado appears under 5 different identifiers across billing systems. True concentration is 34% of platform net collections — well above the 30% threshold flagged in diligence. Risk of renegotiation or network exclusion would have outsized impact.',
    dollarImpact: 26_520_000,
  },
  {
    id: 'risk-excel-gl',
    name: 'Excel GL Integration Risk',
    impact: '2 sites still on Excel-based GL — no audit trail, manual error risk',
    confidence: 'high',
    detail: 'Sites 7 and 8 (smallest tuck-ins) run their general ledger in Excel spreadsheets. No automated reconciliation possible; manual journal entries bypass billing system. $4.2M combined revenue with limited traceability.',
    dollarImpact: 4_200_000,
  },
  {
    id: 'risk-site5-denials',
    name: 'Site 5 Denial Rate Outlier',
    impact: 'Site 5 denial rate is 2.3x platform average — operational risk indicator',
    confidence: 'high',
    detail: 'Site 5 (NextGen + Kareo) shows a 26.9% denial rate vs 11.7% platform average. Root cause analysis suggests a combination of coding accuracy issues (ICD-10 specificity) and prior authorization workflow gaps. Estimated annual revenue impact of $890K in preventable denials.',
    dollarImpact: 890_000,
  },
  {
    id: 'risk-key-person',
    name: 'Provider Key-Person Risk',
    impact: 'Provider #12 generates 22% of Site 3 revenue — key-person dependency',
    confidence: 'medium',
    detail: 'Dr. Roberto Martinez generates $2.4M in annual collections at Site 3, representing 22% of site revenue and 3.1% of platform revenue. No non-compete clause identified in employment agreement. Provider is 2 years from typical retirement age for orthopedic surgeons.',
    dollarImpact: 2_400_000,
  },
  {
    id: 'risk-denial-underreport',
    name: 'Denial Rate Understatement',
    impact: 'True denial rate 11.7% vs reported 8.2% — $1.9M in invisible denials',
    confidence: 'high',
    detail: 'Inconsistent denial tracking methods across billing systems mask true denial volume. AdvancedMD sites use free-text notes; Excel GL sites have no denial visibility. Normalized analysis reveals $1.9M in annual denials not captured in management reporting.',
    dollarImpact: 1_900_000,
  },
];

// ── Integration Planner (Screen B4) ──

export const INTEGRATION_TASKS: IntegrationTask[] = [
  {
    id: 'task-ehr-consolidation',
    description: 'Migrate all sites to athenahealth EHR (4 system decommissions)',
    targetDay: 180,
    status: 'pending',
    mappingsReady: false,
  },
  {
    id: 'task-gl-consolidation',
    description: 'Migrate all GL to Sage Intacct (retire QuickBooks + Excel)',
    targetDay: 90,
    status: 'ready',
    mappingsReady: true,
  },
  {
    id: 'task-billing-consolidation',
    description: 'Consolidate billing/RCM to athenahealth + Waystar clearinghouse',
    targetDay: 120,
    status: 'pending',
    mappingsReady: false,
  },
  {
    id: 'task-payer-master',
    description: 'Unify payer master using resolved golden records across 5 billing identifiers',
    targetDay: 1,
    status: 'ready',
    mappingsReady: true,
  },
  {
    id: 'task-provider-master',
    description: 'Consolidate provider roster with NPI-based identity resolution',
    targetDay: 1,
    status: 'ready',
    mappingsReady: true,
  },
];

// ── Export Files (Screen B4 — references dbt-models.ts content) ──

export const EXPORT_FILES: ExportFile[] = [
  {
    path: 'models/staging/athenahealth/stg_athena__claims.sql',
    type: 'sql',
    content: '', // Content loaded from dbt-models.ts at render time
    ontologyVersion: 'unified_v3',
    generatedAt: '2026-03-10T14:23:17Z',
  },
  {
    path: 'models/staging/kareo/stg_kareo__payments.sql',
    type: 'sql',
    content: '',
    ontologyVersion: 'unified_v3',
    generatedAt: '2026-03-10T14:23:17Z',
  },
  {
    path: 'models/staging/sage_intacct/stg_sage__gl_entries.sql',
    type: 'sql',
    content: '',
    ontologyVersion: 'unified_v3',
    generatedAt: '2026-03-10T14:23:17Z',
  },
  {
    path: 'models/marts/finance/net_collections_reconciliation.sql',
    type: 'sql',
    content: '',
    ontologyVersion: 'unified_v3',
    generatedAt: '2026-03-10T14:23:17Z',
  },
  {
    path: 'schema.yml',
    type: 'yml',
    content: '',
    ontologyVersion: 'unified_v3',
    generatedAt: '2026-03-10T14:23:17Z',
  },
];

// ── Data Quality Score (Screen B1) ──

export const DATA_QUALITY_SCORE = {
  overall: 'B−',
  dimensions: [
    { name: 'Completeness', grade: 'B', detail: '82% of business-critical fields mapped to canonical concepts; Excel GL sites drag score' },
    { name: 'Consistency', grade: 'C+', detail: '71% cross-system reconciliation rate before adjustments — payer identity fragmentation is primary driver' },
    { name: 'Timeliness', grade: 'B+', detail: 'Average sync lag 6.8 hours across 12 systems; Excel GL sites updated monthly' },
  ],
} as const;

src/scenarios/summit-ortho/dbt-models.ts
```
// dbt model SQL templates generated by Data Foundry for Summit Orthopedics Group
// These are static demo assets — not executed against any database.

export const DBT_MODELS: Record<string, string> = {
  'models/staging/athenahealth/stg_athena__claims.sql': `\
/* Generated by Data Foundry v2.4.1 | Ontology: unified_v3 | Source: athenahealth.claims | Generated: 2026-03-10T14:23:17Z */

WITH source AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ source('athenahealth', 'claims') }}
),

filtered AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM source
    WHERE claim_status NOT IN ('Voided', 'Draft')
),

renamed AS (
    SELECT
        -- Mapped from: ClaimId → claim (confidence: 97%)
        claim_id                    AS claim_id__athena,

        -- Mapped from: PatientId → patient (confidence: 95%)
        patient_id                  AS patient_id__athena,

        -- Mapped from: RenderingProviderNPI → provider.npi (confidence: 97%)
        rendering_provider_npi      AS provider_npi__athena,

        -- Mapped from: PrimaryInsuranceId → payer (confidence: 92%)
        primary_insurance_id        AS payer_id__athena,

        -- Mapped from: ProcedureCode → encounter.procedure (confidence: 98%)
        procedure_code              AS cpt_code__athena,

        -- Mapped from: DiagnosisCode1 → encounter.diagnosis (confidence: 96%)
        diagnosis_code_1            AS icd10_primary__athena,

        -- Mapped from: ChargeAmount → claim.charge (confidence: 94%)
        charge_amount               AS charge_amount__athena,

        -- Mapped from: AllowedAmount → payment.allowed (confidence: 91%)
        allowed_amount              AS allowed_amount__athena,

        -- Mapped from: ServiceDate → encounter (confidence: 99%)
        service_date                AS service_date,

        -- Mapped from: ServiceLocationId → service.location (confidence: 93%)
        service_location_id         AS site_id__athena,

        -- Mapped from: CreatedDate → created_at (confidence: 99%)
        created_date                AS created_at

    FROM filtered
)

SELECT * FROM renamed
`,

  'models/staging/kareo/stg_kareo__payments.sql': `\
/* Generated by Data Foundry v2.4.1 | Ontology: unified_v3 | Source: kareo.payments | Generated: 2026-03-10T14:23:17Z */

WITH source AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ source('kareo', 'payments') }}
),

renamed AS (
    SELECT
        -- Mapped from: PaymentID → payment (confidence: 96%)
        payment_id                  AS payment_id__kareo,

        -- Mapped from: ClaimID → claim (confidence: 94%)
        claim_id                    AS claim_id__kareo,

        -- Mapped from: PatientID → patient (confidence: 93%)
        patient_id                  AS patient_id__kareo,

        -- Mapped from: PayerName → payer (confidence: 89%)
        payer_name                  AS payer_name__kareo,

        -- Mapped from: PaymentAmount → payment.posting (confidence: 93%)
        payment_amount              AS payment_amount__kareo,

        -- Mapped from: AdjustmentAmount → payment.adjustment (confidence: 90%)
        adjustment_amount           AS adjustment_amount__kareo,

        -- Mapped from: AdjustmentReasonCode → denial.reason (confidence: 96%)
        adjustment_reason_code      AS carc_code__kareo,

        -- Mapped from: PostingDate → payment.posting_date (confidence: 98%)
        posting_date                AS posting_date,

        -- Mapped from: DepositDate → payment.deposit_date (confidence: 97%)
        deposit_date                AS deposit_date,

        -- Mapped from: PaymentMethod → payment.method (confidence: 95%)
        payment_method              AS payment_method__kareo

    FROM source
    WHERE payment_amount != 0 OR adjustment_amount != 0
)

SELECT * FROM renamed
`,

  'models/staging/sage_intacct/stg_sage__gl_entries.sql': `\
/* Generated by Data Foundry v2.4.1 | Ontology: unified_v3 | Source: sage_intacct.gl_entries | Generated: 2026-03-10T14:23:17Z */

WITH source AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ source('sage_intacct', 'gl_entries') }}
),

filtered AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM source
    WHERE state = 'Posted'
      AND journal_id != 'REVERSE'
),

renamed AS (
    SELECT
        -- Mapped from: RECORDNO → gl.entry_id (confidence: 99%)
        recordno                    AS entry_id__sage,

        -- Mapped from: BATCH_DATE → gl.posting_date (confidence: 98%)
        batch_date                  AS posting_date,

        -- Mapped from: ACCOUNT_NO → gl.account (confidence: 96%)
        account_no                  AS gl_account__sage,

        -- Mapped from: ACCOUNT_TITLE → gl.account_name (confidence: 95%)
        account_title               AS gl_account_name__sage,

        -- Mapped from: AMOUNT → gl.revenue (confidence: 95%)
        amount                      AS amount__sage,

        -- Mapped from: DEPARTMENT_ID → service.location (confidence: 88%)
        department_id               AS site_id__sage,

        -- Mapped from: DESCRIPTION → gl.description (confidence: 85%)
        description                 AS description__sage,

        -- Mapped from: ENTRY_DATE → gl.entry_date (confidence: 99%)
        entry_date                  AS entry_date,

        -- Mapped from: BOOK_ID → gl.book (confidence: 97%)
        book_id                     AS book_id__sage

    FROM filtered
    WHERE account_no LIKE '4%'  -- revenue accounts
       OR account_no LIKE '5%'  -- COGS/expense accounts
)

SELECT * FROM renamed
`,

  'models/marts/finance/net_collections_waterfall.sql': `\
/* Generated by Data Foundry v2.4.1 | Ontology: unified_v3 | Source: marts.finance | Generated: 2026-03-10T14:23:17Z */

-- Net Collections Waterfall: Three-way match across billing, payment, and GL with variance analysis
-- Mapped from: claim.charge, payment.posting, gl.revenue

WITH billing_charges AS (
    -- Layer 1: Charges from EHR/billing systems
    SELECT
        site_id__athena             AS site_id,
        'billing'                   AS source_layer,
        SUM(charge_amount__athena)  AS amount,
        DATE_TRUNC('month', service_date) AS period
    FROM {{ ref('stg_athena__claims') }}
    GROUP BY 1, 4

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        site_id__kareo              AS site_id,
        'billing'                   AS source_layer,
        SUM(charge_amount__kareo)   AS amount,
        DATE_TRUNC('month', service_date) AS period
    FROM {{ ref('stg_kareo__claims') }}
    GROUP BY 1, 4
),

payment_postings AS (
    -- Layer 2: Payment postings from RCM systems
    SELECT
        site_id__kareo              AS site_id,
        'payment'                   AS source_layer,
        SUM(payment_amount__kareo)  AS amount,
        DATE_TRUNC('month', posting_date) AS period
    FROM {{ ref('stg_kareo__payments') }}
    GROUP BY 1, 4
),

gl_revenue AS (
    -- Layer 3: GL-recognized revenue
    SELECT
        site_id__sage               AS site_id,
        'gl'                        AS source_layer,
        SUM(amount__sage)           AS amount,
        DATE_TRUNC('month', posting_date) AS period
    FROM {{ ref('stg_sage__gl_entries') }}
    WHERE gl_account__sage LIKE '4%'  -- revenue accounts only
    GROUP BY 1, 4
),

unioned AS (
    SELECT * FROM billing_charges
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM payment_postings
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM gl_revenue
),

reconciled AS (
    SELECT
        period,
        site_id,
        MAX(CASE WHEN source_layer = 'billing'  THEN amount END) AS charges_billed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN source_layer = 'payment'  THEN amount END) AS payments_posted,
        MAX(CASE WHEN source_layer = 'gl'       THEN amount END) AS gl_revenue,
        -- Variance analysis
        MAX(CASE WHEN source_layer = 'billing' THEN amount END)
          - MAX(CASE WHEN source_layer = 'payment' THEN amount END)
                                    AS variance_billing_vs_payment,
        MAX(CASE WHEN source_layer = 'payment' THEN amount END)
          - MAX(CASE WHEN source_layer = 'gl' THEN amount END)
                                    AS variance_payment_vs_gl
    FROM unioned
    GROUP BY 1, 2
)

SELECT
    period,
    site_id,
    charges_billed,
    payments_posted,
    gl_revenue,
    variance_billing_vs_payment,
    variance_payment_vs_gl,
    CASE
        WHEN ABS(variance_billing_vs_payment) > 25000 THEN 'material'
        WHEN ABS(variance_billing_vs_payment) > 5000  THEN 'notable'
        ELSE 'immaterial'
    END AS variance_flag
FROM reconciled
`,

  'schema.yml': `\
version: 2

models:
  - name: stg_athena__claims
    description: "Staged athenahealth claim records with unified field naming"
    meta:
      data_foundry:
        source_system: athenahealth
        ontology_version: unified_v3
        generated_at: "2026-03-10T14:23:17Z"
    columns:
      - name: claim_id__athena
        description: "athenahealth claim identifier"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: claim
            source_field: ClaimId
            confidence: 0.97
      - name: patient_id__athena
        description: "athenahealth patient identifier mapped to canonical patient"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: patient
            source_field: PatientId
            confidence: 0.95
      - name: charge_amount__athena
        description: "Gross charge amount from athenahealth claims"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: claim.charge
            source_field: ChargeAmount
            confidence: 0.94
      - name: provider_npi__athena
        description: "Rendering provider NPI from athenahealth"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: provider.npi
            source_field: RenderingProviderNPI
            confidence: 0.97

  - name: stg_kareo__payments
    description: "Staged Kareo payment posting records"
    meta:
      data_foundry:
        source_system: kareo
        ontology_version: unified_v3
        generated_at: "2026-03-10T14:23:17Z"
    columns:
      - name: payment_amount__kareo
        description: "Payment amount posted in Kareo"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: payment.posting
            source_field: PaymentAmount
            confidence: 0.93
      - name: carc_code__kareo
        description: "CARC denial reason code from Kareo adjustments"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: denial.reason
            source_field: AdjustmentReasonCode
            confidence: 0.96
      - name: payer_name__kareo
        description: "Payer name from Kareo (requires entity resolution)"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: payer
            source_field: PayerName
            confidence: 0.89

  - name: stg_sage__gl_entries
    description: "Staged Sage Intacct GL entries for revenue recognition"
    meta:
      data_foundry:
        source_system: sage_intacct
        ontology_version: unified_v3
        generated_at: "2026-03-10T14:23:17Z"
    columns:
      - name: amount__sage
        description: "GL entry amount from Sage Intacct"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: gl.revenue
            source_field: AMOUNT
            confidence: 0.95
      - name: gl_account__sage
        description: "GL account number from Sage Intacct"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: gl.account
            source_field: ACCOUNT_NO
            confidence: 0.96
      - name: site_id__sage
        description: "Site/department mapped to canonical service location"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: service.location
            source_field: DEPARTMENT_ID
            confidence: 0.88

  - name: net_collections_waterfall
    description: "Three-way reconciliation of billing charges, payment postings, and GL revenue with variance analysis"
    meta:
      data_foundry:
        model_type: mart
        ontology_version: unified_v3
        generated_at: "2026-03-10T14:23:17Z"
    columns:
      - name: charges_billed
        description: "Gross charges from billing/EHR systems"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: claim.charge
            layer: billing
      - name: payments_posted
        description: "Payment postings from RCM systems"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: payment.posting
            layer: payment
      - name: gl_revenue
        description: "Recognized revenue from general ledger"
        meta:
          data_foundry:
            concept_id: gl.revenue
            layer: gl
      - name: variance_billing_vs_payment
        description: "Variance between billed charges and posted payments"
      - name: variance_payment_vs_gl
        description: "Variance between posted payments and GL-recognized revenue"
      - name: variance_flag
        description: "Materiality classification: material, notable, or immaterial"
`,
};
```

src/scenarios/summit-ortho/drift.ts
```
import { SYSTEM_IDS, EXHIBIT_NAMES } from './_constants';
import type { DriftEvent, QuarterlyRefresh } from '../../types/drift';

export const QUARTERLY_REFRESH: QuarterlyRefresh = {
  quarter: 'Q3 2026',
  exhibitsUpdated: 6,
  exhibitsNeedingReview: 1,
  reconciliationBreaks: 0,
  reviewItems: [
    {
      description: 'eClinicalWorks schema change: InsurancePlanName renamed',
      type: 'schema-change',
      detail: 'eClinicalWorks v12.0.4 renamed InsurancePlanName to PayerPlanDescription and added PriorAuthStatus field. Payer mapping re-linked automatically; new field flagged for annotation review.',
    },
    {
      description: 'Site 8 payer contract rate update: Aetna',
      type: 'metric-shift',
      detail: 'Aetna renegotiated reimbursement rates for Site 8 effective Q3. Top-10 CPT code rates updated; Payer Contract Rate Comparison exhibit refreshed with new effective dates.',
    },
  ],
  ontologyDiff: {
    systemName: 'eClinicalWorks',
    previousVersion: 'v12.0.3',
    newVersion: 'v12.0.4',
    addedFields: ['PriorAuthStatus'],
    removedFields: [],
    changedFields: ['InsurancePlanName → PayerPlanDescription'],
    affectedExhibits: 1,
    unaffectedExhibits: 5,
  },
};

export const DRIFT_EVENTS: DriftEvent[] = [
  {
    id: 'drift-001',
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.ECLINICALWORKS,
    systemName: 'eClinicalWorks',
    changeDescription: 'InsurancePlanName renamed to PayerPlanDescription; PriorAuthStatus field added',
    severity: 'high',
    affectedAnnotations: 4,
    affectedMetrics: [EXHIBIT_NAMES.PAYER_MIX, EXHIBIT_NAMES.DENIAL_RATE_TREND],
    status: 'resolved',
    remediation: 'Payer identifier annotation re-mapped from InsurancePlanName to PayerPlanDescription (confidence maintained at 87%). PriorAuthStatus flagged as new annotation candidate for Denial domain.',
  },
  {
    id: 'drift-002',
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.KAREO,
    systemName: 'Kareo',
    changeDescription: 'Payer contract rate table updated — Aetna CO rates effective 2026-07-01',
    severity: 'low',
    affectedAnnotations: 0,
    affectedMetrics: [EXHIBIT_NAMES.PAYER_CONTRACT_RATES],
    status: 'auto-acknowledged',
    remediation: 'Contract rate data refreshed automatically; Payer Contract Rate Comparison exhibit updated with new Aetna rates for Sites 6 and 8',
  },
  {
    id: 'drift-003',
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.QUICKBOOKS_ONLINE,
    systemName: 'QuickBooks Online',
    changeDescription: 'New tuck-in Site 9 (Montana practice) QuickBooks instance onboarded',
    severity: 'critical',
    affectedAnnotations: 12,
    affectedMetrics: [
      EXHIBIT_NAMES.EBITDA_BRIDGE,
      EXHIBIT_NAMES.SAME_STORE_GROWTH,
      EXHIBIT_NAMES.PAYER_MIX,
    ],
    status: 'investigating',
    remediation: 'New QuickBooks instance detected with 847 fields. 12 annotations require review for system-specific field naming conventions; chart of accounts mapping in progress.',
  },
  {
    id: 'drift-004',
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.ADVANCEDMD,
    systemName: 'AdvancedMD',
    changeDescription: 'Denial tracking workflow changed from free-text to structured CARC codes',
    severity: 'high',
    affectedAnnotations: 2,
    affectedMetrics: [EXHIBIT_NAMES.DENIAL_RATE_TREND],
    status: 'resolved',
    remediation: 'Denial reason annotation updated to use structured CARC code field. Historical free-text denials retained with lower confidence scores; go-forward data quality improved.',
  },
];

      },
    ],
  },

  // ── Low (similarityScore 60-79) — likely distinct entities ──
  {
    id: 'uhc-vs-uhc-medicare',
    similarityScore: 64.2,
    matchConfidence: 'low',
    entities: [
      {
        systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.ATHENAHEALTH,
        systemName: 'athenahealth',
        name: 'UHC Medicare Advantage',
        recordType: 'Payer',
        recordCount: 780,
        arrContribution: 1_800_000,
      },
      {
        systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.ECLINICALWORKS,
        systemName: 'eClinicalWorks',
        name: 'United Health Medicare',
        recordType: 'Payer',
        recordCount: 440,
        arrContribution: 980_000,
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 'smith-vs-smith',
    similarityScore: 58.7,
    matchConfidence: 'low',
    entities: [
      {
        systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.ATHENAHEALTH,
        systemName: 'athenahealth',
        name: 'Smith, Karen MD',
        recordType: 'Provider',
        recordCount: 620,
        arrContribution: 780_000,
      },
      {
        systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.NEXTGEN,
        systemName: 'NextGen Healthcare',
        name: 'Smith, K. PA-C',
        recordType: 'Provider',
        recordCount: 340,
        arrContribution: 420_000,
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 'bcbs-ut-vs-bcbs-wy',
    similarityScore: 67.8,
    matchConfidence: 'low',
    entities: [
      {
        systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.ECLINICALWORKS,
        systemName: 'eClinicalWorks',
        name: 'BCBS Utah',
        recordType: 'Payer',
        recordCount: 580,
        arrContribution: 1_400_000,
      },
      {
        systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.NEXTGEN,
        systemName: 'NextGen Healthcare',
        name: 'BCBS Wyoming',
        recordType: 'Payer',
        recordCount: 320,
        arrContribution: 760_000,
      },
    ],
  },
];

// ── Aggregate resolution statistics ──

export const ENTITY_STATS: EntityResolutionStats = {
  rawRecordCount: ENTITY_COUNTS.rawRecords,
  uniqueEntityCount: ENTITY_COUNTS.uniqueEntities,
  deduplicationRate: ENTITY_COUNTS.deduplicationRate,
  autoMergedCount: 740,
  reviewCount: 96,
  rejectedCount: 32,
};

// ── Downstream impact of merging UHC Colorado payer identities ──

export const MERGE_DOWNSTREAM_IMPACT: DownstreamImpact = {
  affectedExhibits: [
    EXHIBIT_NAMES.PAYER_MIX,
    EXHIBIT_NAMES.PAYER_CONTRACT_RATES,
  ],
  newRisks: [
    `UHC payer concentration at ${CONCENTRATION.after}% exceeds ${CONCENTRATION.threshold}% materiality threshold`,
  ],
  metricsChanged: [
    `Payer concentration: ${CONCENTRATION.before}% → ${CONCENTRATION.after}%`,
    'Top-payer revenue share: reclassified as material risk',
  ],
};
```

import type { Exhibit } from '../../types/exhibit';
import type { WaterfallItem } from '../../types/metric';
import { EXHIBIT_NAMES, CONCENTRATION } from './_constants';

// ── EBITDA Bridge (Net Collections → Normalized EBITDA) ──
// Starts from Net Collections $74.2M, ends at $14.8M (18.9% margin)
export const EBITDA_BRIDGE_ITEMS: WaterfallItem[] = [
  { label: 'Net Collections',       value:  74_200_000, type: 'start',    drillable: false },
  { label: 'Physician Compensation', value: -28_400_000, type: 'decrease', drillable: true  },
  { label: 'Staff & Benefits',      value: -12_800_000, type: 'decrease', drillable: true  },
  { label: 'Facility Costs',        value:  -8_200_000, type: 'decrease', drillable: true  },
  { label: 'Medical Supplies',      value:  -4_600_000, type: 'decrease', drillable: true  },
  { label: 'Admin & IT',            value:  -3_800_000, type: 'decrease', drillable: true  },
  { label: 'Management Fee',        value:  -2_600_000, type: 'decrease', drillable: true  },
  { label: 'Reported EBITDA',       value:  13_800_000, type: 'total',    drillable: false },
  { label: 'Normalization Adj.',     value:   1_000_000, type: 'increase', drillable: true  },
  { label: 'Normalized EBITDA',      value:  14_800_000, type: 'total',    drillable: false },
];

// ── Revenue by Payer Mix ──
// Sums to ~$78M billing charges; pctTotal based on net collections $74.2M proxy
export const PAYER_MIX_DATA = [
  { payer: 'UnitedHealthcare',      revenue: 26_600_000, pctTotal: 34.0, contractedRate: 142, trend: 'stable' },
  { payer: 'Aetna',                 revenue: 12_500_000, pctTotal: 16.0, contractedRate: 138, trend: 'growing' },
  { payer: 'Blue Cross Blue Shield', revenue: 11_700_000, pctTotal: 15.0, contractedRate: 135, trend: 'stable' },
  { payer: 'Cigna',                 revenue:  7_800_000, pctTotal: 10.0, contractedRate: 131, trend: 'declining' },
  { payer: 'Medicare',              revenue:  7_000_000, pctTotal:  9.0, contractedRate: 100, trend: 'stable' },
  { payer: 'Medicaid',              revenue:  3_900_000, pctTotal:  5.0, contractedRate:  72, trend: 'stable' },

  { payer: 'Self-Pay',              revenue:  2_300_000, pctTotal:  3.0, contractedRate:   0, trend: 'stable' },
  { payer: 'Other Commercial',      revenue:  3_100_000, pctTotal:  4.0, contractedRate: 128, trend: 'stable' },
] as const;

// ── Same-Store Revenue Growth ──

  { site: 'Site 1 (Denver)',    revenue2025: 8_200_000,  revenue2026: 8_900_000,  growth:  8.5 },

  { site: 'Site 3 (Boulder)',   revenue2025: 5_400_000,  revenue2026: 5_800_000,  growth:  7.4 },
  { site: 'Site 4 (Ft Collins)', revenue2025: 4_900_000, revenue2026: 5_100_000,  growth:  4.1 },
  { site: 'Site 5 (Springs)',   revenue2025: 5_200_000,  revenue2026: 4_900_000,  growth: -5.8 },
  { site: 'Site 6 (Pueblo)',    revenue2025: 3_800_000,  revenue2026: 4_100_000,  growth:  7.9 },
  { site: 'Sites 7-9',         revenue2025: 14_200_000, revenue2026: 15_100_000, growth:  6.3 },
  { site: 'Sites 10-12',       revenue2025: 12_400_000, revenue2026: 13_100_000, growth:  5.6 },
] as const;

// ── Denial Rate Trend (6-month) ──
export const DENIAL_RATE_DATA = [
  { month: 'Oct 2025', overall: 8.2, site5: 14.1, benchmark: 7.0 },
  { month: 'Nov 2025', overall: 8.5, site5: 15.3, benchmark: 7.0 },
  { month: 'Dec 2025', overall: 8.1, site5: 13.8, benchmark: 7.0 },
  { month: 'Jan 2026', overall: 8.7, site5: 16.2, benchmark: 7.0 },
  { month: 'Feb 2026', overall: 8.4, site5: 15.8, benchmark: 7.0 },

// ── Provider Productivity ──
export const PROVIDER_PRODUCTIVITY_DATA = [
  { provider: 'Dr. Chen',     specialty: 'Sports Medicine',  wRVUs: 6_800, collections: 1_420_000, patientsPerDay: 22 },

// ── Payer Contract Rate Comparison ──
export const PAYER_CONTRACT_RATES_DATA = [
  { procedure: '27447 (Total Knee)',      uhcRate: 14_200, aetnaRate: 13_800, bcbsRate: 13_500, medicareRate: 10_100, benchmark: 12_800 },
  { procedure: '27130 (Total Hip)',       uhcRate: 15_100, aetnaRate: 14_600, bcbsRate: 14_200, medicareRate: 10_800, benchmark: 13_600 },
  { procedure: '29881 (Knee Arthroscopy)', uhcRate:  4_200, aetnaRate:  3_900, bcbsRate:  3_800, medicareRate:  2_900, benchmark:  3_700 },
  { procedure: '20610 (Joint Injection)',  uhcRate:    280, aetnaRate:    260, bcbsRate:    255, medicareRate:    195, benchmark:    248 },
] as const;

// ── Patient Retention by Site Cohort (12-month trailing) ──
export const COHORT_RETENTION: { cohort: string; months: number[] }[] = [
  { cohort: 'Site 1 (Denver)',   months: [100, 98, 96, 94, 92, 91, 90, 89, 88, 87, 86, 85] },
  { cohort: 'Site 2 (Aurora)',   months: [100, 97, 95, 93, 91, 89, 88, 87, 86, 85, 84, 83] },
  { cohort: 'Site 3 (Boulder)',  months: [100, 96, 94, 92, 90, 88, 87, 86, 85, 84, 83, 82] },
  { cohort: 'Site 4 (Ft Collins)', months: [100, 95, 92, 89, 87, 85, 83, 82, 81, 80, 79, 78] },
  { cohort: 'Site 5 (Springs)',  months: [100, 93, 88, 84, 80, 77, 74, 72, 70, 68, 66, 64] },
  { cohort: 'Sites 6-9',        months: [100, 96, 93, 90, 88, 86, 84, 83, 82, 81, 80, 79] },
  { cohort: 'Sites 10-12',      months: [100, 94, 90, 87, 84, 82, 80, 78, 77, 76, 75, 74] },
  { cohort: 'All Sites',        months: [100, 95, 92, 89, 87, 85, 83, 82, 81, 80, 79, 78] },
];

// ── A/R Aging Summary ──
export const AR_AGING_DATA = [
  { bucket: '0-30 days',   amount: 8_200_000, pctTotal: 42 },
  { bucket: '31-60 days',  amount: 4_100_000, pctTotal: 21 },
  { bucket: '61-90 days',  amount: 3_100_000, pctTotal: 16 },
  { bucket: '91-120 days', amount: 2_200_000, pctTotal: 11 },
  { bucket: '120+ days',   amount: 1_900_000, pctTotal: 10 },
] as const;

// ── Exhibit Definitions (15 total) ──
export const EXHIBITS: Exhibit[] = [
  {
    id: 'payer-mix',
    name: EXHIBIT_NAMES.PAYER_MIX,
    status: 'ready',
    lastUpdated: '2026-03-11T10:30:00Z',

src/scenarios/summit-ortho/index.ts
```
// Summit Orthopedics Group scenario — assembles all healthcare fixture data
// into a single ScenarioData object.

import React from 'react';

import type { ScenarioData } from '../types';

// ── Constants ──
import {
  SYSTEM_IDS,
  REVENUE_VALUES,
  VARIANCE_COMPONENTS,
  ANNOTATION_COUNTS,
  ENTITY_COUNTS,
  CONCENTRATION,
  EXHIBIT_NAMES,
  CONCEPT_IDS,
  ENTITY_NAMES,
  SCHEMA_STATS,
} from './_constants';

// ── Company ──
import { COMPANY } from './company';

// ── Core data ──
import { SYSTEMS } from './systems';
import { SOURCE_ONTOLOGIES, UNIFIED_ONTOLOGY } from './ontology';
import { ALL_ANNOTATIONS } from './annotations';

// ── Entity resolution ──
import { MATCH_CANDIDATES, ENTITY_STATS, MERGE_DOWNSTREAM_IMPACT } from './entities';

// ── Reconciliation ──
import { RECONCILIATION_METRICS } from './reconciliation';

// ── Exhibits ──
import {
  EXHIBITS,
  EBITDA_BRIDGE_ITEMS,
  PAYER_MIX_DATA,
  SAME_STORE_GROWTH_DATA,
  DENIAL_RATE_DATA,
  PROVIDER_PRODUCTIVITY_DATA,
  PAYER_CONTRACT_RATES_DATA,
  AR_AGING_DATA,
} from './exhibits';

// ── Waterfall / metrics ──
import { WATERFALL_ITEMS, COHORT_RETENTION } from './metrics';

// ── Drift ──
import { QUARTERLY_REFRESH, DRIFT_EVENTS } from './drift';

// ── Buy-side ──
import {
  RECONSTRUCTED_METRICS,
  VARIANCE_DECOMPOSITION,
  RISK_FACTORS,
  INTEGRATION_TASKS,
  EXPORT_FILES,
  DATA_QUALITY_SCORE,
} from './buyside';

// ── Schemas & lineage ──
import { SCHEMA_TABLES } from './schemas';
import { DBT_MODELS } from './dbt-models';
import { LINEAGE_PATHS, GHOST_NODES, FULL_LINEAGE_GRAPH } from './lineage';
import { TIME_COMPARISONS } from './time-comparisons';

// ── Store snapshots ──
import { SCENARIOS } from './scenarios';

// ── Hold-period data ──
import { holdPeriodData } from './hold-period';

// ── Topology ──
import { TYPE_LANE_ORDER, TYPE_COLORS, LANE_LABELS, ENTITY_SYSTEM_MAP } from './topology';

// ── Chart components for exhibit renderers ──
import { WaterfallChart } from '../../components/data-display/WaterfallChart';
import { CohortTable } from '../../components/data-display/CohortTable';
import { ConcentrationChart } from '../../components/visualization/ConcentrationChart';

// ── Helpers ──

function formatCurrency(value: number): string {
  if (Math.abs(value) >= 1_000_000) {
    return `$${(value / 1_000_000).toFixed(1)}M`;
  }
  if (Math.abs(value) >= 1_000) {
    return `$${(value / 1_000).toFixed(0)}K`;
  }
  return `$${value.toLocaleString()}`;
}

function PreviewTable({ headers, rows, rightAlignFrom = 1 }: {
  headers: string[];
  rows: (string | number)[][];
  rightAlignFrom?: number;
}) {
  return React.createElement('div', { className: 'border border-gray-200 rounded overflow-hidden' },
    React.createElement('table', { className: 'w-full text-sm' },
      React.createElement('thead', null,
        React.createElement('tr', { className: 'bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200' },
          headers.map((h, i) =>
            React.createElement('th', {
              key: h,
              className: `px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 ${i >= rightAlignFrom ? 'text-right' : 'text-left'}`,
            }, h)
          )
        )
      ),
      React.createElement('tbody', null,
        rows.map((row, i) => {
          const isTotal = typeof row[0] === 'string' && (row[0] as string).toLowerCase().startsWith('total');
          return React.createElement('tr', {
            key: i,
            className: `border-b border-gray-100 ${isTotal ? 'bg-gray-50 font-semibold' : ''}`,
          },
            row.map((cell, j) =>
              React.createElement('td', {
                key: j,
                className: `px-3 py-2 ${j >= rightAlignFrom ? 'text-right font-mono' : ''} ${j === 0 ? 'text-gray-900' : 'text-gray-700'}`,
              }, cell)
            )
          );
        })
      )
    )
  );
}

// ── Exhibit renderers ──

const denialRateMetric = RECONCILIATION_METRICS.find((m) => m.id === 'denial-rate')!;

const EXHIBIT_RENDERERS: Record<string, (props: { data: unknown }) => React.ReactNode> = {
  'collection-waterfall': () =>
    React.createElement(WaterfallChart, { items: WATERFALL_ITEMS }),

  'ebitda-bridge-by-site': () =>
    React.createElement(WaterfallChart, { items: EBITDA_BRIDGE_ITEMS }),

  'patient-volume-trend': () =>
    React.createElement(CohortTable, { data: COHORT_RETENTION }),

  'payer-concentration': () =>
    React.createElement(ConcentrationChart, {
      before: CONCENTRATION.before,
      after: CONCENTRATION.after,
      threshold: CONCENTRATION.threshold,
    }),

  'payer-mix': () =>
    PreviewTable({
      headers: ['Payer', 'Revenue', '% of Total', 'Rate Index'],
      rows: PAYER_MIX_DATA.map((p) => [
        p.payer,
        formatCurrency(p.revenue),
        `${p.pctTotal.toFixed(1)}%`,
        p.contractedRate > 0 ? `${p.contractedRate}%` : 'N/A',
      ]),
    }),

  'same-store-growth': () =>
    PreviewTable({
      headers: ['Site', '2025 Revenue', '2026 Revenue', 'Growth'],
      rows: SAME_STORE_GROWTH_DATA.map((s) => [
        s.site,
        formatCurrency(s.revenue2025),
        formatCurrency(s.revenue2026),
        `${s.growth > 0 ? '+' : ''}${s.growth.toFixed(1)}%`,
      ]),
    }),

  'denial-rate-trend': () =>
    PreviewTable({
      headers: ['Month', 'Overall', 'Site 5', 'Benchmark'],
      rows: DENIAL_RATE_DATA.map((d) => [
        d.month,
        `${d.overall}%`,
        `${d.site5}%`,
        `${d.benchmark}%`,
      ]),
    }),

  'provider-productivity': () =>
    PreviewTable({
      headers: ['Provider', 'Specialty', 'wRVUs', 'Collections', 'Pts/Day'],
      rows: PROVIDER_PRODUCTIVITY_DATA.map((p) => [
        p.provider,
        p.specialty,
        p.wRVUs.toLocaleString(),
        formatCurrency(p.collections),
        p.patientsPerDay.toString(),
      ]),
    }),

  'payer-contract-rates': () =>
    PreviewTable({
      headers: ['Procedure', 'UHC', 'Aetna', 'BCBS', 'Medicare', 'Benchmark'],
      rows: PAYER_CONTRACT_RATES_DATA.map((p) => [
        p.procedure,
        formatCurrency(p.uhcRate),
        formatCurrency(p.aetnaRate),
        formatCurrency(p.bcbsRate),
        formatCurrency(p.medicareRate),
        formatCurrency(p.benchmark),
      ]),
    }),

  'ar-aging': () =>
    PreviewTable({
      headers: ['Aging Bucket', 'Amount', '% of Total'],
      rows: AR_AGING_DATA.map((a) => [
        a.bucket,
        formatCurrency(a.amount),
        `${a.pctTotal}%`,
      ]),
    }),

  'case-mix-index': () =>
    PreviewTable({
      headers: ['Category', 'CMI', 'Volume', 'Avg Reimbursement'],
      rows: [
        ['Joint Replacement', '2.14', '1,240', formatCurrency(14_200)],
        ['Spine', '2.42', '680', formatCurrency(15_800)],
        ['Sports Medicine', '1.28', '2,100', formatCurrency(4_200)],
        ['Hand/Wrist/Foot', '1.15', '1,800', formatCurrency(3_600)],
        ['Total/Blended', '1.62', '5,820', formatCurrency(8_400)],
      ],
    }),

  'referral-patterns': () =>
    PreviewTable({
      headers: ['Source', 'Referrals', '% of Total', 'Conversion'],
      rows: [
        ['Primary Care', '3,200', '42%', '68%'],
        ['Self-Referral', '1,800', '24%', '54%'],
        ['Specialist', '1,200', '16%', '72%'],
        ['Emergency/Urgent', '900', '12%', '81%'],
        ['Other', '500', '6%', '45%'],
      ],
    }),

  'compensation-analysis': () =>
    PreviewTable({
      headers: ['Provider', 'Base', 'Bonus', 'Total', 'wRVU Rate'],
      rows: [
        ['Dr. Chen', formatCurrency(420_000), formatCurrency(85_000), formatCurrency(505_000), '$74'],
        ['Dr. Martinez', formatCurrency(580_000), formatCurrency(120_000), formatCurrency(700_000), '$85'],
        ['Dr. Thompson', formatCurrency(520_000), formatCurrency(95_000), formatCurrency(615_000), '$83'],
        ['Dr. Williams', formatCurrency(380_000), formatCurrency(72_000), formatCurrency(452_000), '$77'],
        ['Dr. Park', formatCurrency(390_000), formatCurrency(78_000), formatCurrency(468_000), '$77'],
      ],
    }),

  'site-profitability': () =>
    PreviewTable({
      headers: ['Site', 'Revenue', 'EBITDA', 'Margin'],
      rows: [
        ['Site 1 (Denver)', formatCurrency(8_900_000), formatCurrency(1_780_000), '20.0%'],
        ['Site 2 (Aurora)', formatCurrency(7_200_000), formatCurrency(1_370_000), '19.0%'],
        ['Site 3 (Boulder)', formatCurrency(5_800_000), formatCurrency(1_100_000), '19.0%'],
        ['Site 4 (Ft Collins)', formatCurrency(5_100_000), formatCurrency(870_000), '17.1%'],
        ['Site 5 (Springs)', formatCurrency(4_900_000), formatCurrency(590_000), '12.0%'],
        ['Sites 6-9', formatCurrency(19_200_000), formatCurrency(3_650_000), '19.0%'],
        ['Sites 10-12', formatCurrency(13_100_000), formatCurrency(2_360_000), '18.0%'],
      ],
    }),

  'denial-rate': () =>
    PreviewTable({
      headers: ['Source', 'Denial Rate', 'Variance'],
      rows: denialRateMetric.sources.map((s) => [s.sourceName, `${s.value}%`, '']),
    }),

  'risk-dashboard': () =>
    React.createElement('div', { className: 'space-y-3' },
      React.createElement('div', { className: 'border border-gray-200 rounded-lg p-4' },
        React.createElement('div', { className: 'flex items-baseline gap-3 mb-3' },
          React.createElement('span', { className: 'text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900' }, '5'),
          React.createElement('span', { className: 'text-sm text-gray-500' }, 'risk factors identified'),
        ),
        React.createElement('div', { className: 'space-y-2' },
          React.createElement('div', { className: 'flex items-center gap-2' },
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-red-500' }),
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'text-sm text-gray-700' }, 'UHC payer concentration exceeds 30% threshold'),
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'ml-auto text-xs font-medium text-red-600' }, 'Material'),
          ),
          React.createElement('div', { className: 'flex items-center gap-2' },
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-red-500' }),
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'text-sm text-gray-700' }, 'Sites 10-12 use Excel-based GL'),
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'ml-auto text-xs font-medium text-red-600' }, 'Material'),
          ),
          React.createElement('div', { className: 'flex items-center gap-2' },
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-amber-500' }),
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'text-sm text-gray-700' }, 'Site 5 denial rate 14%+ vs 8% benchmark'),
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'ml-auto text-xs font-medium text-amber-600' }, 'Noteworthy'),
          ),
          React.createElement('div', { className: 'flex items-center gap-2' },
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-amber-500' }),
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'text-sm text-gray-700' }, 'Key-person risk: Dr. Martinez ($2.1M collections)'),
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'ml-auto text-xs font-medium text-amber-600' }, 'Noteworthy'),
          ),
          React.createElement('div', { className: 'flex items-center gap-2' },
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-amber-500' }),
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'text-sm text-gray-700' }, 'Denial underreporting at 3 acquired sites'),
            React.createElement('span', { className: 'ml-auto text-xs font-medium text-amber-600' }, 'Noteworthy'),
          ),
        ),
      ),
      React.createElement('p', { className: 'text-xs text-gray-400 italic' }, 'See Buy-side Risk Dashboard for full analysis'),
    ),
};

// ── Exhibit data map ──

const EXHIBIT_DATA_MAP: Record<string, unknown> = {
  'collection-waterfall': WATERFALL_ITEMS,
  'ebitda-bridge-by-site': EBITDA_BRIDGE_ITEMS,
  'patient-volume-trend': COHORT_RETENTION,
  'payer-concentration': {
    before: CONCENTRATION.before,
    after: CONCENTRATION.after,
    threshold: CONCENTRATION.threshold,
  },
  'payer-mix': PAYER_MIX_DATA,
  'same-store-growth': SAME_STORE_GROWTH_DATA,
  'denial-rate-trend': DENIAL_RATE_DATA,
  'provider-productivity': PROVIDER_PRODUCTIVITY_DATA,
  'payer-contract-rates': PAYER_CONTRACT_RATES_DATA,
  'ar-aging': AR_AGING_DATA,
  'case-mix-index': null,
  'referral-patterns': null,
  'compensation-analysis': null,
  'site-profitability': null,
  'denial-rate': denialRateMetric,
  'risk-dashboard': RISK_FACTORS,
};

// ── Exhibit lineage map ──

const EXHIBIT_LINEAGE_MAP: Record<string, string> = {
  'collection-waterfall': 'Net Collections — Total',
  'payer-mix': 'Net Collections — Total',
  'payer-concentration': 'Payer Concentration',
  'provider-productivity': 'Provider Productivity — wRVUs',
  'denial-rate-trend': 'Net Collections — Total',
  'ebitda-bridge-by-site': 'Net Collections — Total',
  'same-store-growth': 'Net Collections — Total',
  'payer-contract-rates': 'Net Collections — Total',
  'patient-volume-trend': 'Net Collections — Total',
  'case-mix-index': 'Net Collections — Total',
  'ar-aging': 'Net Collections — Total',
  'referral-patterns': 'Net Collections — Total',
  'compensation-analysis': 'Provider Productivity — wRVUs',
  'site-profitability': 'Net Collections — Total',
  'denial-rate': 'Net Collections — Total',
  'risk-dashboard': 'Net Collections — Total',
};

// ── The assembled scenario ──

export const summitOrthoScenario: ScenarioData = {
  id: 'summit-ortho',

  company: COMPANY,

  constants: {
    SYSTEM_IDS: SYSTEM_IDS as unknown as Record<string, string>,
    FINANCIAL_VALUES: REVENUE_VALUES as unknown as Record<string, number>,
    VARIANCE_COMPONENTS: VARIANCE_COMPONENTS as unknown as Record<string, number>,
    ANNOTATION_COUNTS,
    ENTITY_COUNTS,
    CONCENTRATION,
    EXHIBIT_NAMES: EXHIBIT_NAMES as unknown as Record<string, string>,
    CONCEPT_IDS: CONCEPT_IDS as unknown as Record<string, string>,
    ENTITY_NAMES: {
      PRIMARY_ID: ENTITY_NAMES.PRIMARY_ID,
      PRIMARY_VARIANTS: ENTITY_NAMES.PRIMARY_VARIANTS,
      SECONDARY_ID: ENTITY_NAMES.SECONDARY_ID,
      SECONDARY_VARIANTS: ENTITY_NAMES.SECONDARY_VARIANTS,
    },
    SCHEMA_STATS,
  },

  // Core data
  systems: SYSTEMS,
  sourceOntologies: SOURCE_ONTOLOGIES,
  unifiedOntology: UNIFIED_ONTOLOGY,
  annotations: ALL_ANNOTATIONS,

  // Entity resolution
  matchCandidates: MATCH_CANDIDATES,
  entityStats: ENTITY_STATS,
  mergeDownstreamImpact: MERGE_DOWNSTREAM_IMPACT,

  // Reconciliation
  reconciliation: {
    metrics: RECONCILIATION_METRICS,
    labels: {
      source1: 'Billing',
      source2: 'Payment',
      source3: 'GL',
      varianceLabel: 'Collections Variance',
    },
  },

  // Exhibits
  exhibits: {
    definitions: EXHIBITS,
    renderers: EXHIBIT_RENDERERS,
    data: EXHIBIT_DATA_MAP,
    lineagePaths: LINEAGE_PATHS,
    ghostNodes: GHOST_NODES,
    fullLineageGraph: FULL_LINEAGE_GRAPH,
    exhibitLineageMap: EXHIBIT_LINEAGE_MAP,
  },

  // Waterfall / metrics
  waterfall: {
    items: WATERFALL_ITEMS,
    title: 'Net Collections Waterfall',
  },
  cohortRetention: COHORT_RETENTION,

  // Drift / refresh
  quarterlyRefresh: QUARTERLY_REFRESH,
  driftEvents: DRIFT_EVENTS,

  // Buy-side
  buyside: {
    reconstructedMetrics: RECONSTRUCTED_METRICS,
    varianceDecomposition: VARIANCE_DECOMPOSITION,
    riskFactors: RISK_FACTORS,
    integrationTasks: INTEGRATION_TASKS,
    exportFiles: EXPORT_FILES,
    dataQualityScore: DATA_QUALITY_SCORE,
  },

  // Schemas & lineage
  schemaTables: SCHEMA_TABLES,
  dbtModels: DBT_MODELS,
  timeComparisons: TIME_COMPARISONS,

  // Store snapshots
  storeSnapshots: SCENARIOS,

  // Hold-period data
  holdPeriod: holdPeriodData,

  // Screen-specific display config
  problemScreen: {
    painStats: [
      { value: '90 Days', label: 'Exclusivity window. 8+ months of manual work.' },
      { value: '$3.8M', label: 'EBITDA at risk from data gaps' },
      { value: '31,847', label: 'Fields across 12 systems. No shared schema.' },
    ],
  },

  sellSideLayout: {
    dealTimer: { day: 8, total: 90, label: 'Exclusivity Clock' },
  },

  buySideLayout: {
    dealTimer: { day: 3, total: 45, label: 'Diligence Window' },
  },

  // Topology layout config
  topology: {
    systemTypes: TYPE_LANE_ORDER,
    laneLabels: LANE_LABELS,
    typeColors: TYPE_COLORS,
    entitySystemMap: ENTITY_SYSTEM_MAP as unknown as ScenarioData['topology']['entitySystemMap'],
  },

  // Ontology diagram config
  unifiedOntologyCategories: ['Clinical', 'Billing', 'Financial', 'Operational'],

  // Interaction behavior config
  interactions: {
    primaryMetricId: 'net-collections',
    primaryMetricLabel: 'Net Collections',
    concentrationEntityLabel: 'Payer',
    primaryRiskId: 'risk-uhc-concentration',
  },

  navMigration: null,
};

src/scenarios/summit-ortho/lineage.ts
```
import { SYSTEM_IDS, CONCEPT_IDS, EXHIBIT_NAMES } from './_constants';
import type { LineageNode, LineageEdge, GhostNode } from '../../types/demo';

// ── Lineage Paths (for LineagePopover — 3 paths with 4-5 nodes each) ──

const netCollectionsPath: { nodes: LineageNode[]; edges: LineageEdge[] } = {
  nodes: [
    { id: 'lp1-field', label: 'athenahealth charge.ChargeAmount', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.ATHENAHEALTH },
    { id: 'lp1-annotation', label: 'Claim.Charge mapping (93%)', type: 'annotation', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.ATHENAHEALTH },
    { id: 'lp1-concept', label: CONCEPT_IDS.CLAIM_CHARGE, type: 'concept' },
    { id: 'lp1-metric', label: 'Net Collections — Total', type: 'metric' },
    { id: 'lp1-cell', label: `${EXHIBIT_NAMES.EBITDA_BRIDGE} cell B3`, type: 'exhibit-cell' },
  ],
  edges: [
    { source: 'lp1-field', target: 'lp1-annotation', confidence: 93 },
    { source: 'lp1-annotation', target: 'lp1-concept' },
    { source: 'lp1-concept', target: 'lp1-metric' },
    { source: 'lp1-metric', target: 'lp1-cell' },
  ],
};

const providerProductivityPath: { nodes: LineageNode[]; edges: LineageEdge[] } = {
  nodes: [
    { id: 'lp2-field', label: 'eclinicalworks encounter.ProcedureCode', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.ECLINICALWORKS },
    { id: 'lp2-annotation', label: 'Encounter.Procedure mapping (91%)', type: 'annotation', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.ECLINICALWORKS },
    { id: 'lp2-concept', label: CONCEPT_IDS.ENCOUNTER_PROCEDURE, type: 'concept' },
    { id: 'lp2-metric', label: 'Provider Productivity — wRVU per Provider', type: 'metric' },
    { id: 'lp2-cell', label: `${EXHIBIT_NAMES.PROVIDER_PRODUCTIVITY} cell C4`, type: 'exhibit-cell' },
  ],
  edges: [
    { source: 'lp2-field', target: 'lp2-annotation', confidence: 91 },
    { source: 'lp2-annotation', target: 'lp2-concept' },
    { source: 'lp2-concept', target: 'lp2-metric' },
    { source: 'lp2-metric', target: 'lp2-cell' },
  ],
};

const payerConcentrationPath: { nodes: LineageNode[]; edges: LineageEdge[] } = {
  nodes: [
    { id: 'lp3-field', label: 'kareo claim.PayerName', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.KAREO },
    { id: 'lp3-annotation', label: 'Payer mapping (94%)', type: 'annotation', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.KAREO },
    { id: 'lp3-concept', label: CONCEPT_IDS.PAYER, type: 'concept' },
    { id: 'lp3-metric', label: 'Payer Concentration — UHC Share', type: 'metric' },
  ],
  edges: [
    { source: 'lp3-field', target: 'lp3-annotation', confidence: 94 },
    { source: 'lp3-annotation', target: 'lp3-concept' },
    { source: 'lp3-concept', target: 'lp3-metric' },
  ],
};

export const LINEAGE_PATHS = [
  { label: 'Net Collections — Total', ...netCollectionsPath },
  { label: 'Provider Productivity — wRVU per Provider', ...providerProductivityPath },
  { label: 'Payer Concentration — UHC Share', ...payerConcentrationPath },
];

// ── Ghost Nodes (for LineagePopover depth indicators) ──

export const GHOST_NODES: GhostNode[] = [
  {
    id: 'ghost-1',
    parentNodeId: 'lp1-concept',
    label: '… 4 other source fields (Kareo, AdvancedMD)',
    pathCount: 5,
  },
  {
    id: 'ghost-2',
    parentNodeId: 'lp1-metric',
    label: '… 2 other metrics',
    pathCount: 3,
  },
  {
    id: 'ghost-3',
    parentNodeId: 'lp2-concept',
    label: '… 3 other source fields (athenahealth, NextGen)',
    pathCount: 4,
  },
  {
    id: 'ghost-4',
    parentNodeId: 'lp3-concept',
    label: '… 7 other source fields across 4 billing systems',
    pathCount: 8,
  },
];

// ── Full Lineage Graph (for LineageFullView — ~20 nodes) ──

export const FULL_LINEAGE_GRAPH: { nodes: LineageNode[]; edges: LineageEdge[] } = {
  nodes: [
    // Source fields (layer 1) — EHR systems
    { id: 'fl-athena-charge', label: 'athenahealth charge.ChargeAmount', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.ATHENAHEALTH },
    { id: 'fl-athena-dx', label: 'athenahealth claim.DiagnosisCode', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.ATHENAHEALTH },
    { id: 'fl-athena-provider', label: 'athenahealth provider.NPI', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.ATHENAHEALTH },
    { id: 'fl-ecw-procedure', label: 'eclinicalworks encounter.ProcedureCode', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.ECLINICALWORKS },
    { id: 'fl-ecw-payer', label: 'eclinicalworks encounter.InsurancePlanName', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.ECLINICALWORKS },
    { id: 'fl-nextgen-encounter', label: 'nextgen encounter.ProcedureCode', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.NEXTGEN },

    // Source fields (layer 1) — Billing / RCM
    { id: 'fl-kareo-charge', label: 'kareo claim.ChargeAmount', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.KAREO },
    { id: 'fl-kareo-payer', label: 'kareo claim.PayerName', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.KAREO },
    { id: 'fl-kareo-payment', label: 'kareo payment.Amount', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.KAREO },
    { id: 'fl-advmd-charge', label: 'advancedmd charge.BilledAmount', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.ADVANCEDMD },
    { id: 'fl-waystar-remit', label: 'waystar remit.PayerName', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.WAYSTAR },

    // Source fields (layer 1) — GL
    { id: 'fl-sage-amount', label: 'sage-intacct GLENTRY.AMOUNT', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.SAGE_INTACCT },
    { id: 'fl-qbo-amount', label: 'quickbooks journal.Amount', type: 'source-field', systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.QUICKBOOKS_ONLINE },

    // Annotations (layer 2)
    { id: 'fl-ann-charge', label: 'Claim.Charge (93%)', type: 'annotation' },
    { id: 'fl-ann-procedure', label: 'Encounter.Procedure (91%)', type: 'annotation' },
    { id: 'fl-ann-payer', label: 'Payer (94%)', type: 'annotation' },
    { id: 'fl-ann-payment', label: 'Payment.Posting (93%)', type: 'annotation' },
    { id: 'fl-ann-provider', label: 'Provider.NPI (97%)', type: 'annotation' },
    { id: 'fl-ann-gl-revenue', label: 'GL.Revenue (95%)', type: 'annotation' },

    // Concepts (layer 3)
    { id: 'fl-concept-charge', label: CONCEPT_IDS.CLAIM_CHARGE, type: 'concept' },
    { id: 'fl-concept-procedure', label: CONCEPT_IDS.ENCOUNTER_PROCEDURE, type: 'concept' },
    { id: 'fl-concept-payer', label: CONCEPT_IDS.PAYER, type: 'concept' },
    { id: 'fl-concept-payment', label: CONCEPT_IDS.PAYMENT_POSTING, type: 'concept' },
    { id: 'fl-concept-gl', label: CONCEPT_IDS.GL_REVENUE, type: 'concept' },

    // Metrics + Exhibits (layer 4)
    { id: 'fl-metric-collections', label: EXHIBIT_NAMES.EBITDA_BRIDGE, type: 'metric' },
    { id: 'fl-metric-productivity', label: EXHIBIT_NAMES.PROVIDER_PRODUCTIVITY, type: 'metric' },
    { id: 'fl-metric-payer', label: EXHIBIT_NAMES.PAYER_MIX, type: 'metric' },
  ],
  edges: [
    // Source → Annotation
    { source: 'fl-athena-charge', target: 'fl-ann-charge', confidence: 93 },
    { source: 'fl-kareo-charge', target: 'fl-ann-charge', confidence: 94 },
    { source: 'fl-advmd-charge', target: 'fl-ann-charge', confidence: 91 },
    { source: 'fl-ecw-procedure', target: 'fl-ann-procedure', confidence: 91 },
    { source: 'fl-nextgen-encounter', target: 'fl-ann-procedure', confidence: 89 },
    { source: 'fl-athena-dx', target: 'fl-ann-procedure', confidence: 88 },
    { source: 'fl-kareo-payer', target: 'fl-ann-payer', confidence: 94 },
    { source: 'fl-ecw-payer', target: 'fl-ann-payer', confidence: 87 },
    { source: 'fl-waystar-remit', target: 'fl-ann-payer', confidence: 92 },
    { source: 'fl-kareo-payment', target: 'fl-ann-payment', confidence: 93 },
    { source: 'fl-athena-provider', target: 'fl-ann-provider', confidence: 97 },
    { source: 'fl-sage-amount', target: 'fl-ann-gl-revenue', confidence: 95 },
    { source: 'fl-qbo-amount', target: 'fl-ann-gl-revenue', confidence: 88 },

    // Annotation → Concept
    { source: 'fl-ann-charge', target: 'fl-concept-charge' },
    { source: 'fl-ann-procedure', target: 'fl-concept-procedure' },
    { source: 'fl-ann-payer', target: 'fl-concept-payer' },
    { source: 'fl-ann-payment', target: 'fl-concept-payment' },
    { source: 'fl-ann-gl-revenue', target: 'fl-concept-gl' },

    // Concept → Metric
    { source: 'fl-concept-charge', target: 'fl-metric-collections' },
    { source: 'fl-concept-payment', target: 'fl-metric-collections' },
    { source: 'fl-concept-gl', target: 'fl-metric-collections' },
    { source: 'fl-concept-procedure', target: 'fl-metric-productivity' },
    { source: 'fl-concept-payer', target: 'fl-metric-payer' },
  ],
};

import type { WaterfallItem } from '../../types/metric';

// ── EBITDA Bridge (not ARR waterfall — healthcare PE scenario) ──
// Starting EBITDA of $14M with adjustments to normalized EBITDA
export const WATERFALL_ITEMS: WaterfallItem[] = [
  { label: 'Reported EBITDA',             value: 14_000_000,  type: 'start',    drillable: false },
  { label: 'Provider Comp Adjustments',   value: -1_200_000,  type: 'decrease', drillable: true  },
  { label: 'Facility Cost Normalization', value:   -800_000,  type: 'decrease', drillable: true  },
  { label: 'One-Time Integration Costs',  value:  1_400_000,  type: 'increase', drillable: true  },
  { label: 'Management Fee Add-back',     value:    900_000,  type: 'increase', drillable: true  },
  { label: 'Other Add-backs',             value:    500_000,  type: 'increase', drillable: true  },
  { label: 'Normalized EBITDA',           value: 14_800_000,  type: 'total',    drillable: false },
];

// ── Site-Based Cohort Retention ──
// Revenue retention by site, quarterly (as % of baseline quarter).
// Orthopedic practices — stable revenue with seasonal variation.
export const COHORT_RETENTION: { cohort: string; months: number[] }[] = [
  {
    cohort: 'Site 1 (Platform)',
    months: [100, 101, 102, 103, 104, 105, 106, 107, 108, 109, 110, 111],
  },
  {
    cohort: 'Site 2 (Tuck-in 1)',
    months: [100, 99, 98, 99, 101, 103, 104, 105, 106, 107, 108, 109],
  },
  {
    cohort: 'Site 3 (Tuck-in 2)',
    months: [100, 97, 96, 95, 97, 99, 101, 103, 104, 106, 107],
  },
  {
    cohort: 'Site 4 (Tuck-in 3)',
    months: [100, 98, 97, 98, 100, 102, 103, 105, 106, 108],
  },
  {
    cohort: 'Site 5 (Tuck-in 4)',
    months: [100, 96, 94, 93, 94, 96, 98, 100, 102],
  },
  {
    cohort: 'Site 6 (Tuck-in 5)',
    months: [100, 99, 100, 101, 102, 104, 105],
  },
  {
    cohort: 'Site 7 (Tuck-in 6)',
    months: [100, 98, 97, 96, 97, 99],
  },
  {
    cohort: 'Site 8 (Tuck-in 7)',
    months: [100, 97, 95, 94, 96],
  },
];

src/scenarios/summit-ortho/ontology.ts
```
import type { SourceOntology, CanonicalConcept } from '../../types/annotation';
import { SYSTEM_IDS, CONCEPT_IDS } from './_constants';

// ── Source ontology summaries (one per system) ──

export const SOURCE_ONTOLOGIES: SourceOntology[] = [
  // ── EHR / Practice Management (4) ──
  {
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.ATHENAHEALTH,
    systemName: 'athenahealth',
    tableCount: 14,
    fieldCount: 4_200,
    keyConcepts: ['Patient', 'Provider', 'Encounter', 'Diagnosis', 'Procedure'],
    derivedConcepts: [
      { name: 'Patient Demographics', category: 'Clinical', tables: 3, fields: 45 },
      { name: 'Encounter Records', category: 'Clinical', tables: 4, fields: 62 },
      { name: 'Insurance Coverage', category: 'Billing', tables: 2, fields: 28 },
      { name: 'Provider Directory', category: 'Operational', tables: 2, fields: 34 },
      { name: 'Appointment Scheduling', category: 'Operational', tables: 3, fields: 41 },
    ],
    relationships: ['patient_id → encounters', 'encounter_id → diagnoses', 'provider_npi → rendering_provider'],
    constraints: ['patient_dob NOT NULL', 'encounter_date >= 2020-01-01'],
  },
  {
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.ECLINICALWORKS,
    systemName: 'eClinicalWorks',
    tableCount: 11,
    fieldCount: 3_600,
    keyConcepts: ['Patient', 'Provider', 'Encounter', 'Insurance Plan', 'Order'],
    derivedConcepts: [
      { name: 'Patient Records', category: 'Clinical', tables: 3, fields: 52 },
      { name: 'Encounter Details', category: 'Clinical', tables: 3, fields: 48 },
      { name: 'Insurance Plans', category: 'Billing', tables: 2, fields: 31 },
      { name: 'Order Management', category: 'Clinical', tables: 2, fields: 26 },
      { name: 'Provider Schedule', category: 'Operational', tables: 1, fields: 18 },
    ],
    relationships: ['PatientID → Encounters', 'EncounterID → Orders', 'ProviderID → Schedule'],
    constraints: ['DateOfBirth required', 'InsurancePlanName non-empty for billed encounters'],
  },
  {
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.NEXTGEN,
    systemName: 'NextGen Healthcare',
    tableCount: 10,
    fieldCount: 3_100,
    keyConcepts: ['Person', 'Provider', 'Encounter', 'Charge', 'Referral'],
    derivedConcepts: [
      { name: 'Person Demographics', category: 'Clinical', tables: 2, fields: 38 },
      { name: 'Clinical Encounters', category: 'Clinical', tables: 3, fields: 55 },
      { name: 'Charge Capture', category: 'Billing', tables: 2, fields: 32 },
      { name: 'Referral Tracking', category: 'Operational', tables: 2, fields: 22 },
    ],
    relationships: ['person_id → encounters', 'encounter_id → charges', 'provider_id → referrals'],
    constraints: ['NPI format validated', 'encounter_type IN (office, telehealth, procedure)'],
  },
  {
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.MODERNIZING_MEDICINE,
    systemName: 'Modernizing Medicine / EMA',
    tableCount: 8,
    fieldCount: 2_800,
    keyConcepts: ['Patient', 'Provider', 'Encounter', 'Procedure', 'Implant'],
    derivedConcepts: [
      { name: 'Patient Chart', category: 'Clinical', tables: 2, fields: 42 },
      { name: 'Surgical Encounters', category: 'Clinical', tables: 3, fields: 58 },
      { name: 'Implant Registry', category: 'Clinical', tables: 1, fields: 24 },
      { name: 'Ortho-Specific Templates', category: 'Operational', tables: 2, fields: 36 },
    ],
    relationships: ['patient_id → encounters', 'encounter_id → procedures', 'procedure_id → implants'],
    constraints: ['Orthopedic specialty codes required', 'CPT codes validated against ortho subset'],
  },

  // ── Billing / RCM (3) ──
  {
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.KAREO,
    systemName: 'Kareo',
    tableCount: 9,
    fieldCount: 2_900,
    keyConcepts: ['Patient', 'Payer', 'Claim', 'Payment', 'Denial'],
    derivedConcepts: [
      { name: 'Claim Submission', category: 'Billing', tables: 2, fields: 44 },
      { name: 'Payment Posting', category: 'Financial', tables: 2, fields: 38 },
      { name: 'Denial Management', category: 'Billing', tables: 2, fields: 29 },
      { name: 'Payer Contracts', category: 'Billing', tables: 1, fields: 18 },
      { name: 'Patient Balances', category: 'Financial', tables: 2, fields: 22 },
    ],
    relationships: ['PatientID → Claims', 'ClaimID → Payments', 'ClaimID → Denials'],
    constraints: ['PayerName required for claim submission', 'AdjustmentReasonCode follows CARC standard'],
  },
  {
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.ADVANCEDMD,
    systemName: 'AdvancedMD',
    tableCount: 8,
    fieldCount: 2_600,
    keyConcepts: ['Patient', 'Payer', 'Claim', 'Payment', 'Denial'],
    derivedConcepts: [
      { name: 'Claim Processing', category: 'Billing', tables: 2, fields: 40 },
      { name: 'ERA Processing', category: 'Financial', tables: 2, fields: 35 },
      { name: 'Denial Tracking', category: 'Billing', tables: 1, fields: 22 },
      { name: 'Patient Responsibility', category: 'Financial', tables: 2, fields: 28 },
      { name: 'Payer Setup', category: 'Operational', tables: 1, fields: 16 },
    ],
    relationships: ['patient_id → claims', 'claim_id → payments', 'payer_id → contracts'],
    constraints: ['Internal payer codes mapped to national IDs', 'denial_notes free text (unstructured)'],
  },
  {
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.WAYSTAR,
    systemName: 'Waystar',
    tableCount: 6,
    fieldCount: 2_100,
    keyConcepts: ['Claim', 'Remittance', 'Eligibility', 'Prior Authorization'],
    derivedConcepts: [
      { name: 'Claim Status', category: 'Billing', tables: 2, fields: 32 },
      { name: 'Remittance Advice', category: 'Financial', tables: 2, fields: 28 },
      { name: 'Eligibility Verification', category: 'Billing', tables: 1, fields: 19 },
      { name: 'Prior Auth Tracking', category: 'Operational', tables: 1, fields: 15 },
    ],
    relationships: ['claim_id → remittance', 'patient_id → eligibility', 'encounter_id → prior_auth'],
    constraints: ['Partial rollout — 6 of 15 sites connected', 'EDI 835/837 format required'],
  },

  // ── Financial / GL (3 — Excel GL counted as 2 systems but listed separately) ──
  {
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.QUICKBOOKS_ONLINE,
    systemName: 'QuickBooks Online',
    tableCount: 7,
    fieldCount: 2_400,
    keyConcepts: ['Customer', 'Invoice', 'Payment', 'Chart of Accounts', 'Journal Entry'],
    derivedConcepts: [
      { name: 'Invoice', category: 'Financial', tables: 2, fields: 34 },
      { name: 'Payment', category: 'Financial', tables: 1, fields: 22 },
      { name: 'Chart of Accounts', category: 'Financial', tables: 1, fields: 18 },
      { name: 'Customer Master', category: 'Financial', tables: 1, fields: 26 },
      { name: 'Journal Entry', category: 'Financial', tables: 2, fields: 28 },
    ],
    relationships: ['Customer:Job → Invoice → Payment', 'Account → Journal Entry'],
    constraints: ['Shared instance for 5 legacy sites', 'Class tracking = site location'],
  },
  {
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.SAGE_INTACCT,
    systemName: 'Sage Intacct',
    tableCount: 10,
    fieldCount: 3_800,
    keyConcepts: ['Customer', 'Revenue Recognition', 'GL Account', 'Department', 'Location'],
    derivedConcepts: [
      { name: 'Revenue Recognition', category: 'Financial', tables: 3, fields: 48 },
      { name: 'GL Account Structure', category: 'Financial', tables: 2, fields: 36 },
      { name: 'Department Allocation', category: 'Financial', tables: 2, fields: 24 },
      { name: 'Location Hierarchy', category: 'Operational', tables: 1, fields: 16 },
      { name: 'Vendor / AP', category: 'Financial', tables: 2, fields: 30 },
    ],
    relationships: ['Customer → Invoice → Revenue Schedule', 'GL Account → Journal Entry → Department'],
    constraints: ['Platform practice GL — multi-entity enabled', 'ASC 606 revenue recognition active'],
  },
  {
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.EXCEL_GL_1,
    systemName: 'Excel GL (Site 14)',
    tableCount: 3,
    fieldCount: 820,
    keyConcepts: ['Account', 'Amount', 'Date', 'Description'],
    derivedConcepts: [
      { name: 'Trial Balance', category: 'Financial', tables: 1, fields: 12 },
      { name: 'Revenue Journal', category: 'Financial', tables: 1, fields: 14 },
      { name: 'Expense Tracking', category: 'Financial', tables: 1, fields: 10 },
    ],
    relationships: ['Account → Transaction'],
    constraints: ['Manual data entry', 'No audit trail', 'Inconsistent date formats'],
  },
  {
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.EXCEL_GL_2,
    systemName: 'Excel GL (Site 15)',
    tableCount: 3,
    fieldCount: 780,
    keyConcepts: ['Account', 'Amount', 'Date', 'Memo'],
    derivedConcepts: [
      { name: 'Trial Balance', category: 'Financial', tables: 1, fields: 11 },
      { name: 'Revenue Journal', category: 'Financial', tables: 1, fields: 12 },
      { name: 'Expense Tracking', category: 'Financial', tables: 1, fields: 9 },
    ],
    relationships: ['Account → Transaction'],
    constraints: ['Manual data entry', 'No audit trail', 'Owner-managed bookkeeping'],
  },

  // ── Other (2) ──
  {
    systemId: SYSTEM_IDS.SALESFORCE_HEALTH_CLOUD,
    systemName: 'Salesforce Health Cloud',
    tableCount: 8,
    fieldCount: 2_900,
    keyConcepts: ['Patient', 'Care Plan', 'Referral', 'Provider', 'Payer'],
    derivedConcepts: [
      { name: 'Patient Account', category: 'Clinical', tables: 2, fields: 38 },
      { name: 'Care Plan', category: 'Clinical', tables: 2, fields: 32 },
      { name: 'Referral Management', category: 'Operational', tables: 2, fields: 24 },
      { name: 'Provider Relationships', category: 'Operational', tables: 1, fields: 18 },
      { name: 'Payer Information', category: 'Billing', tables: 1, fields: 14 },
    ],
    relationships: ['Patient → Care Plan → Provider', 'Patient → Referral', 'Patient → Payer'],
    constraints: ['Partially populated — 40% of patients have records', 'Custom objects for ortho workflows'],
  },
];

// Note: ADP Workforce (SYSTEM_IDS.ADP_WORKFORCE) is excluded from source ontologies
// because it contains HR/payroll data, not clinical/financial data relevant to the
// canonical concept hierarchy. It appears in the system topology but not ontology mapping.

// ── Unified canonical concept hierarchy ──

export const UNIFIED_ONTOLOGY: CanonicalConcept[] = [
  {
    id: CONCEPT_IDS.PATIENT,
    label: 'Patient',
    category: 'Clinical',
    description: 'Canonical patient entity resolved across all EHR and billing systems',
    children: [
      {
        id: CONCEPT_IDS.PATIENT_DEMOGRAPHICS,
        label: 'Demographics',
        category: 'Clinical',
        description: 'Patient demographic information including DOB, gender, address, and contact details',
      },
      {
        id: 'patient.insurance',
        label: 'Insurance',
        category: 'Billing',
        description: 'Patient insurance coverage, plan assignments, and eligibility status',
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: CONCEPT_IDS.PROVIDER,
    label: 'Provider',
    category: 'Clinical',
    description: 'Canonical provider entity linked by NPI across clinical and billing systems',
    children: [
      {
        id: CONCEPT_IDS.PROVIDER_NPI,
        label: 'NPI',
        category: 'Clinical',
        description: 'National Provider Identifier — unique 10-digit provider number',
      },
      {
        id: 'provider.credentials',
        label: 'Credentials',
        category: 'Clinical',
        description: 'Provider degree, board certifications, and license status',
      },
      {
        id: 'provider.specialty',
        label: 'Specialty',
        category: 'Clinical',
        description: 'Provider medical specialty and sub-specialty designations',
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: CONCEPT_IDS.ENCOUNTER,
    label: 'Encounter',
    category: 'Clinical',
    description: 'Canonical encounter record linking clinical visits to billing events',
    children: [
      {
        id: CONCEPT_IDS.ENCOUNTER_DIAGNOSIS,
        label: 'Diagnosis',
        category: 'Clinical',
        description: 'ICD-10 diagnosis codes attached to encounters across all EHR systems',
      },
      {
        id: CONCEPT_IDS.ENCOUNTER_PROCEDURE,
        label: 'Procedure',
        category: 'Clinical',
        description: 'CPT/HCPCS procedure codes performed during encounters',
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: CONCEPT_IDS.CLAIM,
    label: 'Claim',
    category: 'Billing',
    description: 'Canonical claim entity spanning billing system submissions and clearinghouse data',
    children: [
      {
        id: CONCEPT_IDS.CLAIM_CHARGE,
        label: 'Charge',
        category: 'Billing',
        description: 'Individual line-item charges on a claim, with CPT code, units, and billed amount',
      },
      {
        id: 'claim.adjustment',
        label: 'Adjustment',
        category: 'Billing',
        description: 'Contractual adjustments, write-offs, and payer-specific reductions applied to charges',
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: CONCEPT_IDS.PAYMENT,
    label: 'Payment',
    category: 'Financial',
    description: 'Canonical payment entity reconciling remittances across billing and GL systems',
    children: [
      {
        id: CONCEPT_IDS.PAYMENT_POSTING,
        label: 'Posting',
        category: 'Financial',
        description: 'Payment posting events mapping remittance line items to patient accounts',
      },
      {
        id: 'payment.era',
        label: 'ERA',
        category: 'Financial',
        description: 'Electronic Remittance Advice (835) records from payers and clearinghouses',
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: CONCEPT_IDS.DENIAL,
    label: 'Denial',
    category: 'Billing',
    description: 'Canonical denial entity normalizing rejection reasons across billing systems',
    children: [
      {
        id: CONCEPT_IDS.DENIAL_REASON,
        label: 'Reason Code',
        category: 'Billing',
        description: 'CARC/RARC denial reason codes normalized from structured codes and free-text fields',
      },
      {
        id: 'denial.appeal',
        label: 'Appeal',
        category: 'Billing',
        description: 'Denial appeal status, submission dates, and resolution outcomes',
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: CONCEPT_IDS.PAYER,
    label: 'Payer',
    category: 'Billing',
    description: 'Canonical payer entity resolved across all systems — the key entity for concentration analysis',
    children: [
      {
        id: CONCEPT_IDS.PAYER_CONTRACT,
        label: 'Contract',
        category: 'Billing',
        description: 'Payer contract terms, fee schedules, and reimbursement rate structures',
      },
      {
        id: 'payer.authorization',
        label: 'Authorization',
        category: 'Billing',
        description: 'Prior authorization requirements, approval status, and validity periods',
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: CONCEPT_IDS.SERVICE_LOCATION,
    label: 'Service Location',
    category: 'Operational',
    description: 'Canonical service location mapping practice sites across all systems',
    children: [
      {
        id: 'service.location.site',
        label: 'Site',
        category: 'Operational',
        description: 'Individual practice site with address, NPI, and operational metadata',
      },
      {
        id: 'service.location.region',
        label: 'Region',
        category: 'Operational',
        description: 'Geographic region grouping sites by state or market area',
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 'financial',
    label: 'Financial',
    category: 'Financial',
    description: 'General ledger and financial reporting concepts across GL systems',
    children: [
      {
        id: CONCEPT_IDS.GL_REVENUE,
        label: 'Revenue',
        category: 'Financial',
        description: 'GL-booked revenue entries from Sage Intacct, QuickBooks, and Excel-based ledgers',
      },
      {
        id: CONCEPT_IDS.GL_EXPENSE,
        label: 'Expense',
        category: 'Financial',
        description: 'GL-booked expense entries including provider compensation, rent, and supplies',
      },
      {
        id: 'financial.gl-account',
        label: 'GL Account',
        category: 'Financial',
        description: 'Chart of accounts structure normalized across disparate GL systems',
      },
    ],
  },
];
