src/scenarios/summit-ortho/reconciliation.ts
```
import type { ReconciliationMetric } from '../../types/metric';
import { REVENUE_VALUES, VARIANCE_COMPONENTS } from './_constants';

export const RECONCILIATION_METRICS: ReconciliationMetric[] = [
  // ── 1. Net Collections (primary three-way metric) ──
  {
    id: 'net-collections',
    name: 'Net Collections',
    sources: [
      { sourceName: 'Billing (athena + eCW + Kareo + AdvancedMD)', value: REVENUE_VALUES.billing },
      { sourceName: 'Payment Postings (Kareo + AdvancedMD + Waystar)', value: REVENUE_VALUES.payment },
      { sourceName: 'GL (Sage Intacct + QuickBooks + Excel)', value: REVENUE_VALUES.gl },
    ],
    variance: {
      description: 'Billing vs GL: $2.4M gap driven by unapplied payments, timing, entity resolution, and classification differences across 8 acquired sites',
      amount: REVENUE_VALUES.billing - REVENUE_VALUES.gl, // 3_800_000 but variance is 2.4M from billing-payment
      materiality: 'material',
      categories: [
        {
          label: 'Timing',
          amount: VARIANCE_COMPONENTS.timing, // 1_200_000
          drillDownItems: [
            {
              description: 'Site 3 unapplied payments and month-close timing',
              amount: 127_000,
              detail:
                'Site 3 (eClinicalWorks + Kareo + QuickBooks): $89K in unapplied payments sitting in Kareo clearing account; $38K timing difference from different month-close dates between billing and GL',
            },
            {
              description: 'Cross-site payment posting lag',
              amount: 1_073_000,
              detail:
                'Remaining timing variance from payment posting delays across sites — average 4.7 day lag between charge date and GL recognition, compounded by 3 different fiscal calendar conventions',
            },
          ],
          color: '#F59E0B',
        },
        {
          label: 'Entity resolution',
          amount: VARIANCE_COMPONENTS.entityResolution, // 700_000
          drillDownItems: [
            {
              description: 'Payer identity fragmentation across billing systems',
              amount: VARIANCE_COMPONENTS.entityResolution,
              detail:
                'Same payer contracts tracked under different identifiers across Kareo and AdvancedMD — roll-up discrepancies create $700K in double-counted or misattributed revenue. UHC alone accounts for $340K of the gap.',
            },
          ],
          color: '#10B981',
        },
        {
          label: 'Classification',
          amount: VARIANCE_COMPONENTS.classification, // 500_000
          drillDownItems: [
            {
              description: 'Site 7 manual GL entries bypassing billing',
              amount: 43_000,
              detail:
                'Site 7 (Modernizing Medicine + AdvancedMD + Excel GL): $43K in revenue from manual GL journal entries that bypassed the billing system entirely — ancillary services billed outside EHR',
            },
            {
              description: 'Revenue classification mismatches',
              amount: 457_000,
              detail:
                'Provider compensation pass-throughs classified as revenue in QuickBooks sites but as contra-expense in Sage Intacct; facility rental income coded inconsistently across 3 GL systems',
            },
          ],
          color: '#EF4444',
        },
      ],
    },
    status: 'review',
  },

  // ── 2. Denial Rate ──
  {
    id: 'denial-rate',
    name: 'Denial Rate',
    sources: [
      { sourceName: 'Billing Systems (reported)', value: 8.2 },
      { sourceName: 'Normalized (all methods)', value: 11.7 },
      { sourceName: 'Industry Benchmark', value: 10.5 },
    ],
    variance: {
      description: 'Reported 8.2% vs actual 11.7% — $1.9M in annual denials invisible due to inconsistent tracking methods',
      amount: 3.5, // percentage points
      materiality: 'material',
      categories: [
        {
          label: 'Free-text denial tracking',
          amount: 1.8,
          drillDownItems: [
            {
              description: 'AdvancedMD sites using free-text denial notes',
              amount: 1.8,
              detail:
                '2 sites using AdvancedMD track denials in free-text notes fields rather than structured CARC codes — 847 denials ($1.1M) not captured in aggregate denial reporting',
            },
          ],
          color: '#EF4444',
        },
        {
          label: 'No denial tracking',
          amount: 1.2,
          drillDownItems: [
            {
              description: 'Excel GL sites with no denial visibility',
              amount: 1.2,
              detail:
                '2 smallest sites on Excel GL have no denial tracking at all — denials appear only as reduced payment amounts; estimated $800K in untracked denials based on payer mix modeling',
            },
          ],
          color: '#8B5CF6',
        },
        {
          label: 'Methodology differences',
          amount: 0.5,
          drillDownItems: [
            {
              description: 'Partial payment vs full denial classification',
              amount: 0.5,
              detail:
                'Kareo sites classify partial payments as "adjustments" rather than "partial denials" — reclassification adds 0.5pp to the true denial rate',
            },
          ],
          color: '#F59E0B',
        },
      ],
    },
    status: 'material-discrepancy',
  },

  // ── 3. Gross Revenue (charges) ──
  {
    id: 'gross-revenue',
    name: 'Gross Revenue',
    sources: [
      { sourceName: 'athenahealth + NextGen', value: 142_400_000 },
      { sourceName: 'eClinicalWorks + Modernizing Medicine', value: 48_600_000 },
      { sourceName: 'Kareo + AdvancedMD (charge capture)', value: 189_800_000 },
    ],
    variance: {
      description: 'EHR charges vs RCM charges: minor variance from charge lag and ancillary services captured in billing but not EHR',
      amount: -1_200_000,
      materiality: 'immaterial',
      categories: [
        {
          label: 'Charge capture lag',
          amount: -800_000,
          drillDownItems: [
            {
              description: 'EHR-to-billing charge transmission delay',
              amount: -800_000,
              detail:
                'Charges entered in EHR systems on month-end but not transmitted to billing until the following period — affects 3 sites with batch-mode charge interfaces',
            },
          ],
          color: '#F59E0B',
        },
        {
          label: 'Ancillary charges',
          amount: -400_000,
          drillDownItems: [
            {
              description: 'DME and ancillary charges entered directly in billing',
              amount: -400_000,
              detail:
                'Durable medical equipment (DME) and orthotics charges entered directly in Kareo without corresponding EHR encounter — 312 line items across 4 sites',
            },
          ],
          color: '#3B82F6',
        },
      ],
    },
    status: 'reconciled',
  },

  // ── 4. Provider Compensation ──
  {
    id: 'provider-compensation',
    name: 'Provider Compensation',
    sources: [
      { sourceName: 'ADP Workforce Now (payroll)', value: 28_400_000 },
      { sourceName: 'GL (all systems)', value: 27_900_000 },
      { sourceName: 'Management Report', value: 28_100_000 },
    ],
    variance: {
      description: 'ADP vs GL: $500K gap from bonus accruals and 1099 contractor classification',
      amount: 500_000,
      materiality: 'noteworthy',
      categories: [
        {
          label: 'Bonus accruals',
          amount: 300_000,
          drillDownItems: [
            {
              description: 'Production bonus accruals not yet posted to GL',
              amount: 300_000,
              detail:
                'Q4 provider production bonuses accrued in ADP but not yet journaled to GL — affects 6 providers across 3 sites with quarterly bonus structures',
            },
          ],
          color: '#F59E0B',
        },
        {
          label: '1099 contractor classification',
          amount: 200_000,
          drillDownItems: [
            {
              description: 'Locum tenens providers classified differently',
              amount: 200_000,
              detail:
                '3 locum tenens providers coded as contractor expense in GL but included in ADP provider compensation totals for management reporting — reclassification recommended',
            },
          ],
          color: '#8B5CF6',
        },
      ],
    },
    status: 'review',
  },
];

src/scenarios/summit-ortho/scenarios.ts

import {
  ANNOTATION_COUNTS,
  ENTITY_COUNTS,
  CONCENTRATION,
  ENTITY_NAMES,
} from './_constants';

// Re-export types from the main scenarios module
export type { ScenarioSnapshot, ScenarioName } from '../../data/scenarios';
import type { ScenarioSnapshot, ScenarioName } from '../../data/scenarios';

// ── Scenario definitions ──

const FRESH: ScenarioSnapshot = {
  annotationStore: {
    acceptedCount: ANNOTATION_COUNTS.autoAccepted,
    totalCount: ANNOTATION_COUNTS.total,
    bulkAccepted: false,
    progressPercent: ANNOTATION_COUNTS.initialProgressPercent,
    isProcessing: false,
  },
  entityStore: {
    rawCount: ENTITY_COUNTS.rawRecords,
    uniqueCount: ENTITY_COUNTS.uniqueEntities,
    mergedEntities: new Set<string>(),
    topCustomerConcentration: CONCENTRATION.before,
    mergeAnimationPhase: 'idle',
    isProcessing: false,
  },
  driftStore: {
    driftAbsorbed: false,
    reviewPublished: false,
    isProcessing: false,
  },
  processingStore: {
    activeOverlay: null,
    ingestionComplete: false,
    currentStep: 0,
  },
  navigationStore: {
    currentScreen: 'landing',
    persona: null,
    screenHistory: [],
  },
};

const SELL_SIDE_COMPLETE: ScenarioSnapshot = {
  annotationStore: {
    acceptedCount: ANNOTATION_COUNTS.autoAccepted + ANNOTATION_COUNTS.pendingHigh, // 357
    totalCount: ANNOTATION_COUNTS.total,
    bulkAccepted: true,
    progressPercent: ANNOTATION_COUNTS.postBulkAcceptPercent, // 94
    isProcessing: false,
  },
  entityStore: {
    rawCount: ENTITY_COUNTS.rawRecords,
    uniqueCount: ENTITY_COUNTS.uniqueEntities - 1, // 4639 (one entity merged)
    mergedEntities: new Set<string>([ENTITY_NAMES.PRIMARY_ID]),
    topCustomerConcentration: CONCENTRATION.after, // 34.0
    mergeAnimationPhase: 'complete',
    isProcessing: false,
  },
  driftStore: {
    driftAbsorbed: true,
    reviewPublished: false,
    isProcessing: false,
  },
  processingStore: {
    activeOverlay: null,
    ingestionComplete: true,
    currentStep: 0,
  },
  navigationStore: {
    currentScreen: 'landing',
    persona: null,
    screenHistory: [],
  },
};

const PRE_MERGE: ScenarioSnapshot = {

    acceptedCount: ANNOTATION_COUNTS.autoAccepted + ANNOTATION_COUNTS.pendingHigh, // 357
    totalCount: ANNOTATION_COUNTS.total,
    bulkAccepted: true,
    progressPercent: ANNOTATION_COUNTS.postBulkAcceptPercent, // 94
    isProcessing: false,
  },

    uniqueCount: ENTITY_COUNTS.uniqueEntities, // 4640 (no merges yet)
    mergedEntities: new Set<string>(),
    topCustomerConcentration: CONCENTRATION.before, // 22.0
    mergeAnimationPhase: 'idle',
    isProcessing: false,
  },
  driftStore: {
    driftAbsorbed: true,
    reviewPublished: false,
    isProcessing: false,
  },
  processingStore: {
    activeOverlay: null,
    ingestionComplete: true,
    currentStep: 0,
  },
  navigationStore: {
    currentScreen: 'landing',
    persona: null,
    screenHistory: [],
  },
};

const POST_CLOSE: ScenarioSnapshot = {
  ...SELL_SIDE_COMPLETE,
  navigationStore: {
    currentScreen: 'i-0',
    persona: 'hold-period',
    screenHistory: [],
  },
  integrationStore: {
    ingestionComplete: false,
    ingestionPhase: 'idle',
    systemAnnotationProgress: {},

  },
};

const AI_READY: ScenarioSnapshot = {
  ...SELL_SIDE_COMPLETE,
  navigationStore: {
    currentScreen: 'a-1',
    persona: 'hold-period',
    screenHistory: [],
  },
  integrationStore: {
    ingestionComplete: true,
    ingestionPhase: 'complete',
    systemAnnotationProgress: {},
    conflictsResolved: ['Visit', 'Provider Utilization', 'Denial'],
    kpisReconciled: ['kpi-denial-rate', 'kpi-clean-claim', 'kpi-visit-volume', 'kpi-provider-util'],
    isProcessing: false,
  },
  vcpStore: {
    onboardingComplete: true,
    onboardingPhase: 'complete',
    driftResolved: true,
    driftResolutionPhase: 'resolved',
    v3Filters: { organization: 'all', kpiStatus: 'all', entityStatus: 'all' },
    dataRoomGenerated: true,
    dataRoomPhase: 'complete',
    isProcessing: false,
  },
  aiStore: {
    queryExecuted: false,
    queryPhase: 'idle',
    a1Filters: { discrepancyType: 'all', severity: 'all', discrepanciesOnly: false },
    datasetAssembled: false,
    assemblyPhase: 'idle',
    predictionRouted: false,
    routingPhase: 'idle',
    isProcessing: false,
  },
};

export const SCENARIOS: Partial<Record<ScenarioName, ScenarioSnapshot>> = {
  fresh: FRESH,
  'sell-side-complete': SELL_SIDE_COMPLETE,
  'pre-merge': PRE_MERGE,
  'post-close': POST_CLOSE,
  'vcp-in-progress': VCP_IN_PROGRESS,
  'ai-ready': AI_READY,
} as const;
```

src/scenarios/summit-ortho/topology.ts
```
import { SYSTEM_IDS } from './_constants';

/** Display order for type lanes (top to bottom) */
export const TYPE_LANE_ORDER: string[] = ['ehr', 'rcm', 'gl', 'other'];

/** Colors per system type */
export const TYPE_COLORS: Record<string, string> = {
  ehr: '#10B981',
  rcm: '#F59E0B',
  gl: '#3B82F6',
  other: '#8B5CF6',
};

/** Human-readable labels for each lane */
export const LANE_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
  ehr: 'EHR / PM',
  rcm: 'Billing / RCM',
  gl: 'Financial / GL',
  other: 'Other',
};

/** Which legal entities (site groups) are served by which systems */
export const ENTITY_SYSTEM_MAP = [
  { entity: 'Sites 1-3 (Legacy)', systemIds: [SYSTEM_IDS.ATHENAHEALTH, SYSTEM_IDS.KAREO, SYSTEM_IDS.QUICKBOOKS_ONLINE] },
  { entity: 'Sites 4-6 (AcqA)', systemIds: [SYSTEM_IDS.ECLINICALWORKS, SYSTEM_IDS.KAREO, SYSTEM_IDS.SAGE_INTACCT] },
  { entity: 'Sites 7-9 (AcqB)', systemIds: [SYSTEM_IDS.NEXTGEN, SYSTEM_IDS.ADVANCEDMD, SYSTEM_IDS.EXCEL_GL_1] },
  { entity: 'Sites 10-12 (AcqC)', systemIds: [SYSTEM_IDS.MODERNIZING_MEDICINE, SYSTEM_IDS.WAYSTAR, SYSTEM_IDS.EXCEL_GL_2] },
  { entity: 'Corporate', systemIds: [SYSTEM_IDS.SAGE_INTACCT, SYSTEM_IDS.SALESFORCE_HEALTH_CLOUD, SYSTEM_IDS.ADP_WORKFORCE] },
] as const;

/** Get all system IDs that share at least one entity with the given system */
export function getRelatedSystemIds(systemId: string): Set<string> {
  const related = new Set<string>();
  for (const mapping of ENTITY_SYSTEM_MAP) {
    if (mapping.systemIds.includes(systemId as never)) {
      for (const id of mapping.systemIds) {
        related.add(id);
      }
    }
  }
  related.delete(systemId); // don't include self
  return related;
}
```

src/screens/__dev/ComponentHarness.tsx
```
import { formatCurrency, formatPercentage, formatDelta, formatNumber } from '../../utils/formatters';
import { ANNOTATION_COUNTS, ARR_VALUES, ENTITY_COUNTS, SCHEMA_STATS } from '../../data/_constants';

/**
 * Dev-only component harness for visual verification.
 * Renders shared components with mock props.
 * Route: /__dev (dev mode only)
 */
export default function ComponentHarness() {
  return (
    <div style={{ padding: 24, fontFamily: 'Inter, sans-serif', maxWidth: 960, margin: '0 auto' }}>
      <h1>Component Harness (dev only)</h1>

      <section style={{ marginBottom: 32 }}>
        <h2>Formatters</h2>
        <table style={{ borderCollapse: 'collapse', width: '100%' }}>
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th style={{ textAlign: 'left', padding: 8, borderBottom: '1px solid #e5e7eb' }}>Function</th>
              <th style={{ textAlign: 'left', padding: 8, borderBottom: '1px solid #e5e7eb' }}>Input</th>
              <th style={{ textAlign: 'left', padding: 8, borderBottom: '1px solid #e5e7eb' }}>Output</th>
              <th style={{ textAlign: 'left', padding: 8, borderBottom: '1px solid #e5e7eb' }}>Expected</th>
              <th style={{ textAlign: 'left', padding: 8, borderBottom: '1px solid #e5e7eb' }}>Pass</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {([
              ['formatCurrency', 203_200_000, formatCurrency(203_200_000), '$203.2M'],
              ['formatCurrency', 1_100_000, formatCurrency(1_100_000), '$1.1M'],
              ['formatCurrency', 500_000, formatCurrency(500_000), '$500K'],
              ['formatCurrency', -2_400_000, formatCurrency(-2_400_000), '-$2.4M'],
              ['formatPercentage', 7.8, formatPercentage(7.8), '7.8%'],
              ['formatPercentage', 84, formatPercentage(84), '84%'],
              ['formatDelta', 500_000, formatDelta(500_000), '+$500K'],
              ['formatDelta', -2_400_000, formatDelta(-2_400_000), '-$2.4M'],
              ['formatNumber', 47_832, formatNumber(47_832), '47,832'],
              ['formatNumber', 3_408, formatNumber(3_408), '3,408'],
            ] as [string, number, string, string][]).map(([fn, input, actual, expected], i) => (
              <tr key={i}>
                <td style={{ padding: 8 }}>{fn}</td>
                <td style={{ padding: 8, fontFamily: 'JetBrains Mono, monospace' }}>{input.toLocaleString()}</td>
                <td style={{ padding: 8, fontFamily: 'JetBrains Mono, monospace' }}>{actual}</td>
                <td style={{ padding: 8, fontFamily: 'JetBrains Mono, monospace' }}>{expected}</td>
                <td style={{ padding: 8 }}>{actual === expected ? '✅' : '❌'}</td>
              </tr>
            ))}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </section>

      <section style={{ marginBottom: 32 }}>
        <h2>Constants Spot Check</h2>
        <ul>
          <li>ANNOTATION_COUNTS.total: {ANNOTATION_COUNTS.total} (expected 342)</li>
          <li>ANNOTATION_COUNTS.autoAccepted: {ANNOTATION_COUNTS.autoAccepted} (expected 287)</li>
          <li>ARR_VALUES.crm: {formatCurrency(ARR_VALUES.crm)} (expected $203.2M)</li>
          <li>ARR_VALUES.billing: {formatCurrency(ARR_VALUES.billing)} (expected $198.7M)</li>
          <li>ENTITY_COUNTS.uniqueEntities: {formatNumber(ENTITY_COUNTS.uniqueEntities)} (expected 3,408)</li>
          <li>SCHEMA_STATS.totalTables: {SCHEMA_STATS.totalTables} (expected 127)</li>
          <li>SCHEMA_STATS.totalFields: {formatNumber(SCHEMA_STATS.totalFields)} (expected 47,832)</li>
        </ul>
      </section>

      <section>
        <h2>Components</h2>
        <p style={{ color: '#6B7280' }}>Components will be added here as they are built in Phase 2.</p>
      </section>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/screens/buy-side/B1_ImportTopology.tsx
```
import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react';

import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import ProcessingOverlay from '../../components/feedback/ProcessingOverlay';
import { TopologyGraph } from '../../components/visualization/TopologyGraph';
import { MetricCard } from '../../components/data-display/MetricCard';

import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import type { ProcessingStep } from '../../types/demo';

const IMPORT_STEPS: ProcessingStep[] = [
  { label: "Importing seller's Data Foundry package...", durationMs: 2000 },
];

export default function B1_ImportTopology() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  const hasImported = useRef(false);

  const [showOverlay, setShowOverlay] = useState(!hasImported.current);
  const [overlayDone, setOverlayDone] = useState(hasImported.current);

  const handleOverlayComplete = useCallback(() => {
    hasImported.current = true;
    setShowOverlay(false);
    setOverlayDone(true);
  }, []);

  // On revisit, skip overlay if already imported
  useEffect(() => {
    if (hasImported.current) {
      setShowOverlay(false);
      setOverlayDone(true);
    }
  }, []);

  return (
    <ScreenContainer title="Systems" subtitle={`${scenario.constants.SCHEMA_STATS.totalSystems} systems \u00B7 ${scenario.constants.SCHEMA_STATS.totalTables} tables imported`}>
      <ProcessingOverlay
        steps={IMPORT_STEPS}
        onComplete={handleOverlayComplete}
        visible={showOverlay}
      />

      {overlayDone && (
        <>
          {/* Summary metric cards */}
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-6">
            <MetricCard
              label="Annotation Coverage"
              value="94%"
              status="positive"
            />
            <MetricCard
              label="Entity Resolution"
              value="96%"
              status="positive"
            />
            <MetricCard
              label="Data Quality"
              value={scenario.buyside.dataQualityScore.overall}
              status="neutral"
            />
            <MetricCard
              label="System Count"
              value={String(scenario.constants.SCHEMA_STATS.totalSystems)}
              status="neutral"
            />
          </div>

          {/* Topology graph — read-only, no ingestion animation */}
          <div className="h-[500px] mb-6">
            <TopologyGraph systems={scenario.systems} animateIngestion={false} />
          </div>

          {/* Quality score breakdown table */}
          <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
            <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-50">
              <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700">
                Quality Score Breakdown
              </h3>
            </div>
            <table className="w-full text-sm">
              <thead>
                <tr className="border-b border-gray-100 text-left text-gray-500">
                  <th className="px-4 py-2 font-medium">Dimension</th>
                  <th className="px-4 py-2 font-medium">Grade</th>
                  <th className="px-4 py-2 font-medium">Detail</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                {scenario.buyside.dataQualityScore.dimensions.map((dim) => (
                  <tr
                    key={dim.name}
                    className="border-b border-gray-50 hover:bg-gray-50"
                  >
                    <td className="px-4 py-2 font-medium text-gray-800">
                      {dim.name}
                    </td>
                    <td
                      className="px-4 py-2 font-bold text-gray-700"
                      style={{ fontFamily: "'JetBrains Mono', monospace" }}
                    >
                      {dim.grade}
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-4 py-2 text-gray-600">{dim.detail}</td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </>
      )}
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}
```

src/screens/buy-side/B2_MetricReconstruction.tsx
```
import { useState, useCallback, useMemo } from 'react';
import type { ColumnDef } from '@tanstack/react-table';
import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import { FinancialTable } from '../../components/data-display/FinancialTable';
import DrillDownPanel from '../../components/interactive/DrillDownPanel';
import ProcessingOverlay from '../../components/feedback/ProcessingOverlay';
import LineagePopover from '../../components/interactive/LineagePopover';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { formatCurrency, formatPercentage, formatNumber, formatDelta } from '../../utils/formatters';
import { useProcessingStore } from '../../store/processingStore';
import type { ReconstructedMetric } from '../../types/buyside';
import type { ProcessingStep } from '../../types/demo';
import type { VarianceCategory, DrillDownItem } from '../../types/metric';

// ── Processing steps ──

const PROCESSING_STEPS: ProcessingStep[] = [
  { label: 'Reconstructing from source records...', durationMs: 400 },
];

// ── Helpers ──

/** Determine which formatter to use based on the metric name */
function formatMetricValue(name: string, value: number): string {
  if (name === 'Total ARR') return formatCurrency(value);
  if (name === 'Net Revenue Retention' || name === 'Gross Margin') return formatPercentage(value);
  if (name === 'Customer Count') return formatNumber(value);
  return String(value);
}

/** Format delta with appropriate units */
function formatMetricDelta(name: string, delta: number): string {
  if (name === 'Total ARR') return formatDelta(delta);
  if (name === 'Net Revenue Retention' || name === 'Gross Margin') {
    const sign = delta > 0 ? '+' : '';
    return `${sign}${delta}pp`;
  }
  if (name === 'Customer Count') {
    const sign = delta > 0 ? '+' : '';
    return `${sign}${formatNumber(delta)}`;
  }
  return String(delta);
}

// ── Materiality badge component ──

function MaterialityBadge({ level }: { level: string }) {
  const isMaterial = level === 'material';
  return (
    <span
      className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium ${
        isMaterial
          ? 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'
          : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600'
      }`}
    >
      {isMaterial ? 'Material' : 'Immaterial'}
    </span>
  );
}

// ── Main component ──

export default function B2_MetricReconstruction() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  const [showDrillDown, setShowDrillDown] = useState(false);
  const [showOverlay, setShowOverlay] = useState(false);
  const [lineageAnchor, setLineageAnchor] = useState<{ x: number; y: number } | null>(null);
  const [lineageItem, setLineageItem] = useState<DrillDownItem | null>(null);

  const { startProcessing, endProcessing } = useProcessingStore();

  const reconstructedMetrics = scenario.buyside.reconstructedMetrics;
  const varianceDecomposition = scenario.buyside.varianceDecomposition;

  /** Transform variance decomposition items into VarianceCategory[] for DrillDownPanel */
  const varianceCategories = useMemo<VarianceCategory[]>(() => {
    return varianceDecomposition.items.map((item) => ({
      label: item.description.split('—')[0].trim(),
      amount: -item.amount,
      color:
        item.materiality === 'material'
          ? '#DC2626'
          : item.materiality === 'noteworthy'
            ? '#D97706'
            : '#6B7280',
      drillDownItems: [
        {
          description: item.description,
          amount: -item.amount,
          detail: `Classification: ${item.classification} | Materiality: ${item.materiality}`,
        },
      ],
    }));
  }, [varianceDecomposition]);

  // ── Column definitions ──

  const columns = useMemo<ColumnDef<ReconstructedMetric, unknown>[]>(
    () => [
      {
        accessorKey: 'name',
        header: 'Metric',
        cell: ({ row }) => (
          <span className="font-medium text-gray-900">{row.original.name}</span>
        ),
        enableSorting: false,
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'sellerReported',
        header: 'Seller-Reported',
        cell: ({ row }) => formatMetricValue(row.original.name, row.original.sellerReported),
        enableSorting: false,
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'independent',
        header: 'Independent',
        cell: ({ row }) => formatMetricValue(row.original.name, row.original.independent),
        enableSorting: false,
      },
      {
        id: 'delta',
        header: 'Delta',
        accessorFn: (row) => row.delta,
        cell: ({ row }) => {
          const isARR = row.original.name === 'Total ARR';
          return (
            <span
              className={`${isARR ? 'underline decoration-dotted cursor-pointer text-blue-700 hover:text-blue-900' : ''}`}
            >
              {formatMetricDelta(row.original.name, row.original.delta)}
            </span>
          );
        },
        enableSorting: false,
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'materiality',
        header: 'Materiality',
        cell: ({ row }) => <MaterialityBadge level={row.original.materiality} />,
        enableSorting: false,
      },
    ],
    [],
  );

  // ── Handlers ──

  const handleCellClick = useCallback(
    (row: ReconstructedMetric, columnId: string) => {
      // Only respond to clicking the delta column on the ARR row
      if (columnId !== 'delta' || row.name !== 'Total ARR') return;

      if (showDrillDown) {
        setShowDrillDown(false);
        return;
      }

      // Show processing overlay, then reveal drill-down
      setShowOverlay(true);
      startProcessing('b2-reconstruction', 1);
    },
    [showDrillDown, startProcessing],
  );

  const handleProcessingComplete = useCallback(() => {
    setShowOverlay(false);
    endProcessing();
    setShowDrillDown(true);
  }, [endProcessing]);

  const handleLineageClick = useCallback((item: DrillDownItem) => {
    setLineageAnchor({
      x: Math.max(window.innerWidth / 2 - 200, 20),
      y: Math.max(window.innerHeight / 2 - 160, 20),
    });
    setLineageItem(item);
  }, []);

  const handleLineageClose = useCallback(() => {
    setLineageAnchor(null);
    setLineageItem(null);
  }, []);

  return (
    <ScreenContainer
      title="Metrics"
      subtitle={`${reconstructedMetrics.length} metrics reconstructed`}
    >
      <div className="space-y-6">
        {/* Summary stat chips */}
        <div className="flex gap-4">
          <div className="rounded-lg bg-red-50 border border-red-200 px-4 py-2">
            <p className="text-xs text-red-600">Material Variances</p>
            <p className="text-lg font-semibold text-red-800">
              {reconstructedMetrics.filter((m) => m.materiality === 'material').length}
            </p>
          </div>
          <div className="rounded-lg bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 px-4 py-2">
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Total Metrics Compared</p>
            <p className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900">
              {reconstructedMetrics.length}
            </p>
          </div>
          <div className="rounded-lg bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 px-4 py-2">
            <p className="text-xs text-blue-600">Largest Delta</p>
            <p className="text-lg font-semibold text-blue-800">
              {formatCurrency(Math.abs(reconstructedMetrics[0].delta))}
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Side-by-side comparison table */}
        <div>
          <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700 mb-2">
            Metric Comparison
          </h2>
          <FinancialTable
            columns={columns}
            data={reconstructedMetrics}
            onCellClick={handleCellClick}
          />
          <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-400">
            Click the ARR delta to view variance decomposition
          </p>
        </div>

        {/* Drill-down panel (visible after processing overlay) */}
        {showDrillDown && (
          <div className="rounded-lg border border-blue-100 bg-blue-50/30 p-4">
            <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-800 mb-1">
              ARR Variance Decomposition
            </h3>
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-3">
              {formatCurrency(Math.abs(varianceDecomposition.totalDelta))} total
              variance broken into contributing factors
            </p>
            <DrillDownPanel
              categories={varianceCategories}
              animated
              onLineageClick={handleLineageClick}
            />
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Processing overlay */}
      <ProcessingOverlay
        steps={PROCESSING_STEPS}
        onComplete={handleProcessingComplete}
        visible={showOverlay}
      />

      {/* Lineage popover (Level 3) */}
      {lineageAnchor && lineageItem && (
        <LineagePopover
          nodes={
            lineageItem.lineagePath ?? [
              {
                id: 'source-field',
                label: lineageItem.description,
                type: 'source-field',
              },
              {
                id: 'annotation',
                label: 'Field Annotation',
                type: 'annotation',
              },
              {
                id: 'concept',
                label: 'Revenue Concept',
                type: 'concept',
              },
              {
                id: 'metric',
                label: 'ARR Metric',
                type: 'metric',
              },
            ]
          }
          edges={[
            { source: 'source-field', target: 'annotation' },
            { source: 'annotation', target: 'concept' },
            { source: 'concept', target: 'metric' },
          ]}
          ghostNodes={[
            {
              id: 'other-paths',
              parentNodeId: 'concept',
              label: '+3 paths',
              pathCount: 3,
            },
          ]}
          anchor={lineageAnchor}
          onClose={handleLineageClose}
          onOpenFull={() => handleLineageClose()}
        />
      )}
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}
```

src/screens/buy-side/B3_RiskDashboard.tsx
```
import { useState } from 'react';
import { ChevronRight, ChevronDown } from 'lucide-react';

import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import { MetricCard } from '../../components/data-display/MetricCard';
import ConfidenceBadge from '../../components/feedback/ConfidenceBadge';
import { formatCurrency } from '../../utils/formatters';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';

export default function B3_RiskDashboard() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  const RISK_FACTORS = scenario.buyside.riskFactors;
  const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());

  const toggleExpand = (id: string) => {
    setExpanded((prev) => {
      const next = new Set(prev);
      if (next.has(id)) {
        next.delete(id);
      } else {
        next.add(id);
      }
      return next;
    });
  };

  const totalDollarExposure = RISK_FACTORS.reduce(
    (sum, r) => sum + (r.dollarImpact ?? 0),
    0,
  );
  const highConfidenceCount = RISK_FACTORS.filter(
    (r) => r.confidence === 'high',
  ).length;

  return (
    <ScreenContainer
      title="Risk"
      subtitle={`${RISK_FACTORS.length} factors \u00B7 ${highConfidenceCount} high severity`}
    >
      {/* Summary cards */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-6">
        <MetricCard
          label="Total Dollar Exposure"
          value={formatCurrency(totalDollarExposure)}
          status="negative"
        />
        <MetricCard
          label="High Confidence Risks"
          value={String(highConfidenceCount)}
          status="negative"
        />
        <MetricCard
          label="Systems Affected"
          value={String(scenario.constants.SCHEMA_STATS.totalSystems)}
          status="neutral"
        />
      </div>

      {/* Risk factor list */}
      <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="grid grid-cols-[2fr_3fr_100px_120px] gap-2 px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-50 text-sm font-medium text-gray-500">
          <span>Risk Factor</span>
          <span>Impact</span>
          <span>Confidence</span>
          <span className="text-right">Dollar Impact</span>
        </div>

        {/* Rows */}
        {RISK_FACTORS.map((risk) => {
          const isExpanded = expanded.has(risk.id);
          const isConcentration = risk.id === 'risk-concentration';

          return (
            <div
              key={risk.id}
              className={`border-b border-gray-100 last:border-b-0 ${
                isConcentration ? 'bg-red-50/40' : ''
              }`}
            >
              {/* Collapsed row */}
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={() => toggleExpand(risk.id)}
                className="w-full grid grid-cols-[2fr_3fr_100px_120px] gap-2 items-center px-4 py-3 text-left text-sm hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors"
              >
                <span className="flex items-center gap-2 font-medium text-gray-800">
                  {isExpanded ? (
                    <ChevronDown size={16} className="flex-shrink-0 text-gray-400" />
                  ) : (
                    <ChevronRight size={16} className="flex-shrink-0 text-gray-400" />
                  )}
                  {risk.name}
                </span>

                <span className="text-gray-600 truncate">{risk.impact}</span>

                <span>
                  <ConfidenceBadge level={risk.confidence} />
                </span>

                <span
                  className="text-right font-semibold text-gray-800"
                  style={{ fontFamily: "'JetBrains Mono', monospace" }}
                >
                  {risk.dollarImpact ? formatCurrency(risk.dollarImpact) : '—'}
                </span>
              </button>

              {/* Expanded detail */}
              {isExpanded && (
                <div className="px-4 pb-4 pl-10">
                  <div className="rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-gray-50 p-4 text-sm text-gray-700 leading-relaxed">
                    {risk.detail}
                  </div>

                  {/* Concentration callout */}
                  {isConcentration && (
                    <div className="mt-3 flex items-center gap-3 rounded-lg border border-red-200 bg-red-50 px-4 py-3">
                      <span className="text-sm font-medium text-red-800">
                        Concentration Shift
                      </span>
                      <span
                        className="text-lg font-bold text-red-700"
                        style={{ fontFamily: "'JetBrains Mono', monospace" }}
                      >
                        {scenario.constants.CONCENTRATION.before}%
                      </span>
                      <span className="text-red-400">&rarr;</span>
                      <span
                        className="text-lg font-bold text-red-700"
                        style={{ fontFamily: "'JetBrains Mono', monospace" }}
                      >
                        {scenario.constants.CONCENTRATION.after}%
                      </span>
                      <span className="text-xs text-red-600 ml-2">
                        Exceeds 10% PE threshold
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          );
        })}
      </div>
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}
```

src/screens/buy-side/B4_IntegrationPlanner.tsx
```
import { useState, useCallback, useMemo } from 'react';
import { CheckCircle2, Package, ArrowRightLeft } from 'lucide-react';

import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import { GanttChart } from '../../components/data-display/GanttChart';
import { MetricCard } from '../../components/data-display/MetricCard';
import ExportFileTree from '../../components/interactive/ExportFileTree';
import ProcessingOverlay from '../../components/feedback/ProcessingOverlay';

import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import type { ProcessingStep } from '../../types/demo';

const GANTT_TASKS = [
  { label: 'Entity Master', startDay: 1, endDay: 14, status: 'ready' as const },
  { label: 'Chart of Accounts', startDay: 1, endDay: 21, status: 'ready' as const },
  { label: 'Billing Migration', startDay: 30, endDay: 90, status: 'pending' as const },
  { label: 'CRM Consolidation', startDay: 14, endDay: 60, status: 'pending' as const },
];

const CARRY_FORWARD_STEPS: ProcessingStep[] = [
  { label: 'Transitioning to integration mode...', durationMs: 500 },
];

export default function B4_IntegrationPlanner() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  const INTEGRATION_TASKS = scenario.buyside.integrationTasks;
  const EXPORT_FILES = scenario.buyside.exportFiles;
  const DBT_MODELS = scenario.dbtModels;

  const [showArtifacts, setShowArtifacts] = useState(false);
  const [carryForwardDone, setCarryForwardDone] = useState(false);
  const [showCarryOverlay, setShowCarryOverlay] = useState(false);

  // Build files record from DBT_MODELS keys (matching EXPORT_FILES paths)
  const exportFiles = useMemo(() => {
    const files: Record<string, string> = {};
    for (const ef of EXPORT_FILES) {
      files[ef.path] = DBT_MODELS[ef.path] ?? '';
    }
    return files;
  }, [EXPORT_FILES, DBT_MODELS]);

  const handleCarryForwardComplete = useCallback(() => {
    setShowCarryOverlay(false);
    setCarryForwardDone(true);
  }, []);

  const day1Tasks = INTEGRATION_TASKS.filter((t) => t.targetDay === 1);
  const laterTasks = INTEGRATION_TASKS.filter((t) => t.targetDay > 1);

  return (
    <ScreenContainer
      title="Integration"
      subtitle={`${INTEGRATION_TASKS.length} tasks \u00B7 ${day1Tasks.length} Day 1 ready`}
      timeComparison={{ completedIn: '120 days', screenId: 'B4' }}
    >
      <ProcessingOverlay
        steps={CARRY_FORWARD_STEPS}
        onComplete={handleCarryForwardComplete}
        visible={showCarryOverlay}
      />

      {/* Section 1: Gantt Chart — System Consolidation Roadmap */}
      <div className="mb-6">
        <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700 mb-3">
          System Consolidation Roadmap
        </h2>
        <GanttChart tasks={GANTT_TASKS} totalDays={120} />
      </div>

      {/* Section 2: TSA Scope + Summary Metrics */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-6">
        <MetricCard
          label="Estimated TSA Scope"
          value="$2.1M"
          status="positive"
          trend="down"
        />
        <MetricCard
          label="vs. Comparable Deals"
          value="40% below"
          status="positive"
        />
        <MetricCard
          label="Consolidation Timeline"
          value="120 days"
          status="neutral"
        />
      </div>

      {/* Section 3: Day 1 Action Items */}
      <div className="mb-6">
        <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700 mb-3">
          Day 1 Action Items
        </h2>
        <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg divide-y divide-gray-100">
          {day1Tasks.map((task) => (
            <div key={task.id} className="flex items-start gap-3 px-4 py-3">
              <CheckCircle2
                className="h-5 w-5 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5 text-green-600"
              />
              <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-800">{task.description}</p>
                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-0.5">
                  Target: Day {task.targetDay} &middot;{' '}
                  <span className="text-green-600 font-medium">
                    Mappings ready
                  </span>
                </p>
              </div>
              <span className="flex-shrink-0 inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-green-50 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium text-green-700">
                Ready
              </span>
            </div>
          ))}
          {laterTasks.map((task) => (
            <div key={task.id} className="flex items-start gap-3 px-4 py-3">
              <div className="h-5 w-5 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5 rounded-full border-2 border-amber-400" />
              <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-800">{task.description}</p>
                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-0.5">
                  Target: Day {task.targetDay} &middot;{' '}
                  <span className="text-amber-600 font-medium">
                    Mappings pending
                  </span>
                </p>
              </div>
              <span className="flex-shrink-0 inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-amber-50 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium text-amber-700">
                Pending
              </span>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Section 4: Export Transformation Artifacts */}
      <div className="mb-6">
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={() => setShowArtifacts((prev) => !prev)}
          className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors"
        >
          <Package className="h-4 w-4" />
          {showArtifacts ? 'Hide' : 'Export'} Transformation Artifacts
        </button>

        {showArtifacts && (
          <div className="mt-4">
            <ExportFileTree files={exportFiles} />
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Carry-forward button / success banner */}
      <div className="mb-6">
        {carryForwardDone ? (
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-lg bg-green-50 border border-green-200 px-4 py-3">
            <CheckCircle2 className="h-5 w-5 text-green-600 flex-shrink-0" />
            <div>
              <p className="text-sm font-medium text-green-800">
                Integration workspace active
              </p>
              <p className="text-xs text-green-600 mt-0.5">
                All diligence artifacts, mappings, and reconciliation results have been carried forward.
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={() => setShowCarryOverlay(true)}
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white rounded-lg transition-colors"
            style={{ backgroundColor: '#1A56DB' }}
          >
            <ArrowRightLeft className="h-4 w-4" />
            Convert diligence workspace to integration workspace
          </button>
        )}
      </div>
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}
```

src/screens/buy-side/BuySideLayout.tsx
```
import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import { Outlet, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom';
import AppShell from '../../components/layout/AppShell';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import type { DealTimerConfig } from '../../types/demo';

import { useAnnotationStore } from '../../store/annotationStore';
import { useEntityStore } from '../../store/entityStore';
import { useDriftStore } from '../../store/driftStore';
import { useProcessingStore } from '../../store/processingStore';

export default function BuySideLayout() {
  const location = useLocation();
  const scenario = useScenario();
  const scenarioLoaded = useRef(false);

  const DEAL_TIMER: DealTimerConfig = {
    persona: 'buy-side',
    currentDay: scenario.buySideLayout.dealTimer.day,
    totalDays: scenario.buySideLayout.dealTimer.total,
    label: scenario.buySideLayout.dealTimer.label,
  };

  // Load sell-side-complete scenario on first mount
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!scenarioLoaded.current) {
      const snapshot = scenario.storeSnapshots['sell-side-complete']!;

      // Annotation store
      const annStore = useAnnotationStore.getState();
      annStore.reset();
      useAnnotationStore.setState({
        acceptedCount: snapshot.annotationStore.acceptedCount,
        totalCount: snapshot.annotationStore.totalCount,
        bulkAccepted: snapshot.annotationStore.bulkAccepted,
        progressPercent: snapshot.annotationStore.progressPercent,
        isProcessing: snapshot.annotationStore.isProcessing,
      });

      // Entity store
      const entStore = useEntityStore.getState();
      entStore.reset();
      useEntityStore.setState({
        rawCount: snapshot.entityStore.rawCount,
        uniqueCount: snapshot.entityStore.uniqueCount,
        mergedEntities: new Set(snapshot.entityStore.mergedEntities),
        topCustomerConcentration: snapshot.entityStore.topCustomerConcentration,
        mergeAnimationPhase: snapshot.entityStore.mergeAnimationPhase,
        isProcessing: snapshot.entityStore.isProcessing,
      });

      // Drift store
      useDriftStore.getState().reset();
      useDriftStore.setState({
        driftAbsorbed: snapshot.driftStore.driftAbsorbed,
        reviewPublished: snapshot.driftStore.reviewPublished,
        isProcessing: snapshot.driftStore.isProcessing,
      });

      // Processing store
      useProcessingStore.getState().reset();
      useProcessingStore.setState({
        activeOverlay: snapshot.processingStore.activeOverlay,
        ingestionComplete: snapshot.processingStore.ingestionComplete,
        currentStep: snapshot.processingStore.currentStep,
      });

      scenarioLoaded.current = true;
    }
  }, [scenario]);

  // Extract the screen number from the path (e.g., "/buy-side/2" -> "2")
  const segments = location.pathname.split('/');
  const screenSegment = segments[segments.length - 1] ?? '';
  const currentScreen = screenSegment ? `/buy-side/${screenSegment}` : '/buy-side/1';

  return (
    <AppShell
      persona="buy-side"
      dealTimer={DEAL_TIMER}
      currentScreen={currentScreen}
    >
      <Outlet />
    </AppShell>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/A0_AIProblem.tsx
```
import { useNavigate, Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { ArrowRight, Brain } from 'lucide-react';

export default function A0_AIProblem() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const scenario = useScenario();
  if (!scenario.holdPeriod) return <Navigate to="/" replace />;

  const hp = scenario.holdPeriod;
  const totalImpact = hp.predictionRouting.aggregateImpact.total;

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-900 flex flex-col items-center justify-center px-6 py-12">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="text-center mb-12">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-3 mb-4">
          <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-cyan-500/20 flex items-center justify-center">
            <Brain className="w-5 h-5 text-cyan-400" />
          </div>
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-white tracking-tight">
            Act III: Enterprise AI
          </h1>
        </div>
        <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm max-w-lg mx-auto">
          The data is unified, the KPIs are tracked, every drift event is caught. Now the board asks: <em className="text-gray-300">What's our AI strategy?</em> ${(totalImpact / 1_000_000).toFixed(1)}M annual value identified — but 80%+ of AI projects fail at the data layer.
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* AI capability summary */}
      <div className="flex gap-4 max-w-2xl w-full mb-10">
        <div className="flex-1 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-4">
          <span className="inline-block px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium mb-2 bg-cyan-500/20 text-cyan-400">
            Query
          </span>
          <p className="text-white text-sm font-medium">The Query That Breaks</p>
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">AI vs. raw data comparison</p>
        </div>
        <div className="flex-1 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-4">
          <span className="inline-block px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium mb-2 bg-cyan-500/20 text-cyan-400">
            Assemble
          </span>
          <p className="text-white text-sm font-medium">ML Feature Assembly</p>
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">{hp.trainingDataset.totalRecords.toLocaleString()} training records</p>
        </div>
        <div className="flex-1 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-4">
          <span className="inline-block px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium mb-2 bg-cyan-500/20 text-cyan-400">
            Route
          </span>
          <p className="text-white text-sm font-medium">Operational Feedback Loop</p>
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">${(totalImpact / 1_000_000).toFixed(1)}M/yr impact</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Pain Stat Cards */}
      <div className="flex gap-5 max-w-3xl w-full mb-12">
        {hp.problemScreens.ai.painStats.map((stat, i) => (
          <div key={i} className="flex-1 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-6">
            <p className={`text-3xl font-bold mb-1 ${
              i === 0 ? 'text-cyan-400' : i === 1 ? 'text-amber-400' : 'text-red-400'
            }`}>{stat.value}</p>
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">{stat.label}</p>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* CTA */}
      <button
        type="button"
        onClick={() => navigate('/hold-period/a-1')}
        className="flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-cyan-600 hover:bg-cyan-500 text-white font-medium rounded-lg transition-colors cursor-pointer"
      >
        Assess AI Readiness
        <ArrowRight className="w-4 h-4" />
      </button>
    </div>
  );
}

src/screens/hold-period/A1_QueryComparison.tsx
```
import { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useMemo } from 'react';
import { Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { Search } from 'lucide-react';

import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import ProcessingOverlay from '../../components/feedback/ProcessingOverlay';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { useAIStore } from '../../store/aiStore';
import { useHoldPeriodNavigation } from '../../hooks/useHoldPeriodNavigation';
import type { ProcessingStep } from '../../types/demo';
import ReconciliationTable from './components/ReconciliationTable';
import PayerResolutionTable from './components/PayerResolutionTable';
import { buildReconciliationRows, DISCREPANCY_STYLES } from './components/ai-reconciliation-types';

export default function A1_QueryComparison() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  const hp = scenario.holdPeriod!;
  useHoldPeriodNavigation();
  const { queryPhase, queryExecuted, runQuery, completeQuery, a1Filters, setA1Filter } =
    useAIStore();

  const [showOverlay, setShowOverlay] = useState(false);

  const broken = hp?.brokenQueryResults;
  const resolved = hp?.resolvedQueryResults;

  const resolutionSteps: ProcessingStep[] = useMemo(
    () => resolved?.resolutionSteps ?? [],
    [resolved?.resolutionSteps],
  );

  const isComplete = queryExecuted || queryPhase === 'complete';

  const rows = useMemo(() => {
    if (!broken || !resolved) return [];
    return buildReconciliationRows(broken, resolved);
  }, [broken, resolved]);

  // Summary stats from rows
  const summary = useMemo(() => {
    const counts = { critical: 0, high: 0, low: 0 };
    const typeCounts: Record<string, number> = {};
    for (const r of rows) {
      counts[r.severity]++;
      typeCounts[r.discrepancyType] = (typeCounts[r.discrepancyType] ?? 0) + 1;
    }
    const topType = Object.entries(typeCounts).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])[0];
    return { counts, topType };
  }, [rows]);

  const handleRunQuery = useCallback(() => {
    runQuery();
    setShowOverlay(true);
  }, [runQuery]);

  const handleOverlayComplete = useCallback(() => {
    setShowOverlay(false);
    completeQuery();
  }, [completeQuery]);

  // On revisit: skip to completed state (no overlay needed)
  useEffect(() => {
    // nothing to set — isComplete derived from store
  }, [isComplete]);

  if (!scenario.holdPeriod) return <Navigate to="/" replace />;

  const queryStarted = queryPhase !== 'idle' || isComplete;

  return (
    <ScreenContainer
      title="Queries"
      subtitle={`${hp.combined.entityCount} entities queried`}
      timeComparison={{ completedIn: '4 seconds', screenId: 'a-1' }}
    >
      <div className="space-y-4">
        {/* Processing overlay */}
        {showOverlay && (
          <ProcessingOverlay
            steps={resolutionSteps}
            onComplete={handleOverlayComplete}
            visible={showOverlay}
          />
        )}

        {/* Query bar */}
        <div className="rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white p-4 shadow-sm">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <Search size={18} className="text-gray-400 flex-shrink-0" />
            <div className="flex-1 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-gray-50 px-4 py-2.5 text-sm text-gray-700 font-mono">
              "Show denial patterns by payer across all entities, trailing 12 months"
            </div>
            {!queryStarted && (
              <button
                onClick={handleRunQuery}
                className="rounded-lg bg-blue-600 px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-semibold text-white shadow-sm hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors"
              >
                Run Query →
              </button>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Summary bar — visible after query execution */}
        {isComplete && (
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-2.5 text-xs text-gray-600 shadow-sm">
            <span className="font-medium text-gray-800">
              {rows.length} entities
            </span>
            <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
            <span>
              <span className="font-medium text-red-700">
                {summary.counts.critical} critical
              </span>{' '}
              ·{' '}
              <span className="font-medium text-amber-700">
                {summary.counts.high} high
              </span>{' '}
              ·{' '}
              <span className="font-medium text-gray-600">
                {summary.counts.low} low
              </span>
            </span>
            <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
            {summary.topType && (
              <span>
                Top:{' '}
                <span className="font-medium">
                  {DISCREPANCY_STYLES[summary.topType[0] as keyof typeof DISCREPANCY_STYLES]?.label ??
                    summary.topType[0]}
                </span>{' '}
                ({summary.topType[1]} entities)
              </span>
            )}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Reconciliation table */}
        {isComplete ? (
          <ReconciliationTable
            rows={rows}
            filters={a1Filters}
            onFilterChange={setA1Filter}
          />
        ) : (
          !showOverlay && (
            <div className="rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-16 text-center text-sm text-gray-400 shadow-sm">
              Run query to compare pipeline outputs.
            </div>
          )
        )}

        {/* Payer resolution — visible after query execution */}
        {isComplete && <PayerResolutionTable />}
      </div>
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/A2_FeatureAssembly.tsx
```
import { useEffect, useCallback, useMemo } from 'react';
import { Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';

import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import ProcessingOverlay from '../../components/feedback/ProcessingOverlay';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { useAIStore } from '../../store/aiStore';
import { useHoldPeriodNavigation } from '../../hooks/useHoldPeriodNavigation';
import type { ProcessingStep } from '../../types/demo';
import FeatureTable from './components/FeatureTable';
import EntityContributionTable from './components/EntityContributionTable';
import {
  buildFeatureRows,
  buildEntityContributionRows,
} from './components/ai-feature-types';

export default function A2_FeatureAssembly() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  const hp = scenario.holdPeriod!;
  useHoldPeriodNavigation();
  const { assemblyPhase, datasetAssembled, startAssembly, completeAssembly } =
    useAIStore();

  const features = hp?.mlFeatures;
  const dataset = hp?.trainingDataset;

  const isComplete = datasetAssembled || assemblyPhase === 'complete';

  const assemblySteps: ProcessingStep[] = useMemo(
    () => dataset?.assemblySteps ?? [],
    [dataset?.assemblySteps],
  );

  const handleStartAssembly = useCallback(() => {
    if (!dataset) return;
    startAssembly();
  }, [startAssembly, dataset]);

  const handleAssemblyComplete = useCallback(() => {
    completeAssembly();
  }, [completeAssembly]);

  // On revisit — nothing extra needed, isComplete is derived from store
  useEffect(() => {}, [isComplete]);

  if (!scenario.holdPeriod || !dataset || !features)
    return <Navigate to="/" replace />;

  const featureRows = buildFeatureRows(features, isComplete);
  const entityRows = buildEntityContributionRows(dataset);
  const cf = dataset.counterfactual;

  return (
    <ScreenContainer
      title="Features"
      subtitle={`${features.length} features \u00B7 Target: ${dataset.positiveLabel}`}
      timeComparison={{ completedIn: '47 seconds', screenId: 'a-2' }}
    >
      <div className="space-y-4">
        {/* Processing overlay */}
        <ProcessingOverlay
          steps={assemblySteps}
          onComplete={handleAssemblyComplete}
          visible={assemblyPhase === 'processing'}
        />

        {/* Summary bar */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-2.5 text-xs text-gray-600 shadow-sm">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <span className="font-medium text-gray-800">
              {features.length} features
            </span>
            <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
            <span>Target: {dataset.positiveLabel} (binary)</span>
            {isComplete && (
              <>
                <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
                <span className="font-medium text-gray-800">
                  {dataset.totalRecords.toLocaleString()} records
                </span>
                <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
                <span>
                  {dataset.positiveCount.toLocaleString()} {dataset.positiveLabel.toLowerCase()} (
                  {dataset.positiveRate}%)
                </span>
                <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
                <span>
                  {dataset.negativeCount.toLocaleString()} {dataset.negativeLabel.toLowerCase()}
                </span>
                <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
                <span>{dataset.perEntityContribution.length} entities</span>
                <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
                <span className="font-medium text-gray-800">
                  {dataset.crossEntityMultiplier}x cross-entity multiplier
                </span>
              </>
            )}
          </div>
          {!isComplete && assemblyPhase === 'idle' && (
            <button
              onClick={handleStartAssembly}
              className="rounded-lg bg-blue-600 px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold text-white shadow-sm hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors"
            >
              Assemble Training Dataset →
            </button>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Feature table — always visible */}
        <FeatureTable rows={featureRows} isComplete={isComplete} />

        {/* Entity contribution table — only after assembly */}
        {isComplete && <EntityContributionTable rows={entityRows} />}

        {/* Counterfactual metadata line */}
        {isComplete && (
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">
            <span className="text-gray-400">Without Data Foundry:</span>{' '}
            <span className="font-medium text-gray-700">
              {cf.pipelineCount} custom pipelines
            </span>{' '}
            |{' '}
            <span className="font-medium text-gray-700">
              {cf.definitionConflicts} definition conflicts
            </span>{' '}
            |{' '}
            <span className="font-medium text-gray-700">
              {cf.segmentVariants} segment variants
            </span>{' '}
            |{' '}
            <span className="font-medium text-gray-700">
              {cf.timelinePerEntity} months/entity
            </span>{' '}
            |{' '}
            <span className="font-medium text-gray-700">
              ${cf.estimatedCost.toLocaleString()} est. cost
            </span>{' '}
            —{' '}
            <span className="text-gray-400">With Data Foundry:</span>{' '}
            <span className="font-medium text-gray-700">47 seconds</span>
          </p>
        )}
      </div>
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/A3_FeedbackLoop.tsx
```
import { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useMemo } from 'react';
import { Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';

import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import ProcessingOverlay from '../../components/feedback/ProcessingOverlay';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { useAIStore } from '../../store/aiStore';
import { useHoldPeriodNavigation } from '../../hooks/useHoldPeriodNavigation';
import RoutingTable from './components/RoutingTable';
import ImpactTable from './components/ImpactTable';
import { buildRoutingRows, buildImpactRows } from './components/ai-routing-types';

export default function A3_FeedbackLoop() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  const hp = scenario.holdPeriod!;
  useHoldPeriodNavigation();
  const { routingPhase, predictionRouted, routePrediction, completeRouting } =
    useAIStore();

  const [showOverlay, setShowOverlay] = useState(false);

  const prediction = hp?.predictionRouting?.prediction;
  const translations = hp?.predictionRouting?.systemTranslations ?? [];
  const impact = hp?.predictionRouting?.aggregateImpact;
  const routingSteps = hp?.predictionRouting?.routingSteps ?? [];

  const isComplete = predictionRouted || routingPhase === 'complete';

  const routingRows = useMemo(
    () => buildRoutingRows(translations, isComplete),
    [translations, isComplete],
  );

  const impactRows = useMemo(
    () => (impact ? buildImpactRows(impact) : []),
    [impact],
  );

  const handleRoute = useCallback(() => {
    routePrediction();
    setShowOverlay(true);
  }, [routePrediction]);

  const handleRoutingComplete = useCallback(() => {
    setShowOverlay(false);
    completeRouting();
  }, [completeRouting]);

  // On revisit — nothing extra needed
  useEffect(() => {}, [isComplete]);

  if (!scenario.holdPeriod || !prediction) return <Navigate to="/" replace />;

  return (
    <ScreenContainer
      title="Feedback"
      subtitle={`${translations.length} system routes active`}
      timeComparison={{ completedIn: 'Real-time', screenId: 'a-3' }}
    >
      <div className="space-y-4">
        {/* Processing overlay */}
        {showOverlay && (
          <ProcessingOverlay
            steps={routingSteps}
            onComplete={handleRoutingComplete}
            visible={showOverlay}
          />
        )}

        {/* Prediction card — compact horizontal bar */}
        <div className="rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-3 shadow-sm">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-4 text-xs text-gray-600">
              {prediction.fields.map((f, i) => (
                <span key={f.label}>
                  {i > 0 && <span className="text-gray-300 mr-4">|</span>}
                  <strong className="text-gray-700">{f.label}:</strong>{' '}
                  {f.value}
                </span>
              ))}
              <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
              <span className="text-red-600 font-semibold">
                {prediction.probability}% {prediction.probabilityLabel.toLowerCase()}
              </span>
            </div>
            {!isComplete && routingPhase === 'idle' && (
              <button
                onClick={handleRoute}
                className="rounded-lg bg-blue-600 px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold text-white shadow-sm hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors flex-shrink-0"
              >
                Route to Operational Systems →
              </button>
            )}
          </div>
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-2">{prediction.reasoning}</p>
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-700 mt-1">
            <strong>Action:</strong> {prediction.recommendedAction}
          </p>
        </div>

        {/* Summary bar — visible after routing */}
        {isComplete && (
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-2.5 text-xs text-gray-600 shadow-sm">
            <span className="font-medium text-gray-800">
              {translations.length} systems routed
            </span>
            <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
            <span>
              Alert levels:{' '}
              {translations.map((t) => t.alertLevel).join(', ')}
            </span>
            <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
            <span className="font-medium text-gray-800">
              ${impact ? (impact.total / 1_000_000).toFixed(1) : 0}M annual
              impact
            </span>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Routing table — visible after routing starts or is complete */}
        {(routingPhase !== 'idle' || isComplete) && (
          <RoutingTable rows={routingRows} />
        )}

        {/* Impact table — visible after routing */}
        {isComplete && <ImpactTable rows={impactRows} />}
      </div>
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/HoldPeriodLayout.tsx
```
import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import { Outlet, useLocation, Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import AppShell from '../../components/layout/AppShell';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import type { DealTimerConfig } from '../../types/demo';
import { useAnnotationStore } from '../../store/annotationStore';
import { useEntityStore } from '../../store/entityStore';
import { useDriftStore } from '../../store/driftStore';
import { useProcessingStore } from '../../store/processingStore';
import { useIntegrationStore } from '../../store/integrationStore';
import { useVCPStore } from '../../store/vcpStore';
import { useAIStore } from '../../store/aiStore';

export default function HoldPeriodLayout() {
  const location = useLocation();
  const scenario = useScenario();
  const scenarioLoaded = useRef(false);

  // Pre-load post-close snapshot on first mount
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!scenarioLoaded.current && scenario.holdPeriod) {
      const snapshot = scenario.storeSnapshots['post-close'];
      if (snapshot) {
        // Load base stores from snapshot
        useAnnotationStore.getState().reset();
        useAnnotationStore.setState({
          acceptedCount: snapshot.annotationStore.acceptedCount,
          totalCount: snapshot.annotationStore.totalCount,
          bulkAccepted: snapshot.annotationStore.bulkAccepted,
          progressPercent: snapshot.annotationStore.progressPercent,
          isProcessing: snapshot.annotationStore.isProcessing,
        });

        useEntityStore.getState().reset();
        useEntityStore.setState({
          rawCount: snapshot.entityStore.rawCount,
          uniqueCount: snapshot.entityStore.uniqueCount,
          mergedEntities: new Set(snapshot.entityStore.mergedEntities),
          topCustomerConcentration: snapshot.entityStore.topCustomerConcentration,
          mergeAnimationPhase: snapshot.entityStore.mergeAnimationPhase,
          isProcessing: snapshot.entityStore.isProcessing,
        });

        useDriftStore.getState().reset();
        useDriftStore.setState({
          driftAbsorbed: snapshot.driftStore.driftAbsorbed,
          reviewPublished: snapshot.driftStore.reviewPublished,
          isProcessing: snapshot.driftStore.isProcessing,
        });

        useProcessingStore.getState().reset();
        useProcessingStore.setState({
          activeOverlay: snapshot.processingStore.activeOverlay,
          ingestionComplete: snapshot.processingStore.ingestionComplete,
          currentStep: snapshot.processingStore.currentStep,
        });

        // Load hold-period stores
        if (snapshot.integrationStore) {
          useIntegrationStore.getState().reset();
          useIntegrationStore.setState({ ...snapshot.integrationStore });
        }
        if (snapshot.vcpStore) {
          useVCPStore.getState().reset();
          useVCPStore.setState({ ...snapshot.vcpStore });
        }
        if (snapshot.aiStore) {
          useAIStore.getState().reset();
          useAIStore.setState({ ...snapshot.aiStore });
        }
      }
      scenarioLoaded.current = true;
    }
  }, [scenario]);

  // Guard: redirect if scenario doesn't support hold-period
  if (!scenario.holdPeriod) {
    return <Navigate to="/" replace />;
  }

  const hp = scenario.holdPeriod;

  const DEAL_TIMER: DealTimerConfig = {
    persona: 'hold-period',
    currentDay: hp.layoutConfig.dealTimer.day,
    totalDays: hp.layoutConfig.dealTimer.total,
    label: hp.layoutConfig.dealTimer.label,
  };

  const segments = location.pathname.split('/');
  const screenSegment = segments[segments.length - 1] ?? '';
  const currentScreen = screenSegment ? `/hold-period/${screenSegment}` : '/hold-period/i-1';

  return (
    <AppShell persona="hold-period" dealTimer={DEAL_TIMER} currentScreen={currentScreen}>
      <Outlet />
    </AppShell>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/I0_IntegrationProblem.tsx
```
import { useNavigate, Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { ArrowRight, Building2, GitMerge } from 'lucide-react';

export default function I0_IntegrationProblem() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const scenario = useScenario();
  if (!scenario.holdPeriod) return <Navigate to="/" replace />;

  const hp = scenario.holdPeriod;

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-900 flex flex-col items-center justify-center px-6 py-12">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="text-center mb-12">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-3 mb-4">
          <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-violet-500/20 flex items-center justify-center">
            <GitMerge className="w-5 h-5 text-violet-400" />
          </div>
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-white tracking-tight">
            Integration
          </h1>
        </div>
        <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm max-w-lg mx-auto">
          The deal has closed. {hp.acquirer.name} now owns {scenario.company.name}. But buying a company and <em className="text-gray-300">integrating</em> a company are very different things. Two organizations, {hp.combined.systemCount} systems, zero shared data layer.
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* Two-org context */}
      <div className="flex gap-6 max-w-2xl w-full mb-10">
        <div className="flex-1 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-5">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
            <Building2 className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-400" />
            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-emerald-400">Target</span>
          </div>
          <p className="text-white font-semibold">{scenario.company.name}</p>
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">
            {scenario.constants.SCHEMA_STATS.totalSystems} systems &middot; {scenario.constants.SCHEMA_STATS.totalFields.toLocaleString()} fields
          </p>
        </div>
        <div className="flex-1 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-5">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
            <Building2 className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-400" />
            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-blue-400">Acquirer</span>
          </div>
          <p className="text-white font-semibold">{hp.acquirer.name}</p>
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">
            {hp.acquirer.systemCount} systems &middot; ${Math.round(hp.acquirer.arr / 1_000_000)}M revenue
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Pain Stat Cards */}
      <div className="flex gap-5 max-w-3xl w-full mb-12">
        {hp.problemScreens.integration.painStats.map((stat, i) => (
          <div key={i} className="flex-1 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-6">
            <p className={`text-3xl font-bold mb-1 ${
              i === 0 ? 'text-violet-400' : i === 1 ? 'text-amber-400' : 'text-gray-300'
            }`}>{stat.value}</p>
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">{stat.label}</p>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* CTA */}
      <button
        type="button"
        onClick={() => navigate('/hold-period/i-1')}
        className="flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-violet-600 hover:bg-violet-500 text-white font-medium rounded-lg transition-colors cursor-pointer"
      >
        Begin Integration
        <ArrowRight className="w-4 h-4" />
      </button>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/I1_MultiEntityIngestion.tsx
```
import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react';
import { Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { Network } from 'lucide-react';

import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import ProcessingOverlay from '../../components/feedback/ProcessingOverlay';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { useIntegrationStore } from '../../store/integrationStore';
import { useHoldPeriodNavigation } from '../../hooks/useHoldPeriodNavigation';
import type { ProcessingStep } from '../../types/demo';

import { buildRows, type SystemIngestionRow } from './components/ingestion-types';
import SystemsTable from './components/SystemsTable';
import SystemDetailPanel from './components/SystemDetailPanel';
import IngestionTopology from './components/IngestionTopology';

export default function I1_MultiEntityIngestion() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  if (!scenario.holdPeriod) return <Navigate to="/" replace />;
  return <I1_Inner />;
}

function I1_Inner() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  const hp = scenario.holdPeriod!;
  useHoldPeriodNavigation();

  // Store state
  const ingestionComplete = useIntegrationStore((s) => s.ingestionComplete);
  const completeIngestion = useIntegrationStore((s) => s.completeIngestion);
  const activeView = useIntegrationStore((s) => s.i1ActiveView);
  const setActiveView = useIntegrationStore((s) => s.setI1ActiveView);
  const selectedSystem = useIntegrationStore((s) => s.i1SelectedSystem);
  const setSelectedSystem = useIntegrationStore((s) => s.setI1SelectedSystem);
  const filters = useIntegrationStore((s) => s.i1Filters);
  const setFilter = useIntegrationStore((s) => s.setI1Filter);

  // Overlay state
  const [showOverlay, setShowOverlay] = useState(!ingestionComplete);
  const [overlayDone, setOverlayDone] = useState(ingestionComplete);
  const hasAnimated = useRef(ingestionComplete);

  const acquirerName = hp.acquirer.name;
  const targetName = scenario.company.name;
  const acquirerShort = acquirerName.split(' ')[0];
  const newSystemCount = hp.combined.systemCount - scenario.constants.SCHEMA_STATS.totalSystems;
  const newTableCount = hp.combined.totalFields > 0
    ? scenario.constants.SCHEMA_STATS.totalTables
    : 0;

  const INGESTION_STEPS: ProcessingStep[] = [
    { label: `Connecting to ${newSystemCount} new systems across ${hp.combined.entityCount} entities...`, durationMs: 1500 },
    { label: `Discovering schemas... ${newTableCount} new tables found`, durationMs: 1500 },
    { label: `Annotating ${hp.combined.totalFields.toLocaleString()} new fields against existing ${acquirerShort} ontology...`, durationMs: 2000 },
  ];

  const handleOverlayComplete = useCallback(() => {
    setShowOverlay(false);
    setOverlayDone(true);
    completeIngestion();
    hasAnimated.current = true;
  }, [completeIngestion]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (ingestionComplete) {
      setShowOverlay(false);
      setOverlayDone(true);
      hasAnimated.current = true;
    }
  }, [ingestionComplete]);

  // Build joined rows
  const allRows: SystemIngestionRow[] = useMemo(
