    () => buildRows(hp.ingestionAnimationData, hp.systemMigrations),
    [hp.ingestionAnimationData, hp.systemMigrations],
  );

  // Summary stats
  const totalSystems = allRows.length;
  const totalTables = allRows.reduce((s, r) => s + r.tableCount, 0);
  const totalFields = allRows.reduce((s, r) => s + r.fieldsTotal, 0);
  const avgAutoAccept = allRows.length > 0
    ? (allRows.reduce((s, r) => s + r.autoAcceptRate, 0) / allRows.length).toFixed(1)
    : '0.0';
  const flaggedCount = allRows.filter((r) => r.isFlagged).length;

  // Selected system data for detail panel
  const selectedRow = useMemo(
    () => (selectedSystem ? allRows.find((r) => r.systemId === selectedSystem) ?? null : null),
    [allRows, selectedSystem],
  );

  // Handle topology system click: switch to systems view and select system
  const handleTopologyClick = useCallback((systemId: string) => {
    setSelectedSystem(systemId);
    setActiveView('systems');
  }, [setSelectedSystem, setActiveView]);

  return (
    <ScreenContainer
      title="Ingestion"
      subtitle={`${hp.combined.systemCount} systems \u00B7 ${hp.combined.entityCount} entities`}
      timeComparison={{ completedIn: '2 days, all entities', screenId: 'i-1' }}
    >
      <ProcessingOverlay
        steps={INGESTION_STEPS}
        onComplete={handleOverlayComplete}
        visible={showOverlay}
      />

      {overlayDone && (
        <div className="space-y-4">
          {/* Summary bar */}
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-2.5">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-xs text-gray-600">
              <Stat label="systems" value={totalSystems} />
              <Sep />
              <Stat label="tables" value={totalTables} />
              <Sep />
              <Stat label="fields" value={totalFields.toLocaleString()} />
              <Sep />
              <span>{avgAutoAccept}% auto-accepted</span>
              {flaggedCount > 0 && (
                <>
                  <Sep />
                  <span className="text-amber-700 font-medium">{flaggedCount} need attention</span>
                  <Sep />
                  <span className="text-gray-400">~3 hrs review remaining</span>
                </>
              )}
            </div>
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => setActiveView(activeView === 'topology' ? 'systems' : 'topology')}
              className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700 font-medium"
            >
              <Network size={14} />
              {activeView === 'topology' ? 'Back to systems' : 'View architecture'}
            </button>
          </div>

          {/* Main content */}
          {activeView === 'systems' ? (
            <>
              <SystemsTable
                rows={allRows}
                filters={filters}
                onFilterChange={setFilter}
                selectedSystem={selectedSystem}
                onSelectSystem={setSelectedSystem}
                acquirerName={acquirerName}
                targetName={targetName}
              />
              {selectedRow && (
                <SystemDetailPanel
                  system={selectedRow}
                  onClose={() => setSelectedSystem(null)}
                />
              )}
            </>
          ) : (
            <div className="rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white p-6 overflow-x-auto">
              <IngestionTopology
                rows={allRows}
                onSystemClick={handleTopologyClick}
                acquirerName={acquirerName}
                targetName={targetName}
              />
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}

function Stat({ label, value }: { label: string; value: string | number }) {
  return (
    <span>
      <span className="font-semibold text-gray-800">{value}</span> {label}
    </span>
  );
}

function Sep() {
  return <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>;
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/I2_SchemaHarmonization.tsx
```
import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react';
import { Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';

import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import ProcessingOverlay from '../../components/feedback/ProcessingOverlay';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { useIntegrationStore } from '../../store/integrationStore';
import { useHoldPeriodNavigation } from '../../hooks/useHoldPeriodNavigation';
import type { ProcessingStep } from '../../types/demo';

import { buildFieldMappings } from './components/harmonization-types';
import FieldMappingTable from './components/FieldMappingTable';
import MappingDetailPanel from './components/MappingDetailPanel';

export default function I2_SchemaHarmonization() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  if (!scenario.holdPeriod) return <Navigate to="/" replace />;
  return <I2_Inner />;
}

function I2_Inner() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  const hp = scenario.holdPeriod!;
  useHoldPeriodNavigation();

  // Store state
  const harmonizationComplete = useIntegrationStore((s) => s.harmonizationComplete);
  const completeHarmonization = useIntegrationStore((s) => s.completeHarmonization);
  const conflictsResolved = useIntegrationStore((s) => s.conflictsResolved);
  const resolveConflict = useIntegrationStore((s) => s.resolveConflict);
  const filters = useIntegrationStore((s) => s.i2Filters);
  const setFilter = useIntegrationStore((s) => s.setI2Filter);
  const selectedMapping = useIntegrationStore((s) => s.i2SelectedMapping);
  const setSelectedMapping = useIntegrationStore((s) => s.setI2SelectedMapping);

  // Overlay state
  const [showOverlay, setShowOverlay] = useState(!harmonizationComplete);
  const [overlayDone, setOverlayDone] = useState(harmonizationComplete);
  const hasAnimated = useRef(harmonizationComplete);

  // Resolve overlay state
  const [resolvingConflict, setResolvingConflict] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [showResolveOverlay, setShowResolveOverlay] = useState(false);

  const HARMONIZATION_STEPS: ProcessingStep[] = [
    { label: `Analyzing field definitions across ${hp.combined.systemCount} systems...`, durationMs: 1500 },
    { label: `Identifying schema conflicts... ${hp.schemaConflicts.length} conflicts detected`, durationMs: 1500 },
    { label: 'Computing confidence scores across all fields...', durationMs: 2000 },
  ];

  const RESOLVE_STEPS: ProcessingStep[] = [
    { label: 'Applying canonical definition across entities...', durationMs: 2000 },
  ];

  const handleOverlayComplete = useCallback(() => {
    setShowOverlay(false);
    setOverlayDone(true);
    completeHarmonization();
    hasAnimated.current = true;
  }, [completeHarmonization]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (harmonizationComplete) {
      setShowOverlay(false);
      setOverlayDone(true);
      hasAnimated.current = true;
    }
  }, [harmonizationComplete]);

  const handleResolve = useCallback((conceptName: string) => {
    setResolvingConflict(conceptName);
    setShowResolveOverlay(true);
  }, []);

  const handleResolveComplete = useCallback(() => {
    setShowResolveOverlay(false);
    if (resolvingConflict) {
      resolveConflict(resolvingConflict);
      setResolvingConflict(null);
    }
  }, [resolvingConflict, resolveConflict]);

  // Build rows
  const allRows = useMemo(
    () => buildFieldMappings(hp.systemMigrations, hp.ingestionAnimationData, hp.schemaConflicts),
    [hp.systemMigrations, hp.ingestionAnimationData, hp.schemaConflicts],
  );

  // Summary stats
  const totalMappings = allRows.length;
  const totalFields = allRows.reduce((s, r) => s + r.fieldCount, 0);
  const totalMapped = allRows.reduce((s, r) => s + r.fieldsMapped, 0);
  const mappedPct = totalFields > 0 ? ((totalMapped / totalFields) * 100).toFixed(1) : '0.0';
  const totalConflicts = hp.schemaConflicts.length;
  const resolvedCount = conflictsResolved.length;
  const unresolvedCount = totalConflicts - resolvedCount;
  const avgAutoAccept = allRows.length > 0
    ? (allRows.reduce((s, r) => s + r.autoAcceptRate, 0) / allRows.length).toFixed(1)
    : '0.0';

  // Selected row for detail panel
  const selectedRow = useMemo(
    () => (selectedMapping ? allRows.find((r) => r.id === selectedMapping) ?? null : null),
    [allRows, selectedMapping],
  );

  // Find conflict for selected row
  const selectedConflict = useMemo(
    () => (selectedRow?.conflictId ? hp.schemaConflicts.find((c) => c.conceptName === selectedRow.conflictId) ?? null : null),
    [selectedRow, hp.schemaConflicts],
  );

  const selectedIsResolved = selectedRow?.conflictId ? conflictsResolved.includes(selectedRow.conflictId) : false;

  return (
    <ScreenContainer
      title="Schemas"
      subtitle={`${totalConflicts} conflicts \u00B7 ${resolvedCount} resolved`}
      timeComparison={{ completedIn: '3 days', screenId: 'i-2' }}
    >
      <ProcessingOverlay
        steps={HARMONIZATION_STEPS}
        onComplete={handleOverlayComplete}
        visible={showOverlay}
      />

      <ProcessingOverlay
        steps={RESOLVE_STEPS}
        onComplete={handleResolveComplete}
        visible={showResolveOverlay}
      />

      {overlayDone && (
        <div className="space-y-4">
          {/* Summary bar */}
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-2.5">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-xs text-gray-600">
              <Stat label="mappings" value={totalMappings} />
              <Sep />
              <Stat label="fields" value={totalFields.toLocaleString()} />
              <Sep />
              <span>{mappedPct}% mapped</span>
              <Sep />
              <span>{resolvedCount}/{totalConflicts} conflicts resolved</span>
              <Sep />
              <span>{avgAutoAccept}% avg auto-accept</span>
              {unresolvedCount > 0 && (
                <>
                  <Sep />
                  <span className="text-amber-700 font-medium">{unresolvedCount} conflicts remaining</span>
                </>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Table */}
          <FieldMappingTable
            rows={allRows}
            filters={filters}
            onFilterChange={setFilter}
            selectedMapping={selectedMapping}
            onSelectMapping={setSelectedMapping}
            conflictsResolved={conflictsResolved}
            acquirerName={hp.acquirer.name}
            targetName={scenario.company.name}
          />

          {/* Detail panel */}
          {selectedRow && (
            <MappingDetailPanel
              mapping={selectedRow}
              conflict={selectedConflict}
              isResolved={selectedIsResolved}
              onResolve={handleResolve}
              onClose={() => setSelectedMapping(null)}
            />
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}

function Stat({ label, value }: { label: string; value: string | number }) {
  return (
    <span>
      <span className="font-semibold text-gray-800">{value}</span> {label}
    </span>
  );
}

function Sep() {
  return <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>;
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/I3_KPIReconciliation.tsx
```
import { useCallback, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import { Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';

import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import ProcessingOverlay from '../../components/feedback/ProcessingOverlay';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { useIntegrationStore } from '../../store/integrationStore';
import { useHoldPeriodNavigation } from '../../hooks/useHoldPeriodNavigation';
import type { ProcessingStep } from '../../types/demo';

import { buildKPISummaryRows, buildCascadeImpactRows } from './components/reconciliation-types';
import KPISummaryTable from './components/KPISummaryTable';
import CascadeImpactTable from './components/CascadeImpactTable';

export default function I3_KPIReconciliation() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  if (!scenario.holdPeriod) return <Navigate to="/" replace />;
  return <I3_Inner />;
}

function I3_Inner() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  const hp = scenario.holdPeriod!;
  useHoldPeriodNavigation();

  // Store state
  const kpisReconciled = useIntegrationStore((s) => s.kpisReconciled);
  const reconcileKpi = useIntegrationStore((s) => s.reconcileKpi);
  const cascadeFilters = useIntegrationStore((s) => s.i3CascadeFilters);
  const setCascadeFilter = useIntegrationStore((s) => s.setI3CascadeFilter);

  // Processing overlay state
  const [reconcilingKpiId, setReconcilingKpiId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [showOverlay, setShowOverlay] = useState(false);

  // Build rows
  const kpiRows = useMemo(
    () => buildKPISummaryRows(hp.kpiReconciliations),
    [hp.kpiReconciliations],
  );
  const cascadeRows = useMemo(
    () => buildCascadeImpactRows(hp.kpiReconciliations),
    [hp.kpiReconciliations],
  );

  // KPI names for cascade filter chips
  const kpiNames = useMemo(
    () => hp.kpiReconciliations.map((k) => ({ kpiId: k.kpiId, kpiName: k.kpiName })),
    [hp.kpiReconciliations],
  );

  // Summary stats
  const totalKpis = kpiRows.length;
  const reconciledCount = kpisReconciled.length;
  const totalVariants = kpiRows.reduce((s, r) => s + r.variantCount, 0);
  const totalImpact = kpiRows.reduce((s, r) => s + r.dollarImpact, 0);
  const totalImpactFormatted = totalImpact >= 1_000_000
    ? `$${(totalImpact / 1_000_000).toFixed(1)}M`
    : `$${(totalImpact / 1_000).toFixed(0)}K`;
  const totalCascade = cascadeRows.length;
  const unreconciledCount = totalKpis - reconciledCount;

  // Reconcile handler
  const handleReconcile = useCallback((kpiId: string) => {
    setReconcilingKpiId(kpiId);
    setShowOverlay(true);
  }, []);

  const handleOverlayComplete = useCallback(() => {
    setShowOverlay(false);
    if (reconcilingKpiId) {
      reconcileKpi(reconcilingKpiId);
      setReconcilingKpiId(null);
    }
  }, [reconcilingKpiId, reconcileKpi]);

  // Dynamic processing step label — useMemo for stable reference
  const reconcilingKpiName = reconcilingKpiId
    ? hp.kpiReconciliations.find((k) => k.kpiId === reconcilingKpiId)?.kpiName ?? ''
    : '';
  const RECONCILE_STEPS = useMemo<ProcessingStep[]>(() => [
    { label: `Reconciling ${reconcilingKpiName} across 14 entities...`, durationMs: 2000 },
  ], [reconcilingKpiName]);

  return (
    <ScreenContainer
      title="KPIs"
      subtitle={`${hp.kpiReconciliations.length} metrics \u00B7 ${hp.combined.entityCount} entities`}
      timeComparison={{ completedIn: '1 day', screenId: 'i-3' }}
    >
      <ProcessingOverlay
        steps={RECONCILE_STEPS}
        onComplete={handleOverlayComplete}
        visible={showOverlay}
      />

      <div className="space-y-4">
        {/* Summary bar */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-2.5">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-xs text-gray-600">
            <Stat label="KPIs" value={totalKpis} />
            <Sep />
            <Stat label="variants" value={totalVariants} />
            <Sep />
            <span>{reconciledCount}/{totalKpis} reconciled</span>
            <Sep />
            <span>{totalImpactFormatted} total impact</span>
            <Sep />
            <Stat label="cascade items" value={totalCascade} />
            {unreconciledCount > 0 && (
              <>
                <Sep />
                <span className="text-amber-700 font-medium">{unreconciledCount} KPIs remaining</span>
              </>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* KPI Summary Table */}
        <KPISummaryTable
          rows={kpiRows}
          kpisReconciled={kpisReconciled}
          onReconcile={handleReconcile}
        />

        {/* Cascade Impact Table */}
        <CascadeImpactTable
          rows={cascadeRows}
          kpisReconciled={kpisReconciled}
          filters={cascadeFilters}
          onFilterChange={setCascadeFilter}
          kpiNames={kpiNames}
        />
      </div>
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}

function Stat({ label, value }: { label: string; value: string | number }) {
  return (
    <span>
      <span className="font-semibold text-gray-800">{value}</span> {label}
    </span>
  );
}

function Sep() {
  return <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>;
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/V0_VCPProblem.tsx
```
import { useNavigate, Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { ArrowRight, TrendingUp } from 'lucide-react';

export default function V0_VCPProblem() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const scenario = useScenario();
  if (!scenario.holdPeriod) return <Navigate to="/" replace />;

  const hp = scenario.holdPeriod;

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-900 flex flex-col items-center justify-center px-6 py-12">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="text-center mb-12">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-3 mb-4">
          <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-amber-500/20 flex items-center justify-center">
            <TrendingUp className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-400" />
          </div>
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-white tracking-tight">
            Act II: Value Creation
          </h1>
        </div>
        <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm max-w-lg mx-auto">
          {hp.combined.entityCount} entities. {hp.combined.systemCount} systems. All unified. But the platform doesn't stop acquiring — and the systems don't stop changing. Board expects ${Math.round(hp.ebitdaBridge.filter(b => b.type === 'add').reduce((s, b) => s + b.value, 0) / 1_000_000)}M in EBITDA improvement. No tracking infrastructure exists.
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* Context pills */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-3 mb-10">
        <span className="px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-white/10 text-gray-300 text-sm">
          {hp.kpis.length} KPIs
        </span>
        <span className="px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-white/10 text-gray-300 text-sm">
          {hp.combined.entityCount + 1} Entities
        </span>
        <span className="px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-white/10 text-gray-300 text-sm">
          ${Math.round(hp.combined.combinedRevenue / 1_000_000)}M Combined Revenue
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* Pain Stat Cards */}
      <div className="flex gap-5 max-w-3xl w-full mb-12">
        {hp.problemScreens.vcp.painStats.map((stat, i) => (
          <div key={i} className="flex-1 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-6">
            <p className={`text-3xl font-bold mb-1 ${
              i === 0 ? 'text-amber-400' : i === 1 ? 'text-red-400' : 'text-gray-300'
            }`}>{stat.value}</p>
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">{stat.label}</p>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* CTA */}
      <button
        type="button"
        onClick={() => navigate('/hold-period/v-1')}
        className="flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-amber-600 hover:bg-amber-500 text-white font-medium rounded-lg transition-colors cursor-pointer"
      >
        Build Value Creation Plan
        <ArrowRight className="w-4 h-4" />
      </button>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/V1_TuckInOnboarding.tsx
```
import { useMemo, type ReactNode } from 'react';
import { Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';

import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import ProcessingOverlay from '../../components/feedback/ProcessingOverlay';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { useVCPStore } from '../../store/vcpStore';
import { useHoldPeriodNavigation } from '../../hooks/useHoldPeriodNavigation';
import { buildKPIMappingRows } from './components/onboarding-types';
import KPIMappingTable from './components/KPIMappingTable';
import EntityMatchPanel from './components/EntityMatchPanel';

export default function V1_TuckInOnboarding() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  useHoldPeriodNavigation();
  const { onboardingComplete, onboardingPhase, startOnboarding, completeOnboarding } =
    useVCPStore();

  if (!scenario.holdPeriod) return <Navigate to="/" replace />;

  const hp = scenario.holdPeriod;
  const tuck = hp.tuckInEntity;
  const kpis = hp.kpis;

  const showResults = onboardingComplete || onboardingPhase === 'complete';
  const showOverlay = onboardingPhase === 'processing';

  const rows = useMemo(
    () => buildKPIMappingRows(tuck.kpiMappings, kpis, showResults),
    [tuck.kpiMappings, kpis, showResults],
  );

  const autoMappedCount = tuck.kpiMappings.filter((m) => m.status === 'auto-mapped').length;
  const totalKpis = kpis.length;

  return (
    <ScreenContainer
      title="Onboarding"
      subtitle={`${tuck.name} \u00B7 ${tuck.kpiMappings.length} KPI mappings`}
      timeComparison={{ completedIn: '6 seconds', screenId: 'v-1' }}
    >
      <ProcessingOverlay
        steps={tuck.processingSteps}
        visible={showOverlay}
        onComplete={completeOnboarding}
      />

      <div className="flex flex-col gap-4 h-full">
        {/* Summary bar */}
        <SummaryBar>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-800">{tuck.name}</span>
            <Sep />
            <Stat label="sites" value={tuck.sites} />
            <Sep />
            <Stat label="systems" value={tuck.systems.length} />
            <Sep />
            <Stat label="fields" value={tuck.fields.toLocaleString()} />
            {showResults && (
              <>
                <Sep />
                <Stat label={`/${totalKpis} KPIs mapped`} value={autoMappedCount} />
                <Sep />
                <Stat label="auto-accept" value={`${tuck.annotationResults.autoAcceptRate}%`} />
              </>
            )}
          </div>
          {!showResults && (
            <button
              onClick={startOnboarding}
              className="flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg bg-indigo-600 px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-white hover:bg-indigo-700 transition-colors"
            >
              Onboard to Platform
            </button>
          )}
        </SummaryBar>

        {/* Entity info bar */}
        <div className="flex items-center gap-4 text-xs text-gray-500 px-1">
          <span>
            Systems: <span className="text-gray-700 font-medium">{tuck.systems.map((s) => s.name).join(', ')}</span>
          </span>
          <Sep />
          <span>
            Tables: <span className="text-gray-700 font-medium">{tuck.tables}</span>
          </span>
          <Sep />
          <span>
            Fields: <span className="text-gray-700 font-medium">{tuck.fields.toLocaleString()}</span>
          </span>
        </div>

        {/* KPI Mapping Table */}
        <KPIMappingTable rows={rows} onboardingComplete={showResults} />

        {/* Entity Match Panel (post-onboarding only) */}
        {showResults && <EntityMatchPanel matches={tuck.entityMatches} />}
      </div>
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}

// ── Inline summary bar components ──

function SummaryBar({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) {
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center justify-between rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-2.5">
      {children}
    </div>
  );
}

function Stat({ label, value }: { label: string; value: string | number }) {
  return (
    <span className="text-xs text-gray-600">
      <span className="font-semibold text-gray-800">{value}</span> {label}
    </span>
  );
}

function Sep() {
  return <span className="text-gray-300 text-xs">|</span>;
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/V2_DriftDetection.tsx
```
import { useMemo, useState, type ReactNode } from 'react';
import { Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';

import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import ProcessingOverlay from '../../components/feedback/ProcessingOverlay';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { useVCPStore } from '../../store/vcpStore';
import { useHoldPeriodNavigation } from '../../hooks/useHoldPeriodNavigation';
import { buildDriftEventRows } from './components/drift-types';
import DriftEventTable from './components/DriftEventTable';
import DriftDetailPanel from './components/DriftDetailPanel';
import type { ProcessingStep } from '../../types/demo';

const RESOLUTION_STEPS: ProcessingStep[] = [
  { label: 'Updating annotations for 3 entities...', durationMs: 1500 },
  { label: 'Recalculating Denial Rate...', durationMs: 1500 },
  { label: 'Regenerating affected exhibits...', durationMs: 1000 },
];

export default function V2_DriftDetection() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  useHoldPeriodNavigation();
  const { driftResolved, driftResolutionPhase, startDriftResolution, completeDriftResolution } =
    useVCPStore();

  if (!scenario.holdPeriod) return <Navigate to="/" replace />;

  const hp = scenario.holdPeriod;
  const drift = hp.kpiDriftEvent;

  const resolved = driftResolved || driftResolutionPhase === 'resolved';
  const showOverlay = driftResolutionPhase === 'processing';

  const [selectedRowId, setSelectedRowId] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const rows = useMemo(() => buildDriftEventRows(drift, resolved), [drift, resolved]);

  const selectedRow = useMemo(
    () => rows.find((r) => r.id === selectedRowId) ?? null,
    [rows, selectedRowId],
  );

  const affectedKpiCount = useMemo(
    () => drift.kpiImpacts.filter((i) => i.severity !== 'none').length,
    [drift.kpiImpacts],
  );

  return (
    <ScreenContainer
      title="Drift"
      subtitle={`${drift.schemaDiff.length} schema changes \u00B7 ${affectedKpiCount} KPIs affected`}
      timeComparison={{ completedIn: '2 hours', screenId: 'v-2' }}
    >
      <ProcessingOverlay
        steps={RESOLUTION_STEPS}
        visible={showOverlay}
        onComplete={completeDriftResolution}
      />

      <div className="flex flex-col gap-4 h-full">
        {/* Summary bar */}
        <SummaryBar>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <Stat label="drift event" value={1} />
            <Sep />
            <Stat label="schema changes" value={drift.schemaDiff.length} />
            <Sep />
            <Stat label="KPIs affected" value={affectedKpiCount} />
            <Sep />
            <span className="text-xs text-gray-600">
              Status:{' '}
              <span className={`inline-flex rounded-full border px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium ${
                resolved
                  ? 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200'
                  : 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border-amber-200'
              }`}>
                {resolved ? 'Resolved' : 'Awaiting resolution'}
              </span>
            </span>
          </div>
        </SummaryBar>

        {/* Drift event table */}
        <DriftEventTable
          rows={rows}
          selectedRowId={selectedRowId}
          onSelectRow={setSelectedRowId}
        />

        {/* Detail panel */}
        {selectedRow && (
          <DriftDetailPanel
            row={selectedRow}
            drift={drift}
            resolved={resolved}
            onResolve={startDriftResolution}
            onClose={() => setSelectedRowId(null)}
          />
        )}
      </div>
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}

// ── Inline summary bar components ──

function SummaryBar({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) {
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center justify-between rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-2.5">
      {children}
    </div>
  );
}

function Stat({ label, value }: { label: string; value: string | number }) {
  return (
    <span className="text-xs text-gray-600">
      <span className="font-semibold text-gray-800">{value}</span> {label}
    </span>
  );
}

function Sep() {
  return <span className="text-gray-300 text-xs">|</span>;
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/V3_PortfolioView.tsx
```
import { useMemo, useState, type ReactNode } from 'react';
import { Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';

import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { useHoldPeriodNavigation } from '../../hooks/useHoldPeriodNavigation';
import { useVCPStore } from '../../store/vcpStore';
import { buildPortfolioRows, filterPortfolioRows } from './components/portfolio-types';
import type { V3Filters } from './components/portfolio-types';
import PortfolioHeatmapTable from './components/PortfolioHeatmapTable';
import EntityDetailPanel from './components/EntityDetailPanel';

export default function V3_PortfolioView() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  useHoldPeriodNavigation();

  if (!scenario.holdPeriod) return <Navigate to="/" replace />;

  const hp = scenario.holdPeriod;
  const v3Filters = useVCPStore((s) => s.v3Filters);
  const setV3Filter = useVCPStore((s) => s.setV3Filter);

  const [selectedEntityId, setSelectedEntityId] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const allRows = useMemo(
    () => buildPortfolioRows(hp.portfolioHeatmap, hp.kpis, hp.entityOrgMap),
    [hp.portfolioHeatmap, hp.kpis, hp.entityOrgMap],
  );

  const filteredRows = useMemo(
    () => filterPortfolioRows(allRows, v3Filters),
    [allRows, v3Filters],
  );

  const selectedEntity = useMemo(
    () => filteredRows.find((r) => r.entityId === selectedEntityId) ?? null,
    [filteredRows, selectedEntityId],
  );

  // Derive KPI columns from heatmap data (preserving order)
  const kpiColumns = useMemo(() => {
    const seen = new Set<string>();
    const cols: { id: string; name: string }[] = [];
    for (const cell of hp.portfolioHeatmap) {
      if (!seen.has(cell.kpiId)) {
        seen.add(cell.kpiId);
        cols.push({ id: cell.kpiId, name: cell.kpiName });
      }
    }
    return cols;
  }, [hp.portfolioHeatmap]);

  // Summary stats
  const onTargetCount = useMemo(
    () => allRows.filter((r) => Object.values(r.kpiValues).every((v) => v.status === 'green')).length,
    [allRows],
  );
  const belowTargetCount = allRows.length - onTargetCount;
  const driftResolvedCount = useMemo(
    () => allRows.filter((r) => r.status === 'drift-resolved').length,
    [allRows],
  );

  // Build dynamic org labels for filters and group headers from entityOrgMap
  const { orgLabels, orgFullNames } = useMemo(() => {
    const uniqueOrgs = Array.from(new Set(Object.values(hp.entityOrgMap)));
    const targetShort = scenario.company.name.split(' ')[0];
    const acquirerShort = hp.acquirer.name.split(' ')[0];

    // Map short org names to full names and tags
    const fullNames: Record<string, { fullName: string; tag: string }> = {};
    const labels: { value: string; label: string }[] = [];

    for (const org of uniqueOrgs) {
      const slug = org.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '-');
      labels.push({ value: slug, label: org });

      // Determine tag (acquirer, target, or tuck-in)
      let tag = 'entity';
      if (org === targetShort || org.toLowerCase().includes(scenario.company.name.toLowerCase().split(' ')[0].toLowerCase())) {
        tag = 'target';
      } else if (org === acquirerShort || org.toLowerCase().includes(hp.acquirer.name.toLowerCase().split(' ')[0].toLowerCase())) {
        tag = 'acquirer';
      } else {
        tag = 'tuck-in';
      }
      fullNames[org] = { fullName: org, tag };
    }

    return { orgLabels: labels, orgFullNames: fullNames };
  }, [hp.entityOrgMap, hp.acquirer.name, scenario.company.name]);

  return (
    <ScreenContainer
      title="Portfolio"
      subtitle={`${hp.combined.entityCount} entities \u00B7 ${hp.kpis.length} KPIs`}
      timeComparison={{ completedIn: '5 seconds', screenId: 'v-3' }}
    >
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-4 h-full">
        {/* Summary bar */}
        <SummaryBar>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <Stat label="entities" value={allRows.length} />
            <Sep />
            <Stat label="KPIs" value={kpiColumns.length} />
            <Sep />
            <Stat label="on target" value={onTargetCount} />
            <Sep />
            <Stat label="below target" value={belowTargetCount} />
            <Sep />
            <Stat label="drift event resolved" value={driftResolvedCount} />
          </div>
        </SummaryBar>

        {/* Heatmap table */}
        <PortfolioHeatmapTable
          rows={filteredRows}
          kpiColumns={kpiColumns}
          filters={v3Filters}
          onFilterChange={setV3Filter as (key: keyof V3Filters, value: string) => void}
          selectedEntityId={selectedEntityId}
          onSelectEntity={setSelectedEntityId}
          orgLabels={orgLabels}
          orgFullNames={orgFullNames}
        />

        {/* Detail panel */}
        {selectedEntity && (
          <EntityDetailPanel
            entity={selectedEntity}
            kpis={hp.kpis}
            onClose={() => setSelectedEntityId(null)}
          />
        )}
      </div>
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}

// ── Inline summary bar components ──

function SummaryBar({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) {
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center justify-between rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-2.5">
      {children}
    </div>
  );
}

function Stat({ label, value }: { label: string; value: string | number }) {
  return (
    <span className="text-xs text-gray-600">
      <span className="font-semibold text-gray-800">{value}</span> {label}
    </span>
  );
}

function Sep() {
  return <span className="text-gray-300 text-xs">|</span>;
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/V4_DataRoomGeneration.tsx
```
import { useMemo, type ReactNode } from 'react';
import { Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';

import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import ProcessingOverlay from '../../components/feedback/ProcessingOverlay';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { useVCPStore } from '../../store/vcpStore';
import { useHoldPeriodNavigation } from '../../hooks/useHoldPeriodNavigation';
import { buildExhibitRows } from './components/exhibit-types';
import ExhibitTable from './components/ExhibitTable';

export default function V4_DataRoomGeneration() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  useHoldPeriodNavigation();
  const { dataRoomGenerated, dataRoomPhase, startDataRoomGeneration, completeDataRoomGeneration } =
    useVCPStore();

  if (!scenario.holdPeriod) return <Navigate to="/" replace />;

  const hp = scenario.holdPeriod;
  const config = hp.dataRoomConfig;
  const exhibits = hp.dataRoomExhibits;

  const generated = dataRoomGenerated || dataRoomPhase === 'complete';
  const showOverlay = dataRoomPhase === 'processing';

  const rows = useMemo(
    () => buildExhibitRows(exhibits, config, generated),
    [exhibits, config, generated],
  );

  const readyCount = rows.filter((r) => r.status === 'ready').length;

  return (
    <ScreenContainer
      title="Data Room"
      subtitle={`${rows.length} exhibits \u00B7 ${readyCount} ready`}
      timeComparison={{ completedIn: '47 seconds', screenId: 'v-4' }}
    >
      <ProcessingOverlay
        steps={config.processingSteps}
        visible={showOverlay}
        onComplete={completeDataRoomGeneration}
      />

      <div className="flex flex-col gap-4 h-full">
        {/* Summary bar */}
        <SummaryBar>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <Stat label="exhibits" value={config.exhibitCount} />
            <Sep />
            <Stat label="entities" value={config.entityScope.length} />
            <Sep />
            <Stat label="months" value={config.timeRangeMonths} />
            {generated && (
              <>
                <Sep />
                <span className="inline-flex rounded-full border px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200">
                  All exhibits ready
                </span>
              </>
            )}
            {!generated && readyCount > 0 && (
              <>
                <Sep />
                <span className="text-xs text-gray-600">
                  <span className="font-semibold text-gray-800">{readyCount}</span>/{config.exhibitCount} ready
                </span>
              </>
            )}
          </div>
          {!generated && (
            <button
              onClick={startDataRoomGeneration}
              className="flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg bg-indigo-600 px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-white hover:bg-indigo-700 transition-colors"
            >
              Generate Data Room
            </button>
          )}
        </SummaryBar>

        {/* Exhibit Table */}
        <ExhibitTable
          rows={rows}
          exhibits={exhibits}
          enrichedPreviewData={hp.exhibitPreviewData}
        />
      </div>
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}

// ── Inline summary bar components ──

function SummaryBar({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) {
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center justify-between rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-2.5">
      {children}
    </div>
  );
}

function Stat({ label, value }: { label: string; value: string | number }) {
  return (
    <span className="text-xs text-gray-600">
      <span className="font-semibold text-gray-800">{value}</span> {label}
    </span>
  );
}

function Sep() {
  return <span className="text-gray-300 text-xs">|</span>;
}
```

src/screens/nav-migration/N1_CompanyInventory.tsx
```
import { useState, useMemo } from 'react';
import { Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { useNavMigrationStore } from '../../store/navMigrationStore';
import ProcessingOverlay from '../../components/feedback/ProcessingOverlay';
import CounterAnimation from '../../components/feedback/CounterAnimation';
import ToggleTabs from '../../components/interactive/ToggleTabs';
import type { NAVTable } from '../../scenarios/nav-migration/types';
import { X } from 'lucide-react';

const CLASSIFICATION_COLORS: Record<string, string> = {
  'standard-w1': '',
  'rental-extension': 'bg-violet-50',
  custom: 'bg-amber-50',
  shared: 'bg-blue-50',
};

const CLASSIFICATION_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
  'standard-w1': 'Standard W1',
  'rental-extension': 'Rental Extension',
  custom: 'Custom',
  shared: 'Shared',
};

export default function N1_CompanyInventory() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  const { discoveryComplete, completeDiscovery } = useNavMigrationStore();
  const [activeView, setActiveView] = useState('inventory');
  const [companyFilter, setCompanyFilter] = useState('all');
  const [classFilter, setClassFilter] = useState('all');
  const [selectedTable, setSelectedTable] = useState<NAVTable | null>(null);

  const nav = scenario.navMigration;

  const filteredTables = useMemo(() => {
    if (!nav) return [];
    let tables = nav.tables;
    if (companyFilter !== 'all') {
      tables = tables.filter((t) => t.companyId === companyFilter);
    }
    if (classFilter !== 'all') {
      tables = tables.filter((t) => t.classification === classFilter);
    }
    return tables;
  }, [nav, companyFilter, classFilter]);

  if (!nav) return <Navigate to="/" replace />;

  const counters = nav.counters.inventory;

  const detail = selectedTable ? nav.tableDetails[selectedTable.logicalName] : null;

  return (
    <ScreenContainer title="Company & Table Inventory" subtitle="NAV 2018 Database Discovery">
      <ProcessingOverlay
        steps={[
          { label: 'Connecting to NAV SQL Server...', durationMs: 1500 },
          { label: 'Enumerating companies and resolving <Company>$<Table> physical tables...', durationMs: 2000 },
          { label: 'Classifying standard W1 vs. non-standard objects...', durationMs: 1500 },
        ]}
        onComplete={completeDiscovery}
        visible={!discoveryComplete}
      />

      {/* Counter row */}
      <div className="flex gap-6 mb-6">
        {[
          { label: 'Companies', value: counters.companies },
          { label: 'Physical Tables', value: counters.tables },
          { label: 'Fields', value: counters.fields },
          { label: 'Non-Standard Objects', value: counters.nonStandard },
        ].map((c) => (
          <div key={c.label} className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 px-5 py-4 flex-1">
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">{c.label}</p>
            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900" style={{ fontFamily: "'JetBrains Mono', monospace" }}>
              <CounterAnimation value={c.value} enabled={discoveryComplete} />
            </p>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* View toggle */}
      <div className="mb-4">
        <ToggleTabs
          tabs={[
            { id: 'inventory', label: 'Table Inventory' },
            { id: 'topology', label: 'Topology' },
          ]}
          activeTab={activeView}
          onChange={setActiveView}
        />
      </div>

      {activeView === 'inventory' ? (
        <div className="flex gap-4">
          {/* Main table area */}
          <div className={`flex-1 ${selectedTable ? 'w-2/3' : 'w-full'}`}>
            {/* Filters */}
            <div className="flex gap-3 mb-4">
              <select
                value={companyFilter}
                onChange={(e) => setCompanyFilter(e.target.value)}
                className="text-sm border border-gray-200 rounded-md px-3 py-1.5 bg-white"
              >
                <option value="all">All Companies</option>
                {nav.companies.map((c) => (
                  <option key={c.id} value={c.id}>{c.name}</option>
                ))}
                <option value="shared">Shared Tables</option>
              </select>
              <select
                value={classFilter}
                onChange={(e) => setClassFilter(e.target.value)}
                className="text-sm border border-gray-200 rounded-md px-3 py-1.5 bg-white"
              >
                <option value="all">All Classifications</option>
                <option value="standard-w1">Standard W1</option>
                <option value="rental-extension">Rental Extension</option>
                <option value="custom">Custom</option>
                <option value="shared">Shared</option>
              </select>
              <span className="text-sm text-gray-400 self-center ml-2">
                {filteredTables.length} tables
              </span>
            </div>

            <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 overflow-hidden">
              <div className="max-h-[500px] overflow-y-auto">
                <table className="w-full text-sm">
                  <thead className="bg-gray-50 sticky top-0">
                    <tr>
                      <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Logical Table</th>
                      <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Physical Name</th>
                      <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Company</th>
                      <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Module</th>
                      <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Classification</th>
                      <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Fields</th>
                      <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Risk Flags</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    {filteredTables.slice(0, 100).map((table, i) => {
                      const bgClass = CLASSIFICATION_COLORS[table.classification] ?? '';
                      const companyName = table.companyId === 'shared' ? 'Shared' : (nav.companies.find((c) => c.id === table.companyId)?.name ?? table.companyId);
                      return (
                        <tr
                          key={`${table.physicalName}-${i}`}
                          className={`border-t border-gray-100 cursor-pointer hover:bg-blue-50/50 ${bgClass} ${selectedTable?.physicalName === table.physicalName ? 'ring-2 ring-blue-300 ring-inset' : ''}`}
                          onClick={() => setSelectedTable(table)}
                        >
                          <td className="px-3 py-2 font-medium text-gray-900">{table.logicalName}</td>
                          <td className="px-3 py-2 text-gray-500 font-mono text-xs">{table.physicalName}</td>
                          <td className="px-3 py-2 text-gray-600">{companyName}</td>
                          <td className="px-3 py-2 text-gray-600">{table.module}</td>
                          <td className="px-3 py-2">
                            <span className={`text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded ${
                              table.classification === 'rental-extension' ? 'bg-violet-100 text-violet-700' :
                              table.classification === 'custom' ? 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700' :
                              table.classification === 'shared' ? 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700' :
                              'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600'
                            }`}>
                              {CLASSIFICATION_LABELS[table.classification]}
                            </span>
                          </td>
                          <td className="px-3 py-2 text-gray-600 font-mono">{table.fieldCount}</td>
                          <td className="px-3 py-2">
                            {table.riskFlags.length > 0 ? (
                              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1">
                                {table.riskFlags.map((f) => (
                                  <span key={f} className="text-xs px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded bg-red-50 text-red-600">{f}</span>
                                ))}
                              </div>
                            ) : (
                              <span className="text-gray-300">—</span>
                            )}
                          </td>
                        </tr>
                      );
                    })}
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Detail panel */}
          {selectedTable && (
            <div className="w-80 bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-4 sticky top-0 self-start">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
                <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900">{selectedTable.logicalName}</h3>
                <button type="button" onClick={() => setSelectedTable(null)} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600">
                  <X size={16} />
                </button>
              </div>
              <p className="text-xs font-mono text-gray-500 mb-3">{selectedTable.physicalName}</p>
              <span className={`text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded mb-4 inline-block ${
                selectedTable.classification === 'rental-extension' ? 'bg-violet-100 text-violet-700' :
                selectedTable.classification === 'custom' ? 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700' :
                selectedTable.classification === 'shared' ? 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700' :
                'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600'
              }`}>
                {CLASSIFICATION_LABELS[selectedTable.classification]}
              </span>

              {detail ? (
                <>
                  <h4 className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase mt-4 mb-2">Fields ({detail.fields.length})</h4>
                  <div className="max-h-40 overflow-y-auto border border-gray-100 rounded text-xs">
                    {detail.fields.map((f) => (
                      <div key={f.name} className="flex justify-between px-2 py-1 border-b border-gray-50">
                        <span className="text-gray-700">{f.name}</span>
                        <span className="text-gray-400">{f.type}</span>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>

                  {detail.relationships.length > 0 && (
                    <>
                      <h4 className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase mt-4 mb-2">Relationships</h4>
                      {detail.relationships.map((r) => (
                        <div key={r.targetTable} className="text-xs mb-1.5">
                          <span className="text-gray-700">→ {r.targetTable}</span>
                          <span className="text-gray-400 ml-1">({r.joinKey})</span>
                          {r.type === 'polymorphic' && (
                            <span className="ml-1 text-red-500 font-medium">Polymorphic</span>
                          )}
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </>
                  )}

                  {detail.riskFlagExplanations.length > 0 && (
                    <>
                      <h4 className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase mt-4 mb-2">Risk Flags</h4>
                      {detail.riskFlagExplanations.map((r) => (
                        <div key={r.flag} className="text-xs bg-red-50 rounded p-2 mb-1.5">
                          <span className="font-medium text-red-700">{r.flag}:</span>
                          <span className="text-red-600 ml-1">{r.explanation}</span>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </>
                  )}
                </>
              ) : (
                <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-4">{selectedTable.fieldCount} fields &middot; {selectedTable.module}</p>
              )}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      ) : (
        /* Topology placeholder */
        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-12 flex items-center justify-center">
          <div className="text-center text-gray-400">
            <p className="text-lg mb-2">Topology View</p>
            <p className="text-sm">4 NAV companies → Module clusters → Shared tables</p>
            <p className="text-xs mt-4 text-gray-300">ReactFlow visualization — implementation pending</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}
```

src/screens/nav-migration/N2_RiskHeatmap.tsx
```
import { useState } from 'react';
import { Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { ChevronDown, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { useNavMigrationStore } from '../../store/navMigrationStore';
import ProcessingOverlay from '../../components/feedback/ProcessingOverlay';
import { MetricCard } from '../../components/data-display/MetricCard';
import ToggleTabs from '../../components/interactive/ToggleTabs';
import ProgressBar from '../../components/feedback/ProgressBar';
import BulkAcceptButton from '../../components/interactive/BulkAcceptButton';
import ConfidenceBadge from '../../components/feedback/ConfidenceBadge';

export default function N2_RiskHeatmap() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  const { riskScanComplete, completeRiskScan, bulkAnnotationsAccepted, acceptBulkAnnotations, isProcessing, setProcessing } = useNavMigrationStore();
  const [activeView, setActiveView] = useState('risk');
  const [expandedRisk, setExpandedRisk] = useState<string | null>(null);

  if (!scenario.navMigration) return <Navigate to="/" replace />;

  const nav = scenario.navMigration;
  const riskCounters = nav.counters.risk;

  const needsReview = nav.navAnnotations.filter((a) => a.status === 'needs-review');
  const totalAnnotations = nav.navAnnotations.length;
  const acceptedCount = bulkAnnotationsAccepted
    ? totalAnnotations - needsReview.filter((a) => a.confidenceLevel !== 'high').length
    : totalAnnotations - needsReview.length;

  const toggleRisk = (id: string) => {
    setExpandedRisk(expandedRisk === id ? null : id);
  };

  return (
    <ScreenContainer title="Risk Heatmap" subtitle="Migration Risk Assessment">
      <ProcessingOverlay
        steps={[
          { label: 'Analyzing field definitions across 4 companies...', durationMs: 1500 },
          { label: 'Identifying high-risk patterns (polymorphic, dimensions, posting groups)...', durationMs: 2000 },
          { label: 'Computing confidence scores and impact estimates...', durationMs: 1500 },
        ]}
        onComplete={completeRiskScan}
        visible={!riskScanComplete}
      />

      <div className="mb-4">
        <ToggleTabs
          tabs={[
            { id: 'risk', label: 'Risk Register' },
            { id: 'annotations', label: 'Field Annotations' },
          ]}
          activeTab={activeView}
          onChange={setActiveView}
        />
      </div>

      {activeView === 'risk' ? (
        <>
          {/* Metric cards */}
          <div className="flex gap-4 mb-6">
            <MetricCard label="Non-Standard Objects" value={String(riskCounters.nonStandard)} status="neutral" />
            <MetricCard label="High-Risk Fields" value={String(riskCounters.highRiskFields)} status="negative" />
            <MetricCard label="Est. Rework if Missed" value={riskCounters.estimatedRework} status="negative" />
          </div>

          {/* Expandable risk categories */}
          <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 divide-y divide-gray-100">
            {nav.riskCategories.map((cat) => (
              <div key={cat.id}>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => toggleRisk(cat.id)}
                  className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-left hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer"
                >
                  {expandedRisk === cat.id ? <ChevronDown size={16} className="text-gray-400" /> : <ChevronRight size={16} className="text-gray-400" />}
                  <span className="flex-1 text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">{cat.name}</span>
                  <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">{cat.affectedTableCount} tables</span>
                  <span className={`text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded ${
                    cat.severity === 'Critical' ? 'bg-red-100 text-red-700' :
                    cat.severity === 'High' ? 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700' :
                    'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600'
                  }`}>{cat.severity}</span>
                  <ConfidenceBadge level={cat.confidenceLevel} score={cat.confidence} />
                  <span className="text-sm font-mono text-gray-700 w-16 text-right">
                    ${(cat.estimatedImpact / 1000).toFixed(0)}K
                  </span>
                </button>

                {expandedRisk === cat.id && (
                  <div className="px-4 pb-4 pl-10 bg-gray-50/50">
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-3">{cat.detail}</p>

                    {cat.affectedFields.length > 0 && (
                      <div className="mb-3">
                        <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase mb-1">Affected Fields</p>
                        <div className="border border-gray-200 rounded bg-white text-xs">
                          {cat.affectedFields.map((f, i) => (
                            <div key={i} className="flex gap-4 px-3 py-1.5 border-b border-gray-50 last:border-0">
                              <span className="text-gray-700 font-medium w-40">{f.table}</span>
                              <span className="text-gray-500 font-mono w-40">{f.field}</span>
                              <span className="text-gray-400">{f.issue}</span>
                            </div>
                          ))}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    )}

                    <p className="text-xs text-blue-600 bg-blue-50 rounded px-3 py-2">
                      <strong>Mitigation:</strong> {cat.mitigationApproach}
                    </p>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </>
      ) : (
        <>
          {/* Field Annotations view */}
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mb-4">
            <div className="flex-1">
              <ProgressBar current={acceptedCount} total={totalAnnotations} />
            </div>
            <BulkAcceptButton
              count={needsReview.filter((a) => a.confidenceLevel === 'high').length}
              disabled={bulkAnnotationsAccepted}
              onAccept={() => {
                setProcessing(true);
                setTimeout(() => {
                  acceptBulkAnnotations();
                  setProcessing(false);
                }, 1500);
              }}
            />
          </div>

          <ProcessingOverlay
            steps={[{ label: 'Accepting high-confidence mappings...', durationMs: 1500 }]}
            onComplete={() => setProcessing(false)}
            visible={isProcessing}
          />

          <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 overflow-hidden">
            <div className="max-h-[450px] overflow-y-auto">
              <table className="w-full text-sm">
                <thead className="bg-gray-50 sticky top-0">
                  <tr>
                    <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Source Field</th>
                    <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Table</th>
                    <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Company</th>
                    <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Mapped Concept</th>
                    <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Confidence</th>
                    <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Risk Flag</th>
                  </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                  {needsReview
                    .filter((a) => !bulkAnnotationsAccepted || a.confidenceLevel !== 'high')
                    .map((ann, i) => (
                    <tr key={i} className="border-t border-gray-100">
                      <td className="px-3 py-2 font-mono text-xs text-gray-700">{ann.sourceField}</td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-2 text-gray-600">{ann.tableName}</td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-2 text-gray-500">{ann.companyId === 'all' ? 'All' : ann.companyId}</td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-2 text-gray-700">{ann.mappedConcept}</td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-2">
                        <ConfidenceBadge level={ann.confidenceLevel} score={ann.confidence} alternativeLabel={ann.alternativeLabel} />
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-2">
                        {ann.riskFlag ? (
                          <span className="text-xs px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded bg-red-50 text-red-600">{ann.riskFlag}</span>
                        ) : (
                          <span className="text-gray-300">—</span>
                        )}
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  ))}
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          </div>
        </>
      )}
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}
```

src/screens/nav-migration/N3_PostingChainLineage.tsx
```
import { useState } from 'react';
import { Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { useNavMigrationStore } from '../../store/navMigrationStore';
import { MetricCard } from '../../components/data-display/MetricCard';
import TieOutRow from './components/TieOutRow';

const LAYER_COLORS: Record<string, { bg: string; border: string; text: string }> = {
  'working': { bg: 'bg-blue-50', border: 'border-blue-300', text: 'text-blue-700' },
  'posted-doc': { bg: 'bg-emerald-50', border: 'border-emerald-300', text: 'text-emerald-700' },
  'ledger': { bg: 'bg-amber-50', border: 'border-amber-300', text: 'text-amber-700' },
  'gl': { bg: 'bg-purple-50', border: 'border-purple-300', text: 'text-purple-700' },
};

const LAYER_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
  'working': 'Working Documents',
  'posted-doc': 'Posted Documents',
  'ledger': 'Ledger Entries',
  'gl': 'G/L Entries',
};

export default function N3_PostingChainLineage() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  const { rentalOverlayVisible, toggleRentalOverlay } = useNavMigrationStore();
  const [expandedGate, setExpandedGate] = useState<string | null>(null);

  if (!scenario.navMigration) return <Navigate to="/" replace />;

  const nav = scenario.navMigration;
  const chain = nav.postingChain;

  // Group nodes by layer
  const layers = ['working', 'posted-doc', 'ledger', 'gl'] as const;
  const nodesByLayer = layers.map(layer => ({
    layer,
    label: LAYER_LABELS[layer],
    colors: LAYER_COLORS[layer],
    nodes: chain.nodes.filter(n => n.layer === layer),
    rentalNodes: chain.rentalNodes.filter(n => n.layer === layer),
  }));

  return (
    <ScreenContainer title="Posting Chain Lineage" subtitle="Rental Invoice Walkthrough">
      {/* Metric cards */}
      <div className="flex gap-4 mb-6">
        <MetricCard label="Sales Order" value="SO-10847" status="neutral" />
        <MetricCard label="Items" value="12 desk chairs" status="neutral" />
        <MetricCard label="Amount" value="$4,680.00" status="neutral" />
        <MetricCard label="Posted Invoice" value="PSI-20891" status="neutral" />
      </div>

      <div className="flex gap-6">
        {/* Left: Posting chain visualization */}
        <div className="flex-1">
          <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-4">
            <div className="flex gap-3 overflow-x-auto">
              {nodesByLayer.map(({ layer, label, colors, nodes, rentalNodes }) => (
                <div key={layer} className="flex-1 min-w-[180px]">
                  <p className={`text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider mb-2 ${colors.text}`}>{label}</p>
                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    {nodes.map(node => (
                      <div key={node.id} className={`${colors.bg} border ${colors.border} rounded-lg p-3`}>
                        <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-800">{node.tableName} ({node.tableId})</p>
                        {Object.entries(node.keyFields).map(([k, v]) => (
                          <p key={k} className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-mono mt-0.5">{k}: {v}</p>
                        ))}
                        <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-700 mt-1">{node.displayValue}</p>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                    {/* Rental overlay nodes */}
                    {rentalOverlayVisible && rentalNodes.map(node => (
                      <div
                        key={node.id}
                        className="bg-violet-50 border border-violet-300 border-dashed rounded-lg p-3 transition-all duration-500 opacity-100 translate-y-0"
                      >
                        <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-violet-800">{node.tableName}</p>
                        {Object.entries(node.keyFields).map(([k, v]) => (
                          <p key={k} className="text-xs text-violet-500 font-mono mt-0.5">{k}: {v}</p>
                        ))}
                        <p className="text-xs font-medium text-violet-700 mt-1">{node.displayValue}</p>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Rental overlay toggle */}
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={toggleRentalOverlay}
            className={`mt-4 px-4 py-2 text-sm rounded-lg border transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
              rentalOverlayVisible
                ? 'bg-violet-100 border-violet-300 text-violet-700'
                : 'bg-white border-gray-200 text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50'
            }`}
          >
            {rentalOverlayVisible ? 'Hide' : 'Show'} Rental Asset Lifecycle
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Right: Tie-out gates */}
        <div className="w-80">
          <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-3">Tie-Out Summary</h3>
          <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 divide-y divide-gray-100">
            {chain.tieOutGates.map(gate => (
              <TieOutRow
                key={gate.id}
                gate={gate}
                expanded={expandedGate === gate.id}
                onExpand={() => setExpandedGate(expandedGate === gate.id ? null : gate.id)}
              />
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}
```

src/screens/nav-migration/N4_TieOutGates.tsx
```
import { useState } from 'react';
import { Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { ChevronDown, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { useNavMigrationStore } from '../../store/navMigrationStore';
import { MetricCard } from '../../components/data-display/MetricCard';
import ProcessingOverlay from '../../components/feedback/ProcessingOverlay';
import DiffView from '../../components/interactive/DiffView';
import GateStatusBadge from './components/GateStatusBadge';

export default function N4_TieOutGates() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  const { resolvedGates, resolveGate } = useNavMigrationStore();
  const [expandedCategory, setExpandedCategory] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [expandedGate, setExpandedGate] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [resolving, setResolving] = useState(false);

  if (!scenario.navMigration) return <Navigate to="/" replace />;

  const nav = scenario.navMigration;
  const counters = nav.counters.gates;

  // Derived values
  const passing = counters.passing + resolvedGates.length;
  const failing = counters.fail - resolvedGates.length;
  const total = counters.total;

  return (
    <ScreenContainer title="Reconciliation Gates" subtitle="All Companies">
      <ProcessingOverlay
        steps={[{ label: 'Generating normalized posting group mapping...', durationMs: 1500 }]}
        onComplete={() => setResolving(false)}
        visible={resolving}
      />

      {/* Metric cards */}
      <div className="flex gap-4 mb-6">
        <MetricCard label="Total Gates Evaluated" value={String(total)} status="neutral" />
        <MetricCard
          label="Gates Passing"
          value={String(passing)}
          status="positive"
        />
        <MetricCard
          label="Exceptions Found"
          value={String(counters.warn + failing)}
          status="negative"
        />
      </div>

      {/* Segmented progress bar */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-6">
        <div className="flex-1 h-3 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden flex">
          <div className="bg-emerald-400 h-full" style={{ width: `${(passing / total) * 100}%` }} />
          <div className="bg-amber-400 h-full" style={{ width: `${(counters.warn / total) * 100}%` }} />
          <div className="bg-red-400 h-full" style={{ width: `${(failing / total) * 100}%` }} />
        </div>
        <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">
          {passing} PASS | {counters.warn} WARN | {failing} FAIL
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* Gate categories */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 divide-y divide-gray-100">
        {nav.gateCategories.map(cat => {
          const isExpanded = expandedCategory === cat.id;
          const catGates = nav.gates.filter(g => g.categoryId === cat.id);
          const catStatus = cat.fail > 0 ? 'fail' : cat.warn > 0 ? 'warn' : 'pass';

          return (
            <div key={cat.id}>
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={() => setExpandedCategory(isExpanded ? null : cat.id)}
                className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-left hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer"
              >
                {isExpanded ? <ChevronDown size={14} className="text-gray-400" /> : <ChevronRight size={14} className="text-gray-400" />}
                <span className="flex-1 text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">{cat.name}</span>
                <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">{cat.totalGates} gates</span>
                <span className="text-xs text-emerald-600">{cat.pass} pass</span>
                {cat.warn > 0 && <span className="text-xs text-amber-600">{cat.warn} warn</span>}
                {cat.fail > 0 && <span className="text-xs text-red-600">{cat.fail} fail</span>}
                <GateStatusBadge status={catStatus as 'pass' | 'warn' | 'fail'} />
              </button>

              {isExpanded && catGates.length > 0 && (
                <div className="px-4 pb-3 pl-10 bg-gray-50/50">
                  <div className="border border-gray-200 rounded bg-white text-sm divide-y divide-gray-100">
                    {catGates.map(gate => {
                      const isResolved = resolvedGates.includes(gate.id);
                      const gateExpanded = expandedGate === gate.id;
                      const displayStatus = isResolved ? 'pass' : gate.status;

                      return (
                        <div key={gate.id}>
                          <button
                            type="button"
                            onClick={() => setExpandedGate(gateExpanded ? null : gate.id)}
                            className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 text-left hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer"
                          >
                            {gateExpanded ? <ChevronDown size={12} className="text-gray-400" /> : <ChevronRight size={12} className="text-gray-400" />}
                            <span className="flex-1 text-sm text-gray-700">{gate.description}</span>
                            <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">{gate.companyId}</span>
                            <GateStatusBadge status={displayStatus} />
                            {gate.financialImpact != null && (
                              <span className="text-xs font-mono text-gray-600 w-20 text-right">
                                ${gate.financialImpact.toLocaleString()}
                              </span>
                            )}
                          </button>

                          {gateExpanded && (
                            <div className="px-3 pb-3 pl-8 bg-gray-50/50">
                              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-2">{gate.detail}</p>
                              {gate.rootCause && (
                                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-3 bg-amber-50 rounded p-2 border border-amber-100">{gate.rootCause}</p>
                              )}
                              {gate.crosswalkDiff && !isResolved && (
                                <button
                                  type="button"
                                  onClick={() => {
                                    setResolving(true);
                                    setTimeout(() => {
                                      resolveGate(gate.id);
                                      setResolving(false);
                                    }, 1500);
                                  }}
                                  className="px-4 py-1.5 bg-blue-600 text-white text-xs font-medium rounded hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors cursor-pointer mb-3"
                                >
                                  Create Crosswalk
                                </button>
                              )}
                              {gate.crosswalkDiff && isResolved && (
                                <div className="mt-2">
                                  <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 mb-1">Crosswalk Applied:</p>
                                  <DiffView
                                    additions={gate.crosswalkDiff.after}
                                    removals={gate.crosswalkDiff.before}
                                    changes={gate.crosswalkDiff.changes}
                                  />
                                </div>
                              )}
                            </div>
                          )}
                        </div>
                      );
                    })}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          );
        })}
      </div>
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}
```

src/screens/nav-migration/N5_DimensionReconstruction.tsx
```
import { useState } from 'react';
import { Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { AlertTriangle } from 'lucide-react';
import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { useNavMigrationStore } from '../../store/navMigrationStore';
import { MetricCard } from '../../components/data-display/MetricCard';
import ToggleTabs from '../../components/interactive/ToggleTabs';
import ProcessingOverlay from '../../components/feedback/ProcessingOverlay';
import DiffView from '../../components/interactive/DiffView';
import ConfidenceBadge from '../../components/feedback/ConfidenceBadge';
import DimensionSetCard from './components/DimensionSetCard';

export default function N5_DimensionReconstruction() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  const { dimensionMappingSuggested, suggestDimensionMapping } = useNavMigrationStore();
  const [activeView, setActiveView] = useState('explorer');
  const [selectedTxn, setSelectedTxn] = useState<number | null>(null);
  const [suggesting, setSuggesting] = useState(false);

  if (!scenario.navMigration) return <Navigate to="/" replace />;

  const nav = scenario.navMigration;
  const dimCounters = nav.counters.dimensions;
  const transactions = nav.dimensionTransactions;

  const selectedDimSet = selectedTxn !== null
    ? nav.dimensionSets.find(ds => ds.dimensionSetId === transactions[selectedTxn]?.dimensionSetId)
    : null;

  return (
    <ScreenContainer title="Dimension Set Reconstruction" subtitle="Reporting Model Preservation">
      <ProcessingOverlay
        steps={[{ label: 'Inferring missing dimensions from transaction metadata...', durationMs: 1000 }]}
        onComplete={() => {
          suggestDimensionMapping();
          setSuggesting(false);
        }}
        visible={suggesting}
      />

      {/* Metric cards */}
      <div className="flex gap-4 mb-6">
        <MetricCard label="Unique Dimension Set IDs" value={dimCounters.uniqueSets.toLocaleString()} status="neutral" />
        <MetricCard label="Dimension Codes in Use" value={String(dimCounters.dimensionCodes)} status="neutral" />
        <MetricCard label="Records with Complete Sets" value={`${dimCounters.completenessPercent}%`} status="positive" />
        <MetricCard label="Incomplete Records" value={String(dimCounters.incompleteRecords)} status="negative" />
      </div>

      <div className="mb-4">
        <ToggleTabs
          tabs={[
            { id: 'explorer', label: 'Transaction Explorer' },
            { id: 'audit', label: 'Completeness Audit' },
          ]}
          activeTab={activeView}
          onChange={setActiveView}
        />
      </div>

      {activeView === 'explorer' ? (
        <div className="flex gap-4">
          {/* Left: Transaction list */}
          <div className="w-2/5">
            <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 overflow-hidden">
              <table className="w-full text-sm">
                <thead className="bg-gray-50">
                  <tr>
                    <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Document No.</th>
                    <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Table</th>
                    <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Dim Set ID</th>
                    <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Full Set?</th>
                  </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                  {transactions.map((txn, i) => (
                    <tr
                      key={i}
                      className={`border-t border-gray-100 cursor-pointer hover:bg-blue-50/50 ${selectedTxn === i ? 'bg-blue-50 ring-2 ring-blue-300 ring-inset' : ''} ${!txn.isComplete ? 'bg-amber-50/30' : ''}`}
                      onClick={() => setSelectedTxn(i)}
                    >
                      <td className="px-3 py-2 font-mono text-xs">{txn.documentNo}</td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-2 text-gray-600 text-xs">{txn.tableName}</td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-2 font-mono text-xs">{txn.dimensionSetId}</td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-2">
                        {txn.isComplete ? (
                          <span className="text-xs text-emerald-600">Yes</span>
                        ) : (
                          <span className="text-xs text-amber-600">Incomplete</span>
                        )}
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  ))}
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Right: Dimension set detail */}
          <div className="w-3/5">
            {selectedDimSet ? (
              <>
                <DimensionSetCard dimensionSet={selectedDimSet} />

                {/* Warning for incomplete sets */}
                {!selectedDimSet.isComplete && (
                  <div className="mt-4 bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 rounded-lg p-4">
                    <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
                      <AlertTriangle size={16} className="text-amber-500 mt-0.5 shrink-0" />
                      <div>
                        <p className="text-sm text-amber-800">
                          This dimension set is missing dimensions. If migrated as-is, these transactions will be invisible to reporting in Business Central.
                        </p>
                        {!dimensionMappingSuggested ? (
                          <button
                            type="button"
                            onClick={() => setSuggesting(true)}
                            className="mt-3 px-4 py-1.5 bg-blue-600 text-white text-xs font-medium rounded hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
                          >
                            Suggest Mapping
                          </button>
                        ) : (
                          <div className="mt-3">
                            <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 mb-2">Suggested Enrichment:</p>
                            <DiffView
                              additions={nav.dimensionDiffData.after}
                              removals={[]}
                              changes={nav.dimensionDiffData.changes}
                            />
