                            {selectedDimSet.suggestedMappings && (
                              <div className="mt-3 space-y-1">
                                {selectedDimSet.suggestedMappings.map(m => (
                                  <div key={m.code} className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs">
                                    <span className="font-mono text-gray-600">{m.code}</span>
                                    <span className="text-gray-400">&rarr;</span>
                                    <span className="text-gray-700">{m.suggestedValueName}</span>
                                    <ConfidenceBadge level={m.confidenceLevel} score={Math.round(m.confidence * 100)} />
                                  </div>
                                ))}
                              </div>
                            )}
                          </div>
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
              </>
            ) : (
              <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-12 flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400 text-sm">
                Select a transaction to view its dimension set
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      ) : (
        /* Completeness Audit */
        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 overflow-hidden">
          <div className="px-4 py-3 bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200">
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
              {dimCounters.completenessPercent}% of {nav.dimensionCompleteness.reduce((s, r) => s + r.completeSets + r.incompleteSets, 0).toLocaleString()} dimension-bearing records have complete dimension sets.
              {dimCounters.incompleteRecords > 0 && ` ${dimCounters.incompleteRecords} records across ${nav.dimensionCompleteness.filter(r => r.incompleteSets > 0).length} companies have gaps.`}
            </p>
          </div>
          <table className="w-full text-sm">
            <thead className="bg-gray-50">
              <tr>
                <th className="text-left px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Company</th>
                <th className="text-left px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Complete Sets</th>
                <th className="text-left px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Incomplete Sets</th>
                <th className="text-left px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Gap Rate</th>
                <th className="text-left px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Primary Gap</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {nav.dimensionCompleteness.map(row => (
                <tr
                  key={row.companyId}
                  className={`border-t border-gray-100 ${row.incompleteSets > 0 ? 'bg-amber-50/30 cursor-pointer hover:bg-amber-50' : ''}`}
                  onClick={() => {
                    if (row.incompleteSets > 0) {
                      setActiveView('explorer');
                      // Select first incomplete transaction for this company
                      const idx = transactions.findIndex(t => t.companyId === row.companyId && !t.isComplete);
                      if (idx >= 0) setSelectedTxn(idx);
                    }
                  }}
                >
                  <td className="px-4 py-2 font-medium text-gray-900">{row.companyName}</td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-2 font-mono text-gray-600">{row.completeSets.toLocaleString()}</td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-2 font-mono text-gray-600">{row.incompleteSets}</td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-2 text-gray-600">{row.gapRate}</td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-2 text-gray-500 text-xs">{row.primaryGap || '\u2014'}</td>
                </tr>
              ))}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      )}
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}
```

src/screens/nav-migration/N6_ExceptionsWorkbench.tsx
```
import { useState, useMemo } from 'react';
import { Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { useNavMigrationStore } from '../../store/navMigrationStore';
import ProcessingOverlay from '../../components/feedback/ProcessingOverlay';
import ConfidenceBadge from '../../components/feedback/ConfidenceBadge';
import BulkAcceptButton from '../../components/interactive/BulkAcceptButton';
import CounterAnimation from '../../components/feedback/CounterAnimation';
import { EXCEPTION_CATEGORY_BREAKDOWN, TOTAL_FINANCIAL_EXPOSURE } from '../../scenarios/nav-migration/exceptions';

type FilterTab = 'all' | 'critical' | 'high' | 'medium';

export default function N6_ExceptionsWorkbench() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  const {
    resolvedExceptions, resolveException,
    bulkExceptionsResolved, bulkResolveExceptions,
  } = useNavMigrationStore();
  const [activeFilter, setActiveFilter] = useState<FilterTab>('all');
  const [selectedId, setSelectedId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [resolutionPhase, setResolutionPhase] = useState<'idle' | 'resolving' | 'proposals-shown'>('idle');
  const [bulkResolving, setBulkResolving] = useState(false);

  const nav = scenario.navMigration;

  const filtered = useMemo(() => {
    if (!nav) return [];
    const exceptions = nav.exceptions;
    if (activeFilter === 'all') return exceptions;
    return exceptions.filter(e => e.priority === activeFilter);
  }, [nav, activeFilter]);

  if (!nav) return <Navigate to="/" replace />;

  const exceptions = nav.exceptions;
  const counters = nav.counters.exceptions;

  const selected = selectedId ? exceptions.find(e => e.id === selectedId) : null;

  const resolvedCount = resolvedExceptions.length + (bulkExceptionsResolved ? counters.autoResolvable - resolvedExceptions.length : 0);
  const remainingCount = counters.total - resolvedCount;

  // Financial impact resolved
  const resolvedFinancial = exceptions
    .filter(e => resolvedExceptions.includes(e.id) || (bulkExceptionsResolved && e.resolutionProposals?.some(p => p.confidenceLevel === 'high')))
    .reduce((sum, e) => sum + (e.financialImpact ?? 0), 0);

  const filterTabs: { key: FilterTab; label: string; count: number }[] = [
    { key: 'all', label: 'All', count: counters.total },
    { key: 'critical', label: 'Critical', count: counters.critical },
    { key: 'high', label: 'High', count: counters.high },
    { key: 'medium', label: 'Medium', count: counters.medium },
  ];

  const isResolved = (id: string) => {
    if (resolvedExceptions.includes(id)) return true;
    if (bulkExceptionsResolved) {
      const exc = exceptions.find(e => e.id === id);
      return exc?.resolutionProposals?.some(p => p.confidenceLevel === 'high') ?? false;
    }
    return false;
  };

  return (
    <ScreenContainer title="Exceptions Workbench" subtitle="Long-Tail Exception Management">
      <ProcessingOverlay
        steps={[{ label: 'Applying crosswalk resolutions and propagating...', durationMs: 2500 }]}
        onComplete={() => {
          bulkResolveExceptions();
          setBulkResolving(false);
        }}
        visible={bulkResolving}
      />

      <ProcessingOverlay
        steps={[{ label: 'Searching for contract linkage patterns...', durationMs: 1500 }]}
        onComplete={() => setResolutionPhase('proposals-shown')}
        visible={resolutionPhase === 'resolving'}
      />

      <div className="flex gap-4 h-[calc(100vh-12rem)]">
        {/* Left panel (25%): Exception queue */}
        <div className="w-1/4 flex flex-col">
          {/* Filter tabs */}
          <div className="flex gap-1 mb-3">
            {filterTabs.map(tab => (
              <button
                key={tab.key}
                type="button"
                onClick={() => setActiveFilter(tab.key)}
                className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs rounded-md cursor-pointer transition-colors ${
                  activeFilter === tab.key
                    ? 'bg-gray-900 text-white'
                    : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-200'
                }`}
              >
                {tab.label} ({tab.count})
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>

          {/* Exception list */}
          <div className="flex-1 bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 overflow-y-auto">
            {filtered.map(exc => {
              const resolved = isResolved(exc.id);
              return (
                <button
                  key={exc.id}
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => {
                    setSelectedId(exc.id);
                    setResolutionPhase('idle');
                  }}
                  className={`w-full text-left px-3 py-2.5 border-b border-gray-100 last:border-0 cursor-pointer transition-colors ${
                    selectedId === exc.id ? 'bg-blue-50' : 'hover:bg-gray-50'
                  } ${resolved ? 'opacity-50' : ''}`}
                >
                  <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-800 truncate">{exc.description}</p>
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1">
                    <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">{exc.category}</span>
                    {resolved ? (
                      <span className="text-xs px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700">Resolved</span>
                    ) : (
                      <span className={`text-xs px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded ${
                        exc.priority === 'critical' ? 'bg-red-100 text-red-700' :
                        exc.priority === 'high' ? 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700' :
                        'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600'
                      }`}>{exc.priority}</span>
                    )}
                    {exc.financialImpact != null && exc.financialImpact > 0 && (
                      <span className="text-xs font-mono text-gray-500 ml-auto">${exc.financialImpact.toLocaleString()}</span>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </button>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Center panel (45%): Exception detail */}
        <div className="w-[45%] flex flex-col">
          {selected ? (
            <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-5 flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">{selected.category}</h3>
                {isResolved(selected.id) ? (
                  <span className="text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700">Resolved</span>
                ) : (
                  <span className={`text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded ${
                    selected.priority === 'critical' ? 'bg-red-100 text-red-700' :
                    selected.priority === 'high' ? 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700' :
                    'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600'
                  }`}>{selected.priority}</span>
                )}
              </div>

              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-4">{selected.description}</p>

              {/* Affected records */}
              {selected.affectedRecords.length > 0 && (
                <div className="mb-4">
                  <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase mb-2">Affected Records</p>
                  <div className="border border-gray-200 rounded text-xs overflow-x-auto">
                    <table className="w-full">
                      <thead className="bg-gray-50">
                        <tr>
                          {Object.keys(selected.affectedRecords[0]).map(key => (
                            <th key={key} className="text-left px-2 py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500">{key}</th>
                          ))}
                        </tr>
                      </thead>
                      <tbody>
                        {selected.affectedRecords.map((rec, i) => (
                          <tr key={i} className="border-t border-gray-100">
                            {Object.values(rec).map((val, j) => (
                              <td key={j} className="px-2 py-1.5 text-gray-600 font-mono">{val}</td>
                            ))}
                          </tr>
                        ))}
                      </tbody>
                    </table>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {/* Resolve button / proposals */}
              {!isResolved(selected.id) && selected.resolutionProposals && resolutionPhase === 'idle' && (
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setResolutionPhase('resolving')}
                  className="px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white text-sm font-medium rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
                >
                  Resolve
                </button>
              )}

              {resolutionPhase === 'proposals-shown' && selected.resolutionProposals && !isResolved(selected.id) && (
                <div className="space-y-3">
                  <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Resolution Proposals</p>
                  {selected.resolutionProposals.map((proposal, i) => (
                    <div key={i} className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg p-3">
                      <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
                        <div className="flex-1">
                          <p className="text-sm text-gray-700">{proposal.description}</p>
                        </div>
                        <ConfidenceBadge level={proposal.confidenceLevel} score={proposal.confidence} />
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex gap-2 mt-2">
                        {proposal.confidenceLevel !== 'low' && (
                          <button
                            type="button"
                            onClick={() => {
                              resolveException(selected.id);
                              setResolutionPhase('idle');
                            }}
                            className="px-3 py-1 text-xs bg-emerald-600 text-white rounded hover:bg-emerald-700 cursor-pointer"
                          >
                            Accept
                          </button>
                        )}
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          className="px-3 py-1 text-xs bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 rounded hover:bg-gray-200 cursor-pointer"
                        >
                          Flag for Review
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              )}

              {isResolved(selected.id) && selected.crosswalkEntry && (
                <div className="bg-emerald-50 border border-emerald-200 rounded-lg p-3 mt-3">
                  <p className="text-xs font-medium text-emerald-700">Crosswalk applied:</p>
                  <p className="text-xs font-mono text-emerald-600 mt-1">{selected.crosswalkEntry}</p>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 flex-1 flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400 text-sm">
              Select an exception to view details
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Right panel (30%): Stats & progress */}
        <div className="w-[30%] space-y-4">
          {/* Summary stats */}
          <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-4">
            <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-3">Exception Summary</h3>
            <div className="space-y-2 text-sm">
              <div className="flex justify-between">
                <span className="text-gray-500">Total exceptions</span>
                <span className="font-mono text-gray-900">{counters.total}</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex justify-between">
                <span className="text-gray-500">Resolved</span>
                <span className="font-mono text-emerald-600">
                  <CounterAnimation value={resolvedCount} enabled={true} />
                </span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex justify-between">
                <span className="text-gray-500">Remaining</span>
                <span className="font-mono text-gray-900">
                  <CounterAnimation value={remainingCount} enabled={true} />
                </span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex justify-between border-t border-gray-100 pt-2">
                <span className="text-gray-500">Auto-resolvable</span>
                <span className="font-mono text-gray-600">{counters.autoResolvable}</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex justify-between">
                <span className="text-gray-500">Needs manual review</span>
                <span className="font-mono text-gray-600">{counters.total - counters.autoResolvable}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Category breakdown */}
          <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-4">
            <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-3">By Category</h3>
            <div className="space-y-1.5">
              {EXCEPTION_CATEGORY_BREAKDOWN.map(cat => (
                <div key={cat.category} className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <div className="flex-1 bg-gray-100 rounded-full h-2 overflow-hidden">
                    <div
                      className="bg-gray-400 h-full rounded-full"
                      style={{ width: `${(cat.count / counters.total) * 100}%` }}
                    />
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 w-28 truncate">{cat.category}</span>
                  <span className="text-xs font-mono text-gray-600 w-6 text-right">{cat.count}</span>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Financial impact */}
          <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-4">
            <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-3">Financial Impact</h3>
            <div className="space-y-2 text-sm">
              <div className="flex justify-between">
                <span className="text-gray-500">Total exposure</span>
                <span className="font-mono text-gray-900">${TOTAL_FINANCIAL_EXPOSURE.toLocaleString()}</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex justify-between">
                <span className="text-gray-500">Resolved</span>
                <span className="font-mono text-emerald-600">${resolvedFinancial.toLocaleString()}</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex justify-between">
                <span className="text-gray-500">Remaining</span>
                <span className="font-mono text-gray-900">${(TOTAL_FINANCIAL_EXPOSURE - resolvedFinancial).toLocaleString()}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Bulk resolve button */}
          {!bulkExceptionsResolved && (
            <BulkAcceptButton
              count={counters.autoResolvable}
              disabled={bulkExceptionsResolved}
              onAccept={() => setBulkResolving(true)}
            />
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}
```

src/screens/nav-migration/N7_MigrationRoadmap.tsx
```
import { useState } from 'react';
import { Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { CheckCircle2 } from 'lucide-react';
import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { useNavMigrationStore } from '../../store/navMigrationStore';
import ProcessingOverlay from '../../components/feedback/ProcessingOverlay';
import { MetricCard } from '../../components/data-display/MetricCard';
import { GanttChart } from '../../components/data-display/GanttChart';
import ExportFileTree from '../../components/interactive/ExportFileTree';

export default function N7_MigrationRoadmap() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  const { artifactsGenerated, generateArtifacts } = useNavMigrationStore();
  const [generating, setGenerating] = useState(false);

  if (!scenario.navMigration) return <Navigate to="/" replace />;

  const nav = scenario.navMigration;
  const plan = nav.migrationPlan;

  // Filter out group header rows for the Gantt — they're display-only labels
  const ganttTasks = plan.tasks
    .filter((t) => !t.isGroupHeader)
    .map((t) => ({
      label: t.label,
      startDay: t.startDay,
      endDay: t.endDay,
      status: t.status as 'ready' | 'pending',
    }));

  // Build file tree for ExportFileTree: Record<path, content>
  const fileTree: Record<string, string> = {};
  for (const artifact of plan.artifacts) {
    fileTree[artifact.path] = artifact.content;
  }

  return (
    <ScreenContainer title="Migration Execution Plan" subtitle="Cascade Rentals Group — NAV 2018 → Business Central">
      <ProcessingOverlay
        steps={[{ label: 'Packaging migration artifacts...', durationMs: 2000 }]}
        onComplete={() => {
          generateArtifacts();
          setGenerating(false);
        }}
        visible={generating}
      />

      {/* Metric cards */}
      <div className="flex gap-4 mb-6">
        <MetricCard label="Time to Validated Package" value="4 weeks" status="positive" />
        <MetricCard label="Estimated Project Cost" value="$85K" status="positive" />
        <MetricCard label="Automated Gate Coverage" value="96.1%" status="positive" />
      </div>

      {/* Gantt chart */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-4 mb-6">
        <GanttChart tasks={ganttTasks} totalDays={28} />
      </div>

      {/* Two-column layout */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-6 mb-6">
        {/* Left: What we need */}
        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-5">
          <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-3">What we need from you</h3>
          <ul className="space-y-2">
            {plan.inputRequirements.map((req, i) => (
              <li key={i} className="flex gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
                <span className="text-gray-300 mt-0.5">•</span>
                {req}
              </li>
            ))}
          </ul>
        </div>

        {/* Right: What you get */}
        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-5">
          <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-3">What you get</h3>
          <ExportFileTree files={fileTree} />
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Generate button / success banner */}
      {artifactsGenerated ? (
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 bg-emerald-50 border border-emerald-200 rounded-lg px-5 py-4">
          <CheckCircle2 className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-500" />
          <p className="text-sm text-emerald-700">
            Migration package generated. 14 artifacts, 847 reconciliation gates, 19 resolved crosswalks.
            This package is versioned and reproducible — if the source database changes before cutover, re-run discovery and only the delta needs review.
          </p>
        </div>
      ) : (
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={() => setGenerating(true)}
          className="px-6 py-2.5 bg-blue-600 text-white text-sm font-medium rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
        >
          Generate Artifacts
        </button>
      )}
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}
```

src/screens/nav-migration/NavMigrationLayout.tsx
```
import { Outlet, Navigate, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom';
import AppShell from '../../components/layout/AppShell';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';

export default function NavMigrationLayout() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  const location = useLocation();

  if (!scenario.navMigration) {
    return <Navigate to="/" replace />;
  }

  const segments = location.pathname.split('/');
  const screenSegment = segments[segments.length - 1] ?? '';
  const currentScreen = screenSegment ? `/nav-migration/${screenSegment}` : '/nav-migration/1';

  return (
    <AppShell persona="nav-migration" currentScreen={currentScreen}>
      <Outlet />
    </AppShell>
  );
}
```

```
import { useNavigate, Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react';

const COLOR_MAP: Record<string, string> = {
  red: 'bg-red-500/10 text-red-400',
  amber: 'bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-400',
  gray: 'bg-gray-700/50 text-gray-300',
};

export default function NavMigrationProblem() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const scenario = useScenario();

  if (!scenario.navMigration) return <Navigate to="/" replace />;

  const { companies, problemScreen } = scenario.navMigration;

  const offsets = [
    { top: '0px', left: '0px' },
    { top: '20px', left: '180px' },
    { top: '10px', left: '360px' },
    { top: '30px', left: '540px' },
  ];

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-900 flex flex-col items-center justify-center px-6 py-12">
      {/* Company Context */}
      <div className="text-center mb-12">
        <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-white tracking-tight mb-4">
          Cascade Rentals Group
        </h1>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-3">
          <span className="px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-300 text-sm">
            NAV 2018 &rarr; Business Central Migration
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Company Cards */}
      <div className="relative h-48 w-full max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-10">
        {companies.map((company, i) => {
          return (
            <div
              key={company.id}
              className={`absolute w-40 rounded-lg border p-4 bg-gray-800/80 ${
                company.isAcquired ? 'border-amber-500/50' : 'border-white/20'
              }`}
              style={{ top: offsets[i]?.top, left: offsets[i]?.left }}
            >
              <p className="text-sm font-medium text-white">{company.name}</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">{company.tableCount} tables</p>
              {company.isAcquired && (
                <span className="mt-2 inline-block text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400">
                  Acquired
                </span>
              )}
            </div>
          );
        })}
      </div>

      {/* Pain Stat Cards */}
      <div className="flex gap-5 max-w-3xl w-full mb-12">
        {problemScreen.painStats.map((stat, i) => (
          <div
            key={i}
            className={`flex-1 rounded-xl p-6 border border-white/10 ${COLOR_MAP[stat.color] ?? COLOR_MAP.gray}`}
          >
            <p className="text-3xl font-bold mb-1">{stat.value}</p>
            <p className="text-sm opacity-80">{stat.label}</p>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* CTA */}
      <button
        type="button"
        onClick={() => navigate('/nav-migration/1')}
        className="flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-medium rounded-lg transition-colors cursor-pointer"
      >
        Enter Data Foundry
        <ArrowRight className="w-4 h-4" />
      </button>
    </div>
  );
}
