src/screens/sell-side/S1_SystemTopology.tsx
```
import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react';

import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import ProcessingOverlay from '../../components/feedback/ProcessingOverlay';
import CounterAnimation from '../../components/feedback/CounterAnimation';
import { TopologyGraph } from '../../components/visualization/TopologyGraph';

import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { useProcessingStore } from '../../store/processingStore';
import type { ProcessingStep } from '../../types/demo';

export default function S1_SystemTopology() {
  const scenario = useScenario();

  const INGESTION_STEPS: ProcessingStep[] = [
    { label: `Connecting to ${scenario.constants.SCHEMA_STATS.totalSystems} systems...`, durationMs: 1200 },
    { label: 'Discovering schemas...', durationMs: 1200 },
    { label: `Cataloguing ${scenario.constants.SCHEMA_STATS.totalFields.toLocaleString()} fields...`, durationMs: 1200 },
  ];

  const ingestionComplete = useProcessingStore((s) => s.ingestionComplete);
  const endProcessing = useProcessingStore((s) => s.endProcessing);

  // Show overlay only on first entry when ingestion has not completed
  const [showOverlay, setShowOverlay] = useState(!ingestionComplete);
  const [overlayDone, setOverlayDone] = useState(ingestionComplete);

  // Track whether counters should animate (only after overlay completes for the first time)
  const animateCounters = useRef(!ingestionComplete);

  const handleOverlayComplete = useCallback(() => {
    setShowOverlay(false);
    setOverlayDone(true);
    endProcessing(); // sets ingestionComplete = true in the store
  }, [endProcessing]);

  // If ingestion was already complete (returning to screen), skip overlay
  useEffect(() => {
    if (ingestionComplete) {
      setShowOverlay(false);
      setOverlayDone(true);
      animateCounters.current = false;
    }
  }, [ingestionComplete]);

  return (
    <ScreenContainer title="Systems">
      <ProcessingOverlay
        steps={INGESTION_STEPS}
        onComplete={handleOverlayComplete}
        visible={showOverlay}
      />

      {overlayDone && (
        <>
          {/* Header stats row */}
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-6 text-sm text-gray-700">
            <span className="font-semibold">
              <CounterAnimation
                value={scenario.constants.SCHEMA_STATS.totalSystems}
                format="number"
                enabled={animateCounters.current}
                duration={800}
              />
            </span>
            <span>systems connected</span>
            <span className="text-gray-300">&middot;</span>
            <span className="font-semibold">
              <CounterAnimation
                value={scenario.constants.SCHEMA_STATS.totalTables}
                format="number"
                enabled={animateCounters.current}
                duration={1000}
              />
            </span>
            <span>tables discovered</span>
            <span className="text-gray-300">&middot;</span>
            <span className="font-semibold">
              <CounterAnimation
                value={scenario.constants.SCHEMA_STATS.totalFields}
                format="number"
                enabled={animateCounters.current}
                duration={1200}
              />
            </span>
            <span>fields catalogued</span>
          </div>

          {/* Topology graph */}
          <div className="h-[calc(100vh-200px)]">
            <TopologyGraph
              systems={scenario.systems}
              animateIngestion={animateCounters.current}
            />
          </div>
        </>
      )}
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}
```

src/screens/sell-side/S2_OntologyAnnotation.tsx
```
import { useCallback, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import type { ColumnDef } from '@tanstack/react-table';

import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import ProcessingOverlay from '../../components/feedback/ProcessingOverlay';
import ProgressBar from '../../components/feedback/ProgressBar';
import ConfidenceBadge from '../../components/feedback/ConfidenceBadge';
import TimeComparisonBadge from '../../components/feedback/TimeComparisonBadge';
import ToggleTabs from '../../components/interactive/ToggleTabs';
import BulkAcceptButton from '../../components/interactive/BulkAcceptButton';
import { OntologyDiagram } from '../../components/visualization/OntologyDiagram';
import { DataTable } from '../../components/data-display/DataTable';

import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { useAnnotationStore } from '../../store/annotationStore';
import type { Annotation } from '../../types/annotation';
import type { ProcessingStep } from '../../types/demo';

// ---- constants ----

type TabId = 'source' | 'annotations' | 'unified';

const TABS: { id: TabId; label: string }[] = [
  { id: 'source', label: 'Source Ontologies' },
  { id: 'annotations', label: 'Annotation Dashboard' },
  { id: 'unified', label: 'Unified Ontology' },
];

const BULK_ACCEPT_STEPS: ProcessingStep[] = [
  { label: 'Processing annotations...', durationMs: 400 },
];

// ---- annotation table helpers ----

/** Only non-auto-accepted annotations are shown in the review table */
function getReviewAnnotations(annotations: Annotation[], bulkAccepted: boolean): Annotation[] {
  const filtered = annotations.filter((a) => {
    if (a.status === 'auto-accepted') return false;
    // After bulk accept, high-confidence needs-review are accepted too
    if (bulkAccepted && a.status === 'needs-review' && a.confidenceLevel === 'high') return false;
    return true;
  });
  // Sort by confidence ascending (lowest first)
  return filtered.sort((a, b) => a.confidence - b.confidence);
}

// ---- column factory ----

function buildColumns(systemNameMap: Record<string, string>): ColumnDef<Annotation, unknown>[] {
  return [
    {
      accessorKey: 'systemId',
      header: 'Source System',
      cell: ({ getValue }) => {
        const id = getValue() as string;
        return systemNameMap[id] ?? id;
      },
    },
    {
      accessorFn: (row) => `${row.tableName}.${row.fieldName}`,
      id: 'sourceField',
      header: 'Source Field',
      cell: ({ getValue }) => (
        <code className="text-xs bg-gray-100 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">{getValue() as string}</code>
      ),
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'mappedConceptLabel',
      header: 'Mapped Concept',
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'confidence',
      header: 'Confidence',
      cell: ({ row }) => (
        <ConfidenceBadge
          level={row.original.confidenceLevel}
          score={row.original.confidence}
          alternativeLabel={
            row.original.alternativeMappings.length > 0
              ? `Alt: ${row.original.alternativeMappings[0].conceptLabel} (${row.original.alternativeMappings[0].confidence}%)`
              : undefined
          }
        />
      ),
      sortingFn: 'basic',
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'status',
      header: 'Status',
      cell: ({ row }) => {
        const { status, confidenceLevel } = row.original;
        let display: string;
        let color: string;

        if (status === 'flagged') {
          display = 'Flagged';
          color = 'text-red-600 bg-red-50';
        } else if (status === 'needs-review' && confidenceLevel === 'high') {
          display = 'Ready to Accept';
          color = 'bg-[#7688CE]/10 text-[#7688CE]';
        } else if (status === 'needs-review') {
          display = 'Needs Review';
          color = 'text-amber-700 bg-amber-50';
        } else if (status === 'auto-accepted') {
          display = 'Auto-Accepted';
          color = 'text-green-700 bg-green-50';
        } else if (status === 'human-confirmed') {
          display = 'Confirmed';
          color = 'text-green-700 bg-green-50';
        } else {
          display = status;
          color = 'text-gray-600 bg-gray-50';
        }

        return (
          <span className={`text-xs font-medium px-2 py-0.5 rounded ${color}`}>{display}</span>
        );
      },
    },
  ];
}

// ---- component ----

export default function S2_OntologyAnnotation() {
  const scenario = useScenario();

  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<TabId>('source');
  const [showBulkOverlay, setShowBulkOverlay] = useState(false);

  const acceptedCount = useAnnotationStore((s) => s.acceptedCount);
  const totalCount = useAnnotationStore((s) => s.totalCount);
  const bulkAccepted = useAnnotationStore((s) => s.bulkAccepted);
  const bulkAccept = useAnnotationStore((s) => s.bulkAccept);

  // Build system name lookup from scenario data
  const systemNameMap = useMemo(() => {
    const map: Record<string, string> = {};
    for (const sys of scenario.systems) {
      map[sys.id] = sys.name;
    }
    return map;
  }, [scenario.systems]);

  const columns = useMemo(() => buildColumns(systemNameMap), [systemNameMap]);

  // The time comparison for S2 is the first entry
  const timeComparison = scenario.timeComparisons[0];

  // Filtered + sorted review annotations
  const reviewAnnotations = useMemo(
    () => getReviewAnnotations(scenario.annotations, bulkAccepted),
    [scenario.annotations, bulkAccepted],
  );

  const handleBulkAccept = useCallback(() => {
    setShowBulkOverlay(true);
  }, []);

  const handleBulkOverlayComplete = useCallback(() => {
    setShowBulkOverlay(false);
    bulkAccept();
  }, [bulkAccept]);

  return (
    <ScreenContainer title="Schema Map">
      {/* Bulk-accept processing overlay */}
      <ProcessingOverlay
        steps={BULK_ACCEPT_STEPS}
        onComplete={handleBulkOverlayComplete}
        visible={showBulkOverlay}
      />

      {/* Toggle tabs */}
      <div className="mb-4">
        <ToggleTabs
          tabs={TABS}
          activeTab={activeTab}
          onChange={(id) => setActiveTab(id as TabId)}
        />
      </div>

      {/* Tab 1: Source Ontologies */}
      {activeTab === 'source' && (
        <div className="min-h-[400px]">
          <OntologyDiagram
            sourceOntologies={scenario.sourceOntologies}
            unifiedOntology={scenario.unifiedOntology}
            activeTab="source"
          />
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Tab 2: Annotation Dashboard */}
      {activeTab === 'annotations' && (
        <div className="space-y-6">
          {/* Action bar: progress + bulk accept + time comparison */}
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-4 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-3">
            <div className="flex-1 max-w-xs">
              <ProgressBar current={acceptedCount} total={totalCount} />
            </div>

            <BulkAcceptButton
              count={scenario.constants.ANNOTATION_COUNTS.pendingHigh}
              disabled={bulkAccepted}
              onAccept={handleBulkAccept}
            />

            <TimeComparisonBadge comparison={timeComparison} />

          </div>

          {/* Annotation review table */}
          <DataTable<Annotation> columns={columns} data={reviewAnnotations} />
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Tab 3: Unified Ontology */}
      {activeTab === 'unified' && (
        <div>
          <OntologyDiagram
            sourceOntologies={scenario.sourceOntologies}
            unifiedOntology={scenario.unifiedOntology}
            activeTab="unified"
            annotations={scenario.annotations}
          />
        </div>
      )}
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}
```

src/screens/sell-side/S3_EntityResolution.tsx
```
import { useState, useCallback } from 'react';
import type { ColumnDef } from '@tanstack/react-table';
import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import { DataTable } from '../../components/data-display/DataTable';
import EntityMergeCard from '../../components/interactive/EntityMergeCard';
import DownstreamImpactCard from '../../components/interactive/DownstreamImpactCard';
import CounterAnimation from '../../components/feedback/CounterAnimation';
import ProcessingOverlay from '../../components/feedback/ProcessingOverlay';
import ConfidenceBadge from '../../components/feedback/ConfidenceBadge';
import { ConcentrationChart } from '../../components/visualization/ConcentrationChart';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { useEntityStore } from '../../store/entityStore';
import { formatNumber, formatPercentage } from '../../utils/formatters';
import type { MatchCandidate, MatchConfidence } from '../../types/entity';
import type { ProcessingStep } from '../../types/demo';

const confidenceToLevel = (mc: MatchConfidence) => {
  if (mc === 'auto-merged') return 'high' as const;
  if (mc === 'review') return 'medium' as const;
  return 'low' as const;
};

const columns: ColumnDef<MatchCandidate, unknown>[] = [
  {
    accessorKey: 'entities',
    header: 'Entity',
    cell: ({ row }) => (
      <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">
        {row.original.entities[0]?.name ?? 'Unknown'}
      </span>
    ),
    enableSorting: false,
  },
  {
    accessorKey: 'similarityScore',
    header: 'Score',
    cell: ({ row }) => (
      <span className="text-sm font-mono text-gray-700">
        {formatPercentage(row.original.similarityScore, 1)}
      </span>
    ),
  },
  {
    accessorKey: 'matchConfidence',
    header: 'Confidence',
    cell: ({ row }) => (
      <ConfidenceBadge level={confidenceToLevel(row.original.matchConfidence)} />
    ),
    enableSorting: false,
  },
];

const PROCESSING_STEPS: ProcessingStep[] = [
  { label: 'Recalculating entity graph...', durationMs: 300 },
];

const TIER_ORDER: MatchConfidence[] = ['auto-merged', 'review', 'low'];
const TIER_LABELS: Record<MatchConfidence, string> = {
  'auto-merged': 'Auto-Merged (>95%)',
  review: 'Review (80-94%)',
  low: 'Low Confidence (60-79%)',
};

export default function S3_EntityResolution() {
  const scenario = useScenario();

  // Default to the primary entity (UHC for Summit Ortho) so the demo script's merge moment is pre-selected
  const defaultId = scenario.constants.ENTITY_NAMES?.PRIMARY_ID ?? scenario.matchCandidates[0]?.id ?? '';
  const [selectedId, setSelectedId] = useState<string>(defaultId);
  const [showOverlay, setShowOverlay] = useState(false);

  const {
    uniqueCount,
    mergedEntities,
    mergeAnimationPhase,
    mergeEntity,
    setAnimationPhase,
  } = useEntityStore();

  const selectedCandidate = scenario.matchCandidates.find((c) => c.id === selectedId) ?? scenario.matchCandidates[0];
  const isMerged = mergedEntities.has(selectedCandidate.id);

  const handleMerge = useCallback(() => {
    setShowOverlay(true);
  }, []);

  const handleProcessingComplete = useCallback(() => {
    setShowOverlay(false);
    // Beat 1: Counter animates
    setAnimationPhase('counter');
    mergeEntity(selectedCandidate.id);

    // Beat 2: Chart grows after counter finishes
    setTimeout(() => {
      setAnimationPhase('chart');
    }, 1200);

    // Beat 3: Downstream impact card fades in
    setTimeout(() => {
      setAnimationPhase('impact');
    }, 2800);

    // Complete
    setTimeout(() => {
      setAnimationPhase('complete');
    }, 4200);
  }, [selectedCandidate.id, mergeEntity, setAnimationPhase]);

  const handleRowClick = useCallback((row: MatchCandidate) => {
    setSelectedId(row.id);
  }, []);

  // Group candidates by tier
  const tiers = TIER_ORDER.map((tier) => ({
    tier,
    label: TIER_LABELS[tier],
    candidates: scenario.matchCandidates.filter((c) => c.matchConfidence === tier),
  })).filter((t) => t.candidates.length > 0);

  const showImpactPhase =
    mergeAnimationPhase === 'impact' || mergeAnimationPhase === 'complete';
  const showChartAnimation =
    mergeAnimationPhase === 'chart' ||
    mergeAnimationPhase === 'impact' ||
    mergeAnimationPhase === 'complete';

  return (
    <ScreenContainer
      title="Entities"
      subtitle={`${scenario.entityStats.uniqueEntityCount.toLocaleString()} unique entities \u00B7 ${scenario.matchCandidates.length} pending matches`}
      timeComparison={scenario.timeComparisons[1]}
    >
      <div className="flex gap-4 h-full min-h-0">
        {/* Left panel — Match list (25%) */}
        <div className="w-1/4 flex-shrink-0 overflow-y-auto space-y-4">
          {tiers.map(({ tier, label, candidates }) => (
            <div key={tier}>
              <h3 className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">
                {label}
              </h3>
              <DataTable
                columns={columns}
                data={candidates}
                onRowClick={handleRowClick}
              />
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* Center panel — Selected match detail (45%) */}
        <div className="flex-1 min-w-0 overflow-y-auto space-y-4">
          <div className="rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white p-4">
            <div className="mb-3 flex items-center justify-between">
              <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">
                Match Detail
              </h3>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">
                  Similarity: {formatPercentage(selectedCandidate.similarityScore, 1)}
                </span>
                <ConfidenceBadge
                  level={confidenceToLevel(selectedCandidate.matchConfidence)}
                  score={selectedCandidate.similarityScore}
                />
              </div>
            </div>

            <EntityMergeCard
              candidate={selectedCandidate}
              onMerge={handleMerge}
              animationPhase={isMerged ? 'complete' : mergeAnimationPhase}
            />

            {/* All entity records for candidates with >2 entities */}
            {selectedCandidate.entities.length > 2 && (
              <div className="mt-4 space-y-2">
                <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase">
                  All Source Records ({selectedCandidate.entities.length})
                </h4>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-2">
                  {selectedCandidate.entities.slice(2).map((entity) => (
                    <div
                      key={`${entity.systemId}-${entity.name}`}
                      className="rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-gray-50 p-3 text-sm"
                    >
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                          <span className="inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-blue-100 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium text-blue-700">
                            {entity.systemName}
                          </span>
                          <span className="font-medium text-gray-900">{entity.name}</span>
                        </div>
                        <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">
                          {entity.recordType} &middot; {formatNumber(entity.recordCount)} records
                        </span>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          {/* Downstream impact — fades in on Beat 3 */}
          <DownstreamImpactCard
            impact={scenario.mergeDownstreamImpact}
            visible={showImpactPhase}
          />
        </div>

        {/* Right panel — Stats + Concentration chart (30%) */}
        <div className="w-[30%] flex-shrink-0 overflow-y-auto space-y-4">
          {/* Running stats */}
          <div className="rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white p-4 space-y-3">
            <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">Resolution Summary</h3>
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
                <span className="text-gray-500">Raw Records</span>
                <span
                  className="font-semibold text-gray-900"
                  style={{ fontFamily: "'JetBrains Mono', monospace" }}
                >
                  {formatNumber(scenario.entityStats.rawRecordCount)}
                </span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
                <span className="text-gray-500">Unique Entities</span>
                <span
                  className="font-semibold text-gray-900"
                  style={{ fontFamily: "'JetBrains Mono', monospace" }}
                >
                  <CounterAnimation
                    value={uniqueCount}
                    format="number"
                    enabled={mergeAnimationPhase === 'counter' || mergeAnimationPhase === 'chart' || mergeAnimationPhase === 'impact' || mergeAnimationPhase === 'complete'}
                  />
                </span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
                <span className="text-gray-500">Deduplication Rate</span>
                <span
                  className="font-semibold text-gray-900"
                  style={{ fontFamily: "'JetBrains Mono', monospace" }}
                >
                  {formatPercentage(scenario.entityStats.deduplicationRate)}
                </span>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="border-t border-gray-100 pt-3 space-y-1 text-xs text-gray-500">
              <div className="flex justify-between">
                <span>Auto-merged</span>
                <span className="font-medium text-gray-700">{formatNumber(scenario.entityStats.autoMergedCount)}</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex justify-between">
                <span>Needs Review</span>
                <span className="font-medium text-gray-700">{formatNumber(scenario.entityStats.reviewCount)}</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex justify-between">
                <span>Rejected</span>
                <span className="font-medium text-gray-700">{formatNumber(scenario.entityStats.rejectedCount)}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Concentration chart */}
          <div className="rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white p-4">
            <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">
              Top Customer Concentration
            </h3>
            <ConcentrationChart
              before={scenario.constants.CONCENTRATION.before}
              after={isMerged || showChartAnimation ? scenario.constants.CONCENTRATION.after : scenario.constants.CONCENTRATION.before}
              threshold={scenario.constants.CONCENTRATION.threshold}
              animated={showChartAnimation && !isMerged}
            />
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Processing overlay */}
      <ProcessingOverlay
        steps={PROCESSING_STEPS}
        onComplete={handleProcessingComplete}
        visible={showOverlay}
      />
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}
```

src/screens/sell-side/S4_ARRReconciliation.tsx
```
import { useState, useCallback } from 'react';
import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import { MetricCard } from '../../components/data-display/MetricCard';
import { ReconciliationRow } from '../../components/data-display/ReconciliationRow';
import DrillDownPanel from '../../components/interactive/DrillDownPanel';
import LineagePopover from '../../components/interactive/LineagePopover';
import ProcessingOverlay from '../../components/feedback/ProcessingOverlay';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { useProcessingStore } from '../../store/processingStore';
import { formatCurrency } from '../../utils/formatters';
import type { ProcessingStep } from '../../types/demo';
import type { DrillDownItem } from '../../types/metric';

const PROCESSING_STEPS: ProcessingStep[] = [
  { label: 'Tracing to source records...', durationMs: 400 },
];

export default function S4_ARRReconciliation() {
  const scenario = useScenario();

  const [expandedMetricId, setExpandedMetricId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [showOverlay, setShowOverlay] = useState(false);
  const [pendingExpandId, setPendingExpandId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [lineageAnchor, setLineageAnchor] = useState<{ x: number; y: number } | null>(null);
  const [lineageItem, setLineageItem] = useState<DrillDownItem | null>(null);

  const { startProcessing, endProcessing } = useProcessingStore();

  const reconciliationMetrics = scenario.reconciliation.metrics;
  const timeComparisons = scenario.timeComparisons;
  const financialValues = scenario.constants.FINANCIAL_VALUES;
  const labels = scenario.reconciliation.labels;

  const handleExpand = useCallback(
    (metricId: string) => {
      if (expandedMetricId === metricId) {
        // Collapse
        setExpandedMetricId(null);
        return;
      }

      // Show processing overlay for Total ARR, open directly for others
      if (metricId === 'total-arr') {
        setPendingExpandId(metricId);
        setShowOverlay(true);
        startProcessing('arr-drill-down', 1);
      } else {
        setExpandedMetricId(metricId);
      }
    },
    [expandedMetricId, startProcessing],
  );

  const handleProcessingComplete = useCallback(() => {
    setShowOverlay(false);
    endProcessing();
    if (pendingExpandId) {
      setExpandedMetricId(pendingExpandId);
      setPendingExpandId(null);
    }
  }, [pendingExpandId, endProcessing]);

  const handleLineageClick = useCallback((item: DrillDownItem) => {
    // Position the popover near center of viewport
    setLineageAnchor({
      x: Math.max(window.innerWidth / 2 - 200, 20),
      y: Math.max(window.innerHeight / 2 - 160, 20),
    });
    setLineageItem(item);
  }, []);

  const handleLineageClose = useCallback(() => {
    setLineageAnchor(null);
    setLineageItem(null);
  }, []);

  const expandedMetric = reconciliationMetrics.find(
    (m) => m.id === expandedMetricId,
  );

  return (
    <ScreenContainer
      title="ARR"
      subtitle={`${labels.source1} \u00B7 ${labels.source2} \u00B7 ${labels.source3}`}
      timeComparison={timeComparisons[2]}
    >
      <div className="space-y-6">
        {/* Top metric cards */}
        <div className="flex gap-4">
          <MetricCard
            label={labels.source1}
            value={formatCurrency(financialValues.crm)}
            status="neutral"
          />
          <MetricCard
            label={labels.source2}
            value={formatCurrency(financialValues.billing)}
            status="neutral"
          />
          <MetricCard
            label={labels.source3}
            value={formatCurrency(financialValues.gl)}
            status="neutral"
          />
        </div>

        {/* Reconciliation rows */}
        <div className="space-y-2">
          {reconciliationMetrics.map((metric) => (
            <div key={metric.id}>
              <ReconciliationRow
                metric={metric}
                onExpand={() => handleExpand(metric.id)}
                expanded={expandedMetricId === metric.id}
              />

              {/* Expanded drill-down panel */}
              {expandedMetricId === metric.id && expandedMetric && (
                <div className="mt-2 ml-6 mb-4 rounded-lg border border-blue-100 bg-blue-50/30 p-4">
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-3">
                    {expandedMetric.variance.description}
                  </p>
                  <DrillDownPanel
                    categories={expandedMetric.variance.categories}
                    animated={metric.id === 'total-arr'}
                    onLineageClick={handleLineageClick}
                  />
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Processing overlay */}
      <ProcessingOverlay
        steps={PROCESSING_STEPS}
        onComplete={handleProcessingComplete}
        visible={showOverlay}
      />

      {/* Lineage popover (Level 3) */}
      {lineageAnchor && lineageItem && (
        <LineagePopover
          nodes={
            lineageItem.lineagePath ?? [
              {
                id: 'source-field',
                label: lineageItem.description,
                type: 'source-field',
              },
              {
                id: 'annotation',
                label: 'Field Annotation',
                type: 'annotation',
              },
              {
                id: 'concept',
                label: 'Revenue Concept',
                type: 'concept',
              },
              {
                id: 'metric',
                label: 'ARR Metric',
                type: 'metric',
              },
            ]
          }
          edges={[
            { source: 'source-field', target: 'annotation' },
            { source: 'annotation', target: 'concept' },
            { source: 'concept', target: 'metric' },
          ]}
          ghostNodes={[
            {
              id: 'other-paths',
              parentNodeId: 'concept',
              label: '+3 paths',
              pathCount: 3,
            },
          ]}
          anchor={lineageAnchor}
          onClose={handleLineageClose}
          onOpenFull={() => {
            // In full product this would open a full-screen lineage graph
            handleLineageClose();
          }}
        />
      )}
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}
```

src/screens/sell-side/S5_ExhibitGenerator.tsx
```
import { useState, useCallback, useMemo } from 'react';
import type { ColumnDef } from '@tanstack/react-table';

import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import { DataTable } from '../../components/data-display/DataTable';
import LineagePopover from '../../components/interactive/LineagePopover';
import { LineageFullView } from '../../components/visualization/LineageFullView';
import TimeComparisonBadge from '../../components/feedback/TimeComparisonBadge';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import type { Exhibit } from '../../types/exhibit';

function ExhibitStatusBadge({ status }: { status: Exhibit['status'] }) {
  const config: Record<Exhibit['status'], { label: string; colorClass: string }> = {
    ready: { label: 'Ready', colorClass: 'text-green-700 bg-green-50' },
    'needs-review': { label: 'Needs Review', colorClass: 'text-amber-700 bg-amber-50' },
    'in-progress': { label: 'In Progress', colorClass: 'text-blue-700 bg-blue-50' },
  };
  const c = config[status];
  return (
    <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium ${c.colorClass}`}>
      {c.label}
    </span>
  );
}

function formatDate(iso: string): string {
  return new Date(iso).toLocaleDateString('en-US', {
    month: 'short',
    day: 'numeric',
    year: 'numeric',
  });
}

export default function S5_ExhibitGenerator() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  const [selectedExhibit, setSelectedExhibit] = useState<Exhibit | null>(null);
  const [lineagePopover, setLineagePopover] = useState<{ x: number; y: number } | null>(null);
  const [showFullLineage, setShowFullLineage] = useState(false);

  const exhibits = scenario.exhibits.definitions;
  const lineagePaths = scenario.exhibits.lineagePaths;
  const ghostNodes = scenario.exhibits.ghostNodes;
  const fullLineageGraph = scenario.exhibits.fullLineageGraph;
  const timeComparisons = scenario.timeComparisons;

  const readyCount = exhibits.filter((e) => e.status === 'ready').length;
  const reviewCount = exhibits.filter((e) => e.status === 'needs-review').length;

  // Pick the first lineage path that matches selected exhibit, or default to first path
  const activeLineagePath = useMemo(() => {
    if (!selectedExhibit) return lineagePaths[0];
    const match = lineagePaths.find((lp) =>
      lp.label.toLowerCase().includes(selectedExhibit.name.toLowerCase().split(' ')[0])
    );
    return match ?? lineagePaths[0];
  }, [selectedExhibit, lineagePaths]);

  const activeGhostNodes = useMemo(() => {
    const nodeIds = new Set(activeLineagePath.nodes.map((n) => n.id));
    return ghostNodes.filter((gn) => nodeIds.has(gn.parentNodeId));
  }, [activeLineagePath, ghostNodes]);

  const handleCellClick = useCallback((e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    const rect = (e.currentTarget as HTMLElement).getBoundingClientRect();
    setLineagePopover({ x: rect.right + 8, y: rect.top });
  }, []);

  const columns = useMemo<ColumnDef<Exhibit, unknown>[]>(
    () => [
      {
        accessorKey: 'name',
        header: 'Exhibit',
        cell: (info) => (
          <span className="font-medium text-gray-900">{info.getValue() as string}</span>
        ),
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'status',
        header: 'Status',
        cell: (info) => <ExhibitStatusBadge status={info.getValue() as Exhibit['status']} />,
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'lastUpdated',
        header: 'Last Updated',
        cell: (info) => (
          <span className="text-gray-500 text-xs">{formatDate(info.getValue() as string)}</span>
        ),
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'issueCount',
        header: 'Issues',
        cell: (info) => {
          const count = info.getValue() as number;
          return count > 0 ? (
            <span className="text-amber-600 font-medium">{count}</span>
          ) : (
            <span className="text-gray-400">0</span>
          );
        },
      },
    ],
    []
  );

  const renderExhibitPreview = (exhibit: Exhibit) => {
    const renderer = scenario.exhibits.renderers[exhibit.id];
    if (renderer) {
      return renderer({ data: scenario.exhibits.data[exhibit.id] });
    }
    return (
      <div className="border border-gray-200 rounded overflow-hidden">
        <table className="w-full text-sm">
          <thead>
            <tr className="bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200">
              <th className="px-3 py-2 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500">Metric</th>
              <th className="px-3 py-2 text-right text-xs font-medium text-gray-500">Value</th>
              <th className="px-3 py-2 text-right text-xs font-medium text-gray-500">Source</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            <tr className="border-b border-gray-100">
              <td className="px-3 py-2 text-gray-900">{exhibit.name}</td>
              <td className="px-3 py-2 text-right font-mono text-gray-700">—</td>
              <td className="px-3 py-2 text-right text-gray-500 text-xs">Unified Ontology</td>
            </tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    );
  };

  return (
    <ScreenContainer
      title="Exhibits"
      subtitle={`${readyCount} of ${exhibits.length} exhibits ready. ${reviewCount} pending review.`}
      timeComparison={timeComparisons[3]}
    >
      <div className="flex gap-6 mt-4">
        {/* Left: Exhibit checklist */}
        <div className="w-1/2">
          <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700 mb-3">Readiness Checklist</h2>
          <DataTable
            columns={columns}
            data={exhibits}
            onRowClick={(exhibit) => setSelectedExhibit(exhibit)}
          />
        </div>

        {/* Right: Preview panel */}
        <div className="w-1/2">
          {selectedExhibit ? (
            <div className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg bg-white">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-200">
                <div>
                  <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">{selectedExhibit.name}</h3>
                  <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-0.5">
                    Click any cell to view lineage
                  </p>
                </div>
                <ExhibitStatusBadge status={selectedExhibit.status} />
              </div>
              <div className="p-4 space-y-3" onClick={handleCellClick}>
                {renderExhibitPreview(selectedExhibit)}
                {selectedExhibit.issueDescription && (
                  <div className="bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-xs text-amber-800">
                    {selectedExhibit.issueDescription}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-64 border border-dashed border-gray-300 rounded-lg bg-gray-50">
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">Select an exhibit to preview</p>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Time comparison badge at the bottom */}
      <div className="mt-6">
        <TimeComparisonBadge comparison={timeComparisons[3]} />
      </div>

      {/* Lineage Popover */}
      {lineagePopover && (
        <LineagePopover
          nodes={activeLineagePath.nodes}
          edges={activeLineagePath.edges}
          ghostNodes={activeGhostNodes}
          anchor={lineagePopover}
          onClose={() => setLineagePopover(null)}
          onOpenFull={() => {
            setLineagePopover(null);
            setShowFullLineage(true);
          }}
        />
      )}

      {/* Full Lineage View */}
      {showFullLineage && (
        <LineageFullView
          nodes={fullLineageGraph.nodes}
          edges={fullLineageGraph.edges}
          onClose={() => setShowFullLineage(false)}
        />
      )}
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}
```

src/screens/sell-side/S6_QuarterlyRefresh.tsx
```
import { useState, useMemo } from 'react';
import type { ColumnDef } from '@tanstack/react-table';

import ScreenContainer from '../../components/layout/ScreenContainer';
import { DataTable } from '../../components/data-display/DataTable';
import DiffView from '../../components/interactive/DiffView';

import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { useDriftStore } from '../../store/driftStore';
import type { RefreshReviewItem } from '../../types/drift';

const severityColors: Record<string, string> = {
  critical: 'text-red-700 bg-red-50',
  high: 'text-amber-700 bg-amber-50',
  low: 'text-green-700 bg-green-50',
};

const statusLabels: Record<string, string> = {
  new: 'New',
  investigating: 'Investigating',
  resolved: 'Resolved',
  'auto-acknowledged': 'Auto-acknowledged',
};

export default function S6_QuarterlyRefresh() {
  const scenario = useScenario();
  const driftAbsorbed = useDriftStore((s) => s.driftAbsorbed);
  const absorbDrift = useDriftStore((s) => s.absorbDrift);
  const [showToast, setShowToast] = useState(false);

  const quarterlyRefresh = scenario.quarterlyRefresh;
  const driftEvents = scenario.driftEvents;
  const schemaStats = scenario.constants.SCHEMA_STATS;

  // Mark drift as absorbed on mount if not already
  useState(() => {
    if (!driftAbsorbed) {
      absorbDrift();
    }
  });

  const handleReviewPublish = () => {
    setShowToast(true);
    setTimeout(() => setShowToast(false), 3000);
  };

  const { ontologyDiff } = quarterlyRefresh;

  const reviewColumns = useMemo<ColumnDef<RefreshReviewItem, unknown>[]>(
    () => [
      {
        accessorKey: 'description',
        header: 'Item',
        cell: (info) => (
          <span className="font-medium text-gray-900">{info.getValue() as string}</span>
        ),
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'type',
        header: 'Type',
        cell: (info) => {
          const type = info.getValue() as string;
          const label = type
            .split('-')
            .map((w) => w.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + w.slice(1))
            .join(' ');
          return (
            <span className="inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium text-blue-700 bg-blue-50">
              {label}
            </span>
          );
        },
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'detail',
        header: 'Detail',
        cell: (info) => (
          <span className="text-xs text-gray-600">{info.getValue() as string}</span>
        ),
      },
    ],
    []
  );

  const driftColumns = useMemo<ColumnDef<(typeof driftEvents)[0], unknown>[]>(
    () => [
      {
        accessorKey: 'systemName',
        header: 'System',
        cell: (info) => (
          <span className="font-medium text-gray-900">{info.getValue() as string}</span>
        ),
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'changeDescription',
        header: 'Change',
        cell: (info) => (
          <span className="text-sm text-gray-700">{info.getValue() as string}</span>
        ),
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'severity',
        header: 'Severity',
        cell: (info) => {
          const severity = info.getValue() as string;
          return (
            <span
              className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium ${
                severityColors[severity] ?? 'text-gray-700 bg-gray-50'
              }`}
            >
              {severity.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + severity.slice(1)}
            </span>
          );
        },
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'status',
        header: 'Status',
        cell: (info) => {
          const status = info.getValue() as string;
          return (
            <span className="text-xs text-gray-600">
              {statusLabels[status] ?? status}
            </span>
          );
        },
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'affectedAnnotations',
        header: 'Affected Annotations',
        cell: (info) => (
          <span className="font-mono text-sm text-gray-700">{info.getValue() as number}</span>
        ),
      },
    ],
    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
    []
  );

  return (
    <ScreenContainer
      title="Refresh Log"
      subtitle={`${quarterlyRefresh.quarter} close detected. Source data refreshed across ${schemaStats.totalSystems} systems.`}
    >
      {/* Summary stats */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-6 mt-2 mb-6">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <span className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{quarterlyRefresh.exhibitsUpdated}</span>
          <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">exhibits updated</span>
        </div>
        <span className="text-gray-300">&middot;</span>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <span className="text-2xl font-bold text-amber-600">{quarterlyRefresh.exhibitsNeedingReview}</span>
          <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">require human review</span>
        </div>
        <span className="text-gray-300">&middot;</span>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <span className="text-2xl font-bold text-green-600">{quarterlyRefresh.reconciliationBreaks}</span>
          <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">reconciliation breaks</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Review items table */}
      <div className="mb-6">
        <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700 mb-3">Items Requiring Review</h2>
        <DataTable
          columns={reviewColumns}
          data={quarterlyRefresh.reviewItems}
        />
      </div>

      {/* Drift events table */}
      <div className="mb-6">
        <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700 mb-3">Schema Drift Events</h2>
        <DataTable columns={driftColumns} data={driftEvents} />
      </div>

      {/* Diff view: Zuora v12 -> v13 */}
      <div className="mb-6">
        <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700 mb-3">
          Source Ontology Diff: {ontologyDiff.systemName} {ontologyDiff.previousVersion} &rarr; {ontologyDiff.newVersion}
        </h2>
        <DiffView
          additions={ontologyDiff.addedFields.map(
            (field) => `  ${field}: string  // New field detected in invoice object`
          )}
          removals={ontologyDiff.removedFields.map((field) => `  ${field}: string`)}
          changes={ontologyDiff.changedFields.map((field) => ({
            before: `  ${field}: string  // old type`,
            after: `  ${field}: string  // updated type`,
          }))}
        />
      </div>

      {/* Drift absorption summary */}
      <div className="bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 mb-6">
        <p className="text-sm text-blue-900 font-medium mb-1">Drift Absorbed</p>
        <p className="text-sm text-blue-800">
          {ontologyDiff.systemName} source ontology updated ({ontologyDiff.previousVersion} &rarr; {ontologyDiff.newVersion}).
          Unified ontology re-derived. {ontologyDiff.unaffectedExhibits} of {quarterlyRefresh.exhibitsUpdated} exhibits
          unaffected. {ontologyDiff.affectedExhibits} exhibit flagged: Gross Margin by Product Line.
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* Review & Publish button */}
      <div className="flex justify-end">
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={handleReviewPublish}
          className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium text-white rounded-lg transition-colors"
          style={{ backgroundColor: '#1A56DB' }}
        >
          Review &amp; Publish
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* Toast notification */}
      {showToast && (
        <div className="fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-gray-900 text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-3 shadow-lg text-sm">
          Demo mode — review workflow not available
        </div>
      )}
    </ScreenContainer>
  );
}
```

src/screens/sell-side/SellSideLayout.tsx
```
import { Outlet, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom';
import AppShell from '../../components/layout/AppShell';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import type { DealTimerConfig } from '../../types/demo';

export default function SellSideLayout() {
  const location = useLocation();
  const scenario = useScenario();

  const DEAL_TIMER: DealTimerConfig = {
    persona: 'sell-side',
    currentDay: scenario.sellSideLayout.dealTimer.day,
    totalDays: scenario.sellSideLayout.dealTimer.total,
    label: scenario.sellSideLayout.dealTimer.label,
  };

  // Extract the screen number from the path (e.g., "/sell-side/3" -> "3")
  const segments = location.pathname.split('/');
  const screenSegment = segments[segments.length - 1] ?? '';
  const currentScreen = screenSegment ? `/sell-side/${screenSegment}` : '/sell-side/1';

  return (
    <AppShell
      persona="sell-side"
      dealTimer={DEAL_TIMER}
      currentScreen={currentScreen}
    >
      <Outlet />
    </AppShell>
  );
}
```

src/screens/sell-side/SellSideProblem.tsx
```
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { useScenario } from '../../scenarios/ScenarioContext';
import { ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react';

// Stagger offsets to make the system tiles look disconnected
const OFFSETS = [12, -8, 20, -16, 6, -12, 18, -4, 14];

export default function SellSideProblem() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const scenario = useScenario();

  const formattedArr = `$${Math.round(scenario.company.arr / 1_000_000)}M ARR`;

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-900 flex flex-col items-center justify-center px-6 py-12">
      {/* Company Context */}
      <div className="text-center mb-12">
        <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-white tracking-tight mb-4">
          {scenario.company.name}
        </h1>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-3">
          <span className="px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-white/10 text-gray-300 text-sm">
            {formattedArr}
          </span>
          <span className="px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-white/10 text-gray-300 text-sm">
            {scenario.company.acquisitionCount} Acquisitions
          </span>
          <span className="px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-white/10 text-gray-300 text-sm">
            Going to Market
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Scattered System Logos */}
      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-center gap-5 max-w-2xl mb-14">
        {scenario.systems.map((sys, i) => (
          <div
            key={sys.id}
            className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg bg-white/5"
            style={{
              borderWidth: 1,
              borderStyle: 'solid',
              borderColor: `${sys.brandColor}33`,
              transform: `translateY(${OFFSETS[i]}px)`,
            }}
          >
            <img
              src={`/${sys.logoUrl.replace(/^public\//, '')}`}
              alt={sys.name}
              className="w-6 h-6"
            />
            <span className="text-sm text-gray-300 font-medium">{sys.name}</span>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Pain Stat Cards */}
      <div className="flex gap-5 max-w-3xl w-full mb-12">
        {scenario.problemScreen.painStats.map((stat, i) => (
          <div key={i} className="flex-1 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-6">
            <p className={`text-3xl font-bold mb-1 ${
              i === 0 ? 'text-amber-400' : i === 1 ? 'text-red-400' : 'text-gray-300'
            }`}>{stat.value}</p>
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">{stat.label}</p>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* CTA */}
      <button
        type="button"
        onClick={() => navigate('/sell-side/1')}
        className="flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-medium rounded-lg transition-colors cursor-pointer"
      >
        Solution
        <ArrowRight className="w-4 h-4" />
      </button>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/scenarios/meridian/hold-period/_constants.ts
```
// Meridian Hold-Period constants — acquirer, combined platform, and module targets.
// Imports from parent scenario are used in sibling data files; this file
// defines only the NEW constants introduced by the hold-period module.

// ── Acquirer: Crestview Digital Partners ──
export const ACQUIRER = {
  name: 'Crestview Digital Partners',
  entityCount: 4,
  systemCount: 12,
  revenue: 350_000_000,
} as const;

// ── Combined platform (target + acquirer) ──
export const COMBINED = {
  entityCount: 9, // 5 target business units + 4 acquirer business units
  systemCount: 21, // 9 target + 12 acquirer
  totalFields: 86_000,
  combinedRevenue: 550_000_000, // $200M + $350M
} as const;

// ── Act II: Value Creation Plan targets ──
export const VCP_TARGETS = {
  ebitdaTarget: 85_000_000,
  initiativeCount: 10,
  kpiCount: 24,
} as const;

// ── Act III: AI / ML applications ──
export const AI_APPS = {
  count: 3,
  totalImpact: 12_000_000,
} as const;

// ── Integration planning ──
export const INTEGRATION = {
  day1ChecklistItems: 18,
  systemMigrations: 21,
  fieldMappings: 86_000,
} as const;

// ── Churn Rate Thread — single source of truth ──
// Every fixture file that references churn rates MUST import from here.
// Never hardcode churn rate values in individual fixture files.
export const CHURN_RATE_THREAD = {
  reported: 12.0,               // S4: what Meridian reported in diligence (vs. 6.8% in sell-side)
  actual: 16.8,                 // What Data Foundry found across all systems / I-3: canonical
  perSystemVariants: {          // I-3 / A-1: before reconciliation
    salesforceOrg1: 8.5,        // Only tracks explicit "Churned" stage
    salesforceOrg2: 11.2,       // Includes downgrades as churn
    hubspot: 22.4,              // Counts trial expirations as churn
    zuora: 14.1,                // Subscription cancellation rate
    stripe: 19.7,               // Payment failure → involuntary churn
    chargebee: 13.8,            // Annual non-renewal only
  },
  tuckInRate: 18.5,             // V-1: Helix Analytics churn rate (flagged)
  platformReconciled: 16.2,     // V-2 post-resolution, V-3, A-1 resolved, A-2
  postDriftPerEntity: {         // V-2: after drift resolution
    E1: 15.8,
    E3: 17.1,
    E5: 16.4,
  },
  aiPredictionTarget: 9.5,     // A-3: projected post-AI rate
  enterpriseRate: 11.3,         // A-1: enterprise segment, drives retention focus
} as const;

// ── Helix Analytics (tuck-in entity) ──
export const HELIX = {
  name: 'Helix Analytics',
  entityId: 'entity-10',
  sites: 1,
  systems: [
    { id: 'sys-hubspot-helix', name: 'HubSpot' },
    { id: 'sys-stripe-helix', name: 'Stripe' },
  ],
  tables: 12,
  fields: 3_500,
} as const;

// ── Annotation Velocity (improving auto-accept rates) ──
export const ANNOTATION_VELOCITY = {
  crestview: 86.1,
  meridian: 88.7,
  helix: 91.2,
} as const;
```

import type {
  BrokenQueryResults,
  ResolvedQueryResults,
  MLFeatureCandidate,
  TrainingDatasetSummary,
  PredictionRouting,
} from '../../../types/ai';
import { CHURN_RATE_THREAD } from './_constants';

// ── Broken Query: "What is our churn rate by segment?" WITHOUT semantic layer ──

export const BROKEN_QUERY_RESULTS: BrokenQueryResults = {
  rows: [
    // CRM systems — each defines churn differently
    { entityId: 'entity-1', entityName: 'Meridian Core', systemName: 'Salesforce Org 1', metricValue: CHURN_RATE_THREAD.perSystemVariants.salesforceOrg1, issues: ['Only tracks explicit "Churned" stage — misses downgrades and non-renewals'], isConsistent: false },
    { entityId: 'entity-2', entityName: 'Meridian Growth', systemName: 'Salesforce Org 2', metricValue: CHURN_RATE_THREAD.perSystemVariants.salesforceOrg2, issues: ['Includes downgrades as churn — inflates vs. logo-only definition'], isConsistent: false },
    { entityId: 'entity-3', entityName: 'Meridian SMB', systemName: 'HubSpot', metricValue: CHURN_RATE_THREAD.perSystemVariants.hubspot, issues: ['Counts trial expirations as churn', 'Massively inflated rate — includes never-converted trials'], isConsistent: false },
    // Billing systems — subscription vs. payment vs. renewal definitions
    { entityId: 'entity-1', entityName: 'Meridian Core', systemName: 'Zuora', metricValue: CHURN_RATE_THREAD.perSystemVariants.zuora, issues: ['Subscription cancellation rate only — misses revenue churn from downgrades'], isConsistent: false },
    { entityId: 'entity-2', entityName: 'Meridian Growth', systemName: 'Stripe', metricValue: CHURN_RATE_THREAD.perSystemVariants.stripe, issues: ['Payment failure → involuntary churn', 'Includes recoverable failed charges'], isConsistent: false },
    { entityId: 'entity-3', entityName: 'Meridian SMB', systemName: 'Chargebee', metricValue: CHURN_RATE_THREAD.perSystemVariants.chargebee, issues: ['Annual non-renewal only — ignores monthly churn entirely'], isConsistent: false },
    // ERP systems — no churn concept
    { entityId: 'entity-1', entityName: 'Meridian Core', systemName: 'NetSuite', metricValue: null, issues: ['ERP system — no customer churn data available'], isConsistent: false },
    { entityId: 'entity-4', entityName: 'Meridian International', systemName: 'SAP B1', metricValue: null, issues: ['ERP system — no customer churn data available'], isConsistent: false },
    { entityId: 'entity-5', entityName: 'Meridian Startup', systemName: 'QuickBooks', metricValue: null, issues: ['ERP system — no customer churn data available'], isConsistent: false },
  ],
  payerVariants: [
    { rawName: 'Apex Medical', entityId: 'entity-1' },
    { rawName: 'Apex Medical Systems', entityId: 'entity-2' },
    { rawName: 'Apex Med Sys Inc', entityId: 'entity-3' },
    { rawName: 'APEX-MEDICAL', entityId: 'entity-4' },
  ],
  calloutText:
    'Without a semantic layer, every system defines "churn" differently. ' +
    'Salesforce Org 1 only tracks explicit stage changes. HubSpot counts trial expirations, inflating the rate to 22.4%. ' +
    'Stripe conflates payment failures with voluntary churn. ERPs have no churn concept at all. ' +
    'And top customer "Apex Medical" appears under four names, so any GROUP BY on customer splits revenue across four rows. ' +
    'An AI model trained on this data would learn the noise, not the signal.',
  failureStatText: '80%+ of AI projects fail to reach production. This is why.',
  summaryStats: {
    conflictingDefinitions: 6,
    duplicateSegments: 4,
    systemsReturningZero: 0,
    systemsReturningNA: 3,
  },
};

// ── Resolved Query: Same question WITH the semantic layer ──

export const RESOLVED_QUERY_RESULTS: ResolvedQueryResults = {
  rows: [
    { entityId: 'entity-1', entityName: 'Meridian Core', systemName: 'Salesforce Org 1', metricValue: 15.4, issues: [], isConsistent: true },
    { entityId: 'entity-1', entityName: 'Meridian Core', systemName: 'Zuora', metricValue: 15.4, issues: [], isConsistent: true },
    { entityId: 'entity-1', entityName: 'Meridian Core', systemName: 'NetSuite', metricValue: 15.4, issues: [], isConsistent: true },
    { entityId: 'entity-2', entityName: 'Meridian Growth', systemName: 'Salesforce Org 2', metricValue: 16.9, issues: [], isConsistent: true },
    { entityId: 'entity-2', entityName: 'Meridian Growth', systemName: 'Stripe', metricValue: 16.9, issues: [], isConsistent: true },
    { entityId: 'entity-3', entityName: 'Meridian SMB', systemName: 'HubSpot', metricValue: 17.8, issues: [], isConsistent: true },
    { entityId: 'entity-3', entityName: 'Meridian SMB', systemName: 'Chargebee', metricValue: 17.8, issues: [], isConsistent: true },
    { entityId: 'entity-4', entityName: 'Meridian International', systemName: 'SAP B1', metricValue: 14.7, issues: [], isConsistent: true },
    { entityId: 'entity-5', entityName: 'Meridian Startup', systemName: 'QuickBooks', metricValue: 16.1, issues: [], isConsistent: true },
  ],
  segmentBreakdown: [
    { segmentName: 'Enterprise', metricValue: CHURN_RATE_THREAD.enterpriseRate, volume: 142 },
    { segmentName: 'Mid-Market', metricValue: 15.8, volume: 486 },
    { segmentName: 'SMB', metricValue: 19.2, volume: 1_840 },
    { segmentName: 'Startup', metricValue: 22.1, volume: 3_200 },
  ],
  platformAverage: CHURN_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled,
  resolutionSteps: [
    { label: 'Canonicalize "churn" definition across 6 system variants', durationMs: 380 },
    { label: 'Resolve 127 customer name variants to canonical accounts', durationMs: 310 },
    { label: 'Backfill ERP revenue churn from billing system subscription events', durationMs: 490 },
    { label: 'Exclude trial expirations from logo churn calculation', durationMs: 220 },
  ],
  summaryStats: {
    canonicalDefinitions: 1,
    resolvedSegments: 4,
    consistentEntities: 9,
  },
};

// ── ML Feature Candidates for Churn Prediction ──

export const ML_FEATURES: MLFeatureCandidate[] = [
  {
    name: 'Months Since Last Expansion',
    canonicalConcept: 'canonical_expansion_recency',
    sourceFieldCount: 8,
    completeness: 96,
    consistency: 94,
    freshness: 97,
    lineagePath: ['zuora.subscription_mrr_changes', 'stripe.invoice_line_items', 'chargebee.plan_changes → canonical_expansion_recency'],
    demoOrigin: 'I-3: Subscription event unification across 3 billing platforms',
  },
  {
    name: 'Support Tickets (90d)',
    canonicalConcept: 'canonical_support_volume',
    sourceFieldCount: 5,
    completeness: 99,
    consistency: 97,
    freshness: 99,
    lineagePath: ['hubspot.tickets.created_at', 'salesforce.cases.created_date → canonical_support_volume (windowed 90d)'],
    demoOrigin: 'S2: Annotation layer mapped CRM ticket fields to canonical support concept',
  },
  {
    name: 'NPS Score',
    canonicalConcept: 'canonical_nps',
    sourceFieldCount: 4,
    completeness: 82,
    consistency: 90,
    freshness: 78,
    lineagePath: ['hubspot.contact_properties.nps', 'salesforce.custom_fields.nps_score → canonical_nps'],
    demoOrigin: 'S3: Ontology mapping linked NPS across CRM systems',
  },
  {
    name: 'Contract Months Remaining',
    canonicalConcept: 'canonical_contract_remaining',
    sourceFieldCount: 9,
    completeness: 98,
    consistency: 93,
    freshness: 95,
    lineagePath: ['zuora.subscriptions.term_end_date', 'chargebee.subscriptions.next_billing_at', 'stripe.subscriptions.current_period_end → canonical_contract_remaining'],
    demoOrigin: 'I-2: Schema harmonization unified contract term fields across billing systems',
  },
  {
    name: 'Usage Trend (30d)',
    canonicalConcept: 'canonical_usage_trend',
    sourceFieldCount: 6,
    completeness: 91,
    consistency: 88,
    freshness: 100,
    lineagePath: ['product_db.daily_active_users', 'product_db.api_call_volume → canonical_usage_trend (30d slope)'],
    demoOrigin: 'V-1: KPI baseline identified usage decline as leading churn indicator',
  },
  {
    name: 'Payment Failures (90d)',
    canonicalConcept: 'canonical_payment_failures',
    sourceFieldCount: 7,
    completeness: 100,
    consistency: 96,
    freshness: 98,
    lineagePath: ['stripe.charges.failure_code', 'zuora.payments.status', 'chargebee.transactions.error_code → canonical_payment_failures'],
    demoOrigin: 'S4: Revenue reconciliation traced failed payments across billing systems',
  },
  {
    name: 'Days Since Last Login',
    canonicalConcept: 'canonical_login_recency',
    sourceFieldCount: 3,
    completeness: 95,
    consistency: 99,
    freshness: 100,
    lineagePath: ['product_db.user_sessions.last_seen_at → canonical_login_recency (days)'],
    demoOrigin: 'A-1: Semantic layer unified user activity signals into single engagement metric',
  },
];

// ── Training Dataset Assembly ──

export const TRAINING_DATASET: TrainingDatasetSummary = {
  totalRecords: 182_400,
  positiveCount: 29_549,
  positiveRate: CHURN_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled,
  negativeCount: 152_851,
  positiveLabel: 'Churned',
  negativeLabel: 'Retained',
  perEntityContribution: [
    { entityId: 'entity-1', entityName: 'Meridian Core', records: 48_600 },
    { entityId: 'entity-2', entityName: 'Meridian Growth', records: 38_200 },
    { entityId: 'entity-3', entityName: 'Meridian SMB', records: 32_100 },
    { entityId: 'entity-4', entityName: 'Meridian International', records: 21_800 },
    { entityId: 'entity-5', entityName: 'Meridian Startup', records: 14_200 },
    { entityId: 'entity-6', entityName: 'Crestview Platform A', records: 9_800 },
    { entityId: 'entity-7', entityName: 'Crestview Platform B', records: 8_200 },
    { entityId: 'entity-8', entityName: 'Crestview Platform C', records: 5_900 },
    { entityId: 'entity-9', entityName: 'Crestview Platform D', records: 3_500 },
  ],
  largestSingleEntity: 48_600,
  crossEntityMultiplier: 5.2,
  assemblySteps: [
    { label: 'Load canonical customer-month records from 21 source systems', durationMs: 980 },
    { label: 'Apply unified churn definition across all entities', durationMs: 540 },
    { label: 'Join 7 ML features via semantic layer lookups', durationMs: 720 },
    { label: 'Deduplicate cross-entity customer records via account matching', durationMs: 380 },
    { label: 'Validate label balance — 182,400 customer-months assembled across 9 entities', durationMs: 260 },
  ],
  counterfactual: {
    pipelineCount: 6,
    definitionConflicts: 12,
    segmentVariants: 127,
    timelinePerEntity: 6,
    estimatedCost: 1_800_000,
  },
};

// ── Prediction Routing ──

export const PREDICTION_ROUTING: PredictionRouting = {
  prediction: {
    fields: [
      { label: 'Customer', value: 'Apex Medical Systems' },
      { label: 'Segment', value: 'Enterprise' },
      { label: 'ARR', value: '$2.4M' },
      { label: 'Contract', value: 'Renews in 47 days' },
    ],
    probability: 78,
    probabilityLabel: 'Churn Probability',
    reasoning:
      'Apex Medical Systems has a 78% churn probability based on converging signals: ' +
      'zero expansion in 14 months, 3.1× support ticket increase, NPS dropped from 42 to 18, ' +
      'and DAU declined 34% over 30 days. Enterprise segment churn rate is ' +
      CHURN_RATE_THREAD.enterpriseRate + '% platform-wide, but this account\'s engagement ' +
      'pattern matches churned accounts at 4.2× the baseline.',
    recommendedAction: 'Escalate to VP Sales, schedule QBR within 5 days, prepare retention offer (12-month lock at 15% discount)',
  },
  canonicalFormat: {
    canonical_customer_id: 'CUST-APEX-2941',
    canonical_segment: 'Enterprise',
    canonical_arr: 2_400_000,
    canonical_contract_end: '2026-05-01',
    canonical_usage_trend: -0.34,
    churn_probability: 78,
    model_version: 'v1.3.0',
    recommended_action: 'executive_escalation_retention',
  },
  systemTranslations: [
    {
      systemId: 'sys-salesforce-1',
      systemName: 'Salesforce Org 1',
      targetField: 'account_health_score',
      alertLevel: 'CRITICAL',
      worklistEntry: {
        priority: 'P1',
        description: 'Churn risk 78% — Apex Medical ($2.4M ARR). Schedule executive QBR immediately.',
      },
      entityIds: ['entity-1'],
    },
    {
      systemId: 'sys-zuora',
      systemName: 'Zuora',
      targetField: 'renewal_risk_flag',
      alertLevel: 'HIGH',
      worklistEntry: {
        priority: 'P1',
        description: 'Renewal at risk — 47 days to expiration, 78% churn probability. Prepare retention offer.',
      },
      entityIds: ['entity-1'],
    },
    {
      systemId: 'sys-hubspot',
      systemName: 'HubSpot',
      targetField: 'customer_success_alert',
      alertLevel: 'URGENT',
      worklistEntry: {
        priority: 'P1',
        description: 'Critical engagement decline — DAU -34%, support tickets 3.1× baseline. Assign dedicated CSM.',
      },
      entityIds: ['entity-3'],
    },
  ],
  aggregateImpact: {
    items: [
      { key: 'churn-prevention', amount: 5_200_000, label: 'Churn Prevention' },
      { key: 'expansion-intelligence', amount: 4_100_000, label: 'Expansion Intelligence' },
      { key: 'cs-optimization', amount: 2_700_000, label: 'CS Optimization' },
    ],
    total: 12_000_000,
    multipleValue: 144_000_000,
  },
  routingSteps: [
    { label: 'Translating canonical format to Salesforce Org 1 schema', durationMs: 450 },
    { label: 'Translating canonical format to Zuora subscription model', durationMs: 380 },
    { label: 'Routing to HubSpot customer success workflow', durationMs: 320 },
  ],
};

src/scenarios/meridian/hold-period/index.ts
```
import { ACQUIRER_COMPANY } from './acquirer';
import { COMBINED } from './_constants';
import {
  COMBINED_ENTITIES,
  SYSTEM_MIGRATIONS,
  INTEGRATION_READINESS,
  INGESTION_ANIMATION_DATA,
  SCHEMA_CONFLICTS,
  SANKEY_FLOWS,
  KPI_RECONCILIATIONS,
} from './integration';
import {
  KPIS,
  EBITDA_BRIDGE,
  TUCK_IN_ENTITY,
  KPI_DRIFT_EVENT,
  PORTFOLIO_HEATMAP,
  DATA_ROOM_EXHIBITS,
  DATA_ROOM_CONFIG,
  ENTITY_ORG_MAP,
  EXHIBIT_PREVIEW_DATA,
} from './vcp';
import {
  BROKEN_QUERY_RESULTS,
  RESOLVED_QUERY_RESULTS,
  ML_FEATURES,
  TRAINING_DATASET,
  PREDICTION_ROUTING,
} from './ai';
import { PROBLEM_SCREEN_CONFIGS } from './problem-screens';
// Side-effect import: runs churn rate thread assertions at build time
import './validate-thread';

export const holdPeriodData = {
  acquirer: ACQUIRER_COMPANY,
  combined: {
    entityCount: COMBINED.entityCount,
    systemCount: COMBINED.systemCount,
    totalFields: COMBINED.totalFields,
    combinedRevenue: COMBINED.combinedRevenue,
  },

  // Act I: Integration
  combinedEntities: COMBINED_ENTITIES,
  systemMigrations: SYSTEM_MIGRATIONS,
  integrationReadiness: INTEGRATION_READINESS,
  ingestionAnimationData: INGESTION_ANIMATION_DATA,
  schemaConflicts: SCHEMA_CONFLICTS,
  sankeyFlows: SANKEY_FLOWS,
  kpiReconciliations: KPI_RECONCILIATIONS,

  // Act II: VCP
  kpis: KPIS,
  ebitdaBridge: EBITDA_BRIDGE,
  tuckInEntity: TUCK_IN_ENTITY,
  kpiDriftEvent: KPI_DRIFT_EVENT,
  portfolioHeatmap: PORTFOLIO_HEATMAP,
  dataRoomExhibits: DATA_ROOM_EXHIBITS,
  dataRoomConfig: DATA_ROOM_CONFIG,
  entityOrgMap: ENTITY_ORG_MAP,
  exhibitPreviewData: EXHIBIT_PREVIEW_DATA,

  // Act III: AI
  brokenQueryResults: BROKEN_QUERY_RESULTS,
  resolvedQueryResults: RESOLVED_QUERY_RESULTS,
  mlFeatures: ML_FEATURES,
  trainingDataset: TRAINING_DATASET,
  predictionRouting: PREDICTION_ROUTING,

  // Config
  problemScreens: PROBLEM_SCREEN_CONFIGS,
  layoutConfig: {
    dealTimer: { day: 60, total: 1825, label: 'Hold Period' },
  },
};
```

src/scenarios/meridian/hold-period/integration.ts
```
import type {
  CombinedEntity,
  SystemMigrationItem,
  IntegrationReadinessScore,
  IngestionAnimationState,
  SchemaConflict,
  SankeyFlow,
  KPIReconciliation,
} from '../../../types/integration';

import { CHURN_RATE_THREAD, ANNOTATION_VELOCITY } from './_constants';

// ── Combined Entities (16 total: 8 data entity types × 2 origins) ──

export const COMBINED_ENTITIES: CombinedEntity[] = [
  // Target entities (8) — Meridian
  { id: 'ce-customer-target', name: 'Customer', source: 'target', systemCount: 6, fieldCount: 5_800 },
  { id: 'ce-subscription-target', name: 'Subscription', source: 'target', systemCount: 3, fieldCount: 4_200 },
  { id: 'ce-contract-target', name: 'Contract', source: 'target', systemCount: 3, fieldCount: 3_600 },

    ],
    dollarImpact: { amount: 12_500_000, description: '$12.5M ARR variance from one-time fee inclusion and methodology differences' },
    vcpBaseline: { value: 547_000_000, label: '$547M combined ARR' },
  },

  // 3. Customer Count
  {
    kpiId: 'kpi-customer-count',
    kpiName: 'Customer Count',
    definitionVariants: [
      {
        entityId: 'ce-customer-target',
        entityName: 'Meridian (Salesforce)',
        definitionText: 'Active Accounts — includes subsidiaries as separate customers',
        sourceFields: ['sf_accounts.status', 'sf_accounts.type'],
        valueUnderLocal: 2_847,
        valueUnderCanonical: 2_312,
      },
      {
        entityId: 'ce-customer-target',
        entityName: 'Meridian (Stripe)',
        definitionText: 'Billing accounts with active subscription',
        sourceFields: ['stripe_customers.active_subscriptions'],
        valueUnderLocal: 3_124,
        valueUnderCanonical: 2_312,
      },
      {
        entityId: 'ce-customer-acquirer',
        entityName: 'Crestview (Salesforce)',
        definitionText: 'License organizations with active assignment',
        sourceFields: ['sf_accounts.license_status'],
        valueUnderLocal: 4_215,
        valueUnderCanonical: 3_890,
      },
    ],
    canonicalDefinition: 'Unique organizations with at least one active paid subscription, deduplicated by corporate hierarchy',
    downstreamCascade: [
      { type: 'exhibit', label: 'QoE Exhibit — Customer Base', previousState: 'Meridian: 2,847–3,124 depending on system', newState: 'Unified at 2,312' },
      { type: 'risk-flag', label: 'Customer Deduplication Gap', previousState: '535 apparent duplicates between CRM and billing', newState: 'Deduped to 2,312 unique organizations', detail: 'Subsidiary entities were counted as separate customers' },
    ],
    dollarImpact: { amount: 0, description: 'No direct revenue impact — affects per-customer metrics (ARPU, CAC, LTV)' },
    vcpBaseline: { value: 6_202, label: '6,202 combined unique customers' },
  },

  // 4. Gross Margin
  {
    kpiId: 'kpi-gross-margin',
    kpiName: 'Gross Margin',
    definitionVariants: [
      {
        entityId: 'ce-revenue-target',
        entityName: 'Meridian (NetSuite)',
        definitionText: 'Revenue minus COGS (hosting + support labor only)',
        sourceFields: ['ns_revenue.total', 'ns_cogs.hosting', 'ns_cogs.support_labor'],
        valueUnderLocal: 78.2,
        valueUnderCanonical: 72.1,
      },
      {
        entityId: 'ce-revenue-acquirer',
        entityName: 'Crestview (NetSuite)',
        definitionText: 'Revenue minus COGS (hosting + support + professional services + infrastructure)',
        sourceFields: ['ns_revenue.total', 'ns_cogs.all_categories'],
        valueUnderLocal: 68.5,
        valueUnderCanonical: 72.1,
      },
    ],
    canonicalDefinition: 'Revenue minus COGS (hosting, support labor, third-party infrastructure) / Revenue',
    downstreamCascade: [
      { type: 'exhibit', label: 'QoE Exhibit — Margin Analysis', previousState: 'Meridian 78.2%, Crestview 68.5%', newState: 'Combined 72.1%' },
      { type: 'vcp-baseline', label: 'VCP Margin Improvement', previousState: 'Inconsistent COGS allocation', newState: 'Baseline: 72.1%', detail: 'Target: 76% via infrastructure consolidation' },
    ],
    dollarImpact: { amount: 4_200_000, description: '$4.2M apparent margin gap from COGS allocation differences' },
    vcpBaseline: { value: 72.1, label: '72.1% combined gross margin' },
  },

  // 5. Net Revenue Retention
  {
    kpiId: 'kpi-nrr',
    kpiName: 'Net Revenue Retention',
    definitionVariants: [
      {
        entityId: 'ce-revenue-target',

      { type: 'vcp-baseline', label: 'VCP Expansion Strategy', previousState: 'Different measurement windows', newState: 'Baseline: 112%', detail: 'Target: 120% via cross-sell synergies' },
    ],

    vcpBaseline: { value: 112, label: '112% combined NRR' },
  },
];
