src/scenarios/meridian/hold-period/validate-thread.ts
```
// Churn Rate Thread validation — ensures all fixture files use CHURN_RATE_THREAD
// constants and never hardcode churn rate values. Runs at build time when imported.

import { CHURN_RATE_THREAD } from './_constants';
import { KPI_RECONCILIATIONS } from './integration';
import { PORTFOLIO_HEATMAP, KPI_DRIFT_EVENT } from './vcp';
import { RESOLVED_QUERY_RESULTS, TRAINING_DATASET } from './ai';

function assert(condition: boolean, message: string): void {
  if (!condition) {
    throw new Error(`[Churn Rate Thread] ${message}`);
  }
}

// ── Internal consistency of the thread itself ──

assert(
  CHURN_RATE_THREAD.reported < CHURN_RATE_THREAD.actual,
  `Reported rate (${CHURN_RATE_THREAD.reported}) should be less than actual (${CHURN_RATE_THREAD.actual})`,
);

assert(
  CHURN_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled < CHURN_RATE_THREAD.actual,
  `Platform reconciled (${CHURN_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled}) should be < actual (${CHURN_RATE_THREAD.actual}) after drift resolution`,
);

assert(
  CHURN_RATE_THREAD.aiPredictionTarget < CHURN_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled,
  `AI prediction target (${CHURN_RATE_THREAD.aiPredictionTarget}) should be less than current reconciled (${CHURN_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled})`,
);

// ── Cross-fixture: I-3 KPI Reconciliations ──

const churnReconciliation = KPI_RECONCILIATIONS.find(
  (r) => r.kpiId === 'kpi-churn-rate',
);
assert(
  churnReconciliation !== undefined,
  'KPI_RECONCILIATIONS must include a churn-rate reconciliation',
);
assert(
  churnReconciliation!.vcpBaseline.value === CHURN_RATE_THREAD.actual,
  `I-3 vcpBaseline churn rate (${churnReconciliation!.vcpBaseline.value}) should match CHURN_RATE_THREAD.actual (${CHURN_RATE_THREAD.actual})`,
);

// ── Cross-fixture: V-2 Drift Detection post-resolution ──

assert(
  KPI_DRIFT_EVENT.postResolution.platformReconciledRate === CHURN_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled,
  `V-2 post-resolution platform rate (${KPI_DRIFT_EVENT.postResolution.platformReconciledRate}) should match platformReconciled (${CHURN_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled})`,
);

// ── Cross-fixture: V-3 Portfolio Heatmap ──

const churnHeatmapCells = PORTFOLIO_HEATMAP.filter(
  (c) => c.kpiId === 'kpi-churn-rate',
);
assert(
  churnHeatmapCells.length > 0,
  'V-3 heatmap must include churn-rate cells',
);

// ── Cross-fixture: A-1 Resolved Query Results ──

assert(
  RESOLVED_QUERY_RESULTS.platformAverage === CHURN_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled,
  `A-1 resolved platformAverage (${RESOLVED_QUERY_RESULTS.platformAverage}) should match platformReconciled (${CHURN_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled})`,
);

// ── Cross-fixture: A-2 Training Dataset ──

assert(
  TRAINING_DATASET.positiveRate === CHURN_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled,
  `A-2 training dataset positiveRate (${TRAINING_DATASET.positiveRate}) should match platformReconciled (${CHURN_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled})`,
);

// ── Cross-fixture: A-3 prediction target ──

assert(
  CHURN_RATE_THREAD.aiPredictionTarget === 9.5,
  `AI prediction target should be 9.5, got ${CHURN_RATE_THREAD.aiPredictionTarget}`,
);

export function validateChurnRateThread(): string[] {
  // All assertions above run at module load time.
  // This function exists for explicit invocation in dev mode.
  return [];
}
```

src/scenarios/meridian/hold-period/vcp.ts
```
import type {
  KPI,
  EBITDABridge,
  TuckInEntity,
  KPIDriftEvent,
  PortfolioHeatmapCell,
  DataRoomExhibit,
  DataRoomConfig,
  ExhibitPreviewData,
} from '../../../types/vcp';
import { CHURN_RATE_THREAD, HELIX, ANNOTATION_VELOCITY } from './_constants';

// ── KPIs (24 total: 6 revenue + 6 cost + 6 operational + 6 growth) ──

export const KPIS: KPI[] = [
  // Revenue (6)
  { id: 'kpi-arr', name: 'ARR', category: 'revenue', current: 547_000_000, target: 620_000_000, unit: '$', trend: 'improving', baselineSource: 'Zuora + Stripe + Chargebee' },
  { id: 'kpi-nrr', name: 'Net Revenue Retention', category: 'revenue', current: 112, target: 120, unit: '%', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'Unified cohort analysis' },
  { id: 'kpi-grr', name: 'Gross Revenue Retention', category: 'revenue', current: 88.5, target: 93.0, unit: '%', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'Billing consolidation' },
  { id: 'kpi-revenue-per-customer', name: 'Revenue per Customer', category: 'revenue', current: 88_200, target: 100_000, unit: '$', trend: 'improving', baselineSource: 'ARR / deduped customers' },
  { id: 'kpi-expansion-pct', name: 'Expansion Revenue %', category: 'revenue', current: 24.5, target: 30.0, unit: '%', trend: 'improving', baselineSource: 'Salesforce + Zuora' },
  { id: 'kpi-concentration', name: 'Revenue Concentration (Top 10)', category: 'revenue', current: 18.2, target: 15.0, unit: '%', trend: 'declining', baselineSource: 'Unified customer analysis' },

  // Cost (6)
  { id: 'kpi-gross-margin', name: 'Gross Margin', category: 'cost', current: 72.1, target: 76.0, unit: '%', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'GL consolidation' },
  { id: 'kpi-cac', name: 'CAC', category: 'cost', current: 42_000, target: 35_000, unit: '$', trend: 'improving', baselineSource: 'Marketing + Sales spend' },
  { id: 'kpi-cac-payback', name: 'CAC Payback Period', category: 'cost', current: 18, target: 14, unit: 'months', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'CAC / monthly margin' },
  { id: 'kpi-sm-pct', name: 'S&M as % of Revenue', category: 'cost', current: 32.5, target: 28.0, unit: '%', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'GL consolidation' },
  { id: 'kpi-rd-pct', name: 'R&D as % of Revenue', category: 'cost', current: 22.8, target: 20.0, unit: '%', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'GL consolidation' },
  { id: 'kpi-ga-pct', name: 'G&A as % of Revenue', category: 'cost', current: 12.4, target: 9.5, unit: '%', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'GL consolidation' },

  // Operational (6)
  { id: 'kpi-churn-rate', name: 'Churn Rate', category: 'operational', current: CHURN_RATE_THREAD.actual, target: 9.0, unit: '%', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'Unified subscription analysis' },
  { id: 'kpi-logo-churn', name: 'Logo Churn Rate', category: 'operational', current: 8.4, target: 5.0, unit: '%', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'Deduped customer base' },
  { id: 'kpi-time-to-close', name: 'Time to Close', category: 'operational', current: 78, target: 55, unit: 'days', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'Salesforce Org 1 + Org 2' },
  { id: 'kpi-ticket-resolution', name: 'Support Ticket Resolution', category: 'operational', current: 4.2, target: 2.0, unit: 'days', trend: 'improving', baselineSource: 'HubSpot + Zendesk' },
  { id: 'kpi-nps', name: 'NPS', category: 'operational', current: 42, target: 55, unit: 'score', trend: 'improving', baselineSource: 'Survey consolidation' },
  { id: 'kpi-onboarding-time', name: 'Onboarding Time', category: 'operational', current: 45, target: 28, unit: 'days', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'CS platform' },

  // Growth (6)
  { id: 'kpi-mrr-growth', name: 'MRR Growth Rate', category: 'growth', current: 2.1, target: 3.5, unit: '%', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'Billing consolidation' },
  { id: 'kpi-pipeline', name: 'Pipeline Coverage', category: 'growth', current: 3.2, target: 4.0, unit: 'x', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'Salesforce combined' },
  { id: 'kpi-win-rate', name: 'Win Rate', category: 'growth', current: 22.5, target: 28.0, unit: '%', trend: 'improving', baselineSource: 'Salesforce combined' },
  { id: 'kpi-deal-size', name: 'Average Deal Size', category: 'growth', current: 65_000, target: 80_000, unit: '$', trend: 'improving', baselineSource: 'Salesforce + billing' },
  { id: 'kpi-upsell-rate', name: 'Upsell Rate', category: 'growth', current: 18.3, target: 25.0, unit: '%', trend: 'improving', baselineSource: 'Expansion analysis' },
  { id: 'kpi-free-to-paid', name: 'Free-to-Paid Conversion', category: 'growth', current: 4.8, target: 7.0, unit: '%', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'Product analytics' },
];

// ── EBITDA Bridge (waterfall from base to $85M target) ──

export const EBITDA_BRIDGE: EBITDABridge[] = [
  { label: 'Current Combined EBITDA', value: 48_000_000, type: 'base' },
  { label: 'Billing Consolidation', value: 8_200_000, type: 'add', initiativeId: 'init-01' },
  { label: 'CRM Consolidation', value: 6_500_000, type: 'add', initiativeId: 'init-02' },
  { label: 'Churn Reduction (AI-Driven)', value: 12_000_000, type: 'add', initiativeId: 'init-03' },
  { label: 'Pricing Optimization', value: 5_800_000, type: 'add', initiativeId: 'init-04' },
  { label: 'G&A Consolidation', value: 7_200_000, type: 'add', initiativeId: 'init-05' },
  { label: 'R&D Efficiency', value: 4_800_000, type: 'add', initiativeId: 'init-06' },
  { label: 'Cross-sell / Upsell Synergies', value: 9_500_000, type: 'add', initiativeId: 'init-07' },
  { label: 'Integration Costs', value: -12_000_000, type: 'subtract' },
  { label: 'Stranded Costs / Dis-synergies', value: -5_000_000, type: 'subtract' },
  { label: 'Target EBITDA (Year 3)', value: 85_000_000, type: 'total' },
];

// ── Tuck-In Entity: Helix Analytics ──

export const TUCK_IN_ENTITY: TuckInEntity = {
  name: HELIX.name,
  sites: HELIX.sites,
  systems: [...HELIX.systems],
  tables: HELIX.tables,
  fields: HELIX.fields,
  annotationResults: {
    totalFields: HELIX.fields,
    autoAccepted: 3_192,
    autoAcceptRate: ANNOTATION_VELOCITY.helix,
    highConfidence: 264,
    needsReview: 44,
  },
  kpiMappings: [
    // Auto-mapped (21)
    { kpiId: 'kpi-arr', kpiName: 'ARR', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'stripe_subscriptions.mrr × 12' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-nrr', kpiName: 'Net Revenue Retention', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'stripe_subscriptions.expansion_mrr / beginning_mrr' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-grr', kpiName: 'Gross Revenue Retention', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'stripe_subscriptions.retained_mrr / beginning_mrr' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-revenue-per-customer', kpiName: 'Revenue per Customer', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'stripe_subscriptions.total_mrr × 12 / hubspot_contacts.company_count' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-expansion-pct', kpiName: 'Expansion Revenue %', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'stripe_subscriptions.expansion_mrr / total_mrr' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-concentration', kpiName: 'Revenue Concentration', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'stripe_subscriptions.top_10_mrr / total_mrr' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-gross-margin', kpiName: 'Gross Margin', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: '(revenue - cogs) / revenue' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-cac', kpiName: 'CAC', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'hubspot_marketing.spend / hubspot_contacts.new_customers' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-cac-payback', kpiName: 'CAC Payback Period', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'cac / (arpu × gross_margin / 12)' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-sm-pct', kpiName: 'S&M as % of Revenue', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'hubspot_marketing.total_spend / revenue' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-ga-pct', kpiName: 'G&A as % of Revenue', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'ga_expenses / revenue' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-logo-churn', kpiName: 'Logo Churn Rate', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'hubspot_contacts.churned_companies / total_companies' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-time-to-close', kpiName: 'Time to Close', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'hubspot_deals.avg_days_to_close' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-ticket-resolution', kpiName: 'Support Ticket Resolution', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'hubspot_tickets.avg_resolution_days' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-nps', kpiName: 'NPS', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'hubspot_surveys.nps_score' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-onboarding-time', kpiName: 'Onboarding Time', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'hubspot_deals.onboarding_days' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-mrr-growth', kpiName: 'MRR Growth Rate', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'stripe_subscriptions.mrr_growth_pct' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-pipeline', kpiName: 'Pipeline Coverage', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'hubspot_deals.pipeline_value / quarterly_target' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-win-rate', kpiName: 'Win Rate', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'hubspot_deals.won / total_closed' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-deal-size', kpiName: 'Average Deal Size', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'hubspot_deals.avg_deal_value' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-upsell-rate', kpiName: 'Upsell Rate', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'stripe_subscriptions.upsell_count / active_count' },
    // Flagged (3)
    {
      kpiId: 'kpi-churn-rate', kpiName: 'Churn Rate', status: 'flagged',
      flagReason: `Different churn definition — Helix reports ${CHURN_RATE_THREAD.tuckInRate}% including trial expirations`,
      sourceField: 'stripe_subscriptions.canceled_count / total_count',
    },
    {
      kpiId: 'kpi-rd-pct', kpiName: 'R&D as % of Revenue', status: 'flagged',
      flagReason: 'R&D costs tracked in HubSpot CRM as deal costs — not standard GL categorization',
      sourceField: 'hubspot_deals.rd_cost_allocation',
    },
    {

    },
  ],
  entityMatches: [
    {
      matchedEntityName: 'Apex Medical Systems',
      matchType: 'auto-merge',
      confidence: 'high',
      reason: 'Company domain, billing email, and contract terms match existing Meridian customer',
    },
    {
      matchedEntityName: 'TechVantage Solutions',
      matchType: 'flagged',
      confidence: 'medium',
      reason: 'Domain matches but different billing entity — may be subsidiary or acquired company',
    },
    {
      matchedEntityName: 'DataBridge Health',
      matchType: 'flagged',
      confidence: 'medium',
      reason: 'Company name fuzzy-matches Crestview customer "Data Bridge Healthcare" but different domains',
    },
  ],
  processingSteps: [
    { label: 'Connecting to HubSpot & Stripe', durationMs: 1_600 },
    { label: 'Ingesting 12 tables, 3,500 fields', durationMs: 2_000 },
    { label: 'Running annotation model (91.2% auto-accept)', durationMs: 2_800 },
    { label: 'Mapping to 24 portfolio KPIs', durationMs: 1_800 },
    { label: 'Matching entities across platform', durationMs: 1_400 },
    { label: 'Generating tuck-in integration report', durationMs: 1_000 },
  ],
};

// ── KPI Drift Event: Zuora Schema Change ──

export const KPI_DRIFT_EVENT: KPIDriftEvent = {
  systemName: 'Zuora',
  detectedAt: '3 hours ago',
  affectedEntityIds: ['entity-1', 'entity-3', 'entity-5'],
  schemaDiff: [
    {
      field: 'subscription_status',
      changeType: 'enum-modified',
      before: 'ACTIVE | CANCELLED | EXPIRED | SUSPENDED',
      after: 'ACTIVE | TERMINATED | LAPSED | SUSPENDED | PENDING_CANCEL',
      detail: 'CANCELLED renamed to TERMINATED, EXPIRED renamed to LAPSED, new PENDING_CANCEL added — downstream consumers expecting "CANCELLED" will match zero rows',
    },
    {
      field: 'churn_reason_code',
      changeType: 'field-added',
      after: 'VOLUNTARY | INVOLUNTARY | DOWNGRADE | NON_RENEWAL | PAYMENT_FAILURE',
      detail: 'New categorical field added to subscription table — enriches churn analysis but has no existing annotation',
    },
    {
      field: 'cancellation_effective_date',
      changeType: 'field-added',
      after: 'DATE (nullable)',
      detail: 'New date field tracking when cancellation takes effect — differs from cancellation_request_date',
    },
  ],
  kpiImpacts: [
    {
      kpiName: 'Churn Rate',
      severity: 'breaking',
      detail: 'Churn rate drops to 0% — CANCELLED enum value no longer exists in subscription_status, all churn-counting queries return zero',
      brokenValue: 0.0,
      correctedValues: { ...CHURN_RATE_THREAD.postDriftPerEntity },
    },
    {
      kpiName: 'Gross Revenue Retention',
      severity: 'potential',
      detail: 'GRR calculation depends on subscription_status to identify churned revenue — may undercount with new enum values',
    },
    {
      kpiName: 'ARR',
      severity: 'none',
      detail: 'ARR calculation uses MRR from active subscriptions — not affected by cancellation status changes',
    },
  ],
  resolutionMappings: [
    {
      sourceValue: 'TERMINATED',
      canonicalValue: 'Cancelled',
      confidence: 'high',
      reasoning: 'TERMINATED is the direct successor to the previous CANCELLED value — same business meaning',
      needsReview: false,
    },
    {
      sourceValue: 'LAPSED',
      canonicalValue: 'Cancelled',
      confidence: 'high',
      reasoning: 'LAPSED (expired without renewal) is functionally equivalent to cancellation for churn tracking',
      needsReview: false,
    },
    {
      sourceValue: 'PENDING_CANCEL',
      canonicalValue: 'At Risk',
      confidence: 'medium',
      reasoning: 'PENDING_CANCEL is not yet churned — mapped to new "At Risk" concept for proactive retention, flagged for review',
      needsReview: true,
    },
    {
      sourceValue: 'churn_reason_code',
      canonicalValue: 'New concept: Churn Reason',
      confidence: 'high',
      reasoning: 'New field with no existing mapping — auto-created as new concept with VOLUNTARY/INVOLUNTARY/DOWNGRADE values',
      needsReview: false,
    },
  ],
  postResolution: {
    platformReconciledRate: CHURN_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled,
    annotationsFlaggedForReview: 1,
    exhibitsRegenerated: ['Churn Rate Trends', 'NRR Cohort Analysis', 'Customer Retention Dashboard'],
  },
};

// ── Entity → Organization mapping for portfolio grouping ──

export const ENTITY_ORG_MAP: Record<string, string> = {
  'entity-1': 'Meridian', 'entity-2': 'Meridian', 'entity-3': 'Meridian',
  'entity-4': 'Meridian', 'entity-5': 'Meridian',
  'entity-6': 'Crestview', 'entity-7': 'Crestview', 'entity-8': 'Crestview',
  'entity-9': 'Crestview',
  'entity-10': 'Helix',
};

// ── Portfolio Heatmap: 10 entities × 6 KPIs = 60 cells ──

interface HeatmapKpiDef { id: string; name: string; target: number; lowerIsBetter: boolean }
interface HeatmapEntityDef { id: string; name: string }

const HEATMAP_KPIS: HeatmapKpiDef[] = [
  { id: 'kpi-churn-rate', name: 'Churn Rate', target: 9.0, lowerIsBetter: true },
  { id: 'kpi-arr', name: 'ARR', target: 620_000_000, lowerIsBetter: false },
  { id: 'kpi-nrr', name: 'NRR', target: 120, lowerIsBetter: false },
  { id: 'kpi-gross-margin', name: 'Gross Margin', target: 76.0, lowerIsBetter: false },
  { id: 'kpi-cac', name: 'CAC', target: 35_000, lowerIsBetter: true },
  { id: 'kpi-nps', name: 'NPS', target: 55, lowerIsBetter: false },
];

const HEATMAP_ENTITIES: HeatmapEntityDef[] = [
  { id: 'entity-1', name: 'Meridian Core' },
  { id: 'entity-2', name: 'Meridian Analytics' },
  { id: 'entity-3', name: 'Meridian Connect' },
  { id: 'entity-4', name: 'Meridian Insights' },
  { id: 'entity-5', name: 'Meridian DataHub' },
  { id: 'entity-6', name: 'Crestview Platform' },
  { id: 'entity-7', name: 'Crestview Analytics' },
  { id: 'entity-8', name: 'Crestview Health' },
  { id: 'entity-9', name: 'Crestview SMB' },
  { id: 'entity-10', name: 'Helix Analytics' },
];

const DRIFT_RESOLVED_IDS = new Set(['entity-1', 'entity-3', 'entity-5']);

// Raw heatmap values: pairs of [value, baseline] for each of 6 KPIs per entity
const HEATMAP_RAW: Record<string, number[]> = {
  'entity-1':  [CHURN_RATE_THREAD.postDriftPerEntity.E1, 18.2, 120_000_000, 115_000_000, 114, 110, 74.2, 72.8, 38_000, 42_000, 48, 44],
  'entity-2':  [14.8, 16.5, 42_000_000, 40_000_000, 108, 105, 71.5, 70.2, 45_000, 48_000, 40, 38],
  'entity-3':  [CHURN_RATE_THREAD.postDriftPerEntity.E3, 19.1, 36_500_000, 34_000_000, 106, 103, 69.8, 68.5, 52_000, 55_000, 38, 35],
  'entity-4':  [13.2, 14.8, 85_000_000, 82_000_000, 116, 113, 73.1, 71.8, 40_000, 43_000, 45, 42],
  'entity-5':  [CHURN_RATE_THREAD.postDriftPerEntity.E5, 17.8, 62_000_000, 60_000_000, 111, 109, 70.4, 69.1, 48_000, 51_000, 42, 39],
  'entity-6':  [11.2, 12.5, 145_000_000, 140_000_000, 118, 115, 76.8, 75.2, 34_000, 36_000, 52, 49],
  'entity-7':  [12.8, 14.2, 78_000_000, 75_000_000, 112, 110, 72.4, 71.1, 41_000, 44_000, 46, 43],
  'entity-8':  [15.1, 16.8, 92_000_000, 88_000_000, 109, 106, 68.2, 66.8, 46_000, 49_000, 44, 41],
  'entity-9':  [18.4, 20.1, 33_000_000, 31_000_000, 104, 101, 65.5, 64.2, 55_000, 58_000, 35, 32],
  'entity-10': [CHURN_RATE_THREAD.tuckInRate, 18.5, 8_000_000, 8_000_000, 102, 102, 68.0, 68.0, 52_000, 52_000, 38, 38],
};

function computeHeatmapStatus(value: number, target: number, lowerIsBetter: boolean): 'green' | 'yellow' | 'red' {
  const pctToTarget = lowerIsBetter ? (target - value) / target : (value - target) / target;
  if (pctToTarget >= -0.05) return 'green';
  if (pctToTarget >= -0.20) return 'yellow';
  return 'red';
}

function computeHeatmapTrend(value: number, baseline: number, lowerIsBetter: boolean): 'up' | 'down' | 'flat' {
  const delta = value - baseline;
  const threshold = Math.abs(baseline) < 1 ? 0.01 : 0.01 * Math.abs(baseline);
  if (Math.abs(delta) < threshold) return 'flat';
  if (lowerIsBetter) return delta < 0 ? 'up' : 'down';
  return delta > 0 ? 'up' : 'down';
}

export const PORTFOLIO_HEATMAP: PortfolioHeatmapCell[] = (() => {
  const cells: PortfolioHeatmapCell[] = [];
  for (const entity of HEATMAP_ENTITIES) {
    const raw = HEATMAP_RAW[entity.id];
    for (let k = 0; k < HEATMAP_KPIS.length; k++) {
      const kpi = HEATMAP_KPIS[k];
      const value = raw[k * 2];
      const baseline = raw[k * 2 + 1];
      const badges: ('new' | 'drift-resolved')[] = [];
      if (entity.id === 'entity-10') badges.push('new');
      if (DRIFT_RESOLVED_IDS.has(entity.id)) badges.push('drift-resolved');
      cells.push({
        entityId: entity.id,
        entityName: entity.name,
        kpiId: kpi.id,
        kpiName: kpi.name,
        value,
        baseline,
        target: kpi.target,
        trend: computeHeatmapTrend(value, baseline, kpi.lowerIsBetter),
        status: computeHeatmapStatus(value, kpi.target, kpi.lowerIsBetter),
        badges,
      });
    }
  }
  return cells;
})();

// ── Data Room Exhibits (6 existing + 6 hold-period = 12 total) ──

export const DATA_ROOM_EXHIBITS: DataRoomExhibit[] = [
  // Existing exhibits (category: 'existing')
  {
    exhibitId: 'exhibit-01', name: 'ARR Bridge', category: 'existing', generationStatus: 'ready',
    previewData: { combinedARR: '$547M', methodology: 'Annualized MRR', entityCount: 9 },
    lineageHistory: [
      { timestamp: '2023-09-01T10:00:00Z', eventType: 'initial-annotation', description: 'Revenue fields annotated across 6 billing systems', sourceSystem: 'Zuora, Stripe, Chargebee' },
      { timestamp: '2024-03-15T14:30:00Z', eventType: 'definition-updated', description: 'ARR methodology unified — excluded one-time fees', beforeValue: '$203M (Meridian)', afterValue: '$198.5M (Meridian adjusted)' },
      { timestamp: '2025-03-01T16:00:00Z', eventType: 'entity-added', description: 'Crestview entities merged — combined ARR calculated', afterValue: '$547M' },
    ],

  {
    exhibitId: 'exhibit-02', name: 'Customer Concentration Analysis', category: 'existing', generationStatus: 'ready',
    previewData: { topCustomer: 'Apex Medical', concentration: '7.8%', threshold: '10%', riskLevel: 'Normal' },
    lineageHistory: [
      { timestamp: '2023-09-01T10:00:00Z', eventType: 'initial-annotation', description: 'Customer revenue fields annotated', sourceSystem: 'Salesforce, Zuora' },
      { timestamp: '2025-03-01T16:00:00Z', eventType: 'entity-added', description: 'Crestview customer data merged — concentration recalculated across 9 entities' },

    previewData: { currentRate: `${CHURN_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled}%`, reportedRate: `${CHURN_RATE_THREAD.reported}%`, reconciledRate: `${CHURN_RATE_THREAD.actual}%`, trendDirection: 'Improving' },
    lineageHistory: [
      { timestamp: '2023-09-01T10:00:00Z', eventType: 'initial-annotation', description: 'Churn fields annotated — initial reported rate 12.0%', sourceSystem: 'Salesforce, Zuora, Stripe' },
      { timestamp: '2024-05-18T13:45:00Z', eventType: 'definition-updated', description: 'Churn definition reconciled across systems — actual rate found to be 16.8%', beforeValue: '12.0%', afterValue: '16.8%' },
      { timestamp: '2025-11-20T08:30:00Z', eventType: 'drift-detected', description: 'Zuora schema change renamed CANCELLED → TERMINATED — churn rate dropped to 0%', sourceSystem: 'Zuora' },
      { timestamp: '2025-11-20T10:00:00Z', eventType: 'drift-resolved', description: 'TERMINATED + LAPSED mapped to canonical Cancelled concept', resolution: 'Auto-mapped TERMINATED and LAPSED, flagged PENDING_CANCEL for review', afterValue: `${CHURN_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled}%` },
    ],

  {

    lineageHistory: [

  {

    lineageHistory: [

      { timestamp: '2025-03-01T16:00:00Z', eventType: 'entity-added', description: 'Crestview acquisition cost data merged — unified CAC methodology applied' },
    ],

  // New hold-period exhibits (category: 'hold-period')
  {

    lineageHistory: [

      { timestamp: '2025-12-01T09:00:00Z', eventType: 'entity-added', description: 'Helix Analytics systems (HubSpot, Stripe) added to rationalization roadmap' },
    ],
  },
];

// ── Data Room Configuration ──

export const DATA_ROOM_CONFIG: DataRoomConfig = {
  entityScope: [
    'entity-1', 'entity-2', 'entity-3', 'entity-4', 'entity-5',
    'entity-6', 'entity-7', 'entity-8', 'entity-9', 'entity-10',
