src/screens/hold-period/components/CascadeImpactTable.tsx
```
import { useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import {
  useReactTable,
  getCoreRowModel,
  getSortedRowModel,
  flexRender,
  type ColumnDef,
  type SortingState,
} from '@tanstack/react-table';
import { ChevronDown, ChevronUp, ChevronsUpDown } from 'lucide-react';
import type { CascadeImpactRow, I3CascadeFilters } from './reconciliation-types';

const TYPE_STYLES: Record<string, string> = {
  exhibit: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 border-blue-200',
  'risk-flag': 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 border-amber-200',
  'vcp-baseline': 'bg-green-100 text-green-700 border-green-200',
};

const TYPE_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
  exhibit: 'Exhibit',
  'risk-flag': 'Risk Flag',
  'vcp-baseline': 'VCP Baseline',
};

interface CascadeImpactTableProps {
  rows: CascadeImpactRow[];
  kpisReconciled: string[];
  filters: I3CascadeFilters;
  onFilterChange: (key: keyof I3CascadeFilters, value: string) => void;
  kpiNames: { kpiId: string; kpiName: string }[];
}

export default function CascadeImpactTable({
  rows,
  kpisReconciled,
  filters,
  onFilterChange,
  kpiNames,
}: CascadeImpactTableProps) {
  const [sorting, setSorting] = useState<SortingState>([]);

  // Filter rows
  const filteredRows = useMemo(() => {
    return rows.filter((r) => {
      if (filters.kpi !== 'all' && r.kpiId !== filters.kpi) return false;
      if (filters.type !== 'all' && r.type !== filters.type) return false;
      return true;
    });
  }, [rows, filters]);

  const columns = useMemo<ColumnDef<CascadeImpactRow, unknown>[]>(() => [
    {
      accessorKey: 'kpiName',
      header: 'KPI',
      size: 160,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => (
        <span className="text-sm text-gray-800">{getValue() as string}</span>
      ),
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'type',
      header: 'Type',
      size: 120,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => {
        const type = getValue() as string;
        return (
          <span className={`inline-flex rounded-full border px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium ${TYPE_STYLES[type] ?? ''}`}>
            {TYPE_LABELS[type] ?? type}
          </span>
        );
      },
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'label',
      header: 'Item',
      size: 200,
      cell: ({ row }) => (
        <div>
          <span className="text-sm text-gray-800">{row.original.label}</span>
          {row.original.detail && (
            <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 italic mt-0.5">{row.original.detail}</p>
          )}
        </div>
      ),
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'previousState',
      header: 'Previous State',
      size: 200,
      cell: ({ row }) => {
        const isReconciled = kpisReconciled.includes(row.original.kpiId);
        return (
          <span className={`text-sm text-gray-500 ${isReconciled ? 'line-through' : ''}`}>
            {row.original.previousState}
          </span>
        );
      },
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'newState',
      header: 'Updated State',
      size: 200,
      cell: ({ row }) => {
        const isReconciled = kpisReconciled.includes(row.original.kpiId);
        return (
          <span className={`text-sm ${isReconciled ? 'text-gray-800 font-medium' : 'text-gray-400'}`}>
            {row.original.newState}
          </span>
        );
      },
    },
    {
      id: 'status',
      header: 'Status',
      size: 100,
      enableSorting: false,
      cell: ({ row }) => {
        const isReconciled = kpisReconciled.includes(row.original.kpiId);
        if (isReconciled) {
          return (
            <span className="inline-flex rounded-full border border-green-200 bg-green-50 px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium text-green-700">
              Updated
            </span>
          );
        }
        return (
          <span className="inline-flex rounded-full border border-gray-200 bg-gray-50 px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium text-gray-500">
            Pending
          </span>
        );
      },
    },
  ], [kpisReconciled]);

  const table = useReactTable({
    data: filteredRows,
    columns,
    state: { sorting },
    onSortingChange: setSorting,
    getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel(),
    getSortedRowModel: getSortedRowModel(),
    getRowId: (row) => row.id,
  });

  return (
    <div className="space-y-3">
      {/* Filter chips */}
      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
        <FilterGroup
          label="KPI"
          options={[
            { value: 'all', label: 'All' },
            ...kpiNames.map((k) => ({ value: k.kpiId, label: k.kpiName })),
          ]}
          active={filters.kpi}
          onChange={(v) => onFilterChange('kpi', v)}
        />
        <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
        <FilterGroup
          label="Type"
          options={[
            { value: 'all', label: 'All' },
            { value: 'exhibit', label: 'Exhibit' },
            { value: 'risk-flag', label: 'Risk Flag' },
            { value: 'vcp-baseline', label: 'VCP Baseline' },
          ]}
          active={filters.type}
          onChange={(v) => onFilterChange('type', v)}
        />
      </div>

      {/* Table */}
      <div className="overflow-x-auto rounded-lg border border-gray-200">
        <table className="w-full text-left">
          <thead>
            <tr className="bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200">
              {table.getHeaderGroups()[0].headers.map((header) => (
                <th
                  key={header.id}
                  className="px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider select-none"
                  style={{ width: header.getSize() }}
                >
                  {header.isPlaceholder ? null : (
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      className={`flex items-center gap-1 ${header.column.getCanSort() ? 'cursor-pointer hover:text-gray-700' : ''}`}
                      onClick={header.column.getToggleSortingHandler()}
                      disabled={!header.column.getCanSort()}
                    >
                      {flexRender(header.column.columnDef.header, header.getContext())}
                      {header.column.getCanSort() && (
                        header.column.getIsSorted() === 'asc'
                          ? <ChevronUp size={12} />
                          : header.column.getIsSorted() === 'desc'
                            ? <ChevronDown size={12} />
                            : <ChevronsUpDown size={12} className="text-gray-300" />
                      )}
                    </button>
                  )}
                </th>
              ))}
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {table.getRowModel().rows.map((row) => {
              const isReconciled = kpisReconciled.includes(row.original.kpiId);
              return (
                <tr
                  key={row.id}
                  className={`border-b border-gray-100 ${
                    isReconciled ? 'bg-green-50/20' : ''
                  }`}
                >
                  {row.getVisibleCells().map((cell) => (
                    <td key={cell.id} className="px-3 py-2" style={{ width: cell.column.getSize() }}>
                      {flexRender(cell.column.columnDef.cell, cell.getContext())}
                    </td>
                  ))}
                </tr>
              );
            })}
            {filteredRows.length === 0 && (
              <tr>
                <td colSpan={columns.length} className="px-3 py-8 text-center text-sm text-gray-400">
                  No cascade items match the current filters
                </td>
              </tr>
            )}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── Filter chip group (same pattern as FieldMappingTable) ──

function FilterGroup({
  label,
  options,
  active,
  onChange,
}: {
  label: string;
  options: { value: string; label: string }[];
  active: string;
  onChange: (value: string) => void;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
      <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mr-1">{label}</span>
      {options.map((opt) => (
        <button
          key={opt.value}
          type="button"
          onClick={() => onChange(opt.value)}
          className={`rounded-md px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium transition-colors ${
            active === opt.value
              ? 'bg-gray-800 text-white'
              : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-200 hover:text-gray-700'
          }`}
        >
          {opt.label}
        </button>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/DriftDetailPanel.tsx
```
import { X } from 'lucide-react';
import ConfidenceBadge from '../../../components/feedback/ConfidenceBadge';
import type { DriftEventRow } from './drift-types';
import type { KPIDriftEvent } from '../../../types/vcp';

interface DriftDetailPanelProps {
  row: DriftEventRow;
  drift: KPIDriftEvent;
  resolved: boolean;
  onResolve: () => void;
  onClose: () => void;
}

export default function DriftDetailPanel({
  row,
  drift,
  resolved,
  onResolve,
  onClose,
}: DriftDetailPanelProps) {
  const diff = row.schemaDiff;
  const impacts = row.relatedImpacts;
  const mappings = row.relatedMappings;
  const impact = impacts[0];

  return (
    <div className="rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white p-5 animate-in fade-in duration-300">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
        <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">
          <code className="font-mono">{diff.field}</code>
          <span className="ml-2 text-xs font-normal text-gray-500">{row.changeType}</span>
        </h3>
        <button type="button" onClick={onClose} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600">
          <X size={16} />
        </button>
      </div>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-5 gap-6">
        {/* Left: Diff view + impact */}
        <div className="col-span-3 space-y-4">
          {/* Diff */}
          <div>
            <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Schema Change</p>
            {diff.before && (
              <div className="flex items-start gap-2 mb-1.5">
                <span className="text-[10px] font-medium text-red-500 mt-0.5 w-10 flex-shrink-0">Before</span>
                <code className="text-[11px] text-red-700 bg-red-50 rounded px-1.5 py-0.5 font-mono break-all">
                  {diff.before}
                </code>
              </div>
            )}
            <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
              <span className="text-[10px] font-medium text-green-500 mt-0.5 w-10 flex-shrink-0">After</span>
              <code className="text-[11px] text-green-700 bg-green-50 rounded px-1.5 py-0.5 font-mono break-all">
                {diff.after}
              </code>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Impact description */}
          {impact && (
            <div>
              <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">Impact</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-gray-700 leading-relaxed">{impact.detail}</p>
              {impact.severity === 'breaking' && impact.brokenValue !== undefined && (
                <p className="text-xs text-gray-600 mt-2">
                  If unresolved, denial rate for {drift.affectedEntityIds.length} entities would drop to {impact.brokenValue}%.
                </p>
              )}
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Affected entities */}
          <div>
            <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">Affected Entities</p>
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-600">
              {drift.affectedEntityIds.map((id) => id.replace('entity-', 'Entity ')).join(', ')}
            </p>
          </div>

          {/* Post-resolution metadata */}
          {resolved && (
            <div className="border-t border-gray-100 pt-3">
              <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Resolution Result</p>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-xs text-gray-600">
                <span>Platform Reconciled Rate: <strong className="text-gray-800">{drift.postResolution.platformReconciledRate}%</strong></span>
                <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
                <span>Annotations Flagged: <strong className="text-gray-800">{drift.postResolution.annotationsFlaggedForReview}</strong></span>
                <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
                <span>Exhibits Regenerated: <strong className="text-gray-800">{drift.postResolution.exhibitsRegenerated.length}</strong></span>
              </div>
              <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1.5">
                {drift.postResolution.exhibitsRegenerated.join(', ')}
              </p>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Right: Resolution mappings */}
        <div className="col-span-2">
          <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Resolution Mappings</p>
          {mappings.length > 0 ? (
            <div className="space-y-2.5">
              {mappings.map((mapping) => (
                <div key={mapping.sourceValue} className="rounded-lg border border-gray-100 bg-gray-50 p-2.5">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
                    <code className="text-[11px] font-mono text-gray-700">{mapping.sourceValue}</code>
                    <span className="text-gray-400 text-xs">&rarr;</span>
                    <span className="text-[11px] font-medium text-indigo-700">{mapping.canonicalValue}</span>
                    <span className="ml-auto">
                      <ConfidenceBadge level={mapping.confidence} />
                    </span>
                  </div>
                  <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">{mapping.reasoning}</p>
                  {mapping.needsReview && (
                    <span className="inline-block mt-1 text-[10px] font-medium text-amber-700 bg-amber-100 rounded px-1.5 py-0.5">
                      Flagged for review
                    </span>
                  )}
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          ) : (
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">No resolution mappings for this field</p>
          )}

          {/* Resolve button */}
          {!resolved && mappings.length > 0 && (
            <button
              onClick={onResolve}
              className="mt-4 w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-lg bg-indigo-600 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-medium text-white hover:bg-indigo-700 transition-colors"
            >
              Apply Resolution
            </button>
          )}
          {resolved && (
            <div className="mt-4 flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg bg-emerald-50 border border-emerald-200 px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-medium text-emerald-700">
              Resolved
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/DriftEventTable.tsx
```
import { useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import {
  useReactTable,
  getCoreRowModel,
  getSortedRowModel,
  flexRender,
  type ColumnDef,
  type SortingState,
} from '@tanstack/react-table';
import { ChevronDown, ChevronUp, ChevronsUpDown } from 'lucide-react';
import type { DriftEventRow } from './drift-types';

const SEVERITY_STYLES: Record<string, string> = {
  breaking: 'bg-red-50 text-red-700 border-red-200',
  potential: 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border-amber-200',
  none: 'bg-green-50 text-green-700 border-green-200',
};

const STATUS_STYLES: Record<string, string> = {
  resolved: 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200',
  pending: 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border-amber-200',
};

interface DriftEventTableProps {
  rows: DriftEventRow[];
  selectedRowId: string | null;
  onSelectRow: (id: string | null) => void;
}

export default function DriftEventTable({
  rows,
  selectedRowId,
  onSelectRow,
}: DriftEventTableProps) {
  const [sorting, setSorting] = useState<SortingState>([]);

  const columns = useMemo<ColumnDef<DriftEventRow, unknown>[]>(() => [
    {
      accessorKey: 'field',
      header: 'Field',
      size: 160,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => (
        <code className="text-xs font-mono text-gray-800">{getValue() as string}</code>
      ),
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'changeType',
      header: 'Change Type',
      size: 120,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => (
        <span className="text-xs text-gray-600">{getValue() as string}</span>
      ),
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'before',
      header: 'Before',
      size: 160,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => {
        const v = getValue() as string;
        return v === '—'
          ? <span className="text-xs text-gray-300">—</span>
          : <code className="text-xs font-mono text-gray-700">{v}</code>;
      },
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'after',
      header: 'After',
      size: 160,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => (
        <code className="text-xs font-mono text-gray-700">{getValue() as string}</code>
      ),
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'kpiImpact',
      header: 'KPI Impact',
      size: 140,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => {
        const severity = getValue() as string;
        const label = severity.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + severity.slice(1);
        return (
          <span className={`inline-flex rounded-full border px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium ${SEVERITY_STYLES[severity] ?? ''}`}>
            {label}
          </span>
        );
      },
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'affectedKpis',
      header: 'Affected KPIs',
      size: 160,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => (
        <span className="text-xs text-gray-600">{getValue() as string}</span>
      ),
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'status',
      header: 'Status',
      size: 100,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => {
        const status = getValue() as string;
        return (
          <span className={`inline-flex rounded-full border px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium ${STATUS_STYLES[status] ?? ''}`}>
            {status === 'resolved' ? 'Resolved' : 'Pending'}
          </span>
        );
      },
    },
  ], []);

  const table = useReactTable({
    data: rows,
    columns,
    state: { sorting },
    onSortingChange: setSorting,
    getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel(),
    getSortedRowModel: getSortedRowModel(),
    getRowId: (row) => row.id,
  });

  return (
    <div className="overflow-x-auto rounded-lg border border-gray-200">
      <table className="w-full text-left">
        <thead>
          <tr className="bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200">
            {table.getHeaderGroups()[0].headers.map((header) => (
              <th
                key={header.id}
                className="px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider select-none"
                style={{ width: header.getSize() }}
              >
                {header.isPlaceholder ? null : (
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    className={`flex items-center gap-1 ${header.column.getCanSort() ? 'cursor-pointer hover:text-gray-700' : ''}`}
                    onClick={header.column.getToggleSortingHandler()}
                    disabled={!header.column.getCanSort()}
                  >
                    {flexRender(header.column.columnDef.header, header.getContext())}
                    {header.column.getCanSort() && (
                      header.column.getIsSorted() === 'asc'
                        ? <ChevronUp size={12} />
                        : header.column.getIsSorted() === 'desc'
                          ? <ChevronDown size={12} />
                          : <ChevronsUpDown size={12} className="text-gray-300" />
                    )}
                  </button>
                )}
              </th>
            ))}
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          {table.getRowModel().rows.map((row) => (
            <tr
              key={row.id}
              onClick={() => onSelectRow(selectedRowId === row.original.id ? null : row.original.id)}
              className={`border-b border-gray-100 cursor-pointer transition-colors ${
                selectedRowId === row.original.id ? 'bg-blue-50/30' : 'hover:bg-gray-50'
              }`}
            >
              {row.getVisibleCells().map((cell) => (
                <td key={cell.id} className="px-3 py-2" style={{ width: cell.column.getSize() }}>
                  {flexRender(cell.column.columnDef.cell, cell.getContext())}
                </td>
              ))}
            </tr>
          ))}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/EntityContributionTable.tsx
```
import { useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import {
  useReactTable,
  getCoreRowModel,
  getSortedRowModel,
  flexRender,
  type ColumnDef,
  type SortingState,
} from '@tanstack/react-table';
import { ChevronUp, ChevronDown, ChevronsUpDown } from 'lucide-react';
import type { EntityContributionRow } from './ai-feature-types';

interface EntityContributionTableProps {
  rows: EntityContributionRow[];
}

export default function EntityContributionTable({
  rows,
}: EntityContributionTableProps) {
  const [sorting, setSorting] = useState<SortingState>([
    { id: 'records', desc: true },
  ]);

  const columns = useMemo<ColumnDef<EntityContributionRow, unknown>[]>(
    () => [
      {
        accessorKey: 'entityName',
        header: 'Entity',
        size: 200,
        cell: ({ getValue }) => (
          <span className="text-sm text-gray-800">{getValue() as string}</span>
        ),
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'records',
        header: 'Records',
        size: 120,
        cell: ({ getValue }) => (
          <span className="font-mono text-sm text-gray-800 text-right block">
            {(getValue() as number).toLocaleString()}
          </span>
        ),
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'pctOfTotal',
        header: '% of Total',
        size: 100,
        cell: ({ getValue }) => (
          <span className="font-mono text-sm text-gray-600 text-right block">
            {(getValue() as number).toFixed(1)}%
          </span>
        ),
      },
    ],
    [],
  );

  const table = useReactTable({
    data: rows,
    columns,
    state: { sorting },
    onSortingChange: setSorting,
    getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel(),
    getSortedRowModel: getSortedRowModel(),
    getRowId: (row) => row.entityId,
  });

  return (
    <div className="rounded-lg border border-gray-200">
      <div className="border-b border-gray-200 px-4 py-2.5">
        <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700">
          Per-Entity Contribution
        </h4>
      </div>
      <div className="overflow-x-auto">
        <table className="w-full text-left">
          <thead>
            <tr className="bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200">
              {table.getHeaderGroups()[0].headers.map((header) => (
                <th
                  key={header.id}
                  className="px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider select-none"
                  style={{ width: header.getSize() }}
                >
                  {header.isPlaceholder ? null : (
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      className={`flex items-center gap-1 ${
                        header.column.getCanSort()
                          ? 'cursor-pointer hover:text-gray-700'
                          : ''
                      }`}
                      onClick={header.column.getToggleSortingHandler()}
                      disabled={!header.column.getCanSort()}
                    >
                      {flexRender(
                        header.column.columnDef.header,
                        header.getContext(),
                      )}
                      {header.column.getCanSort() &&
                        (header.column.getIsSorted() === 'asc' ? (
                          <ChevronUp size={12} />
                        ) : header.column.getIsSorted() === 'desc' ? (
                          <ChevronDown size={12} />
                        ) : (
                          <ChevronsUpDown
                            size={12}
                            className="text-gray-300"
                          />
                        ))}
                    </button>
                  )}
                </th>
              ))}
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {table.getRowModel().rows.map((row) => (
              <tr
                key={row.id}
                className="border-b border-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-50"
              >
                {row.getVisibleCells().map((cell) => (
                  <td
                    key={cell.id}
                    className="px-3 py-2"
                    style={{ width: cell.column.getSize() }}
                  >
                    {flexRender(
                      cell.column.columnDef.cell,
                      cell.getContext(),
                    )}
                  </td>
                ))}
              </tr>
            ))}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/EntityDetailPanel.tsx
```
import { X } from 'lucide-react';
import type { PortfolioEntityRow } from './portfolio-types';
import type { KPI } from '../../../types/vcp';

interface EntityDetailPanelProps {
  entity: PortfolioEntityRow;
  kpis: KPI[];
  onClose: () => void;
}

const TREND_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
  up: 'Improving',
  down: 'Declining',
  flat: 'Flat',
};

const STATUS_COLORS: Record<string, string> = {
  green: 'text-green-700',
  yellow: 'text-amber-700',
  red: 'text-red-700',
};

const STATUS_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
  green: 'On Target',
  yellow: 'Below Target',
  red: 'Critical',
};

function formatValue(value: number, unit: string): string {
  if (unit === '$') {
    if (value >= 100_000) return `$${(value / 1_000).toFixed(0)}K`;
    return `$${value.toFixed(2)}`;
  }
  if (unit === '%') return `${value.toFixed(1)}%`;
  if (unit === 'days') return `${value} days`;
  if (unit === 'ratio') return value.toFixed(1);
  if (unit === 'score') return String(value);
  return value % 1 === 0 ? String(value) : value.toFixed(1);
}

export default function EntityDetailPanel({ entity, kpis, onClose }: EntityDetailPanelProps) {
  // Get the KPIs that this entity has values for
  const entityKpis = Object.keys(entity.kpiValues);
  const relevantKpis = kpis.filter((k) => entityKpis.includes(k.id));

  return (
    <div className="rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white p-5 animate-in fade-in duration-300">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
        <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">{entity.entityName}</h3>
        <button type="button" onClick={onClose} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600">
          <X size={16} />
        </button>
      </div>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-5 gap-6">
        {/* Left: KPI detail table */}
        <div className="col-span-3">
          <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">KPI Performance</p>
          <table className="w-full text-xs">
            <thead>
              <tr className="border-b border-gray-100">
                <th className="text-left py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500">KPI</th>
                <th className="text-right py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500">Current</th>
                <th className="text-right py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500">Baseline</th>
                <th className="text-right py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500">Target</th>
                <th className="text-right py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500">Trend</th>
                <th className="text-right py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500">Status</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {relevantKpis.map((kpi) => {
                const kv = entity.kpiValues[kpi.id];
                if (!kv) return null;
                return (
                  <tr key={kpi.id} className="border-b border-gray-50">
                    <td className="py-1.5 text-gray-800 font-medium">{kpi.name}</td>
                    <td className="py-1.5 text-right font-mono text-gray-800">{formatValue(kv.value, kpi.unit)}</td>
                    <td className="py-1.5 text-right font-mono text-gray-500">{formatValue(kv.baseline, kpi.unit)}</td>
                    <td className="py-1.5 text-right font-mono text-gray-500">{formatValue(kv.target, kpi.unit)}</td>
                    <td className="py-1.5 text-right text-gray-600">{TREND_LABELS[kv.trend]}</td>
                    <td className={`py-1.5 text-right font-medium ${STATUS_COLORS[kv.status]}`}>
                      {STATUS_LABELS[kv.status]}
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                );
              })}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>

        {/* Right: Entity metadata */}
        <div className="col-span-2">
          <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Entity Details</p>
          <dl className="space-y-1.5 text-xs">
            <MetaRow label="Organization" value={entity.organization} />
            <MetaRow
              label="Status"
              value={entity.status === 'new' ? 'New' : entity.status === 'drift-resolved' ? 'Drift Resolved' : 'Active'}
              statusColor={
                entity.status === 'new' ? 'text-green-600' : entity.status === 'drift-resolved' ? 'text-blue-600' : undefined
              }
            />
            <MetaRow label="Entity ID" value={entity.entityId} />
          </dl>
          {entity.status === 'new' && (
            <p className="mt-3 text-[10px] text-gray-500 bg-green-50 rounded px-2 py-1.5">
              Onboarded via tuck-in acquisition
            </p>
          )}
          {entity.status === 'drift-resolved' && (
            <p className="mt-3 text-[10px] text-gray-500 bg-blue-50 rounded px-2 py-1.5">
              Affected by Kareo schema drift — resolved
            </p>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function MetaRow({ label, value, statusColor }: { label: string; value: string; statusColor?: string }) {
  return (
    <div className="flex justify-between">
      <dt className="text-gray-500">{label}</dt>
      <dd className={`font-medium ${statusColor ?? 'text-gray-800'}`}>{value}</dd>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/EntityMatchPanel.tsx
```
import ConfidenceBadge from '../../../components/feedback/ConfidenceBadge';
import type { TuckInEntityMatch } from '../../../types/vcp';

interface EntityMatchPanelProps {
  matches: TuckInEntityMatch[];
}

export default function EntityMatchPanel({ matches }: EntityMatchPanelProps) {
  return (
    <div className="rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white p-5">
      <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-3">Entity Resolution</h3>
      <table className="w-full text-xs">
        <thead>
          <tr className="border-b border-gray-100">
            <th className="text-left py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500">Entity Name</th>
            <th className="text-left py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500">Confidence</th>
            <th className="text-left py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500">Status</th>
            <th className="text-left py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500">Reason</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          {matches.map((m) => (
            <tr
              key={m.matchedEntityName}
              className="border-b border-gray-50"
              style={
                m.matchType === 'flagged'
                  ? { borderLeftWidth: 2, borderLeftColor: '#D97706' }
                  : undefined
              }
            >
              <td className="py-2 text-gray-800 font-medium">{m.matchedEntityName}</td>
              <td className="py-2"><ConfidenceBadge level={m.confidence} /></td>
              <td className="py-2">
                <span className={`inline-flex rounded-full border px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium ${
                  m.matchType === 'auto-merge'
                    ? 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200'
                    : 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border-amber-200'
                }`}>
                  {m.matchType === 'auto-merge' ? 'Auto-Merged' : 'Needs Review'}
                </span>
              </td>
              <td className="py-2 text-gray-600 max-w-[300px]">{m.reason}</td>
            </tr>
          ))}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/ExhibitTable.tsx
```
import { useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import {
  useReactTable,
  getCoreRowModel,
  getSortedRowModel,
  getExpandedRowModel,
  flexRender,
  type ColumnDef,
  type SortingState,
  type ExpandedState,
} from '@tanstack/react-table';
import { ChevronDown, ChevronUp, ChevronsUpDown, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
import type { ExhibitRow } from './exhibit-types';
import { EVENT_BADGE_COLORS, formatEventType, formatTimestamp } from './exhibit-types';
import { renderExhibitPreview } from './exhibit-renderers';
import type { DataRoomExhibit, ExhibitPreviewData } from '../../../types/vcp';

const CATEGORY_STYLES: Record<string, string> = {
  'hold-period': 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700',
  existing: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600',
};

const CATEGORY_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
  'hold-period': 'Hold Period',
  existing: 'Existing',
};

const STATUS_STYLES: Record<string, string> = {
  ready: 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200',
  'not-generated': 'bg-gray-50 text-gray-500 border-gray-200',
  'needs-review': 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border-amber-200',
};

const STATUS_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
  ready: 'Ready',
  'not-generated': 'Not Generated',
  'needs-review': 'Needs Review',
};

interface ExhibitTableProps {
  rows: ExhibitRow[];
  exhibits: DataRoomExhibit[];
  enrichedPreviewData: Record<string, ExhibitPreviewData>;
}

export default function ExhibitTable({ rows, exhibits, enrichedPreviewData }: ExhibitTableProps) {
  const [sorting, setSorting] = useState<SortingState>([]);
  const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState<ExpandedState>({});

  const exhibitMap = useMemo(
    () => new Map(exhibits.map((e) => [e.exhibitId, e])),
    [exhibits],
  );

  const columns = useMemo<ColumnDef<ExhibitRow, unknown>[]>(() => [
    {
      id: 'expander',
      size: 40,
      enableSorting: false,
      cell: ({ row }) => (
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={row.getToggleExpandedHandler()}
          className="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600"
        >
          {row.getIsExpanded() ? <ChevronDown size={14} /> : <ChevronRight size={14} />}
        </button>
      ),
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'name',
      header: 'Exhibit Name',
      size: 220,
      enableSorting: false,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => (
        <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-800">{getValue() as string}</span>
      ),
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'category',
      header: 'Category',
      size: 120,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => {
        const cat = getValue() as string;
        return (
          <span className={`inline-flex rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium ${CATEGORY_STYLES[cat] ?? ''}`}>
            {CATEGORY_LABELS[cat] ?? cat}
          </span>
        );
      },
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'entityScope',
      header: 'Entity Scope',
      size: 100,
      enableSorting: false,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => (
        <span className="text-xs text-gray-700">{getValue() as string}</span>
      ),
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'timeRange',
      header: 'Time Range',
      size: 100,
      enableSorting: false,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => (
        <span className="text-xs text-gray-600">{getValue() as string}</span>
      ),
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'lineageEventCount',
      header: 'Lineage Events',
      size: 100,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => (
        <span className="text-xs font-mono text-gray-700">{getValue() as number}</span>
      ),
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'status',
      header: 'Status',
      size: 120,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => {
        const status = getValue() as string;
        return (
          <span className={`inline-flex rounded-full border px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium ${STATUS_STYLES[status] ?? ''}`}>
            {STATUS_LABELS[status] ?? status}
          </span>
        );
      },
    },
  ], []);

  const table = useReactTable({
    data: rows,
    columns,
    state: { sorting, expanded },
    onSortingChange: setSorting,
    onExpandedChange: setExpanded,
    getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel(),
    getSortedRowModel: getSortedRowModel(),
    getExpandedRowModel: getExpandedRowModel(),
    getRowId: (row) => row.exhibitId,
    getRowCanExpand: () => true,
  });

  return (
    <div className="overflow-x-auto rounded-lg border border-gray-200">
      <table className="w-full text-left">
        <thead>
          <tr className="bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200">
            {table.getHeaderGroups()[0].headers.map((header) => (
              <th
                key={header.id}
                className="px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider select-none"
                style={{ width: header.getSize() }}
              >
                {header.isPlaceholder ? null : (
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    className={`flex items-center gap-1 ${header.column.getCanSort() ? 'cursor-pointer hover:text-gray-700' : ''}`}
                    onClick={header.column.getToggleSortingHandler()}
                    disabled={!header.column.getCanSort()}
                  >
                    {flexRender(header.column.columnDef.header, header.getContext())}
                    {header.column.getCanSort() && (
                      header.column.getIsSorted() === 'asc'
                        ? <ChevronUp size={12} />
                        : header.column.getIsSorted() === 'desc'
                          ? <ChevronDown size={12} />
                          : <ChevronsUpDown size={12} className="text-gray-300" />
                    )}
                  </button>
                )}
              </th>
            ))}
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          {table.getRowModel().rows.map((row) => (
            <>
              <tr
                key={row.id}
                className={`border-b border-gray-100 cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-50/50 ${
                  row.getIsExpanded() ? 'bg-gray-50/30' : ''
                }`}
                onClick={row.getToggleExpandedHandler()}
              >
                {row.getVisibleCells().map((cell) => (
                  <td key={cell.id} className="px-3 py-2" style={{ width: cell.column.getSize() }}>
                    {flexRender(cell.column.columnDef.cell, cell.getContext())}
                  </td>
                ))}
              </tr>
              {row.getIsExpanded() && (
                <tr key={`${row.id}-expanded`} className="border-b border-gray-100">
                  <td colSpan={columns.length} className="p-4 bg-gray-50/30">
                    <ExpandedContent
                      exhibitId={row.original.exhibitId}
                      exhibit={exhibitMap.get(row.original.exhibitId)!}
                      enrichedPreviewData={enrichedPreviewData}
                    />
                  </td>
                </tr>
              )}
            </>
          ))}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── Expanded row content ──

function ExpandedContent({
  exhibitId,
  exhibit,
  enrichedPreviewData,
}: {
  exhibitId: string;
  exhibit: DataRoomExhibit;
  enrichedPreviewData: Record<string, ExhibitPreviewData>;
}) {
  const previewData = enrichedPreviewData[exhibitId];

  return (
    <div className="space-y-4">
      {/* Exhibit Preview */}
      <div className="rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white p-4 max-h-[300px] overflow-y-auto">
        <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Preview</p>
        {previewData ? (
          renderExhibitPreview(previewData)
        ) : (
          <FallbackPreview data={exhibit.previewData} />
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Lineage History */}
      <div className="rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white p-4">
        <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Lineage History</p>
        <table className="w-full text-xs">
          <thead>
            <tr className="border-b border-gray-100">
              <th className="text-left py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500 w-24">Date</th>
              <th className="text-left py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500 w-32">Event</th>
              <th className="text-left py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500">Description</th>
              <th className="text-left py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500 w-28">Before</th>
              <th className="text-left py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500 w-28">After</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {exhibit.lineageHistory.map((entry, idx) => {
              const badge = EVENT_BADGE_COLORS[entry.eventType] ?? EVENT_BADGE_COLORS['initial-annotation'];
              return (
                <tr key={idx} className="border-b border-gray-50">
                  <td className="py-1.5 text-gray-500">{formatTimestamp(entry.timestamp)}</td>
                  <td className="py-1.5">
                    <span className={`inline-flex rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium ${badge.bg} ${badge.text}`}>
                      {formatEventType(entry.eventType)}
                    </span>
                  </td>
                  <td className="py-1.5 text-gray-700">{entry.description}</td>
                  <td className="py-1.5 font-mono text-gray-500">
                    {entry.beforeValue ? (
                      <span className="text-red-600">{entry.beforeValue}</span>
                    ) : '—'}
                  </td>
                  <td className="py-1.5 font-mono text-gray-500">
                    {entry.afterValue ? (
                      <span className="text-green-600">{entry.afterValue}</span>
                    ) : '—'}
                  </td>
                </tr>
              );
            })}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>

      {/* Exhibit Metadata */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-4 text-xs text-gray-500 px-1">
        <span>Entity Scope: <span className="text-gray-700 font-medium">
          {exhibitId === 'exhibit-08' ? 'Front Range PT' : 'All 15'}
        </span></span>
        <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
        <span>Time Range: <span className="text-gray-700 font-medium">36 months</span></span>
        <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
        <span>Lineage Events: <span className="text-gray-700 font-medium">{exhibit.lineageHistory.length}</span></span>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function FallbackPreview({ data }: { data: Record<string, unknown> }) {
  const entries = Object.entries(data).map(([key, val]) => ({
    label: key.replace(/([A-Z])/g, ' $1').trim(),
    value: String(val),
  }));

  return (
    <dl className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-4 gap-y-2">
      {entries.map((entry) => (
        <div key={entry.label} className="flex justify-between items-baseline">
          <dt className="text-xs text-gray-500 capitalize">{entry.label}</dt>
          <dd className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-800">{entry.value}</dd>
        </div>
      ))}
    </dl>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/FeatureTable.tsx
```
import { useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import {
  useReactTable,
  getCoreRowModel,
  getSortedRowModel,
  flexRender,
  type ColumnDef,
  type SortingState,
} from '@tanstack/react-table';
import { ChevronUp, ChevronDown, ChevronsUpDown } from 'lucide-react';
import type { FeatureRow } from './ai-feature-types';

interface FeatureTableProps {
  rows: FeatureRow[];
  isComplete: boolean;
}

function QualityBadge({ value }: { value: number }) {
  const color =
    value >= 95
      ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-700'
      : value >= 85
        ? 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700'
        : value >= 70
          ? 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700'
          : 'bg-red-100 text-red-700';

  return (
    <span
      className={`inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full font-medium px-2 py-0.5 text-xs ${color}`}
    >
      {value}%
    </span>
  );
}

export default function FeatureTable({ rows, isComplete }: FeatureTableProps) {
  const [sorting, setSorting] = useState<SortingState>([]);

  const columns = useMemo<ColumnDef<FeatureRow, unknown>[]>(() => {
    const cols: ColumnDef<FeatureRow, unknown>[] = [
      {
        accessorKey: 'name',
        header: 'Feature',
        size: 180,
        cell: ({ getValue }) => (
          <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">
            {getValue() as string}
          </span>
        ),
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'canonicalConcept',
        header: 'Canonical Concept',
        size: 160,
        cell: ({ getValue }) => (
          <span className="font-mono text-xs text-gray-500">
            {getValue() as string}
          </span>
        ),
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'completeness',
        header: 'Completeness',
        size: 100,
        cell: ({ getValue }) => (
          <div className="text-right">
            <QualityBadge value={getValue() as number} />
          </div>
        ),
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'consistency',
        header: 'Consistency',
        size: 100,
        cell: ({ getValue }) => (
          <div className="text-right">
            <QualityBadge value={getValue() as number} />
          </div>
        ),
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'freshness',
        header: 'Freshness',
        size: 90,
        cell: ({ getValue }) => (
          <span className="text-sm text-gray-600 text-right block">
            {getValue() as number}
          </span>
        ),
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'sourceFieldCount',
        header: 'Sources',
        size: 80,
        cell: ({ getValue }) => (
          <span className="text-sm text-gray-600 text-right block">
            {getValue() as number}
          </span>
        ),
      },
    ];

    if (isComplete) {
      cols.push({
        accessorKey: 'assemblyStatus',
        header: 'Status',
        size: 100,
        enableSorting: false,
        cell: ({ getValue }) => {
          const status = getValue() as string | null;
          if (status === 'ready') {
            return (
              <span className="inline-flex rounded-full bg-green-100 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium text-green-700">
                Ready
              </span>
            );
          }
          if (status === 'pending') {
            return (
              <span className="inline-flex rounded-full bg-gray-100 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500">
                Pending
              </span>
            );
          }
          return null;
        },
      });
    }

    return cols;
  }, [isComplete]);

  const table = useReactTable({
    data: rows,
    columns,
    state: { sorting },
    onSortingChange: setSorting,
    getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel(),
    getSortedRowModel: getSortedRowModel(),
    getRowId: (row) => row.id,
  });

  return (
    <div className="overflow-x-auto rounded-lg border border-gray-200">
      <table className="w-full text-left">
        <thead>
          <tr className="bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200">
            {table.getHeaderGroups()[0].headers.map((header) => (
              <th
                key={header.id}
                className="px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider select-none"
                style={{ width: header.getSize() }}
              >
                {header.isPlaceholder ? null : (
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    className={`flex items-center gap-1 ${
                      header.column.getCanSort()
                        ? 'cursor-pointer hover:text-gray-700'
                        : ''
                    }`}
                    onClick={header.column.getToggleSortingHandler()}
                    disabled={!header.column.getCanSort()}
                  >
                    {flexRender(
                      header.column.columnDef.header,
                      header.getContext(),
                    )}
                    {header.column.getCanSort() &&
                      (header.column.getIsSorted() === 'asc' ? (
                        <ChevronUp size={12} />
                      ) : header.column.getIsSorted() === 'desc' ? (
                        <ChevronDown size={12} />
                      ) : (
                        <ChevronsUpDown
                          size={12}
                          className="text-gray-300"
                        />
                      ))}
                  </button>
                )}
              </th>
            ))}
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          {table.getRowModel().rows.map((row) => (
            <tr
              key={row.id}
              className="border-b border-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-50"
            >
              {row.getVisibleCells().map((cell) => (
                <td
                  key={cell.id}
                  className="px-3 py-2.5"
                  style={{ width: cell.column.getSize() }}
                >
                  {flexRender(
                    cell.column.columnDef.cell,
                    cell.getContext(),
                  )}
                </td>
              ))}
            </tr>
          ))}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/FieldMappingTable.tsx
```
import { Fragment, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import {
  useReactTable,
  getCoreRowModel,
  getSortedRowModel,
  flexRender,
  type ColumnDef,
  type SortingState,
} from '@tanstack/react-table';
import { ChevronDown, ChevronUp, ChevronsUpDown, CheckCircle2 } from 'lucide-react';
import ConfidenceBadge from '../../../components/feedback/ConfidenceBadge';
import type { FieldMappingRow, I2Filters } from './harmonization-types';

const TYPE_COLORS: Record<string, string> = {
  EHR: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700',
  RCM: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-700',
  GL: 'bg-green-100 text-green-700',
  CRM: 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-700',
  HR: 'bg-pink-100 text-pink-700',
  ERP: 'bg-teal-100 text-teal-700',
  Billing: 'bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-700',
  DWH: 'bg-cyan-100 text-cyan-700',
};

const STATUS_STYLES: Record<string, string> = {
  mapped: 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200',
  'in-progress': 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border-amber-200',
  unmapped: 'bg-red-50 text-red-700 border-red-200',
};

const STATUS_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
  mapped: 'Mapped',
  'in-progress': 'In Progress',
  unmapped: 'Unmapped',
};

// ── Component ──

interface FieldMappingTableProps {
  rows: FieldMappingRow[];
  filters: I2Filters;
  onFilterChange: (key: keyof I2Filters, value: string) => void;
  selectedMapping: string | null;
  onSelectMapping: (id: string | null) => void;
  conflictsResolved: string[];
  acquirerName: string;
  targetName: string;
}

export default function FieldMappingTable({
  rows,
  filters,
  onFilterChange,
  selectedMapping,
  onSelectMapping,
  conflictsResolved,
  acquirerName,
  targetName,
}: FieldMappingTableProps) {
  const [sorting, setSorting] = useState<SortingState>([]);

  const acquirerShort = acquirerName.split(' ')[0];
  const targetShort = targetName.split(' ')[0];

  // Derive canonical concepts from actual data (order-preserving)
  const conceptList = useMemo(() => {
    const seen = new Set<string>();
    const result: string[] = [];
    for (const r of rows) {
      if (!seen.has(r.canonicalConcept)) {
        seen.add(r.canonicalConcept);
        result.push(r.canonicalConcept);
      }
    }
    return result;
  }, [rows]);

  // Filter rows
  const filteredRows = useMemo(() => {
    return rows.filter((r) => {
      if (filters.organization !== 'all') {
        const isAcquirer = r.organizationName === acquirerName;
        if (filters.organization === 'acquirer' && !isAcquirer) return false;
        if (filters.organization === 'target' && isAcquirer) return false;
      }
      if (filters.status === 'conflict') {
        if (!r.hasConflict || conflictsResolved.includes(r.conflictId ?? '')) return false;
      } else if (filters.status !== 'all' && r.status !== filters.status) {
        return false;
      }
      if (filters.confidence !== 'all' && r.confidence !== filters.confidence) return false;
      if (filters.concept !== 'all' && r.canonicalConcept !== filters.concept) return false;
      return true;
    });
  }, [rows, filters, conflictsResolved]);

  // Attention counts
  const unresolvedConflictCount = useMemo(
    () => rows.filter((r) => r.hasConflict && !conflictsResolved.includes(r.conflictId ?? '')).length,
    [rows, conflictsResolved],
  );
  const unmappedCount = useMemo(() => rows.filter((r) => r.status === 'unmapped').length, [rows]);
  const attentionCount = unresolvedConflictCount + unmappedCount;

  // Columns
  const columns = useMemo<ColumnDef<FieldMappingRow, unknown>[]>(() => [
    {
      accessorKey: 'sourceConcept',
      header: 'Source Concept',
      size: 160,
      cell: ({ row }) => (
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-800 truncate">{row.original.sourceConcept}</span>
          <span className={`inline-flex rounded px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium ${TYPE_COLORS[row.original.systemType] ?? ''}`}>
            {row.original.systemType}
          </span>
        </div>
      ),
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'systemName',
      header: 'System',
      size: 140,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">{getValue() as string}</span>,
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'entityName',
      header: 'Entity',
      size: 120,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">{getValue() as string}</span>,
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'canonicalConcept',
      header: 'Canonical',
      size: 140,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => <span className="text-sm font-medium text-indigo-700">{getValue() as string}</span>,
    },
    {
      id: 'fields',
      header: 'Fields',
      size: 100,
      accessorFn: (row) => row.fieldsMapped,
      cell: ({ row }) => (
        <span className="font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">
          {row.original.fieldsMapped.toLocaleString()}
          <span className="text-gray-400"> / </span>
          {row.original.fieldCount.toLocaleString()}
        </span>
      ),
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'autoAcceptRate',
      header: 'Auto-Accept',
      size: 100,
      cell: ({ row }) => {
        const rate = row.original.autoAcceptRate;
        return (
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <div className="flex-1 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-gray-100 overflow-hidden max-w-[48px]">
              <div className="h-full rounded-full bg-emerald-500" style={{ width: `${rate}%` }} />
            </div>
            <span className="font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">{rate}%</span>
          </div>
        );
      },
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'confidence',
      header: 'Confidence',
      size: 90,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => <ConfidenceBadge level={getValue() as 'high' | 'medium' | 'low'} />,
    },
    {
      id: 'status',
      header: 'Status',
      size: 120,
      accessorFn: (row) => row.status,
      cell: ({ row }) => {
        const { status, hasConflict, conflictId } = row.original;
        const isResolved = conflictsResolved.includes(conflictId ?? '');
        return (
          <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
            <span className={`inline-flex rounded-full border px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium ${STATUS_STYLES[status] ?? ''}`}>
              {STATUS_LABELS[status] ?? status}
            </span>
            {hasConflict && !isResolved && (
              <span className="text-[10px] text-amber-600 font-medium">Conflict</span>
            )}
            {hasConflict && isResolved && (
              <CheckCircle2 size={12} className="text-green-600" />
            )}
          </div>
        );
      },
    },
  ], [conflictsResolved]);

  const table = useReactTable({
    data: filteredRows,
    columns,
    state: { sorting },
    onSortingChange: setSorting,
    getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel(),
    getSortedRowModel: getSortedRowModel(),
  });

  // Group sorted rows by canonical concept
  const sortedRows = table.getRowModel().rows;
  const grouped = useMemo(() => {
    const map = new Map<string, typeof sortedRows>();
    for (const row of sortedRows) {
      const concept = row.original.canonicalConcept;
      const arr = map.get(concept) ?? [];
      arr.push(row);
      map.set(concept, arr);
    }
    return map;
  }, [sortedRows]);

  const showFlaggedOnly = () => {
    onFilterChange('organization', 'all');
    onFilterChange('confidence', 'all');
    onFilterChange('concept', 'all');
    setTimeout(() => {
      onFilterChange('status', 'conflict');
    }, 0);
  };

  const allFiltersDefault = filters.organization === 'all' && filters.status === 'all' &&
    filters.confidence === 'all' && filters.concept === 'all';

  return (
    <div className="space-y-3">
      {/* Filter chips */}
      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
        <FilterGroup
          label="Organization"
          options={[
            { value: 'all', label: 'All' },
            { value: 'acquirer', label: acquirerShort },
            { value: 'target', label: targetShort },
          ]}
          active={filters.organization}
          onChange={(v) => onFilterChange('organization', v)}
        />
        <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
        <FilterGroup
          label="Status"
          options={[
            { value: 'all', label: 'All' },
            { value: 'mapped', label: 'Mapped' },
            { value: 'in-progress', label: 'In Progress' },
            { value: 'conflict', label: 'Conflict' },
            { value: 'unmapped', label: 'Unmapped' },
          ]}
          active={filters.status}
          onChange={(v) => onFilterChange('status', v)}
        />
        <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
        <FilterGroup
          label="Confidence"
          options={[
            { value: 'all', label: 'All' },
            { value: 'high', label: 'High' },
            { value: 'medium', label: 'Medium' },
            { value: 'low', label: 'Low' },
          ]}
          active={filters.confidence}
          onChange={(v) => onFilterChange('confidence', v)}
        />
        <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
        <FilterGroup
          label="Concept"
          options={[
            { value: 'all', label: 'All' },
            ...conceptList.map((c) => ({ value: c, label: c })),
          ]}
          active={filters.concept}
          onChange={(v) => onFilterChange('concept', v)}
        />
      </div>

      {/* Attention callout */}
      {attentionCount > 0 && allFiltersDefault && (
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between rounded-lg border border-amber-200 bg-amber-50 px-4 py-2 text-xs text-amber-800">
          <span>
            <strong>{attentionCount} mappings need attention</strong> — {unresolvedConflictCount} unresolved conflicts, {unmappedCount} unmapped
          </span>
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={showFlaggedOnly}
            className="text-amber-700 font-medium underline hover:text-amber-900 ml-4 whitespace-nowrap"
          >
            Show conflicts &rarr;
          </button>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Table */}
      <div className="overflow-x-auto rounded-lg border border-gray-200">
        <table className="w-full text-left">
          <thead>
            <tr className="bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200">
              {table.getHeaderGroups()[0].headers.map((header) => (
                <th
                  key={header.id}
                  className="px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider select-none"
                  style={{ width: header.getSize() }}
                >
                  {header.isPlaceholder ? null : (
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      className={`flex items-center gap-1 ${header.column.getCanSort() ? 'cursor-pointer hover:text-gray-700' : ''}`}
                      onClick={header.column.getToggleSortingHandler()}
                      disabled={!header.column.getCanSort()}
                    >
                      {flexRender(header.column.columnDef.header, header.getContext())}
                      {header.column.getCanSort() && (
                        header.column.getIsSorted() === 'asc'
                          ? <ChevronUp size={12} />
                          : header.column.getIsSorted() === 'desc'
                            ? <ChevronDown size={12} />
                            : <ChevronsUpDown size={12} className="text-gray-300" />
                      )}
                    </button>
                  )}
                </th>
              ))}
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {conceptList.map((concept) => {
              const groupRows = grouped.get(concept);
              if (!groupRows || groupRows.length === 0) return null;

              const groupFieldCount = groupRows.reduce((s, r) => s + r.original.fieldCount, 0);
              const entityCount = new Set(groupRows.map((r) => r.original.entityName)).size;
              const avgAutoAccept = (groupRows.reduce((s, r) => s + r.original.autoAcceptRate, 0) / groupRows.length).toFixed(1);
              const hasUnresolvedConflict = groupRows.some(
                (r) => r.original.hasConflict && !conflictsResolved.includes(r.original.conflictId ?? ''),
              );

              return (
                <Fragment key={concept}>
                  <GroupHeader
                    concept={concept}
                    entityCount={entityCount}
                    fieldCount={groupFieldCount}
                    avgAutoAccept={avgAutoAccept}
                    hasConflict={hasUnresolvedConflict}
                    colSpan={columns.length}
                  />
                  {groupRows.map((row) => {
                    const isConflict = row.original.hasConflict;
                    const isResolved = conflictsResolved.includes(row.original.conflictId ?? '');
                    return (
                      <tr
                        key={row.id}
                        onClick={() => onSelectMapping(selectedMapping === row.original.id ? null : row.original.id)}
                        className={`border-b border-gray-100 cursor-pointer transition-colors ${
                          selectedMapping === row.original.id
                            ? 'bg-blue-50'
                            : isConflict && !isResolved
                              ? 'bg-amber-50/30 hover:bg-amber-50/60'
                              : 'hover:bg-gray-50'
                        }`}
                        style={
                          isConflict
                            ? {
                                borderLeftWidth: 3,
                                borderLeftColor: isResolved ? '#059669' : '#D97706',
                              }
                            : undefined
                        }
                      >
                        {row.getVisibleCells().map((cell) => (
                          <td key={cell.id} className="px-3 py-2" style={{ width: cell.column.getSize() }}>
                            {flexRender(cell.column.columnDef.cell, cell.getContext())}
                          </td>
                        ))}
                      </tr>
                    );
                  })}
                </Fragment>
              );
            })}

            {filteredRows.length === 0 && (
              <tr>
                <td colSpan={columns.length} className="px-3 py-8 text-center text-sm text-gray-400">
                  No mappings match the current filters
                </td>
              </tr>
            )}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── Group header row ──

function GroupHeader({
  concept,
  entityCount,
  fieldCount,
  avgAutoAccept,
  hasConflict,
  colSpan,
}: {
  concept: string;
  entityCount: number;
  fieldCount: number;
  avgAutoAccept: string;
  hasConflict: boolean;
  colSpan: number;
}) {
  return (
    <tr className="bg-gray-50/80">
      <td colSpan={colSpan} className="px-3 py-2">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <span className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700">{concept}</span>
            {hasConflict && (
              <span className="flex items-center gap-1 text-[10px] text-amber-600 font-medium">
                <span className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-amber-500" />
                conflict
              </span>
            )}
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-[10px] text-gray-500">
            <span>{entityCount} entities</span>
            <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
            <span>{fieldCount.toLocaleString()} fields</span>
            <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
            <span>{avgAutoAccept}% auto-accept</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </td>
    </tr>
  );
}

// ── Filter chip group ──

function FilterGroup({
  label,
  options,
  active,
  onChange,
}: {
  label: string;
  options: { value: string; label: string }[];
  active: string;
  onChange: (value: string) => void;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
      <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mr-1">{label}</span>
      {options.map((opt) => (
        <button
          key={opt.value}
          type="button"
          onClick={() => onChange(opt.value)}
          className={`rounded-md px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium transition-colors ${
            active === opt.value
              ? 'bg-gray-800 text-white'
              : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-200 hover:text-gray-700'
          }`}
        >
          {opt.label}
        </button>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

import type { ImpactRow } from './ai-routing-types';

interface ImpactTableProps {
  rows: ImpactRow[];
}

export default function ImpactTable({ rows }: ImpactTableProps) {
  return (
    <div className="rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white">
      <div className="border-b border-gray-200 px-4 py-2.5">
        <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700">
          Aggregate Impact — AI Applications Powered by Semantic Layer
        </h4>
      </div>
      <div className="overflow-x-auto">
        <table className="w-full text-sm">
          <thead>
            <tr className="bg-gray-50 text-left">
              <th className="px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500">
                Application
              </th>
              <th className="px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 text-right">
                Annual Impact
              </th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {rows.map((row) => (
              <tr
                key={row.id}
                className={`border-t ${
                  row.isTotal
                    ? 'border-t-2 border-gray-300'
                    : 'border-gray-100'
                }`}
              >
                <td
                  className={`px-4 py-2 ${
                    row.isTotal
                      ? 'font-semibold text-gray-900'
                      : 'text-gray-700'
                  }`}
                >
                  {row.application}
                </td>
                <td
                  className={`px-4 py-2 text-right font-mono ${
                    row.isTotal
                      ? 'font-semibold text-gray-900'
                      : 'text-gray-700'
                  }`}
                >
                  {row.annualImpactFormatted}
                </td>
              </tr>
            ))}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

src/screens/hold-period/components/IngestionTopology.tsx
```
import { useState, useMemo } from 'react';
import type { SystemIngestionRow } from './ingestion-types';

interface IngestionTopologyProps {
  rows: SystemIngestionRow[];
  onSystemClick: (systemId: string) => void;
  acquirerName: string;
  targetName: string;
}

// Domain display labels — covers both healthcare and SaaS target system IDs
const DOMAIN_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
  'unified-ehr': 'Unified EHR',
  'unified-rcm': 'Unified RCM',
  'unified-gl': 'Unified GL',
  'unified-crm': 'Unified CRM',
  'unified-hr': 'Unified HR',
  'unified-erp': 'Unified ERP',
  'unified-billing': 'Unified Billing',
  'unified-dwh': 'Unified DWH',
};

export default function IngestionTopology({ rows, onSystemClick, acquirerName, targetName: _targetName }: IngestionTopologyProps) {
  const [hoveredNode, setHoveredNode] = useState<string | null>(null);

  // Derive domains from actual data (order-preserving)
  const domains = useMemo(() => {
    const seen = new Set<string>();
    const result: string[] = [];
    for (const row of rows) {
      if (!seen.has(row.targetSystemId)) {
        seen.add(row.targetSystemId);
        result.push(row.targetSystemId);
      }
    }
    return result;
  }, [rows]);

  // Group systems by domain and organization
  const { acquirerByDomain, targetByDomain, domainStats } = useMemo(() => {
    const acq: Record<string, SystemIngestionRow[]> = {};
    const tgt: Record<string, SystemIngestionRow[]> = {};
    const stats: Record<string, { sources: number; fields: number; mapped: number }> = {};

    for (const d of domains) {
      acq[d] = [];
      tgt[d] = [];
      stats[d] = { sources: 0, fields: 0, mapped: 0 };
    }

    for (const row of rows) {
      const domain = row.targetSystemId;
      if (row.organizationName === acquirerName) {
        acq[domain]?.push(row);
      } else {
        tgt[domain]?.push(row);
      }
      if (stats[domain]) {
        stats[domain].sources++;
        stats[domain].fields += row.fieldsTotal;
        stats[domain].mapped += row.fieldsMapped;
      }
    }

    return { acquirerByDomain: acq, targetByDomain: tgt, domainStats: stats };
  }, [rows, acquirerName, domains]);

  // Compute positions
  const NODE_W = 152;
  const NODE_H = 40;
  const DOMAIN_W = 170;
  const DOMAIN_H = 44;
  const BAND_GAP = 12;
  const SYS_GAP = 4;

  // Build layout: for each domain, compute y-band
  const layout = useMemo(() => {
    const domainPositions: Record<string, { y: number; height: number }> = {};
    const acquirerPositions: Record<string, { x: number; y: number }> = {};
    const targetPositions: Record<string, { x: number; y: number }> = {};

    let currentY = 0;
    for (const domain of domains) {
      const acquirerSystems = acquirerByDomain[domain] ?? [];
      const targetSystems = targetByDomain[domain] ?? [];
      const maxCount = Math.max(acquirerSystems.length, targetSystems.length, 1);
      const bandHeight = maxCount * (NODE_H + SYS_GAP) - SYS_GAP;

      domainPositions[domain] = { y: currentY, height: bandHeight };

      // Position acquirer systems (left lane)
      const acquirerStartY = currentY + (bandHeight - acquirerSystems.length * (NODE_H + SYS_GAP) + SYS_GAP) / 2;
      acquirerSystems.forEach((sys, i) => {
        acquirerPositions[sys.systemId] = { x: 0, y: acquirerStartY + i * (NODE_H + SYS_GAP) };
      });

      // Position target systems (right lane)
      const targetStartY = currentY + (bandHeight - targetSystems.length * (NODE_H + SYS_GAP) + SYS_GAP) / 2;
      targetSystems.forEach((sys, i) => {
        targetPositions[sys.systemId] = { x: 0, y: targetStartY + i * (NODE_H + SYS_GAP) };
      });

      currentY += bandHeight + BAND_GAP;
    }

    return { domainPositions, acquirerPositions, targetPositions, totalHeight: currentY - BAND_GAP };
  }, [acquirerByDomain, targetByDomain, domains]);

  // Determine hover-related opacity
  const getConnectionOpacity = (systemId: string, domain: string, baseOpacity: number) => {
    if (!hoveredNode) return baseOpacity;
    if (hoveredNode === systemId || hoveredNode === domain) return 1;
    return 0.1;
  };

  const getNodeOpacity = (nodeId: string, domain?: string) => {
    if (!hoveredNode) return 1;
    if (hoveredNode === nodeId) return 1;
    if (domain && hoveredNode === domain) return 1;
    // If hovering a system, highlight its domain too
    const hoveredRow = rows.find((r) => r.systemId === hoveredNode);
    if (hoveredRow && domain === hoveredRow.targetSystemId) return 1;
    if (domain && hoveredNode === nodeId) return 1;
    return 0.35;
  };

  const containerWidth = 820;
  const leftLaneX = 0;
  const centerX = (containerWidth - DOMAIN_W) / 2;
  const rightLaneX = containerWidth - NODE_W;

  const statusColor = (status: string) => {
    if (status === 'mapped') return '#059669';
    if (status === 'in-progress') return '#D97706';
    return '#DC2626';
  };

  return (
    <div className="relative" style={{ width: containerWidth, height: layout.totalHeight + 16, margin: '0 auto' }}>
      {/* SVG connections */}
      <svg className="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full pointer-events-none" style={{ zIndex: 1 }}>
        {rows.map((row) => {
          const isAcquirer = row.organizationName === acquirerName;
          const sysPos = isAcquirer ? layout.acquirerPositions[row.systemId] : layout.targetPositions[row.systemId];
          const domPos = layout.domainPositions[row.targetSystemId];
          if (!sysPos || !domPos) return null;

          const domainCenterY = domPos.y + domPos.height / 2;
          const sysCenterY = sysPos.y + NODE_H / 2;

          let x1: number, x2: number, cpX: number;
          if (isAcquirer) {
            x1 = leftLaneX + NODE_W;
            x2 = centerX;
            cpX = centerX - 60;
          } else {
            x1 = rightLaneX;
            x2 = centerX + DOMAIN_W;
            cpX = centerX + DOMAIN_W + 60;
          }

          const baseOpacity = row.status === 'mapped' ? 0.7 : row.status === 'in-progress' ? 0.45 : 0.2;
          const opacity = getConnectionOpacity(row.systemId, row.targetSystemId, baseOpacity);
          const strokeWidth = (hoveredNode === row.systemId || hoveredNode === row.targetSystemId) ? 2.5 : 1.5;

          return (
            <path
              key={row.systemId}
              d={`M ${x1} ${sysCenterY} Q ${cpX} ${sysCenterY} ${x2} ${domainCenterY}`}
              fill="none"
              stroke={isAcquirer ? '#93c5fd' : '#fbbf24'}
              strokeWidth={strokeWidth}
              strokeDasharray={row.status === 'unmapped' ? '4 3' : undefined}
              opacity={opacity}
              style={{ transition: 'opacity 200ms, stroke-width 200ms' }}
            />
          );
        })}
      </svg>

      {/* Acquirer system nodes (left) */}
      {rows.filter((r) => r.organizationName === acquirerName).map((row) => {
        const pos = layout.acquirerPositions[row.systemId];
        if (!pos) return null;
        return (
          <button
            key={row.systemId}
            type="button"
            onClick={() => onSystemClick(row.systemId)}
            onMouseEnter={() => setHoveredNode(row.systemId)}
            onMouseLeave={() => setHoveredNode(null)}
            className="absolute bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-3 py-1.5 text-left hover:shadow-sm"
            style={{
              left: leftLaneX,
              top: pos.y,
              width: NODE_W,
              height: NODE_H,
              borderLeftWidth: 3,
              borderLeftColor: '#3b82f6',
              zIndex: 2,
              opacity: getNodeOpacity(row.systemId, row.targetSystemId),
              transition: 'opacity 200ms, box-shadow 200ms',
            }}
          >
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <span className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-800 truncate">{row.systemName}</span>
              <span className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full flex-shrink-0 ml-1" style={{ backgroundColor: statusColor(row.status) }} />
            </div>
            <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-400">{row.fieldsTotal.toLocaleString()} fields</span>
          </button>
        );
      })}

      {/* Unified domain nodes (center) */}
      {domains.map((domain) => {
        const pos = layout.domainPositions[domain];
        if (!pos) return null;
        const stats = domainStats[domain];
        const domainCenterY = pos.y + pos.height / 2 - DOMAIN_H / 2;
        return (
          <div
            key={domain}
            onMouseEnter={() => setHoveredNode(domain)}
            onMouseLeave={() => setHoveredNode(null)}
            className="absolute bg-white border border-indigo-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 shadow-sm"
            style={{
              left: centerX,
              top: domainCenterY,
              width: DOMAIN_W,
              height: DOMAIN_H,
              borderLeftWidth: 3,
              borderLeftColor: '#4f46e5',
              zIndex: 2,
              opacity: getNodeOpacity(domain),
              transition: 'opacity 200ms',
            }}
          >
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <span className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-800">{DOMAIN_LABELS[domain] ?? domain}</span>
              <span className="text-[10px] text-indigo-500 font-medium">{stats.sources} sources</span>
            </div>
            <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-400">{stats.fields.toLocaleString()} fields</span>
          </div>
        );
      })}

      {/* Target system nodes (right) */}
      {rows.filter((r) => r.organizationName !== acquirerName).map((row) => {
        const pos = layout.targetPositions[row.systemId];
        if (!pos) return null;
        return (
          <button
            key={row.systemId}
            type="button"
            onClick={() => onSystemClick(row.systemId)}
            onMouseEnter={() => setHoveredNode(row.systemId)}
            onMouseLeave={() => setHoveredNode(null)}
            className="absolute bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-3 py-1.5 text-left hover:shadow-sm"
            style={{
              left: rightLaneX,
              top: pos.y,
              width: NODE_W,
              height: NODE_H,
              borderLeftWidth: 3,
              borderLeftColor: '#f59e0b',
              zIndex: 2,
              opacity: getNodeOpacity(row.systemId, row.targetSystemId),
              transition: 'opacity 200ms, box-shadow 200ms',
            }}
          >
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <span className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-800 truncate">{row.systemName}</span>
