              <span className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full flex-shrink-0 ml-1" style={{ backgroundColor: statusColor(row.status) }} />
            </div>
            <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-400">{row.fieldsTotal.toLocaleString()} fields</span>
          </button>
        );
      })}
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/KPIMappingTable.tsx
```
import { useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import {
  useReactTable,
  getCoreRowModel,
  getSortedRowModel,
  flexRender,
  type ColumnDef,
  type SortingState,
} from '@tanstack/react-table';
import { ChevronDown, ChevronUp, ChevronsUpDown } from 'lucide-react';
import ConfidenceBadge from '../../../components/feedback/ConfidenceBadge';
import type { KPIMappingRow } from './onboarding-types';

const CATEGORY_STYLES: Record<string, string> = {
  revenue: 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-700',
  cost: 'bg-purple-50 text-purple-700',
  operational: 'bg-orange-50 text-orange-700',
  clinical: 'bg-green-50 text-green-700',
};

const STATUS_STYLES: Record<string, string> = {
  'auto-mapped': 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200',
  flagged: 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border-amber-200',
  'n-a': 'bg-gray-50 text-gray-500 border-gray-200',
  pending: 'bg-gray-50 text-gray-400 border-gray-200',
};

const STATUS_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
  'auto-mapped': 'Auto-Mapped',
  flagged: 'Flagged',
  'n-a': 'N/A',
  pending: 'Pending',
};

interface KPIMappingTableProps {
  rows: KPIMappingRow[];
  onboardingComplete: boolean;
}

export default function KPIMappingTable({ rows, onboardingComplete }: KPIMappingTableProps) {
  const [sorting, setSorting] = useState<SortingState>(
    onboardingComplete ? [{ id: 'status', desc: true }] : [],
  );

  const columns = useMemo<ColumnDef<KPIMappingRow, unknown>[]>(() => [
    {
      accessorKey: 'kpiName',
      header: 'KPI Name',
      size: 200,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => (
        <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-800">{getValue() as string}</span>
      ),
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'category',
      header: 'Category',
      size: 100,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => {
        const cat = getValue() as string;
        const label = cat.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + cat.slice(1);
        return (
          <span className={`inline-flex rounded px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium ${CATEGORY_STYLES[cat] ?? ''}`}>
            {label}
          </span>
        );
      },
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'platformValue',
      header: 'Platform Value',
      size: 120,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => (
        <span className="font-mono text-xs text-gray-800">{getValue() as string}</span>
      ),
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'entityValue',
      header: 'Entity Value',
      size: 120,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => {
        const v = getValue() as string;
        return (
          <span className={`text-xs ${v === '—' ? 'text-gray-300' : 'font-mono text-gray-800'}`}>{v}</span>
        );
      },
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'status',
      header: 'Status',
      size: 120,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => {
        const status = getValue() as string;
        return (
          <span className={`inline-flex rounded-full border px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium ${STATUS_STYLES[status] ?? ''}`}>
            {STATUS_LABELS[status] ?? status}
          </span>
        );
      },
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'confidence',
      header: 'Confidence',
      size: 90,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => {
        const level = getValue() as string;
        if (level === '—') return <span className="text-xs text-gray-300">—</span>;
        return <ConfidenceBadge level={level as 'high' | 'medium' | 'low'} />;
      },
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'flagReason',
      header: 'Flag Reason',
      size: 200,
      enableSorting: false,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => {
        const reason = getValue() as string;
        return reason
          ? <span className="text-xs text-amber-700">{reason}</span>
          : null;
      },
    },
  ], []);

  const table = useReactTable({
    data: rows,
    columns,
    state: { sorting },
    onSortingChange: setSorting,
    getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel(),
    getSortedRowModel: getSortedRowModel(),
    getRowId: (row) => row.kpiId,
  });

  return (
    <div className="overflow-x-auto rounded-lg border border-gray-200">
      <table className="w-full text-left">
        <thead>
          <tr className="bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200">
            {table.getHeaderGroups()[0].headers.map((header) => (
              <th
                key={header.id}
                className="px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider select-none"
                style={{ width: header.getSize() }}
              >
                {header.isPlaceholder ? null : (
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    className={`flex items-center gap-1 ${header.column.getCanSort() ? 'cursor-pointer hover:text-gray-700' : ''}`}
                    onClick={header.column.getToggleSortingHandler()}
                    disabled={!header.column.getCanSort()}
                  >
                    {flexRender(header.column.columnDef.header, header.getContext())}
                    {header.column.getCanSort() && (
                      header.column.getIsSorted() === 'asc'
                        ? <ChevronUp size={12} />
                        : header.column.getIsSorted() === 'desc'
                          ? <ChevronDown size={12} />
                          : <ChevronsUpDown size={12} className="text-gray-300" />
                    )}
                  </button>
                )}
              </th>
            ))}
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          {table.getRowModel().rows.map((row) => (
            <tr
              key={row.id}
              className={`border-b border-gray-100 ${
                row.original.status === 'flagged' ? 'bg-amber-50/30' : ''
              }`}
            >
              {row.getVisibleCells().map((cell) => (
                <td key={cell.id} className="px-3 py-2" style={{ width: cell.column.getSize() }}>
                  {flexRender(cell.column.columnDef.cell, cell.getContext())}
                </td>
              ))}
            </tr>
          ))}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/KPISummaryTable.tsx
```
import { Fragment, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import {
  useReactTable,
  getCoreRowModel,
  getSortedRowModel,
  flexRender,
  type ColumnDef,
  type SortingState,
  type ExpandedState,
} from '@tanstack/react-table';
import { ChevronRight, ChevronDown, ChevronUp, ChevronsUpDown, CheckCircle2 } from 'lucide-react';
import type { KPIReconciliation } from '../../../types/integration';
import { formatKpiValue, type KPISummaryRow } from './reconciliation-types';

interface KPISummaryTableProps {
  rows: KPISummaryRow[];
  kpisReconciled: string[];
  onReconcile: (kpiId: string) => void;
}

export default function KPISummaryTable({
  rows,
  kpisReconciled,
  onReconcile,
}: KPISummaryTableProps) {
  const [sorting, setSorting] = useState<SortingState>([]);
  const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState<ExpandedState>({});

  const columns = useMemo<ColumnDef<KPISummaryRow, unknown>[]>(() => [
    {
      id: 'expand',
      header: '',
      size: 40,
      enableSorting: false,
      cell: ({ row }) => (
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); row.toggleExpanded(); }}
          className="p-0.5 text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600"
        >
          {row.getIsExpanded() ? <ChevronDown size={14} /> : <ChevronRight size={14} />}
        </button>
      ),
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'kpiName',
      header: 'KPI Name',
      size: 200,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => (
        <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">{getValue() as string}</span>
      ),
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'variantCount',
      header: 'Variants',
      size: 80,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => (
        <span className="font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">{getValue() as number}</span>
      ),
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'localRange',
      header: 'Local Range',
      size: 140,
      enableSorting: false,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => (
        <span className="font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">{getValue() as string}</span>
      ),
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'canonicalValue',
      header: 'Canonical',
      size: 130,
      enableSorting: false,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => (
        <span className="font-mono text-sm font-medium text-indigo-700">{getValue() as string}</span>
      ),
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'dollarImpact',
      header: 'Dollar Impact',
      size: 110,
      cell: ({ row }) => (
        <span className="font-mono text-sm text-gray-800 text-right block">
          {row.original.dollarImpactFormatted}
        </span>
      ),
    },
    {
      id: 'status',
      header: 'Status',
      size: 140,
      enableSorting: false,
      cell: ({ row }) => {
        const isReconciled = kpisReconciled.includes(row.original.kpiId);
        if (isReconciled) {
          return (
            <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded-full bg-green-100 border border-green-200 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium text-green-700">
              <CheckCircle2 size={12} /> Reconciled
            </span>
          );
        }
        return (
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); onReconcile(row.original.kpiId); }}
            className="rounded-lg bg-blue-600 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium text-white hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors"
          >
            Reconcile
          </button>
        );
      },
    },
  ], [kpisReconciled, onReconcile]);

  const table = useReactTable({
    data: rows,
    columns,
    state: { sorting, expanded },
    onSortingChange: setSorting,
    onExpandedChange: setExpanded,
    getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel(),
    getSortedRowModel: getSortedRowModel(),
    getRowId: (row) => row.kpiId,
  });

  return (
    <div className="overflow-x-auto rounded-lg border border-gray-200">
      <table className="w-full text-left">
        <thead>
          <tr className="bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200">
            {table.getHeaderGroups()[0].headers.map((header) => (
              <th
                key={header.id}
                className="px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider select-none"
                style={{ width: header.getSize() }}
              >
                {header.isPlaceholder ? null : (
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    className={`flex items-center gap-1 ${header.column.getCanSort() ? 'cursor-pointer hover:text-gray-700' : ''}`}
                    onClick={header.column.getToggleSortingHandler()}
                    disabled={!header.column.getCanSort()}
                  >
                    {flexRender(header.column.columnDef.header, header.getContext())}
                    {header.column.getCanSort() && (
                      header.column.getIsSorted() === 'asc'
                        ? <ChevronUp size={12} />
                        : header.column.getIsSorted() === 'desc'
                          ? <ChevronDown size={12} />
                          : <ChevronsUpDown size={12} className="text-gray-300" />
                    )}
                  </button>
                )}
              </th>
            ))}
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          {table.getRowModel().rows.map((row) => {
            const isReconciled = kpisReconciled.includes(row.original.kpiId);
            const isExpanded = row.getIsExpanded();
            return (
              <Fragment key={row.id}>
                <tr
                  onClick={() => row.toggleExpanded()}
                  className={`border-b border-gray-100 cursor-pointer transition-colors ${
                    isExpanded
                      ? 'bg-blue-50/30'
                      : 'hover:bg-gray-50'
                  }`}
                  style={{
                    borderLeftWidth: 3,
                    borderLeftColor: isReconciled ? '#059669' : '#D97706',
                  }}
                >
                  {row.getVisibleCells().map((cell) => (
                    <td key={cell.id} className="px-3 py-2.5" style={{ width: cell.column.getSize() }}>
                      {flexRender(cell.column.columnDef.cell, cell.getContext())}
                    </td>
                  ))}
                </tr>
                {isExpanded && (
                  <tr className="border-b border-gray-200">
                    <td colSpan={columns.length} className="p-0">
                      <KPIExpandedDetail
                        reconciliation={row.original.reconciliation}
                        dollarImpactFormatted={row.original.dollarImpactFormatted}
                        vcpBaseline={row.original.vcpBaseline}
                        isReconciled={isReconciled}
                        onReconcile={onReconcile}
                      />
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                )}
              </Fragment>
            );
          })}
          {rows.length === 0 && (
            <tr>
              <td colSpan={columns.length} className="px-3 py-8 text-center text-sm text-gray-400">
                No KPIs available
              </td>
            </tr>
          )}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── Expanded detail (inline sub-component) ──

function KPIExpandedDetail({
  reconciliation,
  dollarImpactFormatted,
  vcpBaseline,
  isReconciled,
  onReconcile,
}: {
  reconciliation: KPIReconciliation;
  dollarImpactFormatted: string;
  vcpBaseline: string;
  isReconciled: boolean;
  onReconcile: (kpiId: string) => void;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="bg-blue-50/20 px-6 py-4 space-y-4">
      {/* Canonical definition */}
      <div className="rounded-lg bg-indigo-50 border border-indigo-200 px-4 py-3">
        <p className="text-[10px] font-medium text-indigo-600 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">Canonical Definition</p>
        <p className="text-sm text-indigo-900 font-medium">{reconciliation.canonicalDefinition}</p>
      </div>

      {/* Definition variants table */}
      <div className="overflow-x-auto">
        <table className="w-full text-xs">
          <thead>
            <tr className="border-b border-gray-200">
              <th className="text-left py-2 pr-3 font-medium text-gray-500">Entity</th>
              <th className="text-left py-2 pr-3 font-medium text-gray-500">Definition</th>
              <th className="text-left py-2 pr-3 font-medium text-gray-500">Source Fields</th>
              <th className="text-right py-2 pr-3 font-medium text-gray-500">Value (Local)</th>
              <th className="text-right py-2 font-medium text-gray-500">Value (Canonical)</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {reconciliation.definitionVariants.map((v, i) => (
              <tr key={i} className="border-b border-gray-100 last:border-0">
                <td className="py-2.5 pr-3 text-gray-800 font-medium whitespace-nowrap">{v.entityName}</td>
                <td className="py-2.5 pr-3 text-gray-600 max-w-xs">{v.definitionText}</td>
                <td className="py-2.5 pr-3">
                  <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1">
                    {v.sourceFields.map((f) => (
                      <span key={f} className="inline-block rounded bg-gray-100 px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-mono text-gray-600">
                        {f}
                      </span>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </td>
                <td className="py-2.5 pr-3 text-right font-mono text-gray-700">
                  {formatKpiValue(v.valueUnderLocal, reconciliation.kpiId)}
                </td>
                <td className="py-2.5 text-right font-mono font-semibold text-indigo-700">
                  {formatKpiValue(v.valueUnderCanonical, reconciliation.kpiId)}
                </td>
              </tr>
            ))}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>

      {/* Metadata + action */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-4 text-xs text-gray-500">
          <span>
            <span className="font-medium text-gray-700">Dollar Impact:</span>{' '}
            {dollarImpactFormatted} — {reconciliation.dollarImpact.description}
          </span>
          <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
          <span>
            <span className="font-medium text-gray-700">VCP Baseline:</span> {vcpBaseline}
          </span>
        </div>
        {!isReconciled ? (
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); onReconcile(reconciliation.kpiId); }}
            className="rounded-lg bg-blue-600 px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-white hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors"
          >
            Apply Canonical Definition
          </button>
        ) : (
          <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded-full bg-green-100 border border-green-200 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium text-green-700">
            <CheckCircle2 size={12} /> Reconciled
          </span>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/MappingDetailPanel.tsx
```
import { X, CheckCircle2, AlertTriangle } from 'lucide-react';
import ConfidenceBadge from '../../../components/feedback/ConfidenceBadge';
import type { SchemaConflict } from '../../../types/integration';
import type { FieldMappingRow } from './harmonization-types';

interface MappingDetailPanelProps {
  mapping: FieldMappingRow;
  conflict: SchemaConflict | null;
  isResolved: boolean;
  onResolve: (conceptName: string) => void;
  onClose: () => void;
}

export default function MappingDetailPanel({
  mapping,
  conflict,
  isResolved,
  onResolve,
  onClose,
}: MappingDetailPanelProps) {
  const coverage = mapping.fieldCount > 0
    ? ((mapping.fieldsMapped / mapping.fieldCount) * 100).toFixed(1)
    : '0.0';

  return (
    <div className="rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white p-5 animate-in fade-in duration-300">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
        <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">
          {mapping.sourceConcept} → {mapping.canonicalConcept}
        </h3>
        <button type="button" onClick={onClose} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600">
          <X size={16} />
        </button>
      </div>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-5 gap-6">
        {/* Left: Field Mapping + Conflict */}
        <div className="col-span-3 space-y-4">
          {/* Field Mapping Summary */}
          <div>
            <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Field Mapping</p>
            <table className="w-full text-xs">
              <thead>
                <tr className="border-b border-gray-100">
                  <th className="text-left py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500">Source</th>
                  <th className="text-left py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500">Canonical</th>
                  <th className="text-right py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500">Mapped</th>
                  <th className="text-right py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500">Total</th>
                  <th className="text-right py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500">Coverage</th>
                  <th className="text-right py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500">Confidence</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                <tr>
                  <td className="py-1.5 text-gray-800">{mapping.sourceConcept}</td>
                  <td className="py-1.5 text-indigo-700 font-medium">{mapping.canonicalConcept}</td>
                  <td className="py-1.5 text-right font-mono text-gray-800">{mapping.fieldsMapped.toLocaleString()}</td>
                  <td className="py-1.5 text-right font-mono text-gray-800">{mapping.fieldCount.toLocaleString()}</td>
                  <td className="py-1.5 text-right font-mono text-gray-800">{coverage}%</td>
                  <td className="py-1.5 text-right"><ConfidenceBadge level={mapping.confidence} /></td>
                </tr>
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>

          {/* Conflict Section */}
          {conflict && (
            <div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                {isResolved ? (
                  <CheckCircle2 size={14} className="text-green-600" />
                ) : (
                  <AlertTriangle size={14} className="text-amber-500" />
                )}
                <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">
                  Schema Conflict — {conflict.conceptName}
                </p>
              </div>

              {/* Variants table */}
              <div className="overflow-x-auto mb-3">
                <table className="w-full text-xs">
                  <thead>
                    <tr className="border-b border-gray-200">
                      <th className="text-left py-1.5 pr-3 font-medium text-gray-500">Entity</th>
                      <th className="text-left py-1.5 pr-3 font-medium text-gray-500">System</th>
                      <th className="text-left py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500">Local Definition</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    {conflict.variants.map((v, i) => (
                      <tr key={i} className="border-b border-gray-100 last:border-0">
                        <td className="py-1.5 pr-3 text-gray-700">{v.entityName}</td>
                        <td className="py-1.5 pr-3 text-gray-500 font-mono text-[10px]">{v.systemId}</td>
                        <td className="py-1.5 text-gray-600">{v.localDefinition}</td>
                      </tr>
                    ))}
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>

              {/* Canonical resolution */}
              <div className="rounded-lg bg-indigo-50 border border-indigo-200 px-3 py-2 mb-3">
                <p className="text-[10px] font-medium text-indigo-600 uppercase tracking-wider mb-0.5">Canonical Resolution</p>
                <p className="text-xs text-indigo-900">{conflict.canonicalResolution}</p>
              </div>

              {/* Resolve button or downstream impact */}
              {!isResolved ? (
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => onResolve(conflict.conceptName)}
                  className="rounded-lg bg-blue-600 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium text-white hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors"
                >
                  Apply Resolution
                </button>
              ) : (
                <div>
                  <p className="text-[10px] font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">Downstream Impact</p>
                  <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
                    {conflict.affectedKpis.map((kpi) => (
                      <span key={kpi} className="inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-green-100 border border-green-200 px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium text-green-800">
                        {kpi}
                      </span>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Right: Mapping Metadata */}
        <div className="col-span-2">
          <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Mapping Details</p>
          <dl className="space-y-1.5 text-xs">
            <MetaRow label="Organization" value={mapping.organizationName} />
            <MetaRow label="System" value={mapping.systemName} />
            <MetaRow label="Entity" value={mapping.entityName} />
            <MetaRow label="System Type" value={mapping.systemType} />
            <MetaRow label="Canonical Concept" value={mapping.canonicalConcept} />
            <MetaRow label="Auto-Accept Rate" value={`${mapping.autoAcceptRate}%`} />
            <MetaRow
              label="Mapping Status"
              value={mapping.status === 'mapped' ? 'Complete' : mapping.status === 'in-progress' ? 'In Progress' : 'Unmapped'}
              statusColor={mapping.status === 'mapped' ? 'text-emerald-600' : mapping.status === 'in-progress' ? 'text-amber-600' : 'text-red-600'}
            />
            <MetaRow label="Last Updated" value="Mar 12, 2026 09:14 AM" />
          </dl>
          <div className="mt-3 space-y-1">
            <button
              type="button"
              className="block text-xs text-blue-600 hover:underline cursor-pointer"
              onClick={() => {/* no-op in demo */}}
            >
              View field-level mappings &rarr;
            </button>
            <button
              type="button"
              className="block text-xs text-blue-600 hover:underline cursor-pointer"
              onClick={() => {/* no-op in demo */}}
            >
              View change history &rarr;
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function MetaRow({ label, value, statusColor }: { label: string; value: string; statusColor?: string }) {
  return (
    <div className="flex justify-between">
      <dt className="text-gray-500">{label}</dt>
      <dd className={`font-medium ${statusColor ?? 'text-gray-800'}`}>{value}</dd>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/PayerResolutionTable.tsx
```
import { PAYER_RESOLUTION_DATA } from './ai-reconciliation-types';

export default function PayerResolutionTable() {
  return (
    <div className="rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white">
      <div className="border-b border-gray-200 px-4 py-2.5">
        <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700">
          Payer Name Resolution ({PAYER_RESOLUTION_DATA.length} variants → 1
          canonical)
        </h4>
      </div>
      <div className="overflow-x-auto">
        <table className="w-full text-sm">
          <thead>
            <tr className="bg-gray-50 text-left">
              <th className="px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500">
                Raw Payer Name (Standard Pipeline)
              </th>
              <th className="px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500">
                → Canonical (Data Foundry)
              </th>
              <th className="px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500">
                Resolution
              </th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {PAYER_RESOLUTION_DATA.map((row) => (
              <tr key={row.rawName} className="border-t border-gray-100">
                <td className="px-4 py-2 font-mono text-sm text-gray-700">
                  {row.rawName}
                </td>
                <td className="px-4 py-2 font-mono text-sm font-medium text-indigo-700">
                  {row.canonicalName}
                </td>
                <td className="px-4 py-2 text-xs text-gray-500">
                  {row.resolutionMethod}
                </td>
              </tr>
            ))}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/PortfolioHeatmapTable.tsx
```
import { useMemo, useState, Fragment } from 'react';
import {
  useReactTable,
  getCoreRowModel,
  getSortedRowModel,
  flexRender,
  type ColumnDef,
  type SortingState,
} from '@tanstack/react-table';
import { ChevronDown, ChevronUp, ChevronsUpDown } from 'lucide-react';
import type { PortfolioEntityRow, PortfolioKpiValue, V3Filters } from './portfolio-types';
import { groupByOrganization } from './portfolio-types';

const STATUS_COLORS: Record<string, string> = {
  green: 'bg-green-100 text-green-800',
  yellow: 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-800',
  red: 'bg-red-100 text-red-800',
};

const TREND_ARROW: Record<string, string> = {
  up: '\u2191',
  down: '\u2193',
  flat: '\u2192',
};

const ENTITY_STATUS_STYLES: Record<string, string> = {
  new: 'bg-green-50 text-green-700 border-green-200',
  'drift-resolved': 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 border-blue-200',
  active: 'bg-gray-50 text-gray-600 border-gray-200',
};

const ENTITY_STATUS_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
  new: 'New',
  'drift-resolved': 'Drift Resolved',
  active: 'Active',
};

function formatValue(value: number): string {
  if (value >= 100_000) return `$${(value / 1_000).toFixed(0)}K`;
  if (value >= 1_000) return `$${(value / 1_000).toFixed(0)}K`;
  return value % 1 === 0 ? String(value) : value.toFixed(1);
}

interface PortfolioHeatmapTableProps {
  rows: PortfolioEntityRow[];
  kpiColumns: { id: string; name: string }[];
  filters: V3Filters;
  onFilterChange: (key: keyof V3Filters, value: string) => void;
  selectedEntityId: string | null;
  onSelectEntity: (entityId: string | null) => void;
  orgLabels: { value: string; label: string }[];
  orgFullNames: Record<string, { fullName: string; tag: string }>;
}

export default function PortfolioHeatmapTable({
  rows,
  kpiColumns,
  filters,
  onFilterChange,
  selectedEntityId,
  onSelectEntity,
  orgLabels,
  orgFullNames,
}: PortfolioHeatmapTableProps) {
  const [sorting, setSorting] = useState<SortingState>([]);

  const columns = useMemo<ColumnDef<PortfolioEntityRow, unknown>[]>(() => {
    const cols: ColumnDef<PortfolioEntityRow, unknown>[] = [
      {
        accessorKey: 'entityName',
        header: 'Entity',
        size: 200,
        cell: ({ getValue }) => (
          <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-800">{getValue() as string}</span>
        ),
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'status',
        header: 'Status',
        size: 100,
        cell: ({ getValue }) => {
          const status = getValue() as string;
          return (
            <span className={`inline-flex rounded-full border px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium ${ENTITY_STATUS_STYLES[status] ?? ''}`}>
              {ENTITY_STATUS_LABELS[status] ?? status}
            </span>
          );
        },
      },
    ];

    for (const kpi of kpiColumns) {
      cols.push({
        id: kpi.id,
        header: kpi.name,
        size: 110,
        accessorFn: (row) => row.kpiValues[kpi.id]?.value ?? 0,
        cell: ({ row }) => {
          const kv: PortfolioKpiValue | undefined = row.original.kpiValues[kpi.id];
          if (!kv) return <span className="text-gray-300">—</span>;
          return (
            <span
              className={`inline-flex items-center gap-0.5 rounded px-1.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium ${STATUS_COLORS[kv.status]}`}
              title={`Current: ${formatValue(kv.value)} | Baseline: ${formatValue(kv.baseline)} | Target: ${formatValue(kv.target)} | Trend: ${TREND_ARROW[kv.trend]}`}
            >
              {formatValue(kv.value)}
              <span className="text-[10px] opacity-70">{TREND_ARROW[kv.trend]}</span>
            </span>
          );
        },
        sortingFn: (a, b) => {
          const av = a.original.kpiValues[kpi.id]?.value ?? 0;
          const bv = b.original.kpiValues[kpi.id]?.value ?? 0;
          return av - bv;
        },
      });
    }

    return cols;
  }, [kpiColumns]);

  const table = useReactTable({
    data: rows,
    columns,
    state: { sorting },
    onSortingChange: setSorting,
    getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel(),
    getSortedRowModel: getSortedRowModel(),
    getRowId: (row) => row.entityId,
  });

  // Group by organization (only when no column sorting is active)
  const grouped = useMemo(() => groupByOrganization(rows), [rows]);
  const hasSorting = sorting.length > 0;

  // Subtotals per org
  const subtotal = (group: PortfolioEntityRow[]) => {
    const count = group.length;
    const greenCount = group.reduce(
      (sum, r) => sum + Object.values(r.kpiValues).filter((v) => v.status === 'green').length,
      0,
    );
    const total = group.reduce((sum, r) => sum + Object.values(r.kpiValues).length, 0);
    const onTargetPct = total > 0 ? ((greenCount / total) * 100).toFixed(0) : '0';
    return { count, onTargetPct };
  };

  // Summary footer averages
  const footerAverages = useMemo(() => {
    const avgs: Record<string, { sum: number; count: number }> = {};
    for (const row of rows) {
      for (const [kpiId, kv] of Object.entries(row.kpiValues)) {
        if (!avgs[kpiId]) avgs[kpiId] = { sum: 0, count: 0 };
        avgs[kpiId].sum += kv.value;
        avgs[kpiId].count += 1;
      }
    }
    return avgs;
  }, [rows]);

  const renderRow = (row: ReturnType<typeof table.getRowModel>['rows'][number]) => (
    <tr
      key={row.id}
      onClick={() => onSelectEntity(selectedEntityId === row.original.entityId ? null : row.original.entityId)}
      className={`border-b border-gray-100 cursor-pointer transition-colors ${
        selectedEntityId === row.original.entityId
          ? 'bg-blue-50/30'
          : 'hover:bg-gray-50'
      }`}
    >
      {row.getVisibleCells().map((cell) => (
        <td key={cell.id} className="px-3 py-2" style={{ width: cell.column.getSize() }}>
          {flexRender(cell.column.columnDef.cell, cell.getContext())}
        </td>
      ))}
    </tr>
  );

  // When sorting is active, use sorted rows directly; when not, use org groups
  const sortedRows = table.getRowModel().rows;

  return (
    <div className="space-y-3">
      {/* Filter chips */}
      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
        <FilterGroup
          label="Organization"
          options={[
            { value: 'all', label: 'All' },
            ...orgLabels,
          ]}
          active={filters.organization}
          onChange={(v) => onFilterChange('organization', v)}
        />
        <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
        <FilterGroup
          label="KPI Status"
          options={[
            { value: 'all', label: 'All' },
            { value: 'on-target', label: 'On Target' },
            { value: 'below-target', label: 'Below Target' },
            { value: 'critical', label: 'Critical' },
          ]}
          active={filters.kpiStatus}
          onChange={(v) => onFilterChange('kpiStatus', v)}
        />
        <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
        <FilterGroup
          label="Entity Status"
          options={[
            { value: 'all', label: 'All' },
            { value: 'new', label: 'New' },
            { value: 'drift-resolved', label: 'Drift Resolved' },
          ]}
          active={filters.entityStatus}
          onChange={(v) => onFilterChange('entityStatus', v)}
        />
      </div>

      {/* Table */}
      <div className="overflow-x-auto rounded-lg border border-gray-200">
        <table className="w-full text-left">
          <thead>
            <tr className="bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200">
              {table.getHeaderGroups()[0].headers.map((header) => (
                <th
                  key={header.id}
                  className="px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider select-none"
                  style={{ width: header.getSize() }}
                >
                  {header.isPlaceholder ? null : (
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      className={`flex items-center gap-1 ${header.column.getCanSort() ? 'cursor-pointer hover:text-gray-700' : ''}`}
                      onClick={header.column.getToggleSortingHandler()}
                      disabled={!header.column.getCanSort()}
                    >
                      {flexRender(header.column.columnDef.header, header.getContext())}
                      {header.column.getCanSort() && (
                        header.column.getIsSorted() === 'asc'
                          ? <ChevronUp size={12} />
                          : header.column.getIsSorted() === 'desc'
                            ? <ChevronDown size={12} />
                            : <ChevronsUpDown size={12} className="text-gray-300" />
                      )}
                    </button>
                  )}
                </th>
              ))}
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {hasSorting ? (
              // Sorted: flat list
              sortedRows.map(renderRow)
            ) : (
              // Unsorted: grouped by organization
              Array.from(grouped.entries()).map(([org, groupRows]) => {
                if (groupRows.length === 0) return null;
                const sub = subtotal(groupRows);
                // Find matching table rows for this org group
                const tableRows = sortedRows.filter((r) => r.original.organization === org);
                return (
                  <Fragment key={org}>
                    <GroupHeader
                      label={orgFullNames[org]?.fullName ?? org}
                      tag={orgFullNames[org]?.tag ?? 'entity'}
                      sub={sub}
                      colSpan={columns.length}
                    />
                    {tableRows.map(renderRow)}
                  </Fragment>
                );
              })
            )}

            {rows.length === 0 && (
              <tr>
                <td colSpan={columns.length} className="px-3 py-8 text-center text-sm text-gray-400">
                  No entities match the current filters
                </td>
              </tr>
            )}
          </tbody>

          {/* Summary footer */}
          {rows.length > 0 && (
            <tfoot>
              <tr className="bg-gray-100 border-t border-gray-200">
                <td className="px-3 py-2 text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700">Portfolio Average</td>
                <td className="px-3 py-2" />
                {kpiColumns.map((kpi) => {
                  const avg = footerAverages[kpi.id];
                  const val = avg && avg.count > 0 ? avg.sum / avg.count : 0;
                  return (
                    <td key={kpi.id} className="px-3 py-2 text-center text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700">
                      {formatValue(val)}
                    </td>
                  );
                })}
              </tr>
            </tfoot>
          )}
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── Group header ──

function GroupHeader({
  label,
  tag,
  sub,
  colSpan,
}: {
  label: string;
  tag: string;
  sub: { count: number; onTargetPct: string };
  colSpan: number;
}) {
  return (
    <tr className="bg-gray-50/80">
      <td colSpan={colSpan} className="px-3 py-2">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <span className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700">{label}</span>
            <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-400">({tag})</span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-[10px] text-gray-500">
            <span>{sub.count} entities</span>
            <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
            <span>{sub.onTargetPct}% KPIs on target</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </td>
    </tr>
  );
}

// ── Filter chip group ──

function FilterGroup({
  label,
  options,
  active,
  onChange,
}: {
  label: string;
  options: { value: string; label: string }[];
  active: string;
  onChange: (value: string) => void;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
      <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mr-1">{label}</span>
      {options.map((opt) => (
        <button
          key={opt.value}
          type="button"
          onClick={() => onChange(opt.value)}
          className={`rounded-md px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium transition-colors ${
            active === opt.value
              ? 'bg-gray-800 text-white'
              : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-200 hover:text-gray-700'
          }`}
        >
          {opt.label}
        </button>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/ReconciliationTable.tsx
```
import { Fragment, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import {
  useReactTable,
  getCoreRowModel,
  getSortedRowModel,
  flexRender,
  type ColumnDef,
  type SortingState,
  type ExpandedState,
} from '@tanstack/react-table';
import { ChevronRight, ChevronDown, ChevronUp, ChevronsUpDown } from 'lucide-react';
import type { A1Filters } from '../../../store/aiStore';
import {
  type ReconciliationRow,
  type DiscrepancyType,
  DISCREPANCY_STYLES,
  getRootCauseText,
  getSystemDetail,
} from './ai-reconciliation-types';

interface ReconciliationTableProps {
  rows: ReconciliationRow[];
  filters: A1Filters;
  onFilterChange: (key: keyof A1Filters, value: string | boolean) => void;
}

const SEVERITY_COLORS: Record<string, string> = {
  critical: 'bg-red-50',
  high: 'bg-amber-50',
  low: '',
};

function formatDelta(delta: number | null): string {
  if (delta === null) return '—';
  const sign = delta >= 0 ? '+' : '−';
  return `${sign}${Math.abs(delta).toFixed(1)}pp`;
}

export default function ReconciliationTable({
  rows,
  filters,
  onFilterChange,
}: ReconciliationTableProps) {
  const [sorting, setSorting] = useState<SortingState>([]);
  const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState<ExpandedState>({});

  const filteredRows = useMemo(() => {
    let result = rows;
    if (filters.discrepanciesOnly) {
      result = result.filter((r) => r.discrepancyType !== 'none');
    }
    if (filters.discrepancyType !== 'all') {
      result = result.filter((r) => r.discrepancyType === filters.discrepancyType);
    }
    if (filters.severity !== 'all') {
      result = result.filter((r) => r.severity === filters.severity);
    }
    return result;
  }, [rows, filters]);

  const columns = useMemo<ColumnDef<ReconciliationRow, unknown>[]>(
    () => [
      {
        id: 'expand',
        header: '',
        size: 40,
        enableSorting: false,
        cell: ({ row }) => (
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={(e) => {
              e.stopPropagation();
              row.toggleExpanded();
            }}
            className="p-0.5 text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600"
          >
            {row.getIsExpanded() ? (
              <ChevronDown size={14} />
            ) : (
              <ChevronRight size={14} />
            )}
          </button>
        ),
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'entityName',
        header: 'Entity',
        size: 200,
        cell: ({ getValue }) => (
          <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">
            {getValue() as string}
          </span>
        ),
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'pipelineAValue',
        header: 'Standard',
        size: 110,
        cell: ({ getValue }) => {
          const v = getValue() as number | null;
          return v !== null ? (
            <span className="font-mono text-sm text-gray-800 text-right block">
              {v.toFixed(1)}%
            </span>
          ) : (
            <span className="font-mono text-sm text-gray-400 text-right block">
              N/A
            </span>
          );
        },
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'pipelineBValue',
        header: 'Data Foundry',
        size: 110,
        cell: ({ getValue }) => {
          const v = getValue() as number | null;
          return (
            <span className="font-mono text-sm text-gray-800 text-right block">
              {v !== null ? `${v.toFixed(1)}%` : 'N/A'}
            </span>
          );
        },
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'delta',
        header: 'Δ',
        size: 100,
        cell: ({ row }) => (
          <span
            className={`font-mono text-sm text-right block ${
              row.original.severity === 'critical' ? 'font-bold' : ''
            }`}
          >
            {formatDelta(row.original.delta)}
          </span>
        ),
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'discrepancyType',
        header: 'Discrepancy',
        size: 180,
        cell: ({ getValue }) => {
          const type = getValue() as DiscrepancyType;
          const style = DISCREPANCY_STYLES[type];
          return (
            <span className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-sm text-gray-700">
              <span
                className={`inline-block h-2 w-2 rounded-full ${style.dot}`}
              />
              {style.label}
            </span>
          );
        },
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'affectedSystems',
        header: 'System',
        size: 140,
        cell: ({ getValue }) => (
          <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">{getValue() as string}</span>
        ),
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'severity',
        header: 'Severity',
        size: 80,
        cell: ({ getValue }) => {
          const sev = getValue() as string;
          const colors: Record<string, string> = {
            critical: 'bg-red-100 text-red-700',
            high: 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700',
            low: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600',
          };
          return (
            <span
              className={`inline-flex rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium ${colors[sev] ?? ''}`}
            >
              {sev}
            </span>
          );
        },
      },
    ],
    [],
  );

  const table = useReactTable({
    data: filteredRows,
    columns,
    state: { sorting, expanded },
    onSortingChange: setSorting,
    onExpandedChange: setExpanded,
    getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel(),
    getSortedRowModel: getSortedRowModel(),
    getRowId: (row) => row.id,
  });

  return (
    <div className="space-y-3">
      {/* Filter bar */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-xs">
        <label className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-gray-600">
          <span className="font-medium">Type:</span>
          <select
            value={filters.discrepancyType}
            onChange={(e) => onFilterChange('discrepancyType', e.target.value)}
            className="rounded border border-gray-200 bg-white px-2 py-1 text-xs"
          >
            <option value="all">All</option>
            <option value="definition-conflict">Definition Conflict</option>
            <option value="schema-drift">Schema Drift</option>
            <option value="missing-data">Missing Data</option>
            <option value="none">Match</option>
          </select>
        </label>
        <label className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-gray-600">
          <span className="font-medium">Severity:</span>
          <select
            value={filters.severity}
            onChange={(e) => onFilterChange('severity', e.target.value)}
            className="rounded border border-gray-200 bg-white px-2 py-1 text-xs"
          >
            <option value="all">All</option>
            <option value="critical">Critical</option>
            <option value="high">High</option>
            <option value="low">Low</option>
          </select>
        </label>
        <label className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-gray-600 cursor-pointer">
          <input
            type="checkbox"
            checked={filters.discrepanciesOnly}
            onChange={(e) =>
              onFilterChange('discrepanciesOnly', e.target.checked)
            }
            className="rounded border-gray-300"
          />
          <span>Discrepancies only</span>
        </label>
        <span className="ml-auto text-gray-400">
          {filteredRows.length} of {rows.length} entities
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* Table */}
      <div className="overflow-x-auto rounded-lg border border-gray-200">
        <table className="w-full text-left">
          <thead>
            <tr className="bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200">
              {table.getHeaderGroups()[0].headers.map((header) => (
                <th
                  key={header.id}
                  className="px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider select-none"
                  style={{ width: header.getSize() }}
                >
                  {header.isPlaceholder ? null : (
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      className={`flex items-center gap-1 ${
                        header.column.getCanSort()
                          ? 'cursor-pointer hover:text-gray-700'
                          : ''
                      }`}
                      onClick={header.column.getToggleSortingHandler()}
                      disabled={!header.column.getCanSort()}
                    >
                      {flexRender(
                        header.column.columnDef.header,
                        header.getContext(),
                      )}
                      {header.column.getCanSort() &&
                        (header.column.getIsSorted() === 'asc' ? (
                          <ChevronUp size={12} />
                        ) : header.column.getIsSorted() === 'desc' ? (
                          <ChevronDown size={12} />
                        ) : (
                          <ChevronsUpDown
                            size={12}
                            className="text-gray-300"
                          />
                        ))}
                    </button>
                  )}
                </th>
              ))}
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {table.getRowModel().rows.map((row) => {
              const isExpanded = row.getIsExpanded();
              const rowBg = SEVERITY_COLORS[row.original.severity] ?? '';
              return (
                <Fragment key={row.id}>
                  <tr
                    onClick={() => row.toggleExpanded()}
                    className={`border-b border-gray-100 cursor-pointer transition-colors ${
                      isExpanded ? 'bg-blue-50/30' : rowBg || 'hover:bg-gray-50'
                    }`}
                  >
                    {row.getVisibleCells().map((cell) => (
                      <td
                        key={cell.id}
                        className="px-3 py-2.5"
                        style={{ width: cell.column.getSize() }}
                      >
                        {flexRender(
                          cell.column.columnDef.cell,
                          cell.getContext(),
                        )}
                      </td>
                    ))}
                  </tr>
                  {isExpanded && (
                    <tr className="border-b border-gray-200">
                      <td colSpan={columns.length} className="p-0">
                        <ExpandedDetail row={row.original} />
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  )}
                </Fragment>
              );
            })}
            {filteredRows.length === 0 && (
              <tr>
                <td
                  colSpan={columns.length}
                  className="px-3 py-8 text-center text-sm text-gray-400"
                >
                  No matching entities
                </td>
              </tr>
            )}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── Expanded row detail ──

function ExpandedDetail({ row }: { row: ReconciliationRow }) {
  const detail = getSystemDetail(row.systemName);

  return (
    <div className="bg-blue-50/20 px-6 py-4 space-y-4">
      {/* Root cause */}
      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">
        {getRootCauseText(row)}
      </p>

      {/* Source system detail */}
      <div className="overflow-x-auto">
        <table className="w-full text-xs">
          <thead>
            <tr className="border-b border-gray-200">
              <th className="text-left py-2 pr-3 font-medium text-gray-500">
                Source System
              </th>
              <th className="text-left py-2 pr-3 font-medium text-gray-500">
                Field
              </th>
              <th className="text-left py-2 pr-3 font-medium text-gray-500">
                Standard Pipeline
              </th>
              <th className="text-left py-2 pr-3 font-medium text-gray-500">
                Data Foundry
              </th>
              <th className="text-left py-2 font-medium text-gray-500">
                Status
              </th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            <tr className="border-b border-gray-100 last:border-0">
              <td className="py-2.5 pr-3 text-gray-800 font-medium">
                {row.systemName}
              </td>
              <td className="py-2.5 pr-3 font-mono text-gray-600">
                {detail.field}
              </td>
              <td className="py-2.5 pr-3 text-gray-600">
                {detail.pipelineAHandling}
              </td>
              <td className="py-2.5 pr-3 text-gray-600">
                {detail.pipelineBHandling}
              </td>
              <td className="py-2.5">
                <span className="inline-flex rounded-full bg-green-100 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium text-green-700">
                  {detail.status}
                </span>
              </td>
            </tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/RoutingTable.tsx
```
import { Fragment, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import {
  useReactTable,
  getCoreRowModel,
  flexRender,
  type ColumnDef,
  type ExpandedState,
} from '@tanstack/react-table';
import { ChevronRight, ChevronDown } from 'lucide-react';
import type { RoutingRow } from './ai-routing-types';

interface RoutingTableProps {
  rows: RoutingRow[];
}

export default function RoutingTable({ rows }: RoutingTableProps) {
  // All rows expanded by default
  const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState<ExpandedState>(true);

  const columns = useMemo<ColumnDef<RoutingRow, unknown>[]>(
    () => [
      {
        id: 'expand',
        header: '',
        size: 40,
        cell: ({ row }) => (
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={(e) => {
              e.stopPropagation();
              row.toggleExpanded();
            }}
            className="p-0.5 text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600"
          >
            {row.getIsExpanded() ? (
              <ChevronDown size={14} />
            ) : (
              <ChevronRight size={14} />
            )}
          </button>
        ),
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'systemName',
        header: 'System',
        size: 160,
        cell: ({ getValue }) => (
          <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">
            {getValue() as string}
          </span>
        ),
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'targetField',
        header: 'Target Field',
        size: 160,
        cell: ({ getValue }) => (
          <span className="font-mono text-xs text-gray-600">
            {getValue() as string}
          </span>
        ),
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'alertLevel',
        header: 'Alert Level',
        size: 100,
        cell: ({ getValue }) => {
          const level = (getValue() as string).toUpperCase();
          const color =
            level === 'URGENT' || level === 'HIGH'
              ? 'text-red-700 bg-red-50'
              : 'text-amber-700 bg-amber-50';
          return (
            <span
              className={`inline-flex rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium ${color}`}
            >
              {level}
            </span>
          );
        },
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'priority',
        header: 'Priority',
        size: 80,
        cell: ({ getValue }) => (
          <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">{getValue() as string}</span>
        ),
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'worklistDescription',
        header: 'Worklist Entry',
        size: 280,
        cell: ({ getValue }) => (
          <span
            className="text-xs text-gray-600 truncate block"
            title={getValue() as string}
          >
            {getValue() as string}
          </span>
        ),
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'status',
        header: 'Status',
        size: 100,
        cell: ({ getValue }) => {
          const status = getValue() as string;
          return status === 'routed' ? (
            <span className="inline-flex rounded-full bg-green-100 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium text-green-700">
              Routed
            </span>
          ) : (
            <span className="inline-flex rounded-full bg-gray-100 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500">
              Pending
            </span>
          );
        },
      },
    ],
    [],
  );

  const table = useReactTable({
    data: rows,
    columns,
    state: { expanded },
    onExpandedChange: setExpanded,
    getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel(),
    getRowId: (row) => row.id,
  });

  return (
    <div className="overflow-x-auto rounded-lg border border-gray-200">
      <table className="w-full text-left">
        <thead>
          <tr className="bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200">
            {table.getHeaderGroups()[0].headers.map((header) => (
              <th
                key={header.id}
                className="px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider"
                style={{ width: header.getSize() }}
              >
                {header.isPlaceholder
                  ? null
                  : flexRender(
                      header.column.columnDef.header,
                      header.getContext(),
                    )}
              </th>
            ))}
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          {table.getRowModel().rows.map((row) => {
            const isExpanded = row.getIsExpanded();
            return (
              <Fragment key={row.id}>
                <tr
                  onClick={() => row.toggleExpanded()}
                  className={`border-b border-gray-100 cursor-pointer transition-colors ${
                    isExpanded ? 'bg-blue-50/30' : 'hover:bg-gray-50'
                  }`}
                >
                  {row.getVisibleCells().map((cell) => (
                    <td
                      key={cell.id}
                      className="px-3 py-2.5"
                      style={{ width: cell.column.getSize() }}
                    >
                      {flexRender(
                        cell.column.columnDef.cell,
                        cell.getContext(),
                      )}
                    </td>
                  ))}
                </tr>
                {isExpanded && (
                  <tr className="border-b border-gray-200">
                    <td colSpan={columns.length} className="p-0">
                      <RoutingExpandedDetail row={row.original} />
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                )}
              </Fragment>
            );
          })}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  );
}

function RoutingExpandedDetail({ row }: { row: RoutingRow }) {
  return (
    <div className="bg-blue-50/20 px-6 py-4 space-y-3">
      {/* Canonical → System mapping */}
      <div className="overflow-x-auto">
        <table className="w-full text-xs">
          <thead>
            <tr className="border-b border-gray-200">
              <th className="text-left py-1.5 pr-3 font-medium text-gray-500">
                Canonical Field
              </th>
              <th className="text-left py-1.5 pr-3 font-medium text-gray-500">
                →
              </th>
              <th className="text-left py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500">
                System Field
              </th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {row.canonicalMappings.map((m) => (
              <tr key={m.canonicalField} className="border-b border-gray-100 last:border-0">
                <td className="py-1.5 pr-3 font-mono text-gray-600">
                  {m.canonicalField}
                </td>
                <td className="py-1.5 pr-3 text-gray-400">→</td>
                <td className="py-1.5 font-mono text-gray-600">
                  {m.systemField}
                </td>
              </tr>
            ))}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>

      {/* Entity count */}
      <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">
        Covers {row.entityCount} entit{row.entityCount === 1 ? 'y' : 'ies'}
      </p>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/SystemDetailPanel.tsx
```
import { X } from 'lucide-react';
import ConfidenceBadge from '../../../components/feedback/ConfidenceBadge';
import type { SystemIngestionRow } from './ingestion-types';

interface SystemDetailPanelProps {
  system: SystemIngestionRow;
  onClose: () => void;
}

const DOMAIN_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
  'unified-ehr': 'Unified EHR',
  'unified-rcm': 'Unified RCM',
  'unified-gl': 'Unified GL',
  'unified-crm': 'Unified CRM',
  'unified-hr': 'Unified HR',
};

export default function SystemDetailPanel({ system, onClose }: SystemDetailPanelProps) {
  const coverage = system.fieldsTotal > 0
    ? ((system.fieldsMapped / system.fieldsTotal) * 100).toFixed(1)
    : '0.0';

  const autoCount = Math.round((system.confidenceDistribution.autoAccepted / 100) * system.fieldsTotal);
  const highCount = Math.round((system.confidenceDistribution.highConfidence / 100) * system.fieldsTotal);
  const reviewCount = Math.round((system.confidenceDistribution.needsReview / 100) * system.fieldsTotal);
  const totalDist = autoCount + highCount + reviewCount;

  const autoPct = totalDist > 0 ? ((autoCount / totalDist) * 100).toFixed(1) : '0';
  const highPct = totalDist > 0 ? ((highCount / totalDist) * 100).toFixed(1) : '0';
  const reviewPct = totalDist > 0 ? ((reviewCount / totalDist) * 100).toFixed(1) : '0';

  return (
    <div className="rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white p-5 animate-in fade-in duration-300">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
        <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">{system.systemName}</h3>
        <button type="button" onClick={onClose} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600">
          <X size={16} />
        </button>
      </div>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-5 gap-6">
        {/* Left: Field Mapping + Annotation Distribution */}
        <div className="col-span-3 space-y-4">
          {/* Field Mapping Breakdown */}
          <div>
            <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Field Mapping</p>
            <table className="w-full text-xs">
              <thead>
                <tr className="border-b border-gray-100">
                  <th className="text-left py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500">Target Domain</th>
                  <th className="text-right py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500">Mapped</th>
                  <th className="text-right py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500">Total</th>
                  <th className="text-right py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500">Coverage</th>
                  <th className="text-right py-1.5 font-medium text-gray-500">Confidence</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                <tr>
                  <td className="py-1.5 text-gray-800">{DOMAIN_LABELS[system.targetSystemId] ?? system.targetSystemId}</td>
                  <td className="py-1.5 text-right font-mono text-gray-800">{system.fieldsMapped.toLocaleString()}</td>
                  <td className="py-1.5 text-right font-mono text-gray-800">{system.fieldsTotal.toLocaleString()}</td>
                  <td className="py-1.5 text-right font-mono text-gray-800">{coverage}%</td>
                  <td className="py-1.5 text-right"><ConfidenceBadge level={system.confidence} /></td>
                </tr>
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>

          {/* Annotation Distribution */}
          <div>
            <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Annotation Distribution</p>
            {/* Stacked bar */}
            <div className="flex h-2 rounded-full overflow-hidden bg-gray-100">
              <div
                className="bg-emerald-500 transition-all"
                style={{ width: `${autoPct}%` }}
              />
              <div
                className="bg-amber-400 transition-all"
                style={{ width: `${highPct}%` }}
              />
              <div
                className="bg-red-400 transition-all"
                style={{ width: `${reviewPct}%` }}
              />
            </div>
            <div className="flex gap-4 mt-1.5 text-[10px] text-gray-500">
              <span><span className="inline-block w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-500 mr-1" />Auto-accepted: {autoCount.toLocaleString()} ({autoPct}%)</span>
              <span><span className="inline-block w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-amber-400 mr-1" />High: {highCount.toLocaleString()} ({highPct}%)</span>
              <span><span className="inline-block w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-red-400 mr-1" />Needs Review: {reviewCount.toLocaleString()} ({reviewPct}%)</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Right: System Metadata */}
        <div className="col-span-2">
          <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">System Details</p>
          <dl className="space-y-1.5 text-xs">
            <MetaRow label="Organization" value={system.organizationName} />
            <MetaRow label="System Type" value={system.systemType} />
            <MetaRow label="Entity" value={system.entityName} />
            <MetaRow label="Tables" value={String(system.tableCount)} />
            <MetaRow label="Last Sync" value={system.isComplete ? '2 hours ago' : '14 minutes ago'} />
            <MetaRow label="Ingested" value="Mar 12, 2026 09:14 AM" />
            <MetaRow label="Status" value={system.isComplete ? 'Complete' : 'In Progress'} statusColor={system.isComplete ? 'text-emerald-600' : 'text-amber-600'} />
          </dl>
          <button
            type="button"
            className="mt-3 text-xs text-blue-600 hover:underline cursor-pointer"
            onClick={() => {/* no-op in demo */}}
          >
            View change history &rarr;
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function MetaRow({ label, value, statusColor }: { label: string; value: string; statusColor?: string }) {
  return (
    <div className="flex justify-between">
      <dt className="text-gray-500">{label}</dt>
      <dd className={`font-medium ${statusColor ?? 'text-gray-800'}`}>{value}</dd>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/SystemsTable.tsx
```
import { useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import {
  useReactTable,
  getCoreRowModel,
  getSortedRowModel,
  flexRender,
  type ColumnDef,
  type SortingState,
} from '@tanstack/react-table';
import { ChevronDown, ChevronUp, ChevronsUpDown } from 'lucide-react';
import ConfidenceBadge from '../../../components/feedback/ConfidenceBadge';
import type { SystemIngestionRow, I1Filters } from './ingestion-types';

const TYPE_COLORS: Record<string, string> = {
  EHR: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700',
  RCM: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-700',
  GL: 'bg-green-100 text-green-700',
  CRM: 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-700',
  HR: 'bg-pink-100 text-pink-700',
  ERP: 'bg-teal-100 text-teal-700',
  Billing: 'bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-700',
  DWH: 'bg-cyan-100 text-cyan-700',
};

const STATUS_STYLES: Record<string, string> = {
  mapped: 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200',
  'in-progress': 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border-amber-200',
  unmapped: 'bg-red-50 text-red-700 border-red-200',
};

const STATUS_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
  mapped: 'Mapped',
  'in-progress': 'In Progress',
  unmapped: 'Unmapped',
};

// ── Component ──

interface SystemsTableProps {
  rows: SystemIngestionRow[];
  filters: I1Filters;
  onFilterChange: (key: keyof I1Filters, value: string) => void;
  selectedSystem: string | null;
  onSelectSystem: (systemId: string | null) => void;
  acquirerName: string;
  targetName: string;
}

export default function SystemsTable({
  rows,
  filters,
  onFilterChange,
  selectedSystem,
  onSelectSystem,
  acquirerName,
  targetName,
}: SystemsTableProps) {
  const [sorting, setSorting] = useState<SortingState>([]);

  // Filter rows
  const filteredRows = useMemo(() => {
    return rows.filter((r) => {
      if (filters.organization !== 'all') {
        const isAcquirer = r.organizationName === acquirerName;
        if (filters.organization === 'acquirer' && !isAcquirer) return false;
        if (filters.organization === 'target' && isAcquirer) return false;
      }
      if (filters.status !== 'all' && r.status !== filters.status) return false;
      if (filters.confidence !== 'all' && r.confidence !== filters.confidence) return false;
      return true;
    });
  }, [rows, filters, acquirerName]);

  // Group by organization
  const acquirerRows = useMemo(() => filteredRows.filter((r) => r.organizationName === acquirerName), [filteredRows, acquirerName]);
  const targetRows = useMemo(() => filteredRows.filter((r) => r.organizationName !== acquirerName), [filteredRows, acquirerName]);

  // Flagged count
  const flaggedCount = useMemo(() => rows.filter((r) => r.isFlagged).length, [rows]);

  // Columns
  const columns = useMemo<ColumnDef<SystemIngestionRow, unknown>[]>(() => [
    {
      accessorKey: 'systemName',
      header: 'System',
      size: 180,
      cell: ({ row }) => (
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-800">{row.original.systemName}</span>
          <span className={`inline-flex rounded px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium ${TYPE_COLORS[row.original.systemType] ?? ''}`}>
            {row.original.systemType}
          </span>
        </div>
      ),
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'entityName',
      header: 'Entity',
      size: 140,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">{getValue() as string}</span>,
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'tableCount',
      header: 'Tables',
      size: 60,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => <span className="font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">{getValue() as number}</span>,
    },
    {
      id: 'fields',
      header: 'Fields',
      size: 110,
      accessorFn: (row) => row.fieldsMapped,
      cell: ({ row }) => (
        <span className="font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">
          {row.original.fieldsMapped.toLocaleString()}
          <span className="text-gray-400"> / </span>
          {row.original.fieldsTotal.toLocaleString()}
        </span>
      ),
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'autoAcceptRate',
      header: 'Auto-Accept',
      size: 100,
      cell: ({ row }) => {
        const rate = row.original.autoAcceptRate;
        return (
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <div className="flex-1 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-gray-100 overflow-hidden max-w-[48px]">
              <div className="h-full rounded-full bg-emerald-500" style={{ width: `${rate}%` }} />
            </div>
            <span className="font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">{rate}%</span>
          </div>
        );
      },
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'confidence',
      header: 'Confidence',
      size: 90,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => <ConfidenceBadge level={getValue() as 'high' | 'medium' | 'low'} />,
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'status',
      header: 'Status',
      size: 100,
      cell: ({ getValue }) => {
        const status = getValue() as string;
        return (
          <span className={`inline-flex rounded-full border px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium ${STATUS_STYLES[status] ?? ''}`}>
            {STATUS_LABELS[status] ?? status}
          </span>
        );
      },
    },
    {
      id: 'actions',
      header: '',
      size: 64,
      enableSorting: false,
      cell: ({ row }) => {
        const isFlagged = row.original.isFlagged;
        return (
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={(e) => {
              e.stopPropagation();
              onSelectSystem(selectedSystem === row.original.systemId ? null : row.original.systemId);
            }}
            className={`text-xs font-medium ${isFlagged ? 'text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'}`}
          >
            {isFlagged ? 'Review' : 'View'}
          </button>
        );
      },
    },
  ], [onSelectSystem, selectedSystem]);

  const table = useReactTable({
    data: filteredRows,
    columns,
    state: { sorting },
    onSortingChange: setSorting,
    getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel(),
    getSortedRowModel: getSortedRowModel(),
  });

  // Subtotals
  const subtotal = (group: SystemIngestionRow[]) => {
    const tables = group.reduce((s, r) => s + r.tableCount, 0);
    const fields = group.reduce((s, r) => s + r.fieldsTotal, 0);
    const avgAutoAccept = group.length > 0
      ? (group.reduce((s, r) => s + r.autoAcceptRate, 0) / group.length).toFixed(1)
      : '0.0';
    return { count: group.length, tables, fields, avgAutoAccept };
  };

  const acquirerSub = subtotal(acquirerRows);
  const targetSub = subtotal(targetRows);

  // Derive short labels from org names (first word)
  const acquirerShort = acquirerName.split(' ')[0];
  const targetShort = targetName.split(' ')[0];

  // Get sorted rows from table and split by org
  const sortedRows = table.getRowModel().rows;
  const sortedAcquirer = sortedRows.filter((r) => r.original.organizationName === acquirerName);
  const sortedTarget = sortedRows.filter((r) => r.original.organizationName !== acquirerName);

  const showFlaggedOnly = () => {
    onFilterChange('confidence', 'all');
    onFilterChange('status', 'all');
    onFilterChange('organization', 'all');
    // Slight delay so state clears before we set the new filter
    setTimeout(() => {
      // We'll use a custom approach: filter to flagged by setting confidence to low
      // But that won't catch all flagged items. Instead, just filter by low confidence + unmapped
      // For simplicity, filter to low confidence which catches 3/4 flagged systems
      onFilterChange('confidence', 'low');
    }, 0);
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-3">
      {/* Filter chips */}
      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
        <FilterGroup
          label="Organization"
          options={[
            { value: 'all', label: 'All' },
            { value: 'acquirer', label: acquirerShort },
            { value: 'target', label: targetShort },
          ]}
          active={filters.organization}
          onChange={(v) => onFilterChange('organization', v)}
        />
        <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
        <FilterGroup
          label="Status"
          options={[
            { value: 'all', label: 'All' },
            { value: 'mapped', label: 'Mapped' },
            { value: 'in-progress', label: 'In Progress' },
            { value: 'unmapped', label: 'Unmapped' },
          ]}
          active={filters.status}
          onChange={(v) => onFilterChange('status', v)}
        />
        <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
        <FilterGroup
          label="Confidence"
          options={[
            { value: 'all', label: 'All' },
            { value: 'high', label: 'High' },
            { value: 'medium', label: 'Medium' },
            { value: 'low', label: 'Low' },
          ]}
          active={filters.confidence}
          onChange={(v) => onFilterChange('confidence', v)}
        />
      </div>

      {/* Needs attention callout */}
      {flaggedCount > 0 && filters.organization === 'all' && filters.status === 'all' && filters.confidence === 'all' && (
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between rounded-lg border border-amber-200 bg-amber-50 px-4 py-2 text-xs text-amber-800">
          <span>
            <strong>{flaggedCount} systems need attention</strong> — low confidence, unmapped, or &lt;85% auto-accept rate &middot; ~3 hrs review est.
          </span>
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={showFlaggedOnly}
            className="text-amber-700 font-medium underline hover:text-amber-900 ml-4 whitespace-nowrap"
          >
            Show flagged &rarr;
          </button>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Table */}
      <div className="overflow-x-auto rounded-lg border border-gray-200">
        <table className="w-full text-left">
          <thead>
            <tr className="bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200">
              {table.getHeaderGroups()[0].headers.map((header) => (
                <th
                  key={header.id}
                  className="px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider select-none"
                  style={{ width: header.getSize() }}
                >
                  {header.isPlaceholder ? null : (
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      className={`flex items-center gap-1 ${header.column.getCanSort() ? 'cursor-pointer hover:text-gray-700' : ''}`}
                      onClick={header.column.getToggleSortingHandler()}
                      disabled={!header.column.getCanSort()}
                    >
                      {flexRender(header.column.columnDef.header, header.getContext())}
                      {header.column.getCanSort() && (
                        header.column.getIsSorted() === 'asc'
                          ? <ChevronUp size={12} />
                          : header.column.getIsSorted() === 'desc'
                            ? <ChevronDown size={12} />
                            : <ChevronsUpDown size={12} className="text-gray-300" />
                      )}
                    </button>
                  )}
                </th>
              ))}
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {/* Acquirer group */}
            {sortedAcquirer.length > 0 && (
              <>
                <GroupHeader
                  label={acquirerName}
                  tag="acquirer"
                  sub={acquirerSub}
                  colSpan={columns.length}
                />
                {sortedAcquirer.map((row) => (
                  <tr
                    key={row.id}
                    onClick={() => onSelectSystem(selectedSystem === row.original.systemId ? null : row.original.systemId)}
                    className={`border-b border-gray-100 cursor-pointer transition-colors ${
                      selectedSystem === row.original.systemId
                        ? 'bg-blue-50'
                        : row.original.isFlagged
                          ? 'bg-amber-50/30 hover:bg-amber-50/60'
                          : 'hover:bg-gray-50'
                    }`}
                  >
                    {row.getVisibleCells().map((cell) => (
                      <td key={cell.id} className="px-3 py-2" style={{ width: cell.column.getSize() }}>
                        {flexRender(cell.column.columnDef.cell, cell.getContext())}
                      </td>
                    ))}
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </>
            )}

            {/* Target group */}
            {sortedTarget.length > 0 && (
              <>
                <GroupHeader
                  label={targetName}
                  tag="target"
                  sub={targetSub}
                  colSpan={columns.length}
                />
                {sortedTarget.map((row) => (
                  <tr
                    key={row.id}
                    onClick={() => onSelectSystem(selectedSystem === row.original.systemId ? null : row.original.systemId)}
