                    className={`border-b border-gray-100 cursor-pointer transition-colors ${
                      selectedSystem === row.original.systemId
                        ? 'bg-blue-50'
                        : row.original.isFlagged
                          ? 'bg-amber-50/30 hover:bg-amber-50/60'
                          : 'hover:bg-gray-50'
                    }`}
                  >
                    {row.getVisibleCells().map((cell) => (
                      <td key={cell.id} className="px-3 py-2" style={{ width: cell.column.getSize() }}>
                        {flexRender(cell.column.columnDef.cell, cell.getContext())}
                      </td>
                    ))}
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </>
            )}

            {filteredRows.length === 0 && (
              <tr>
                <td colSpan={columns.length} className="px-3 py-8 text-center text-sm text-gray-400">
                  No systems match the current filters
                </td>
              </tr>
            )}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── Group header row ──

function GroupHeader({
  label,
  tag,
  sub,
  colSpan,
}: {
  label: string;
  tag: string;
  sub: { count: number; tables: number; fields: number; avgAutoAccept: string };
  colSpan: number;
}) {
  return (
    <tr className="bg-gray-50/80">
      <td colSpan={colSpan} className="px-3 py-2">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <span className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700">{label}</span>
            <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-400">({tag})</span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-[10px] text-gray-500">
            <span>{sub.count} systems</span>
            <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
            <span>{sub.tables} tables</span>
            <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
            <span>{sub.fields.toLocaleString()} fields</span>
            <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
            <span>{sub.avgAutoAccept}% auto-accept</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </td>
    </tr>
  );
}

// ── Filter chip group ──

function FilterGroup({
  label,
  options,
  active,
  onChange,
}: {
  label: string;
  options: { value: string; label: string }[];
  active: string;
  onChange: (value: string) => void;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
      <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mr-1">{label}</span>
      {options.map((opt) => (
        <button
          key={opt.value}
          type="button"
          onClick={() => onChange(opt.value)}
          className={`rounded-md px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium transition-colors ${
            active === opt.value
              ? 'bg-gray-800 text-white'
              : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-200 hover:text-gray-700'
          }`}
        >
          {opt.label}
        </button>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/ai-feature-types.ts
```
import type { MLFeatureCandidate, TrainingDatasetSummary } from '../../../types/ai';

export interface FeatureRow {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  canonicalConcept: string;
  sourceFieldCount: number;
  completeness: number;
  consistency: number;
  freshness: number;
  lineagePath: string[];
  demoOrigin?: string;
  assemblyStatus: 'ready' | 'pending' | null;
}

export interface EntityContributionRow {
  entityId: string;
  entityName: string;
  records: number;
  pctOfTotal: number;
}

export function buildFeatureRows(
  features: MLFeatureCandidate[],
  isComplete: boolean,
): FeatureRow[] {
  return features.map((f) => ({
    id: f.name,
    name: f.name,
    canonicalConcept: f.canonicalConcept,
    sourceFieldCount: f.sourceFieldCount,
    completeness: f.completeness,
    consistency: f.consistency,
    freshness: f.freshness,
    lineagePath: f.lineagePath,
    demoOrigin: f.demoOrigin,
    assemblyStatus: isComplete ? 'ready' : null,
  }));
}

export function buildEntityContributionRows(
  dataset: TrainingDatasetSummary,
): EntityContributionRow[] {
  return dataset.perEntityContribution
    .map((e) => ({
      entityId: e.entityId,
      entityName: e.entityName,
      records: e.records,
      pctOfTotal: (e.records / dataset.totalRecords) * 100,
    }))
    .sort((a, b) => b.records - a.records);
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/ai-reconciliation-types.ts
```
import type { BrokenQueryResults, ResolvedQueryResults } from '../../../types/ai';

// ── Row types ──

export type DiscrepancyType =
  | 'entity-duplication'
  | 'schema-drift'
  | 'definition-conflict'
  | 'missing-data'
  | 'none';

export interface ReconciliationRow {
  id: string;
  entityName: string;
  systemName: string;
  pipelineAValue: number | null;
  pipelineBValue: number | null;
  delta: number | null;
  deltaPct: number | null;
  discrepancyType: DiscrepancyType;
  issues: string[];
  severity: 'critical' | 'high' | 'low';
  affectedSystems: string;
}

export interface PayerResolutionRow {
  rawName: string;
  canonicalName: string;
  resolutionMethod: string;
}

// Mirrors payerVariants in ai.ts — hardcoded for reliability
export const PAYER_RESOLUTION_DATA: PayerResolutionRow[] = [
  { rawName: 'UHC', canonicalName: 'UnitedHealthcare', resolutionMethod: 'Alias mapping' },
  { rawName: 'United Healthcare', canonicalName: 'UnitedHealthcare', resolutionMethod: 'Fuzzy match' },
  { rawName: 'UnitedHealthcare', canonicalName: 'UnitedHealthcare', resolutionMethod: 'Exact match' },
  { rawName: 'United Health Care', canonicalName: 'UnitedHealthcare', resolutionMethod: 'Fuzzy match' },
];

// ── Discrepancy style map ──

export const DISCREPANCY_STYLES: Record<DiscrepancyType, { dot: string; label: string }> = {
  'entity-duplication': { dot: 'bg-purple-500', label: 'Entity Duplication' },
  'schema-drift':       { dot: 'bg-orange-500', label: 'Schema Drift' },
  'definition-conflict': { dot: 'bg-amber-500', label: 'Definition Conflict' },
  'missing-data':       { dot: 'bg-red-500',    label: 'Missing Data' },
  'none':               { dot: 'bg-green-500',  label: 'Match' },
};

// ── Builder functions ──

function classifyDiscrepancy(pipelineAValue: number | null): DiscrepancyType {
  if (pipelineAValue === null) return 'missing-data';
  if (pipelineAValue === 0) return 'schema-drift';
  return 'definition-conflict';
}

function classifySeverity(
  delta: number | null,
  deltaPct: number | null,
): 'critical' | 'high' | 'low' {
  if (delta === null) return 'critical';
  if (deltaPct !== null && Math.abs(deltaPct) > 25) return 'critical';
  if (deltaPct !== null && Math.abs(deltaPct) > 10) return 'high';
  if (Math.abs(delta) > 2) return 'high';
  return 'low';
}

export function buildReconciliationRows(
  broken: BrokenQueryResults,
  resolved: ResolvedQueryResults,
): ReconciliationRow[] {
  return broken.rows.map((brokenRow, i) => {
    const resolvedRow = resolved.rows[i];
    const pA = brokenRow.metricValue;
    const pB = resolvedRow.metricValue;
    const delta = pA !== null && pB !== null ? pB - pA : null;
    const deltaPct = delta !== null && pB !== null && pB !== 0
      ? (Math.abs(delta) / Math.abs(pB)) * 100
      : null;

    return {
      id: brokenRow.entityId,
      entityName: brokenRow.entityName,
      systemName: brokenRow.systemName,
      pipelineAValue: pA,
      pipelineBValue: pB,
      delta,
      deltaPct,
      discrepancyType: classifyDiscrepancy(pA),
      issues: brokenRow.issues,
      severity: classifySeverity(delta, deltaPct),
      affectedSystems: brokenRow.systemName,
    };
  });
}

// ── Root cause text ──

const ROOT_CAUSE_MAP: Record<string, string> = {
  eClinicalWorks:
    'Standard pipeline counts only initial denials, excluding appeals. Data Foundry applies the canonical definition (initial + appeal denials normalized by total claims) uniformly across all entities.',
  Kareo:
    "Standard pipeline reports 0.0% because the 'claim_status' enum in Kareo dropped the 'DENIED' value during a schema migration. Data Foundry detects this via schema drift monitoring and remaps using the adjudication_code field.",
  AdvancedMD:
    'Standard pipeline includes resubmissions in the denial count, inflating the rate. Data Foundry applies the canonical definition (initial denials only), producing a comparable rate.',
  'QuickBooks Online':
    "This entity's primary system is a GL (general ledger) with no claim-level data. Standard pipeline returns N/A. Data Foundry derives the denial rate from the entity's billing/RCM system via the semantic layer.",
  'Sage Intacct':
    "This entity's primary system is a GL (general ledger) with no claim-level data. Standard pipeline returns N/A. Data Foundry derives the denial rate from the entity's billing/RCM system via the semantic layer.",
  athenahealth:
    "Standard pipeline uses the system's native denial categorization, which differs from the platform standard. Data Foundry applies the canonical definition for cross-entity comparability.",
  NextGen:
    "Standard pipeline uses the system's native denial categorization, which differs from the platform standard. Data Foundry applies the canonical definition for cross-entity comparability.",
  CollaborateMD:
    'Standard pipeline uses a non-standard denial categorization flagged for review. Data Foundry applies the canonical definition.',
};

export function getRootCauseText(row: ReconciliationRow): string {
  return ROOT_CAUSE_MAP[row.systemName] ?? 'Discrepancy source under investigation.';
}

// ── Source system detail for expansion ──

const SYSTEM_DETAIL_MAP: Record<string, { field: string; pipelineAHandling: string; pipelineBHandling: string; status: string }> = {
  eClinicalWorks: {
    field: 'claim_status',
    pipelineAHandling: 'Counts initial denials only (ignores appeals)',
    pipelineBHandling: 'Applies canonical: initial + appeal denials / total claims',
    status: 'Definition conflict resolved',
  },
  Kareo: {
    field: 'claim_status (DENIED enum)',
    pipelineAHandling: 'DENIED value removed in schema migration → returns 0%',
    pipelineBHandling: 'Detects drift, remaps via adjudication_code field',
    status: 'Schema drift remediated',
  },
  AdvancedMD: {
    field: 'denial_count',
    pipelineAHandling: 'Includes resubmissions in denial count',
    pipelineBHandling: 'Applies canonical: initial denials only',
    status: 'Definition conflict resolved',
  },
  'QuickBooks Online': {
    field: 'N/A (GL system)',
    pipelineAHandling: 'No claim-level data available',
    pipelineBHandling: 'Derives denial rate from billing/RCM via semantic layer',
    status: 'Data gap backfilled',
  },
  'Sage Intacct': {
    field: 'N/A (GL system)',
    pipelineAHandling: 'No claim-level data available',
    pipelineBHandling: 'Derives denial rate from billing/RCM via semantic layer',
    status: 'Data gap backfilled',
  },
  athenahealth: {
    field: 'denial_category',
    pipelineAHandling: 'Uses native denial categorization',
    pipelineBHandling: 'Applies canonical definition for cross-entity comparability',
    status: 'Definition conflict resolved',
  },
  NextGen: {
    field: 'denial_category',
    pipelineAHandling: 'Includes partial denials in count',
    pipelineBHandling: 'Applies canonical definition for cross-entity comparability',
    status: 'Definition conflict resolved',
  },
  CollaborateMD: {
    field: 'denial_status',
    pipelineAHandling: 'Non-standard denial categorization',
    pipelineBHandling: 'Applies canonical definition',
    status: 'Definition conflict resolved',
  },
};

export function getSystemDetail(systemName: string) {
  return SYSTEM_DETAIL_MAP[systemName] ?? {
    field: 'unknown',
    pipelineAHandling: 'Unknown handling',
    pipelineBHandling: 'Canonical definition applied',
    status: 'Resolved',
  };
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/ai-routing-types.ts
```
import type { SystemTranslation, PredictionRouting } from '../../../types/ai';

export interface RoutingRow {
  id: string;
  systemName: string;
  targetField: string;
  alertLevel: string;
  priority: string;
  worklistDescription: string;
  entityCount: number;
  status: 'routed' | 'pending';
  canonicalMappings: { canonicalField: string; systemField: string }[];
}

export interface ImpactRow {
  id: string;
  application: string;
  annualImpact: number;
  annualImpactFormatted: string;
  isTotal: boolean;
}

// System name → prefix for field mapping generation
const SYSTEM_PREFIXES: Record<string, string> = {
  eClinicalWorks: 'ecw',
  Kareo: 'kareo',
  CollaborateMD: 'cmd',
};

export function buildRoutingRows(
  translations: SystemTranslation[],
  isRouted: boolean,
): RoutingRow[] {
  return translations.map((t) => {
    const prefix = SYSTEM_PREFIXES[t.systemName] ?? t.systemName.toLowerCase();
    return {
      id: t.systemId,
      systemName: t.systemName,
      targetField: t.targetField,
      alertLevel: t.alertLevel,
      priority: t.worklistEntry.priority,
      worklistDescription: t.worklistEntry.description,
      entityCount: t.entityIds.length,
      status: isRouted ? 'routed' : 'pending',
      canonicalMappings: [
        {
          canonicalField: 'denial_probability',
          systemField: t.targetField,
        },
        {
          canonicalField: 'canonical_patient_id',
          systemField: `${prefix}.patient_id`,
        },
        {
          canonicalField: 'recommended_action',
          systemField: `${prefix}.worklist_entry`,
        },
      ],
    };
  });
}

export function buildImpactRows(
  impact: PredictionRouting['aggregateImpact'],
): ImpactRow[] {
  const rows: ImpactRow[] = impact.items.map((item) => ({
    id: item.key,
    application: item.label,
    annualImpact: item.amount,
    annualImpactFormatted: `$${(item.amount / 1_000_000).toFixed(1)}M`,
    isTotal: false,
  }));
  rows.push({
    id: 'total',
    application: 'Total Annual Impact',
    annualImpact: impact.total,
    annualImpactFormatted: `$${(impact.total / 1_000_000).toFixed(1)}M`,
    isTotal: true,
  });
  return rows;
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/drift-types.ts
```
import type { KPIDriftEvent, SchemaDiffEntry, DriftResolutionMapping } from '../../../types/vcp';

// ── Row type ──

export interface DriftEventRow {
  id: string;
  field: string;
  changeType: string;
  before: string;
  after: string;
  kpiImpact: 'breaking' | 'potential' | 'none';
  affectedKpis: string;
  status: 'resolved' | 'pending';
  // Pre-computed detail data
  schemaDiff: SchemaDiffEntry;
  relatedImpacts: KPIDriftEvent['kpiImpacts'];
  relatedMappings: DriftResolutionMapping[];
}

// ── Change type formatting ──

const CHANGE_TYPE_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
  'enum-modified': 'Enum Removed',
  'field-added': 'Field Added',
  'enum-extended': 'Enum Added',
};

// ── Builder ──

export function buildDriftEventRows(
  drift: KPIDriftEvent,
  resolved: boolean,
): DriftEventRow[] {
  return drift.schemaDiff.map((diff, index) => {
    // Parallel array alignment: schemaDiff[i] <-> kpiImpacts[i]
    const impact = drift.kpiImpacts[index];

    // Resolution mappings: all belong to the first row (claim_status / breaking)
    // since the enum value remappings are all for the breaking claim_status change
    const relatedMappings = index === 0
      ? drift.resolutionMappings
      : diff.changeType === 'field-added'
        ? drift.resolutionMappings.filter((m) => m.sourceValue === diff.field)
        : [];

    return {
      id: `drift::${diff.field}`,
      field: diff.field,
      changeType: CHANGE_TYPE_LABELS[diff.changeType] ?? diff.changeType,
      before: diff.before ?? '—',
      after: diff.after,
      kpiImpact: impact?.severity ?? 'none',
      affectedKpis: impact?.kpiName ?? '',
      status: resolved ? 'resolved' : 'pending',
      schemaDiff: diff,
      relatedImpacts: impact ? [impact] : [],
      relatedMappings,
    };
  });
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/exhibit-renderers.tsx
```
import type { ReactNode } from 'react';
import type { ExhibitPreviewData } from '../../../types/vcp';

export function renderExhibitPreview(data: ExhibitPreviewData): ReactNode {
  switch (data.type) {
    case 'table':
      return <PreviewTable columns={data.columns} rows={data.rows} />;
    case 'waterfall':
      return <WaterfallPreview bars={data.bars} />;
    case 'key-value':
      return <KeyValuePreview entries={data.entries} />;
  }
}

function PreviewTable({ columns, rows }: { columns: string[]; rows: string[][] }) {
  return (
    <table className="w-full text-xs">
      <thead>
        <tr className="border-b border-gray-200">
          {columns.map((col) => (
            <th key={col} className="text-left py-1.5 px-2 font-medium text-gray-500">
              {col}
            </th>
          ))}
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        {rows.map((row, i) => (
          <tr key={i} className="border-b border-gray-50">
            {row.map((cell, j) => (
              <td key={j} className="py-1.5 px-2 text-gray-700 font-mono">
                {cell}
              </td>
            ))}
          </tr>
        ))}
      </tbody>
    </table>
  );
}

function WaterfallPreview({
  bars,
}: {
  bars: { label: string; value: number; barType: 'base' | 'add' | 'subtract' | 'total' }[];
}) {
  const maxVal = Math.max(...bars.map((b) => Math.abs(b.value)));

  return (
    <div className="space-y-1.5">
      {bars.map((bar) => {
        const pct = Math.min(Math.abs(bar.value) / maxVal * 100, 100);
        const colorClass =
          bar.barType === 'subtract'
            ? 'bg-red-400'
            : bar.barType === 'add'
              ? 'bg-emerald-400'
              : 'bg-indigo-400';

        return (
          <div key={bar.label} className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-600 w-36 truncate text-right flex-shrink-0">
              {bar.label}
            </span>
            <div className="flex-1 h-4 bg-gray-50 rounded overflow-hidden">
              <div
                className={`h-full rounded ${colorClass}`}
                style={{ width: `${pct}%` }}
              />
            </div>
            <span className="text-[10px] font-mono text-gray-700 w-12 flex-shrink-0">
              {bar.barType === 'subtract' ? '-' : ''}${bar.value}M
            </span>
          </div>
        );
      })}
    </div>
  );
}

function KeyValuePreview({ entries }: { entries: { label: string; value: string }[] }) {
  return (
    <dl className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-4 gap-y-2">
      {entries.map((entry) => (
        <div key={entry.label} className="flex justify-between items-baseline">
          <dt className="text-xs text-gray-500">{entry.label}</dt>
          <dd className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-800">{entry.value}</dd>
        </div>
      ))}
    </dl>
  );
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/exhibit-types.ts
```
import type { DataRoomExhibit, DataRoomConfig } from '../../../types/vcp';

// ── Row type ──

export interface ExhibitRow {
  exhibitId: string;
  name: string;
  category: 'existing' | 'hold-period';
  entityScope: string;
  timeRange: string;
  lineageEventCount: number;
  status: 'ready' | 'not-generated' | 'needs-review';
}

// ── Builder ──

export function buildExhibitRows(
  exhibits: DataRoomExhibit[],
  config: DataRoomConfig,
  generated: boolean,
): ExhibitRow[] {
  const timeRange = `${config.timeRangeMonths} months`;

  return exhibits.map((e) => ({
    exhibitId: e.exhibitId,
    name: e.name,
    category: e.category,
    entityScope:
      e.exhibitId === 'exhibit-08' ? 'Front Range PT' : `All ${config.entityScope.length}`,
    timeRange,
    lineageEventCount: e.lineageHistory.length,
    status: generated || e.category === 'existing' ? 'ready' as const : 'not-generated' as const,
  }));
}

// ── Lineage helpers (moved from V4 screen) ──

export const EVENT_BADGE_COLORS: Record<string, { bg: string; text: string }> = {
  'initial-annotation': { bg: 'bg-blue-100', text: 'text-blue-700' },
  'drift-detected': { bg: 'bg-red-100', text: 'text-red-700' },
  'drift-resolved': { bg: 'bg-green-100', text: 'text-green-700' },
  'schema-change': { bg: 'bg-amber-100', text: 'text-amber-700' },
  'entity-added': { bg: 'bg-indigo-100', text: 'text-indigo-700' },
  'definition-updated': { bg: 'bg-purple-100', text: 'text-purple-700' },
};

export function formatEventType(eventType: string): string {
  return eventType
    .split('-')
    .map((w) => w.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + w.slice(1))
    .join(' ');
}

export function formatTimestamp(ts: string): string {
  const d = new Date(ts);
  return d.toLocaleDateString('en-US', {
    month: 'short',
    day: 'numeric',
    year: 'numeric',
  });
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/harmonization-types.ts
```
import type { IngestionAnimationState, SchemaConflict, SystemMigrationItem } from '../../../types/integration';

// ── Canonical concepts per vertical ──

export const HEALTHCARE_CONCEPTS = [
  'Patient', 'Provider', 'Encounter', 'Claim', 'Payment', 'Payer', 'Denial', 'GL Account',
] as const;

export const SAAS_CONCEPTS = [
  'Customer', 'Subscription', 'Contract', 'Invoice', 'Product', 'User', 'Revenue', 'Support Ticket',
] as const;

export type CanonicalConcept = typeof HEALTHCARE_CONCEPTS[number] | typeof SAAS_CONCEPTS[number];

// ── Row type for the Field Mapping table ──

export interface FieldMappingRow {
  id: string;
  systemId: string;
  systemName: string;
  organizationName: string;
  entityName: string;
  systemType: 'EHR' | 'RCM' | 'GL' | 'CRM' | 'HR' | 'ERP' | 'Billing' | 'DWH';
  sourceConcept: string;
  canonicalConcept: CanonicalConcept;
  fieldCount: number;
  fieldsMapped: number;
  autoAcceptRate: number;
  confidence: 'high' | 'medium' | 'low';
  status: 'mapped' | 'in-progress' | 'unmapped';
  hasConflict: boolean;
  conflictId: string | null;
}

// ── Filter types ──

export interface I2Filters {
  organization: 'all' | 'acquirer' | 'target';
  status: 'all' | 'mapped' | 'in-progress' | 'unmapped' | 'conflict';
  confidence: 'all' | 'high' | 'medium' | 'low';
  concept: string; // 'all' or any canonical concept name
}

// ── Constants ──

const SYSTEM_TYPE_MAP: Record<string, FieldMappingRow['systemType']> = {
  'unified-ehr': 'EHR',
  'unified-rcm': 'RCM',
  'unified-gl': 'GL',
  'unified-crm': 'CRM',
  'unified-hr': 'HR',
  'unified-erp': 'ERP',
  'unified-billing': 'Billing',
  'unified-dwh': 'DWH',
};

const CONCEPT_POOLS: Record<string, { concept: CanonicalConcept; weight: number }[]> = {
  // Healthcare target systems
  'unified-ehr': [
    { concept: 'Patient', weight: 0.25 },
    { concept: 'Provider', weight: 0.20 },
    { concept: 'Encounter', weight: 0.35 },
    { concept: 'Denial', weight: 0.20 },
  ],
  'unified-rcm': [
    { concept: 'Claim', weight: 0.30 },
    { concept: 'Payment', weight: 0.25 },
    { concept: 'Denial', weight: 0.20 },
    { concept: 'Payer', weight: 0.25 },
  ],
  'unified-gl': [
    { concept: 'GL Account', weight: 0.55 },
    { concept: 'Payment', weight: 0.30 },
    { concept: 'Payer', weight: 0.15 },
  ],
  'unified-crm:healthcare': [
    { concept: 'Patient', weight: 0.40 },
    { concept: 'Provider', weight: 0.35 },
    { concept: 'Encounter', weight: 0.25 },
  ],
  'unified-crm:saas': [
    { concept: 'Customer', weight: 0.35 },
    { concept: 'Contract', weight: 0.35 },
    { concept: 'Subscription', weight: 0.30 },
  ],
  'unified-hr': [
    { concept: 'Provider', weight: 0.60 },
    { concept: 'Patient', weight: 0.40 },
  ],
  // SaaS target systems
  'unified-erp': [
    { concept: 'Revenue', weight: 0.30 },
    { concept: 'Invoice', weight: 0.25 },
    { concept: 'Customer', weight: 0.25 },
    { concept: 'Product', weight: 0.20 },
  ],
  'unified-billing': [
    { concept: 'Subscription', weight: 0.30 },
    { concept: 'Invoice', weight: 0.25 },
    { concept: 'Customer', weight: 0.20 },
    { concept: 'Revenue', weight: 0.25 },
  ],
  'unified-dwh': [
    { concept: 'Revenue', weight: 0.25 },
    { concept: 'Customer', weight: 0.20 },
    { concept: 'User', weight: 0.20 },
    { concept: 'Subscription', weight: 0.20 },
    { concept: 'Support Ticket', weight: 0.15 },
  ],
};

// Bridges conflict concept names (KPI-level) to canonical concept names (entity-level)
const CONFLICT_CONCEPT_MAP: Record<string, CanonicalConcept> = {
  // Healthcare
  'Denial Rate': 'Denial',
  'Provider Utilization': 'Provider',
  'Patient Visit': 'Encounter',
  'Payment Posting': 'Payment',
  // SaaS
  'Churn Rate': 'Customer',
  'ARR Calculation': 'Revenue',
  'Customer Definition': 'Customer',
  'Contract Start Date': 'Contract',
};

// Local variant names for system × concept pairs (from SANKEY_FLOWS and SCHEMA_CONFLICTS)
const SOURCE_CONCEPT_NAMES: Record<string, Record<string, string>> = {
  // Healthcare systems
  'eclinicalworks': { 'Denial': 'Initial Denial Flag', 'Encounter': 'Appointment w/ Vitals' },
  'kareo': { 'Denial': 'Claim Status DENIED', 'Payment': 'ERA Receipt Date' },
  'advancedmd': { 'Denial': 'All Denial Statuses', 'Payment': 'Bank Deposit Date' },
  'alpine-nthrive': { 'Denial': 'Denial Indicator' },
  'athenahealth': { 'Provider': 'Work RVUs', 'Encounter': 'Closed Encounter' },
  'nextgen': { 'Provider': 'Slot Fill Rate' },
  'alpine-epic': { 'Encounter': 'Cases per Day', 'Patient': 'Epic Patient MRN' },
  'alpine-cerner': { 'Encounter': 'Billable Visit' },
  'alpine-r1-rcm': { 'Payment': 'Posting/Reconciliation Date' },
  'modernizing-medicine': { 'Encounter': 'Case Record' },
  // SaaS systems — Meridian (target)
  'netsuite': { 'Revenue': 'Contract Value Annualized', 'Invoice': 'NS Invoice Line' },
  'quickbooks': { 'Revenue': 'QB Revenue Journal', 'Invoice': 'QB Invoice' },
  'sap-b1': { 'Revenue': 'SAP Revenue Entry', 'Invoice': 'SAP AR Invoice' },
  'salesforce-org1': { 'Customer': 'SF Account (Org 1)', 'Revenue': 'Opportunity Amount' },
  'salesforce-org2': { 'Customer': 'SF Account (Org 2)', 'Subscription': 'SF Opportunity' },
  'hubspot': { 'Customer': 'HS Company', 'Subscription': 'HS Deal' },
  'zuora': { 'Subscription': 'Zuora Subscription', 'Revenue': 'Annualized MRR', 'Invoice': 'Zuora Invoice' },
  'stripe': { 'Subscription': 'Stripe Subscription', 'Customer': 'Stripe Customer', 'Invoice': 'Stripe Invoice' },
  'chargebee': { 'Subscription': 'CB Subscription', 'Revenue': 'CB Plan Revenue', 'Invoice': 'CB Invoice' },
  // SaaS systems — Crestview (acquirer)
  'crestview-netsuite': { 'Revenue': 'ASC 606 Recognized', 'Invoice': 'NS Invoice' },
  'crestview-sage': { 'Revenue': 'Sage Revenue Entry', 'Invoice': 'Sage Invoice' },
  'crestview-intacct': { 'Revenue': 'Intacct Revenue Schedule', 'Invoice': 'Intacct AR' },
  'crestview-salesforce': { 'Customer': 'SF Account', 'Subscription': 'SF Contract' },
  'crestview-hubspot': { 'Customer': 'HS Company', 'Subscription': 'HS Deal' },
  'crestview-dynamics': { 'Customer': 'Dynamics Account', 'User': 'License Assignment' },
  'crestview-pipedrive': { 'Customer': 'PD Organization', 'Subscription': 'PD Deal' },
  'crestview-stripe': { 'Subscription': 'Stripe Subscription', 'Invoice': 'Stripe Invoice' },
  'crestview-recurly': { 'Subscription': 'Recurly Subscription', 'Invoice': 'Recurly Invoice' },
  'crestview-chargebee': { 'Subscription': 'CB Subscription', 'Invoice': 'CB Invoice' },
  'crestview-snowflake': { 'Revenue': 'SF Warehouse Revenue', 'Customer': 'Unified Customer View' },
  'crestview-redshift': { 'Revenue': 'RS Revenue Mart', 'User': 'RS Usage Events' },
};

function getSourceConceptName(systemId: string, systemName: string, concept: CanonicalConcept): string {
  return SOURCE_CONCEPT_NAMES[systemId]?.[concept] ?? `${systemName} ${concept}`;
}

// ── Weighted distribution helper ──

function distributeWeighted(total: number, weights: number[]): number[] {
  const result = weights.map((w) => Math.round(total * w));
  // Adjust largest bucket so sum matches total exactly
  const sum = result.reduce((s, v) => s + v, 0);
  const diff = total - sum;
  if (diff !== 0) {
    let maxIdx = 0;
    for (let i = 1; i < result.length; i++) {
      if (result[i] > result[maxIdx]) maxIdx = i;
    }
    result[maxIdx] += diff;
  }
  return result;
}

// ── Builder function ──

export function buildFieldMappings(
  migrations: SystemMigrationItem[],
  ingestionData: IngestionAnimationState[],
  conflicts: SchemaConflict[],
  // sankeyFlows consumed indirectly via SOURCE_CONCEPT_NAMES (pre-populated from fixture data)
): FieldMappingRow[] {
  const ingestionMap = new Map(ingestionData.map((d) => [d.systemId, d]));

  // Detect vertical: if any migration targets a SaaS-specific system, use SaaS CRM concepts
  const allTargets = new Set(migrations.map((m) => m.targetSystemId));
  const isSaaS = allTargets.has('unified-erp') || allTargets.has('unified-billing') || allTargets.has('unified-dwh');

  // Build conflict lookup: systemId → conflictConceptName
  const conflictLookup = new Map<string, string>();
  for (const conflict of conflicts) {
    for (const variant of conflict.variants) {
      conflictLookup.set(variant.systemId, conflict.conceptName);
    }
  }

  const rows: FieldMappingRow[] = [];

  for (const migration of migrations) {
    // Resolve CRM pool based on detected vertical
    let poolKey = migration.targetSystemId;
    if (poolKey === 'unified-crm') {
      poolKey = isSaaS ? 'unified-crm:saas' : 'unified-crm:healthcare';
    }
    const pool = CONCEPT_POOLS[poolKey];
    if (!pool) continue;

    const ingestion = ingestionMap.get(migration.sourceSystemId);
    const systemName = ingestion?.systemName ?? migration.sourceSystemId;
    const organizationName = ingestion?.organizationName ?? '';
    const entityName = ingestion?.entityName ?? '';
    const autoAcceptRate = ingestion?.confidenceDistribution.autoAccepted ?? 0;
    const systemType = SYSTEM_TYPE_MAP[migration.targetSystemId] ?? 'EHR';

    const weights = pool.map((p) => p.weight);
    const fieldCounts = distributeWeighted(migration.fieldsTotal, weights);
    const mappedCounts = distributeWeighted(migration.fieldsMapped, weights);

    for (let i = 0; i < pool.length; i++) {
      const concept = pool[i].concept;

      // Check if this specific system has a conflict for this concept
      const conflictName = conflictLookup.get(migration.sourceSystemId) ?? null;
      const canonicalForConflict = conflictName ? CONFLICT_CONCEPT_MAP[conflictName] : null;
      const hasConflict = canonicalForConflict === concept;

      rows.push({
        id: `${migration.sourceSystemId}::${concept}`,
        systemId: migration.sourceSystemId,
        systemName,
        organizationName,
        entityName,
        systemType,
        sourceConcept: getSourceConceptName(migration.sourceSystemId, systemName, concept),
        canonicalConcept: concept,
        fieldCount: fieldCounts[i],
        fieldsMapped: mappedCounts[i],
        autoAcceptRate,
        confidence: migration.confidence,
        status: migration.status,
        hasConflict,
        conflictId: hasConflict ? conflictName : null,
      });
    }
  }

  return rows;
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/ingestion-types.ts
```
import type { IngestionAnimationState, SystemMigrationItem } from '../../../types/integration';

// ── Row type for the Systems table ──

export interface SystemIngestionRow {
  systemId: string;
  systemName: string;
  organizationName: string;
  systemType: 'EHR' | 'RCM' | 'GL' | 'CRM' | 'HR' | 'ERP' | 'Billing' | 'DWH';
  entityName: string;
  tableCount: number;
  fieldsMapped: number;
  fieldsTotal: number;
  autoAcceptRate: number;
  confidence: 'high' | 'medium' | 'low';
  status: 'mapped' | 'in-progress' | 'unmapped';
  confidenceDistribution: {
    autoAccepted: number;
    highConfidence: number;
    needsReview: number;
  };
  autoAcceptCount: number;
  isComplete: boolean;
  progress: number;
  isFlagged: boolean;
  targetSystemId: string;
}

// ── Filter types ──

export interface I1Filters {
  organization: 'all' | 'acquirer' | 'target';
  status: 'all' | 'mapped' | 'in-progress' | 'unmapped';
  confidence: 'all' | 'high' | 'medium' | 'low';
}

// ── Data assembly ──

const SYSTEM_TYPE_MAP: Record<string, SystemIngestionRow['systemType']> = {
  'unified-ehr': 'EHR',
  'unified-rcm': 'RCM',
  'unified-gl': 'GL',
  'unified-crm': 'CRM',
  'unified-hr': 'HR',
  'unified-erp': 'ERP',
  'unified-billing': 'Billing',
  'unified-dwh': 'DWH',
};

export function buildRows(
  ingestionData: IngestionAnimationState[],
  migrations: SystemMigrationItem[],
): SystemIngestionRow[] {
  const migrationMap = new Map(migrations.map((m) => [m.sourceSystemId, m]));

  return ingestionData.map((sys) => {
    const migration = migrationMap.get(sys.systemId);
    const systemType = migration ? (SYSTEM_TYPE_MAP[migration.targetSystemId] ?? 'EHR') : 'EHR';
    const confidence = migration?.confidence ?? 'low';
    const status = migration?.status ?? 'unmapped';

    return {
      systemId: sys.systemId,
      systemName: sys.systemName,
      organizationName: sys.organizationName,
      systemType,
      entityName: sys.entityName,
      tableCount: sys.tableCount,
      fieldsMapped: migration?.fieldsMapped ?? 0,
      fieldsTotal: migration?.fieldsTotal ?? 0,
      autoAcceptRate: sys.confidenceDistribution.autoAccepted,
      confidence,
      status,
      confidenceDistribution: sys.confidenceDistribution,
      autoAcceptCount: sys.autoAcceptCount,
      isComplete: sys.isComplete,
      progress: sys.progress,
      isFlagged: confidence === 'low' || status === 'unmapped' || sys.confidenceDistribution.autoAccepted < 85,
      targetSystemId: migration?.targetSystemId ?? '',
    };
  });
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/onboarding-types.ts
```
import type { TuckInKPIMapping, KPI } from '../../../types/vcp';

// ── Row type ──

export interface KPIMappingRow {
  kpiId: string;
  kpiName: string;
  category: 'revenue' | 'cost' | 'operational' | 'clinical' | 'growth';
  platformValue: string;
  entityValue: string;
  status: 'auto-mapped' | 'flagged' | 'n-a' | 'pending';
  confidence: 'high' | 'medium' | 'low' | '—';
  flagReason: string;
}

// ── Value formatting ──

function formatKpiValue(value: number, unit: string): string {
  if (unit === '$') {
    if (value >= 1_000_000) return `$${(value / 1_000_000).toFixed(0)}M`;
    if (value >= 1_000) return `$${(value / 1_000).toFixed(0)}K`;
    return `$${value.toFixed(2)}`;
  }
  if (unit === '%') return `${value.toFixed(1)}%`;
  if (unit === 'days') return `${value} days`;
  if (unit === 'ratio') return value.toFixed(1);
  if (unit === 'score') return String(value);
  return value % 1 === 0 ? String(value) : value.toFixed(1);
}

// ── Builder ──

export function buildKPIMappingRows(
  mappings: TuckInKPIMapping[],
  kpis: KPI[],
  onboardingComplete: boolean,
): KPIMappingRow[] {
  const kpiMap = new Map(kpis.map((k) => [k.id, k]));

  if (!onboardingComplete) {
    // Pre-onboarding: show all KPIs with platform-side data only
    return kpis.map((kpi) => ({
      kpiId: kpi.id,
      kpiName: kpi.name,
      category: kpi.category,
      platformValue: formatKpiValue(kpi.current, kpi.unit),
      entityValue: '—',
      status: 'pending' as const,
      confidence: '—' as const,
      flagReason: '',
    }));
  }

  // Post-onboarding: join mappings with KPIs
  const rows: KPIMappingRow[] = mappings.map((m) => {
    const kpi = kpiMap.get(m.kpiId);
    return {
      kpiId: m.kpiId,
      kpiName: m.kpiName,
      category: kpi?.category ?? 'operational',
      platformValue: kpi ? formatKpiValue(kpi.current, kpi.unit) : '—',
      entityValue: m.sourceField ? 'Mapped' : '—',
      status: m.status,
      confidence: m.status === 'auto-mapped' ? 'high' as const : 'medium' as const,
      flagReason: m.flagReason ?? '',
    };
  });

  // Sort: flagged first, then auto-mapped, then alphabetical
  rows.sort((a, b) => {
    if (a.status === 'flagged' && b.status !== 'flagged') return -1;
    if (a.status !== 'flagged' && b.status === 'flagged') return 1;
    return a.kpiName.localeCompare(b.kpiName);
  });

  return rows;
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/portfolio-types.ts
```
import type { PortfolioHeatmapCell, KPI } from '../../../types/vcp';

// ── Row type ──

export interface PortfolioEntityRow {
  entityId: string;
  entityName: string;
  organization: string;          // 'Summit' | 'Alpine' | 'Front Range'
  status: 'active' | 'new' | 'drift-resolved';
  kpiValues: Record<string, PortfolioKpiValue>;
}

export interface PortfolioKpiValue {
  value: number;
  baseline: number;
  target: number;
  trend: 'up' | 'down' | 'flat';
  status: 'green' | 'yellow' | 'red';
}

// ── Filters ──

export interface V3Filters {
  organization: string; // 'all' or a slug derived from org name
  kpiStatus: 'all' | 'on-target' | 'below-target' | 'critical';
  entityStatus: 'all' | 'new' | 'drift-resolved';
}

export const V3_DEFAULT_FILTERS: V3Filters = {
  organization: 'all',
  kpiStatus: 'all',
  entityStatus: 'all',
};

// ── Builder ──

export function buildPortfolioRows(
  cells: PortfolioHeatmapCell[],
  _kpis: KPI[],
  orgLookup: Record<string, string>,
): PortfolioEntityRow[] {
  const entityMap = new Map<string, PortfolioEntityRow>();

  for (const cell of cells) {
    let row = entityMap.get(cell.entityId);
    if (!row) {
      const status: PortfolioEntityRow['status'] = cell.badges.includes('new')
        ? 'new'
        : cell.badges.includes('drift-resolved')
          ? 'drift-resolved'
          : 'active';

      row = {
        entityId: cell.entityId,
        entityName: cell.entityName,
        organization: orgLookup[cell.entityId] ?? 'Unknown',
        status,
        kpiValues: {},
      };
      entityMap.set(cell.entityId, row);
    }

    row.kpiValues[cell.kpiId] = {
      value: cell.value,
      baseline: cell.baseline,
      target: cell.target,
      trend: cell.trend,
      status: cell.status,
    };
  }

  return Array.from(entityMap.values());
}

// ── Filter ──

export function filterPortfolioRows(
  rows: PortfolioEntityRow[],
  filters: V3Filters,
): PortfolioEntityRow[] {
  return rows.filter((row) => {
    // Organization filter
    if (filters.organization !== 'all') {
      const orgKey = row.organization.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '-');
      if (orgKey !== filters.organization) return false;
    }
    // Entity status filter
    if (filters.entityStatus !== 'all' && row.status !== filters.entityStatus) return false;
    // KPI status filter
    if (filters.kpiStatus !== 'all') {
      const kpiStatuses = Object.values(row.kpiValues).map((v) => v.status);
      if (filters.kpiStatus === 'on-target' && !kpiStatuses.every((s) => s === 'green')) return false;
      if (filters.kpiStatus === 'below-target' && !kpiStatuses.some((s) => s === 'yellow')) return false;
      if (filters.kpiStatus === 'critical' && !kpiStatuses.some((s) => s === 'red')) return false;
    }
    return true;
  });
}

// ── Grouping ──

export function groupByOrganization(rows: PortfolioEntityRow[]): Map<string, PortfolioEntityRow[]> {
  // Collect unique org names in order of first appearance
  const groups = new Map<string, PortfolioEntityRow[]>();
  for (const row of rows) {
    if (!groups.has(row.organization)) {
      groups.set(row.organization, []);
    }
    groups.get(row.organization)!.push(row);
  }
  return groups;
}
```

src/screens/hold-period/components/reconciliation-types.ts
```
import type { KPIReconciliation, DownstreamCascadeItem } from '../../../types/integration';

// ── Format helper (moved from I3_KPIReconciliation.tsx) ──

export function formatKpiValue(value: number, kpiId: string): string {
  if (kpiId === 'kpi-cost-per-claim') return `$${value.toFixed(2)}`;
  if (kpiId === 'kpi-provider-utilization') return value.toLocaleString();
  return `${value}%`;
}

// ── KPI Summary Row (top table) ──

export interface KPISummaryRow {
  kpiId: string;
  kpiName: string;
  canonicalDefinition: string;
  variantCount: number;
  localRange: string;
  canonicalValue: string;
  dollarImpact: number;
  dollarImpactFormatted: string;
  vcpBaseline: string;
  cascadeItemCount: number;
  reconciliation: KPIReconciliation;
}

// ── Cascade Impact Row (bottom table) ──

export interface CascadeImpactRow {
  id: string;
  kpiId: string;
  kpiName: string;
  type: DownstreamCascadeItem['type'];
  label: string;
  previousState: string;
  newState: string;
  detail?: string;
}

// ── Filter types ──

export interface I3CascadeFilters {
  kpi: 'all' | string;
  type: 'all' | 'exhibit' | 'risk-flag' | 'vcp-baseline';
}

// ── Builder functions ──

// KPIs with incomparable units across variants (different metrics, not just different values)
const MIXED_UNIT_KPIS = new Set(['kpi-provider-utilization']);

export function buildKPISummaryRows(
  reconciliations: KPIReconciliation[],
): KPISummaryRow[] {
  return reconciliations.map((rec) => {
    let localRange: string;
    if (MIXED_UNIT_KPIS.has(rec.kpiId)) {
      localRange = `${rec.definitionVariants.length} definitions`;
    } else {
      const localValues = rec.definitionVariants.map((v) => v.valueUnderLocal);
      const localMin = Math.min(...localValues);
      const localMax = Math.max(...localValues);
      localRange = localMin === localMax
        ? formatKpiValue(localMin, rec.kpiId)
        : `${formatKpiValue(localMin, rec.kpiId)}–${formatKpiValue(localMax, rec.kpiId)}`;
    }
    const canonicalValue = formatKpiValue(rec.definitionVariants[0].valueUnderCanonical, rec.kpiId);

    const amount = rec.dollarImpact.amount;
    const dollarImpactFormatted = amount >= 1_000_000
      ? `$${(amount / 1_000_000).toFixed(1)}M`
      : `$${(amount / 1_000).toFixed(0)}K`;

    return {
      kpiId: rec.kpiId,
      kpiName: rec.kpiName,
      canonicalDefinition: rec.canonicalDefinition,
      variantCount: rec.definitionVariants.length,
      localRange,
      canonicalValue,
      dollarImpact: amount,
      dollarImpactFormatted,
      vcpBaseline: rec.vcpBaseline.label,
      cascadeItemCount: rec.downstreamCascade.length,
      reconciliation: rec,
    };
  });
}

export function buildCascadeImpactRows(
  reconciliations: KPIReconciliation[],
): CascadeImpactRow[] {
  const rows: CascadeImpactRow[] = [];
  for (const rec of reconciliations) {
    for (let i = 0; i < rec.downstreamCascade.length; i++) {
      const item = rec.downstreamCascade[i];
      rows.push({
        id: `${rec.kpiId}::${i}`,
        kpiId: rec.kpiId,
        kpiName: rec.kpiName,
        type: item.type,
        label: item.label,
        previousState: item.previousState,
        newState: item.newState,
        detail: item.detail,
      });
    }
  }
  return rows;
}
```

// Summit Ortho Hold-Period constants — acquirer, combined platform, and module targets.
// Imports from parent _constants.ts are used in sibling data files; this file
// defines only the NEW constants introduced by the hold-period module.

// ── Acquirer: Alpine Health Partners ──
export const ACQUIRER = {
  name: 'Alpine Health Partners',
  entityCount: 6,
  systemCount: 10,
  revenue: 132_000_000,
} as const;

// ── Combined platform (target + acquirer) ──
export const COMBINED = {
  entityCount: 14, // 8 target + 6 acquirer
  systemCount: 22, // 12 target + 10 acquirer
  totalFields: 58_000,
  combinedRevenue: 210_000_000, // $78M + $132M
} as const;

// ── Act II: Value Creation Plan targets ──
export const VCP_TARGETS = {
  ebitdaTarget: 28_000_000,
  initiativeCount: 12,
  kpiCount: 24,
} as const;

// ── Act III: AI / ML applications ──
export const AI_APPS = {
  count: 3,
  totalImpact: 7_500_000,
} as const;

// ── Integration planning ──
export const INTEGRATION = {
  day1ChecklistItems: 16,
  systemMigrations: 22,
  fieldMappings: 58_000,
} as const;

// ── Denial Rate Thread — single source of truth ──
// Every fixture file that references denial rates MUST import from here.
// Never hardcode denial rate values in individual fixture files.
export const DENIAL_RATE_THREAD = {
  reported: 8.2,              // S4: what was reported
  actual: 11.7,               // S4: what Data Foundry found / I-3: canonical
  perEntityVariants: {        // I-3 / A-1: before reconciliation
    eCW: 5.1,                 // eClinicalWorks — uses only initial denials
    kareoDrift: 0.0,          // Kareo post-drift — DENIED field removed
    advancedMD: 12.3,         // AdvancedMD — includes resubmissions
  },
  frontRange: 9.4,            // V-1: different categorization, flagged for review
  platformReconciled: 11.4,   // V-2 post-resolution, V-3, A-1 resolved, A-2
  postDriftPerEntity: {       // V-2: after drift resolution
    E2: 10.3,
    E4: 9.8,
    E9: 11.2,
  },
  aiPredictionTarget: 6.8,    // A-3: projected post-AI rate
  uhcRate: 14.2,              // A-1: highest payer, drives A-2 use case
} as const;

// ── Front Range Physical Therapy (Entity 15) ──
export const FRONT_RANGE = {
  name: 'Front Range Physical Therapy',
  entityId: 'entity-15',
  sites: 3,
  systems: [
    { id: 'sys-drchrono', name: 'DrChrono' },
    { id: 'sys-collaboratemd', name: 'CollaborateMD' },
  ],
  tables: 18,
  fields: 4_247,
} as const;

// ── Annotation Velocity (improving auto-accept rates) ──
export const ANNOTATION_VELOCITY = {
  alpine: 85.3,
  summit: 89.2,
  frontRange: 91.6,
} as const;
```

import type {
  BrokenQueryResults,
  ResolvedQueryResults,
  MLFeatureCandidate,
  TrainingDatasetSummary,
  PredictionRouting,
} from '../../../types/ai';
import { DENIAL_RATE_THREAD } from './_constants';

// ── Broken Query: "What is our denial rate by payer?" WITHOUT semantic layer ──

export const BROKEN_QUERY_RESULTS: BrokenQueryResults = {
  rows: [
    // eClinicalWorks entities — only counts initial denials → 5.1%
    { entityId: 'entity-1', entityName: 'Summit Site 1', systemName: 'eClinicalWorks', metricValue: DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.perEntityVariants.eCW, issues: ['Only counts initial denials, ignores appeals'], isConsistent: false },
    { entityId: 'entity-2', entityName: 'Summit Site 2', systemName: 'eClinicalWorks', metricValue: DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.perEntityVariants.eCW, issues: ['Only counts initial denials, ignores appeals'], isConsistent: false },
    { entityId: 'entity-3', entityName: 'Summit Site 3', systemName: 'eClinicalWorks', metricValue: DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.perEntityVariants.eCW, issues: ['Only counts initial denials, ignores appeals'], isConsistent: false },
    // Kareo entities — DENIED field removed post-drift → 0.0%
    { entityId: 'entity-4', entityName: 'Summit Site 4', systemName: 'Kareo', metricValue: DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.perEntityVariants.kareoDrift, issues: ['DENIED status field removed during schema migration', 'Returns 0% — no denial data available'], isConsistent: false },
    { entityId: 'entity-5', entityName: 'Summit Site 5', systemName: 'Kareo', metricValue: DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.perEntityVariants.kareoDrift, issues: ['DENIED status field removed during schema migration', 'Returns 0% — no denial data available'], isConsistent: false },
    // AdvancedMD entities — includes resubmissions → 12.3%
    { entityId: 'entity-6', entityName: 'Summit Site 6', systemName: 'AdvancedMD', metricValue: DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.perEntityVariants.advancedMD, issues: ['Includes resubmissions in denial count', 'Inflated rate vs. initial-only methodology'], isConsistent: false },
    { entityId: 'entity-7', entityName: 'Summit Site 7', systemName: 'AdvancedMD', metricValue: DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.perEntityVariants.advancedMD, issues: ['Includes resubmissions in denial count', 'Inflated rate vs. initial-only methodology'], isConsistent: false },
    { entityId: 'entity-8', entityName: 'Summit Site 8', systemName: 'AdvancedMD', metricValue: DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.perEntityVariants.advancedMD, issues: ['Includes resubmissions in denial count', 'Inflated rate vs. initial-only methodology'], isConsistent: false },
    // Alpine sites — mixed systems, varying definitions
    { entityId: 'entity-9', entityName: 'Alpine Site 1', systemName: 'athenahealth', metricValue: 10.1, issues: ['Different denial categorization than Summit sites'], isConsistent: false },
    { entityId: 'entity-10', entityName: 'Alpine Site 2', systemName: 'athenahealth', metricValue: 9.7, issues: ['Different denial categorization than Summit sites'], isConsistent: false },
    { entityId: 'entity-11', entityName: 'Alpine Site 3', systemName: 'NextGen', metricValue: 11.8, issues: ['Includes partial denials in count'], isConsistent: false },
    { entityId: 'entity-12', entityName: 'Alpine Site 4', systemName: 'NextGen', metricValue: 10.9, issues: ['Includes partial denials in count'], isConsistent: false },
    // GL systems — no denial data at all
    { entityId: 'entity-13', entityName: 'Alpine Site 5', systemName: 'QuickBooks Online', metricValue: null, issues: ['GL system — no claim or denial data available'], isConsistent: false },
    { entityId: 'entity-14', entityName: 'Alpine Site 6', systemName: 'Sage Intacct', metricValue: null, issues: ['GL system — no claim or denial data available'], isConsistent: false },
    // Front Range PT
    { entityId: 'entity-15', entityName: 'Front Range PT', systemName: 'CollaborateMD', metricValue: DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.frontRange, issues: ['Uses non-standard denial categorization', 'Flagged for review'], isConsistent: false },
  ],
  payerVariants: [
    { rawName: 'UHC', entityId: 'entity-1' },
    { rawName: 'United Healthcare', entityId: 'entity-4' },
    { rawName: 'UnitedHealthcare', entityId: 'entity-6' },
    { rawName: 'United Health Care', entityId: 'entity-9' },
  ],
  calloutText:
    'Without a semantic layer, every system defines "denial rate" differently. ' +
    'eClinicalWorks counts only initial denials. Kareo lost its DENIED field during a schema migration ' +
    'and silently returns zero. AdvancedMD includes resubmissions, inflating the rate. GL systems have ' +
    'no claim data at all. And "UHC" appears under four different names across entities, so any GROUP BY ' +
    'on payer splits a single carrier into four rows. An AI model trained on this data would learn the ' +
    'noise, not the signal.',
  failureStatText: '80%+ of AI projects fail to reach production. This is why.',
  summaryStats: {
    conflictingDefinitions: 5,
    duplicateSegments: 4,
    systemsReturningZero: 1,
    systemsReturningNA: 2,
  },
};

// ── Resolved Query: Same question WITH the semantic layer ──

    { entityId: 'entity-13', entityName: 'Alpine Site 5', systemName: 'QuickBooks Online', metricValue: 11.0, issues: [], isConsistent: true },
    { entityId: 'entity-14', entityName: 'Alpine Site 6', systemName: 'Sage Intacct', metricValue: 9.8, issues: [], isConsistent: true },
    { entityId: 'entity-15', entityName: 'Front Range PT', systemName: 'CollaborateMD', metricValue: 11.4, issues: [], isConsistent: true },
  ],
  segmentBreakdown: [
    { segmentName: 'UnitedHealthcare', metricValue: DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.uhcRate, volume: 62_340 },
    { segmentName: 'Aetna', metricValue: 12.8, volume: 41_200 },
    { segmentName: 'Blue Cross Blue Shield', metricValue: 11.9, volume: 55_780 },
    { segmentName: 'Cigna', metricValue: 11.2, volume: 38_450 },
    { segmentName: 'Humana', metricValue: 10.7, volume: 28_900 },
    { segmentName: 'Medicare', metricValue: 9.4, volume: 47_600 },

    { segmentName: 'Self-Pay', metricValue: 7.2, volume: 8_200 },
  ],
  platformAverage: DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled,
  resolutionSteps: [
    { label: 'Canonicalize "denial" definition across 5 system variants', durationMs: 340 },
    { label: 'Resolve 47 payer name variants to 12 canonical entities', durationMs: 280 },
    { label: 'Backfill Kareo denial data from claims adjudication log', durationMs: 520 },
    { label: 'Normalize resubmission handling to initial-denial-only methodology', durationMs: 190 },

// ── ML Feature Candidates for Denial Prediction ──

export const ML_FEATURES: MLFeatureCandidate[] = [
  {
    name: 'Payer',

src/scenarios/summit-ortho/hold-period/index.ts
```
import { ACQUIRER_COMPANY } from './acquirer';
import { COMBINED } from './_constants';
import {
  COMBINED_ENTITIES,
  SYSTEM_MIGRATIONS,
  INTEGRATION_READINESS,
  INGESTION_ANIMATION_DATA,
  SCHEMA_CONFLICTS,
  SANKEY_FLOWS,
  KPI_RECONCILIATIONS,
} from './integration';
import {
  KPIS,
  EBITDA_BRIDGE,
  TUCK_IN_ENTITY,
  KPI_DRIFT_EVENT,
  PORTFOLIO_HEATMAP,
  DATA_ROOM_EXHIBITS,
  DATA_ROOM_CONFIG,
  ENTITY_ORG_MAP,
  EXHIBIT_PREVIEW_DATA,
} from './vcp';
import {
  BROKEN_QUERY_RESULTS,
  RESOLVED_QUERY_RESULTS,
  ML_FEATURES,
  TRAINING_DATASET,
  PREDICTION_ROUTING,
} from './ai';
import { PROBLEM_SCREEN_CONFIGS } from './problem-screens';
// Side-effect import: runs denial rate thread assertions at build time
import './validate-thread';

export const holdPeriodData = {
  acquirer: ACQUIRER_COMPANY,
  combined: {
    entityCount: COMBINED.entityCount,
    systemCount: COMBINED.systemCount,
    totalFields: COMBINED.totalFields,
    combinedRevenue: COMBINED.combinedRevenue,
  },

  // Act I: Integration
  combinedEntities: COMBINED_ENTITIES,
  systemMigrations: SYSTEM_MIGRATIONS,
  integrationReadiness: INTEGRATION_READINESS,
  ingestionAnimationData: INGESTION_ANIMATION_DATA,
  schemaConflicts: SCHEMA_CONFLICTS,
  sankeyFlows: SANKEY_FLOWS,
  kpiReconciliations: KPI_RECONCILIATIONS,

  // Act II: VCP
  kpis: KPIS,
  ebitdaBridge: EBITDA_BRIDGE,
  tuckInEntity: TUCK_IN_ENTITY,
  kpiDriftEvent: KPI_DRIFT_EVENT,
  portfolioHeatmap: PORTFOLIO_HEATMAP,
  dataRoomExhibits: DATA_ROOM_EXHIBITS,
  dataRoomConfig: DATA_ROOM_CONFIG,
  entityOrgMap: ENTITY_ORG_MAP,
  exhibitPreviewData: EXHIBIT_PREVIEW_DATA,

  // Act III: AI
  brokenQueryResults: BROKEN_QUERY_RESULTS,
  resolvedQueryResults: RESOLVED_QUERY_RESULTS,
  mlFeatures: ML_FEATURES,
  trainingDataset: TRAINING_DATASET,
  predictionRouting: PREDICTION_ROUTING,

  // Config
  problemScreens: PROBLEM_SCREEN_CONFIGS,
  layoutConfig: {
    dealTimer: { day: 45, total: 1825, label: 'Hold Period' },
  },
};
```

src/scenarios/summit-ortho/hold-period/integration.ts
```
import type {
  CombinedEntity,
  SystemMigrationItem,
  IntegrationReadinessScore,
  IngestionAnimationState,
  SchemaConflict,
  SankeyFlow,
  KPIReconciliation,
} from '../../../types/integration';

import { DENIAL_RATE_THREAD, ANNOTATION_VELOCITY } from './_constants';

// ── Combined Entities (14 total: 8 target + 6 acquirer) ──

export const COMBINED_ENTITIES: CombinedEntity[] = [
  // Target entities (8)
  { id: 'ce-patient-target', name: 'Patient', source: 'target', systemCount: 6, fieldCount: 4_200 },
  { id: 'ce-provider-target', name: 'Provider', source: 'target', systemCount: 5, fieldCount: 3_100 },
  { id: 'ce-encounter-target', name: 'Encounter', source: 'target', systemCount: 4, fieldCount: 2_800 },
  { id: 'ce-claim-target', name: 'Claim', source: 'target', systemCount: 3, fieldCount: 3_400 },
  { id: 'ce-payment-target', name: 'Payment', source: 'target', systemCount: 3, fieldCount: 2_600 },
  { id: 'ce-payer-target', name: 'Payer', source: 'target', systemCount: 4, fieldCount: 1_900 },
  { id: 'ce-denial-target', name: 'Denial', source: 'target', systemCount: 3, fieldCount: 1_500 },
  { id: 'ce-gl-target', name: 'GL Account', source: 'target', systemCount: 3, fieldCount: 1_200 },

  // Acquirer entities (6)
  { id: 'ce-patient-acquirer', name: 'Patient', source: 'acquirer', systemCount: 4, fieldCount: 8_600 },
  { id: 'ce-provider-acquirer', name: 'Provider', source: 'acquirer', systemCount: 3, fieldCount: 5_200 },
  { id: 'ce-encounter-acquirer', name: 'Encounter', source: 'acquirer', systemCount: 3, fieldCount: 6_400 },
  { id: 'ce-claim-acquirer', name: 'Claim', source: 'acquirer', systemCount: 3, fieldCount: 7_100 },
  { id: 'ce-payer-acquirer', name: 'Payer', source: 'acquirer', systemCount: 2, fieldCount: 4_800 },
  { id: 'ce-gl-acquirer', name: 'GL Account', source: 'acquirer', systemCount: 2, fieldCount: 5_100 },
];

// ── System Migrations (22 items — one per combined system) ──

export const SYSTEM_MIGRATIONS: SystemMigrationItem[] = [
  // Target systems (12) → unified layer
  { sourceSystemId: 'athenahealth', targetSystemId: 'unified-ehr', fieldsMapped: 2_850, fieldsTotal: 3_200, status: 'mapped', confidence: 'high' },

export const KPI_RECONCILIATIONS: KPIReconciliation[] = [
  // 1. Denial Rate — primary walkthrough KPI
  {
    kpiId: 'kpi-denial-rate',
    kpiName: 'Denial Rate',
    definitionVariants: [
      {
        entityId: 'ce-denial-target',
        entityName: 'eClinicalWorks',
        definitionText: 'Initial denials only (excludes partial and resubmission denials)',

        valueUnderLocal: DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.perEntityVariants.eCW,

      },
      {
        entityId: 'ce-denial-target',
        entityName: 'Kareo (post-drift)',

        sourceFields: ['kareo_claims.status'],
        valueUnderLocal: DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.perEntityVariants.kareoDrift,
        valueUnderCanonical: DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.actual,
      },
      {
        entityId: 'ce-denial-target',
        entityName: 'AdvancedMD',
        definitionText: 'All denied claims including resubmission denials and partial denials',
        sourceFields: ['amd_claims.claim_status', 'amd_claims.resubmit_status', 'amd_claims.partial_deny_flag'],
        valueUnderLocal: DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.perEntityVariants.advancedMD,
        valueUnderCanonical: DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.actual,
      },
    ],
    canonicalDefinition: 'All denied claims (initial + partial + final) / total submitted claims',
    downstreamCascade: [
      { type: 'exhibit', label: 'QoE Exhibit — Revenue Adjustments', previousState: `Denial rate shown as ${DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.reported}%`, newState: `Corrected to ${DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.actual}%`, detail: 'Reported rate excluded partial and resubmission denials' },
      { type: 'risk-flag', label: 'Kareo Data Integrity Risk', previousState: 'No denial tracking anomaly detected', newState: 'DENIED field missing — silent data loss', detail: 'Post-migration schema drift eliminated denial visibility' },
      { type: 'vcp-baseline', label: 'VCP Denial Reduction Initiative', previousState: `Baseline: ${DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.reported}%`, newState: `Baseline: ${DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.actual}%`, detail: 'Addressable opportunity increases with accurate baseline' },
    ],
    dollarImpact: { amount: 1_900_000, description: '$1.9M in addressable revenue from denied claims previously undercounted' },
    vcpBaseline: { value: DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.actual, label: `${DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.actual}% combined denial rate` },
  },

  // 2. Net Collection Rate
  {
    kpiId: 'kpi-net-collection-rate',
    kpiName: 'Net Collection Rate',
    definitionVariants: [
      {
        entityId: 'ce-payment-target',
        entityName: 'Summit (Kareo + AdvancedMD)',

        valueUnderCanonical: 91.8,

      {
        entityId: 'ce-claim-acquirer',
        entityName: 'Alpine (nThrive)',

        sourceFields: ['nthrive_payments.collected', 'nthrive_claims.charged', 'nthrive_adj.contractual', 'nthrive_adj.bad_debt'],
        valueUnderLocal: 96.1,
        valueUnderCanonical: 91.8,
      },
      {
        entityId: 'ce-claim-acquirer',
        entityName: 'Alpine (R1 RCM)',
        definitionText: 'Collections / allowed amount per payer contract',
        sourceFields: ['r1_payments.collected', 'r1_contracts.allowed_amount'],
        valueUnderLocal: 89.3,
        valueUnderCanonical: 91.8,
      },
    ],
    canonicalDefinition: 'Total payments collected / (total charges − contractual adjustments), recognized on ERA receipt date',
    downstreamCascade: [
      { type: 'exhibit', label: 'QoE Exhibit — Collection Efficiency', previousState: 'Ranged 89.3%–96.1% across systems', newState: 'Unified at 91.8%' },
      { type: 'vcp-baseline', label: 'VCP Revenue Cycle Optimization', previousState: 'No consistent baseline', newState: 'Baseline: 91.8%', detail: 'Target: 95% within 18 months' },
    ],
    dollarImpact: { amount: 2_400_000, description: '$2.4M annual revenue recovery from aligning collection methodology' },
    vcpBaseline: { value: 91.8, label: '91.8% combined net collection rate' },
  },

  // 3. Clean Claim Rate
  {
    kpiId: 'kpi-clean-claim-rate',
    kpiName: 'Clean Claim Rate',
    definitionVariants: [
      {
        entityId: 'ce-claim-target',
        entityName: 'Summit (combined)',
        definitionText: 'Claims accepted on first submission without edits or rejections',
        sourceFields: ['claims.submission_count', 'claims.edit_flag', 'claims.rejection_flag'],
        valueUnderLocal: 88.4,
        valueUnderCanonical: 85.1,
      },
      {
        entityId: 'ce-claim-acquirer',
        entityName: 'Alpine (combined)',
        definitionText: 'Claims passing all front-end edits (includes soft-edit overrides as "clean")',
        sourceFields: ['claims.front_end_edit_status', 'claims.override_flag'],
        valueUnderLocal: 92.7,
        valueUnderCanonical: 85.1,
      },
    ],
    canonicalDefinition: 'Claims accepted on first submission with zero edits, rejections, or overrides',
    downstreamCascade: [
      { type: 'exhibit', label: 'QoE Exhibit — Claims Efficiency', previousState: 'Summit 88.4%, Alpine 92.7%', newState: 'Combined 85.1%' },
      { type: 'risk-flag', label: 'Soft-Edit Override Inflation', previousState: 'Alpine reports 92.7%', newState: '85.1% excluding overrides', detail: 'Soft-edit overrides masked rework in Alpine claims workflow' },
      { type: 'vcp-baseline', label: 'VCP Claims Process Improvement', previousState: 'No unified baseline', newState: 'Baseline: 85.1%', detail: 'Target: 93% within 12 months' },
    ],
    dollarImpact: { amount: 820_000, description: '$820K annual savings from reduced rework and resubmissions' },
    vcpBaseline: { value: 85.1, label: '85.1% combined clean claim rate' },
  },

  // 4. Cost per Claim
  {
    kpiId: 'kpi-cost-per-claim',
    kpiName: 'Cost per Claim',
    definitionVariants: [
      {
        entityId: 'ce-claim-target',
        entityName: 'Summit (Kareo)',
        definitionText: 'Total RCM department cost / claims submitted (includes only direct labor)',
        sourceFields: ['gl_expense.rcm_dept', 'kareo_claims.submitted_count'],
        valueUnderLocal: 6.80,
        valueUnderCanonical: 8.45,
      },
      {
        entityId: 'ce-claim-target',
        entityName: 'Summit (AdvancedMD)',
        definitionText: 'RCM vendor fees + internal labor / claims submitted',
        sourceFields: ['amd_invoices.vendor_fee', 'gl_expense.rcm_labor', 'amd_claims.submitted_count'],
        valueUnderLocal: 9.20,
        valueUnderCanonical: 8.45,
      },
      {
        entityId: 'ce-claim-acquirer',
        entityName: 'Alpine (nThrive + R1)',
        definitionText: 'Fully-loaded RCM cost (labor + vendor + technology + overhead) / claims processed',
        sourceFields: ['nthrive_cost.total', 'r1_cost.total', 'claims.processed_count'],
        valueUnderLocal: 8.90,
        valueUnderCanonical: 8.45,
      },
    ],
    canonicalDefinition: 'Total RCM cost (direct labor + vendor fees + allocated technology) / total claims submitted',
    downstreamCascade: [
      { type: 'exhibit', label: 'QoE Exhibit — Operating Cost Analysis', previousState: 'Ranged $6.80–$9.20 per claim', newState: 'Unified at $8.45' },
      { type: 'vcp-baseline', label: 'VCP RCM Consolidation Savings', previousState: 'Inconsistent cost definitions', newState: 'Baseline: $8.45/claim', detail: 'Target: $6.50/claim via platform consolidation' },
    ],
    dollarImpact: { amount: 1_350_000, description: '$1.35M annual savings potential from RCM platform consolidation' },
    vcpBaseline: { value: 8.45, label: '$8.45 combined cost per claim' },
  },

  // 5. Provider Utilization
  {
    kpiId: 'kpi-provider-utilization',
    kpiName: 'Provider Utilization',
    definitionVariants: [
      {
        entityId: 'ce-provider-target',
        entityName: 'Summit (athenahealth)',
        definitionText: 'Total work RVUs billed per provider per calendar month',
        sourceFields: ['athena_encounters.work_rvu_total', 'athena_providers.provider_id'],
        valueUnderLocal: 4_250,
        valueUnderCanonical: 3_820,
      },
      {
        entityId: 'ce-encounter-target',
        entityName: 'Summit (NextGen)',
        definitionText: 'Appointment slots filled / total available slots as percentage',
        sourceFields: ['ng_schedule.slot_status', 'ng_schedule.slot_count'],
        valueUnderLocal: 78.5,
        valueUnderCanonical: 3_820,
      },
      {
        entityId: 'ce-encounter-acquirer',
        entityName: 'Alpine (Epic)',
        definitionText: 'Surgical cases per provider per working day',
        sourceFields: ['epic_or_log.case_count', 'epic_provider.work_days', 'epic_provider.provider_id'],
        valueUnderLocal: 3.2,
        valueUnderCanonical: 3_820,
      },
    ],
    canonicalDefinition: 'Work RVUs billed per provider FTE per calendar month',
    downstreamCascade: [
      { type: 'exhibit', label: 'QoE Exhibit — Physician Productivity', previousState: 'Three incompatible metrics reported', newState: 'Unified at 3,820 wRVUs/provider/month' },
      { type: 'risk-flag', label: 'Provider Capacity Misstatement', previousState: 'NextGen slot-fill suggested 78.5% utilization', newState: '3,820 wRVUs reveals true capacity usage', detail: 'Slot-fill metric inflated by blocked/admin slots' },
      { type: 'vcp-baseline', label: 'VCP Provider Productivity Target', previousState: 'No comparable metric across orgs', newState: 'Baseline: 3,820 wRVUs/FTE/month', detail: 'Target: 4,200 wRVUs — 75th percentile benchmark' },
    ],
    dollarImpact: { amount: 3_200_000, description: '$3.2M revenue opportunity from closing provider utilization gap to 75th percentile' },
    vcpBaseline: { value: 3_820, label: '3,820 wRVUs per FTE per month' },
  },
];
