src/scenarios/summit-ortho/hold-period/validate-thread.ts
```
// Denial Rate Thread validation — ensures all fixture files use DENIAL_RATE_THREAD
// constants and never hardcode denial rate values. Runs at build time when imported.

import { DENIAL_RATE_THREAD } from './_constants';
import { KPI_RECONCILIATIONS } from './integration';
import { PORTFOLIO_HEATMAP, KPI_DRIFT_EVENT } from './vcp';
import { RESOLVED_QUERY_RESULTS, TRAINING_DATASET } from './ai';

function assert(condition: boolean, message: string): void {
  if (!condition) {
    throw new Error(`[Denial Rate Thread] ${message}`);
  }
}

// ── Internal consistency of the thread itself ──

assert(
  DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.reported < DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.actual,
  `Reported rate (${DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.reported}) should be less than actual (${DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.actual})`,
);

assert(
  DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled < DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.actual,
  `Platform reconciled (${DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled}) should be < actual (${DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.actual}) after drift resolution`,
);

assert(
  DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.aiPredictionTarget < DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled,
  `AI prediction target (${DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.aiPredictionTarget}) should be less than current reconciled (${DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled})`,
);

assert(
  DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.perEntityVariants.kareoDrift === 0.0,
  `Kareo post-drift denial rate should be 0.0 (DENIED field removed)`,
);

// ── Cross-fixture: I-3 KPI Reconciliations ──

const denialReconciliation = KPI_RECONCILIATIONS.find(
  (r) => r.kpiId === 'kpi-denial-rate',
);
assert(
  denialReconciliation !== undefined,
  'KPI_RECONCILIATIONS must include a denial-rate reconciliation',
);
assert(
  denialReconciliation!.vcpBaseline.value === DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.actual,
  `I-3 vcpBaseline denial rate (${denialReconciliation!.vcpBaseline.value}) should match DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.actual (${DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.actual})`,
);

// ── Cross-fixture: V-2 Drift Detection post-resolution ──

assert(
  KPI_DRIFT_EVENT.postResolution.platformReconciledRate === DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled,
  `V-2 post-resolution platform rate (${KPI_DRIFT_EVENT.postResolution.platformReconciledRate}) should match platformReconciled (${DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled})`,
);

// ── Cross-fixture: V-3 Portfolio Heatmap ──

const denialHeatmapCells = PORTFOLIO_HEATMAP.filter(
  (c) => c.kpiId === 'kpi-denial-rate',
);
assert(
  denialHeatmapCells.length > 0,
  'V-3 heatmap must include denial-rate cells',
);

// ── Cross-fixture: A-1 Resolved Query Results ──

assert(
  RESOLVED_QUERY_RESULTS.platformAverage === DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled,
  `A-1 resolved platformAverage (${RESOLVED_QUERY_RESULTS.platformAverage}) should match platformReconciled (${DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled})`,
);

// ── Cross-fixture: A-2 Training Dataset ──

assert(
  TRAINING_DATASET.positiveRate === DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled,
  `A-2 training dataset positiveRate (${TRAINING_DATASET.positiveRate}) should match platformReconciled (${DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled})`,
);

// ── Cross-fixture: A-3 prediction target ──

assert(
  DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.aiPredictionTarget === 6.8,
  `AI prediction target should be 6.8, got ${DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.aiPredictionTarget}`,
);

export function validateDenialRateThread(): string[] {
  // All assertions above run at module load time.
  // This function exists for explicit invocation in dev mode.
  return [];
}
```

src/scenarios/summit-ortho/hold-period/vcp.ts
```
import type {
  KPI,
  EBITDABridge,
  TuckInEntity,
  KPIDriftEvent,
  PortfolioHeatmapCell,
  DataRoomExhibit,
  DataRoomConfig,
} from '../../../types/vcp';
import { DENIAL_RATE_THREAD, FRONT_RANGE, ANNOTATION_VELOCITY } from './_constants';

// ── KPIs (24 total: 6 revenue + 6 cost + 6 operational + 6 clinical) ──

export const KPIS: KPI[] = [
  // Revenue (6)
  { id: 'kpi-rev-01', name: 'Net Collection Rate', category: 'revenue', current: 92.3, target: 96.0, unit: '%', trend: 'improving', baselineSource: 'Kareo + AdvancedMD + nThrive' },
  { id: 'kpi-rev-02', name: 'Combined Net Collections', category: 'revenue', current: 210_000_000, target: 228_000_000, unit: '$', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'GL consolidation' },
  { id: 'kpi-rev-03', name: 'Revenue per Provider', category: 'revenue', current: 485_000, target: 540_000, unit: '$', trend: 'improving', baselineSource: 'athenahealth + Epic' },
  { id: 'kpi-rev-04', name: 'Payer Contract Yield', category: 'revenue', current: 78.5, target: 85.0, unit: '%', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'Waystar + R1 RCM' },
  { id: 'kpi-rev-05', name: 'UHC Concentration', category: 'revenue', current: 34.0, target: 28.0, unit: '%', trend: 'declining', baselineSource: 'Unified payer analysis' },
  { id: 'kpi-rev-06', name: 'Same-Store Revenue Growth', category: 'revenue', current: 3.2, target: 6.0, unit: '%', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'GL year-over-year' },

  // Cost (6)
  { id: 'kpi-cost-01', name: 'Cost per Claim', category: 'cost', current: 12.40, target: 8.50, unit: '$', trend: 'improving', baselineSource: 'Kareo + nThrive' },
  { id: 'kpi-cost-02', name: 'A/R Days Outstanding', category: 'cost', current: 42, target: 32, unit: 'days', trend: 'improving', baselineSource: 'AdvancedMD + R1 RCM' },
  { id: 'kpi-cost-03', name: 'IT Cost per Provider', category: 'cost', current: 18_500, target: 14_000, unit: '$', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'Combined IT spend' },
  { id: 'kpi-cost-04', name: 'G&A as % of Revenue', category: 'cost', current: 14.2, target: 11.5, unit: '%', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'GL consolidation' },
  { id: 'kpi-cost-05', name: 'Supply Cost per Case', category: 'cost', current: 2_850, target: 2_400, unit: '$', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'GL + purchase orders' },
  { id: 'kpi-cost-06', name: 'Billing Staff per Provider', category: 'cost', current: 1.8, target: 1.2, unit: 'ratio', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'ADP + Workday headcount' },

  // Operational (6)
  { id: 'kpi-denial-rate', name: 'Denial Rate', category: 'operational', current: 11.7, target: 6.0, unit: '%', trend: 'improving', baselineSource: 'Waystar + AdvancedMD + nThrive' },
  { id: 'kpi-ops-02', name: 'Clean Claim Rate', category: 'operational', current: 82.0, target: 92.0, unit: '%', trend: 'improving', baselineSource: 'Kareo + R1 RCM' },
  { id: 'kpi-ops-03', name: 'Days to Credentialing', category: 'operational', current: 68, target: 35, unit: 'days', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'Salesforce Health Cloud' },
  { id: 'kpi-ops-04', name: 'Patient No-Show Rate', category: 'operational', current: 14.5, target: 8.0, unit: '%', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'athenahealth + eClinicalWorks + Epic' },
  { id: 'kpi-ops-05', name: 'Authorization Turnaround', category: 'operational', current: 5.2, target: 2.0, unit: 'days', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'Waystar + R1 RCM' },
  { id: 'kpi-ops-06', name: 'Charge Lag (days)', category: 'operational', current: 3.8, target: 1.5, unit: 'days', trend: 'improving', baselineSource: 'athenahealth + NextGen + Epic' },

  // Clinical (6)
  { id: 'kpi-clin-01', name: 'Patient Satisfaction (NPS)', category: 'clinical', current: 62, target: 78, unit: 'score', trend: 'improving', baselineSource: 'Press Ganey surveys' },
  { id: 'kpi-clin-02', name: 'Surgical Complication Rate', category: 'clinical', current: 2.8, target: 1.5, unit: '%', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'EHR clinical registry' },
  { id: 'kpi-clin-03', name: 'Avg Wait-to-Appointment', category: 'clinical', current: 18, target: 10, unit: 'days', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'athenahealth + Epic scheduling' },
  { id: 'kpi-clin-04', name: 'Documentation Completeness', category: 'clinical', current: 76, target: 95, unit: '%', trend: 'improving', baselineSource: 'EHR audit logs' },
  { id: 'kpi-clin-05', name: 'Readmission Rate (30-day)', category: 'clinical', current: 4.2, target: 2.5, unit: '%', trend: 'flat', baselineSource: 'Claims + EHR discharge' },
  { id: 'kpi-clin-06', name: 'Quality Measure Compliance', category: 'clinical', current: 71, target: 90, unit: '%', trend: 'improving', baselineSource: 'MIPS registry data' },
];

// ── EBITDA Bridge (waterfall from base to $28M target) ──

export const EBITDA_BRIDGE: EBITDABridge[] = [
  { label: 'Current Combined EBITDA', value: 31_000_000, type: 'base' },
  { label: 'Revenue Cycle Consolidation', value: 5_200_000, type: 'add', initiativeId: 'init-01' },
  { label: 'Denial Rate Reduction', value: 3_800_000, type: 'add', initiativeId: 'init-02' },
  { label: 'Payer Contract Renegotiation', value: 4_500_000, type: 'add', initiativeId: 'init-03' },
  { label: 'Provider Productivity', value: 2_800_000, type: 'add', initiativeId: 'init-04' },
  { label: 'G&A Consolidation', value: 3_200_000, type: 'add', initiativeId: 'init-05' },
  { label: 'IT Rationalization', value: 2_100_000, type: 'add', initiativeId: 'init-06' },
  { label: 'Supply Chain Savings', value: 1_600_000, type: 'add', initiativeId: 'init-07' },
  { label: 'Patient Access & Ops', value: 2_700_000, type: 'add', initiativeId: 'init-08' },
  { label: 'Clinical Improvement', value: 2_100_000, type: 'add', initiativeId: 'init-11' },
  { label: 'Integration Costs', value: -8_500_000, type: 'subtract' },
  { label: 'Stranded Costs / Dis-synergies', value: -3_500_000, type: 'subtract' },
  { label: 'Target EBITDA (Year 3)', value: 59_000_000, type: 'total' },
];

// ── Tuck-In Entity: Front Range Physical Therapy (Entity 15) ──

export const TUCK_IN_ENTITY: TuckInEntity = {
  name: FRONT_RANGE.name,
  sites: FRONT_RANGE.sites,
  systems: [...FRONT_RANGE.systems],
  tables: FRONT_RANGE.tables,
  fields: FRONT_RANGE.fields,
  annotationResults: {
    totalFields: FRONT_RANGE.fields,
    autoAccepted: 3_891,
    autoAcceptRate: ANNOTATION_VELOCITY.frontRange,
    highConfidence: 312,
    needsReview: 44,
  },
  kpiMappings: [
    // Auto-mapped (21)
    { kpiId: 'kpi-rev-01', kpiName: 'Net Collection Rate', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'collections.net_collected_amt / charges.total_billed_amt' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-rev-02', kpiName: 'Combined Net Collections', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'collections.net_collected_amt' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-rev-03', kpiName: 'Revenue per Provider', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'collections.net_collected_amt / providers.active_count' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-rev-04', kpiName: 'Payer Contract Yield', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'payments.allowed_amt / charges.total_billed_amt' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-rev-05', kpiName: 'UHC Concentration', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'payments.payer_id = UHC / payments.total' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-rev-06', kpiName: 'Same-Store Revenue Growth', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'collections.net_collected_amt YoY' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-cost-01', kpiName: 'Cost per Claim', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'billing_costs.total / claims.submitted_count' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-cost-02', kpiName: 'A/R Days Outstanding', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'ar_aging.average_days' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-cost-03', kpiName: 'IT Cost per Provider', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'it_expenses.total / providers.active_count' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-cost-04', kpiName: 'G&A as % of Revenue', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'gl_expenses.ga_total / collections.net_collected_amt' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-cost-05', kpiName: 'Supply Cost per Case', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'supply_orders.total_cost / encounters.case_count' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-cost-06', kpiName: 'Billing Staff per Provider', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'staff.billing_headcount / providers.active_count' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-ops-02', kpiName: 'Clean Claim Rate', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'claims.clean_count / claims.submitted_count' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-ops-03', kpiName: 'Days to Credentialing', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'credentialing.avg_days_to_complete' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-ops-04', kpiName: 'Patient No-Show Rate', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'appointments.no_show_count / appointments.scheduled_count' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-ops-05', kpiName: 'Authorization Turnaround', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'prior_auth.avg_turnaround_days' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-ops-06', kpiName: 'Charge Lag (days)', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'charges.avg_days_to_entry' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-clin-01', kpiName: 'Patient Satisfaction (NPS)', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'surveys.nps_score' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-clin-02', kpiName: 'Surgical Complication Rate', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'outcomes.complication_count / encounters.surgical_count' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-clin-04', kpiName: 'Documentation Completeness', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'ehr_audit.complete_pct' },
    { kpiId: 'kpi-clin-05', kpiName: 'Readmission Rate (30-day)', status: 'auto-mapped', sourceField: 'encounters.readmit_30d_count / encounters.discharge_count' },
    // Flagged (3)
    {
      kpiId: 'kpi-clin-03', kpiName: 'Provider Utilization', status: 'flagged',
      flagReason: 'DrChrono tracks "appointment slots filled" not wRVUs — different productivity concept',
      sourceField: 'appointments.slots_filled_pct',
    },
    {
      kpiId: 'kpi-denial-rate', kpiName: 'Denial Rate', status: 'flagged',
      flagReason: `Different categorization scheme — Front Range reports ${DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.frontRange}% using a narrower denial definition`,
      sourceField: 'claims.denied_count / claims.adjudicated_count',
    },
    {
      kpiId: 'kpi-clin-06', kpiName: 'Patient Acuity Mix', status: 'flagged',
      flagReason: 'No equivalent concept in DrChrono — PT practices do not track acuity the same way as orthopedic surgery',
    },
  ],
  entityMatches: [
    {
      matchedEntityName: 'United Healthcare (UHC)',
      matchType: 'auto-merge',
      confidence: 'high',
      reason: 'Payer ID, TIN, and contract terms match existing UHC entity across all platforms',
    },
    {
      matchedEntityName: 'Dr. Sarah Mitchell (Referring Provider)',
      matchType: 'flagged',
      confidence: 'medium',
      reason: 'NPI matches Summit Site 3 referring provider but name differs slightly — "S. Mitchell MD" vs "Sarah Mitchell DO"',
    },
    {
      matchedEntityName: 'Rocky Mountain Orthopedics (Referring Provider)',
      matchType: 'flagged',
      confidence: 'medium',
      reason: 'Organization NPI matches but DrChrono uses practice group name while Summit EHRs use individual provider names',
    },
  ],
  processingSteps: [
    { label: 'Connecting to DrChrono & CollaborateMD', durationMs: 1_800 },
    { label: 'Ingesting 18 tables, 4,247 fields', durationMs: 2_400 },
    { label: 'Running annotation model (91.6% auto-accept)', durationMs: 3_200 },
    { label: 'Mapping to 24 portfolio KPIs', durationMs: 2_000 },
    { label: 'Matching entities across platform', durationMs: 1_600 },
    { label: 'Generating tuck-in integration report', durationMs: 1_200 },
  ],
};

// ── KPI Drift Event: Kareo Schema Change ──

export const KPI_DRIFT_EVENT: KPIDriftEvent = {
  systemName: 'Kareo',
  detectedAt: '2 hours ago',
  affectedEntityIds: ['entity-2', 'entity-4', 'entity-9'],
  schemaDiff: [
    {
      field: 'claim_status',
      changeType: 'enum-modified',
      before: 'APPROVED | DENIED | PENDING',
      after: 'APPROVED | INITIAL_DENIAL | PARTIAL_DENIAL | PENDING',
      detail: 'DENIED value split into INITIAL_DENIAL and PARTIAL_DENIAL — downstream consumers expecting "DENIED" will match zero rows',
    },
    {
      field: 'denial_subcategory',
      changeType: 'field-added',
      after: 'CLINICAL | ADMINISTRATIVE | TECHNICAL',
      detail: 'New categorical field added to claims table — enriches denial analysis but has no existing annotation',
    },
    {
      field: 'adjustment_code',
      changeType: 'enum-extended',
      before: 'CO-45, CO-50, PR-2, OA-18 (+ 12 others)',
      after: 'CO-45, CO-50, PR-2, OA-18, CO-4, PR-1, OA-23 (+ 12 others)',
      detail: 'Three new adjustment codes added: CO-4 (procedure not consistent with modifier), PR-1 (deductible), OA-23 (impact of prior payer adjudication)',
    },
  ],
  kpiImpacts: [
    {
      kpiName: 'Denial Rate',
      severity: 'breaking',
      detail: 'Denial rate drops to 0% — DENIED enum value no longer exists in claim_status, all denial-counting queries return zero',
      brokenValue: DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.perEntityVariants.kareoDrift,
      correctedValues: { ...DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.postDriftPerEntity },
    },
    {
      kpiName: 'Clean Claim Rate',
      severity: 'potential',
      detail: 'New denial subcategories may affect clean claim classification — need to verify CLINICAL vs ADMINISTRATIVE denial handling',
    },
    {
      kpiName: 'Cost per Claim',
      severity: 'none',
      detail: 'New adjustment codes do not affect cost calculation — adjustment amounts are already summed regardless of code',
    },
  ],
  resolutionMappings: [
    {
      sourceValue: 'INITIAL_DENIAL',
      canonicalValue: 'Denied',
      confidence: 'high',
      reasoning: 'INITIAL_DENIAL is the direct successor to the previous DENIED value — same business meaning, finer granularity',
      needsReview: false,
    },
    {
      sourceValue: 'PARTIAL_DENIAL',
      canonicalValue: 'Denied',
      confidence: 'medium',
      reasoning: 'PARTIAL_DENIAL is a subset of denials but may warrant separate tracking — mapped to Denied for continuity, flagged for review',
      needsReview: true,
    },
    {
      sourceValue: 'denial_subcategory',
      canonicalValue: 'New concept: Denial Subcategory',
      confidence: 'high',
      reasoning: 'New field with no existing mapping — auto-created as new concept under Denial hierarchy with CLINICAL/ADMINISTRATIVE/TECHNICAL values',
      needsReview: false,
    },
    {
      sourceValue: 'CO-4, PR-1, OA-23',
      canonicalValue: 'Adjustment Reason (existing concept)',
      confidence: 'high',
      reasoning: 'New enum values map directly to existing Adjustment Reason concept — standard CARC/RARC codes with well-defined meanings',
      needsReview: false,
    },
  ],
  postResolution: {
    platformReconciledRate: DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.platformReconciled,
    annotationsFlaggedForReview: 1,
    exhibitsRegenerated: ['Denial Rate Trends', 'Clean Claim Summary', 'RCM Performance Dashboard'],
  },
};

// ── Portfolio Heatmap: 15 entities x 6 KPIs = 90 cells ──

interface HeatmapKpiDef {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  target: number;
  lowerIsBetter: boolean;
}

const HEATMAP_KPIS: HeatmapKpiDef[] = [
  { id: 'kpi-denial-rate', name: 'Denial Rate', target: 6.0, lowerIsBetter: true },
  { id: 'kpi-rev-01', name: 'Net Collection Rate', target: 96.0, lowerIsBetter: false },
  { id: 'kpi-ops-02', name: 'Clean Claim Rate', target: 92.0, lowerIsBetter: false },
  { id: 'kpi-cost-01', name: 'Cost per Claim', target: 8.50, lowerIsBetter: true },
  { id: 'kpi-rev-03', name: 'Revenue per Provider', target: 540_000, lowerIsBetter: false },
  { id: 'kpi-clin-01', name: 'Patient Satisfaction', target: 78, lowerIsBetter: false },
];

interface HeatmapEntityDef {
  id: string;
  name: string;
}

const HEATMAP_ENTITIES: HeatmapEntityDef[] = [
  { id: 'entity-1', name: 'Summit Site 1' },
  { id: 'entity-2', name: 'Summit Site 2' },
  { id: 'entity-3', name: 'Summit Site 3' },

  { id: 'entity-12', name: 'Alpine Site 4' },
  { id: 'entity-13', name: 'Alpine Site 5' },
  { id: 'entity-14', name: 'Alpine Site 6' },
  { id: 'entity-15', name: 'Front Range PT' },
];

const DRIFT_RESOLVED_IDS = new Set(['entity-2', 'entity-4', 'entity-9']);

// Raw heatmap values: pairs of [value, baseline] for each of 6 KPIs per entity
const HEATMAP_RAW: Record<string, number[]> = {
  'entity-1':  [10.2, 12.8, 93.4, 91.2, 85.0, 80.1, 11.20, 13.50, 502_000, 478_000, 68, 61],
  'entity-2':  [DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.postDriftPerEntity.E2, 13.1, 94.1, 90.8, 84.2, 79.5, 10.80, 12.90, 510_000, 482_000, 65, 59],
  'entity-3':  [11.5, 13.5, 91.8, 90.0, 81.3, 78.2, 12.60, 14.10, 475_000, 462_000, 71, 64],
  'entity-4':  [DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.postDriftPerEntity.E4, 12.4, 93.8, 91.5, 86.1, 81.0, 10.50, 12.20, 525_000, 498_000, 66, 60],
  'entity-5':  [12.3, 14.0, 90.5, 89.1, 79.8, 76.5, 13.10, 14.80, 468_000, 455_000, 58, 55],
  'entity-6':  [9.8, 11.9, 94.7, 92.0, 87.2, 82.3, 9.80, 11.90, 548_000, 520_000, 73, 67],
  'entity-7':  [11.1, 13.0, 92.2, 90.4, 83.5, 79.8, 11.90, 13.70, 490_000, 472_000, 64, 58],
  'entity-8':  [13.4, 15.2, 89.3, 87.5, 77.1, 74.0, 14.20, 15.60, 445_000, 430_000, 56, 53],
  'entity-9':  [DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.postDriftPerEntity.E9, 13.8, 92.6, 90.2, 83.8, 80.1, 11.40, 13.30, 498_000, 475_000, 62, 57],
  'entity-10': [8.5, 10.2, 95.2, 93.8, 89.4, 85.6, 8.90, 10.40, 562_000, 545_000, 76, 72],
  'entity-11': [9.1, 11.0, 94.5, 92.9, 88.0, 84.2, 9.40, 11.10, 538_000, 518_000, 74, 69],
  'entity-12': [10.8, 12.5, 93.0, 91.4, 85.6, 81.5, 10.70, 12.60, 515_000, 495_000, 69, 63],
  'entity-13': [7.9, 9.8, 95.8, 94.1, 90.2, 86.8, 8.20, 9.80, 570_000, 555_000, 77, 73],
  'entity-14': [11.6, 13.3, 91.4, 89.8, 82.1, 78.9, 12.30, 14.00, 480_000, 465_000, 61, 56],
  'entity-15': [DENIAL_RATE_THREAD.frontRange, 9.4, 91.0, 91.0, 80.5, 80.5, 13.80, 13.80, 420_000, 420_000, 60, 60],
};

function computeHeatmapStatus(
  value: number,
  target: number,
  lowerIsBetter: boolean,
): 'green' | 'yellow' | 'red' {
  const pctToTarget = lowerIsBetter
    ? (target - value) / target
    : (value - target) / target;
  if (pctToTarget >= -0.05) return 'green';
  if (pctToTarget >= -0.20) return 'yellow';
  return 'red';
}

function computeHeatmapTrend(value: number, baseline: number, lowerIsBetter: boolean): 'up' | 'down' | 'flat' {
  const delta = value - baseline;
  const threshold = Math.abs(baseline) < 1 ? 0.01 : 0.01 * Math.abs(baseline);
  if (Math.abs(delta) < threshold) return 'flat';
  if (lowerIsBetter) return delta < 0 ? 'up' : 'down';
  return delta > 0 ? 'up' : 'down';
}

export const PORTFOLIO_HEATMAP: PortfolioHeatmapCell[] = (() => {
  const cells: PortfolioHeatmapCell[] = [];

  for (const entity of HEATMAP_ENTITIES) {
    const raw = HEATMAP_RAW[entity.id];
    for (let k = 0; k < HEATMAP_KPIS.length; k++) {
      const kpi = HEATMAP_KPIS[k];
      const value = raw[k * 2];
      const baseline = raw[k * 2 + 1];

      const badges: ('new' | 'drift-resolved')[] = [];
      if (entity.id === 'entity-15') badges.push('new');
      if (DRIFT_RESOLVED_IDS.has(entity.id)) badges.push('drift-resolved');

      cells.push({
        entityId: entity.id,
        entityName: entity.name,
        kpiId: kpi.id,
        kpiName: kpi.name,
        value,
        baseline,
        target: kpi.target,
        trend: computeHeatmapTrend(value, baseline, kpi.lowerIsBetter),
        status: computeHeatmapStatus(value, kpi.target, kpi.lowerIsBetter),
        badges,
      });
    }
  }

  return cells;
})();

  | { type: 'key-value'; entries: { label: string; value: string }[] };

      { label: 'Last Certified', value: 'Pending generation' },
    ],
  },
  'exhibit-10': {

src/screens/nav-migration/components/DimensionSetCard.tsx
```
import type { DimensionSetExplosion } from '../../../scenarios/nav-migration/types';

interface DimensionSetCardProps {
  dimensionSet: DimensionSetExplosion;
}

export default function DimensionSetCard({ dimensionSet }: DimensionSetCardProps) {
  const borderColor = dimensionSet.isComplete ? 'border-blue-300' : 'border-amber-300';
  const headerBg = dimensionSet.isComplete ? 'bg-blue-50' : 'bg-amber-50';

  return (
    <div className={`border ${borderColor} rounded-lg overflow-hidden`}>
      {/* Header */}
      <div className={`${headerBg} px-4 py-3 flex items-center justify-between`}>
        <div>
          <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">
            Dimension Set ID: {dimensionSet.dimensionSetId}
          </span>
          {!dimensionSet.isComplete && (
            <span className="ml-2 text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded bg-amber-200 text-amber-800">
              Incomplete
            </span>
          )}
        </div>
        <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">
          Referenced by {dimensionSet.referenceCount} records
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* Dimension entries table */}
      <table className="w-full text-sm">
        <thead className="bg-gray-50">
          <tr>
            <th className="text-left px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Dimension Code</th>
            <th className="text-left px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Value Code</th>
            <th className="text-left px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase">Value Name</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          {dimensionSet.entries.map((entry) => (
            <tr key={entry.code} className="border-t border-gray-100">
              <td className="px-4 py-2 font-mono text-xs text-gray-700">{entry.code}</td>
              <td className="px-4 py-2 font-mono text-xs text-gray-600">{entry.valueCode}</td>
              <td className="px-4 py-2 text-gray-600">{entry.valueName}</td>
            </tr>
          ))}
          {/* Show missing entries for incomplete sets */}
          {!dimensionSet.isComplete && dimensionSet.suggestedMappings && (
            dimensionSet.suggestedMappings.map((m) => (
              <tr key={m.code} className="border-t border-gray-100 bg-amber-50/50">
                <td className="px-4 py-2 font-mono text-xs text-amber-600 italic">{m.code}</td>
                <td className="px-4 py-2 text-xs text-gray-400 italic">—</td>
                <td className="px-4 py-2 text-xs text-amber-500 italic">(missing)</td>
              </tr>
            ))
          )}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/screens/nav-migration/components/GateStatusBadge.tsx
```
import type { GateStatus } from '../../../scenarios/nav-migration/types';

const STATUS_STYLES: Record<GateStatus, string> = {
  pass: 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700',
  warn: 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700',
  fail: 'bg-red-100 text-red-700',
};

const STATUS_LABELS: Record<GateStatus, string> = {
  pass: 'PASS',
  warn: 'WARN',
  fail: 'FAIL',
};

export default function GateStatusBadge({ status }: { status: GateStatus }) {
  return (
    <span className={`text-xs font-medium px-2 py-0.5 rounded ${STATUS_STYLES[status]}`}>
      {STATUS_LABELS[status]}
    </span>
  );
}
```

src/screens/nav-migration/components/TieOutRow.tsx
```
import { ChevronDown, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
import type { TieOutGate } from '../../../scenarios/nav-migration/types';
import GateStatusBadge from './GateStatusBadge';

interface TieOutRowProps {
  gate: TieOutGate;
  expanded: boolean;
  onExpand: () => void;
}

export default function TieOutRow({ gate, expanded, onExpand }: TieOutRowProps) {
  return (
    <div className="border-b border-gray-100 last:border-0">
      <button
        type="button"
        onClick={onExpand}
        className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-left hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer"
      >
        {expanded ? (
          <ChevronDown size={14} className="text-gray-400 shrink-0" />
        ) : (
          <ChevronRight size={14} className="text-gray-400 shrink-0" />
        )}
        <span className="flex-1 text-sm text-gray-700">{gate.description}</span>
        <GateStatusBadge status={gate.status} />
        <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 w-36 text-right">{gate.detail}</span>
      </button>

      {expanded && (
        <div className="px-4 pb-4 pl-10 bg-gray-50/50">
          {gate.expandedDetail && (
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-3">{gate.expandedDetail}</p>
          )}
          {gate.drillDownItems && gate.drillDownItems.length > 0 && (
            <div className="border border-gray-200 rounded bg-white text-xs">
              {gate.drillDownItems.map((item, i) => (
                <div key={i} className="flex justify-between px-3 py-2 border-b border-gray-50 last:border-0">
                  <span className="text-gray-700">{item.description}</span>
                  {item.amount !== 0 && (
                    <span className="font-mono text-gray-600">
                      ${item.amount.toLocaleString()}
                    </span>
                  )}
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
          {gate.financialImpact != null && gate.financialImpact > 0 && (
            <p className="text-xs text-amber-600 mt-2">
              Estimated impact: ${gate.financialImpact.toLocaleString()}
            </p>
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
```

</source_code>
